Attribute VB_Name = "Informes"
Dim RS1 As New ADODB.Recordset, RS2 As New ADODB.Recordset, RS3 As New ADODB.Recordset, RS4 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim inf_nreceta As String, cdetalle As String, opcionsalto As String
Dim inf_opcion As Integer

Public Function I_Ajuste(Bodega As String, Fecha As String)
Dim i As Long, codbod As Long, nombod As String, totfam As Double, totgrl As Double
codbod = Trim(Mid(Bodega, 1, InStr(1, Bodega, "|") - 1))
nombod = Trim(Mid(Bodega, InStr(1, Bodega, "|") + 1, Len(Bodega)))
On Local Error GoTo Error_Ajustes
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Ajustes"
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Ajuste de Inventario"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1, 2, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 2) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Bodega": .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = nombod
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Toma de Inventario": .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Fecha
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 6: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 2100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Unidad"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Diferencia"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Precio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Total"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    Dim opfampro As String, estfpro As Boolean, codtip As Long
    opfampro = IIf(0 = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("opfampro"), ";", "','")), " ORDER BY dev.dev_numlin", " ORDER BY pro.pro_ctacon, pro.pro_codtip, pro.pro_nombre")
    estfpro = IIf(0 = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("opfampro"), ";", "','")), False, True)
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       RS2.Open "SELECT dev.dev_codmer, pro.pro_nombre, pro.pro_codtip, pro.pro_ctacon, dev.dev_precos, uni.uni_nombre, dev.dev_canmer, aju.aju_tipo " & _
                "FROM b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro, a_unidad uni, a_tipoajuste aju " & _
                "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc AND tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc " & _
                "AND   pro.pro_codigo = dev.dev_codmer AND uni.uni_codigo = pro.pro_coduni " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_codser = aju.aju_codigo " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_fecemi = Cdate('" & Fecha & "') AND tov_codbod = " & codbod & " AND tov.tov_tipdoc = 'AI' " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & opfampro & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Else
       RS2.Open "SELECT dev.dev_codmer, pro.pro_nombre, pro.pro_codtip, pro.pro_ctacon, dev.dev_precos, uni.uni_nombre, dev.dev_canmer, aju.aju_tipo " & _
                "FROM b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro, a_unidad uni, a_tipoajuste aju " & _
                "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc AND tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc " & _
                "AND   pro.pro_codigo = dev.dev_codmer AND uni.uni_codigo = pro.pro_coduni " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_codser = aju.aju_codigo " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_fecemi = '" & Format(Fecha, "yyyymmdd") & "' AND tov_codbod = " & codbod & " AND tov.tov_tipdoc = 'AI' " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & opfampro & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    End If
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 6: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 2100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    i = 1: codtip = 0: totfam = 0: totgrl = 0
    Do While Not RS2.EOF
       If RS2!pro_codtip <> codtip And estfpro Then
          If codtip > 0 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total Familia ": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(totfam, fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 6) = True
             totfam = 0
             i = i + 1
          End If
          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 5
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = fg_BuscaenArbol(RS2!pro_codtip, "a_tipopro", "tip_codigo")
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
          i = i + 1
          codtip = RS2!pro_codtip
       End If
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS2!dev_codmer
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS2!pro_nombre
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = RS2!uni_nombre
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(IIf(RS2!aju_tipo = "A", RS2!dev_canmer, (RS2!dev_canmer * -1)), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS2!dev_precos, fg_Pict(9, 2)) 'vg_DCa))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(RS2!dev_precos * IIf(RS2!aju_tipo = "A", RS2!dev_canmer, (RS2!dev_canmer * -1)), fg_Pict(9, 2)) 'vg_DCa))
       totfam = totfam + RS2!dev_precos * IIf(RS2!aju_tipo = "A", RS2!dev_canmer, (RS2!dev_canmer * -1))
       totgrl = totgrl + RS2!dev_precos * IIf(RS2!aju_tipo = "A", RS2!dev_canmer, (RS2!dev_canmer * -1))
       RS2.MoveNext: i = i + 1
    Loop
    RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total Familia ": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(totfam, fg_Pict(9, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 6) = True
    totfam = 0
    i = i + 2
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total General ": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(totgrl, fg_Pict(9, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 6) = True
    totgrl = 0
    i = i + 1
    
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i - 1
    '.PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_Ajustes:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Sub I_TipoDocumento()
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_TipoDocumento
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Tipo de Documento"
Preview.Show
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    LogoEmp
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Tipo Documento"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.TipoDocumento(1, "", ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Sub
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Nombre"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Clase Documento"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Orden"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
    i = 1
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!tdo_codigo)
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!tdo_nombre)
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!tdo_cladoc)
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!tdo_orden), "", Trim(RS1!tdo_orden))
        Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4)
        RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Exit Sub
Error_TipoDocumento:
     MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
     Close #1
     Exit Sub
End Sub

Sub I_ClaseDocumentoSAP()
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, coddoc As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_ClaseDocumentoSAP
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Calse Documento SAP"
Preview.Show
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    LogoEmp
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Clase Documento SAP"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tdo_codigo, a.tdo_nombre, b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, c.cds_cdosap " & _
             "FROM   a_tipodocumento a, a_region b, a_clasedocsap c " & _
             "Where  c.cds_coddoc = a.tdo_codigo " & _
             "AND    c.cds_codreg = b.reg_codigo " & _
             "ORDER BY c.cds_coddoc, c.cds_codreg", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Sub
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Nombre"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Clase Doc. SAP"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = ""
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
    i = 1: coddoc = ""
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
        If coddoc <> RS1!tdo_codigo Then
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!tdo_codigo)
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!tdo_nombre)
           coddoc = RS1!tdo_codigo
           i = i + 1
        End If
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!reg_codigo)
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!reg_nombre)
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!cds_cdosap)
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
        Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4)
        RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Exit Sub
Error_ClaseDocumentoSAP:
     MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
     Close #1
     Exit Sub
End Sub

Public Function I_Clientes()
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_Clientes
fg_carga ""
mgstitulo = "Informe de Clientes"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape 'orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Maestro Clientes"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_clientes WHERE cli_tipo = 1 ORDER BY cli_codigo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 11: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Dirección"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Comuna"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Ciudad"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Fono 1"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Fono 2"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Fax"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = "Contacto"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) = "Giro"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11) = "E-Mail"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & _
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) & "|" & _
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 11: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taLeftTop
    i = 1
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!cli_nombre
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = fg_PintaRut(RS1!cli_codigo)
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = RS1!cli_direccion
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = RS1!cli_comuna
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = RS1!cli_ciudad
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = RS1!cli_fono1
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = RS1!cli_fono2
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = RS1!cli_fax
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = RS1!cli_percon
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) = RS1!cli_giro
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 11) = RS1!cli_email
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & _
                      .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) & "|" & _
                      .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 11)
            RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
        Loop
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_Clientes:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_Pacientes()
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_Pacientes
fg_carga ""
mgstitulo = "Informe de Pacientes"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape 'orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Maestro Pacientes"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open "SELECT b_pacientes.*, a_grupopaciente.grp_nombre, a_regimen.reg_nombre " & _
             "FROM (a_grupopaciente RIGHT JOIN b_pacientes ON a_grupopaciente.grp_codigo = b_pacientes.pac_codgrp) " & _
             "LEFT JOIN a_regimen ON b_pacientes.pac_codreg = a_regimen.reg_codigo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 14: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 12) = 1400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 12) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 13) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 13) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 14) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 14) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Departamento"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Cama"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Rut"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Bloqueado"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Ap.Paterno"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Ap.Materno"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Nombre"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Sexo"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = "Régimen"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) = "Fecha Ing."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11) = "Fecha Alt."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 12) = "Prescripción Dietetica"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 13) = "Comentario"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 14) = "Origen"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & _
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) & "|" & _
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 12) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 13) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 14)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 14: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 12) = 1400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 12) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 13) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 13) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 14) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 14) = taLeftTop
    i = 1
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!grp_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!grp_nombre))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!pac_nrocam), "", Trim(RS1!pac_nrocam))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!pac_codigo), "", fg_PintaRut(RS1!pac_codigo))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!pac_estado), "", IIf(RS1!pac_estado = "A", "Activo", "Bloqueado"))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!pac_appaterno), "", Trim(RS1!pac_appaterno))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!pac_apmaterno), "", Trim(RS1!pac_apmaterno))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!pac_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!pac_nombre))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!pac_sexo), "", IIf(RS1!pac_sexo = "M", "Masculino", "Femenino"))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!reg_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!reg_nombre))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!pac_fecing), "", Trim(RS1!pac_fecing))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 11) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!pac_fecalt), "", Trim(RS1!pac_fecalt))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 12) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!pac_presdiet), "", Trim(RS1!pac_presdiet))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 13) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!pac_comentario), "", Trim(RS1!pac_comentario))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 14) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!pac_origen), "", Trim(RS1!pac_origen))
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & _
                      .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) & "|" & _
                      .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 11) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 12) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 13) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 14)
            RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
        Loop
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_Pacientes:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_ClienteCencos()
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxrut As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_Clientecencos
fg_carga ""
mgstitulo = "Informe de Clientes Centro Costo"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Maestro Clientes Centro Costo"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.clc_codigo, a.clc_codcli, a.clc_nombre, b.cli_nombre FROM b_clientecencos a, b_clientes b WHERE a.clc_codcli = b.cli_codigo ORDER BY a.clc_codcli, a.clc_codigo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 5800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Nombre"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 5800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    i = 1: auxrut = ""
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
           If RS1!clc_codcli <> auxcli Then
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = fg_PintaRut(RS1!clc_codcli)
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2)
              i = i + 1
              auxcli = RS1!clc_codcli
           End If
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "  " & Trim(RS1!clc_codigo)
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "  " & Trim(RS1!clc_nombre)
           Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2)
           RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
        Loop
    Else
       i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_Clientecencos:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

On Local Error GoTo Error_SucursalCliente
fg_carga ""
mgstitulo = "Informe de Clientes Sucursal SAP"

    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Maestro Clientes Sucursal SAP"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.scl_codigo, a.scl_codcli, a.scl_direccion, b.cli_nombre FROM b_sucursalcliente a, b_clientes b WHERE a.scl_codcli=b.cli_codigo ORDER BY a.scl_codcli, a.scl_codigo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 6800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Dirección"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 6800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    i = 1: auxrut = ""
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
           If RS1!scl_codcli <> auxcli Then
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = fg_PintaRut(RS1!scl_codcli)
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2)
              i = i + 1
              auxcli = RS1!scl_codcli
           End If
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "  " & Trim(RS1!scl_codigo)
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "  " & Trim(RS1!scl_direccion)
           Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2)
           RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
        Loop
    Else
       i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_SucursalCliente:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_Contratos()
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_Contratos
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Contratos"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .FontSize = 8
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Maestro Contratos"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_clientes WHERE cli_tipo=0 OR cli_tipo = 2 ORDER BY cli_codigo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 12: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 12) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 12) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Dirección"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Comuna"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Ciudad"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Fono 1"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Fono 2"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Fax"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = "Contacto"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) = "Giro"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11) = "E-Mail"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 12) = "Tipo"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & _
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) & "|" & _
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 12)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 12: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 12) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 12) = taLeftTop
    i = 1
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!cli_nombre))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!cli_codigo
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_direccion), "", Trim(RS1!cli_direccion))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_comuna), "", Trim(RS1!cli_comuna))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_ciudad), "", Trim(RS1!cli_ciudad))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_fono1), "", Trim(RS1!cli_fono1))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_fono2), "", Trim(RS1!cli_fono2))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_fax), "", Trim(RS1!cli_fax))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_percon), "", Trim(RS1!cli_percon))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_giro), "", Trim(RS1!cli_giro))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 11) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_email), "", Trim(RS1!cli_email))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 12) = IIf(RS1!cli_tipo = 0, "Operador", "Traspaso")
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & _
                      .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) & "|" & _
                      .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 11) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 12)
            RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
        Loop
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_Contratos:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_Pedidos(cencos As String, Fecha As Long, opcion As Integer)
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, inding As Long, codpre As Long, fecdes As Long
Dim proc1 As String, proc2 As String, proc3 As String, codtip As String, ustock As String
Dim reqtot As Double, Stock As Double, proped As Double, aAp1   As String, aAp2 As String
Dim etapa5 As Boolean
On Local Error GoTo Error_Pedidos
fg_carga ""
etapa5 = IIf("S" = fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("5etapas"), ";", "','"), True, False)
MsgTitulo = "Pedidos Mensual"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Pedidos Mensual " & Mid(Fecha, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(Fecha, 1, 4)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = RS1!cli_nombre
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
'    vg_db.Execute "SELECT DISTINCT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_fecdia, ppd_propon, ppd_saldo INTO " & aAp2 & " FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & ""
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       '-------> Insert tabla productospmpdia
       aAp2 = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ProductoPMPInfPedidos"
       fg_CheckTmp aAp2
       vg_db.Execute "SELECT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, 0 AS ppd_propon, Max(ppd_fecdia) AS ppd_fecdia " & _
                     "INTO " & aAp2 & " " & _
                     "FROM b_productospmpdia " & _
                     "WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                     "AND   ppd_fecdia >= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_fecdia <= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia), "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                     "AND   ppd_propon>0 " & _
                     "GROUP BY ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro"
       vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp2 & " ADD Constraint pmp_pk Primary Key (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_fecdia)"
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp2 & " INNER JOIN b_productospmpdia ON (" & aAp2 & ".ppd_fecdia = b_productospmpdia.ppd_fecdia) AND (" & aAp2 & ".ppd_codpro = b_productospmpdia.ppd_codpro) AND (" & aAp2 & ".ppd_cencos = b_productospmpdia.ppd_cencos) SET " & aAp2 & ".ppd_propon=b_productospmpdia.ppd_propon"
       vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp2 & " (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia) SELECT DISTINCT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_codpro NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_codpro FROM " & aAp2 & ")"
    End If
    aAp1 = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_paramdesp"
    '-------> Creo tabla temporal y chequeo si existe antes
    fg_CheckTmp aAp1
    '------->
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT pro_codtip, 0 AS pro_previo INTO " & aAp1 & " FROM b_productos", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM " & aAp1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp1 & " SET pro_previo=" & fg_BuscaenArbolNivel2(RS1!pro_codtip, "a_tipopro", "tip_codigo") & "  WHERE pro_codtip=" & RS1!pro_codtip & ""
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    proc1 = "": proc2 = "": proc3 = ""
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       proc1 = "SELECT c.ing_codigo, c.ing_nombre, (SELECT DISTINCT cpi_precos FROM b_contlistpreing WHERE cpi_coding = c.ing_codigo AND cpi_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "'), e.unm_nomcor, " & _
               "b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, b.pro_coduni, b.pro_facsto, " & _
               "d.uni_nomcor, a.ped_canped, a.ped_canmin, (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_propon FROM " & aAp2 & " WHERE ppd_codpro = b.pro_codigo AND ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & ") AS cpi_precos, " & _
               "a.ped_stoact, a.ped_proped, a.ped_fecped, b.pro_ctacon, h.pro_previo AS tip_previo " & _
               "FROM  b_minutapedido a, b_productos b, b_ingrediente c, a_unidad d, a_unidadmed e, a_tipopro f, b_paramdesp g, " & aAp1 & " h " & _
               "WHERE a.ped_codpro = b.pro_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_codtip = f.tip_codigo " & _
               "AND   f.tip_codigo = h.pro_codtip AND h.pro_previo = g.pad_codigo AND g.pad_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_coding = c.ing_codigo " & _
               "AND   c.ing_unimed = e.unm_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_coduni = d.uni_codigo " & _
               "AND   a.ped_codcas = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_anomes = " & Fecha & " " & _
               "AND   a.ped_tipped = 1 " & _
               "ORDER BY b.pro_ctacon, tip_previo, c.ing_codigo, c.ing_nombre, b.pro_nombre, a.ped_fecped "
       proc2 = "UNION "
       proc3 = "SELECT 'zzzfija', 'Estructura Fija', 0, '', " & _
               "b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, b.pro_coduni, b.pro_facsto, " & _
               "d.uni_nomcor, a.ped_canped, a.ped_canmin, (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_propon FROM " & aAp2 & " WHERE ppd_codpro = b.pro_codigo AND ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & ") AS cpi_precos, " & _
               "a.ped_stoact, a.ped_proped, a.ped_fecped, b.pro_ctacon, h.pro_previo AS tip_previo " & _
               "FROM  b_minutapedido a, b_productos b, b_ingrediente c, a_unidad d, a_unidadmed e, a_tipopro f, b_paramdesp g, " & aAp1 & " h " & _
               "WHERE a.ped_codpro = b.pro_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_codtip = f.tip_codigo " & _
               "AND   f.tip_codigo = h.pro_codtip AND h.pro_previo = g.pad_codigo AND g.pad_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_coding = '' " & _
               "AND   c.ing_unimed = e.unm_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_coduni = d.uni_codigo " & _
               "AND   a.ped_codcas = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_anomes = " & Fecha & " " & _
               "AND   a.ped_tipped = 1 " & _
               "ORDER BY b.pro_ctacon, tip_previo, c.ing_codigo, c.ing_nombre, b.pro_nombre, a.ped_fecped"
    Else
       proc1 = "SELECT c.ing_codigo, c.ing_nombre, (SELECT DISTINCT cpi_precos FROM b_contlistpreing WHERE cpi_coding = c.ing_codigo AND cpi_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "'), e.unm_nomcor, " & _
               "b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, b.pro_coduni, b.pro_facsto, " & _
               "d.uni_nomcor, a.ped_canped, a.ped_canmin, (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_propon FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_codpro = b.pro_codigo AND ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & ") AS cpi_precos, " & _
               "a.ped_stoact, a.ped_proped, a.ped_fecped, b.pro_ctacon, h.pro_previo AS tip_previo " & _
               "FROM  b_minutapedido a, b_productos b, b_ingrediente c, a_unidad d, a_unidadmed e, a_tipopro f, b_paramdesp g, " & aAp1 & " h " & _
               "WHERE a.ped_codpro = b.pro_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_codtip = f.tip_codigo " & _
               "AND   f.tip_codigo = h.pro_codtip AND h.pro_previo = g.pad_codigo AND g.pad_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_coding = c.ing_codigo " & _
               "AND   c.ing_unimed = e.unm_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_coduni = d.uni_codigo " & _
               "AND   a.ped_codcas = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_anomes = " & Fecha & " " & _
               "AND   a.ped_tipped = 1 " & _
               " "
       proc2 = "UNION "
       proc3 = "SELECT 'zzzfija', 'Estructura Fija', 0, '', " & _
               "b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, b.pro_coduni, b.pro_facsto, " & _
               "d.uni_nomcor, a.ped_canped, a.ped_canmin, (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_propon FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_codpro = b.pro_codigo AND ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & ") AS cpi_precos, " & _
               "a.ped_stoact, a.ped_proped, a.ped_fecped, b.pro_ctacon, h.pro_previo AS tip_previo " & _
               "FROM  b_minutapedido a, b_productos b, b_ingrediente c, a_unidad d, a_unidadmed e, a_tipopro f, b_paramdesp g, " & aAp1 & " h " & _
               "WHERE a.ped_codpro = b.pro_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_codtip = f.tip_codigo " & _
               "AND   f.tip_codigo = h.pro_codtip AND h.pro_previo = g.pad_codigo AND g.pad_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_coding = '' " & _
               "AND   c.ing_unimed = e.unm_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_coduni = d.uni_codigo " & _
               "AND   a.ped_codcas = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_anomes = " & Fecha & " " & _
               "AND   a.ped_tipped = 1 " & _
               "ORDER BY b.pro_ctacon, tip_previo, c.ing_codigo, c.ing_nombre, b.pro_nombre, a.ped_fecped"
    End If
    RS1.Open proc1 & proc2 & proc3, vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 700: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1700: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Despacho"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "C.Minuta"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Req.Tot"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "U.Stock"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Stock"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Prop.Ped"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable

    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 700: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1700: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    i = 1: inding = 0: codpre = 0: fecdes = 0
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
           If RS1!tip_previo <> codpre Then
              If codpre > 0 Then i = i + 2
              .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 8
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = fg_BuscaenArbol(RS1!tip_previo, "a_tipopro", "tip_codigo")
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
              codpre = RS1!tip_previo: i = i + 1
           End If
           If RS1!ing_codigo <> codtip And opcion = 0 Or (fecdes <> RS1!ped_fecped And etapa5) Then
              If inding > 0 And etapa5 And codtip <> "720" Then
                 .TableCell(tcFontSize, inding, 5) = 8: .TableCell(tcText, inding, 5) = Format(reqtot, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcFontSize, inding, 6) = 8: .TableCell(tcText, inding, 6) = ustock
                 .TableCell(tcFontSize, inding, 7) = 8: .TableCell(tcText, inding, 7) = Format(Stock, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcFontSize, inding, 8) = 8: .TableCell(tcText, inding, 8) = Format(proped, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              End If
              reqtot = 0: Stock = 0: proped = 0: ustock = ""
              i = i + 1
              inding = i
              If opcion = 0 Or (RS1!ing_codigo = "720" And etapa5) Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = IIf(RS1!ing_codigo = "zzzfija", "", RS1!ing_codigo)
                 .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = IIf(etapa5, False, True)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!ing_nombre
                 .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = IIf(etapa5, False, True)
                 .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 3) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = IIf(etapa5, False, True): .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(etapa5, Mid(RS1!ped_fecped, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!ped_fecped, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!ped_fecped, 1, 4), "")
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(RS1!ped_canmin > 0, Format(RS1!ped_canmin, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " " & RS1!unm_nomcor, "")
                 .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 4) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = IIf(etapa5, False, True)
                 Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4)
              End If
              codtip = RS1!ing_codigo
              If Not etapa5 Then i = i + 1
              fecdes = RS1!ped_fecped
           End If
           If Not etapa5 Or RS1!ing_codigo = "720" Then
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!pro_codigo: .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 1) = 8
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!pro_nombre: .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 2) = 8
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Mid(RS1!ped_fecped, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!ped_fecped, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!ped_fecped, 1, 4): .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 3) = 8
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(opcion = 0, "", IIf(RS1!ped_canmin > 0, Format(RS1!ped_canmin, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " " & RS1!unm_nomcor, "")): .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 4) = 8
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS1!ped_canped, fg_Pict(6, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 5) = 8
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = RS1!uni_nomcor: .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 6) = 8
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(RS1!ped_stoact, fg_Pict(6, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 7) = 8
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(RS1!ped_proped, fg_Pict(6, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 8) = 8
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8)
              If Not etapa5 Then i = i + 1
           End If
           reqtot = reqtot + RS1!ped_canped
           ustock = RS1!uni_nomcor
           Stock = Stock + RS1!ped_stoact
           proped = proped + RS1!ped_proped
           RS1.MoveNext
        Loop
        If inding > 0 And etapa5 And codtip <> "720" Then
           .TableCell(tcText, inding, 5) = Format(reqtot, fg_Pict(6, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontSize, inding, 5) = 8
           .TableCell(tcText, inding, 6) = ustock: .TableCell(tcFontSize, inding, 6) = 8
           .TableCell(tcText, inding, 7) = Format(Stock, fg_Pict(6, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontSize, inding, 7) = 8
           .TableCell(tcText, inding, 8) = Format(proped, fg_Pict(6, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontSize, inding, 8) = 8:
        End If
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
    '-------> Borrar tablas temporales
    If Trim(aAp1) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp1 & ""
    If Trim(aAp2) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp2 & ""
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_Pedidos:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_PedidosNew(cencos As String, Fecha As Long, opcion As Integer)
Dim i As Long, iRow As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, inding As Long, codpre As Long, fecdes As Long, auxing As String, auxpro As String
Dim proc1 As String, proc2 As String, proc3 As String, codtip As String, ustock As String
Dim reqtot As Double, Stock As Double, proped As Double, aAp1   As String, aAp2 As String
Dim sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String, sql4 As String, sql5 As String
Dim canped As Double, canmin As Double, cansol As Double
Dim etapa5 As Boolean
On Local Error GoTo Error_Pedidos
fg_carga ""
etapa5 = IIf("S" = fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("5etapas"), ";", "','"), True, False)
MsgTitulo = "Pedidos Mensual"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Pedidos Mensual " & Mid(Fecha, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(Fecha, 1, 4)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = RS1!cli_nombre
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       '-------> Insert tabla productospmpdia
       aAp2 = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ProductoPMPInfPedidos"
       fg_CheckTmp aAp2
       vg_db.Execute "SELECT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, 0 AS ppd_propon, Max(ppd_fecdia) AS ppd_fecdia " & _
                     "INTO " & aAp2 & " " & _
                     "FROM b_productospmpdia " & _
                     "WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                     "AND   ppd_fecdia >= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_fecdia <= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia), "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                     "AND   ppd_propon>0 " & _
                     "GROUP BY ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro"
       vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp2 & " ADD Constraint pmp_pk Primary Key (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_fecdia)"
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp2 & " INNER JOIN b_productospmpdia ON (" & aAp2 & ".ppd_fecdia = b_productospmpdia.ppd_fecdia) AND (" & aAp2 & ".ppd_codpro = b_productospmpdia.ppd_codpro) AND (" & aAp2 & ".ppd_cencos = b_productospmpdia.ppd_cencos) SET " & aAp2 & ".ppd_propon=b_productospmpdia.ppd_propon"
       vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp2 & " (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia) SELECT DISTINCT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_codpro NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_codpro FROM " & aAp2 & ")"
    End If
    aAp1 = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_paramdespzzz"
    '-------> Creo tabla temporal y chequeo si existe antes
    fg_CheckTmp aAp1
    '------->
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT pro_codtip, 0 AS pro_previo INTO " & aAp1 & " FROM b_productos", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM " & aAp1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp1 & " SET pro_previo = " & IIf(fg_BuscaenArbolNivel2(RS1!pro_codtip, "a_tipopro", "tip_codigo") = 0, RS1!pro_codtip, fg_BuscaenArbolNivel2(RS1!pro_codtip, "a_tipopro", "tip_codigo")) & "  WHERE pro_codtip = " & RS1!pro_codtip & ""
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    sql1 = " ": sql2 = " ": sql3 = " ": sql4 = " ": sql5 = " "
    If vg_pais = "CO" Then
       sql1 = " i.foc_codsac, i.foc_nomsac, i.foc_unisac, i.foc_faccon, "
       sql2 = " , b_formatocompras i, b_formatocomprassgp j "
       sql3 = "AND   a.ped_codsac = i.foc_codsac AND   i.foc_codsac = j.fcs_codsac AND   j.fcs_codsgp = b.pro_codigo AND i.foc_faccon > 0 "
    Else
       sql1 = " b.pro_codigo AS foc_codsac, b.pro_nombre AS foc_nomsac, d.uni_nomcor AS foc_unisac, 1 AS foc_faccon, "
    End If
    proc1 = "": proc2 = "": proc3 = ""
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       proc1 = "SELECT c.ing_codigo, c.ing_nombre, (SELECT DISTINCT cpi_precos FROM b_contlistpreing WHERE cpi_coding = c.ing_codigo AND cpi_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "'), e.unm_nomcor, " & _
               "b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, b.pro_coduni, b.pro_facsto, " & _
               "d.uni_nomcor, " & sql1 & " a.ped_canped, a.ped_canmin, (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_propon FROM " & aAp2 & " WHERE ppd_codpro = b.pro_codigo AND ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & ") AS cpi_precos, " & _
               "a.ped_stoact, a.ped_conrea, a.ped_ordrec, a.ped_proped, a.ped_fecped, b.pro_ctacon, h.pro_previo AS tip_previo " & _
               "FROM  b_minutapedidos a, b_productos b, b_ingrediente c, a_unidad d, a_unidadmed e, a_tipopro f, b_paramdesp g, " & aAp1 & " h " & sql2 & "  " & _
               "WHERE a.ped_codpro = b.pro_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_codtip = f.tip_codigo " & _
               "AND   f.tip_codigo = h.pro_codtip AND h.pro_previo = g.pad_codigo AND g.pad_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_coding = c.ing_codigo " & _
               "AND   c.ing_unimed = e.unm_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_coduni = d.uni_codigo " & _
               "AND   a.ped_codcas = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_anomes = " & Fecha & " " & _
               "AND   a.ped_tipped = 1 " & _
               "      " & sql3 & " " & _
               "ORDER BY b.pro_ctacon, tip_previo, c.ing_codigo, c.ing_nombre, b.pro_nombre, a.ped_fecped "
       proc2 = "UNION "
       proc3 = "SELECT 'zzzfija', 'Estructura Fija', 0, '', " & _
               "b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, b.pro_coduni, b.pro_facsto, " & _
               "d.uni_nomcor, a.ped_canped, a.ped_canmin, (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_propon FROM " & aAp2 & " WHERE ppd_codpro = b.pro_codigo AND ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & ") AS cpi_precos, " & _
               "a.ped_stoact, a.ped_conrea, a.ped_ordrec, " & sql1 & " a.ped_proped, a.ped_fecped, b.pro_ctacon, h.pro_previo AS tip_previo " & _
               "FROM  b_minutapedidos a, b_productos b, b_ingrediente c, a_unidad d, a_unidadmed e, a_tipopro f, b_paramdesp g, " & aAp1 & " h " & sql2 & " " & _
               "WHERE a.ped_codpro = b.pro_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_codtip = f.tip_codigo " & _
               "AND   f.tip_codigo = h.pro_codtip AND h.pro_previo = g.pad_codigo AND g.pad_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_coding = '' " & _
               "AND   c.ing_unimed = e.unm_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_coduni = d.uni_codigo " & _
               "AND   a.ped_codcas = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_anomes = " & Fecha & " " & _
               "AND   a.ped_tipped = 1 " & _
               "      " & sql3 & " " & _
               "ORDER BY b.pro_ctacon, tip_previo, c.ing_codigo, c.ing_nombre, b.pro_nombre, a.ped_fecped"
    Else
       proc1 = "SELECT c.ing_codigo, c.ing_nombre, (SELECT DISTINCT cpi_precos FROM b_contlistpreing WHERE cpi_coding = c.ing_codigo AND cpi_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "'), e.unm_nomcor, " & _
               "b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, b.pro_coduni, b.pro_facsto, " & _
               "d.uni_nomcor, " & sql1 & " a.ped_canped AS cantidad2, a.ped_canmin, (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_propon FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_codpro = b.pro_codigo AND ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & ") AS cpi_precos, " & _
               "a.ped_stoact, a.ped_conrea, a.ped_ordrec, a.ped_proped, a.ped_fecped, b.pro_ctacon, h.pro_previo AS tip_previo " & _
               "FROM  b_minutapedidos a, b_productos b, b_ingrediente c, a_unidad d, a_unidadmed e, a_tipopro f, b_paramdesp g, " & aAp1 & " h " & sql2 & " " & _
               "WHERE a.ped_codpro = b.pro_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_codtip = f.tip_codigo " & _
               "AND   f.tip_codigo = h.pro_codtip AND h.pro_previo = g.pad_codigo AND g.pad_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_coding = c.ing_codigo " & _
               "AND   c.ing_unimed = e.unm_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_coduni = d.uni_codigo " & _
               "AND   a.ped_codcas = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_anomes = " & Fecha & " " & _
               "AND   a.ped_tipped = 1 " & _
               "      " & sql3 & " " & _
               " "
       proc2 = "UNION "
       proc3 = "SELECT 'zzzfija', 'Estructura Fija', 0, '', " & _
               "b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, b.pro_coduni, b.pro_facsto, " & _
               "d.uni_nomcor, " & sql1 & " a.ped_canped AS cantidad2, a.ped_canmin, (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_propon FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_codpro = b.pro_codigo AND ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & ") AS cpi_precos, " & _
               "a.ped_stoact, a.ped_conrea, a.ped_ordrec, a.ped_proped, a.ped_fecped, b.pro_ctacon, h.pro_previo AS tip_previo " & _
               "FROM  b_minutapedidos a, b_productos b, b_ingrediente c, a_unidad d, a_unidadmed e, a_tipopro f, b_paramdesp g, " & aAp1 & " h " & sql2 & " " & _
               "WHERE a.ped_codpro = b.pro_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_codtip = f.tip_codigo " & _
               "AND   f.tip_codigo = h.pro_codtip AND h.pro_previo = g.pad_codigo AND g.pad_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_coding = '' " & _
               "AND   c.ing_unimed = e.unm_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.pro_coduni = d.uni_codigo " & _
               "AND   a.ped_codcas = '" & cencos & "' " & _
               "AND   a.ped_anomes = " & Fecha & " " & _
               "AND   a.ped_tipped = 1 " & _
               "      " & sql3 & "  " & _
               "ORDER BY b.pro_ctacon, tip_previo, c.ing_codigo, c.ing_nombre, b.pro_nombre, a.ped_fecped"
    End If
    RS1.Open proc1 & proc2 & proc3, vg_db, adOpenStatic
    auxing = "": auxpro = ""
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1700: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Unidad"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Nec. Minuta"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Ped. Propuesto"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "U.Despacho"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Fecha Entrega"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Cant. Sol."
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable

    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1700: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    i = 1: inding = 0: codpre = 0: fecdes = 0: canmin = 0
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
           If RS1!tip_previo <> codpre Then
              If codpre > 0 Then i = i + 2
              .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 8
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = fg_BuscaenArbol(RS1!tip_previo, "a_tipopro", "tip_codigo")
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
              codpre = RS1!tip_previo: i = i + 1
           End If
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = False
           If RS1!pro_codigo <> auxpro Or RS1!ing_codigo <> auxing Then
              If Trim(auxpro) <> "" Then i = i + 1
              If iRow > 0 Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 4) = Format(canmin, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 5) = Format(cansol, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 8) = Format(cansol, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 canmin = 0
                 cansol = 0
              End If
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!foc_codsac)
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!foc_nomsac)
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!foc_unisac)
'              .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(RS1!ped_canmin, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              iRow = i
              canped = (RS1!ped_canmin - RS1!ped_stoact - RS1!ped_ordrec + RS1!ped_conrea)
'              .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
'              If canped > 0 Then
'                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(Int(canped / RS1!foc_faccon) <> (canped / RS1!foc_faccon), Int(canped / RS1!foc_faccon) + 1, Round(canped / RS1!foc_faccon, 0))  'Format((RS1!ped_canmin - RS1!ped_stoact - RS1!ped_ordrec + RS1!ped_conrea), fg_Pict(6, 2))
'              End If
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = RS1!foc_faccon
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
'              If canped > 0 Then
'                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = IIf(Int(canped / RS1!foc_faccon) <> (canped / RS1!foc_faccon), Int(canped / RS1!foc_faccon) + 1, Round(canped / RS1!foc_faccon, 0))  'Format((RS1!ped_canmin - RS1!ped_stoact - RS1!ped_ordrec + RS1!ped_conrea), fg_Pict(6, 2))
'              End If
              i = i + 1
              auxpro = RS1!pro_codigo
              auxing = RS1!ing_codigo
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = CDate(fg_Ctod1(RS1!ped_fecped))
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format((RS1!ped_proped), fg_Pict(6, 2))
           Else
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = CDate(fg_Ctod1(RS1!ped_fecped))
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format((RS1!ped_proped), fg_Pict(6, 2))
           End If
           canmin = canmin + RS1!ped_canmin
           cansol = cansol + RS1!ped_proped
           RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
        Loop
        If iRow > 0 Then
           .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 4) = Format(canmin, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 5) = Format(cansol, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 8) = Format(cansol, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           canmin = 0
        End If
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
    '-------> Borrar tablas temporales
    If Trim(aAp1) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp1 & ""
    If Trim(aAp2) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp2 & ""
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_Pedidos:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_PedidosAdiAnu(cencos As String, anomes As Long, Fecha As Long, tipped As Long, desped As String, opcion As Integer)
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, codtip As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_PedidosAdiAnu
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Pedidos Adicionales & Anulaciones"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Pedidos " & desped & " " & Mid(Fecha, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(Fecha, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(Fecha, 1, 4)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .EndTable
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = RS1!cli_nombre & " " & Mid(anomes, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(anomes, 1, 4)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .EndTable
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open "SELECT b.ing_codigo, b.ing_nombre, " & _
             "f.unm_nomcor, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, " & _
             "c.pro_codtip, c.pro_facsto, d.tip_nombre, " & _
             "e.uni_nomcor, a.ped_canped, a.ped_canmin " & _
             "FROM b_minutapedido a, b_ingrediente b, b_productos c, a_tipopro d, a_unidad e, a_unidadmed f " & _
             "WHERE a.ped_codpro = c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.ped_coding = b.ing_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.ing_unimed = f.unm_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.pro_codtip = d.tip_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.pro_coduni = e.uni_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.ped_codcas = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   a.ped_fecped = " & Fecha & " " & _
             "AND   a.ped_anomes = " & anomes & " " & _
             "AND   a.ped_tipped = " & tipped & " ORDER BY d.tip_nombre, b.ing_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: Close #1: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 2300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "C. Minuta"
