    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "C. " & desped
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Und. Stock"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 2300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    i = 1
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
'            If RS1!pro_codtip <> codtip Then
'                i = i + 1
'                .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 5
'                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!tip_nombre
'                .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
'                Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
'                codtip = RS1!pro_codtip: i = i + 1
'            End If
            If RS1!ing_codigo <> codtip And opcion = 0 Then
                i = i + 1
'                .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 5
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!ing_codigo
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!ing_nombre
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(RS1!ped_canmin > 0, Format(RS1!ped_canmin, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " " & RS1!unm_nomcor, "")
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
                Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3)
                codtip = RS1!ing_codigo: i = i + 1
            End If
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!pro_codigo
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!pro_nombre
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(opcion = 0, "", IIf(RS1!ped_canmin > 0, Format(RS1!ped_canmin, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " " & RS1!unm_nomcor, ""))
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = RS1!ped_canped
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = RS1!uni_nomcor '& " x " & RS1!pro_facsto
           Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5)
            RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
        Loop
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_PedidosAdiAnu:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_MenuPlanMecano(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String, opnomrec As Boolean, opponderacion As Boolean, opracion As Boolean)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxfec As Long, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long, auxest As Long
Dim nomser As String, cLin As String, opgruvul As Boolean, txtsql As String, sql1 As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_Mecano
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Menu Mecano"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    
'    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
'    .HdrFontSize = 15
'    .HdrFontBold = True
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    fg_carga ""
    'traer opción de impresión grupo vulnerable en informe
    opgruvul = False
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT par_codigo FROM a_param WHERE  par_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND par_codigo = 'opgruvul' AND par_valor = 'S'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then opgruvul = True
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    txtsql = IIf(opponderacion = True, " AND c.mid_numrac > 0 ", "")
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " DISTINCT ", "")
    RS1.Open "SELECT " & sql1 & " b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, e.ser_nombre, c.mid_tipmin, c.mid_numlin, c.mid_codrec, c.mid_descri, c.mid_cosrec, c.mid_cosdes, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo, " & _
             "a.rec_nombre, a.rec_nomfan, a.rec_gruvul, c.mid_numrac, c.mid_estser, d.ess_nombre " & _
             "FROM b_receta a, b_minuta b, b_minutadet c, a_estservicio d, a_servicio e " & _
             "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_codser = e.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.mid_codrec = a.rec_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.mid_estser = d.ess_codigo AND b.min_cencos = d.ess_cencos " & _
             "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   c.mid_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "' " & txtsql & " ORDER BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, b.min_fecmin, c.mid_numlin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: fg_descarga: Exit Function
    auxreg = 0: auxser = 0: auxest = 0
    j = 1: cLin = ""
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
'           If auxser > 0 Then LogoEmp: .NewPage
       If RS1!min_fecmin <> auxfec Or RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
          If auxest > 0 Then .TableCell(tcRows) = j: .TableBorder = tbNone: .EndTable: .Footer = "" & fg_Fecha_Escrita(Mid(auxfec, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(auxfec, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(auxfec, 1, 4)) & "||Bon Appétit!": Print #1, " ": Print #1, vbTab & vbTab & fg_Fecha_Escrita(Mid(auxfec, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(auxfec, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(auxfec, 1, 4)) & "||Bon Appétit!" & Chr(13) & Chr(13): .NewPage
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 15: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = RS1!ser_nombre
          Print #1, vbTab & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
          auxfec = RS1!min_fecmin
          auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
          auxser = RS1!min_codser
          auxest = 0
          j = 1
       End If
       If RS1!mid_estser <> auxest Then
          If auxest = 0 Then .StartTable Else j = j + 1
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1000
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 8000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, j, 1) = 10
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 1) = True
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) = Trim(RS1!ess_nombre)
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = "": cLin = ""
          cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) & "|"
          auxest = RS1!mid_estser
       End If
       .TableCell(tcFontSize, j, 3) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 3) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(opnomrec = True, Trim(RS1!rec_nomfan), Trim(RS1!rec_nombre)) & IIf(opracion = False Or RS1!mid_numrac < 1, "", " (" & RS1!mid_numrac & ")")
       Preview.rtfPic.TextRTF = "": If opgruvul = True And Not IsNull(RS1!rec_gruvul) Then Preview.rtfPic.TextRTF = IIf(IsNull(RS1!rec_gruvul), "", Trim(RS1!rec_gruvul))
       If Trim(Preview.rtfPic.text) <> "" Then j = j + 1:  .TableCell(tcFontSize, j, 3) = 8: .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = "(" & Mid(Trim(Preview.rtfPic.text), 1, Len(Trim(Preview.rtfPic.text)) - IIf(Asc(Right(Preview.rtfPic.text, 1)) = 13 Or Asc(Right(Preview.rtfPic.text, 1)) = 10, 1, 0)) & ")": j = j + 1
       Print #1, cLin & .TableCell(tcText, j, 3)
       cLin = "|"
       RS1.MoveNext: j = j + 1
    Loop
    .Footer = "" & fg_Fecha_Escrita(Mid(auxfec, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(auxfec, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(auxfec, 1, 4)) & "||Bon Appétit!"
    Print #1, fg_Fecha_Escrita(Mid(auxfec, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(auxfec, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(auxfec, 1, 4)) & "Bon Appétit!" & Chr(13) & Chr(13)
    .TableCell(tcRows) = j: .TableBorder = tbNone: .EndTable
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    Close #1
    fg_descarga
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_Mecano:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_MenuPlanMensual(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String, opnomrec As Boolean, opponderacion As Boolean, opracion As Boolean)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, X As Long, p As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxfec As Long, auxser As Long, auxreg As Long, auxest As Long
Dim icol As Long, imay As Long, anccol As Long, xcol As Long, filmay As Long, idia As Long, diafin As Long, diaini As Long, diafan As Long
Dim essnom As Boolean, dianva As Boolean, est As Boolean
Dim nomser As String, cLin As String, fecmin As String, txtsql As String
Dim vecdia(7) As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_PlanMensual
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Menu Mensual"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 15
    .HdrFontBold = True
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    txtsql = "": txtsql = IIf(opponderacion = True, " AND c.mid_numrac > 0 ", "")
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, e.ser_nombre, c.mid_tipmin, c.mid_numlin, c.mid_codrec, c.mid_descri, c.mid_cosrec, c.mid_cosdes, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo, " & _
             "a.rec_nombre, a.rec_nomfan, c.mid_numrac, c.mid_estser, d.ess_nombre " & _
             "FROM b_receta a, b_minuta b, b_minutadet c, a_estservicio d, a_servicio e " & _
             "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_codser = e.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.mid_codrec = a.rec_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.mid_estser = d.ess_codigo AND b.min_cencos = d.ess_cencos " & _
             "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   c.mid_tipmin='" & tipmin & "' " & txtsql & " ORDER BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, b.min_fecmin, c.mid_numlin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    auxfec = 0: auxser = 0: filmay = 0: essnom = False: auxreg = 0: auxest = 0
    j = 2: imay = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       If RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
          If auxreg > 0 Or auxser > 0 Then
             j = 2
             For j = 1 To filmay
                 cLin = ""
                 For X = 1 To icol + 1
                     cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, j, X) & "|"
                 Next X
                 Print #1, cLin
             Next j
             Print #1, Chr(13): Print #1, Chr(13): cLin = ""
            .TableCell(tcRows) = filmay + 1: .TableBorder = tbBoxColumns: .EndTable
            .NewPage
          End If
          auxfec = 0: auxest = 0: filmay = 0: essnom = False
          j = 2: imay = 0
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "S e t   de   M i n u t a"
          Print #1, vbTab & vbTab & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If RS2.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, 2) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = RS2!cli_nombre
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1)
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, 3) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre) & " (" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4) & ")"
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
          'Buscar Nº días
          If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
             RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.min_fecmin FROM b_minuta a, b_minutadet b WHERE a.min_codigo = b.mid_codigo " & _
                      "AND a.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND a.min_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " AND a.min_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                      "AND val(mid(a.min_fecmin,1 ,6)) = " & Val(Mid(fecini, 1, 6)) & " AND b.mid_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "' ORDER BY a.min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          Else
             RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.min_fecmin FROM b_minuta a, b_minutadet b WHERE a.min_codigo = b.mid_codigo " & _
                      "AND a.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND a.min_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " AND a.min_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                      "AND convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),a.min_fecmin),1 ,6)) = " & Val(Mid(fecini, 1, 6)) & " AND b.mid_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "' ORDER BY a.min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          End If
          If RS2.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
          Do While Not RS2.EOF
             Select Case fg_Dia(RS2!min_fecmin)
             Case 1
                  icol = 7
             Case 2
                  icol = 1
             Case 3
                  icol = 2
             Case 4
                  icol = 3
             Case 5
                  icol = 4
             Case 6
                  icol = 5
             Case 7
                  icol = 6
             End Select
             If icol > imay Then imay = icol
             RS2.MoveNext
          Loop
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          icol = imay
          Select Case icol
          Case 1
              anccol = 6800
          Case 2
              anccol = 6800
          Case 3
              anccol = 4550
          Case 4
              anccol = 3400
          Case 5
              anccol = 2650
          Case 6
              anccol = 2200
          Case 7
              anccol = 1900
          End Select
          vecdia(7) = 1: vecdia(1) = 2: vecdia(2) = 3: vecdia(3) = 4: vecdia(4) = 5: vecdia(5) = 6: vecdia(6) = 7
          
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = icol + 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taCenterMiddle
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1400
          fecmin = RS1!min_fecmin
          est = True: dianva = False
          Do While est
             If Mid(fecmin, 7, 2) <> "00" Then
                If fg_Dia(fecmin) = 2 Then est = False: diaini = Mid(fecmin, 7, 2): Exit Do
             End If
             If Mid(fecmin, 7, 2) = "00" Then
                dianva = True
                fecmin = BoM("01/" & Mid(fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecmin, 1, 4))
                fecmin = Mid(fecmin, 7, 4) & Mid(fecmin, 4, 2) & Mid(fecmin, 1, 2)
             Else
                fecmin = (fecmin - 1)
             End If
          Loop
          diafin = Mid(dEoM("01/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)), 1, 2)
          diafan = Val(Mid(BoM("01/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)), 1, 2))
          For X = 1 To icol + 1
              If X = 1 Then
                 .TableCell(tcFontName) = "Arial Narrow"
                 .TableCell(tcFontSize) = 8
                 .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Estructura"
                 cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) & vbTab
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = anccol: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                 Select Case X
                 Case 2
                     .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Lunes " & fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2)
                     If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                 Case 3
                     .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Martes " & fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2)
                     If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                 Case 4
                     .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Miércoles " & fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2)
                     If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                 Case 5
                     .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Jueves " & fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2)
                     If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                 Case 6
                     .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Viernes " & fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2)
                     If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                 Case 7
                     .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Sábado " & fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2)
                     If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                 Case 8
                     .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Domingo " & fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2)
                     If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                 End Select
                 cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) & "|"
                 diaini = diaini + 1
                 If diaini > diafan And diafan > 0 Then diaini = 1: diafan = 0: dianva = False
              End If
          Next X
          Print #1, cLin
          .TableBorder = tbAll
          .EndTable
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = icol + 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1000
          .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taCenterMiddle
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1400
          For X = 1 To icol + 1
              If X = 1 Then
                 .TableCell(tcFontName) = "Arial Narrow"
                 .TableCell(tcFontSize) = 8
                 .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = ""
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = anccol: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
              End If
          Next X
          cLin = ""
          
          auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
          auxser = RS1!min_codser
       End If
    
       If DatePart("ww", fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin), 2) <> auxfec Then
          If auxfec > 0 Then
             j = 2
             For j = 1 To filmay
                 cLin = ""
                 For X = 1 To icol + 1
                     cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, j, X) & "|"
                 Next X
                 Print #1, cLin
             Next j
             Print #1, Chr(13): Print #1, Chr(13)
             .TableCell(tcRows) = filmay + 1: .TableBorder = tbBoxColumns: .EndTable: j = 2
             .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): cLin = ""
             .StartTable
             filmay = 0
             .TableCell(tcCols) = icol + 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taCenterMiddle
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1400
             idia = Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 7, 2): dianva = False
             If DatePart("w", fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin), 2) <> fg_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin) Then idia = idia - fg_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin) + 2
             For X = 1 To icol + 1
                 If X = 1 Then
                    .TableCell(tcFontName) = "Arial Narrow"
                    .TableCell(tcFontSize) = 8
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
                    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Estructura"
                    cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) & vbTab
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = anccol: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                    Select Case X
                    Case 2
                        .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Lunes " & IIf(idia > diafin, "", fg_pone_cero(Str(idia), 2))
                        If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                    Case 3
                        .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Martes " & IIf(idia > diafin, "", fg_pone_cero(Str(idia), 2))
                        If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                    Case 4
                        .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Miércoles " & IIf(idia > diafin, "", fg_pone_cero(Str(idia), 2))
                        If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                    Case 5
                        .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Jueves " & IIf(idia > diafin, "", fg_pone_cero(Str(idia), 2))
                        If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                    Case 6
                        .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Viernes " & IIf(idia > diafin, "", fg_pone_cero(Str(idia), 2))
                        If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                    Case 7
                        .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Sábado " & IIf(idia > diafin, "", fg_pone_cero(Str(idia), 2))
                        If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                    Case 8
                        .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Domingo " & IIf(idia > diafin, "", fg_pone_cero(Str(idia), 2))
                        If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                    End Select
                    cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) & "|"
                    If idia >= diafin Then idia = 0: dianva = True
                    idia = idia + 1
                 End If
             Next X
             Print #1, cLin
             .TableBorder = tbAll
             .EndTable
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = icol + 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1000
             .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taCenterMiddle
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1400
             For X = 1 To icol + 1
                 If X = 1 Then
                    .TableCell(tcFontName) = "Arial Narrow"
                    .TableCell(tcFontSize) = 8
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
                    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = ""
                  Else
                     .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = anccol: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                  End If
             Next X
          End If
          auxest = 0
          auxfec = DatePart("ww", fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin), 2)
       End If
       j = 1 + RS1!mid_numlin
       If j > filmay Then filmay = j
       If RS1!mid_estser <> auxest Then
          'Revisar si existe una estructura fija
          essnom = False: cLin = ""
          For p = 1 To j
              If .TableCell(tcText, p, 1) = RS1!ess_nombre Then essnom = True: cLin = "": Exit For
          Next p
          If essnom = False Then .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) = RS1!ess_nombre: cLin = .TableCell(tcText, j, 1)
          'Fin revisar si existe una estructura fija
          auxest = RS1!mid_estser
       End If
       For X = 1 To 7
           If vecdia(X) = fg_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin) Then .TableCell(tcText, j, X + 1) = IIf(opnomrec = True, Trim(RS1!rec_nomfan), Trim(RS1!rec_nombre)) & IIf(opracion = False Or RS1!mid_numrac < 1, "", " (" & RS1!mid_numrac & ")")
       Next X
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    j = 2
    For j = 1 To filmay
        cLin = ""
        For X = 1 To icol + 1
            cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, j, X) & "|"
        Next X
        Print #1, cLin
    Next j
    Print #1, Chr(13): Print #1, Chr(13): cLin = ""
    .TableCell(tcRows) = filmay + 1: .TableBorder = tbBoxColumns: .EndTable
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Close #1
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_PlanMensual:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_CostoPlanDetallado(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String, opnomrec As Boolean)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxfec As Long, condia As Long, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long
Dim nomser As String, nomtip As String
Dim totcos As Double, totser As Double, totdia As Double
MsgTitulo = "Informe Costo Detallado"
fg_carga ""
On Local Error GoTo Error_CostDet
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = True
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    RS1.Open "SELECT b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, c.mid_tipmin, c.mid_numlin, c.mid_codrec, c.mid_descri, " & _
             "isnull(c.mid_cosrec,0) as mid_cosrec, isnull(c.mid_cosdes,0) as mid_cosdes, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo, isnull(a.rec_nombre,'') as rec_nombre, isnull(a.rec_nomfan,'') as rec_nomfan, isnull(c.mid_numrac,0) as mid_numrac " & _
             "FROM  b_receta a, b_minuta b, b_minutadet c " & _
             "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.mid_codrec = a.rec_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   c.mid_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "' " & _
             "ORDER BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, b.min_fecmin, c.mid_numlin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: MsgBox "No existen datos para impirimir...", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo: Exit Function
    auxfec = 0: auxreg = 0: auxser = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       If RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
          If auxreg > 0 Then
            j = j + 1
            .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 2) = True
            .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = "Total Día"
            .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 3) = True
            .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = ""
            .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 5) = True
            .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = Format(totdia, fg_Pict(6, 2))
            Print #1, "|": Print #1, "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) & "|" & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 5)
            totdia = 0: j = j + 2
            .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 2) = True
            .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = "Total Servicio"
            .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 3) = True
            .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = Format(totcos, fg_Pict(6, 2))
            .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 5) = True
            .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = Format(totser, fg_Pict(6, 2))
            Print #1, "|": Print #1, "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) & "|" & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 5)
            j = j + 2
            .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 2) = True
            .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = "Costo Promedio Díario"
            .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 3) = True
            If condia > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = Format(CCur(totcos / condia), fg_Pict(6, 2)) Else .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
            Print #1, Chr(13): Print #1, "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 3)
            .TableCell(tcRows) = j: .TableBorder = tbNone: .EndTable
            .NewPage
          End If
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
          nomtip = IIf(tipmin = 1, "Teórico", "Real")
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Costo Detallado (" & nomtip & ")  " & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Servicio"
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS2!cli_nombre
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Regimen(2, RS1!min_codreg, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = RS2!reg_nombre
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Servicio(8, RS1!min_codser, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = RS2!ser_nombre
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13)
          
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
          .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Día"
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Nombre Receta"
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Costo Unit."
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Nro. Rac."
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Costo"
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5)
          .TableBorder = tbBox
          .EndTable
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
          auxfec = 0
          j = 2: totcos = 0: totser = 0: totdia = 0: condia = 0
          
          auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
          auxser = RS1!min_codser
       End If
       
       If RS1!min_fecmin <> auxfec Or RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
          If auxfec > 0 Then
             j = j + 1
             .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 2) = True
             .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = "Total Día"
             .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 3) = True
             .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = ""
             .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 5) = True
             .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = Format(totdia, fg_Pict(6, 2))
             Print #1, "|": Print #1, "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) & "|" & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 5)
             totdia = 0: j = j + 2
          End If
          auxfec = RS1!min_fecmin: condia = condia + 1
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) = Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)
          Print #1, "'" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 1)
       End If
       
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = IIf(opnomrec = True, RS1!rec_nomfan, RS1!rec_nombre)
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = Format((RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes), fg_Pict(6, 2))
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = Format(IIf(IsNull(RS1!mid_numrac), 0, RS1!mid_numrac), fg_Pict(6, 0))
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = Format(CCur(IIf(IsNull(RS1!mid_numrac), 0, RS1!mid_numrac) * (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes)), fg_Pict(6, 2))
       Print #1, "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 5)
       totdia = CCur(totdia + (IIf(IsNull(RS1!mid_numrac), 0, RS1!mid_numrac) * (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes)))
       totcos = CCur(totcos + RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes)
       totser = CCur(totser + IIf(IsNull(RS1!mid_numrac), 0, RS1!mid_numrac) * (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes))
       RS1.MoveNext: j = j + 1
    Loop
    j = j + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 2) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = "Total Día"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 3) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = ""
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 5) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = Format(totdia, fg_Pict(6, 2))
    Print #1, "|": Print #1, "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) & "|" & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 5)
    totdia = 0: j = j + 2
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 2) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = "Total Servicio"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 3) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = Format(totcos, fg_Pict(6, 2))
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 5) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = Format(totser, fg_Pict(6, 2))
    Print #1, "|": Print #1, "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) & "|" & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 5)
    j = j + 2
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 2) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = "Costo Promedio Díario"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, j, 3) = True
    If condia > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = Format(CCur(totcos / condia), fg_Pict(6, 2)) Else .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
    Print #1, Chr(13): Print #1, "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, j, 3)
    .TableCell(tcRows) = j: .TableBorder = tbNone: .EndTable
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .EndDoc
End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_CostDet:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_CostoPlanResumido(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String, opnomrec As Boolean)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxfec As Long, condia As Long, icol As Long, iRow As Long, numrac As Long, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long
Dim nomser As String, nomtip As String, cLin As String
Dim totcos As Double, CosTot As Double
On Local Error GoTo Error_CostResumen
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Costo Resumen"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = True
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.min_codreg, a.min_codser, c.ser_nombre, a.min_fecmin, SUM((isnull(b.mid_cosdes,0)+isnull(b.mid_cosrec,0))*isnull(b.mid_numrac,0)) AS mid_cosrec, SUM(isnull(b.mid_numrac,0)) AS mid_numrac " & _
             "FROM  b_minuta a, b_minutadet b, a_servicio c " & _
             "WHERE a.min_codigo = b.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.min_codser = c.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   a.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   a.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   a.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   a.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   b.mid_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "' " & _
             "GROUP BY a.min_codreg, a.min_codser, a.min_fecmin, c.ser_nombre ORDER BY a.min_codreg, a.min_codser, a.min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: MsgBox "No existen datos para imprimir...", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo: Exit Function
    auxfec = 0: condia = 0: auxreg = 0: auxser = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       If RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Then
          If auxreg > 0 Then
             If numrac > 0 Then condia = condia + 1
             Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Val(Right(auxfec, 2)) + 1
             Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1
             If Preview.vaSpread1.text = "" Then Preview.vaSpread1.text = Mid(auxfec, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(auxfec, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(auxfec, 1, 4)
             
             Preview.vaSpread1.Col = icol
             Preview.vaSpread1.text = CosTot
             Preview.vaSpread1.Col = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
             Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur(Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot)
             Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 33: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = icol
             Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur(Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot)
             Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 33: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
             Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur(Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot)
             Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 35: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = icol
             If condia > 0 Then Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur((Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot) / condia)
             CosTot = Preview.vaSpread1.text
             Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 35: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
             Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur(Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot)
             CosTot = 0: condia = 0
          
             .StartTable
             cLin = ""
             .TableCell(tcCols) = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             For i = 1 To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
                 Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 1
                 Preview.vaSpread1.Col = i
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, i) = 1800
                 .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, i) = IIf(i = 1, taLeftTop, taRightTop)
                 .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, i) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, i) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1, i) = 230
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, i) = Preview.vaSpread1.text
                 If i = 1 Then
                    cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, i)
                 Else
                    cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, i)
                 End If
             Next i
             Print #1, cLin
             .TableBorder = tbBox
             .EndTable
             cLin = ""
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
             iRow = 1
             For i = 2 To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
                 Preview.vaSpread1.Row = i
                 Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1
                 If Preview.vaSpread1.text <> "" Then
                    If i = 33 Or i = 35 Then iRow = iRow + 1
                    For j = 1 To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
                        Preview.vaSpread1.Col = j
                        .TableCell(tcColWidth, iRow, j) = 1800
                        .TableCell(tcAlign, iRow, j) = IIf(j = 1, taLeftTop, taRightTop)
                        .TableCell(tcText, iRow, j) = IIf(j = 1, Preview.vaSpread1.text, Format(Preview.vaSpread1.text, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
                    Next j
                    iRow = iRow + 1
                 End If
             Next i
             For i = 1 To iRow
                 cLin = ""
                 For j = 1 To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
                     If j = 1 And Trim(.TableCell(tcText, i, j)) <> "" Then cLin = cLin & "'" & .TableCell(tcText, i, j) & "|" Else cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, i, j) & "|"
                 Next j
                 Print #1, cLin
             Next i
             cLin = ""
             .TableCell(tcRows) = iRow
             .TableBorder = tbNone
             .EndTable
             .NewPage
             Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = 0
             Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols = 0
          End If
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
          nomtip = IIf(tipmin = 1, "Teórico", "Real")
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Costo Resumido (" & nomtip & ")  " & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen"
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS2!cli_nombre
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Regimen(2, RS1!min_codreg, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = RS2!reg_nombre
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13)
          Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = 35: Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols = 0: Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols = 1
          Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Fecha"
          
          RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.min_codser, c.ser_nombre " & _
                   "FROM  b_minuta a, b_minutadet b, a_servicio c " & _
                   "WHERE a.min_codser = c.ser_codigo " & _
                   "AND   a.min_codigo = b.mid_codigo " & _
                   "AND   a.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   a.min_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   a.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                   "AND   a.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
                   "AND   a.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                   "AND   b.mid_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "' " & _
                   "ORDER BY a.min_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then
             Do While Not RS2.EOF
                Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols + 1
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
                Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS2!ser_nombre
                RS2.MoveNext
             Loop
          End If
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols + 1
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Total"
          Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 33: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Tot. Serv."
          Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 35: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Tot. Prom."
          auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
          auxser = 0
       End If
       
       If RS1!min_fecmin <> auxfec Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
          If auxfec > 0 Then
             Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Val(Right(auxfec, 2)) + 1
             Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1
             If Preview.vaSpread1.text = "" Then Preview.vaSpread1.text = Mid(auxfec, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(auxfec, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(auxfec, 1, 4)
             Preview.vaSpread1.Col = icol
             Preview.vaSpread1.text = CosTot
             Preview.vaSpread1.Col = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
             Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur(Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot)
             Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 33: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = icol
             Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur(Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot)
             Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 33: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
             Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur(Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot)
             Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 35: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = icol
             Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur(Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot)
          End If
          auxfec = RS1!min_fecmin
          If numrac > 0 Then condia = condia + 1
          CosTot = 0: numrac = 0
       End If
       
       If RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
          If auxser > 0 Then
             Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 35: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = icol
             If condia > 0 Then Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur((Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text)) / condia)
             CosTot = Preview.vaSpread1.text
             Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 35: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
             Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur(Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot)
             CosTot = 0: condia = 0
          End If
          auxser = RS1!min_codser
       End If
       
       For j = 2 To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
           Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 1
           Preview.vaSpread1.Col = j
           If Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!ser_nombre Then icol = j: Exit For
       Next j
       CosTot = CCur(CosTot + RS1!mid_cosrec)
       numrac = numrac + IIf(IsNull(RS1!mid_numrac), 0, RS1!mid_numrac)
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    If numrac > 0 Then condia = condia + 1
    Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Val(Right(auxfec, 2)) + 1
    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1
    If Preview.vaSpread1.text = "" Then Preview.vaSpread1.text = Mid(auxfec, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(auxfec, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(auxfec, 1, 4)
    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = icol
    Preview.vaSpread1.text = CosTot
    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
    Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur(Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot)
    Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 33: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = icol
    Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur(Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot)
    Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 33: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
    Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur(Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot)
    Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 35: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = icol
    If condia > 0 Then Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur((Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot) / condia)
    CosTot = Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text)
    Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 35: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
    Preview.vaSpread1.text = CCur(Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text) + CosTot)
    CosTot = 0
   .StartTable
   cLin = ""
   .TableCell(tcCols) = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
   For i = 1 To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
       Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 1
       Preview.vaSpread1.Col = i
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, i) = 1800
       .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, i) = IIf(i = 1, taLeftTop, taRightTop)
       .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, i) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, i) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1, i) = 230
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, i) = Preview.vaSpread1.text
       If i = 1 Then
          cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, i)
       Else
          cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, i)
       End If
   Next i
   Print #1, cLin
   .TableBorder = tbBox
   .EndTable
    cLin = ""
   .StartTable
   .TableCell(tcCols) = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
   iRow = 1
   For i = 2 To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
       Preview.vaSpread1.Row = i
       Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1
       If Preview.vaSpread1.text <> "" Then
          If i = 33 Or i = 35 Then iRow = iRow + 1
          For j = 1 To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
              Preview.vaSpread1.Col = j
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, iRow, j) = 1800
              .TableCell(tcAlign, iRow, j) = IIf(j = 1, taLeftTop, taRightTop)
              .TableCell(tcText, iRow, j) = IIf(j = 1, Preview.vaSpread1.text, Format(Preview.vaSpread1.text, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
          Next j
          iRow = iRow + 1
       End If
   Next i
   For i = 1 To iRow
       cLin = ""
       For j = 1 To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols
           If j = 1 And Trim(.TableCell(tcText, i, j)) <> "" Then cLin = cLin & "'" & .TableCell(tcText, i, j) & "|" Else cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, i, j) & "|"
       Next j
       Print #1, cLin
   Next i
'   Print #1, cLin
   cLin = ""
   .TableCell(tcRows) = iRow
   .TableBorder = tbNone
   .EndTable
   .EndDoc
End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_CostResumen:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_CostoTeoricoRealFood(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String, opinf As Integer, opinc As Boolean, opcosto As Integer, numreg As Long, numser As Long)

Dim i As Long, j As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxfec As Long, auxfecrac As Long, ancpag As Long, fecesf As Long
Dim nomser As String, cLin As String, nomtit As String, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String, sql4 As String, estfij As Boolean, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long
Dim costeo As Double, cosrea As Double, racteo As Double, racrea As Double, totteo As Double, totdoc As Double
Dim tcoteo As Double, tcorea As Double, trateo As Double, trarea As Double, totrea As Double
Dim cosfod As Double, tcofod As Double, trafod As Double, tdiateo As Double, tdiarea As Double, vCosFij As Double, vFcUnit As Double, vPtUnit As Double, vPrUnit As Double
Dim tgracpt As Double, tgracpr As Double, tgracre As Double, tgcospt As Double, tgrcospt As Double, tgrcospr As Double, tgrcosre As Double
Dim aAp As String, aAp1 As String
Dim vec_cosmin() As Variant

On Local Error GoTo Error_CostTeoReaFood

fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Costo Plan. Teórico - Plan. Real - Realizado"
nomtit = "Costo Plan. Teorico - Plan. Real - Realizado " & IIf(opcosto = 2, "(Alimentación & Desechable) ", IIf(opcosto = 0, "(Alimentación) ", "(Desechable) "))
ancpag = 13500
If opinf = 0 Then
   If opcosto = 0 Then
      nomtit = "Costo Plan. Teórico & Realizado (Alimentación) "
   ElseIf opcosto = 1 Then
      nomtit = "Costo Plan. Teórico & Realizado (Desechable) "
   End If
   ancpag = 10500
ElseIf opinf = 1 Then
   If opcosto = 0 Then
      nomtit = "Costo Plan. Real & Realizado (Alimentación) "
   ElseIf opcosto = 1 Then
      nomtit = "Costo Plan. Real & Realizado (Desechable) "
   End If
   ancpag = 10500
End If
sql1 = IIf(opcosto = 0, "b.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') ", IIf(opcosto = 1, "b.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "') ", "(b.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') OR b.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "')) "))
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = IIf(opinf = O Or opinf = 1, orPortrait, orLandscape)
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = True
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    numreg = (numser * 31)
    ReDim vec_cosmin(numser * 31, 15)
    For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
        vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 '-------> Fecha ddmmyyyy
        vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 '-------> Código regimen
        vec_cosmin(i, 3) = "" '-------> Nombre regimen
        vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 '-------> Código servicio
        vec_cosmin(i, 5) = "" '-------> Nombre servicio
        vec_cosmin(i, 6) = 0 '-------> Raciones teorica
        vec_cosmin(i, 7) = 0 '-------> Monto teorica
        vec_cosmin(i, 8) = 0 '-------> raciones real
        vec_cosmin(i, 9) = 0 '-------> Monto real
        vec_cosmin(i, 10) = 0 '-------> raciones realizada
        vec_cosmin(i, 11) = 0 '-------> Monto realizada
        vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 0 '-------> Identifica si viene solamente estructura fija
    Next i
    '-------> Insert tabla productospmpdia
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       aAp1 = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ProductoPMPCosTeoReaFoo"
       fg_CheckTmp aAp1
       vg_db.Execute "SELECT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, 0 AS ppd_propon, Max(ppd_fecdia) AS ppd_fecdia " & _
                     "INTO " & aAp1 & " " & _
                     "FROM b_productospmpdia " & _
                     "WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                     "AND   ppd_fecdia >= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_fecdia <= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia), "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                     "AND   ppd_propon>0 " & _
                     "GROUP BY ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro"
       vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp1 & " ADD Constraint pmp_pk Primary Key (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_fecdia)"
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp1 & " INNER JOIN b_productospmpdia ON (" & aAp1 & ".ppd_fecdia = b_productospmpdia.ppd_fecdia) AND (" & aAp1 & ".ppd_codpro = b_productospmpdia.ppd_codpro) AND (" & aAp1 & ".ppd_cencos = b_productospmpdia.ppd_cencos) SET " & aAp1 & ".ppd_propon=b_productospmpdia.ppd_propon"
       vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp1 & " (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia) SELECT DISTINCT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_codpro NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_codpro FROM " & aAp1 & ")"
    End If
    aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ServicioNoPlanfood"
    fg_CheckTmp aAp
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT ser_codigo AS codser, 0 AS eximin INTO " & aAp & " FROM a_servicio", vg_db, adOpenForwardOnly
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp & " ADD Constraint a_servicio_pk Primary Key (codser)"
    End If
    
    '-------> Mover costo planificación teorica vs real
    RS1.Open "SELECT b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, c.mid_tipmin, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo, isnull(b.min_racteo,0) as min_racteo, isnull(b.min_racrea,0) as min_racrea, " & _
             "ROUND(SUM(c.mid_cosrec*c.mid_numrac),2) AS mid_cosrec, ROUND(SUM(c.mid_cosdes*c.mid_numrac),2) AS mid_cosdes FROM b_minuta b, b_minutadet c " & _
             "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   c.mid_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ") " & _
             "GROUP BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, c.mid_tipmin, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo, b.min_racteo, b.min_racrea " & _
             "ORDER BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, b.min_fecmin, c.mid_tipmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then Close #1: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: fg_descarga: Exit Function
    auxreg = 0: auxser = 0: estfij = False
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       DoEvents
       If RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
          '-------> Traer estructura fija
          estfij = False
          RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT mfd_cencos FROM b_minutafijadia " & _
                   "WHERE mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   mfd_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   mfd_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   mfd_fecha >= " & fecini & " AND mfd_fecha <= " & fecfin & " AND mfd_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ")", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then estfij = True
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
           
          '-------> Buscar fecha estructura fija
          fecesf = 0
          If Not estfij Then
             RS2.Open RutinaLectura.MinutaFija(1, RS1!min_codreg, RS1!min_codser, 0, 0, "", "", ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then fecesf = IIf(IsNull(RS2!fecval), 0, RS2!fecval)
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          End If
          auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
          auxser = RS1!min_codser
       End If
       
       vCosFij = 0
       If estfij Then
          '-------> Calcular datos desde tabla estructura fija día
          RS3.Open RutinaLectura.MinutaFijaDia(2, RS1!min_codreg, RS1!min_codser, RS1!min_fecmin, RS1!mid_tipmin, sql1), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS3.EOF And Not IsNull(RS3!cosesf) Then vCosFij = RS3!cosesf
          RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
       ElseIf Not estfij And fecesf > 0 Then
          '-------> Calcular datos desde tabla estructura fija
          If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
             RS3.Open RutinaLectura.MinutaFija(2, RS1!min_codreg, RS1!min_codser, fecesf, fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2)) - 2))), aAp1, sql1, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          Else
             RS3.Open RutinaLectura.MinutaFija(3, RS1!min_codreg, RS1!min_codser, fecesf, fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2)) - 2))), "", sql1, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          End If
          If Not RS3.EOF And Not IsNull(RS3!cosesf) Then vCosFij = RS3!cosesf
          RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
       End If
       
       For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
           If vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!min_fecmin And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!min_codreg And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!min_codser Then
              vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", 6, 8)) = vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", 6, 8)) + IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", IIf(IsNull(RS1!min_racteo), 0, RS1!min_racteo), IIf(IsNull(RS1!min_racrea), 0, RS1!min_racrea))
              vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", 7, 9)) = vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", 7, 9)) + IIf(opcosto = 0, RS1!mid_cosrec, IIf(opcosto = 1, RS1!mid_cosdes, (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes))) + vCosFij
              vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 1
              Exit For
           ElseIf vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 Then
              vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!min_fecmin
              vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!min_codreg
              vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!min_codser
              vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", 6, 8)) = IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", IIf(IsNull(RS1!min_racteo), 0, RS1!min_racteo), IIf(IsNull(RS1!min_racrea), 0, RS1!min_racrea))
              vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", 7, 9)) = IIf(opcosto = 0, RS1!mid_cosrec, IIf(opcosto = 1, RS1!mid_cosdes, (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes))) + vCosFij
              vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 1
              Exit For
           End If
       Next i
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Traer costo estructura fija que no este asociada a planificación Minutas
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
'                     "AND   b_minuta.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _

       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " INNER JOIN (b_minuta INNER JOIN b_minutadet ON b_minuta.min_codigo = b_minutadet.mid_codigo) ON " & aAp & ".codser = b_minuta.min_codser SET " & aAp & ".eximin = 1 " & _
                     "WHERE b_minuta.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                     "AND   b_minuta.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                     "AND   b_minuta.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " AND b_minuta.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " AND b_minutadet.mid_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ") AND   b_minuta.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") "
    Else
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " SET " & aAp & ".eximin = 1 FROM " & aAp & ", b_minuta, b_minutadet WHERE b_minuta.min_codigo = b_minutadet.mid_codigo AND " & aAp & ".codser = b_minuta.min_codser " & _
                     "AND   b_minuta.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                     "AND   b_minuta.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                     "AND   b_minuta.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " AND b_minuta.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " AND b_minutadet.mid_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ")"
    End If
    vg_db.Execute "DELETE " & aAp & " FROM " & aAp & " WHERE eximin = 1"
  
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.mfd_codreg, a.mfd_codser, a.mfd_tipmin, a.mfd_fecha, SUM(a.mfd_canpro*a.mfd_cospro) AS mfd_cospro " & _
             "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos b " & _
             "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = b.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   a.mfd_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   a.mfd_codser IN (SELECT DISTINCT codser FROM " & aAp & ") " & _
             "AND   a.mfd_fecha >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   a.mfd_fecha <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   a.mfd_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ") " & _
             "AND   " & sql1 & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.mfd_codreg, a.mfd_codser, a.mfd_tipmin, a.mfd_fecha " & _
             "ORDER BY a.mfd_codreg, a.mfd_codser, a.mfd_fecha, a.mfd_tipmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       auxreg = 0: auxser = 0: estfij = False
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
              If vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!mfd_fecha And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!mfd_codreg And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!mfd_codser Then
'                 vec_cosmin(i, 11) = vec_cosmin(i, 11) + RS1!mfd_cospro
'                 vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mfd_tipmin = "1", 6, 8)) = 1
                 vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mfd_tipmin = "1", 7, 9)) = vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mfd_tipmin = "1", 7, 9)) + IIf(opcosto = 0, RS1!mfd_cospro, IIf(opcosto = 1, RS1!mfd_cospro, (RS1!mfd_cospro + RS1!mfd_cospro)))
'                 vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 2
                 Exit For
              ElseIf vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 Then
                 vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!mfd_fecha
                 vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!mfd_codreg
                 vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!mfd_codser
                 vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mfd_tipmin = "1", 6, 8)) = 1
                 vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mfd_tipmin = "1", 7, 9)) = IIf(opcosto = 0, RS1!mfd_cospro, IIf(opcosto = 1, RS1!mfd_cospro, (RS1!mfd_cospro + RS1!mfd_cospro)))
                 vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 2
                 Exit For
              End If
          Next i
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Traer costo salida & devolución
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " SUM(IIf(a.tov_tipdoc='SP',c.dev_ptotal,'-' & c.dev_ptotal)) AS dev_ptotal ", " SUM(CASE WHEN a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' THEN c.dev_ptotal ELSE (-1 * c.dev_ptotal) END) AS dev_ptotal ")
    sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sql4 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    totdoc = 0: vFcUnit = 0
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_fecpro, a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser, " & _
             " " & sql2 & " " & _
             "FROM  b_totventas a, b_productos b, b_detventas c " & _
             "WHERE a.tov_rutcli = c.dev_rutcli " & _
             "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = c.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_numdoc = c.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND   c.dev_codmer = b.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   " & sql1 & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND  (a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' OR a.tov_tipdoc = 'DP') " & _
             "AND   c.dev_canmer <> 0 " & _
             "AND   a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' AND a.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro >= " & sql3 & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro <= " & sql4 & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_fecpro, a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser ORDER BY a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser, a.tov_fecpro", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       DoEvents
       For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
           If vec_cosmin(i, 1) = Val(Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd")) And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!tov_codreg And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!tov_codser Then
              vec_cosmin(i, 11) = vec_cosmin(i, 11) + RS1!dev_ptotal
              vec_cosmin(i, 10) = IIf(vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 2, 1, 0)
              Exit For
           ElseIf vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 Then
              vec_cosmin(i, 1) = Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd")
              vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!tov_codreg
              vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!tov_codser
              vec_cosmin(i, 11) = RS1!dev_ptotal
              Exit For
           End If
       Next i
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Mover raciones
    If opinc = False Then
       RS1.Open "SELECT mir_fecmin, mir_codreg, mir_codser, SUM(mir_nrorac) AS mir_nrorac FROM b_minutaraciones " & _
                "WHERE mir_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                "AND   mir_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND   mir_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND   mir_rutcli IN ('PRODUCIDAS') " & _
                "AND   mir_fecmin >= " & fecini & " AND mir_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " AND mir_nrorac > 0 GROUP BY mir_fecmin, mir_codreg, mir_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          DoEvents
          For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
           If vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!mir_fecmin And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!mir_codreg And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!mir_codser Then
              vec_cosmin(i, 10) = IIf(vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 2, 1, vec_cosmin(i, 10) + IIf(IsNull(RS1!mir_nrorac), 0, RS1!mir_nrorac))
              Exit For
           ElseIf vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 Then
              vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!mir_fecmin
              vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!mir_codreg
              vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!mir_codser
              vec_cosmin(i, 10) = IIf(vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 2, 1, IIf(IsNull(RS1!mir_nrorac), 0, RS1!mir_nrorac))
              Exit For
           End If
          Next i
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
       RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    End If
    For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
        a = vec_cosmin(i, 1)
        a = vec_cosmin(i, 11)
    Next i
    
    '-------> Proceso de imprimir
    If vec_cosmin(1, 1) < 1 Then Close #1: Exit Function
    auxreg = 0: auxser = 0
    tgracpt = 0: tgracpr = 0: tgracre = 0: tgrcospt = 0: tgrcospr = 0: tgrcosre = 0
    j = 1
    For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
        If vec_cosmin(i, 1) > 0 Then
           If vec_cosmin(i, 2) <> auxreg Or vec_cosmin(i, 4) <> auxser Then
              If auxreg > 0 Or auxser > 0 Then
                 auxreg = 0: auxser = 0
                 j = j + 2
                 '-------> Totales generales
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) = "Total"
                 '-------> Sumar totales generales
                 tgracpt = tgracpt + trateo
                 tgcospt = tgcospt + tcoteo
                 tgracpr = tgracpr + trarea
                 tgcospr = tgcospr + tcorea
                 tgracre = tgracre + trafod
                 tgcosre = tgcosre + tcofod
                 If opinf = 0 Or opinf = 2 Then
                    If Not opinc Then
                       If trateo > 0 Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((tcoteo / trateo), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                       End If
                    ElseIf opinc Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    End If
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trateo, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(tcoteo, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
                 Else
                    If Not opinc Then
                       If trarea > 0 Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((tcorea / trarea), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                       End If
                    ElseIf opinc Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    End If
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trarea, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(tcorea, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
                 End If
                 If opinf = 2 Then
                    If trarea > 0 Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tcorea / trarea), fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = ""
                    End If
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trarea, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 7, 3)) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    If totteo > 0 And totrea > 0 Then
                       If opinc = False Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur((((tcorea / trarea) - (tcoteo / trateo)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       ElseIf opinc = True Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(((totrea - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       End If
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    End If
                    If trafod > 0 Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 9) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tcofod / trafod), fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 9) = ""
                    End If
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 10) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trafod, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 5)) = Format(tcofod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    If totrea > 0 And tcofod > 0 Then
                       If opinc = False And tcofod > 0 And trafod > 0 Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(CCur(tcofod / trafod) - (tcorea / trarea), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       ElseIf opinc = True Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       End If
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    End If
                 Else
                    If trafod > 0 Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tcofod / trafod), fg_Pict(6, 2)), "") 'Format(cosfod, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = ""
                    End If
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trafod, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 7, 3)) = Format(tcofod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    If totteo > 0 And tcofod > 0 And opinf = 0 Then
                       If opinc = False And tcofod > 0 And trafod > 0 Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur((((tcofod / trafod) - (tcoteo / trateo)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       ElseIf opinc = True Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       End If
                    ElseIf totrea > 0 And tcofod > 0 And opinf = 1 Then
                       If opinc = False And tcofod > 0 And trafod > 0 Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur((((tcofod / trafod) - (tcorea / trarea)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       ElseIf opinc = True Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       End If
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    End If
                 End If
                 
                 Print #1, Chr(13) & Chr(13)
                 .TableCell(tcRows) = j
                 .TableBorder = tbNone
                 .EndTable
                 .NewPage
              End If
               
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = ancpag: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
              .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = nomtit & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
              .TableBorder = tbNone
              .EndTable
              .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
                
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 6000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen"
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Servicio"
              RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS1!cli_nombre
              RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
           
              RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Regimen(2, vec_cosmin(i, 2), ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Trim(RS1!reg_nombre)
              RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
           
              RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Servicio(8, vec_cosmin(i, 4), ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre) & IIf(vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 2, " (Solo Estructura Fija) ", "")
              RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
                
              '-------> Traer costo patron
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Costo Piso"
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Costo Techo"
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 3) = ""
              RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_costopatron WHERE cpa_cencos='" & cencos & "' AND cpa_codreg=" & vec_cosmin(i, 2) & " AND cpa_codser=" & vec_cosmin(i, 4) & " AND cpa_anomes=" & Mid(vec_cosmin(i, 1), 1, 6) & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS1.EOF Then
                 Do While Not RS1.EOF
                     .TableCell(tcFontBold, IIf(Trim(RS1!cpa_descripcion) = "PISO", 1, 2), 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, IIf(Trim(RS1!cpa_descripcion) = "PISO", 1, 2), 4) = "$ " & Format(IIf(IsNull(RS1!cpa_valor), 0, RS1!cpa_valor), fg_Pict(9, 2))
                     RS1.MoveNext
                  Loop
