              End If
              RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
              .TableBorder = tbNone
              .EndTable
              .text = Chr(13)
               
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = IIf(opinf = 0 Or opinf = 1, 4, 6): .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = IIf(opinc = False, 3900, 2300): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = IIf(opinc = False, 3900, 2300): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = IIf(opinc = False, 1200, 2200): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop 'taCenterTop
              If opinf = 2 Then
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = IIf(opinc = False, 3900, 2200): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = IIf(opinc = False, 1200, 2200): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop 'taCenterTop
              End If
              .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = IIf(opinf = 2, "Planif. Teórico", IIf(opinf = 0, "Planif. Teórico", "Planif. Real"))
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = IIf(opinf = 2, "Planif. Real", "Realizado")
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = IIf(opinf = 2, "Desviación", "Desviación")
              If opinf = 2 Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Realizado"
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Desviación"
              End If
              .TableBorder = tbTop
              .EndTable
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = IIf(opinf = 0 Or opinf = 1, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4), IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)): .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              If opinc = False Then
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
                 If opinf = 2 Then
                    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
                    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taRightTop
                    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taRightTop
                    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 12) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 12) = taRightTop
                 End If
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 2300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 2200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
              End If
              .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = IIf(opinc = False, "Costo Bandeja", "Costo Total")
              If opinc = False Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Nro. Rac."
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Costo Total"
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Costo bandeja"
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Nro. Rac."
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Costo Total"
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = IIf(opinf <= 1, "C.Band.Realizado", "C.Band.Plan.")
                 If opinf = 2 Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = "Costo Bandeja"
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) = "Nro. Rac."
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11) = "Costo Total"
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 12) = "C.Band.Realizado"
                 End If
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Costo Total"
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = IIf(opinf <= 1, "C.Band.Realizado", "C.Band.Plan.")
                 If opinf = 2 Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Costo Total"
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "C.Band.Realizado"
                 End If
              End If
              .TableBorder = tbBottom
              .EndTable
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = IIf(opinf = 0 Or opinf = 1, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4), IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)): .TableCell(tcRows) = 100 '00
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              If opinc = False Then
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 12) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 12) = taRightTop
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 2300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 2200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
              End If
              j = 2: costeo = 0: cosrea = 0: tcoteo = 0: tcorea = 0: racteo = 0: vFcUnit = 0: vPtUnit = 0: vPrUnit = 0
              racrea = 0: trateo = 0: trarea = 0: totteo = 0: totrea = 0: tcofod = 0: trafod = 0: cosfod = 0: tdiateo = 0: tdiarea = 0
              Preview.Toolbar1.Buttons(4).Visible = True
              Preview.Toolbar1.Buttons(5).Visible = True
              auxreg = vec_cosmin(i, 2)
              auxser = vec_cosmin(i, 4)
'               j = j + 1
           End If
           '-------> Mover costo teorico
           costeo = CCur(costeo + vec_cosmin(i, 7))
           racteo = CCur(racteo + vec_cosmin(i, 6))
           tdiateo = CCur(tdiateo + vec_cosmin(i, 7))
           tcoteo = CCur(tcoteo + vec_cosmin(i, 7))
           trateo = CCur(trateo + vec_cosmin(i, 6))
           '-------> Mover costo real
           cosrea = CCur(cosrea + vec_cosmin(i, 9))
           racrea = CCur(racrea + vec_cosmin(i, 8))
           tdiarea = CCur(tdiarea + vec_cosmin(i, 9))
           tcorea = CCur(tcorea + vec_cosmin(i, 9))
           trarea = CCur(trarea + vec_cosmin(i, 8))
           '-------> Mover costo realizado
           tcofod = CCur(tcofod + vec_cosmin(i, 11))
           
           totteo = CCur(totteo + tdiateo)
           .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) = Mid(vec_cosmin(i, 1), 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(vec_cosmin(i, 1), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(vec_cosmin(i, 1), 1, 4)
           vPtUnit = 0: vPrUnit = 0
           If vec_cosmin(i, 6) > 0 Then vPtUnit = (vec_cosmin(i, 7) / vec_cosmin(i, 6))
           If vec_cosmin(i, 8) > 0 Then vPrUnit = (vec_cosmin(i, 9) / vec_cosmin(i, 8))
           If opinf = 0 Or opinf = 2 Then
              '-------> Mover teórico
              If Not opinc Then
                 If vec_cosmin(i, 6) > 0 Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((vec_cosmin(i, 7) / vec_cosmin(i, 6)), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 End If
              ElseIf opinc Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(vec_cosmin(i, 7), fg_Pict(6, 2))
              End If
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(vec_cosmin(i, 6), fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(vec_cosmin(i, 7), fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
           Else
              '-------> Mover Real
              If Not opinc Then
                 If vec_cosmin(i, 8) > 0 Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((vec_cosmin(i, 9) / vec_cosmin(i, 8)), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 End If
              ElseIf opinc Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(vec_cosmin(i, 9), fg_Pict(6, 2))
              End If
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(vec_cosmin(i, 8), fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(vec_cosmin(i, 9), fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
           End If
           totrea = CCur(totrea + tdiarea)
           If opinf = 2 Then
              '-------> Mover Real
              If Not opinc Then
                 If vec_cosmin(i, 8) > 0 Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 5, 3)) = Format((vec_cosmin(i, 9) / vec_cosmin(i, 8)), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 5, 3)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 End If
              ElseIf opinc Then
                 If vec_cosmin(i, 8) > 0 Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 5, 3)) = Format(vec_cosmin(i, 9), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 5, 3)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 End If
              End If
              If opinc = False Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = Format(vec_cosmin(i, 8), fg_Pict(6, 0))
              Else
                 If vec_cosmin(i, 7) > 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 9) > 0 Then
                    If vPtUnit > 0 And opinc = False Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = Format(CCur(vPrUnit - vPtUnit), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    ElseIf opinc = True Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = Format(CCur(vec_cosmin(i, 9) - vec_cosmin(i, 7)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    End If
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 End If
              End If
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 7, 3)) = Format(vec_cosmin(i, 9), fg_Pict(6, 2))
              If vec_cosmin(i, 7) > 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 9) > 0 Then
                 If vPtUnit > 0 And opinc = False Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(vPrUnit - vPtUnit), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 ElseIf opinc = True Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(vec_cosmin(i, 9) - vec_cosmin(i, 7)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 End If
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
              End If
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 9) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 10) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 5)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           Else
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 5, 3)) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 6, 4)) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 7, 3)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           End If
           totdoc = 0: vFcUnit = 0
           '-------> Mover salida & devolución
           If opinf = 2 Then
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 5)) = Format(vec_cosmin(i, 11), fg_Pict(6, 2))
           Else
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 7, 3)) = Format(vec_cosmin(i, 11), fg_Pict(6, 2))
           End If
           '-------> Mover raciones
           If opinc = False Then
              If vec_cosmin(i, 10) > 0 Then
                 vFcUnit = (vec_cosmin(i, 11) / vec_cosmin(i, 10))
                 If opinf = 2 Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 9) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(CCur(vec_cosmin(i, 11) / vec_cosmin(i, 10)), fg_Pict(6, 2)), ""): cosfod = CCur(cosfod + (vec_cosmin(i, 11) / vec_cosmin(i, 10)))
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(CCur(vec_cosmin(i, 11) / vec_cosmin(i, 10)), fg_Pict(6, 2)), ""): cosfod = CCur(cosfod + (vec_cosmin(i, 11) / vec_cosmin(i, 10)))
                 End If
              End If
              If opinf = 2 Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, 10) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(vec_cosmin(i, 10), fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(vec_cosmin(i, 10), fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
              End If
              trafod = CCur(trafod + vec_cosmin(i, 10))
           End If
           If opinf = 2 Then
              If vec_cosmin(i, 9) > 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 11) > 0 Then
                 If vPrUnit > 0 And opinc = False Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(CCur(vFcUnit - vPrUnit), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 ElseIf opinc = True Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(CCur(vec_cosmin(i, 11) - vec_cosmin(i, 9)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 End If
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
              End If
           Else
              If vec_cosmin(i, 7) > 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 11) > 0 And opinf = 0 Then
                 If vec_cosmin(i, 7) > 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 11) > 0 Then
                    If vPtUnit > 0 And opinc = False Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(vFcUnit - vPtUnit), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    ElseIf opinc = True Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(vec_cosmin(i, 11) - vec_cosmin(i, 7)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    End If
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 End If
              ElseIf vec_cosmin(i, 9) > 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 11) > 0 And opinf = 1 Then
                 If vec_cosmin(i, 9) > 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 11) > 0 Then
                    If vPrUnit > 0 And opinc = False Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(vFcUnit - vPrUnit), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    ElseIf opinc = True Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(vec_cosmin(i, 11) - vec_cosmin(i, 9)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    End If
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 End If
              End If
           End If
           tdiateo = 0: tdiarea = 0
           j = j + 1
        End If
    Next i
    j = j + 2
    '-------> Totales generales
    .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) = "Total"
    If opinf = 0 Or opinf = 2 Then
       If Not opinc Then
          If trateo > 0 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((tcoteo / trateo), fg_Pict(6, 2))
          Else
             .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
          End If
       ElseIf opinc Then
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       End If
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trateo, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(tcoteo, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
    Else
       If Not opinc Then
          If trarea > 0 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((tcorea / trarea), fg_Pict(6, 2))
          Else
             .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
          End If
       ElseIf opinc Then
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       End If
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trarea, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(tcorea, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
    End If
    If opinf = 2 Then
       If trarea > 0 Then
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tcorea / trarea), fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = ""
       End If
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trarea, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 7, 3)) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       If totteo > 0 And totrea > 0 Then
          If opinc = False Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur((((tcorea / trarea) - (tcoteo / trateo)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          ElseIf opinc = True Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(((totrea - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          Else
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          End If
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       End If
       If trafod > 0 Then
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 9) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tcofod / trafod), fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 9) = ""
       End If
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 10) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trafod, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 5)) = Format(tcofod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       If totrea > 0 And tcofod > 0 Then
          If opinc = False And tcofod > 0 And trafod > 0 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(CCur(tcofod / trafod) - (tcorea / trarea), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          ElseIf opinc = True Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          Else
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          End If
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       End If
    Else
       If trafod > 0 Then
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tcofod / trafod), fg_Pict(6, 2)), "") 'Format(cosfod, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = ""
       End If
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trafod, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 7, 3)) = Format(tcofod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       If totteo > 0 And tcofod > 0 And opinf = 0 Then
          If opinc = False And tcofod > 0 And trafod > 0 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur((((tcofod / trafod) - (tcoteo / trateo)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          ElseIf opinc = True Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          Else
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          End If
       ElseIf totrea > 0 And tcofod > 0 And opinf = 1 Then
          If opinc = False And tcofod > 0 And trafod > 0 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur((((tcofod / trafod) - (tcorea / trarea)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          ElseIf opinc = True Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          Else
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          End If
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       End If
    End If
    j = j + 2
    
    '-------> Totales generales servicio
    '-------> Sumar totales generales
    tgracpt = tgracpt + trateo
    tgcospt = tgcospt + tcoteo
    tgracpr = tgracpr + trarea
    tgcospr = tgcospr + tcorea
    tgracre = tgracre + trafod
    tgcosre = tgcosre + tcofod
    .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) = "T. General"
    If opinf = 0 Or opinf = 2 Then
       If Not opinc Then
          If tgracpt > 0 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((tgcospt / tgracpt), fg_Pict(6, 2))
          Else
             .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
          End If
       ElseIf opinc Then
       
'          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2))
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(tgcospt, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       End If
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(tgracpt, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(tgcospt, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
    Else
       If Not opinc Then
          If tgracpr > 0 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((tgcospr / tgracpr), fg_Pict(6, 2))
          Else
             .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
          End If
       ElseIf opinc Then
'          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2))
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(tgcospr, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       End If
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(tgracpr, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(tgcospr, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
    End If
    If opinf = 2 Then
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tgcospr / tgracpr), fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(tgracpr, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
'       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 7, 3)) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 7, 3)) = Format(tgcospr, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       If totteo > 0 And totrea > 0 Then
          If opinc = False Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur((((tgcospr / tgracpr) - (tgcospt / tgracpt)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          ElseIf opinc = True Then
'             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(((totrea - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(((tgcospr - tgcospt))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          Else
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          End If
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       End If
       If tgracre > 0 Then
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 9) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tgcosre / tgracre), fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 9) = ""
       End If
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 10) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(tgracre, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 5)) = Format(tgcosre, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       If totrea > 0 And tgcosre > 0 Then
          If opinc = False And tgcosre > 0 And tgracre > 0 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(CCur(tgcosre / tgracre) - (tgcospr / tgracpr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          ElseIf opinc = True Then
'             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(CCur(((tgcosre - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(CCur(((tgcosre - tgcospr))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          Else
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          End If
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 6)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       End If
    Else
       If tgracre > 0 Then
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tgcosre / tgracre), fg_Pict(6, 2)), "") 'Format(cosfod, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = ""
       End If
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(tgracre, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 7, 3)) = Format(tgcosre, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       If tgcospt > 0 And tgcosre > 0 And opinf = 0 Then
          If opinc = False And tgcosre > 0 And tgracre > 0 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur((((tgcosre / tgracre) - (tgcospt / tgracpt)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          ElseIf opinc = True Then
'             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(((tgcosre - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(((tgcosre - tgcospt))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          Else
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          End If
       ElseIf totrea > 0 And tgcosre > 0 And opinf = 1 Then
          If opinc = False And tgcosre > 0 And tgracre > 0 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur((((tgcosre / tgracre) - (tgcospr / tgracpr)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          ElseIf opinc = True Then
'             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(((tgcosre - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(CCur(((tgcospr - tgcosre))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          Else
             .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          End If
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       End If
    End If
    Print #1, Chr(13) & Chr(13)
    .TableCell(tcRows) = j
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc: Close #1
    '-------> Borrar tablas temporales
    If Trim(aAp) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp & ""
    If Trim(aAp1) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp1 & ""
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_CostTeoReaFood:
    fg_descarga
    Resume Next
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_CostoTeoricoRealFoodAcum(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String, opinf As Integer, opinc As Boolean, opcosto As Integer, numreg As Long, numser As Long)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxfec As Long, auxfecrac As Long, ancpag As Long, fecesf As Long, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long, nrorac As Long
Dim nomser As String, cLin As String, nomtit As String, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String, sql4 As String, estfij As Boolean
Dim costeo As Double, cosrea As Double, racteo As Double, racrea As Double, totteo As Double, totdoc As Double
Dim tcoteo As Double, tcorea As Double, trateo As Double, trarea As Double, totrea As Double, vCosFij As Double, vFcUnit As Double, vPtUnit As Double, vPrUnit As Double
Dim cosfod As Double, tcofod As Double, trafod As Double, tdiateo As Double, tdiarea As Double
Dim vec_cosmin() As Variant
Dim aAp As String, aAp1 As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_CostTeoReaFood
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Costo Plan. Teórico - Plan. Real - Realizado (Acumulado) "
nomtit = "Costo Plan. Teorico - Plan. Real - Realizado " & IIf(opcosto = 2, "(Acumulado Alimentación & Desechable) ", IIf(opcosto = 0, "(Acumulado Alimentación) ", "(Acumulado Desechable) "))
ancpag = 13500
If opinf = 3 Then
   If opcosto = 0 Then
      nomtit = "Costo Plan. Teórico & Realizado (Acumulado Alimentación) "
   ElseIf opcosto = 1 Then
      nomtit = "Costo Plan. Teórico & Realizado (Acumulado Desechable) "
   End If
   ancpag = 10500
ElseIf opinf = 4 Then
   If opcosto = 0 Then
      nomtit = "Costo Plan. Real & Realizado (Acumulado Alimentación) "
   ElseIf opcosto = 1 Then
      nomtit = "Costo Plan. Real & Realizado (Acumulado Desechable) "
   End If
   ancpag = 10500
End If
sql1 = IIf(opcosto = 0, "c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') ", IIf(opcosto = 1, "c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "') ", "(c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') OR c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "')) "))
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = IIf(opinf = O Or opinf = 1, orPortrait, orLandscape)
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 7
    .HdrFontBold = True
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 7
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    numreg = (numser * 31)
    ReDim vec_cosmin(numser * 31, 15)
    For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
        vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 'Fecha ddmmyyyy
        vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 'Código regimen
        vec_cosmin(i, 3) = "" 'Nombre regimen
        vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 'Código servicio
        vec_cosmin(i, 5) = "" 'Nombre servicio
        vec_cosmin(i, 6) = 0 'Raciones teorica
        vec_cosmin(i, 7) = 0 'Monto teorica
        vec_cosmin(i, 8) = 0 'raciones real
        vec_cosmin(i, 9) = 0 'Monto real
        vec_cosmin(i, 10) = 0 'raciones realizada
        vec_cosmin(i, 11) = 0 'Monto realizada
        vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 0 'Monto realizada
    Next i
    '-------> Insert tabla productospmpdia
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       aAp1 = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ProductoPMPCosTeoReFooAcum"
       fg_CheckTmp aAp1
       vg_db.Execute "SELECT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, 0 AS ppd_propon, Max(ppd_fecdia) AS ppd_fecdia " & _
                     "INTO " & aAp1 & " " & _
                     "FROM b_productospmpdia " & _
                     "WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                     "AND   ppd_fecdia >= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_fecdia <= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia), "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                     "AND   ppd_propon > 0 " & _
                     "GROUP BY ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro"
       vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp1 & " ADD Constraint pmp_pk Primary Key (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_fecdia)"
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp1 & " INNER JOIN b_productospmpdia ON (" & aAp1 & ".ppd_fecdia = b_productospmpdia.ppd_fecdia) AND (" & aAp1 & ".ppd_codpro = b_productospmpdia.ppd_codpro) AND (" & aAp1 & ".ppd_cencos = b_productospmpdia.ppd_cencos) SET " & aAp1 & ".ppd_propon=b_productospmpdia.ppd_propon"
       vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp1 & " (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia) SELECT DISTINCT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_codpro NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_codpro FROM " & aAp1 & ")"
    End If
    aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ServicioNoPlanFoodAcum"
    fg_CheckTmp aAp
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT ser_codigo AS codser, 0 AS eximin INTO " & aAp & " FROM a_servicio", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp & " ADD Constraint a_servicio_pk Primary Key (codser)"
    End If

    '------- Mover costo planificación teorica vs real
    RS1.Open "SELECT b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, c.mid_tipmin, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo, isnull(b.min_racteo,0) as min_racteo , isnull(b.min_racrea,0) as min_racrea, " & _
             "ROUND(SUM(c.mid_cosrec*isnull(c.mid_numrac,0)),2) AS mid_cosrec FROM b_minuta b, b_minutadet c " & _
             "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   c.mid_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ") " & _
             "GROUP BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, c.mid_tipmin, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo, b.min_racteo, b.min_racrea " & _
             "ORDER BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, b.min_fecmin, c.mid_tipmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then Close #1: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Function
    auxreg = 0: auxser = 0: estfij = False
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       DoEvents
       If RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
          '------- Traer estructura fija
          estfij = False
          RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT mfd_cencos FROM b_minutafijadia " & _
                   "WHERE mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   mfd_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   mfd_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   mfd_fecha >= " & fecini & " AND mfd_fecha <= " & fecfin & " AND mfd_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ")", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then estfij = True
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
           
          '------- Buscar fecha estructura fija
          fecesf = 0
          If Not estfij Then
             RS2.Open "SELECT MAX(mif_fecval) AS fecval FROM b_minutafija " & _
                      "WHERE mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then fecesf = IIf(IsNull(RS2!fecval), 0, RS2!fecval)
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          End If
          auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
          auxser = RS1!min_codser
       End If
       
       vCosFij = 0
       If estfij Then
          '------- Calcular datos desde tabla estructura fija día
          RS3.Open "SELECT SUM(a.mfd_canpro*a.mfd_cospro) AS cosfij " & _
                   "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos c " & _
                   "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = c.pro_codigo " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_fecha = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " AND a.mfd_tipmin = '" & RS1!mid_tipmin & "' " & _
                   "AND   " & sql1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS3.EOF And Not IsNull(RS3!cosfij) Then vCosFij = RS3!cosfij
          RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
       ElseIf Not estfij And fecesf > 0 Then
          '------- Calcular datos desde tabla estructura fija
          If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
             RS3.Open "SELECT SUM(b.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro) AS cosfij " & _
                      "FROM  b_minutafija a, " & aAp1 & " b, b_productos c " & _
                      "WHERE a.mif_codpro = c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo = b.ppd_codpro AND b.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_fecval = " & fecesf & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_dianro = " & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                      "AND   " & sql1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          Else
             RS3.Open "SELECT SUM(b.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro) AS cosfij " & _
                      "FROM  b_minutafija a, b_productospmpdia b, b_productos c " & _
                      "WHERE a.mif_codpro = c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo = b.ppd_codpro AND b.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND b.ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_fecval = " & fecesf & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_dianro = " & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                      "AND   " & sql1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          End If
          If Not RS3.EOF And Not IsNull(RS3!cosfij) Then vCosFij = RS3!cosfij
          RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
       End If
       For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
           If vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!min_fecmin And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!min_codreg And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!min_codser Then
              vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", 6, 8)) = vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", 6, 8)) + IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", IIf(IsNull(RS1!min_racteo), 0, RS1!min_racteo), IIf(IsNull(RS1!min_racrea), 0, RS1!min_racrea))
              vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", 7, 9)) = vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", 7, 9)) + RS1!mid_cosrec + vCosFij
              vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 1
              Exit For
           ElseIf vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 Then
              vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!min_fecmin
              vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!min_codreg
              vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!min_codser
              vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", 6, 8)) = IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", IIf(IsNull(RS1!min_racteo), 0, RS1!min_racteo), IIf(IsNull(RS1!min_racrea), 0, RS1!min_racrea))
              vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", 7, 9)) = RS1!mid_cosrec + vCosFij
              vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 1
              Exit For
           End If
       Next i
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    '-------> Traer costo estructura fija que no este asociada a planificación Minutas
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " INNER JOIN (b_minuta INNER JOIN b_minutadet ON b_minuta.min_codigo = b_minutadet.mid_codigo) ON " & aAp & ".codser = b_minuta.min_codser SET " & aAp & ".eximin = 1 " & _
                     "WHERE b_minuta.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                     "AND   b_minuta.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                     "AND   b_minuta.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " AND b_minuta.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " AND b_minutadet.mid_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ")"
    Else
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " SET " & aAp & ".eximin = 1 FROM " & aAp & ", b_minuta, b_minutadet WHERE b_minuta.min_codigo = b_minutadet.mid_codigo AND " & aAp & ".codser = b_minuta.min_codser " & _
                     "AND b_minuta.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                     "AND   b_minuta.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                     "AND   b_minuta.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " AND b_minuta.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " AND b_minutadet.mid_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ")"
    End If
    vg_db.Execute "DELETE " & aAp & " FROM " & aAp & " WHERE eximin = 1"
  
'    RS1.Open "SELECT a.mfd_codreg, a.mfd_codser, a.mfd_tipmin, a.mfd_fecha, SUM(a.mfd_canpro*a.mfd_cospro) AS mfd_cospro " & _
'             "FROM b_minutafijadia a, " & aAp & ", b_productos c " & _
'             "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = c.pro_codigo " & _
'             "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
'             "AND   a.mfd_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
'             "AND   a.mfd_codser IN (SELECT codser FROM " & aAp & ") " & _
'             "AND   a.mfd_fecha >= " & fecini & " " & _
'             "AND   a.mfd_fecha <= " & fecfin & " " & _
'             "AND   a.mfd_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ") " & _
'             "AND   " & sql1 & " " & _
'             "GROUP BY a.mfd_codreg, a.mfd_codser, a.mfd_tipmin, a.mfd_fecha " & _
'             "ORDER BY a.mfd_codreg, a.mfd_codser, a.mfd_fecha, a.mfd_tipmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.mfd_codreg, a.mfd_codser, a.mfd_tipmin, a.mfd_fecha, SUM(a.mfd_canpro*a.mfd_cospro) AS mfd_cospro " & _
             "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos c " & _
             "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   a.mfd_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   a.mfd_codser IN (SELECT codser FROM " & aAp & ") " & _
             "AND   a.mfd_fecha >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   a.mfd_fecha <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   a.mfd_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ") " & _
             "AND   " & sql1 & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.mfd_codreg, a.mfd_codser, a.mfd_tipmin, a.mfd_fecha " & _
             "ORDER BY a.mfd_codreg, a.mfd_codser, a.mfd_fecha, a.mfd_tipmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       auxreg = 0: auxser = 0: estfij = False
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
              If vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!mfd_fecha And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!mfd_codreg And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!mfd_codser Then
                 vec_cosmin(i, 11) = vec_cosmin(i, 11) + RS1!mfd_cospro
                 vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mfd_tipmin = "1", 6, 8)) = 1
                 vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mfd_tipmin = "1", 7, 9)) = vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mfd_tipmin = "1", 7, 9)) + IIf(opcosto = 0, RS1!mfd_cospro, IIf(opcosto = 1, RS1!mfd_cospro, (RS1!mfd_cospro + RS1!mfd_cospro)))
                 vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 2
                 Exit For
              ElseIf vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 Then
                 vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!mfd_fecha
                 vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!mfd_codreg
                 vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!mfd_codser
                 vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mfd_tipmin = "1", 6, 8)) = 1
                 vec_cosmin(i, IIf(RS1!mfd_tipmin = "1", 7, 9)) = IIf(opcosto = 0, RS1!mfd_cospro, IIf(opcosto = 1, RS1!mfd_cospro, (RS1!mfd_cospro + RS1!mfd_cospro)))
                 vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 2
                 Exit For
              End If
          Next i
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '------- Traer costo salida & devolución
    totdoc = 0: vFcUnit = 0
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " SUM(IIf(a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP',b.dev_ptotal,'-' & b.dev_ptotal)) AS dev_ptotal ", " SUM(CASE WHEN a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' THEN b.dev_ptotal ELSE (-1 * b.dev_ptotal) END) AS dev_ptotal ")
    sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sql4 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_fecpro, a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser, " & _
             " " & sql2 & " " & _
             "FROM  b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c " & _
             "WHERE a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
             "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND   b.dev_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   " & sql1 & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND  (a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' OR a.tov_tipdoc='DP') " & _
             "AND   b.dev_canmer <> 0 " & _
             "AND   a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' AND a.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro >= " & sql3 & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro <= " & sql4 & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_fecpro, a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser ORDER BY a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser, a.tov_fecpro", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       DoEvents
       For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
           If vec_cosmin(i, 1) = Val(Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd")) And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!tov_codreg And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!tov_codser Then
              vec_cosmin(i, 11) = vec_cosmin(i, 11) + RS1!dev_ptotal
              vec_cosmin(i, 10) = IIf(vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 2, 1, 0)
              Exit For
           ElseIf vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 Then
              vec_cosmin(i, 1) = Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd")
              vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!tov_codreg
              vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!tov_codser
              vec_cosmin(i, 11) = RS1!dev_ptotal
              Exit For
           End If
       Next i
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '------- Mover raciones
    If opinc = False Then
       RS1.Open "SELECT mir_fecmin, mir_codreg, mir_codser, SUM(mir_nrorac) AS mir_nrorac FROM b_minutaraciones " & _
                "WHERE mir_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                "AND   mir_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND   mir_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND   mir_rutcli IN ('PRODUCIDAS') " & _
                "AND   mir_fecmin>=" & fecini & " AND mir_fecmin<=" & fecfin & " GROUP BY mir_fecmin, mir_codreg, mir_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          DoEvents
          For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
           If vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!mir_fecmin And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!mir_codreg And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!mir_codser Then
              vec_cosmin(i, 10) = vec_cosmin(i, 10) + IIf(IsNull(RS1!mir_nrorac), 0, RS1!mir_nrorac)
              Exit For
           ElseIf vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 Then
              vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!mir_fecmin
              vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!mir_codreg
              vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!mir_codser
              vec_cosmin(i, 10) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!mir_nrorac), 0, RS1!mir_nrorac)
              Exit For
           End If
          Next i
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
       RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    End If
    '------- Proceso de imprimir
    If vec_cosmin(1, 1) < 1 Then Close #1: Exit Function
    auxreg = 0: auxser = 0
    j = 1
    For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
        If vec_cosmin(i, 1) > 0 Then
           If vec_cosmin(i, 2) <> auxreg Or vec_cosmin(i, 4) <> auxser Then
              If auxreg > 0 Or auxser > 0 Then
                 j = j + 2
                 '------- Totales generales
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) = "Total "
                 If opinf = 3 Or opinf = 5 Then
                    If Not opinc Then
                       If trateo > 0 Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((tcoteo / trateo), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
                       End If
                    ElseIf opinc Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    End If
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trateo, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
                 Else
                    If Not opinc Then
                       If trarea > 0 Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((tcorea / trarea), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
                       End If
                    ElseIf opinc Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    End If
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trarea, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
                 End If
                 If opinf = 5 Then
                    If trarea > 0 Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tcorea / trarea), fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
                    End If
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 7) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trarea, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    If totteo > 0 And totrea > 0 Then
                       If trateo > 0 And trarea > 0 And opinc = False Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur((((tcorea / trarea) - (tcoteo / trateo)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       ElseIf opinc = True Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur(((totrea - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       End If
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    End If
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 10, 6)) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    If totteo > 0 And totrea > 0 Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 7)) = IIf(totteo > 0 And totrea > 0, Format(CCur(((totrea - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 7)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    End If
                    If trafod > 0 Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 8)) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tcofod / trafod), fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(trafod, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 8)) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
                    End If
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 13, 9)) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trafod, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 14, 8)) = Format(tcofod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    If totrea > 0 And tcofod > 0 Then
                       If trafod > 0 And trarea > 0 And opinc = False Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 15, 9)) = Format(CCur((((tcofod / trafod) - (tcorea / trarea)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       ElseIf opinc = True Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 15, 9)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 15, 9)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       End If
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 15, 9)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    End If
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 16, 10)) = Format(tcofod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    If totrea > 0 And tcofod > 0 Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 17, 11)) = IIf(totteo > 0 And tcofod > 0, Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 17, 11)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    End If
                 Else
                    If trafod > 0 Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 6, 4)) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tcofod / trafod), fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 6, 4)) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
                    End If
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 7, 6)) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trafod, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(tcofod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 10, 6)) = Format(tcofod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    If totteo > 0 And tcofod > 0 And opinf = 3 Then
                       If opinc = False And trateo > 0 And trafood > 0 Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur((((tcofod / trafod) - (totteo / trateo)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       ElseIf opinc = True Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       End If
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 7)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    ElseIf totrea > 0 And tcofod > 0 And opinf = 4 Then
                       If trafod > 0 And trarea > 0 And opinc = False Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur((((tcofod / trafod) - (totrea / trarea)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       ElseIf opinc = True Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       End If
                       .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 7)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    End If
                 End If
                 Print #1, Chr(13) & Chr(13)
                 .TableCell(tcRows) = j
                 .TableBorder = tbNone
                 .EndTable
                 .NewPage
              End If
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = ancpag: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
              .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = nomtit & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
              .TableBorder = tbNone
              .EndTable
              .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
               
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen"
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Servicio"
              
              RS1.Open "SELECT cli_codigo, cli_nombre FROM b_clientes WHERE cli_codigo='" & cencos & "' AND cli_tipo=0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
              RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
              
              RS1.Open "SELECT reg_nombre FROM a_regimen WHERE reg_codigo=" & vec_cosmin(i, 2) & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Trim(RS1!reg_nombre)
              RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
              
              RS1.Open "SELECT ser_nombre FROM a_servicio WHERE ser_codigo=" & vec_cosmin(i, 4) & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre) & IIf(vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 2, " (Solo Estructura Fija) ", "")
              RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
              
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Costo Piso"
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Costo Techo"
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 3) = ""
              '------- Traer costo patron
              RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_costopatron WHERE cpa_cencos='" & cencos & "' AND cpa_codreg=" & vec_cosmin(i, 2) & " AND cpa_codser=" & vec_cosmin(i, 4) & " AND cpa_anomes=" & Mid(vec_cosmin(i, 1), 1, 6) & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS1.EOF Then
                 Do While Not RS1.EOF
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, IIf(Trim(RS1!cpa_descripcion) = "PISO", 1, 2), 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, IIf(Trim(RS1!cpa_descripcion) = "PISO", 1, 2), 4) = "$ " & Format(IIf(IsNull(RS1!cpa_valor), 0, RS1!cpa_valor), fg_Pict(9, 2))
                    RS1.MoveNext
                 Loop
              End If
              RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
               
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
              .TableBorder = tbNone
              .EndTable
              .text = Chr(13)
              
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = IIf(Not opinc, IIf(opinf = 3 Or opinf = 4, 6, 10), IIf(opinf = 3 Or opinf = 4, 3, 4)): .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = IIf(opinc = False, 3600, 2000): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = IIf(opinc = False, 2600, 3600): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
              If Not opinc Then
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = IIf(opinc = False, 800, 3600): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop 'taCenterTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = IIf(opinc = False, 1000, 3600): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = IIf(opinc = False, 800, 3600): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop 'taCenterTop
              End If
              If opinf = 5 Then
                 If Not opinc Then
                    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = IIf(opinc = False, 2600, 3600): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
                    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = IIf(opinc = False, 800, 3600): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop 'taCenterTop
                    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = IIf(opinc = False, 1000, 3600): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taCenterTop
                    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = IIf(opinc = False, 800, 3600): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taRightTop 'taCenterTop
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = IIf(opinc = False, 2600, 3600): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
                 End If
              End If
              .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = IIf(opinf = 5, "Planif. Teórico", IIf(opinf = 3, "Planif. Teórico", "Planif. Real"))
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = IIf(opinf = 5, "Planif. Real", "Realizado")
              If Not opinc Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = IIf(opinf = 5, "% Varia.", "% Varia.")
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = ""
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = IIf(opinf = 5, "% Varia.", "% Varia.")
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Realizado"
              End If
              If opinf = 5 And Not opinc Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Realizado"
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = " % Varia."
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = ""
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) = " % Varia."
              End If
              .TableBorder = tbTop
              .EndTable
               
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = IIf(opinf = 3 Or opinf = 4, IIf(Not opinc, 11, 7), IIf(Not opinc, 17, 11)): .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = IIf(Not opinc, 600, 1000): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = IIf(Not opinc, 1000, 800): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = IIf(Not opinc, 600, 800): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taRightTop
              If opinf = 5 Then
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 12) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 12) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 13) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 13) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 14) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 14) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 15) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 15) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 16) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 16) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 17) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 17) = taRightTop
              End If
              .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = IIf(Not opinc, "Cto.Bandeja", "Costo Total")
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = IIf(Not opinc, "N.Rac.", "Costo Acum.")
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Costo Total"
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = IIf(Not opinc, "Costo Acum.", "Variación")
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = IIf(Not opinc, "Cto.Bandeja", "Costo Acum.")
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = IIf(Not opinc, "N.Rac.", "Variación")
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Costo Total"
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = IIf(opinc, IIf(opinf < 5, "C.Band.Real.", "Variación"), IIf(opinf < 5, "C.Band.Real.", "C.Band.Plan."))
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) = "Costo Acum."
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11) = IIf(opinc, IIf(opinf < 5, "C.Acum.Real.", "Variación"), IIf(opinf < 5, "C.Acum.Real.", "C.Acum.Plan."))
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 12) = "Cto.Bandeja"
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 13) = "N.Rac."
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 14) = "Costo Total"
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 15) = "C.Band.Real."
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 16) = "Costo Acum."
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 17) = "C.Acum.Realizado"
              .TableBorder = tbBottom
              .EndTable
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = IIf(opinf = 3 Or opinf = 4, IIf(Not opinc, 11, 7), IIf(Not opinc, 17, 11)): .TableCell(tcRows) = 100 '00
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = IIf(Not opinc, 600, 1000): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = IIf(Not opinc, 1000, 800): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = IIf(Not opinc, 600, 800): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taRightTop
    '          If opinf = 5 Then
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 12) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 12) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 13) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 13) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 14) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 14) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 15) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 15) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 16) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 16) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 17) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 17) = taRightTop
    '          End If
              j = 2: costeo = 0: cosrea = 0: tcoteo = 0: tcorea = 0: racteo = 0: vFcUnit = 0: vPtUnit = 0: vPrUnit = 0
              racrea = 0: trateo = 0: trarea = 0: totteo = 0: totrea = 0: tcofod = 0: trafod = 0: cosfod = 0: tdiateo = 0: tdiarea = 0
              auxreg = vec_cosmin(i, 2)
              auxser = vec_cosmin(i, 4)
           End If
        
           '------- Mover costo teorico
           If vec_cosmin(i, 6) > 0 And Not IsNull(vec_cosmin(i, 7)) Then
              costeo = CCur(costeo + IIf(IsNull(vec_cosmin(i, 6)), (vec_cosmin(i, 7)), (vec_cosmin(i, 7)) / vec_cosmin(i, 6)))
           End If
           racteo = CCur(racteo + IIf(IsNull(vec_cosmin(i, 6)), 0, vec_cosmin(i, 6)))
           tdiateo = CCur(tdiateo + IIf(IsNull(vec_cosmin(i, 7)), 0, vec_cosmin(i, 7)))
           tcoteo = CCur(tcoteo + IIf(IsNull(vec_cosmin(i, 7)), 0, vec_cosmin(i, 7)))
           trateo = CCur(trateo + IIf(IsNull(vec_cosmin(i, 6)), 0, vec_cosmin(i, 6)))
           '------- Mover costo real
           If vec_cosmin(i, 8) > 0 Then
              cosrea = CCur(cosrea + IIf(IsNull(vec_cosmin(i, 8)), (vec_cosmin(i, 9)), (vec_cosmin(i, 9)) / vec_cosmin(i, 8)))
           End If
           racrea = CCur(racrea + IIf(IsNull(vec_cosmin(i, 8)), 0, vec_cosmin(i, 8)))
           tdiarea = CCur(tdiarea + (vec_cosmin(i, 9)))
           tcorea = CCur(tcorea + vec_cosmin(i, 9))
           trarea = CCur(trarea + IIf(IsNull(vec_cosmin(i, 8)), 0, vec_cosmin(i, 8)))
           '------- Mover costo realizado
           tcofod = CCur(tcofod + vec_cosmin(i, 11))
           
           vPtUnit = 0: vPrUnit = 0
           totteo = CCur(totteo + IIf(IsNull(vec_cosmin(i, 7)), 0, vec_cosmin(i, 7)))
           totrea = CCur(totrea + vec_cosmin(i, 9))
           .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) = Mid(vec_cosmin(i, 1), 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(vec_cosmin(i, 1), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(vec_cosmin(i, 1), 1, 4)
           If vec_cosmin(i, 6) > 0 And Not IsNull(vec_cosmin(i, 7)) Then vPtUnit = (vec_cosmin(i, 7) / vec_cosmin(i, 6))
           If vec_cosmin(i, 8) > 0 Then vPrUnit = (vec_cosmin(i, 9) / vec_cosmin(i, 8))
           If opinf = 3 Or opinf = 5 Then
              '------- Mover teórico
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = IIf(Not opinc, Format(costeo, fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(tdiateo, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(Not opinc, Format(racteo, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = IIf(Not opinc, Format(tdiateo, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = IIf(Not opinc, Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
           Else
              '------- Mover real
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = IIf(Not opinc, Format(cosrea, fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(tdiarea, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(Not opinc, Format(racrea, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = IIf(Not opinc, Format(tdiarea, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = IIf(Not opinc, Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
           End If
           If opinf = 5 Then
              '------- Mover real
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = IIf(Not opinc, Format(cosrea, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 7) = IIf(Not opinc, Format(racrea, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 8, 4)) = Format(tdiarea, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              If tdiateo > 0 And tdiarea > 0 Then
                 If vPtUnit > 0 And opinc = False Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur(((vPrUnit - vPtUnit))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 ElseIf opinc = True Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur(((tdiarea - tdiateo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 9, 5)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 End If
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 9, 5)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
              End If
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 10, 6)) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              If totteo > 0 And totrea > 0 Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 11, 7)) = Format(CCur(((totrea - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 11, 7)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
              End If
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 12, 8)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 13, 9)) = IIf(Not opinc, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 14, 10)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 15, 11)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 16) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 17) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           Else
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 6, 4)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 7, 5)) = IIf(Not opinc, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 8, 6)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(Not opinc, 9, 7)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 10) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 11) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           End If
           totdoc = 0: vFcUnit = 0
           totdoc = vec_cosmin(i, 11)
           nrorac = 0: nrorac = vec_cosmin(i, 10)
           If opinf = 5 Then
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 14, 8)) = Format(totdoc, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 16, 10)) = Format(tcofod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           Else
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(totdoc, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 10, 6)) = Format(tcofod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           End If
           '------- Mover raciones
           If opinc = False Then
              If nrorac > 0 Then
                 vFcUnit = (totdoc / nrorac)
                 If opinf = 5 Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 12) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(CCur(totdoc / nrorac), fg_Pict(6, 2)), ""): cosfod = CCur(cosfod + (totdoc / nrorac))
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(CCur(totdoc / nrorac), fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(nrorac, fg_Pict(6, 2))): cosfod = CCur(cosfod + (totdoc / nrorac))
                 End If
              End If
              If opinf = 5 Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, 13) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(nrorac, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, 7) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(nrorac, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(nrorac, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
              End If
              trafod = CCur(trafod + nrorac)
           End If
           If opinf = 5 Then
              If tdiarea > 0 And totdoc > 0 Then
                 If vPrUnit > 0 And opinc = False Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 15, 9)) = Format(CCur(((vFcUnit - vPrUnit))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 ElseIf opinc = True Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 15, 9)) = Format(CCur(((totdoc - tdiarea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 15, 9)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 End If
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 15, 9)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
              End If
              If totrea > 0 And tcofod > 0 Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 17, 11)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 17, 11)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
              End If
           Else
              If tdiateo > 0 And totdoc > 0 And opinf = 3 Then
                 If vPtUnit > 0 And opinc = False Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur(((vFcUnit - vPtUnit))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 ElseIf opinc = True Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur(((totdoc - tdiateo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 End If
              ElseIf tdiarea > 0 And totdoc > 0 And opinf = 4 Then
                 If vPrUnit > 0 And opinc = False Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur(((vFcUnit - vPrUnit))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 ElseIf opinc = True Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur(((totdoc - tdiarea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 End If
              End If
              If totteo > 0 And tcofod > 0 And opinf = 3 Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 7)) = IIf(totteo > 0 And tcofod > 0, Format(CCur(((tcofod - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
              ElseIf totrea > 0 And tcofod > 0 And opinf = 4 Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 7)) = IIf(totrea > 0 And tcofod > 0, Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
              End If
           End If
           tdiateo = 0: tdiarea = 0
           costeo = 0: cosrea = 0: racteo = 0: racrea = 0
           j = j + 1
        End If
    Next i
   j = j + 2
   '------- Totales generales
   .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) = "Total "
   If opinf = 3 Or opinf = 5 Then
      If Not opinc Then
         If trateo > 0 Then
            .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((tcoteo / trateo), fg_Pict(6, 2))
         Else
            .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
         End If
      ElseIf opinc Then
         .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2))
      End If
      .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trateo, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
      .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
      .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
   Else
      If Not opinc Then
         If trarea > 0 Then
            .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((tcorea / trarea), fg_Pict(6, 2))
         Else
            .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
         End If
      ElseIf opinc Then
         .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2))
      End If
      .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trarea, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
      .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
      .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
   End If
   If opinf = 5 Then
      If trarea > 0 Then
         .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tcorea / trarea), fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
      Else
         .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)), "")
      End If
      .TableCell(tcText, j, 7) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trarea, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
      .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2))
      If totteo > 0 And totrea > 0 Then
         If trateo > 0 And trarea > 0 And opinc = False Then
