            .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur((((tcorea / trarea) - (tcoteo / trateo)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
         ElseIf opinc = True Then
            .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur(((totrea - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
         Else
            .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
         End If
      Else
         .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
      End If
      .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 10, 6)) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 2))
      If totteo > 0 And totrea > 0 Then
         .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 7)) = IIf(totteo > 0 And totrea > 0, Format(CCur(((totrea - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
      Else
         .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 7)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
      End If
      If trafod > 0 Then
         .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 8)) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tcofod / trafod), fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(trafod, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
      Else
         .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 12, 8)) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
      End If
      .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 13, 9)) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trafod, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
      .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 14, 8)) = Format(tcofod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
      If totrea > 0 And tcofod > 0 Then
         If trafod > 0 And trarea > 0 And opinc = False Then
            .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 15, 9)) = Format(CCur((((tcofod / trafod) - (tcorea / trarea)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
         ElseIf opinc = True Then
            .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 15, 9)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
         Else
            .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 15, 9)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
         End If
      Else
         .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 15, 9)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
      End If
      .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 16, 10)) = Format(tcofod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
      If totrea > 0 And tcofod > 0 Then
         .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 17, 11)) = IIf(totteo > 0 And tcofod > 0, Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
      Else
         .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 17, 11)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
      End If
   Else
      If trafod > 0 Then
         .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 6, 4)) = IIf(opinc = False, Format((tcofod / trafod), fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
      Else
         .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 6, 4)) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
      End If
      .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 7, 6)) = IIf(opinc = False, Format(trafod, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
      .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 8, 4)) = Format(tcofod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
      .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 10, 6)) = Format(tcofod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
      If totteo > 0 And tcofod > 0 And opinf = 3 Then
         If opinc = False And trateo > 0 And trafood > 0 Then
            .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur((((tcofod / trafod) - (totteo / trateo)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
         ElseIf opinc = True Then
            .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
         Else
            .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
         End If
         .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 7)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totteo))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
      ElseIf totrea > 0 And tcofod > 0 And opinf = 4 Then
         If trafod > 0 And trarea > 0 And opinc = False Then
            .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur((((tcofod / trafod) - (totrea / trarea)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
         ElseIf opinc = True Then
            .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
         Else
            .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 9, 5)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
         End If
         .TableCell(tcText, j, IIf(opinc = False, 11, 7)) = Format(CCur(((tcofod - totrea))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
      End If
   End If
   Print #1, Chr(13) & Chr(13)
   .TableCell(tcRows) = j
   .TableBorder = tbNone
   .EndTable
   .EndDoc: Close #1
   '-------> Borrar tablas temporales
   If Trim(aAp) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp & ""
   If Trim(aAp1) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp1 & ""
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_CostTeoReaFood:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_AportePlanDetallado(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String, opnomrec As Boolean, Form As Object)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, X As Long, y As Long, z As Long, p As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxfec As Long, icol As Long
Dim auxrec As Long, codnut As Long, inut As Long, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long
Dim nomser As String, nomtip As String, cLin As String
Dim vecdie() As Long
Dim vecrec() As Double
Dim vecdia() As Double
On Local Error GoTo Error_AporDetalle
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Aporte en Detalle"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = True
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    icol = 4
    ReDim Preserve vecdie(0)
    ReDim Preserve vecrec(0)
    ReDim Preserve vecdia(0)
    If Form.Option1(4).Value = True Then icol = 2
    If Form.Option1(5).Value = True Then icol = 2
    If Form.Option1(6).Value = True Then icol = 2
    inut = 0
    For i = 1 To Form.vaSpread1(2).MaxRows
        Form.vaSpread1(2).Row = i
        Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 1
        If Form.vaSpread1(2).text = "1" Then
           icol = icol + 1: inut = inut + 1
           ReDim Preserve vecdie(inut)
           Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 2
           vecdie(inut) = Form.vaSpread1(2).text
        End If
    Next i
    ReDim Preserve vecrec(inut)
    ReDim Preserve vecdia(inut)
    RS1.Open "SELECT c.min_codreg, c.min_codser, d.mid_tipmin, d.mid_numlin, d.mid_codrec, d.mid_descri, d.mid_cosrec, d.mid_cosdes, c.min_fecmin, c.min_indblo, " & _
             "a.rec_nombre, a.rec_nomfan, d.mid_numrac, b.red_codpro, b.red_pctapr, b.red_pctcoc, b.red_pctnut, " & _
             "(b.red_canpro/a.rec_basrac) AS canpro, e.ing_nombre, e.ing_facnut " & _
             "FROM b_receta a, b_recetadet b, b_minuta c, b_minutadet d, b_ingrediente e " & _
             "WHERE c.min_codigo=d.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   d.mid_codrec=b.red_codigo " & _
             "AND   d.mid_tiprec=b.red_tiprec AND ((b.red_tiprec<>0 AND b.red_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') OR (b.red_tiprec=0 AND b.red_cencos='0')) " & _
             "AND   b.red_codigo=a.rec_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.red_codpro=e.ing_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   c.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   c.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   c.min_fecmin>=" & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   c.min_fecmin<=" & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   d.mid_tipmin='" & tipmin & "' ORDER BY c.min_codreg, c.min_codser, c.min_fecmin, d.mid_numlin, b.red_nroite", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: fg_descarga: Exit Function
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       DoEvents
       If RS1!min_fecmin <> auxfec Or RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
          If auxfec > 0 Then
             For j = 1 To X
                cLin = ""
                 For p = 1 To icol
                     cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, j, p) & "|"
                 Next p
                 Print #1, cLin
             Next j
             .TableCell(tcRows) = X
             .TableBorder = tbNone
             .EndTable
             '------- Impresión total receta
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Total Aporte"
             X = 2
             If Form.Option1(7).Value = True Then
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
                X = 4
             End If
             For j = 1 To inut
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X + j) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X + j) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X + j) = Format(vecrec(j), fg_Pict(6, 2))
             Next j
             cLin = ""
             For p = 1 To icol
                 cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, p) & "|"
             Next p
             Print #1, cLin
             .TableBorder = tbNone
             .EndTable
             cLin = ""
             For j = 1 To inut
                 vecrec(j) = 0
             Next j
             cLin = ""
             'Impresión total día
             .text = Chr(13)
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Total Día"
             If X = 4 Then
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
             End If
             For j = 1 To inut
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X + j) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X + j) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X + j) = Format(vecdia(j), fg_Pict(6, 2))
             Next j
             cLin = ""
             For p = 1 To icol
                 cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, p) & "|"
             Next p
             Print #1, cLin
             X = 1
             .TableBorder = tbNone
             .EndTable
             For j = 1 To inut
                 vecdia(j) = 0
             Next j
             '------- Variable de concatenación para archivo excel
             cLin = ""
             '------- Salto de pagina x nuevo día
             .NewPage
             If RS1!min_fecmin > auxfec Then
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
             .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
             nomtip = IIf(tipmin = 1, "Teórico", "Real")
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Aporte Nutricional Detallado (" & nomtip & ")  " & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)
             Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
             .TableBorder = tbNone
             .EndTable
              .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
             .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)
             Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|'" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
             .TableBorder = tbNone
             .EndTable
    
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = 1 + icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
             .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Preparaciones"
             cLin = "": cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
             X = 2
             If Form.Option1(4).Value = True Then .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "C.Bruta": cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
             If Form.Option1(5).Value = True Then .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "C.Servida": cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
             If Form.Option1(6).Value = True Then .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "C.Neta": cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
             If Form.Option1(7).Value = True Then
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "C.Bruta": cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "C.Servida": cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3)
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "C.Neta": cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4)
                X = 4
             End If
             X = X + 1
             For j = 1 To Form.vaSpread1(2).MaxRows
                 Form.vaSpread1(2).Row = j
                 Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 1
                 If Form.vaSpread1(2).text = "1" Then
                    Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 3
                    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taRightTop
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = Form.vaSpread1(2).text
                     cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X)
                    X = X + 1
                 End If
             Next j
             Print #1, cLin
             .TableBorder = tbBox
             .EndTable
             End If
          End If
          auxfec = RS1!min_fecmin
          auxrec = 0
       End If
       
       If RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
          If auxreg > 0 Or auxser > 0 Then
          End If
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
          nomtip = IIf(tipmin = 1, "Teórico", "Real")
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Aporte Nutricional Detallado (" & nomtip & ")  " & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Servicio"
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS2!cli_nombre
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Regimen(2, RS1!min_codreg, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = RS2!reg_nombre
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Servicio(8, RS1!min_codser, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = RS2!ser_nombre
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13)
          
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|'" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
           
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 1 + icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
          .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Preparaciones"
          cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          X = 2
          If Form.Option1(4).Value = True Then .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "C.Bruta": cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
          If Form.Option1(5).Value = True Then .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "C.Servida": cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
          If Form.Option1(6).Value = True Then .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "C.Neta": cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
          If Form.Option1(7).Value = True Then
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "C.Bruta": cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "C.Servida": cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3)
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "C.Neta": cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4)
             X = 4
          End If
          X = X + 1
          For j = 1 To Form.vaSpread1(2).MaxRows
              Form.vaSpread1(2).Row = j
              Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 1
              If Form.vaSpread1(2).text = "1" Then
                 Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 3
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = Form.vaSpread1(2).text: cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X)
                 X = X + 1
              End If
          Next j
          Print #1, cLin
          .TableBorder = tbBox
          .EndTable
          cLin = ""
'          auxrec = 0: auxfec = 0: j = 1
          
          auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
          auxser = RS1!min_codser
       End If
    
       cLin = ""
       'Corte control Recetas
       If RS1!mid_codrec <> auxrec Then
          If auxrec > 0 Then
             For j = 1 To X
                cLin = ""
                 For p = 1 To icol
                     cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, j, p) & "|"
                 Next p
                 Print #1, cLin
             Next j
             .TableCell(tcRows) = X
             .TableBorder = tbNone
             .EndTable
             'Impresión total receta
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Total Aporte"
             X = 2
             If Form.Option1(7).Value = True Then
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
                X = 4
             End If
             For j = 1 To inut
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X + j) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X + j) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X + j) = Format(vecrec(j), fg_Pict(6, 2))
             Next j
              cLin = ""
              For p = 1 To icol
                  cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, p) & "|"
              Next p
              Print #1, cLin
              X = 1
             .TableBorder = tbNone
             .EndTable
             For j = 1 To inut
                 vecrec(j) = 0
             Next j
          End If
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = IIf(opnomrec = True, RS1!rec_nomfan, RS1!rec_nombre)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          auxrec = RS1!mid_codrec
          cLin = ""
          '------- Impresión detalle aporte
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 800 '0
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
          X = 2
          If Form.Option1(7).Value = True Then
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
             X = 4
          End If
          For j = 1 To inut
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X + j) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taRightTop
          Next j
          X = 1
       End If
       y = 2
       .TableCell(tcText, X, 1) = RS1!ing_nombre
       If Form.Option1(4).Value = True Then
          .TableCell(tcAlign, X, 2) = taRightTop: .TableCell(tcText, X, 2) = Format(RS1!canpro, fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
       ElseIf Form.Option1(5).Value = True Then
          .TableCell(tcAlign, X, 2) = taRightTop: .TableCell(tcText, X, 2) = Format(CCur((RS1!red_pctnut / 100) * RS1!canpro), fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
       ElseIf Form.Option1(6).Value = True Then
          .TableCell(tcAlign, X, 2) = taRightTop: .TableCell(tcText, X, 2) = Format(CCur((RS1!canpro * (RS1!red_pctcoc / 100)) * (RS1!red_pctapr / 100)), fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
       ElseIf Form.Option1(7).Value = True Then
          .TableCell(tcAlign, X, 2) = taRightTop: .TableCell(tcText, X, 2) = Format(RS1!canpro, fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
          .TableCell(tcAlign, X, 3) = taRightTop: .TableCell(tcText, X, 3) = Format(CCur((RS1!canpro * (RS1!red_pctcoc / 100)) * (RS1!red_pctapr / 100)), fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
          .TableCell(tcAlign, X, 4) = taRightTop: .TableCell(tcText, X, 4) = Format(CCur((RS1!red_pctnut / 100) * RS1!canpro), fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
          y = 4
       End If
       For j = 1 To inut
           .TableCell(tcAlign, X, y + j) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcText, X, y + j) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       Next j
       DoEvents
       RS2.Open "SELECT pnu_codapo, pnu_canapo FROM b_productonut WHERE pnu_codpro='" & RS1!red_codpro & "'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS2.EOF Then
          Do While Not RS2.EOF
             For j = 1 To inut
                 If vecdie(j) = RS2!pnu_codapo Then
                    .TableCell(tcAlign, X, y + j) = taRightTop
                    .TableCell(tcText, X, y + j) = Format(((((RS1!red_pctnut / 100) * (RS2!pnu_canapo * (RS1!canpro))) / RS1!ing_facnut)), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    vecrec(j) = CCur(vecrec(j) + ((((RS1!red_pctnut / 100) * (RS2!pnu_canapo * (RS1!canpro))) / RS1!ing_facnut)))
                    vecdia(j) = CCur(vecdia(j) + ((((RS1!red_pctnut / 100) * (RS2!pnu_canapo * (RS1!canpro))) / RS1!ing_facnut)))
                    Exit For
                 End If
             Next j
             RS2.MoveNext
          Loop
       End If
       RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
       RS1.MoveNext: X = X + 1
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    For j = 1 To X
        cLin = ""
        For p = 1 To icol
            cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, j, p) & "|"
        Next p
        Print #1, cLin
    Next j
    .TableCell(tcRows) = X
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    cLin = ""
    'Impresión total receta
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Total Aporte"
    X = 2
    If Form.Option1(7).Value = True Then
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
       X = 4
    End If
    For j = 1 To inut
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X + j) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X + j) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcText, 1, X + j) = Format(vecrec(j), fg_Pict(6, 2))
    Next j
    cLin = ""
    For p = 1 To icol
        cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, p) & "|"
    Next p
    Print #1, cLin
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    For j = 1 To inut
        vecrec(j) = 0
    Next j
    cLin = ""
   '------- Impresión total día
   .text = Chr(13)
   .StartTable
   .TableCell(tcCols) = icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
   .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
   .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
   .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Total Día"
   If X = 4 Then
      .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
      .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
   End If
   For j = 1 To inut
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X + j) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X + j) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, X + j) = Format(vecdia(j), fg_Pict(6, 2))
   Next j
   X = 1
   cLin = ""
   For p = 1 To icol
       cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, p) & "|"
   Next p
   Print #1, cLin
   .TableBorder = tbNone
   .EndTable
   For j = 1 To inut
       vecdia(j) = 0
   Next j
   cLin = ""
   .EndDoc
End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_AporDetalle:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_AportePlanResumido(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String, opnomrec As Boolean, Form As Object)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, X As Long, y As Long, z As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxfec As Long, icol As Long
Dim auxrec As Long, codnut As Long, inut As Long, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long
Dim nomser As String, nomtip As String, cLin As String
Dim vecdie() As Long
Dim vecdia() As Double
On Local Error GoTo Error_AporResumen
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Aporte Resumen"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = True
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    ReDim Preserve vecdie(0)
    ReDim Preserve vecdia(0)
    icol = 1: inut = 0
    For i = 1 To Form.vaSpread1(2).MaxRows
        Form.vaSpread1(2).Row = i
        Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 1
        If Form.vaSpread1(2).text = "1" Then
           icol = icol + 1: inut = inut + 1
           ReDim Preserve vecdie(inut)
           Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 2
           vecdie(inut) = Form.vaSpread1(2).text
        End If
    Next i
    ReDim Preserve vecdia(inut)
    RS1.Open "SELECT b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, c.mid_tipmin, c.mid_numlin, c.mid_codrec, c.mid_tiprec, c.mid_descri, c.mid_cosrec, c.mid_cosdes, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo, " & _
             "a.rec_nombre, a.rec_nomfan " & _
             "FROM  b_receta a, b_minuta b, b_minutadet c " & _
             "WHERE b.min_codigo=c.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.mid_codrec=a.rec_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin>=" & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin<=" & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   c.mid_tipmin='" & tipmin & "' ORDER BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, b.min_fecmin, c.mid_numlin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       DoEvents
       If RS1!min_fecmin <> auxfec Or RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
          If auxfec > 0 Then
             For j = 1 To X
                cLin = ""
                 For p = 1 To icol
                     cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, j, p) & "|"
                 Next p
                 Print #1, cLin
             Next j
             .TableCell(tcRows) = X
             Print #1, cLin
             .TableBorder = tbNone
             .EndTable
             '------- Impresión total día
             .text = Chr(13)
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Total Día"
             For j = 1 To inut
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1 + j) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1 + j) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1 + j) = Format(vecdia(j), fg_Pict(6, 2))
             Next j
             .TableBorder = tbNone
             cLin = ""
             For p = 1 To icol
                 cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, p) & "|"
             Next p
             Print #1, cLin: Print #1, Chr(13)
             .EndTable
             For j = 1 To inut
                 vecdia(j) = 0
             Next j
             cLin = ""
             '------- Salto de pagina x nuevo día
             .NewPage
             If RS1!min_fecmin > auxfec Then
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
             .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
             nomtip = IIf(tipmin = 1, "Teórico", "Real")
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Aporte Nutricional Resumido (" & nomtip & ")  " & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)
             Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
             .TableBorder = tbNone
             .EndTable
             .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
             .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)
             Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|'" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
             .TableBorder = tbNone
             .EndTable
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = 1 + icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
             .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Preparaciones"
             cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
             X = 2
             For j = 1 To Form.vaSpread1(2).MaxRows
                 Form.vaSpread1(2).Row = j
                 Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 1
                 If Form.vaSpread1(2).text = "1" Then
                    Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 3
                    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taRightTop
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = Form.vaSpread1(2).text
                    cLin = cLin & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X)
                    X = X + 1
                 End If
             Next j
             .TableBorder = tbBox
             Print #1, cLin
             .EndTable
             End If
          End If
          cLin = ""
          auxfec = RS1!min_fecmin
          auxrec = 0
          X = 1
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 800 '1000
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          For j = 1 To inut
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1 + j) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taRightTop
          Next j
       End If
       
       If RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
'          If auxfec > 0 Then .NewPage
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
          nomtip = IIf(tipmin = 1, "Teórico", "Real")
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Aporte Nutricional Resumido (" & nomtip & ")  " & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Servicio"
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS2!cli_nombre
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Regimen(2, RS1!min_codreg, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = RS2!reg_nombre
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Servicio(8, RS1!min_codser, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = RS2!ser_nombre
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing

          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|"; .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|"; .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|"; .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13)
         
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|'" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 1 + icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
          .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Preparaciones"
          cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          X = 2
          For j = 1 To Form.vaSpread1(2).MaxRows
              Form.vaSpread1(2).Row = j
              Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 1
              If Form.vaSpread1(2).text = "1" Then
                 Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 3
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = Form.vaSpread1(2).text
                 cLin = cLin & "|" & "" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X)
                 X = X + 1
              End If
          Next j
          Print #1, cLin
          .TableBorder = tbBox
          .EndTable
          cLin = ""
          'auxrec = 0: auxfec = 0
          j = 1: X = 1
          
          auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
          auxser = RS1!min_codser
       End If
       .TableCell(tcAlign, X, 1) = taLeftTop: .TableCell(tcText, X, 1) = IIf(opnomrec = True, RS1!rec_nomfan, RS1!rec_nombre)
       For j = 1 To inut
           .TableCell(tcAlign, X, 1 + j) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcText, X, 1 + j) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       Next j
       RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT e.nut_nombre, e.nut_codigo, SUM((((b.red_pctnut/100)*(d.pnu_canapo*(b.red_canpro/a.rec_basrac)))/c.ing_facnut)) AS candiet, " & _
                "e.nut_secnro FROM b_receta a, b_recetadet b, b_ingrediente c, b_productonut d, a_nutriente e WHERE b.red_codigo=a.rec_codigo " & _
                "AND b.red_codpro=c.ing_codigo AND c.ing_codigo=d.pnu_codpro AND d.pnu_codapo=e.nut_codigo " & _
                "AND b.red_codigo=" & RS1!mid_codrec & " AND b.red_tiprec=" & RS1!mid_tiprec & " AND ((b.red_tiprec<>0 AND b.red_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') OR (b.red_tiprec=0 AND b.red_cencos='0')) AND c.ing_facnut>0 GROUP BY e.nut_nombre, e.nut_codigo, e.nut_secnro " & _
                "ORDER BY e.nut_secnro", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       DoEvents
       If Not RS2.EOF Then
          Do While Not RS2.EOF
             For j = 1 To inut
                 If vecdie(j) = RS2!nut_codigo Then
                    .TableCell(tcAlign, X, 1 + j) = taRightTop
                    .TableCell(tcText, X, 1 + j) = Format(RS2!candiet, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    vecdia(j) = CCur(vecdia(j) + RS2!candiet)
                    Exit For
                 End If
             Next j
             RS2.MoveNext
          Loop
       End If
       RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
       RS1.MoveNext: X = X + 2
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    For j = 1 To X
        cLin = ""
        For p = 1 To icol
            cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, j, p) & "|"
        Next p
        Print #1, cLin
    Next j
    .TableCell(tcRows) = X
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    cLin = ""
    '------- Impresión total día
    .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Total Día"
    For j = 1 To inut
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1 + j) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1 + j) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1 + j) = Format(vecdia(j), fg_Pict(6, 2))
    Next j
    cLin = ""
    For p = 1 To icol
        cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, p) & "|"
    Next p
    Print #1, cLin: Print #1, Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    For j = 1 To inut
        vecdia(j) = 0
    Next j
    cLin = ""
    .EndDoc
End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_AporResumen:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_EstructuraFija(cencos As String, codreg As Long, codser As Long, Fecha As Long)
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, dianro As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_EstFija
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Estructura Fija"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    .FontSize = 8
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Estructura Fija" & " (" & Mid(Fecha, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(Fecha, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(Fecha, 1, 4) & ")"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Servicio"
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS1!cli_nombre
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Regimen(2, codreg, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = RS1!reg_nombre
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Servicio(8, codser, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = RS1!ser_nombre
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open "SELECT b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, a.uni_nomcor, c.mif_canpro, c.mif_dianro " & _
             "FROM a_unidad a, b_productos b, b_minutafija c WHERE c.mif_codpro=b.pro_codigo AND b.pro_coduni=a.uni_codigo " & _
             "AND c.mif_cencos='" & cencos & "' AND c.mif_codreg=" & codreg & " AND c.mif_codser=" & codser & " " & _
             "AND c.mif_fecval=" & Fecha & " ORDER BY c.mif_dianro, b.pro_codigo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 5800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Producto"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Cantidad"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "UM"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 5800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    i = 1: dianro = 0
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            If RS1!mif_dianro <> dianro Then
                i = i + 1
                .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 4
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = fg_NomDia(RS1!mif_dianro)
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
                Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
                dianro = RS1!mif_dianro: i = i + 1
            End If
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!pro_codigo
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!pro_nombre
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(RS1!mif_canpro, fg_Pict(6, 2))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = RS1!uni_nomcor
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4)
            RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
        Loop
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_EstFija:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_CFC(cencos As String, fecemi As Long, numinf As Long, tipinf As String)

Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxnumdoc As Long, envdoc As String
Dim auxrutpro As String, auxnompro As String, auxtipdoc As String, nomcta As String, nomcli As String, auxmueinv As String
Dim canali As Double, candes As Double, cangrl As Double, totali As Double, totdes As Double, totgrl As Double, pctimp As Double
Dim tanali As Double, tandes As Double, tangrl As Double, pctdes As Double
Dim cLin As String

On Local Error GoTo Error_CFC

fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe CFC"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
     
     vg_reporte = dir_trabajo_Inf & "CFC" & cencos & Format(Date, "yyyymm") & ".rtf"
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & vg_reporte
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    .HdrFontBold = False
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = Trim(fg_ponepiepagina) & " Contrato : " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre) & " " & (RS1!cli_codigo) & "| VºBº ADC______________________________________________|Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    nomcli = RS1!cli_nombre
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    .FontSize = 8
    LogoEmp
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 5
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Control Facturas Compras " & "Mes : " & Meses(Mid(fg_pone_cero(Str(fecemi), 8), 1, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecemi, 8), 3, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecemi, 8), 5, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecemi, 8), 5, 4)
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 2) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Sistema de Origen :  " & IIf(tipinf = "P", " Plataforma Electrónica ", " SGP ")
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 5, 1) = taLeftMiddle: .TableCell(tcFontSize, 5) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 5) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 5, 1) = Trim(nomcli) & "(" & Trim(cencos) & ")"
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 5, 2) = taLeftMiddle: .TableCell(tcFontSize, 5) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 5) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 5, 2) = "Nº " & Trim(Str(numinf))
    
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) & "|||||||" & .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 5, 1) & "|||||||" & .TableCell(tcText, 5, 2)
    
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    
    '-------> Traer saldo anterior
    Dim fecper As Long
    canali = 0
    candes = 0
    cangrl = 0
    tanali = 0
    tandes = 0
    tangrl = 0
    pctdes = 0
    
    auxtipdoc = ""
    auxnomdoc = ""
    auxnompro = ""
    
    fecini = 0
    fecter = 0
    fecper = 0
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
        
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.CierrePeriodo(1, cencos, 0, Val(Mid(fg_pone_cero(Str(fecemi), 8), 5, 4) & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecemi, 8), 3, 2) & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecemi, 8), 1, 2)), Val(Mid(fg_pone_cero(Str(fecemi), 8), 5, 4) & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecemi, 8), 3, 2) & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecemi, 8), 1, 2))), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then fecini = RS1!cie_fecini: fecter = RS1!cie_fecter: fecper = RS1!cie_periodo
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
'    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.dec_rutpro, b.dec_tipdoc, b.dec_numdoc, " & _
'             "b.dec_numlin, b.dec_codmer, b.dec_canmer, b.dec_precom, " & _
'             "b.dec_pctdes, b.dec_canrec, b.dec_prerec, b.dec_prefle, " & _
'             "c.pro_ctacon, d.prv_nombre, b.dec_ptotal " & _
'             "FROM  b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c, b_proveedor d " & _
'             "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
'             "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
'             "AND   b.dec_rutpro = d.prv_codigo " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_tipinf = '" & tipinf & "' AND a.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
'             "AND  (a.toc_tipdoc = 'FA' OR a.toc_tipdoc = 'FE' OR a.toc_tipdoc = 'NC' OR a.toc_tipdoc = 'CE' OR a.toc_tipdoc = 'ND' OR a.toc_tipdoc = 'DE') " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_numinf < " & numinf & " " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_fecper=" & fecper & " " & _
'             "ORDER BY b.dec_rutpro, b.dec_numdoc, c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.dec_rutpro, b.dec_tipdoc, b.dec_numdoc, " & _
             "b.dec_numlin, b.dec_codmer, b.dec_canmer, b.dec_precom, " & _
             "b.dec_pctdes, b.dec_canrec, b.dec_prerec, b.dec_prefle, " & _
             "c.pro_ctacon, d.prv_nombre, b.dec_ptotal " & _
             "FROM  b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c, b_proveedor d " & _
             "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
             "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
             "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.dec_rutpro = d.prv_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.toc_tipinf = '" & tipinf & "' AND a.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND  (a.toc_tipdoc in (select tdo_codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_IdCodigo in ('FA','FE','NC','CE','ND','DE'))) " & _
             "AND   a.toc_numinf < " & numinf & " " & _
             "AND   a.toc_fecper=" & fecper & " " & _
             "ORDER BY b.dec_rutpro, b.dec_numdoc, c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          pctimp = 0
          
          If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
          RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.DocProImp(1, RS1!dec_rutpro, RS1!dec_tipdoc, RS1!dec_numdoc, RS1!dec_numlin, RS1!dec_codmer), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If RS2.EOF Then RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing Else pctimp = RS2!imd_monimp: RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          pctdes = 0
          
          If RS1!dec_pctdes > 0 Then pctdes = RS1!dec_pctdes
          
          If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             tanali = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "DE", Round(tanali + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DCa), Round(tanali - (RS1!dec_prefle + (RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr)) 'vg_DCa))
          
          ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             tandes = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "DE", Round(tandes + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DCa), Round(tandes - (RS1!dec_prefle + (RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr)) 'vg_DCa))
          
          Else
             
             tangrl = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "DE", Round(tangrl + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DCa), Round(tangrl - (RS1!dec_prefle + (RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr)) 'vg_DCa))
          
          End If
          
          RS1.MoveNext
       
       Loop
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    '-------> Fin Traer saldo anterior
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 9: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop: .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Proveedor"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "TD"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Nº Doc."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Alim(01)"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Desc (04)"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Vrs $"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Vrs Descr."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = "Envío SAP"
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 2) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Saldo Anterior"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = ""
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 5) = taRightTop: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = IIf(tanali <> 0, Format(tanali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 6) = taRightTop: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = IIf(tandes <> 0, Format(tandes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 7) = taRightTop: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = IIf(tangrl <> 0, Format(tangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 8) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 9) = ""
    
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9)
    
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 9: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taCenterTop
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
'    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.dec_rutpro, b.dec_tipdoc, b.dec_numdoc, " & _
'             "b.dec_numlin, b.dec_codmer, b.dec_canmer, b.dec_precom, " & _
'             "b.dec_pctdes, b.dec_canrec, b.dec_prerec, b.dec_prefle, c.pro_ctacon, " & _
'             "d.prv_nombre, b.dec_mueinv, b.dec_ptotal, a.toc_envsap, a.toc_fecdig " & _
'             "FROM b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c, b_proveedor d " & _
'             "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
'             "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
'             "AND   b.dec_rutpro = d.prv_codigo " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_tipinf = '" & tipinf & "' AND a.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
'             "AND  (a.toc_tipdoc = 'FA' OR a.toc_tipdoc = 'FE' OR a.toc_tipdoc = 'NC' OR a.toc_tipdoc = 'CE' OR a.toc_tipdoc = 'ND' OR a.toc_tipdoc = 'DE') " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_numinf = " & numinf & " " & _
'             "ORDER BY a.toc_fecdig, b.dec_rutpro, b.dec_numdoc, c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.dec_rutpro, b.dec_tipdoc, b.dec_numdoc, " & _
             "b.dec_numlin, b.dec_codmer, b.dec_canmer, b.dec_precom, " & _
             "b.dec_pctdes, b.dec_canrec, b.dec_prerec, b.dec_prefle, c.pro_ctacon, " & _
             "d.prv_nombre, b.dec_mueinv, b.dec_ptotal, a.toc_envsap, a.toc_fecdig " & _
             "FROM b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c, b_proveedor d " & _
             "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
             "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
             "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.dec_rutpro = d.prv_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.toc_tipinf = '" & tipinf & "' AND a.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND  (a.toc_tipdoc in (select tdo_codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_IdCodigo in ('FA','FE','NC','CE','ND','DE'))) " & _
             "AND   a.toc_numinf = " & numinf & " " & _
             "ORDER BY a.toc_fecdig, b.dec_rutpro, b.dec_numdoc, c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndDoc: Close #1: Exit Function
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       i = 1
       canali = 0
       candes = 0
       cangrl = 0
       totali = 0
       totdes = 0
       totgrl = 0
       pctdes = 0
       
       auxtipdoc = ""
       auxnomdoc = ""
       auxnompro = ""
       auxmueinv = ""
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          If RS1!dec_rutpro <> Trim(auxrutpro) Or RS1!dec_numdoc <> auxnumdoc Then
             
             If Trim(auxrutpro) <> "" Then
                
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = i
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = auxnompro
                '------- Consultar si el documento es una factura provisonada
                
                If RS3.State = 1 Then RS3.Close
                RS3.CursorLocation = adUseClient
                vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

                RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT toc_docaso FROM b_totcompras WHERE toc_rutpro = '" & auxrutpro & "' AND toc_docaso='" & Trim(Str(auxnumdoc)) & "' AND toc_tipdoc in (select tdo_codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_IdCodigo <> 'SN') AND toc_codbod=" & vg_codbod & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(Not RS3.EOF And (fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE"), "FP", auxtipdoc)
                
                RS3.Close
                Set RS3 = Nothing
                '------- Fin consultar si el documento es una factura provisonada
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = auxnumdoc
                
                If canali > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "FA" Or auxtipdoc = "FE" Or auxtipdoc = "ND" Or auxtipdoc = "DE", Format(canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
                If candes > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "FA" Or auxtipdoc = "FE" Or auxtipdoc = "ND" Or auxtipdoc = "DE", Format(candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
                If cangrl > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "FA" Or auxtipdoc = "FE" Or auxtipdoc = "ND" Or auxtipdoc = "DE", Format(cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0))): .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = nomcta
                
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = envdoc
                
                Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & _
                          "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 9)
                
                canali = 0
                candes = 0
                cangrl = 0
                
                i = i + 1
             
             End If
             
             auxrutpro = RS1!dec_rutpro
             auxnompro = RS1!prv_nombre
             auxnumdoc = RS1!dec_numdoc
             auxtipdoc = RS1!dec_tipdoc
             auxmueinv = RS1!dec_mueinv
             envdoc = IIf(RS1!toc_envsap = "1", "(SI)", "(NO)")
          
          End If
          If (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) <> RS1!pro_ctacon And (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) <> RS1!pro_ctacon Then nomcta = RS1!pro_ctacon
          If RS1!dec_numdoc <> auxnumdoc Then
             
             If auxnumdoc > 0 Then
                
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = i
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = auxnompro
                '------- Consultar si el documento es una factura provisonada
                
                If RS3.State = 1 Then RS3.Close
                RS3.CursorLocation = adUseClient
                vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
                
'                RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT toc_docaso FROM b_totcompras WHERE toc_rutpro = '" & auxrutpro & "' AND toc_docaso = '" & Trim(Str(auxnumdoc)) & "' AND toc_tipdoc <> 'SN' AND toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT toc_docaso FROM b_totcompras WHERE toc_rutpro = '" & auxrutpro & "' AND toc_docaso = '" & Trim(Str(auxnumdoc)) & "' AND toc_tipdoc in (select tdo_codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_IdCodigo <> 'SN') AND toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(Not RS3.EOF And (fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE"), "FP", auxtipdoc)
                RS3.Close
                Set RS3 = Nothing
                
                '------- Fin consultar si el documento es una factura provisonada
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = auxnumdoc
                
                If canali > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "DE", Format(canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
                If candes > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "DE", Format(candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
                If cangrl > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "DE", Format(cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0))): .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = nomcta
                
                Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & _
                          "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8)
                
                canali = 0
                candes = 0
                cangrl = 0
                
                i = i + 1
             
             End If
             auxnumdoc = RS1!dec_numdoc
             auxtipdoc = RS1!dec_tipdoc
             auxmueinv = RS1!dec_mueinv
             envdoc = IIf(RS1!toc_envsap = "1", "(SI)", "(NO)")
'             nomcta = RS1!pro_ctacon
          
          End If
          
          If RS1!dec_tipdoc <> Trim(auxtipdoc) Then
             
             If auxtipdoc <> "" Then
                
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = i
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = auxnompro
                '------- Consultar si el documento es una factura provisonada
                
                If RS3.State = 1 Then RS3.Close
                RS3.CursorLocation = adUseClient
                vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
                
'                RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT toc_docaso FROM b_totcompras WHERE toc_rutpro = '" & auxrutpro & "' AND toc_docaso = '" & Trim(Str(auxnumdoc)) & "' AND toc_tipdoc <> 'SN' AND toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT toc_docaso FROM b_totcompras WHERE toc_rutpro = '" & auxrutpro & "' AND toc_docaso = '" & Trim(Str(auxnumdoc)) & "' AND toc_tipdoc in (select tdo_codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_IdCodigo <> 'SN') AND toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(Not RS3.EOF And (auxtipdoc = "FA" Or auxtipdoc = "FE"), "FP", auxtipdoc)
                RS3.Close
                Set RS3 = Nothing
                
                '------- Fin consultar si el documento es una factura provisonada
                
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = auxnumdoc
                If canali > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "DE", Format(canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
                If candes > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "DE", Format(candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
                If cangrl > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "DE", Format(cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0))): .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = nomcta
                
                Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & _
                          "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8)
                
                canali = 0
                candes = 0
                cangrl = 0
                
                i = i + 1
             
             End If
             auxtipdoc = RS1!dec_tipdoc
             auxmueinv = RS1!dec_mueinv
             envdoc = IIf(RS1!toc_envsap = "1", "(SI)", "(NO)")
 '            nomcta = RS1!pro_ctacon
          
          End If
          pctimp = 0
          
          '------- Traer Impuesto adicionales
          
          If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
          RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.DocProImp(1, RS1!dec_rutpro, RS1!dec_tipdoc, RS1!dec_numdoc, RS1!dec_numlin, RS1!dec_codmer), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If RS2.EOF Then RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing Else pctimp = RS2!imd_monimp: RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          pctdes = 0
          
          If RS1!dec_pctdes > 0 Then pctdes = RS1!dec_pctdes
          
          If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             canali = Round(canali + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             totali = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "DE", Round(totali + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DCa), Round(totali - (RS1!dec_prefle + (RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr)) 'vg_DCa))
          
          ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             candes = Round(candes + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             totdes = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "DE", Round(totdes + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DCa), Round(totdes - (RS1!dec_prefle + (RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr)) 'vg_DCa))
          
          Else
             
             cangrl = Round(cangrl + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr)
             totgrl = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "DE", Round(totgrl + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DCa), Round(totgrl - (RS1!dec_prefle + (RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr)) 'vg_DCa))
          
          End If
          '------- Fin traer Impuesto adicionales
          RS1.MoveNext
       
       Loop
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = i
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = auxnompro
       
       '------- Consultar si el documento es una factura provisonada
       
       If RS3.State = 1 Then RS3.Close
       RS3.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

       RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT toc_docaso FROM b_totcompras WHERE toc_rutpro = '" & auxrutpro & "' AND toc_docaso='" & Trim(Str(auxnumdoc)) & "' AND toc_codbod=" & vg_codbod & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(Not RS3.EOF And (fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE"), "FP", auxtipdoc)
       RS3.Close
       Set RS3 = Nothing
       
       '------- Fin consultar si el documento es una factura provisonada
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = auxnumdoc
       
       If canali > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "DE", Format(canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
       If candes > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "DE", Format(candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
       If cangrl > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(auxtipdoc) = "DE", Format(cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0))): .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = nomcta
       
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = envdoc
       
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & _
                "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 9)
       
       i = i + 1
       
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, i) = 230
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total CFC"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(totali <> 0, Format(totali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(totdes <> 0, Format(totdes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(totgrl <> 0, Format(totgrl, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = ""
       
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & _
                "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 9)
       i = i + 1
       
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, i) = 230
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total Acumulado"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(tanali <> 0 Or totali <> 0, Format(tanali + totali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(tandes <> 0 Or totdes <> 0, Format(tandes + totdes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(tangrl <> 0 Or totgrl <> 0, Format(tangrl + totgrl, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = ""
       
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & _
                "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 9)
       
       canali = 0
       candes = 0
       cangrl = 0
       totali = 0
       totdes = 0
       totgrl = 0
    
    Else
    
        i = i + 1
    
    End If
    
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
    
End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1

Exit Function
Error_CFC:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & "|" & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function

End Function

Public Function I_CTC(cencos As String, fecemi As Long, numinf As Long, tiptra As Integer, tipinf As String)

Dim i As Long, j As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxnumdoc As Long, pctdes As Long, auxcodser As Long
Dim auxrutpro As String, auxnompro As String, auxtipdoc As String, nomcta As String, nomcli As String
Dim canali As Double, candes As Double, cangrl As Double, totali As Double, totdes As Double, totgrl As Double, pctimp As Double
Dim tanali As Double, tandes As Double, tangrl As Double
Dim tental As Double, tentde As Double, tentgr As Double, tsalal As Double, tsalde As Double, tsalgr As Double
Dim cLin As String

On Local Error GoTo Error_CTC

fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe CTC"
Preview.Refresh

With Preview.VSPrinter
     
     vg_reporte = dir_trabajo_Inf & "CTC" & cencos & Format(Date, "yyyymm") & ".rtf"
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & vg_reporte
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
