    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = fg_ponepiepagina & " Contrato : " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre) & " " & (RS1!cli_codigo) & "|VºBº ADC_______________________________________________|Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    nomcli = Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Control Traspasos Entre Contratos " & IIf(tiptra = 1, " (Entrada) ", " (Salida) ") & " Mes : " & Meses(Mid(fg_pone_cero(Str(fecemi), 8), 1, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecemi, 8), 3, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecemi, 8), 5, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecemi, 8), 5, 4)
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 3, 1) = taLeftMiddle: .TableCell(tcFontSize, 3) = 12: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = nomcli & " (" & cencos & ")"
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 3, 2) = taCenterTop: .TableCell(tcFontSize, 3) = 12: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = "Nº " & Trim(Str(numinf))
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|||||||" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    '------- Traer saldo anterior
    canali = 0: candes = 0: cangrl = 0: tanali = 0: tandes = 0: tangrl = 0: pctdes = 0
    auxtipdoc = "": auxnomdoc = "": auxnompro = ""
    fecini = 0: fecter = 0
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT cie_fecini, cie_fecter FROM b_cierreperiodo WHERE cie_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND cie_fecini <= " & Val(Mid(fg_pone_cero(Str(fecemi), 8), 5, 4) & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecemi, 8), 3, 2) & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecemi, 8), 1, 2)) & " AND cie_fecter >= " & Val(Mid(fg_pone_cero(Str(fecemi), 8), 5, 4) & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecemi, 8), 3, 2) & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecemi, 8), 1, 2)) & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then fecini = RS1!cie_fecini: fecter = RS1!cie_fecter
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       RS1.Open "SELECT distinct a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon, " & _
                "SUM(b.dev_canmer*b.dev_precos) AS costo " & _
                "FROM  b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c " & _
                "WHERE a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
                "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
                "AND   a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
                "AND   b.dev_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
                "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = 'TR' " & _
                "AND   a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' AND a.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                "AND   a.tov_numinf < " & numinf & " " & _
                "AND   a.tov_codser = " & tiptra & " " & _
                "AND format(a.tov_fecemi, 'yyyymmdd') >= " & fecini & " AND format(a.tov_fecemi, 'yyyymmdd') <= " & fecter & " AND a.tov_numdoc > 0 " & _
                "GROUP BY a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon ORDER BY c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Else
       RS1.Open "SELECT distinct a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon, " & _
                "SUM(b.dev_canmer*b.dev_precos) AS costo " & _
                "FROM  b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c " & _
                "WHERE a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
                "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
                "AND   a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
                "AND   b.dev_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
                "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = 'TR' " & _
                "AND   a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' AND a.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                "AND   a.tov_numinf < " & numinf & " " & _
                "AND   a.tov_codser = " & tiptra & " " & _
                "AND   a.tov_fecemi >= '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' AND a.tov_fecemi <= '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecter), "yyyymmdd") & "' AND a.tov_numdoc > 0 " & _
                "GROUP BY a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon ORDER BY c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    End If
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
             tanali = Round(tanali + (RS1!Costo), vg_DPr)
          ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
             tandes = Round(tandes + (RS1!Costo), vg_DPr)
          Else
             tangrl = Round(tangrl + (RS1!Costo), vg_DPr)
          End If
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '------- Fin Traer saldo anterior
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop: .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Contrato Origen / Destino"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "TD"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Nº Doc."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Alim(01)"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Desc (04)"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Vrs $"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Vrs Descr."
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 2) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Saldo Anterior"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = ""
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 5) = taRightTop: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = IIf(tanali <> 0, Format(tanali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 6) = taRightTop: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = IIf(tandes <> 0, Format(tandes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 7) = taRightTop: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = IIf(tangrl <> 0, Format(tangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 8) = ""
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 8)
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop

    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.tov_codcas, b.dev_tipdoc, b.dev_numdoc, b.dev_numlin, " & _
             "b.dev_codmer, b.dev_canmer, b.dev_precos, a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon, d.cli_nombre " & _
             "FROM  b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c, b_clientes d " & _
             "WHERE a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
             "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND   b.dev_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codcas = d.cli_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = 'TR' " & _
             "AND   a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' AND a.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_numinf = " & numinf & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codser = " & tiptra & " AND a.tov_numdoc > 0 " & _
             "ORDER BY a.tov_codser, a.tov_codcas, b.dev_numdoc, c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndDoc: Close #1: Exit Function
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       i = 1: j = 1: canali = 0: candes = 0: cangrl = 0: totali = 0: totdes = 0: totgrl = 0: pctdes = 0:
       tental = 0: tentde = 0: tentgr = 0
       auxtipdoc = "": auxnomdoc = "": auxnompro = "": auxcodser = -1
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          If RS1!tov_codcas <> Trim(auxrutpro) Then
             
             If Trim(auxrutpro) <> "" Then
                
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = j
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = auxnompro
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = auxnumdoc
                If canali > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "TR", Format(canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
                If candes > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "TR", Format(candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
                If cangrl > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "TR", Format(cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0))): .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = nomcta
                Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & _
                          "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8)
                canali = 0: candes = 0: cangrl = 0
                i = i + 1: j = j + 1
             
             End If
             
             auxrutpro = RS1!tov_codcas
             auxnompro = RS1!cli_nombre & " (" & RS1!tov_codcas & ")"
             auxnumdoc = RS1!dev_numdoc
             auxtipdoc = RS1!dev_tipdoc
'             nomcta = RS1!pro_ctacon
          
          End If
          If RS1!dev_numdoc <> auxnumdoc Then
             
             If auxnumdoc > 0 Then
                
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = j
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = auxnompro
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = auxnumdoc
                If canali > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "TR", Format(canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
                If candes > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "TR", Format(candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
                If cangrl > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "TR", Format(cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0))): .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = nomcta
                Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & _
                          "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8)
                canali = 0: candes = 0: cangrl = 0
                i = i + 1: j = j + 1
             
             End If
             
             auxnumdoc = RS1!dev_numdoc
             auxtipdoc = RS1!dev_tipdoc
'             nomcta = RS1!pro_ctacon
          
          End If
          
          If RS1!dev_tipdoc <> Trim(auxtipdoc) Then
             
             If auxtipdoc <> "" Then
                
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = j
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = auxnompro
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = auxnumdoc
                If canali > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "TR", Format(canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
                If candes > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "TR", Format(candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
                If cangrl > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "TR", Format(cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0))): .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = nomcta
                Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & _
                          "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8)
                canali = 0: candes = 0: cangrl = 0
                i = i + 1: j = j + 1
             
             End If
             
             auxtipdoc = RS1!dev_tipdoc
'             nomcta = RS1!pro_ctacon
          
          End If

          If RS1!tov_codser <> auxcodser Then
            
            auxcodser = RS1!tov_codser
          
          End If
          
          If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             canali = Round(canali + (RS1!dev_canmer * RS1!dev_precos), vg_DPr)
             tental = Round(tental + (RS1!dev_canmer * RS1!dev_precos), vg_DPr)
             totali = Round(totali + (RS1!dev_canmer * RS1!dev_precos), vg_DPr)
          
          ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             candes = Round(candes + (RS1!dev_canmer * RS1!dev_precos), vg_DPr)
             tentde = Round(tentde + (RS1!dev_canmer * RS1!dev_precos), vg_DPr)
             totdes = Round(totdes + (RS1!dev_canmer * RS1!dev_precos), vg_DPr)
          
          Else
             
             cangrl = Round(cangrl + (RS1!dev_canmer * RS1!dev_precos), vg_DPr)
             tentgr = Round(tentgr + (RS1!dev_canmer * RS1!dev_precos), vg_DPr)
             totgrl = Round(totgrl + (RS1!dev_canmer * RS1!dev_precos), vg_DPr)
             nomcta = RS1!pro_ctacon
          
          End If
          RS1.MoveNext
       
       Loop
       
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = j
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = auxnompro
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = auxnumdoc
       If canali > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "TR", Format(canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-canali, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
       If candes > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "TR", Format(candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-candes, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
       If cangrl > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(auxtipdoc = "TR", Format(cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(-cangrl, fg_Pict(6, 0))): .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = nomcta
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & _
                "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8)
       tental = 0: tentde = 0: tentgr = 0
       i = i + 2: j = j + 1
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, i) = 230
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total Traspasos Entre Contratos"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(totali <> 0, Format(totali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(totdes <> 0, Format(totdes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(totgrl <> 0, Format(totgrl, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & _
                 "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8)
       i = i + 1
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, i) = 230
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total Acumulado"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(tanali <> 0 Or totali <> 0, Format(tanali + totali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(tandes <> 0 Or totdes <> 0, Format(tandes + totdes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(tangrl <> 0 Or totgrl <> 0, Format(tangrl + totgrl, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
        Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & _
                  "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8)
       canali = 0: candes = 0: cangrl = 0: totali = 0: totdes = 0: totgrl = 0
    Else
        
        i = i + 1
    
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc

End With

Close #1
Preview.Show 1

Exit Function
Error_CTC:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function

End Function

Sub I_ConRac(cencos As String, codreg As Long, codser As Long, Fecha As String)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, R As Long, auxfec As Long, ndia As String
Dim cLin As String

On Local Error GoTo Error_ControlRac

fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Raciones"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .FontSize = 7
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Control de Raciones " & Fecha
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Servicio"
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS1!cli_nombre
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Regimen(2, codreg, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = RS1!reg_nombre
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Servicio(8, codser, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = RS1!ser_nombre
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    auxfec = 0
    For i = 3 To M_ConRac.vaSpread1.MaxCols
        M_ConRac.vaSpread1.Row = 0: M_ConRac.vaSpread1.Col = i
'        If DatePart("ww", fg_Ctod1(Mid(Fecha, 4, 4) & Mid(Fecha, 1, 2) & fg_pone_cero(Right(M_ConRac.vaSpread1.text, 2), 2)), 2) <> auxfec Then
        If DatePart("ww", Right(M_ConRac.vaSpread1.text, 10), 2) <> auxfec Then
           If auxfec > 0 Then
              For R = 1 To M_ConRac.vaSpread1.MaxRows
                 cLin = ""
                 For j = 1 To 8
                     cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, R, j) & "|"
                 Next j
                 Print #1, cLin
              Next R
              .TableCell(tcRows) = M_ConRac.vaSpread1.MaxRows
              .TableBorder = tbAll
              .EndTable
           End If
           auxfec = DatePart("ww", Right(M_ConRac.vaSpread1.text, 10), 2)
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
           .TableCell(tcBackColor) = vbYellow
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
           .TableCell(tcText) = "Clientes"
           For R = 2 To 8
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , R) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , R) = taCenterMiddle
              .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, R) = ""
           Next R
           H = R
           cLin = ""
           For R = i To M_ConRac.vaSpread1.MaxCols
               M_ConRac.vaSpread1.Row = 0: M_ConRac.vaSpread1.Col = R
               If M_ConRac.vaSpread1.text = "0" Then Close #1: Preview.Show 1: Exit Sub
               If DatePart("ww", Right(M_ConRac.vaSpread1.text, 10), 2) <> auxfec Then Exit For
               .TableCell(tcText, 1, fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(M_ConRac.vaSpread1.text, Len(M_ConRac.vaSpread1.text) - 11))) + 1) = M_ConRac.vaSpread1.text
           Next R
           cLin = ""
           For R = 1 To 8
              cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, R) & "|"
           Next R
           Print #1, cLin
           .TableBorder = tbAll
           .EndTable
           
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = M_ConRac.vaSpread1.MaxRows
           .TableCell(tcBackColor) = vbBlack
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = False
           For R = 2 To 8
               .TableCell(tcColWidth, , R) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , R) = taCenterMiddle
               .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = False
           Next R
        End If
        For R = 1 To M_ConRac.vaSpread1.MaxRows
            M_ConRac.vaSpread1.Row = 0: M_ConRac.vaSpread1.Col = i: ndia = M_ConRac.vaSpread1.text 'Format(Right(M_ConRac.vaSpread1.text, 10), "dd")
            M_ConRac.vaSpread1.Row = R: M_ConRac.vaSpread1.Col = 2
            If M_ConRac.vaSpread1.text = "Total Cliente" Then
               .TableCell(tcFontSize, R, 1) = 8
               .TableCell(tcFontBold, R, 1) = True
               .TableCell(tcFontBold, R, fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(ndia, Len(ndia) - 11))) + 1) = True
            End If
            .TableCell(tcText, R, 1) = M_ConRac.vaSpread1.text
            M_ConRac.vaSpread1.Row = R: M_ConRac.vaSpread1.Col = i
            .TableCell(tcText, R, fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(ndia, Len(ndia) - 11))) + 1) = M_ConRac.vaSpread1.text
        Next R
        cLin = ""
    Next i
    For R = 1 To M_ConRac.vaSpread1.MaxRows
        cLin = ""
        For j = 1 To 8
            cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, R, j) & "|"
        Next j
        Print #1, cLin
    Next R
    .TableCell(tcRows) = M_ConRac.vaSpread1.MaxRows
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1
Exit Sub
Error_ControlRac:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Sub
End Sub

Sub I_VentaContado(cencos As String, codreg As Long, codser As Long, Fecha As String, forpag As String)
Dim i As Long, j As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_ControlRac
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Servicio Contado"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .FontSize = 7
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Venta Servicio Contado " & Fecha
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Servicio"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 4, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) = "Forma de Pago"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = MuestraCasino(1) & " " & MuestraCasino(2)
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Regimen(2, codreg, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Trim(RS1!reg_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Servicio(8, codser, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 4, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2) = forpag
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    For i = 1 To M_VtaCon.vaSpread1.MaxRows Step 2
        .StartTable
        .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
        .TableCell(tcBackColor) = vbYellow
        .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
        For j = 1 To M_VtaCon.vaSpread1.MaxCols
            M_VtaCon.vaSpread1.Row = 0
            M_VtaCon.vaSpread1.Col = j
            Glosa = Trim(M_VtaCon.vaSpread1.text)
            M_VtaCon.vaSpread1.Row = i
            M_VtaCon.vaSpread1.Col = j
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , j) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, j) = Glosa & " " & Trim(M_VtaCon.vaSpread1.text)
        Next j
        .TableBorder = tbAll
        .EndTable
        .StartTable
        
        .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
        .TableCell(tcBackColor) = vbBlack
        .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
        .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = False
        For j = 1 To M_VtaCon.vaSpread1.MaxCols
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , j) = taCenterMiddle
            .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = False
            M_VtaCon.vaSpread1.Row = i + 1
            M_VtaCon.vaSpread1.Col = j
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, j) = IIf(Trim(M_VtaCon.vaSpread1.text) <> "", Format(M_VtaCon.vaSpread1.text, fg_Pict(11, 2)), "")
        Next j
        .TableBorder = tbAll
        .EndTable
    Next i
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Total Mes"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = M_VtaCon.Label1(6).Caption
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1
Exit Sub
Error_ControlRac:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Sub
End Sub

Public Function I_PrecioVentaCliente(cencos As String, codreg As Long, codser As Long, Fecha As Long)
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_PrecioCliente
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Precio Venta Cliente"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    .FontSize = 8
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Precio Venta de Cliente" & " (" & Mid(Fecha, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(Fecha, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(Fecha, 1, 4) & ")"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS1!cli_nombre
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    If codser = 0 Or codreg = 0 Then Fecha = 0
    RS1.Open "SELECT c.reg_codigo, c.reg_nombre, d.ser_codigo, d.ser_nombre, a.cli_codigo, a.cli_nombre, b.prv_preven, b.prv_fecvig " & _
             "FROM b_clientes a, b_preciovta b, a_regimen c, a_servicio d " & _
             "WHERE b.prv_rutcli=a.cli_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.prv_codreg=c.reg_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.prv_codser=d.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.prv_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND  (b.prv_codreg=" & codreg & " OR " & codreg & "=0) " & _
             "AND  (b.prv_codser=" & codser & " OR " & codser & "=0) " & _
             "AND  (b.prv_fecvig=" & Fecha & " OR " & Fecha & "=0) " & _
             "ORDER BY c.reg_codigo ASC, d.ser_codigo ASC, a.cli_nombre ASC, b.prv_fecvig DESC", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 5800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Clientes"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Precio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Fecha"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 5800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    i = 1: auxreg = 0: auxser = 0
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!reg_codigo <> auxreg Or RS1!ser_codigo <> auxser Then
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!reg_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre) & " \ " & RS1!ser_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
             .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 4
             i = i + 1
             auxreg = RS1!reg_codigo
             auxser = RS1!ser_codigo
             auxfec = 0
          End If
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = " " & fg_PintaRut(RS1!cli_codigo)
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(RS1!prv_preven, fg_Pict(6, 2))
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = fg_Ctod1(RS1!prv_fecvig)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4)
          RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
       Loop
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_PrecioCliente:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_IngValCeroPlan(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String, opnomrec As Boolean)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxfec As Long, auxser As Long, auxreg As Long, nomtip As String
Dim nomser As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_ProdValCero
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informer Ingredientes Valor Cero"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .FontSize = 8
    fg_carga ""
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT e.min_codreg, e.min_codser, a.pro_codigo, a.pro_nombre, b.ing_codigo, b.ing_nombre " & _
             "FROM b_productos a, b_ingrediente b, b_productosing c, b_recetadet d, b_minuta e, b_minutadet f, b_contlistpreing g " & _
             "WHERE e.min_codigo=f.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   f.mid_codrec=d.red_codigo " & _
             "AND   f.mid_tiprec=d.red_tiprec AND ((d.red_tiprec<>0 AND d.red_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') OR (d.red_tiprec=0 AND d.red_cencos='0')) " & _
             "AND   d.red_codpro=b.ing_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.ing_codigo=g.cpi_coding AND g.cpi_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND g.cpi_precos=0 " & _
             "AND   b.ing_codigo=c.pri_coding " & _
             "AND   a.pro_codigo=c.pri_codpro " & _
             "AND   e.min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   e.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   e.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   e.min_fecmin>=" & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   e.min_fecmin<=" & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   f.mid_tipmin='" & tipmin & "' " & _
             "ORDER BY e.min_codreg, e.min_codser, b.ing_nombre, a.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: fg_descarga: Exit Function
    auxser = 0: auxreg = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       If RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
          If RS1!min_codser <> auxser And auxser > 0 Then
             .TableCell(tcRows) = i: .TableBorder = tbNone: .EndTable
             .NewPage
             auxser = 0
          End If
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
          nomtip = IIf(tipmin = 1, "Teórico", "Real")
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Ingredientes Valor Cero en Planificación (" & nomtip & ")  " & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4) & ")"
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Servicio"
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS2!cli_nombre
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Regimen(2, RS1!min_codreg, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = RS2!reg_nombre
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Servicio(8, RS1!min_codser, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = RS2!ser_nombre
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13)
          
          
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 3800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Ingredientes"
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Productos"
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Descripción"
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4)
          .TableBorder = tbBox
          .EndTable
          
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 3800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
          i = 1
          auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
          auxser = RS1!min_codser
       End If
    
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!ing_codigo
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!ing_nombre
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = RS1!pro_codigo
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = RS1!pro_nombre
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4)
       RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
    Loop
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i: .TableBorder = tbNone: .EndTable
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    fg_descarga
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_ProdValCero:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_RA13(cencos As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, opppto As Boolean, opproy As Boolean, opcosban As Boolean)

Dim i As Long, j As Long, X As Long, y As Long, z As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, sqlfini As String, sqlffin As String
Dim MsgTitulo As String, Nfecha As String, p As Long, R As Long, H As Long, cLin As String, anomes As Long, sql1 As String, sql2 As String

On Local Error GoTo Error_A13

MsgTitulo = "Resultado Operacionales Mensual o A13"
anomes = Val(Left(Trim(Str(fecini)), 6))
Preview.Refresh
fg_carga ""

With Preview.VSPrinter
     
     vg_reporte = dir_trabajo_Inf & "A13" & cencos & Format(Date, "yyyymm") & ".rtf"
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 7.5
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    
    '-------> Traer periodo
    Dim fecper As Long
    fecper = 0
    Nfecha = ""
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

    RS1.Open "SELECT cie_periodo FROM b_cierreperiodo with (nolock) WHERE cie_cencos='" & cencos & "' AND cie_fecini<=" & fecini & "  AND cie_fecter>=" & fecfin & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then fecper = RS1!cie_periodo
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    '-------> Fin traer periodo
    If fecper > 0 Then Nfecha = "(Mes : " & Meses("01/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4) & ")" Else Nfecha = "(Mes : " & Meses(Mid(fg_pone_cero(Str(fecini), 8), 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecini, 8), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecini, 8), 1, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecini, 8), 1, 4) & ")"
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2
    .TableCell(tcRows) = 1

    .text = Chr(13)

    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close

    If RS1.EOF Or IsNull(RS1!par_valor) Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: MsgBox "No existe días stock, proceso cancelado", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo: Exit Function
    Dim ndiast As Long

    Dim totven As Double, totcaf As Double, tgrval As Double
    totven = 0
    tgrval = 0
    sqlfini = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sqlffin = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")

    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_tipdoc, ROUND(SUM(b.dev_ptotal),0) AS ptotal FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b WHERE a.tov_rutcli=b.dev_rutcli AND a.tov_tipdoc=b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND a.tov_numdoc=b.dev_numdoc AND (a.tov_tipdoc='FA' OR a.tov_tipdoc='FE' OR a.tov_tipdoc='GD') AND b.dev_ptotal<>0 AND a.tov_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND a.tov_estdoc<>'A' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'P' " & _
             "AND a.tov_fecemi>=" & sqlfini & " AND a.tov_fecemi<=" & sqlffin & " GROUP BY a.tov_tipdoc", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          totven = Round(totven + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          tgrval = Round(tgrval + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          RS1.MoveNext
       
       Loop
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin traer ventas directas

             "WHERE vtc.vtc_codser=ser.ser_codigo AND vtc.vtc_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   vtc.vtc_fecvta>=" & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   vtc.vtc_fecvta<=" & fecfin & " " & _
             "GROUP BY vtc.vtc_codser, ser.ser_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic

          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!totmon, vg_DPr)
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Traer ventas directas"
          Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
          tgrval = Round(tgrval + RS1!totmon, vg_DPr)
          i = i + 1
          RS1.MoveNext
       
       Loop
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin traer ventas contado
    
    '-------> Traer venta cafetería
    totcaf = 0
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

             "AND b.dvc_precio <> 0 AND a.tvc_estado='C' AND a.tvc_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND a.tvc_fecing >= " & sqlfini & " AND a.tvc_fecing<=" & sqlffin & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    totcaf = Round(totcaf + TipoDato(RS1!ptotal, 0), vg_DPr)
    tgrval = Round(tgrval + TipoDato(RS1!ptotal, 0), vg_DPr)
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin traer ventas cafetería
    
    '-------> Ini Ventas servicios especiales
    Dim TotalVentaServicioEspeciales As Double

    '-------> Traer numero raciones & costo x clientes
    Dim totrac As Double, totval As Double, prevta As Double, nArch As String, auxreg As Long, ciedia As Long, fecvti As Long, fecvtf As Long, fanomes As Long
    totrac = 0
    totval = 0

    If fecper > 0 Then

    vg_db.Execute "SELECT mir.mir_cencos, mir.mir_codreg, mir.mir_codser, mir.mir_fecmin, mir.mir_rutcli, mir.mir_nrorac, MAX(prv.prv_fecvig) AS prv_fecvig INTO " & nArch & " " & _
                  "FROM b_minutaraciones mir, b_preciovta prv, b_clientes cli " & _

    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    If I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1 Then
       
       RS1.Open "SELECT '' AS mir_rutcli, mir.mir_codreg, b.reg_nombre, mir.mir_codser, " & _
                "c.ser_nombre, '' AS cli_nombre, 0 AS prv_preven, SUM(prv.prv_preven*mir.mir_nrorac) AS nrorac FROM " & nArch & " mir, b_preciovta prv, b_clientes a, a_regimen b, a_servicio c " & _
                "WHERE mir.mir_rutcli=prv.prv_rutcli AND mir.mir_codser=prv.prv_codser AND mir.mir_codreg=prv.prv_codreg AND mir.mir_cencos=prv.prv_cencos AND mir.prv_fecvig=prv.prv_fecvig " & _
                "AND mir.mir_codreg=b.reg_codigo AND mir.mir_codser=c.ser_codigo AND mir.mir_rutcli=a.cli_codigo AND mir.mir_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                "GROUP BY mir.mir_codreg, b.reg_nombre, mir.mir_codser, c.ser_nombre ORDER BY mir.mir_codreg, mir.mir_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Else
       
       RS1.Open "SELECT mir.mir_rutcli, mir.mir_codreg, b.reg_nombre, mir.mir_codser, " & _
                "c.ser_nombre, a.cli_nombre, prv.prv_preven, SUM(mir.mir_nrorac) AS nrorac FROM " & nArch & " mir, b_preciovta prv, b_clientes a, a_regimen b, a_servicio c " & _
                "WHERE mir.mir_rutcli=prv.prv_rutcli AND mir.mir_codser=prv.prv_codser AND mir.mir_codreg=prv.prv_codreg AND mir.mir_cencos=prv.prv_cencos AND mir.prv_fecvig=prv.prv_fecvig " & _
                "AND mir.mir_codreg=b.reg_codigo AND mir.mir_codser=c.ser_codigo AND mir.mir_rutcli=a.cli_codigo AND mir.mir_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                "GROUP BY mir.mir_rutcli, mir.mir_codreg, b.reg_nombre, mir.mir_codser, c.ser_nombre, a.cli_nombre, prv.prv_preven ORDER BY mir.mir_codreg, mir.mir_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    End If
    
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          If RS1!mir_codreg <> auxreg Then
             
             Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows

          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(Mid(RS1!ser_nombre, 1, IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, 30, 20))) & IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, "", " (" & Trim(Mid(RS1!cli_nombre, 1, 15)) & ")")
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, Format(RS1!nrorac, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(RS1!nrorac, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, "", Format(RS1!prv_preven, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, Format(RS1!nrorac, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(Round(RS1!nrorac * RS1!prv_preven, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)))
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "numero raciones"
          Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1

          totval = IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, Round((totval + RS1!nrorac), vg_DPr), Round(totval + (RS1!nrorac * RS1!prv_preven), vg_DPr))

    '-------> Consulta existe inventario inicial
    Dim indinv As Boolean, fectom As Long, iniali As Double, inides As Double
    indinv = False: fectom = 0: iniali = 0: inides = 0
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " VAL(MID(tin_fectom,1,6)) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),tin_fectom),1,6)) ")

    If Not RS1.EOF And Not IsNull(RS1!fectom) Then fectom = RS1!fectom: indinv = True
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    If indinv = False Then
       
       If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
       RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       
       RS1.Open "SELECT MAX(tin_fectom) AS fectom FROM b_tomainv WHERE tin_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND " & sql1 & "=" & Val(Format(BoM(Mid(fecini, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)), "yyyymm")) & " AND tin_ciemes<>0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS1.EOF And Not IsNull(RS1!fectom) Then fectom = RS1!fectom: indinv = True
       
       RS1.Close
       Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    End If
    If indinv = True And fectom > 0 Then
    
       If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
       RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       
       RS1.Open "SELECT a.pro_ctacon, ROUND(SUM(b.tin_stofis*b.tin_propon),0) AS cosinv FROM b_productos a, b_tomainv b " & _
                "WHERE b.tin_codpro=a.pro_codigo AND (a.pro_ctacon not in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') or a.pro_ctacon not in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
                "AND b.tin_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND b.tin_fectom=" & fectom & " AND b.tin_stofis<>0 AND b.tin_propon<>0 GROUP BY a.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS1.EOF Then
          
          Do While Not RS1.EOF
             
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                iniali = Round(iniali + RS1!cosinv, vg_DPr)
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                inides = Round(inides + RS1!cosinv, vg_DPr)
             
             End If
             
             RS1.MoveNext
          
          Loop
       End If
       
       RS1.Close
       Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    End If
    '-------> Fin consulta existe inventario inicial
        
    '-------> Traer compras centralizadas & fofi & No Estoqueable
    Dim cosalc           As Double
    Dim cosdec           As Double
    Dim cosalf           As Double
    Dim cosdef           As Double
    Dim cosans           As Double
    Dim cosdns           As Double
    Dim auxcos           As Double
    Dim tipdoc           As String

    Dim Cuentaa As String

    cosalc = 0
    cosdec = 0
    cosalf = 0
    cosdef = 0
    cosans = 0
    cosdns = 0
    auxcos = 0
    tipdoc = ""
'Jpaz 20121106        sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " ROUND(SUM((c.dec_ptotrec) - (IIf(c.dec_pctdes <> 0, (c.dec_ptotrec) * (c.dec_pctdes / 100), 0))),0) AS cosdif ", " ROUND(SUM((c.dec_ptotrec) - (CASE WHEN c.dec_pctdes <> 0 THEN (c.dec_ptotrec) * (c.dec_pctdes / 100) ELSE 0 END)),0) AS cosdif ")
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " ROUND(SUM((c.dec_precom * c.dec_canrec) - (IIf(c.dec_pctdes <> 0, (c.dec_precom * c.dec_canrec) * (c.dec_pctdes / 100), 0))),0) AS CostoCompras ", " ROUND(SUM((c.dec_precom * c.dec_canrec) - (CASE WHEN c.dec_pctdes <> 0 THEN (c.dec_precom * c.dec_canrec) * (c.dec_pctdes / 100) ELSE 0 END)),0) AS CostoCompras ")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " TRIM(b.toc_docaso) ", " lTRIM(b.toc_docaso) ")

    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

'             "" & sql1 & ", " & _
'             "SUM(c.dec_prefle) AS prefle FROM  b_productos a, b_totcompras b, b_detcompras c " & _

'             "AND   b.toc_numdoc=c.dec_numdoc " & _

''             "AND  (a.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') OR a.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
'             "AND ((b.toc_tipdoc IN ('FA', 'FE', 'ND', 'DE', 'SN', 'NC', 'CE') AND (b.toc_docaso IS NULL OR " & sql2 & "='')) OR b.toc_tipdoc NOT IN ('FA', 'FE', 'NC', 'CE', 'SN')) " & _
'             "AND   b.toc_tipinf IN ('C','F','P') " & _
'             "AND   b.toc_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " " & _
'             "AND   b.toc_fecrem>=" & sqlfini & " " & _
'             "AND   b.toc_fecrem<=" & sqlffin & " " & _
'             "GROUP BY b.toc_tipinf, b.toc_tipdoc, a.pro_ctacon, a.pro_ctrsto, c.dec_mueinv ORDER BY b.toc_tipinf, a.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
'
    Cuentaa = """" & fg_CambiaChar(fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','"), "'", """") & """"
    Cuentab = """" & fg_CambiaChar(fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','"), "'", """") & """"

    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF

'jpaz 20121106          auxcos = 0: auxcos = Round((IIf(RS1!ptotal <> RS1!cosdif, RS1!cosdif, RS1!ptotal) + RS1!prefle), vg_DPr)
          
          auxcos = 0
          auxcos = Round((RS1!CostoCompras + RS1!prefle), vg_DPr)
          tipdoc = IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "FA" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "FE", "FA", IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "ND" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "DE", "ND", IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "NC" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "CE", "NC", "GD")))
          
          If RS1!toc_tipinf = "C" Or RS1!toc_tipinf = "P" Then
             
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                If RS1!pro_ctrsto = 1 Then
                   
                   cosalc = Round(cosalc + IIf((tipdoc = "NC"), (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                
                Else
                   
                   If (tipdoc <> "FA") And tipdoc <> "GD" And (tipdoc <> "ND") And (tipdoc <> "NC") Then
                      
                      cosalf = Round((cosalf + auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   
                   Else
                      
                      cosans = Round(cosans + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   
                   End If
                
                End If
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                If RS1!pro_ctrsto = 1 Then
                   
                   cosdec = Round(cosdec + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                
                Else
                   
                   If (tipdoc <> "FA") And tipdoc <> "GD" And (tipdoc <> "ND") And (tipdoc <> "NC") Then
                      
                      cosdef = Round((cosdef + auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   
                   Else
                      
                      cosdns = Round(cosdns + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   
                   End If
                
                End If
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctafleins"), ";", "','")) Then 'creado 20130709
                
                CostoFleteInsumo = Round(CostoFleteInsumo + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr)  'vg_DCa)
             
             End If
          
          ElseIf RS1!toc_tipinf = "F" Then
             
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                If RS1!pro_ctrsto = 1 Then
                   
                   cosalf = Round(cosalf + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                
                Else
                   
                   If (tipdoc <> "FA") And tipdoc <> "GD" And (tipdoc <> "ND") And (tipdoc <> "NC") Then
                      
                      cosalf = Round((cosalf + auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   
                   Else
                      
                      cosans = Round(cosans + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   
                   End If
                
                End If
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                If RS1!pro_ctrsto = 1 Then
                   
                   cosdef = Round(cosdef + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                
                Else
                   
                   If (tipdoc <> "FA") And tipdoc <> "GD" And (tipdoc <> "ND") And (tipdoc <> "NC") Then
                      
                      cosdef = Round((cosdef + auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   
                   Else
                      
                      cosdns = Round(cosdns + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   
                   End If
                
                End If
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctafleins"), ";", "','")) Then 'creado 20130709
                
                CostoFleteInsumo = Round(CostoFleteInsumo + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr)  'vg_DCa)
             
             End If
          
          End If
          
          RS1.MoveNext
          
       Loop
       
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    auxcos = 0
    tipdoc = ""
    
    '-------> Buscar productos con impuesto recuperable
'    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " ROUND(SUM(((de.dec_ptotrec) - (IIf(de.dec_pctdes<>0, (de.dec_ptotrec) * (de.dec_pctdes/100), 0)))*(imd.imd_pctimp/100)),2) AS cosdif ", " ROUND(SUM(((de.dec_ptotrec) - ( CASE WHEN de.dec_pctdes<>0 THEN (de.dec_ptotrec) * (de.dec_pctdes/100) ELSE 0 END))*(imd.imd_pctimp/100)),2) AS cosdif ")
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " ROUND(SUM(((de.dec_precom * de.dec_canrec) - (IIf(de.dec_pctdes<>0, (de.dec_precom * de.dec_canrec) * (de.dec_pctdes/100), 0)))*(imd.imd_pctimp/100)),2) AS cosdif ", " ROUND(SUM(((de.dec_precom * de.dec_canrec) - ( CASE WHEN de.dec_pctdes<>0 THEN (de.dec_precom * de.dec_canrec) * (de.dec_pctdes/100) ELSE 0 END))*(imd.imd_pctimp/100)),2) AS cosdif ")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " trim(toc.toc_docaso) ", " ltrim(toc.toc_docaso) ")
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
'jpaz 20121106          auxcos = Round(IIf(RS1!monimp <> RS1!cosdif, RS1!cosdif, RS1!monimp), vg_DCa)
          
          auxcos = Round((RS1!cosdif), vg_DCa)
          tipdoc = IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "FA" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "FE", "FA", IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "ND" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "DE", "ND", IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "NC" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "CE", "NC", "GD")))
          
          If RS1!toc_tipinf = "C" Or RS1!toc_tipinf = "P" Then

                If RS1!pro_ctrsto = 1 Then
                   
                   cosalc = Round(cosalc + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                
                Else

                   cosdec = Round(cosdec + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)

             End If
          
          ElseIf RS1!toc_tipinf = "F" Then
             
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                If RS1!pro_ctrsto = 1 Then
                   
                   cosalf = Round(cosalf + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)

    '-------> Transferencia recibidas & entragadas alimento & desechable
    Dim crecal As Double
    Dim crecde As Double
    Dim cemtal As Double
    Dim cemtde As Double
    Dim CosLog As Double
        
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    Cuentaa = """" & fg_CambiaChar(fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','"), "'", """") & """"
    Cuentab = """" & fg_CambiaChar(fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','"), "'", """") & """"
    
    Set RS1 = vg_db.Execute("sgp_Sel_TraspasoEntradaSalidaA13 " & vg_codbod & ", " & sqlfini & ", " & sqlffin & ", '" & Cuentaa & "', '" & Cuentab & "'")

       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          If RS1!tov_codser = 1 Then
             
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                crecal = Round(crecal + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                crecde = Round(crecde + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             End If
             
'--> comenta linea actual calculo costo logistico 20200706             CosLog = CosLog + RS1!CosLogistico
          
          Else
             
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                cemtal = Round(cemtal + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                cemtde = Round(cemtde + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             End If
          
          End If
          RS1.MoveNext
       
       Loop
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin transferencia recibidas & entregadas alimento & desechable
    
    '-------> Ini : Calculo Costo Logistico
    CosLog = 0
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    Set RS1 = vg_db.Execute("sgp_Sel_TraspasoEntradaCostoLogisticoA13 " & vg_codbod & ", " & sqlfini & ", " & sqlffin & "")
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          CosLog = CosLog + RS1!CosLogistico
          
          RS1.MoveNext
       
       Loop
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin : Calculo Costo Logistico
    
    '-------> Transferencia productos terminados
    Dim crenal As Double, cennde As Double
    crenal = 0
    cennde = 0
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon, ROUND(SUM(b.dev_canmer*b.dev_precos),0) AS cosmer " & _
             "FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c WHERE a.tov_rutcli=b.dev_rutcli AND a.tov_tipdoc=b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND  a.tov_numdoc=b.dev_numdoc AND b.dev_codmer=c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND (c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') OR c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND  a.tov_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND a.tov_tipdoc='TR' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'A' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'P' AND a.tov_fecemi>=" & sqlfini & " " & _
             "AND  a.tov_fecemi<=" & sqlffin & " " & _
             "AND  b.dev_mueinv='N' " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon ORDER BY a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          If RS1!tov_codser = 1 Then
             
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                crenal = Round(crenal + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                cennde = Round(cennde + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             End If
          
          Else
             
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                crenal = Round(crenal - RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                cennde = Round(cennde - RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             End If
          
          End If
          RS1.MoveNext
       
       Loop
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin transferencia productos terminados
    
    '-------> Traer mermas
    Dim cmeali As Double, cmedes As Double
    cmeali = 0
    cmedes = 0
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

    RS1.Open "SELECT c.pro_ctacon, SUM(b.dev_canmer*b.dev_precos) AS cosmer FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c " & _
             "WHERE a.tov_rutcli=b.dev_rutcli AND a.tov_tipdoc=b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_numdoc=b.dev_numdoc AND b.dev_codmer=c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND  (c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') OR c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND   a.tov_tipdoc='ME' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'A' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'P' AND a.tov_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecemi>=" & sqlfini & " AND a.tov_fecemi<=" & sqlffin & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon ORDER BY a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             cmeali = Round(cmeali + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr)
          
          ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             cmedes = Round(cmedes + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr)
          
          End If
          
          RS1.MoveNext
       
       Loop
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin traer mermas
    
    '-------> Traer salida & devolución producción
    Dim tosali As Double, tosdes As Double, todali As Double, toddes As Double
    tosali = 0
    tosdes = 0
    todali = 0
    toddes = 0
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_tipdoc, c.pro_ctacon, SUM(b.dev_ptotal) AS ptotal FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c " & _
             "WHERE a.tov_rutcli=b.dev_rutcli AND a.tov_tipdoc=b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_numdoc=b.dev_numdoc AND b.dev_codmer=c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND  (c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') OR c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND  (a.tov_tipdoc='SP' OR a.tov_tipdoc='DP') AND b.dev_canmer<>0 AND a.tov_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND a.tov_estdoc<>'A' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'P' " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro>=" & sqlfini & " AND a.tov_fecpro<=" & sqlffin & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_tipdoc, c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          If RS1!tov_tipdoc = "SP" And RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             tosali = Round(tosali + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          
          ElseIf RS1!tov_tipdoc = "SP" And RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             tosdes = Round(tosdes + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          
          ElseIf RS1!tov_tipdoc = "DP" And RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             todali = Round(todali + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          
          ElseIf RS1!tov_tipdoc = "DP" And RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             toddes = Round(toddes + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          
          End If
          
          RS1.MoveNext
       
       Loop
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    '-------> Ini : Salida & Devolucion Venta Servicios Especiales (17/03/2021)
    Dim TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial As Double, TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial As Double, TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial As Double, TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial As Double
    TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial = 0
    TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial = 0
    TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial = 0
    TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial = 0
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    Cuentaa = """" & fg_CambiaChar(fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','"), "'", """") & """"
    Cuentab = """" & fg_CambiaChar(fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','"), "'", """") & """"
    
    Set RS1 = vg_db.Execute("sgp_Sel_SalidaDevolucionVentaservicioEspecialesA13 '" & cencos & "', " & vg_codbod & ", " & sqlfini & ", " & sqlffin & ", '" & Cuentaa & "', '" & Cuentab & "'")
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          If RS1!tos_tipo_documento = "SE" And RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial = Round(TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          
          ElseIf RS1!tos_tipo_documento = "SE" And RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial = Round(TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          
          ElseIf RS1!tos_tipo_documento = "DE" And RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial = Round(TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          
          ElseIf RS1!tos_tipo_documento = "DE" And RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial = Round(TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          
          End If
          
          RS1.MoveNext
       
       Loop
    
    End If

             "WHERE b.tvc_cencos=a.dvp_cencos AND b.tvc_fecing=a.dvp_fecing " & _

                   "GROUP BY pro.pro_ctacon, aju.aju_tipo ORDER BY pro.pro_ctacon, aju.aju_tipo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          
          If Not RS2.EOF Then
             
             Do While Not RS2.EOF

                      ajuali = (ajuali + RS2!cosinv)
                   
                   ElseIf RS2!aju_tipo = "D" Then
                      
                      ajuali = (ajuali - RS2!cosinv)
                   
                   End If
                
                ElseIf RS2!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then

                      ajudes = (ajudes - RS2!cosinv)
                   
                   End If
                
                End If
                
                RS2.MoveNext
             Loop
          
          End If
          RS2.Close
          Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          RS1.MoveNext
          
       Loop
       
    End If

    Set RS1 = Nothing

        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            
            If RS1!gas_codigo >= 2 And RS1!gas_codigo <= 5 Then
               
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!gas_descri
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(RS1!gas_valor, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
               tocope = tocope + RS1!gas_valor
                i = i + 1
            
            End If
            
            RS1.MoveNext
        
        Loop
        
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total Costo Personal"
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(tocope, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
        If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format((tocope / tgrval) * 100, fg_Pict(9, 2)) & "%"
        .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
        
        .text = Chr(13)
        .StartTable
        .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
        i = 1
        RS1.MoveFirst
        
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            
            If RS1!gas_codigo >= 6 And RS1!gas_codigo <= 8 Then
                
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!gas_descri
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(RS1!gas_valor, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
                i = i + 1
            
            End If
            
            RS1.MoveNext
        
        Loop
        .TableBorder = tbAll
        .EndTable
        '-------> Fin traer costo personal
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    .text = Chr(13)
    
    '-------> Total de gastos
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "TOTAL DE GASTOS": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True
    
    Dim totgas As Double
    
    totgas = (cmeali + cmedes + ctogas + tosali + TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial + tosdes + TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial + (ajuali * -1) + (ajudes * -1) + tocope + totdep + cosans + cosdns) - (todali + TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial + toddes + TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial + (crenal * -1) + (cennde * -1))
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format(Round(totgas, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    If tgrval > 0 Then
    
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format(((totgas / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    
    End If
    
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    '-------> Fin total de gastos

    '-------> Utilidad Operacional
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "UTILIDAD - OPERACIONAL": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format(Round((tgrval) - totgas, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    
    Dim totuti As Double, vTUtili As Double
    vTUtili = 0
    vTUtili = Round((tgrval) - totgas, vg_DPr)
    If tgrval > 0 Then
       
       totuti = Format(((((tgrval) - totgas) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(9, 20))
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Left(Trim(Str(totuti)), InStr(1, Trim(Str(totuti)), vg_CDec) + 2) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 3) = True
    
    End If
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable: .text = Chr(13)
    '-------> Fin utilidad
    
        
    '------- Transferencia recibidas & entragadas alimento & desechable No Estoqueable
    I_RA13B cencos, fecper, fecini, fecfin, tgrval, cmeali, cmedes, tosali, tosdes, ajuali, ajudes, todali, toddes, infali, infdes, cosans, cosdns, X, y, opppto, opproy, nArch, crenal, cennde, opcosban, ctogas, totdep, totgas, vTUtili, totuti, tocope, iniali, inides, cosalc, cosalf, cosdec, cosdef, crecal, crecde, cemtal, cemtde, totven, totcaf, tomali, tomdes, CostoFleteInsumo, CosLog, TotalVentaServicioEspeciales, TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial, TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial, TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial, TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial

    .EndDoc

End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_A13:
    fg_descarga
    Close #1
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    'Resume Next
    'Exit Function
End Function


Public Function I_RA13Colombia(cencos As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, opppto As Boolean, opproy As Boolean, opcosban As Boolean)
