Dim i As Long, j As Long, X As Long, y As Long, z As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, sqlfini As String, sqlffin As String
Dim MsgTitulo As String, Nfecha As String, p As Long, R As Long, H As Long, cLin As String, anomes As Long, sql1 As String, sql2 As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_A13Colombia
MsgTitulo = "Resultado Operacionales Mensual o A13"
anomes = Val(Left(Trim(Str(fecini)), 6))
Preview.Refresh
fg_carga ""
With Preview.VSPrinter
     vg_reporte = dir_trabajo_Inf & "A13" & cencos & Format(Date, "yyyymm") & ".rtf"
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 7.5
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    '-------> Traer periodo
    Dim fecper As Long
    fecper = 0: Nfecha = ""
    RS1.Open "SELECT cie_periodo FROM b_cierreperiodo WHERE cie_cencos='" & cencos & "' AND cie_fecini<=" & fecini & "  AND cie_fecter>=" & fecfin & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then fecper = RS1!cie_periodo
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin traer periodo
    If fecper > 0 Then Nfecha = "(Mes : " & Meses("01/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4) & ")" Else Nfecha = "(Mes : " & Meses(Mid(fg_pone_cero(Str(fecini), 8), 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecini, 8), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecini, 8), 1, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecini, 8), 1, 4) & ")"
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Resultados Operacionales Mensual o A13 " & Nfecha
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    Print #1, Chr(13) & Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 2) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 230
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 10300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Periodo"
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS1!cli_nombre & " (" & RS1!cli_codigo & ")"
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Mid(fg_pone_cero(Str(fecini), 8), 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(Str(fecini), 8), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(Str(fecini), 8), 1, 4) & " al " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(Str(fecfin), 8), 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(Str(fecfin), 8), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(Str(fecfin), 8), 1, 4)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
    Print #1, Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable

    '-------> Traer número días stock
    RS1.Open "SELECT par_valor FROM a_param WHERE par_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND par_codigo='diasstock' AND (par_valor<>'0' OR par_valor<>'' OR (par_valor) IS NOT NULL)", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Or IsNull(RS1!par_valor) Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: MsgBox "No existe días stock, proceso cancelado", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo: Exit Function
    Dim ndiast As Long
    ndiast = RS1!par_valor
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin traer número días stock
    
    X = .CurrentX
    y = .CurrentY
    Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = 0
    Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1: Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols = 10
    
    '-------> Traer ventas directas
    Dim totven As Double, totcaf As Double, tgrval As Double, tgrteo As Double
    totven = 0: tgrval = 0
    sqlfini = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sqlffin = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_tipdoc, ROUND(SUM(b.dev_ptotal),0) AS ptotal FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b WHERE a.tov_rutcli=b.dev_rutcli AND a.tov_tipdoc=b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND a.tov_numdoc=b.dev_numdoc AND (a.tov_tipdoc='FA' OR a.tov_tipdoc='FE' OR a.tov_tipdoc='GD') AND b.dev_ptotal<>0 AND a.tov_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND a.tov_estdoc<>'A' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'P' " & _
             "AND a.tov_fecemi>=" & sqlfini & " AND a.tov_fecemi<=" & sqlffin & " GROUP BY a.tov_tipdoc", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          totven = Round(totven + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          tgrval = Round(tgrval + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin traer ventas directas
    
    '-------> Traer venta contado
    RS1.Open "SELECT vtc.vtc_codser, ser.ser_nombre, ROUND(SUM(vtc.vtc_totmon),0) AS totmon FROM b_ventacontado vtc, a_servicio ser " & _
             "WHERE vtc.vtc_codser=ser.ser_codigo AND vtc.vtc_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   vtc.vtc_fecvta>=" & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   vtc.vtc_fecvta<=" & fecfin & " " & _
             "GROUP BY vtc.vtc_codser, ser.ser_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = ""
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = ""
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!totmon, vg_DPr)
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Traer ventas directas"
          Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
          tgrval = Round(tgrval + RS1!totmon, vg_DPr)
          i = i + 1: RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin traer ventas contado
    
    '-------> Traer venta cafetería
    totcaf = 0
    RS1.Open "SELECT ROUND(SUM(b.dvc_precio*b.dvc_canart),0) AS ptotal FROM b_totventascaf a, b_detventascaf b WHERE a.tvc_cencos=b.dvc_cencos AND a.tvc_fecing=b.dvc_fecing " & _
             "AND b.dvc_precio <> 0 AND a.tvc_estado='C' AND a.tvc_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND a.tvc_fecing >= " & sqlfini & " AND a.tvc_fecing<=" & sqlffin & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    totcaf = Round(totcaf + TipoDato(RS1!ptotal, 0), vg_DPr)
    tgrval = Round(tgrval + TipoDato(RS1!ptotal, 0), vg_DPr)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin traer ventas cafetería
    
    '-------> Traer numero raciones & costo x clientes
    Dim totrac As Double, totval As Double, prevta As Double, nArch As String, auxreg As Long, ciedia As Long, fecvti As Long, fecvtf As Long, fanomes As Long
    totrac = 0: totval = 0:  prevta = 0: auxreg = 0: fecvti = 0: fecvtf = 0: fanomes = 0
    nArch = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmpfactA13"
    If fecper > 0 Then
        '-------> Traer día cierre
        ciedia = 0
        RS1.Open "SELECT MIN(cli_ciedia) AS cli_ciedia FROM b_clientes WHERE cli_tipo=1 AND cli_cievta='2' AND cli_activo='1'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        If Not RS1.EOF Then
           ciedia = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_ciedia) Or Trim(RS1!cli_ciedia) = "", 0, RS1!cli_ciedia)
           If ciedia > 0 Then
              fecvti = Format(BoM("01/" & Mid(fecper, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecper, 1, 4)), "yyyymm") & fg_pone_cero(ciedia + 1, 2)
              fecvtf = fecper & fg_pone_cero(ciedia, 2)
              If fecfin < fecvtf Then fecvtf = fecfin
           End If
        End If
        RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    End If
    If fecper > 0 Then fanomes = Format(BoM("01/" & Mid(fecper, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecper, 1, 4)), "yyyymm")
    fg_CheckTmp nArch
'    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " iif(cli.cli_cievta='1', " & fecini & ", " & fanomes & " & Right('00' + (cli.cli_ciedia + 1), 2)) ", " CASE WHEN cli.cli_cievta = '1' THEN " & fecini & " ELSE " & fanomes & " + cli.cli_ciedia + 1 END ")
'    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " iif(cli.cli_cievta='1', " & fecfin & ", iif(" & fecfin & "<" & fecper & " & Right('00' + cli.cli_ciedia, 2)," & fecfin & "," & fecper & " & Right('00' + cli.cli_ciedia, 2))) ", " CASE WHEN cli.cli_cievta = '1' THEN " & fecfin & " ELSE CASE WHEN " & fecfin & " < " & fecper & " + cli.cli_ciedia THEN " & fecfin & " ELSE " & fecper & " + cli.cli_ciedia END END ")
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " iif(cli.cli_cievta='1', " & fecini & ", " & fanomes & " & Right('00' + (cli.cli_ciedia + 1), 2)) ", " CASE WHEN cli.cli_cievta = '1' THEN " & fecini & " ELSE convert(int,'" & fanomes & "' + (convert(varchar,isnull(cli.cli_ciedia,0)+1))) END ")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " iif(cli.cli_cievta='1', " & fecfin & ", iif(" & fecfin & "<" & fecper & " & Right('00' + cli.cli_ciedia, 2)," & fecfin & "," & fecper & " & Right('00' + cli.cli_ciedia, 2))) ", " CASE WHEN cli.cli_cievta = '1' THEN " & fecfin & " ELSE CASE WHEN " & fecfin & " < convert(int,'" & fecper & "' + convert(varchar,isnull(cli.cli_ciedia,0))) THEN " & fecfin & " ELSE convert(int,'" & fecper & "' + convert(varchar,isnull(cli.cli_ciedia,0))) END END ")
    vg_db.Execute "SELECT mir.mir_cencos, mir.mir_codreg, mir.mir_codser, mir.mir_fecmin, mir.mir_rutcli, mir.mir_nrorac, MAX(prv.prv_fecvig) AS prv_fecvig INTO " & nArch & " " & _
                  "FROM b_minutaraciones mir, b_preciovta prv, b_clientes cli " & _
                  "WHERE mir.mir_rutcli=prv.prv_rutcli " & _
                  "AND   mir.mir_codser=prv.prv_codser " & _
                  "AND   mir.mir_codreg=prv.prv_codreg " & _
                  "AND   mir.mir_cencos=prv.prv_cencos " & _
                  "AND   mir.mir_fecmin>=prv.prv_fecvig " & _
                  "AND   mir.mir_rutcli=cli.cli_codigo " & _
                  "AND   mir.mir_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                  "AND   mir.mir_fecmin>=" & sql1 & " " & _
                  "AND   mir.mir_fecmin<=" & sql2 & " " & _
                  "AND   mir.mir_nrorac>0 " & _
                  "AND  ((mir.mir_nroguia) IS NULL OR mir.mir_nroguia=0) " & _
                  "GROUP BY mir.mir_cencos, mir.mir_codreg, mir.mir_codser, mir.mir_fecmin, mir.mir_rutcli, mir.mir_nrorac"
    If I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1 Then
       RS1.Open "SELECT '' AS mir_rutcli, mir.mir_codreg, b.reg_nombre, mir.mir_codser, " & _
                "c.ser_nombre, '' AS cli_nombre, 0 AS prv_preven, SUM(prv.prv_preven*mir.mir_nrorac) AS nrorac FROM " & nArch & " mir, b_preciovta prv, b_clientes a, a_regimen b, a_servicio c " & _
                "WHERE mir.mir_rutcli=prv.prv_rutcli AND mir.mir_codser=prv.prv_codser AND mir.mir_codreg=prv.prv_codreg AND mir.mir_cencos=prv.prv_cencos AND mir.prv_fecvig=prv.prv_fecvig " & _
                "AND mir.mir_codreg=b.reg_codigo AND mir.mir_codser=c.ser_codigo AND mir.mir_rutcli=a.cli_codigo AND mir.mir_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                "GROUP BY mir.mir_codreg, b.reg_nombre, mir.mir_codser, c.ser_nombre ORDER BY mir.mir_codreg, mir.mir_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Else
       RS1.Open "SELECT mir.mir_rutcli, mir.mir_codreg, b.reg_nombre, mir.mir_codser, " & _
                "c.ser_nombre, a.cli_nombre, prv.prv_preven, SUM(mir.mir_nrorac) AS nrorac FROM " & nArch & " mir, b_preciovta prv, b_clientes a, a_regimen b, a_servicio c " & _
                "WHERE mir.mir_rutcli=prv.prv_rutcli AND mir.mir_codser=prv.prv_codser AND mir.mir_codreg=prv.prv_codreg AND mir.mir_cencos=prv.prv_cencos AND mir.prv_fecvig=prv.prv_fecvig " & _
                "AND mir.mir_codreg=b.reg_codigo AND mir.mir_codser=c.ser_codigo AND mir.mir_rutcli=a.cli_codigo AND mir.mir_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                "GROUP BY mir.mir_rutcli, mir.mir_codreg, b.reg_nombre, mir.mir_codser, c.ser_nombre, a.cli_nombre, prv.prv_preven ORDER BY mir.mir_codreg, mir.mir_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    End If
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!mir_codreg <> auxreg Then
             Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
             Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!reg_nombre)
             Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = ""
             Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = ""
             Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = ""
             Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "numero raciones"
             Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
             auxreg = RS1!mir_codreg
          End If
          Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(Mid(RS1!ser_nombre, 1, IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, 30, 20))) & IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, "", " (" & Trim(Mid(RS1!cli_nombre, 1, 15)) & ")")
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, Format(RS1!nrorac, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(RS1!nrorac, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, "", Format(RS1!prv_preven, fg_Pict(6, 2)))
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, Format(RS1!nrorac, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(Round(RS1!nrorac * RS1!prv_preven, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)))
          Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "numero raciones"
          If auxser <> RS1!mir_codser Then
             Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 10: Preview.vaSpread1.text = CalcularCostoMinuta(RS1!mir_codreg, RS1!mir_codser, fecini, fecfin, "'1'")
             tgrteo = tgrteo + CalcularCostoMinuta(RS1!mir_codreg, RS1!mir_codser, fecini, fecfin, "'1'")
             auxser = RS1!mir_codser
          End If
          Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
          tgrval = IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, Round((tgrval + RS1!nrorac), vg_DPr), Round(tgrval + (RS1!nrorac * RS1!prv_preven), vg_DPr))
          totval = IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, Round((totval + RS1!nrorac), vg_DPr), Round(totval + (RS1!nrorac * RS1!prv_preven), vg_DPr))
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin traer numero raciones & costo x clientes
    
    '-------> Consulta existe inventario inicial
    Dim indinv As Boolean, fectom As Long, iniali As Double, inides As Double
    indinv = False: fectom = 0: iniali = 0: inides = 0
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " VAL(MID(tin_fectom,1,6)) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),tin_fectom),1,6)) ")
    RS1.Open "SELECT MAX(tin_fectom) AS fectom FROM b_tomainv WHERE tin_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND " & sql1 & "=" & Val(Format(BoM(Mid(fecfin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 1, 4)), "yyyymm")) & " AND tin_ciemes<>0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF And Not IsNull(RS1!fectom) Then fectom = RS1!fectom: indinv = True
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    If indinv = False Then
       RS1.Open "SELECT MAX(tin_fectom) AS fectom FROM b_tomainv WHERE tin_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND " & sql1 & "=" & Val(Format(BoM(Mid(fecini, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)), "yyyymm")) & " AND tin_ciemes<>0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS1.EOF And Not IsNull(RS1!fectom) Then fectom = RS1!fectom: indinv = True
       RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    End If
    If indinv = True And fectom > 0 Then
       'RS1.Open "SELECT a.pro_ctacon, ROUND(SUM(b.tin_stofis*b.tin_propon),0) AS cosinv FROM b_productos a, b_tomainv b " & _
       '         "WHERE b.tin_codpro=a.pro_codigo AND (a.pro_ctacon not in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') or a.pro_ctacon not in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
       '         "AND b.tin_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND b.tin_fectom=" & fectom & " AND b.tin_stofis<>0 AND b.tin_propon<>0 GROUP BY a.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       
'                "AND   b.ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(Mid(fecfin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 1, 4)) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _

       RS1.Open "SELECT a.pro_ctacon, SUM(round(b.ppd_saldo, " & vg_DCa & ")*b.ppd_propon) as cosinv " & _
                "FROM b_productos a, b_productospmpdia b " & _
                "WHERE a.pro_codigo = b.ppd_codpro " & _
                "AND   b.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                "AND   b.ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(Mid(fecini, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                "AND  b.ppd_propon <> 0 AND b.ppd_saldo <> 0 " & _
                "GROUP BY a.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS1.EOF Then
          Do While Not RS1.EOF
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                iniali = Round(iniali + RS1!cosinv, vg_DPr)
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                inides = Round(inides + RS1!cosinv, vg_DPr)
             End If
             RS1.MoveNext
          Loop
       End If
       RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    End If
    '-------> Fin consulta existe inventario inicial
        
    '-------> Traer compras centralizadas & fofi & No Estoqueable
    Dim cosalc As Double, cosdec As Double, cosalf As Double, cosdef As Double, cosans As Double, cosdns As Double, auxcos As Double, tipdoc As String
    cosalc = 0: cosdec = 0: cosalf = 0: cosdef = 0: cosans = 0: cosdns = 0: auxcos = 0: tipdoc = ""
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " ROUND(SUM((c.dec_ptotrec) - (IIf(c.dec_pctdes <> 0, (c.dec_ptotrec) * (c.dec_pctdes / 100), 0))),0) AS cosdif ", " ROUND(SUM((c.dec_ptotrec) - (CASE WHEN c.dec_pctdes <> 0 THEN (c.dec_ptotrec) * (c.dec_pctdes / 100) ELSE 0 END)),0) AS cosdif ")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " TRIM(b.toc_docaso) ", " lTRIM(b.toc_docaso) ")
    
'             "AND   b.toc_fecemi>=" & sqlfini & " " & _
'             "AND   b.toc_fecemi<=" & sqlffin & " " & _

    RS1.Open "SELECT b.toc_tipinf, b.toc_tipdoc, a.pro_ctacon, a.pro_ctrsto, c.dec_mueinv, ROUND(SUM(c.dec_ptotal),0) AS ptotal, " & _
             "" & sql1 & ", " & _
             "SUM(c.dec_prefle) AS prefle FROM  b_productos a, b_totcompras b, b_detcompras c " & _
             "WHERE b.toc_rutpro=c.dec_rutpro " & _
             "AND   b.toc_tipdoc=c.dec_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   b.toc_numdoc=c.dec_numdoc " & _
             "AND   c.dec_codmer=a.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND  (a.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') OR a.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND ((b.toc_tipdoc IN ('FA', 'FE', 'ND', 'DE', 'SN', 'NC', 'CE') AND (b.toc_docaso IS NULL OR " & sql2 & "='')) OR b.toc_tipdoc NOT IN ('FA', 'FE', 'NC', 'CE', 'SN')) " & _
             "AND   b.toc_tipinf IN ('C','F','P') " & _
             "AND   b.toc_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND   b.toc_fecrem>=" & sqlfini & " " & _
             "AND   b.toc_fecrem<=" & sqlffin & " " & _
             "GROUP BY b.toc_tipinf, b.toc_tipdoc, a.pro_ctacon, a.pro_ctrsto, c.dec_mueinv ORDER BY b.toc_tipinf, a.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          auxcos = 0: auxcos = Round((IIf(RS1!ptotal <> RS1!cosdif, RS1!cosdif, RS1!ptotal) + RS1!prefle), vg_DPr)
          tipdoc = IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "FA" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "FE", "FA", IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "ND" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "DE", "ND", IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "NC" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "CE", "NC", "GD")))
          If RS1!toc_tipinf = "C" Or RS1!toc_tipinf = "P" Then
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                If RS1!pro_ctrsto = 1 Then
                   cosalc = Round(cosalc + IIf((tipdoc = "NC"), (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                Else
                   If (tipdoc <> "FA") And tipdoc <> "GD" And (tipdoc <> "ND") And (tipdoc <> "NC") Then
                      cosalf = Round((cosalf + auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   Else
                      cosans = Round(cosans + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   End If
                End If
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                If RS1!pro_ctrsto = 1 Then
                   cosdec = Round(cosdec + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                Else
                   If (tipdoc <> "FA") And tipdoc <> "GD" And (tipdoc <> "ND") And (tipdoc <> "NC") Then
                      cosdef = Round((cosdef + auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   Else
                      cosdns = Round(cosdns + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   End If
                End If
             End If
          ElseIf RS1!toc_tipinf = "F" Then
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                If RS1!pro_ctrsto = 1 Then
                   cosalf = Round(cosalf + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                Else
                   If (tipdoc <> "FA") And tipdoc <> "GD" And (tipdoc <> "ND") And (tipdoc <> "NC") Then
                      cosalf = Round((cosalf + auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   Else
                      cosans = Round(cosans + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   End If
                End If
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                If RS1!pro_ctrsto = 1 Then
                   cosdef = Round(cosdef + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                Else
                   If (tipdoc <> "FA") And tipdoc <> "GD" And (tipdoc <> "ND") And (tipdoc <> "NC") Then
                      cosdef = Round((cosdef + auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   Else
                      cosdns = Round(cosdns + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   End If
                End If
             End If
          End If
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    auxcos = 0: tipdoc = ""
    '-------> Buscar productos con impuesto recuperable
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " ROUND(SUM(((de.dec_ptotrec) - (IIf(de.dec_pctdes<>0, (de.dec_ptotrec) * (de.dec_pctdes/100), 0)))*(imd.imd_pctimp/100)),2) AS cosdif ", " ROUND(SUM(((de.dec_ptotrec) - ( CASE WHEN de.dec_pctdes<>0 THEN (de.dec_ptotrec) * (de.dec_pctdes/100) ELSE 0 END))*(imd.imd_pctimp/100)),2) AS cosdif ")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " trim(toc.toc_docaso) ", " ltrim(toc.toc_docaso) ")
    
'             "AND   toc.toc_fecemi>=" & sqlfini & " AND toc.toc_fecemi<=" & sqlffin & " " & _

    RS1.Open "SELECT toc.toc_tipinf, toc.toc_tipdoc, pro.pro_ctacon, pro.pro_ctrsto, de.dec_mueinv, ROUND(SUM(imd.imd_monimp),2) AS monimp, " & _
             "" & sql1 & " " & _
             "FROM a_impuesto im, b_productos pro, b_totcompras toc, b_detcompras de, b_detcomprasimp imd " & _
             "WHERE toc.toc_rutpro=de.dec_rutpro " & _
             "AND   toc.toc_tipdoc=de.dec_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   toc.toc_numdoc=de.dec_numdoc " & _
             "AND   de.dec_rutpro=imd.imd_rutdoc " & _
             "AND   de.dec_tipdoc=imd.imd_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   de.dec_numdoc=imd.imd_numdoc " & _
             "AND   de.dec_numlin=imd.imd_numlin " & _
             "AND   imd.imd_codpro=pro.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   imd.imd_codimp=im.imp_codigo " & _
             "AND   im.imp_inccos=1 " & _
             "AND  (pro.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "')  OR pro.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND ((toc.toc_tipdoc IN ('FA', 'FE', 'ND', 'DE', 'SN', 'NC', 'CE') AND (toc.toc_docaso IS NULL OR " & sql2 & "='')) OR toc.toc_tipdoc NOT IN ('FA', 'FE', 'NC', 'CE', 'SN')) " & _
             "AND  toc.toc_tipinf IN ('C','F','P') AND toc.toc_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND   toc.toc_fecrem>=" & sqlfini & " AND toc.toc_fecrem<=" & sqlffin & " " & _
             "GROUP BY toc.toc_tipinf, toc.toc_tipdoc, pro.pro_ctacon, pro.pro_ctrsto, de.dec_mueinv ORDER BY toc.toc_tipinf, pro.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          auxcos = Round(IIf(RS1!monimp <> RS1!cosdif, RS1!cosdif, RS1!monimp), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
          tipdoc = IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "FA" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "FE", "FA", IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "ND" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "DE", "ND", IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "NC" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "CE", "NC", "GD")))
          If RS1!toc_tipinf = "C" Or RS1!toc_tipinf = "P" Then
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                If RS1!pro_ctrsto = 1 Then
                   cosalc = Round(cosalc + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                Else
                   If (tipdoc <> "FA") And tipdoc <> "GD" And (tipdoc <> "ND") And (tipdoc <> "NC") Then
                      cosalf = Round((cosalf + auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   Else
                      cosans = Round(cosans + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   End If
                End If
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                If RS1!pro_ctrsto = 1 Then
                   cosdec = Round(cosdec + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                Else
                   If (tipdoc <> "FA") And tipdoc <> "GD" And (tipdoc <> "ND") And (tipdoc <> "NC") Then
                      cosdef = Round((cosdef + auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   Else
                      cosdns = Round(cosdns + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   End If
                End If
             End If
          ElseIf RS1!toc_tipinf = "F" Then
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                If RS1!pro_ctrsto = 1 Then
                   cosalf = Round(cosalf + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                Else
                   If (tipdoc <> "FA") And tipdoc <> "GD" And (tipdoc <> "ND") And (tipdoc <> "NC") Then
                      cosalf = Round((cosalf + auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   Else
                      cosans = Round(cosans + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   End If
                End If
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                If RS1!pro_ctrsto = 1 Then
                   cosdef = Round(cosdef + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                Else
                   If (tipdoc <> "FA") And tipdoc <> "GD" And (tipdoc <> "ND") And (tipdoc <> "NC") Then
                      cosdef = Round((cosdef + auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   Else
                      cosdns = Round(cosdns + IIf(tipdoc = "NC", (auxcos * -1), auxcos), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
                   End If
                End If
             End If
          End If
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin traer compras centralizadas & fofi & No Estoqueable
    
    '-------> Transferencia recibidas & entragadas alimento & desechable
    Dim crecal As Double, crecde As Double, cemtal As Double, cemtde As Double
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon, ROUND(SUM(b.dev_canmer*b.dev_precos),0) AS cosmer " & _
             "FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c WHERE a.tov_rutcli=b.dev_rutcli AND a.tov_tipdoc=b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND  a.tov_numdoc=b.dev_numdoc AND b.dev_codmer=c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND (c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') OR c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND  a.tov_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND a.tov_tipdoc='TR' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'A' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'P' AND a.tov_fecemi>=" & sqlfini & " AND a.tov_fecemi<=" & sqlffin & " " & _
             "AND  b.dev_mueinv='S' " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon ORDER BY a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!tov_codser = 1 Then
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                crecal = Round(crecal + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                crecde = Round(crecde + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             End If
          Else
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                cemtal = Round(cemtal + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                cemtde = Round(cemtde + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             End If
          End If
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin transferencia recibidas & entregadas alimento & desechable
    
    '-------> Transferencia productos terminados
    Dim crenal As Double, cennde As Double
    crenal = 0: cennde = 0
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon, ROUND(SUM(b.dev_canmer*b.dev_precos),0) AS cosmer " & _
             "FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c WHERE a.tov_rutcli=b.dev_rutcli AND a.tov_tipdoc=b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND  a.tov_numdoc=b.dev_numdoc AND b.dev_codmer=c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND (c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') OR c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND  a.tov_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND a.tov_tipdoc='TR' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'A' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'P' AND a.tov_fecemi>=" & sqlfini & " " & _
             "AND  a.tov_fecemi<=" & sqlffin & " " & _
             "AND  b.dev_mueinv='N' " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon ORDER BY a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!tov_codser = 1 Then
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                crenal = Round(crenal + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                cennde = Round(cennde + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             End If
          Else
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                crenal = Round(crenal - RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                cennde = Round(cennde - RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             End If
          End If
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin transferencia productos terminados
    
    '-------> Traer mermas
    Dim cmeali As Double, cmedes As Double
    cmeali = 0: cmedes = 0
    RS1.Open "SELECT c.pro_ctacon, SUM(b.dev_canmer*b.dev_precos) AS cosmer FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c " & _
             "WHERE a.tov_rutcli=b.dev_rutcli AND a.tov_tipdoc=b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_numdoc=b.dev_numdoc AND b.dev_codmer=c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND  (c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') OR c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND   a.tov_tipdoc='ME' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'A' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'P' AND a.tov_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecemi>=" & sqlfini & " AND a.tov_fecemi<=" & sqlffin & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon ORDER BY a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
             cmeali = Round(cmeali + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr)
          ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
             cmedes = Round(cmedes + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr)
          End If
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin traer mermas
    
    '-------> Traer salida & devolución producción
    Dim tosali As Double, tosdes As Double, todali As Double, toddes As Double
    tosali = 0: tosdes = 0: todali = 0: toddes = 0
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_tipdoc, c.pro_ctacon, SUM(b.dev_ptotal) AS ptotal FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c " & _
             "WHERE a.tov_rutcli=b.dev_rutcli AND a.tov_tipdoc=b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_numdoc=b.dev_numdoc AND b.dev_codmer=c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND  (c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') OR c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND  (a.tov_tipdoc='SP' OR a.tov_tipdoc='DP') AND b.dev_canmer<>0 AND a.tov_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND a.tov_estdoc<>'A' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'P' " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro>=" & sqlfini & " AND a.tov_fecpro<=" & sqlffin & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_tipdoc, c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!tov_tipdoc = "SP" And RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
             tosali = Round(tosali + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          ElseIf RS1!tov_tipdoc = "SP" And RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
             tosdes = Round(tosdes + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          ElseIf RS1!tov_tipdoc = "DP" And RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
             todali = Round(todali + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          ElseIf RS1!tov_tipdoc = "DP" And RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
             toddes = Round(toddes + RS1!ptotal, vg_DPr)
          End If
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Incremento por rebaje de Venta Cafetería
    RS1.Open "SELECT c.pro_ctacon, ROUND(SUM(a.dvp_precos*a.dvp_candig),0) AS ptotal FROM b_detventascafpro a, b_totventascaf b, b_productos c " & _
             "WHERE b.tvc_cencos=a.dvp_cencos AND b.tvc_fecing=a.dvp_fecing " & _
             "AND   a.dvp_codmer=c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND  (c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') OR c.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND   a.dvp_precos<>0 AND b.tvc_estado='C' AND b.tvc_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND   b.tvc_fecing>=" & sqlfini & " AND b.tvc_fecing<=" & sqlffin & " " & _
             "GROUP BY c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
          tosali = Round(tosali + TipoDato(RS1!ptotal, 0), vg_DPr)
       ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
          tosdes = Round(tosdes + TipoDato(RS1!ptotal, 0), vg_DPr)
       End If
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Traer Ajuste Inventario
    Dim fecstf As Long, infali As Double, infdes As Double, ajuali As Double, ajudes As Double
    fecstf = 0: indinv = False: infali = 0: infdes = 0: ajuali = 0: ajudes = 0
    fecstf = 0: indinv = False: infali = 0: infdes = 0: ajuali = 0: ajudes = 0: ajuali1 = 0: ajuali2 = 0
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
        sql1 = "tov.tov_fecemi >= CDate('" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "dd/MM/yyyy") & "') AND tov.tov_fecemi <= CDate('" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "dd/MM/yyyy") & "')"
    Else
        sql1 = "tov.tov_fecemi >= convert(datetime, '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "dd/MM/yyyy") & "', 103) AND tov.tov_fecemi <= convert(datetime, '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "dd/MM/yyyy") & "', 103)"
    End If
    RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT pro.pro_ctacon, aju.aju_tipo, SUM(dev.dev_precos*dev.dev_canmer) AS cosinv " & _
             "FROM  b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro, a_tipoajuste aju " & _
             "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli=dev.dev_rutcli " & _
             "AND   tov.tov_tipdoc=dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   tov.tov_numdoc=dev.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND   pro.pro_codigo=dev.dev_codmer " & _
             "AND   tov.tov_codser=aju.aju_codigo " & _
             "AND   " & sql1 & " " & _
             "AND   tov.tov_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND tov.tov_tipdoc='AI' " & _
             "AND   tov.tov_estdoc<>'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc<>'P' " & _
             "AND   dev.dev_canmer>0 " & _
             "AND   (pro.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') OR pro.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "GROUP BY pro.pro_ctacon, aju.aju_tipo ORDER BY pro.pro_ctacon, aju.aju_tipo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Do While Not RS2.EOF
        If RS2!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
            If RS2!aju_tipo = "A" Then
                ajuali = (ajuali + RS2!cosinv)
            ElseIf RS2!aju_tipo = "D" Then
                ajuali = (ajuali - RS2!cosinv)
            End If
        ElseIf RS2!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
            If RS2!aju_tipo = "A" Then
                ajudes = (ajudes + RS2!cosinv)
            ElseIf RS2!aju_tipo = "D" Then
                ajudes = (ajudes - RS2!cosinv)
            End If
        End If
        RS2.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin traer Ajuste Inventario
    
    '-------> Inventario Final
    '-------> Fin inventario final
        
    '-------> Toma inventario
    Dim tomali As Double, tomdes As Double, tomtot As Double, fectof As Long, indtom As Boolean
    tomali = 0: tomdes = 0: tomtot = 0: fectof = 0: indtom = False
    'RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT tin_fectom FROM b_tomainv WHERE tin_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND tin_fectom>=" & fecfin & " AND tin_fectom<=" & fecfin & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT ppd_fecdia FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia >= " & fecfin & " AND ppd_fecdia <= " & fecfin & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    If Not RS1.EOF And Not IsNull(RS1!ppd_fecdia) Then fectof = RS1!ppd_fecdia: indtom = True
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    If fectof > 0 And fectof = fecfin Then
       'RS1.Open "SELECT a.pro_ctacon, SUM(b.tin_stofis*b.tin_propon) AS cosinv FROM b_productos a, b_tomainv b " & _
       '         "WHERE b.tin_codpro=a.pro_codigo AND (a.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') OR a.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
       '         "AND b.tin_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND b.tin_fectom=" & fectof & " AND b.tin_stofis<>0 " & _
       '         "AND b.tin_propon<>0 GROUP BY a.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       RS1.Open "SELECT a.pro_ctacon, SUM(round(b.ppd_saldo, " & vg_DCa & ")*b.ppd_propon) as cosinv " & _
                "FROM b_productos a, b_productospmpdia b " & _
                "WHERE a.pro_codigo = b.ppd_codpro " & _
                "AND   b.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                "AND   b.ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(Mid(fecfin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 1, 4)), "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                "AND  b.ppd_propon <> 0 AND round(b.ppd_saldo, " & vg_DCa & ") <> 0 " & _
                "GROUP BY a.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS1.EOF Then
          Do While Not RS1.EOF
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                tomali = RS1!cosinv
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                tomdes = RS1!cosinv
             End If
             RS1.MoveNext
          Loop
       End If
       RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    End If
    infali = Round(tomali, vg_DPr): infdes = Round(tomdes, vg_DPr)
    '-------> Fin toma inventario
    
    '-------> Calcular costo insumos
    Dim tcoali As Double, tcodes As Double
    tcoali = 0: tcodes = 0
    '-------> Fin calcular costo insumos

    .MarginLeft = "11.1cm"
    yy = .CurrentY: .CurrentX = X: .CurrentY = y: R = 3
    '-------> Traer gastos generales compras centralizadas & fofi
    Dim vecgas() As Variant, ctogas As Double, ggepro As Double, paso As Long, est As Boolean, auxcos1 As Double
    ctogas = 0: paso = 0: auxcos1 = 0
    RS1.Open "SELECT COUNT(cta_codigo) AS nreg FROM a_ctacontable WHERE cta_codigo NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') AND cta_codigo NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "')", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF And RS1!nreg <> 0 Then ReDim Preserve vecgas(RS1!nreg, 4) Else ReDim Preserve vecgas(1, 4)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " SUM((c.dec_ptotrec) - (IIf(c.dec_pctdes <> 0, (c.dec_ptotrec) * (c.dec_pctdes / 100), 0))) AS cosdif ", " SUM((c.dec_ptotrec) - (CASE WHEN c.dec_pctdes <> 0 THEN (c.dec_ptotrec) * (c.dec_pctdes / 100) ELSE  0 END )) AS cosdif ")

'             "AND  (b.toc_tipinf='C' OR b.toc_tipinf='F') AND b.toc_fecemi>=" & sqlfini & " " & _
'             "AND  b.toc_fecemi<=" & sqlffin & " AND b.toc_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " GROUP BY a.pro_ctacon, b.toc_tipdoc ORDER BY a.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic

    RS1.Open "SELECT a.pro_ctacon, b.toc_tipdoc, SUM(c.dec_ptotal) AS ptotal, " & sql1 & ", " & _
             "SUM(c.dec_prefle) AS prefle " & _
             "FROM  b_productos a, b_totcompras b, b_detcompras c WHERE b.toc_rutpro=c.dec_rutpro " & _
             "AND   b.toc_tipdoc=c.dec_tipdoc AND b.toc_numdoc=c.dec_numdoc " & _
             "AND   c.dec_codmer=a.pro_codigo AND (a.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') AND a.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND ((b.toc_tipdoc IN ('FA', 'FE', 'NC', 'CE', 'SN') AND (b.toc_docaso IS NULL OR b.toc_docaso='')) OR b.toc_tipdoc NOT IN ('FA', 'FE', 'NC', 'CE', 'SN')) " & _
             "AND  b.toc_tipinf IN ('C','F','P') AND b.toc_fecrem>=" & sqlfini & " " & _
             "AND  b.toc_fecrem<=" & sqlffin & " AND b.toc_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " GROUP BY a.pro_ctacon, b.toc_tipdoc ORDER BY a.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    j = 1
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          auxcos1 = 0: auxcos1 = Round(RS1!prefle + IIf(RS1!ptotal <> RS1!cosdif, RS1!cosdif, RS1!ptotal), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
          est = True
          For i = 1 To UBound(vecgas)
             If vecgas(i, 1) = RS1!pro_ctacon Then: vecgas(i, 3) = Round(vecgas(i, 3) + IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "NC" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "CE", (auxcos1 * -1), auxcos1)): est = False: Exit For
          Next i
          If est Then
             vecgas(j, 1) = RS1!pro_ctacon
             RS2.Open "SELECT cta_nombre FROM a_ctacontable WHERE cta_codigo='" & RS1!pro_ctacon & "'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then vecgas(j, 2) = RS2!cta_nombre
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
             vecgas(j, 3) = IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "NC" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "CE", (auxcos1 * -1), auxcos1)
             j = j + 1
          End If
          ctogas = Round(ctogas + IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "NC" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "CE", (auxcos1 * -1), auxcos1), vg_DPr)
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Rutina que trae numero de días del periodo, par ser prorroteo
    Dim diapro As Long
    diapro = TraerNumeroDiasPeriodo(cencos, fecper)
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_gastosa13 WHERE gas_codigo > 8 AND gas_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND gas_anomes = " & fecper & " ORDER BY gas_orden", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          est = True
          For i = 1 To UBound(vecgas)
              If vecgas(i, 1) = RS1!gas_ctacon Then
                 vecgas(i, 3) = Round(vecgas(i, 3) + CalcularProrroteoGrlPerDep(diapro, IIf(IsNull(RS1!gas_valor), 0, RS1!gas_valor), fecini, fecfin))
                 vecgas(i, 4) = Round(vecgas(i, 4) + CalcularProrroteoGrlPerDep(diapro, IIf(IsNull(RS1!gas_valpro), 0, RS1!gas_valpro), fecini, fecfin))
                 est = False
                 Exit For
              End If
          Next i
          If est Then
             vecgas(j, 1) = RS1!gas_ctacon
             RS2.Open "SELECT cta_nombre FROM a_ctacontable WHERE cta_codigo='" & RS1!gas_ctacon & "'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then vecgas(j, 2) = RS2!cta_nombre
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
             vecgas(j, 3) = CalcularProrroteoGrlPerDep(diapro, IIf(IsNull(RS1!gas_valor), 0, RS1!gas_valor), fecini, fecfin)
             vecgas(j, 4) = CalcularProrroteoGrlPerDep(diapro, IIf(IsNull(RS1!gas_valpro), 0, RS1!gas_valpro), fecini, fecfin)
             j = j + 1
          End If
          ctogas = Round(ctogas + CalcularProrroteoGrlPerDep(diapro, RS1!gas_valor, fecini, fecfin), vg_DPr)
          ggepro = Round(ggepro + CalcularProrroteoGrlPerDep(diapro, IIf(IsNull(RS1!gas_valpro), 0, RS1!gas_valpro), fecini, fecfin), vg_DPr)
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Buscar productos con impuesto recuperable
    auxcos1 = 0
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " SUM(((d.dec_ptotrec) - (IIf(d.dec_pctdes <> 0, (d.dec_ptotrec) * (d.dec_pctdes / 100), 2)))*(e.imd_pctimp/100)) AS cosdif ", " SUM(((d.dec_ptotrec) - (CASE WHEN d.dec_pctdes <> 0 THEN  (d.dec_ptotrec) * (d.dec_pctdes / 100) ELSE 2 END))*(e.imd_pctimp/100)) AS cosdif ")
    
'             "AND   c.toc_fecemi>=" & sqlfini & " AND c.toc_fecemi<=" & sqlffin & " " & _

    RS1.Open "SELECT b.pro_ctacon, c.toc_tipdoc, SUM(e.imd_monimp) AS monimp, " & sql1 & " " & _
             "FROM  a_impuesto a, b_productos b, b_totcompras c, b_detcompras d, b_detcomprasimp e WHERE c.toc_rutpro=d.dec_rutpro AND c.toc_tipdoc=d.dec_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   c.toc_numdoc=d.dec_numdoc AND d.dec_rutpro=e.imd_rutdoc " & _
             "AND   d.dec_tipdoc=e.imd_tipdoc AND d.dec_numdoc=e.imd_numdoc " & _
             "AND   d.dec_numlin=e.imd_numlin AND e.imd_codpro=b.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   e.imd_codimp=a.imp_codigo AND a.imp_inccos=1 " & _
             "AND  (b.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') AND b.pro_ctacon NOT IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND ((c.toc_tipdoc IN ('FA', 'FE', 'NC', 'CE', 'SN') AND c.toc_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND (c.toc_docaso IS NULL OR c.toc_docaso='')) OR c.toc_tipdoc NOT IN ('FA', 'FE', 'NC', 'CE', 'SN')) " & _
             "AND   c.toc_fecrem>=" & sqlfini & " AND c.toc_fecrem<=" & sqlffin & " " & _
             "GROUP BY c.toc_tipinf, b.pro_ctacon, c.toc_tipdoc ORDER BY b.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          auxcos1 = 0: auxcos1 = Round(IIf(RS1!monimp <> RS1!cosdif, RS1!cosdif, RS1!monimp), vg_DPr)
          For i = 1 To UBound(vecgas)
              If vecgas(i, 1) = RS1!pro_ctacon Then vecgas(i, 3) = Round(vecgas(i, 3) + IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "NC" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "CE", (auxcos1 * -1), auxcos1), vg_DPr): Exit For
          Next i
          ctogas = Round(ctogas + IIf(RS1!toc_tipdoc = "NC" Or RS1!toc_tipdoc = "CE", (auxcos1 * -1), auxcos1), vg_DPr)
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    '-------> Transferencia recibidas & entragadas gastos generales
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon, SUM(b.dev_canmer*b.dev_precos) AS cosmer " & _
             "FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c WHERE a.tov_rutcli=b.dev_rutcli AND a.tov_tipdoc=b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND  a.tov_numdoc=b.dev_numdoc AND b.dev_codmer=c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND (c.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos"), ";", "','") & "') OR c.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctagastos2"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND  a.tov_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND a.tov_tipdoc='TR' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'A' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'P' AND a.tov_fecemi>=" & sqlfini & " AND a.tov_fecemi<=" & sqlffin & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon ORDER BY a.tov_codser, c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          est = True
          For i = 1 To UBound(vecgas)
              If vecgas(i, 1) = RS1!pro_ctacon Then vecgas(i, 3) = IIf(RS1!tov_codser = 1, Round(vecgas(i, 3) + RS1!cosmer), Round(vecgas(i, 3) - RS1!cosmer)): est = False: Exit For
          Next i
          If est Then
             vecgas(j, 1) = RS1!pro_ctacon
             RS2.Open "SELECT cta_nombre FROM a_ctacontable WHERE cta_codigo='" & RS1!pro_ctacon & "'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then vecgas(j, 2) = RS2!cta_nombre
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
             vecgas(j, 3) = IIf(RS1!tov_codser = 1, Round(vecgas(j, 3) + RS1!cosmer), Round(vecgas(j, 3) - RS1!cosmer))
             j = j + 1
          End If
          ctogas = IIf(RS1!tov_codser = 1, Round(ctogas + RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr), Round(ctogas - RS1!cosmer, vg_DPr))
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin transferencia recibidas & entregadas gastos generales
    
    
        
    '------- Transferencia recibidas & entragadas alimento & desechable No Estoqueable
    I_RA13BColombia cencos, fecper, fecini, fecfin, tgrval, cmeali, cmedes, tosali, tosdes, ajuali, ajudes, todali, toddes, infali, infdes, cosans, cosdns, X, y, opppto, opproy, nArch, crenal, cennde, opcosban, ctogas, iniali, inides, cosalc, cosalf, cosdec, cosdef, crecal, crecde, cemtal, cemtde, totven, totcaf, tomali, tomdes, vecgas, tgrteo, ggepro, diapro
    .EndDoc
End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_A13Colombia:
    fg_descarga
    Close #1
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    'Resume Next
    'Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_IngredientesProductos()
Dim i As Long, X As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, codigo As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_Productos
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Ingredientes & Productos"
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .Zoom = 110
    .StartDoc
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 7
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 12: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Ingredientes & Productos"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .TextAlign = taCenterTop
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 4500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = talefttTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1050: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1050: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Nombre Ingrediente"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "U.Medida"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Còdigo"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Nombre Producto"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "U.Stock"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "F.Conv. Prod."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "F.Conv.Ingr."
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & _
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8)
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 4500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1050: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1050: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    X = 1
    For i = 1 To I_Produc.vaSpread1.MaxRows
        I_Produc.vaSpread1.Row = i: I_Produc.vaSpread1.Col = 1
        If I_Produc.vaSpread1.text = "1" Then
            I_Produc.vaSpread1.Col = 2: codigo = I_Produc.vaSpread1.text
            RS1.Open "SELECT ing.ing_codigo, ing.ing_nombre, unm.unm_nomcor, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, " & _
                     "uni.uni_nomcor, pro.pro_facsto, pro.pro_facing " & _
                     "FROM a_unidadmed unm, a_unidad uni, b_productos pro, b_ingrediente ing, b_productosing pri " & _
                     "WHERE pro.pro_codigo=pri.pri_codpro " & _
                     "AND   ing.ing_codigo=pri.pri_coding " & _
                     "AND   ing.ing_unimed=unm.unm_codigo " & _
                     "AND   pro.pro_coduni=uni.uni_codigo " & _
                     "AND   pro.pro_codigo='" & codigo & "' ORDER BY ing.ing_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
            If Not RS1.EOF Then
                Do While Not RS1.EOF
                    .TableCell(tcText, X, 1) = RS1!ing_codigo
                    .TableCell(tcText, X, 2) = RS1!ing_nombre
                    .TableCell(tcText, X, 3) = RS1!unm_nomcor
                    .TableCell(tcText, X, 4) = RS1!pro_codigo
                    .TableCell(tcText, X, 5) = RS1!pro_nombre
                    .TableCell(tcText, X, 6) = RS1!uni_nomcor
                    .TableCell(tcText, X, 7) = Format(RS1!pro_facsto, fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
                    .TableCell(tcText, X, 8) = Format(RS1!pro_facing, fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
                    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, X, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, X, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, X, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, X, 4) & "|" & _
                              .TableCell(tcText, X, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, X, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, X, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, X, 8)
                    RS1.MoveNext: X = X + 1
                Loop
            Else
                X = X + 1
            End If
            RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
        End If
    Next i
    .TableCell(tcRows) = X - 1
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Close #1
Exit Function
Error_Productos:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_CartolaInventario(cencos As String, codbod As Long, nombod As String, fecinv As Long)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
Dim ctacon As String, totali As Double, totdes As Double, cosinv As Double, totgrl As Double, taliaju As Double, tdesaju As Double, fecini As Long
Dim tototr As Double, totraju As Double
On Local Error GoTo Error_CartolaInv
fg_carga ""
mgstitulo = "Cartola Inventario"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
     vg_reporte = dir_trabajo_Inf & "CARTOLA INVENTARIO" & cencos & Format(Date, "yyyymm") & ".rtf"
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 9
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = fg_ponepiepagina & "  Vº Jefe Contrato|VºBº Gerencia Operaciones|VºBº Contabilidad"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
'    .Footer = "||Página : %d"
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Cartola Inventario"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 5500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Fecha"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Bodega"
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Trim(RS1!cli_nombre) & " (" & Trim(RS1!cli_codigo) & ")"
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Mid(fecinv, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecinv, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecinv, 1, 4)
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = nombod
    '-------> Traer documento sap de tabla tabla log_porcesos
'    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT mensaje FROM b_tomainv a, log_procesos b, sap_inv c " & _
'             "WHERE a.tin_fectom = val(b.num_documento) " & _
'             "AND   a.tin_fectom = val(mid(c.inv_feccon,5,4) & mid(c.inv_feccon,3,2) & mid(c.inv_feccon,1,2)) " & _
'             "AND   b.envio = c.inv_codigo " & _
'             "AND   b.cencos = c.inv_refere " & _
'             "AND   b.cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND b.tipo_proceso = '2' AND   b.estado = '1' " & _
'             "AND   a.tin_envsap = '1' AND tin_fectom = " & fecinv & " AND tin_codbod = " & codbod & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT mensaje FROM b_tomainv a, log_procesos b " & _
                "WHERE a.tin_fectom = val(b.num_documento) " & _
                "AND   b.cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND b.tipo_proceso = '2' AND b.estado = '1' " & _
                "AND   a.tin_envsap = '1' AND a.tin_fectom = " & fecinv & " AND a.tin_codbod = " & codbod & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Else
       RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT ISNULL(mensaje,'') AS mensaje FROM b_tomainv a, log_procesos b " & _
                "WHERE a.tin_fectom = convert(int,b.num_documento) " & _
                "AND   b.cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND b.tipo_proceso = '2' AND b.estado = '1' " & _
                "AND   a.tin_envsap = '1' AND a.tin_fectom = " & fecinv & " AND a.tin_codbod = " & codbod & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    End If
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       If RS1!mensaje <> "" Then
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 3) = True
          .TableCell(tcText, 3, 3) = "Documento SAP : " & Mid(RS1!mensaje, InStr(RS1!mensaje, "SAP") + 3, (Len(RS1!mensaje) - 8 - InStr(RS1!mensaje, "SAP") + 3))
       End If
    End If
    'Trim (Mid(RS1!mensaje, 1, Len(RS1!mensaje) - 3))
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
'    "Documento SAP : " &
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    fecini = 0
    '-------> Traer fecha inicial
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_cierreperiodo WHERE cie_cencos='" & cencos & "' AND cie_periodo=" & Mid(fecinv, 1, 6) & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then fecini = RS1!cie_fecini
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    If fecini = 0 Then fg_descarga: Close #1: MsgBox "No existe información...", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo: Exit Function
    '-------> Traer Ajuste Inventario
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.tip_previo, pro.pro_ctacon, SUM(dev.dev_precos*iif(aju.aju_tipo='A',(dev.dev_canmer),(dev.dev_canmer*-1))) AS cosinv " & _
                "FROM  b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro, a_tipoajuste aju, a_tipopro a " & _
                "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc " & _
                "AND   pro.pro_codigo = dev.dev_codmer " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_codser = aju.aju_codigo " & _
                "AND   pro.pro_codtip = a.tip_codigo " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_fecemi >= cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_fecemi <= cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecinv) & "') " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_codbod = " & codbod & " AND tov.tov_tipdoc='AI' " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc<>'P' " & _
                "AND   dev.dev_canmer > 0 AND (pro.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') or pro.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
                "GROUP BY a.tip_previo, pro.pro_ctacon ORDER BY pro.pro_ctacon, a.tip_previo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Else
       RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.tip_previo, pro.pro_ctacon, SUM(dev.dev_precos* CASE WHEN aju.aju_tipo='A' THEN (dev.dev_canmer) ELSE (dev.dev_canmer*-1) END) AS cosinv " & _
                "FROM  b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro, a_tipoajuste aju, a_tipopro a " & _
                "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc " & _
                "AND   pro.pro_codigo = dev.dev_codmer " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_codser = aju.aju_codigo " & _
                "AND   pro.pro_codtip = a.tip_codigo " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_fecemi >= '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_fecemi <= '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecinv), "yyyymmdd") & "' " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_codbod = " & codbod & " AND tov.tov_tipdoc = 'AI' " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc<>'P' " & _
                "AND   dev.dev_canmer > 0 AND (pro.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') or pro.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
                "GROUP BY a.tip_previo, pro.pro_ctacon ORDER BY pro.pro_ctacon, a.tip_previo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    End If
    '-------> Traer resumen toma inventario
    RS1.Open "SELECT SUM(d.tin_propon*d.tin_stofis) AS tin_propon " & _
             "FROM  a_tipopro a, a_ctacontable b, b_productos c, b_tomainv d " & _
             "WHERE d.tin_codpro = c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.pro_codtip = a.tip_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.pro_ctacon = b.cta_codigo " & _
             "AND  (c.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') or c.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND   d.tin_fectom = " & fecinv & " " & _
             "AND  (d.tin_codbod = " & codbod & " OR " & codbod & " = 0) " & _
             "AND   d.tin_stofis > 0 " & _
             "AND   d.tin_propon > 0 " & _
             "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    totgrl = 0: taliaju = 0: tdesaju = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       totgrl = totgrl + IIf(IsNull(RS1!tin_propon), 0, RS1!tin_propon)
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Traer detalle toma inventario
    RS1.Open "SELECT c.pro_ctacon, b.cta_nombre, a.tip_previo, SUM(d.tin_propon*d.tin_stofis) AS tin_propon " & _
             "FROM  a_tipopro a, a_ctacontable b, b_productos c, b_tomainv d " & _
             "WHERE d.tin_codpro = c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.pro_codtip = a.tip_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.pro_ctacon = b.cta_codigo " & _
             "AND  (c.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') or c.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "')) " & _
             "AND   d.tin_fectom = " & fecinv & " " & _
             "AND  (d.tin_codbod = " & codbod & " OR " & codbod & " = 0) " & _
             " " & _
             "AND   d.tin_propon>0 " & _
             "GROUP BY c.pro_ctacon, b.cta_nombre, a.tip_previo ORDER BY c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Num."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Denominación del Grupo"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Monto"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Ajuste"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "%"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5)
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    j = 1: i = 1: ctacon = "": totali = 0: totdes = 0: tototr = 0: totraju = 0
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
           If RS1!pro_ctacon <> ctacon Then
              If totali > 0 Or totdes > 0 Or tototr > 0 Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total Cuenta ": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")), Format(totali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), IIf(ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")), Format(totdes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(tototr, fg_Pict(6, 0)))): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
                 If taliaju <> 0 Or tdesaju <> 0 Or totraju <> 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")), Format(taliaju, fg_Pict(6, 0)), IIf(ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")), Format(tdesaju, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(totraju, fg_Pict(6, 0)))): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
                 If taliaju <> 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((taliaju / totgrl) * 100, fg_Pict(3, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True
                 If tdesaju <> 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((tdesaju / totgrl) * 100, fg_Pict(3, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True
                 If totraju <> 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((totraju / totgrl) * 100, fg_Pict(3, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True
                 Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5)
                 i = i + 2
              End If
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!pro_ctacon: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!cta_nombre: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3)
              i = i + 1: ctacon = RS1!pro_ctacon
           End If
           '-------> Leer ajuste inventario
           cosinv = 0
           If Not RS3.EOF Then
              Do While Not RS3.EOF
                 If RS3!tip_previo = RS1!tip_previo Then cosinv = RS3!cosinv: Exit Do
                 RS3.MoveNext
              Loop
              RS3.MoveFirst
           End If
           RS2.Open "SELECT tip_nombre FROM a_tipopro WHERE tip_codigo = " & RS1!tip_previo & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = j
           If Not RS2.EOF Then
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!tip_nombre)
           Else
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Existe producto mal asignado familia de producto"
           End If
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(RS1!tin_propon, fg_Pict(6, 0))
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(cosinv <> 0, Format(cosinv, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
           If cosinv <> 0 And totgrl <> 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((cosinv / totgrl) * 100, fg_Pict(3, 2))
           RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
           Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5)
           If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
              totali = Round(totali + RS1!tin_propon)
              taliaju = Round(taliaju + cosinv)
           ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
              totdes = Round(totdes + RS1!tin_propon)
              tdesaju = Round(tdesaju + cosinv)
           Else
              tototr = Round(tototr + RS1!tin_propon)
              totraju = Round(totraju + cosinv)
           End If
           RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1: j = j + 1
        Loop
        If totali > 0 Or totdes > 0 Or tototr > 0 Then
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total Cuenta ": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")), Format(totali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), IIf(ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")), Format(totdes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(tototr, fg_Pict(6, 0)))): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
           If taliaju <> 0 Or tdesaju <> 0 Or totraju <> 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")), Format(taliaju, fg_Pict(6, 0)), IIf(ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")), Format(tdesaju, fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(totraju, fg_Pict(6, 0)))): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
           If taliaju <> 0 And ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((taliaju / totgrl) * 100, fg_Pict(3, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True
           If tdesaju <> 0 And ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((tdesaju / totgrl) * 100, fg_Pict(3, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True
           If totraju <> 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((totraju / totgrl) * 100, fg_Pict(3, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True
           Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5)
           i = i + 2
        End If
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total General Inventario": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(Round(totali + totdes), fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
        If taliaju <> 0 Or tdesaju <> 0 Or totraju <> 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(taliaju + tdesaju + totraju), fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
        If taliaju <> 0 And totgrl <> 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((taliaju + tdesaju + totraju) / totgrl) * 100), fg_Pict(3, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True
        Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5)
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable: Close #1
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_CartolaInv:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_ResSalDevBod(Form As Object)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, codsec As Long
Dim auxfec As Date, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String
Dim salbod As Double, devbod As Double, totbod As Double
On Local Error GoTo Error_ResSalDevBod
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Resumen Salida ó Dovolución a Bodega"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    LogoEmp
    .FontSize = 8
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Informe Resumen Salida ó Devolución a Bodega " & "(Mes : " & Meses("01/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(Form.fpDateTime1.text, 7), 1, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(Form.fpDateTime1.text, 7), 4, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(Form.fpDateTime1.text, 7), 4, 4) & ")"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = IIf(vg_tipser, "", "Regimen")
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = IIf(vg_tipser, "", "Servicio")
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Trim(Form.fpText.text) & " " & Trim(Form.fpayuda(0).Caption)
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = IIf(vg_tipser, "", Form.fpLongInteger1(0).Value & " " & Trim(Form.fpayuda(1).Caption))
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = IIf(vg_tipser, "", Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value & " " & Trim(Form.fpayuda(2).Caption))
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " IIF(ISNULL(b.dev_codsec),0,1) ", " CASE WHEN (b.dev_codsec) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(Mid(Form.fpDateTime1.text, 4, 4) & Mid(Form.fpDateTime1.text, 1, 2) & "01") & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(Mid(Form.fpDateTime1.text, 4, 4) & Mid(Form.fpDateTime1.text, 1, 2) & "01"), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(Format(dEoM("01/" & Form.fpDateTime1.text), "yyyymmdd")) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(Format(dEoM("01/" & Form.fpDateTime1.text), "yyyymmdd")), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_fecpro, a.tov_tipdoc, a.tov_numdoc, " & sql1 & " AS dev_codsec, SUM(b.dev_ptotal) AS ptotal " & _
             "FROM  b_totventas a, b_detventas b " & _
             "WHERE a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
             "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_rutcli = '" & Form.fpText.text & "' " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codreg = " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(0).Value) & " " & _
