             "AND   a.tov_codser = " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value) & " " & _
             "AND  (a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' OR a.tov_tipdoc='DP') AND a.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND   b.dev_canmer <> 0 " & _
             "AND   a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro >= " & sql2 & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro <= " & sql3 & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_fecpro, a.tov_tipdoc, a.tov_numdoc, " & sql1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 2400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Tipo"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Realizada"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Devolución"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Total"
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 2400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
    i = 1: auxfec = 0: salbod = 0: devbod = 0: totbod = 0
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!tov_fecpro <> auxfec Or codsec <> RS1!dev_codsec Then
             If auxfec > 0 Then
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(totbod, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                totbod = 0
                i = i + 1
             End If
             auxfec = RS1!tov_fecpro
             codsec = RS1!dev_codsec
          End If
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!tov_fecpro
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(RS1!dev_codsec > 0, "Sector", "Resumen")
          If RS1!tov_tipdoc = "SP" Then
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(RS1!ptotal, fg_Pict(6, 0))
             salbod = salbod + RS1!ptotal
          ElseIf RS1!tov_tipdoc = "DP" Then
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(RS1!ptotal, fg_Pict(6, 0))
             devbod = devbod + RS1!ptotal
          End If
          totbod = IIf(RS1!tov_tipdoc = "SP", Round(totbod + RS1!ptotal), Round(totbod - RS1!ptotal))
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(totbod, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       totbod = 0
       i = i + 2
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Totales "
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(salbod > 0, Format(salbod, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(devdob > 0, Format(devbod, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "")
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(Round(salbod - devbod), fg_Pict(6, 0))
       .TableCell(tcRows) = i: .TableBorder = tbNone: .EndTable
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    fg_descarga
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_ResSalDevBod:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_DetSalDevBod(Form As Object, Tipo As String, fecini As Date, ressec As Boolean, NumDoc As Long)
Dim rutcli As String, i As Long, j As Long, total As Double, aAp As String, codsec As String, coding As String, totsec As Double
Dim numlin As Long, codmer As String, canmin As Double, canmer As Double, predoc As Double, ptotal As Double, descri As String, vNumRac As Long, vTotSec As Double
Dim sql1 As String, sql2 As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_DetSalDevBod
fg_carga ""
If Tipo = "SP" Then
   MsgTitulo = "Informe Detalle Salida a Bodega " & IIf(ressec, "Resumen", "Sector")
ElseIf Tipo = "DP" Then
   MsgTitulo = "Informe Detalle Devolución a Bodega " & IIf(ressec, "Resumen", "Sector")
End If
Preview.Refresh
Preview.Cls
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .TextAlign = taLeftTop
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcForeColor, 2) = &H4080&
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = IIf(Tipo = "SP", "Salida Detalle Bodega " & IIf(ressec, "Resumen", "Sector"), "Devolución Detalle Bodega " & IIf(ressec, "Resumen", "Sector")) & " " & Form.Label3(7).Caption
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = ""
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = IIf(vg_tipser, "", "Regimen")
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = IIf(vg_tipser, "", "Servicio")
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Trim(Form.fpText.text) & " " & Trim(Form.fpayuda(0).Caption)
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = IIf(vg_tipser, "", Form.fpLongInteger1(0).Value & " " & Trim(Form.fpayuda(1).Caption))
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = IIf(vg_tipser, "", Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value & " " & Trim(Form.fpayuda(2).Caption))
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    .FontSize = 7
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Unid."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = IIf(Tipo = "SP", "Cant.Calculada", "Cant.Salida")
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = IIf(Tipo = "SP", "Cant.Salida", "Cant.Devolver")
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "P.M.P."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Total"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = IIf(ressec, "", "Cto. Per Capita")
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    vNumRac = 0: vTotSec = 0
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fecini & "') ", " '" & Format(fecini, "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " ORDER BY dev.dev_numlin ", "")
    If ressec Then
       RS3.Open "SELECT ing.ing_codigo, ing.ing_nombre, unm.unm_nomcor, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, uni.uni_nomcor, dev.dev_canmin, dev.dev_predoc, dev.dev_numlin, 0 as sec_codigo, '' as sec_nombre, 0 as sec_orden, SUM(dev.dev_canmin * pro.pro_facing) AS canmin, " & _
                "SUM(dev.dev_canmer) AS dev_canmer, SUM(dev.dev_ptotal) AS dev_ptotal " & _
                "FROM  b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_ingrediente ing, b_productos pro, a_unidadmed unm, a_unidad uni " & _
                "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc AND dev.dev_coding = ing.ing_codigo " & _
                "AND   ing.ing_unimed = unm.unm_codigo AND dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                "AND   pro.pro_coduni = uni.uni_codigo " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_rutcli = '" & LimpiaDato(Trim(Form.fpText.text)) & "' AND tov.tov_numdoc = " & NumDoc & " " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_fecpro = " & sql1 & " " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_codreg = " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(0).Value) & " AND tov.tov_codser = " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value) & " " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND tov.tov_tipdoc = '" & Tipo & "' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
                "GROUP BY ing.ing_codigo, ing.ing_nombre, unm.unm_nomcor, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, uni.uni_nomcor, dev.dev_canmin, dev.dev_predoc, dev.dev_numlin " & sql2 & " " & _
                "UNION ALL " & _
                "SELECT '' AS ing_codigo, 'Estructura Fija' AS ing_nombre, '' as unm_nomcor, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, uni.uni_nomcor, dev.dev_canmin, dev.dev_predoc, dev.dev_numlin, 0 AS sec_codigo, '' AS sec_nombre, 0 AS sec_orden, 0 AS canmin,  dev.dev_canmer AS dev_canmer, dev.dev_ptotal AS dev_ptotal " & _
                "FROM  b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro, a_unidad uni " & _
                "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc AND  dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                "AND   pro.pro_coduni = uni.uni_codigo AND  tov.tov_rutcli = '" & LimpiaDato(Trim(Form.fpText.text)) & "' " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_fecpro = " & sql1 & " " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_codreg = " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(0).Value) & " AND tov.tov_codser = " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value) & " " & _
                "AND   dev.dev_numdoc = " & NumDoc & " AND  tov.tov_tipdoc = '" & Tipo & "'  " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' AND (dev.dev_coding = '' OR (dev.dev_coding) IS NULL OR dev.dev_codsec=-1) ORDER BY dev.dev_numlin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Else
       '------- Traer raciones
       RS3.Open "SELECT mir_fecmin, SUM(mir_nrorac) AS nrorac FROM b_minutaraciones " & _
                "WHERE mir_cencos = '" & LimpiaDato(Trim(Form.fpText.text)) & "' " & _
                "AND   mir_codreg = " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(0).Value) & " " & _
                "AND   mir_codser = " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value) & " " & _
                "AND  (mir_rutcli = 'PRODUCIDAS') " & _
                "AND   mir_fecmin = " & Format(fecini, "yyyymmdd") & " GROUP BY mir_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS3.EOF Then vNumRac = RS3!nrorac
       RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
       
       sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " ORDER BY sec.sec_orden, dev.dev_numlin ", "")
       RS3.Open "SELECT ing.ing_codigo, ing.ing_nombre,unm.unm_nomcor, sec.sec_codigo, sec.sec_nombre, sec.sec_orden, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, uni.uni_nomcor, dev.dev_canmin, dev.dev_predoc, dev.dev_numlin, SUM(dev.dev_canmin * pro.pro_facing) AS canmin, " & _
                "SUM(dev.dev_canmer) AS dev_canmer, SUM(dev.dev_ptotal) AS dev_ptotal " & _
                "FROM  b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_ingrediente ing, b_productos pro, a_unidadmed unm, a_sector sec, a_unidad uni " & _
                "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc AND dev.dev_coding = ing.ing_codigo " & _
                "AND   ing.ing_unimed = unm.unm_codigo AND dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                "AND   dev.dev_codsec = sec.sec_codigo AND pro.pro_coduni = uni.uni_codigo " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_rutcli = '" & LimpiaDato(Trim(Form.fpText.text)) & "' AND tov.tov_numdoc = " & NumDoc & " " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_fecpro = " & sql1 & " " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_codreg = " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(0).Value) & " AND tov.tov_codser = " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value) & " " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND tov.tov_tipdoc = '" & Tipo & "' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
                "GROUP BY ing.ing_codigo, ing.ing_nombre, unm.unm_nomcor,  sec.sec_codigo, sec.sec_nombre,  sec.sec_orden, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, uni.uni_nomcor, dev.dev_canmin, dev.dev_predoc, dev.dev_numlin " & sql2 & " " & _
                "UNION ALL " & _
                "SELECT '' AS ing_codigo, 'Estructura Fija' AS ing_nombre, '' as unm_nomcor, -1 AS sec_codigo, 'Estructura Fija' AS sec_nombre, 999999999 AS sec_orden, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, uni.uni_nomcor, dev.dev_canmin, dev.dev_predoc, dev.dev_numlin, 0 AS canmin,  dev.dev_canmer AS dev_canmer, dev.dev_ptotal AS dev_ptotal " & _
                "FROM  b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro, a_unidad uni " & _
                "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc AND dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                "AND   pro.pro_coduni = uni.uni_codigo AND  tov.tov_rutcli = '" & LimpiaDato(Trim(Form.fpText.text)) & "' " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_fecpro = " & sql1 & " " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_codreg = " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(0).Value) & " AND tov.tov_codser = " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value) & " " & _
                "AND   dev.dev_numdoc = " & NumDoc & " AND  tov.tov_tipdoc = '" & Tipo & "'  " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' AND (dev.dev_coding = '' OR (dev.dev_coding) IS NULL OR dev.dev_codsec=-1) ORDER BY sec_orden, dev.dev_numlin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    End If
    i = 1: j = 1: total = 0: codsec = "0": coding = "": totsec = 0
    Do While Not RS3.EOF
       If codsec <> RS3!sec_codigo And Not ressec Then
          If i > 1 Then
             i = i + 1
             .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) & " (Nº Raciones : " & vNumRac & ")"
             .TableCell(tcFontSize, j, 7) = 9
             .TableCell(tcText, j, 7) = Format(totsec, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
             If vNumRac > 0 And vTotSec > 0 Then
                .TableCell(tcFontSize, j, 8) = 9
                .TableCell(tcText, j, 8) = Format((vTotSec / vNumRac), fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr))
             End If
             j = i: totsec = 0
          End If
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 1) = 9: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = IIf(RS3!sec_codigo = -1, "", RS3!sec_codigo)
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 2) = 9: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS3!sec_nombre)
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
          codsec = RS3!sec_codigo
          coding = IIf(RS3!sec_codigo = -1, RS3!ing_codigo, 0)
          vTotSec = 0
          i = i + 1
       End If
       '------- Ingrediente
       If coding <> RS3!ing_codigo Then
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = IIf(RS3!ing_codigo = "estfij", "", RS3!ing_codigo)
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS3!ing_nombre)
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS3!unm_nomcor)
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(RS3!ing_codigo = "", "", Format(RS3!canmin, fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa)))
          coding = RS3!ing_codigo
          i = i + 1
       End If
      '------- Productos
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS3!pro_codigo
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS3!pro_nombre
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = RS3!uni_nomcor
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(RS3!dev_canmin, fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS3!dev_canmer, fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(RS3!dev_predoc, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(RS3!dev_ptotal, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
       total = total + Format(RS3!dev_ptotal, fg_Pict(9, 2))
       If Not ressec Then totsec = (totsec + RS3!dev_ptotal): vTotSec = Round(vTotSec + RS3!dev_ptotal)
       i = i + 1
       RS3.MoveNext
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
    Loop
    If Not ressec Then
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) & " (Nº Raciones : " & vNumRac & ")"
       .TableCell(tcFontSize, j, 7) = 9
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 7) = Format(totsec, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
       totsec = 0
       If vNumRac > 0 And vTotSec > 0 Then
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, j, 8) = 9
          .TableCell(tcText, j, 8) = Format((vTotSec / vNumRac), fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr))
       End If
       j = i
    End If
    RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i - 1
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    .TableBorder = tbBottom
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1, 1, 3) = True
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 9500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 2) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Total"
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 3) = 8: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format(total, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_DetSalDevBod:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_SalBodegaxEst(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As String, fecter As String, tipinf As Integer, opspag As Boolean)
Dim i As Long, nomcen As String, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long, ndia As Long
Dim cantfija As Double, cantprodxdia As Double, aAp As String
Dim auxestser As Long, auxrecod As Long, auxfec As Variant
On Local Error GoTo Error_SalBodxEst
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Salida de Bodega x Estructura"
Preview.Refresh
Preview.Cls
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .TextAlign = taLeftTop
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 12: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcForeColor, 2) = &H4080&
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = IIf(tipinf = 0, "Formato de Requisición x Estructura Servicio Detallado", "Formato de Requisición x Estructura Servicio Resumido")
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS1!cli_codigo & " " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre): nomcen = Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Rango Facha"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = fecini & " - " & fecter
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    '------- Rutina validar producto vigente
    ValidarProductoVigente
    '------- Creo tabla temporal y chequeo si existe antes
    aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_SalBod1"
    fg_CheckTmp aAp
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, a.ser_codigo, a.ser_nombre, c.min_fecmin INTO " & aAp & " " & _
             "FROM a_servicio a, a_regimen b, b_minuta c, b_minutadet d " & _
             "WHERE  c.min_codigo = d.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND    c.min_codreg = b.reg_codigo " & _
             "AND    c.min_codser = a.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND    c.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND    c.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND    c.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND    c.min_fecmin >= " & Format(fecini, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
             "AND    c.min_fecmin <= " & Format(fecter, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
             "AND    d.mid_tipmin = '2'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " SELECT DISTINCT b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, a.ser_codigo, a.ser_nombre, c.mfd_fecha AS min_fecmin " & _
                  "FROM a_servicio a, a_regimen b, b_minutafijadia c " & _
                  "WHERE c.mfd_codreg = b.reg_codigo " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_codser = a.ser_codigo " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_fecha >= " & Format(fecini, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_fecha <= " & Format(fecter, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_tipmin = '2'"
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT reg_codigo, reg_nombre, ser_codigo, ser_nombre, min_fecmin FROM " & aAp & " ORDER BY reg_codigo, ser_codigo, min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Function
    auxfec = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
        ndia = fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(Trim(Str(RS1!min_fecmin)), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(Trim(Str(RS1!min_fecmin)), 2)) - 2)))
        If tipinf = 0 Then
           RS2.Open "SELECT rec.rec_codigo, rec.rec_nombre, red.red_nroite, red.red_codpro, (SELECT DISTINCT ing_nombre FROM b_ingrediente WHERE ing_codigo = ing_cpi_coding), " & _
                    "pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, pro.pro_facing, mid.mid_numrac, red.red_canpro, " & _
                    "rec.rec_basrac, mid.mid_estser, ess.ess_nombre, mid.mid_numlin, uni.uni_nomcor, rec.rec_basrac AS cantprodxdia " & _
                    "FROM b_minuta mi, b_minutadet mid, b_receta rec, b_recetadet red, a_servicio ser, a_estservicio ess, b_contlistpreing ing, b_productos pro, a_unidad uni " & _
                    "WHERE rec.rec_codigo = mid.mid_codrec " & _
                    "AND   rec.rec_codigo = red.red_codigo " & _
                    "AND   red.red_tiprec = mid.mid_tiprec AND ((red.red_tiprec <> 0 AND red.red_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') OR (red.red_tiprec = 0 AND red.red_cencos = '0')) " & _
                    "AND   red.red_codpro = ing.cpi_coding AND ing.cpi_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                    "AND   ing.cpi_codped = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codigo = mid.mid_codigo " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codser = ser.ser_codigo " & _
                    "AND   mid.mid_estser = ess.ess_codigo AND mi_min_cencos = ess.ess_cencos " & _
                    "AND   pro.pro_coduni = uni.uni_codigo " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_fecmin = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " " & _
                    "AND   mid.mid_tipmin = '2' " & _
                    "AND   mid.mid_numrac > 0 and pro_facing > 0 and red_canpro > 0 " & _
                    "ORDER BY mid.mid_numlin, mid.mid_estser, red.red_nroite", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        Else
           RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, mid.mid_estser, ess.ess_orden, ess.ess_nombre, uni.uni_nomcor, " & _
                    "SUM(((red.red_canpro/rec.rec_basrac)*mid.mid_numrac)/pro.pro_facing) AS cantprodxdia " & _
                    "FROM b_minuta mi, b_minutadet mid, b_receta rec, b_recetadet red, a_servicio ser, a_estservicio ess, b_contlistpreing ing, b_productos pro, a_unidad uni " & _
                    "WHERE rec.rec_codigo = mid.mid_codrec " & _
                    "AND   rec.rec_codigo = red.red_codigo " & _
                    "AND   red.red_codpro = ing.cpi_coding AND ing.cpi_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                    "AND   red.red_tiprec = mid.mid_tiprec AND ((red.red_tiprec <> 0 AND red.red_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') OR (red.red_tiprec = 0 AND red.red_cencos = '0')) " & _
                    "AND   ing.cpi_codped = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                    "AND  (pro.pro_fecven > " & Format(Date, "yyyymmdd") & " OR pro.pro_fecven <= 0 OR (pro.pro_codigo IN (SELECT bod.bod_codpro FROM b_bodegas bod WHERE bod.bod_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND bod.bod_canmer > 0))) " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codigo = mid.mid_codigo " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codser = ser.ser_codigo " & _
                    "AND   mid.mid_estser = ess.ess_codigo AND mi.min_cencos = ess.ess_cencos " & _
                    "AND   pro.pro_coduni = uni.uni_codigo " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_fecmin = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " " & _
                    "AND   mid.mid_tipmin = '2' " & _
                    "AND   mid.mid_numrac > 0 and pro_facing > 0 and red_canpro > 0 " & _
                    "GROUP BY pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, mid.mid_estser, ess.ess_orden, ess.ess_nombre, uni.uni_nomcor ORDER BY ess.ess_orden", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        End If
        RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, c.uni_nomcor, a.mfd_canpro " & _
                 "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos b, a_unidad c " & _
                 "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = b.pro_codigo AND b.pro_coduni = c.uni_codigo " & _
                 "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                 "AND   a.mfd_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                 "AND   a.mfd_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                 "AND   a.mfd_fecha = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " AND a.mfd_tipmin = '2' " & _
                 "AND  (b.pro_fecven > " & Format(Date, "yyyymmdd") & " OR b.pro_fecven <= 0 OR (b.pro_codigo IN (SELECT bod_codpro FROM b_bodegas WHERE bod_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND bod_canmer > 0))) ", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        auxser = 0: auxreg = 0
        If Not RS2.EOF Or Not RS3.EOF Then
           If RS1!ser_codigo <> auxser Or RS1!min_fecmin <> auxfec Or RS1!reg_codigo <> auxreg Then
              If auxfec > 0 And opspag Then
                 .NewPage
                 .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
                 .StartTable
                 .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
                 .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = cencos & " " & nomcen
                 .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Rango Facha"
                 .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = fecini & " - " & fecter
                 .TableBorder = tbNone
                 .EndTable
              End If
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 3, , 3) = True
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow:: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 200
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Regimen : " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre) & "- Servicio : " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & Trim(RS1!ser_nombre) & " - " & "Fecha : " & fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin)
              .TableBorder = tbNone
              .EndTable
              auxreg = RS1!reg_codigo
              auxser = RS1!ser_codigo
              auxfec = RS1!min_fecmin
           End If
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 4300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taCenterTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Código"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Descripción"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = IIf(tipinf = 0, "Cant.Bruta", "")
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = "Cantidad"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = "Cant.Real."
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = "Unidad"
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
              
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 500
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 4300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taCenterTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
           i = 1: auxestser = 0: auxrecod = 0
           If Not RS2.EOF Then
              i = 2
              Do While Not RS2.EOF
                 If RS2!mid_estser <> auxestser Then
                    If auxestser > 0 Then i = i + 1
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!ess_nombre)
                    auxestser = RS2!mid_estser
                    i = i + 1
                 End If
                 If tipinf = 0 Then
                    If RS2!rec_codigo <> auxrecod Then
                       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!rec_codigo)
                       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS2!rec_nombre) & " [Nº. Rac. " & RS2!mid_numrac & "]"
                       auxrecod = RS2!rec_codigo
                       i = i + 1
                    End If
                 End If
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS2!pro_codigo
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "  " & RS2!pro_nombre
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((RS2!cantprodxdia), fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = "_________"
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = RS2!uni_nomcor
                 i = i + 1
                 RS2.MoveNext
              Loop
           End If
           If Not RS3.EOF Then
              i = i + 1
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Estructura Fija": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
              i = i + 1
              Do While Not RS3.EOF
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS3!pro_codigo
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = RS3!pro_nombre
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(TipoDato(RS3!mfd_canpro, 0), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = "_________"
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = RS3!uni_nomcor
                 i = i + 1
                 RS3.MoveNext
              Loop
           End If
           .TableCell(tcRows) = i
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
        End If
        RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
        RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
        RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_SalBodxEst:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_SalBodegaSector(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As String, fecter As String, tipinf As Integer, opspag As Boolean)
Dim i As Long, nomcen As String, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long, ndia As Long, sql1 As String
Dim cantfija As Double, cantprodxdia As Double, aAp As String
Dim auxsec As Long, auxrecod As Long, auxfec As Variant, opgruvul As Boolean
On Local Error GoTo Error_SalBodxSector
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Salida de Bodega x Sector"
Preview.Refresh
Preview.Cls
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .TextAlign = taLeftTop
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 12: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcForeColor, 2) = &H4080&
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Formato de Requisición x Sector"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS1!cli_codigo & " " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre): nomcen = Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Rango Fecha"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = fecini & " - " & fecter
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    '------- Traer opción de impresión grupo vulnerable en informe
    opgruvul = False
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT par_codigo FROM a_param WHERE par_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND par_codigo = 'opgruvul' AND par_valor = 'S'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then opgruvul = True
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '------- Rutina validar producto vigente
    ValidarProductoVigente
    '------- Creo tabla temporal y chequeo si existe antes
    aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_SalBod2"
    fg_CheckTmp aAp
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, a.ser_codigo, a.ser_nombre, c.min_fecmin INTO " & aAp & " " & _
             "FROM a_servicio a, a_regimen b, b_minuta c, b_minutadet d " & _
             "WHERE  c.min_codigo = d.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND    c.min_codreg = b.reg_codigo " & _
             "AND    c.min_codser = a.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND    c.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND    c.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND    c.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND    c.min_fecmin >= " & Format(fecini, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
             "AND    c.min_fecmin <= " & Format(fecter, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
             "AND    d.mid_tipmin = '2'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " SELECT DISTINCT b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, a.ser_codigo, a.ser_nombre, c.mfd_fecha AS min_fecmin " & _
                  "FROM a_servicio a, a_regimen b, b_minutafijadia c " & _
                  "WHERE c.mfd_codreg = b.reg_codigo " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_codser = a.ser_codigo " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_fecha  >= " & Format(fecini, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_fecha  <= " & Format(fecter, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_tipmin = '2'"
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT reg_codigo, reg_nombre, ser_codigo, ser_nombre, min_fecmin FROM " & aAp & " ORDER BY reg_codigo, ser_codigo, min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Function
    auxfec = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       ndia = fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(Trim(Str(RS1!min_fecmin)), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(Trim(Str(RS1!min_fecmin)), 2)) - 2)))
       RS2.Open "SELECT pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_propon, pro.pro_nombre, ing.cpi_coding, uni.uni_nomcor, sec.sec_codigo, sec.sec_orden, sec.sec_nombre, " & _
                "SUM(((red.red_canpro/rec.rec_basrac)*mid.mid_numrac)/pro.pro_facing) AS cantprodxdia, SUM(red.red_canpro) AS red_canpro, " & _
                "SUM(red.red_canpro) AS rec_basrac, SUM(red.red_canpro) AS mid_numrac, SUM(red.red_canpro) AS pro_facing " & _
                "FROM b_minuta mi, b_minutadet mid, b_receta rec, b_recetadet red, a_servicio ser, a_estservicio ess, b_contlistpreing ing, b_productos pro, a_unidad uni, a_sector sec " & _
                "WHERE rec.rec_codigo = mid.mid_codrec AND rec.rec_codigo = red.red_codigo " & _
                "AND   red.red_codpro = ing.cpi_coding AND ing.cpi_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND red.red_tiprec = mid.mid_tiprec AND ((red.red_tiprec <> 0 AND red.red_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') OR (red.red_tiprec = 0 AND red.red_cencos = '0')) " & _
                "AND   ing.cpi_codped = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                "AND  (pro.pro_fecven > " & Format(Date, "yyyymmdd") & " OR pro.pro_fecven <= 0 OR (pro.pro_codigo IN (SELECT bod.bod_codpro FROM b_bodegas bod WHERE bod.bod_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND bod.bod_canmer > 0))) " & _
                "AND   mi.min_codigo  = mid.mid_codigo AND mi.min_codser = ser.ser_codigo AND mi.min_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " AND mi.min_cencos = ess.ess_cencos AND mid.mid_estser = ess.ess_codigo AND ess.ess_codsec = sec.sec_codigo " & _
                "AND   pro.pro_coduni = uni.uni_codigo AND mi.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND mi.min_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " AND mi.min_fecmin = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " AND mid.mid_tipmin = '2' AND mid.mid_numrac > 0 AND pro.pro_facing > 0 AND red.red_canpro > 0 " & _
                "GROUP BY pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_propon, pro.pro_nombre, ing.cpi_coding, uni.uni_nomcor, sec.sec_codigo, sec.sec_orden, sec.sec_nombre ORDER BY sec.sec_orden, ing.cpi_coding", vg_db, adOpenForwardOnly
       RS3.Open "SELECT b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, c.uni_nomcor, a.mfd_canpro " & _
                "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos b, a_unidad c " & _
                "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = b.pro_codigo AND b.pro_coduni=c.uni_codigo " & _
                "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                "AND   a.mfd_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                "AND   a.mfd_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                "AND   a.mfd_fecha  = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " AND a.mfd_tipmin = '2' " & _
                "AND  (b.pro_fecven > " & Format(Date, "yyyymmdd") & " OR b.pro_fecven <= 0 OR (b.pro_codigo IN (SELECT bod_codpro FROM b_bodegas WHERE bod_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND bod_canmer > 0)))", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " rec.rec_gruvul ", " convert(varchar(max),rec.rec_gruvul) AS rec_gruvul ")
       RS4.Open "SELECT DISTINCT rec.rec_codigo, rec.rec_nombre, " & sql1 & ", sec.sec_codigo, sec.sec_orden, sec.sec_nombre, mid.mid_numrac " & _
                "FROM b_minuta mi, b_minutadet mid, b_receta rec, b_recetadet red, a_servicio ser, a_estservicio ess, a_sector sec " & _
                "WHERE rec.rec_codigo = mid.mid_codrec AND rec.rec_codigo = red.red_codigo AND red.red_tiprec = mid.mid_tiprec AND ((red.red_tiprec <> 0 AND red.red_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') OR (red.red_tiprec = 0 AND red.red_cencos = '0')) " & _
                "AND  mi.min_codigo = mid.mid_codigo AND mi.min_codser = ser.ser_codigo AND mi.min_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " AND mi.min_cencos = ess.ess_cencos AND mid.mid_estser = ess.ess_codigo AND ess.ess_codsec = sec.sec_codigo " & _
                "AND  mi.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND mi.min_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " AND mi.min_fecmin = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " AND mid.mid_tipmin = '2' AND mid.mid_numrac > 0 AND red.red_canpro > 0 " & _
                "ORDER BY sec.sec_orden", vg_db, adOpenForwardOnly
       auxreg = 0: auxser = 0
       If Not RS2.EOF Or Not RS3.EOF Then
          If RS1!ser_codigo <> auxser Or RS1!min_fecmin <> auxfec Or RS1!reg_codigo <> auxreg Then
             If auxfec > 0 And opspag Then
                .NewPage
                .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
                .StartTable
                .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = cencos & " " & Trim(nomcen)
                .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Rango Fecha"
                .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = fecini & " - " & fecter
                .TableBorder = tbNone
                .EndTable
             End If
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 3, , 3) = True
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow:: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 200
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Regimen : " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre) & "- Servicio : " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & Trim(RS1!ser_nombre) & " - " & "Fecha : " & fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin)
             .TableBorder = tbNone
             .EndTable
             auxser = RS1!ser_codigo
             auxreg = RS1!reg_codigo
             auxfec = RS1!min_fecmin
          End If
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 4300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taCenterTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
          .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Código"
          .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Descripción"
          .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = IIf(tipinf = 0, "Cant.Bruta", "")
          .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = "Cantidad"
          .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = "Cant.Real."
          .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = "Unidad"
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
                
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 500
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 4300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taCenterTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
          i = 1: auxsec = 0: auxrecod = 0
          If Not RS2.EOF Then
             i = 2
             Do While Not RS2.EOF
                If RS2!sec_codigo <> auxsec Then
                   If auxsec > 0 Then i = i + 1
                   .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!sec_nombre)
                   auxsec = RS2!sec_codigo
                   RS4.MoveFirst
                   Do While Not RS4.EOF
                      If RS4!sec_codigo = RS2!sec_codigo Then
                         Preview.rtfPic.TextRTF = "": If opgruvul = True And Not IsNull(RS4!rec_gruvul) Then Preview.rtfPic.TextRTF = IIf(IsNull(RS4!rec_gruvul), "", Trim(RS4!rec_gruvul))
                         .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 3) = 7
                         If Trim(Preview.rtfPic.text) = "" Then
                            .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "(" & Trim(RS4!rec_codigo) & ") " & Trim(RS4!rec_nombre) & " [Nº.Rac. " & RS4!mid_numrac & "]"
                         Else
                            .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "(" & Trim(RS4!rec_codigo) & ") " & Trim(RS4!rec_nombre) & " [Nº.Rac. " & RS4!mid_numrac & "]"
                            i = i + 1
                            .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 3) = 7
                            .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = False: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "(" & Mid(Trim(Preview.rtfPic.text), 1, Len(Trim(Preview.rtfPic.text)) - IIf(Asc(Right(Preview.rtfPic.text, 1)) = 13 Or Asc(Right(Preview.rtfPic.text, 1)) = 10, 1, 0)) & ")"
                            i = i + 1
                         End If
                         i = i + 1
                      End If
                      RS4.MoveNext
                   Loop
                   i = i + 1
                End If
                If tipinf = 0 Then
                   If RS2!rec_codigo <> auxrecod Then
                      .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!rec_codigo)
                      .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS2!rec_nombre) & " [Nº. Rac. " & IIf(IsNull(RS2!mid_numrac), 0, RS2!mid_numrac) & "]"
                      auxrecod = RS2!rec_codigo
                      i = i + 1
                   End If
                End If
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS2!pro_codigo
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "  " & RS2!pro_nombre
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(tipinf = 0, Format(Round(RS2!red_canpro / RS2!rec_basrac), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa)), "")
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(tipinf = 0, Format(Round(TipoDato((((RS2!red_canpro / RS2!rec_basrac) * RS2!mid_numrac) / RS2!pro_facing), 0), vg_DCa), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa)), Format(Round(TipoDato(RS2!cantprodxdia, 0), vg_DCa), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa)))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = "_________"
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = RS2!uni_nomcor
                i = i + 1
                RS2.MoveNext
             Loop
          End If
          If Not RS3.EOF Then
             i = i + 1
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Estructura Fija": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
             i = i + 1
             Do While Not RS3.EOF
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS3!pro_codigo
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = RS3!pro_nombre
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(TipoDato(RS3!mfd_canpro, 0), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = "_________"
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = RS3!uni_nomcor
                i = i + 1
                RS3.MoveNext
             Loop
          End If
          .TableCell(tcRows) = i
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
       End If
       RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
       RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
       RS4.Close: Set RS4 = Nothing
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_SalBodxSector:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_SalBodegaDet(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As String, fecter As String, tipinf As Integer, opspag As Boolean)

Dim i As Long, nomcen As String, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long, ndia As Long, sql1 As String
Dim cantfija As Double, cantprodxdia As Double, aAp As String
Dim auxestser As Long, auxrecod As Long, auxfec As Variant, opgruvul As Boolean

On Local Error GoTo Error_SalBodDet

fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Salida de Bodega Detallado"
Preview.Refresh
Preview.Cls

With Preview.VSPrinter
    
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .TextAlign = taLeftTop
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 12: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcForeColor, 2) = &H4080&
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Formato de Requisición Detallado"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS1!cli_codigo & " " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre): nomcen = Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Rango Facha"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = fecini & " - " & fecter
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    
    '------- Traer opción de impresión grupo vulnerable en informe
    opgruvul = False
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT par_codigo FROM a_param WHERE par_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND par_codigo = 'opgruvul' AND par_valor = 'S'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then opgruvul = True
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    '------- Rutina validar producto vigente
    ValidarProductoVigente
    
    '------- Creo tabla temporal y chequeo si existe antes
    aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_SalBod3"
    fg_CheckTmp aAp
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, a.ser_codigo, a.ser_nombre, c.min_fecmin INTO " & aAp & " " & _
             "FROM a_servicio a, a_regimen b, b_minuta c, b_minutadet d " & _
             "WHERE  c.min_codigo = d.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND    c.min_codreg = b.reg_codigo " & _
             "AND    c.min_codser = a.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND    c.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND    c.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND    c.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND    c.min_fecmin >= " & Format(fecini, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
             "AND    c.min_fecmin <= " & Format(fecter, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
             "AND    d.mid_tipmin = '2'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " SELECT DISTINCT b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, a.ser_codigo, a.ser_nombre, c.mfd_fecha AS min_fecmin " & _
                  "FROM a_servicio a, a_regimen b, b_minutafijadia c " & _
                  "WHERE c.mfd_codreg = b.reg_codigo " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_codser = a.ser_codigo " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_fecha  >= " & Format(fecini, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_fecha  <= " & Format(fecter, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                  "AND   c.mfd_tipmin = '2'"
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT reg_codigo, reg_nombre, ser_codigo, ser_nombre, min_fecmin FROM " & aAp & " ORDER BY reg_codigo, ser_codigo, min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Function
    auxfec = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
        
        ndia = fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(Trim(Str(RS1!min_fecmin)), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(Trim(Str(RS1!min_fecmin)), 2)) - 2)))
        
        If tipinf = 0 Then
           
           sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " rec.rec_gruvul ", " convert(varchar(max),rec.rec_gruvul) AS rec_gruvul ")
           
           RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT rec.rec_codigo, rec.rec_nombre, " & sql1 & ", red.red_nroite, red.red_codpro, (SELECT DISTINCT ing_nombre FROM b_ingrediente WHERE ing_codigo=ing.cpi_coding), " & _
                    "pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, pro.pro_facing, mid.mid_numrac, red.red_canpro, " & _
                    "rec.rec_basrac, mid.mid_estser, ess.ess_nombre, mid.mid_numlin, uni.uni_nomcor, rec.rec_basrac as cantprodxdia " & _
                    "FROM b_minuta mi, b_minutadet mid, b_receta rec, b_recetadet red, a_servicio ser, a_estservicio ess, b_contlistpreing ing, b_productos pro, a_unidad uni " & _
                    "WHERE rec.rec_codigo = mid.mid_codrec " & _
                    "AND   rec.rec_codigo = red.red_codigo " & _
                    "AND   red.red_tiprec = mid.mid_tiprec AND ((red.red_tiprec <> 0 AND red.red_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') OR (red.red_tiprec = 0 AND red.red_cencos = '0')) " & _
                    "AND   red.red_codpro = ing.cpi_coding AND ing.cpi_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                    "AND   ing.cpi_codped = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codigo  = mid.mid_codigo " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codser  = ser.ser_codigo " & _
                    "AND   mid.mid_estser = ess.ess_codigo AND mi.min_cencos = ess.ess_cencos " & _
                    "AND   pro.pro_coduni = uni.uni_codigo " & _
                    "AND  (pro.pro_fecven > " & Format(Date, "yyyymmdd") & " OR pro.pro_fecven <= 0 OR (pro.pro_codigo IN (SELECT bod.bod_codpro FROM b_bodegas bod WHERE bod.bod_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND bod.bod_canmer > 0))) " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_cencos  = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codreg  = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codser  = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_fecmin  = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " " & _
                    "AND   mid.mid_tipmin = '2' " & _
                    "AND   mid.mid_numrac > 0 AND pro_facing > 0 AND red_canpro > 0 " & _
                    "ORDER BY  mid.mid_numlin, mid.mid_estser, red.red_nroite", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        
        Else
           
           RS2.Open "SELECT pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, mid.mid_estser, ess.ess_orden, ess.ess_nombre, uni.uni_nomcor, " & _
                    "SUM(((red.red_canpro/rec.rec_basrac)*mid.mid_numrac)/pro.pro_facing) AS cantprodxdia, " & _
                    "SUM(red.red_canpro) AS red_canpro, " & _
                    "SUM(red.red_canpro) AS rec_basrac, " & _
                    "SUM(red.red_canpro) AS mid_numrac, " & _
                    "SUM(red.red_canpro) AS pro_facing " & _
                    "FROM b_minuta mi, b_minutadet mid, b_receta rec, b_recetadet red, a_servicio ser, a_estservicio ess, b_contlistpreing ing, b_productos pro, a_unidad uni " & _
                    "WHERE rec.rec_codigo = mid.mid_codrec " & _
                    "AND   rec.rec_codigo = red.red_codigo " & _
                    "AND   red.red_codpro = ing.cpi_coding " & _
                    "AND   red.red_tiprec = mid.mid_tiprec AND ((red.red_tiprec <> 0 AND red.red_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') OR (red.red_tiprec = 0 AND red.red_cencos = '0')) " & _
                    "AND   ing.cpi_codped = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codigo  = mid.mid_codigo " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codser  = ser.ser_codigo " & _
                    "AND   mid.mid_estser = ess.ess_codigo AND mi_min_cencos = ess.ess_cencos " & _
                    "AND   pro.pro_coduni = uni.uni_codigo " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_cencos  = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codreg  = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_codser  = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                    "AND   mi.min_fecmin  = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " " & _
                    "AND   mid.mid_tipmin = '2' " & _
                    "AND   mid.mid_numrac > 0 AND pro_facing > 0 AND red_canpro > 0 " & _
                    "GROUP BY pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, mid.mid_estser, ess.ess_orden, ess.ess_nombre, uni.uni_nomcor ORDER BY ess.ess_orden", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        End If
           
        RS3.Open "SELECT b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, c.uni_nomcor, a.mfd_canpro " & _
                 "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos b, a_unidad c " & _
                 "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = b.pro_codigo AND b.pro_coduni = c.uni_codigo " & _
                 "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                 "AND   a.mfd_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                 "AND   a.mfd_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                 "AND   a.mfd_fecha  = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " AND a.mfd_tipmin = '2' " & _
                 "AND  (b.pro_fecven > " & Format(Date, "yyyymmdd") & " OR b.pro_fecven <= 0 OR (b.pro_codigo IN (SELECT bod_codpro FROM b_bodegas WHERE bod_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND bod_canmer > 0)))", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        
        auxreg = 0
        auxser = 0
        
        If Not RS2.EOF Or Not RS3.EOF Then
           
           If RS1!ser_codigo <> auxser Or RS1!min_fecmin <> auxfec Or RS1!reg_codigo <> auxreg Then
              
              If auxfec > 0 And opspag Then
                 
                 .NewPage
                 .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
                 .StartTable
                 .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
                 .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = cencos & " " & nomcen
                 .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Rango Facha"
                 .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = fecini & " - " & fecter
                 .TableBorder = tbNone
                 .EndTable
              
              End If
              
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 3, , 3) = True
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow:: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 200
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Regimen : " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre) & "- Servicio : " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & Trim(RS1!ser_nombre) & " - " & "Fecha : " & fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin)
              .TableBorder = tbNone
              .EndTable
              auxreg = RS1!reg_codigo
              auxser = RS1!ser_codigo
              auxfec = RS1!min_fecmin
           
           End If
           
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 4300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taCenterTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Código"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Descripción"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = IIf(tipinf = 0, "Cant.Bruta", "")
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = "Cantidad"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = "Cant.Real."
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = "Unidad"
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
                
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1500
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 4300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taCenterTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
           i = 1: auxestser = 0: auxrecod = 0
           If Not RS2.EOF Then
              i = 2
              Do While Not RS2.EOF
                 
                 If RS2!mid_estser <> auxestser Then
                    
                    If auxestser > 0 Then i = i + 1
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!ess_nombre)
                    auxestser = RS2!mid_estser
                    i = i + 1
                 
                 End If
                 
                 If tipinf = 0 Then
                    
                    If RS2!rec_codigo <> auxrecod Then
                       
                       Preview.rtfPic.TextRTF = "": If opgruvul = True And Not IsNull(RS2!rec_gruvul) Then Preview.rtfPic.TextRTF = IIf(IsNull(RS2!rec_gruvul), "", Trim(RS2!rec_gruvul))
                       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!rec_codigo)
                       
                       If Trim(Preview.rtfPic.text) = "" Then
                          
                          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS2!rec_nombre) & " [Nº. Rac. " & RS2!mid_numrac & "]"
                       
                       Else
                          
                          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 3) = 7: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS2!rec_nombre) & " [Nº. Rac. " & RS2!mid_numrac & "]"
                          i = i + 1
                          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = False: .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 3) = 7: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "(" & Mid(Trim(Preview.rtfPic.text), 1, Len(Trim(Preview.rtfPic.text)) - IIf(Asc(Right(Preview.rtfPic.text, 1)) = 13 Or Asc(Right(Preview.rtfPic.text, 1)) = 10, 1, 0)) & ")"
                          i = i + 1
                       
                       End If
                       auxrecod = RS2!rec_codigo
                       i = i + 1
                    
                    End If
                 
                 End If
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS2!pro_codigo
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "  " & RS2!pro_nombre
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format((RS2!red_canpro / RS2!rec_basrac), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(tipinf = 0, Format(Round(TipoDato((((RS2!red_canpro / RS2!rec_basrac) * RS2!mid_numrac) / RS2!pro_facing), 0), vg_DCa), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa)), Format(Round(TipoDato(RS2!cantprodxdia, 0), vg_DCa), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa)))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = "_________"
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = RS2!uni_nomcor
                 i = i + 1
                 RS2.MoveNext
              
              Loop
           
           End If
           
           If Not RS3.EOF Then
              
              i = i + 1
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Estructura Fija": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
              i = i + 1
              
              Do While Not RS3.EOF
                 
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS3!pro_codigo
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = RS3!pro_nombre
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(TipoDato(RS3!mfd_canpro, 0), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = "_________"
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = RS3!uni_nomcor
                 i = i + 1
                 RS3.MoveNext
              
              Loop
           
           End If
           
           .TableCell(tcRows) = i
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
        
        End If
        
        RS2.Close
        Set RS2 = Nothing
        
        RS3.Close
        Set RS3 = Nothing
        RS1.MoveNext
    
    Loop
    
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    .EndDoc
    
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_SalBodDet:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_FichaStock(cForm As Form, codbod As Long, codpro As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long)
Dim auxpro As String, aAp As String, sql1 As String, sql2 As String

On Local Error GoTo Error_FicStock

fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Movimiento Stock"
Preview.Refresh

With Preview.VSPrinter
    
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    LogoEmp
    .FontSize = 8
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Informe Ficha Stock"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    fg_carga ""
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 9: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 2) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 230
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 700: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = ""
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Tipo"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Movimiento"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = ""
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = ""
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Número"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = "Doc."
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Cantidad"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = "Movimiento"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 6) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Costo"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 6) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = "Movimiento"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Cantidad"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = "Stock"
'    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 8) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Can.Total"
'    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 8) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 8) = "Stock"
'    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 9) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = "Cto. PPP"
'    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 9) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 9) = "Stock"
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable

'00 Inventario inicial
'10 Ajuste de Entrada
'20 Proveedores Entrada
'30 Traspaso Entrada
'40 Prodccion Salida
'50 Produccion Entrada
'60 Traspaso Salida
'70 Mermas Salida
'80 Venta Directa Salida
'90 Ajuste Salida
    '-------> Insert tabla productospmpdia
    
    If RS3.State = 1 Then RS3.Close
    RS3.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ProductoPMPFichaStock"
       fg_CheckTmp aAp
       vg_db.Execute "SELECT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, 0 AS ppd_propon, Max(ppd_fecdia) AS ppd_fecdia " & _
                     "INTO " & aAp & " " & _
                     "FROM b_productospmpdia " & _
                     "WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                     "AND   ppd_fecdia >= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_fecdia <= " & Format(dEoM(CDate(vg_ciedia)), "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                     "AND   ppd_propon > 0 " & _
                     "GROUP BY ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro"
       vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp & " ADD Constraint pmp_pk Primary Key (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_fecdia)"
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " INNER JOIN b_productospmpdia ON (" & aAp & ".ppd_fecdia = b_productospmpdia.ppd_fecdia) AND (" & aAp & ".ppd_codpro = b_productospmpdia.ppd_codpro) AND (" & aAp & ".ppd_cencos = b_productospmpdia.ppd_cencos) SET " & aAp & ".ppd_propon=b_productospmpdia.ppd_propon"
       vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia) SELECT DISTINCT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_codpro NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_codpro FROM " & aAp & ")"
    End If
    
    cForm.fpayuda(1).Visible = True
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       
       RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.* FROM b_productos a, " & aAp & " b, a_tiposervicio c, b_clientes d " & _
                "WHERE (c.tis_codigo = d.cli_codtis OR a.pro_maepro < 1) " & _
                "AND    d.cli_codigo = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                "AND   (c.tis_codigo = a.pro_maepro OR a.pro_maepro < 1) " & _
                "AND    a.pro_codigo = b.ppd_codpro " & _
                "AND    b.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                "AND   (b.ppd_codpro = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "'='') " & _
                "AND    a.pro_ctrsto = 1 AND b.ppd_propon > 0 ORDER BY a.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    Else
       
       RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.* FROM b_productos a, b_productospmpdia b, a_tiposervicio c, b_clientes d " & _
                "WHERE (c.tis_codigo = d.cli_codtis OR a.pro_maepro < 1) " & _
                "AND    d.cli_codigo = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                "AND   (c.tis_codigo = a.pro_maepro OR a.pro_maepro < 1) " & _
                "AND    a.pro_codigo = b.ppd_codpro " & _
                "AND    b.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                "AND    b.ppd_fecdia >= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND b.ppd_fecdia <= " & Format(dEoM(CDate(vg_ciedia)), "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                "AND   (b.ppd_codpro = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "'='') " & _
                "AND    a.pro_ctrsto = 1 AND b.ppd_propon>0 ORDER BY a.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    End If
    
    Do While Not RS3.EOF
        
        cForm.fpayuda(1).Caption = Trim(RS3!pro_nombre)
        DoEvents
        codpro = RS3!pro_codigo
        Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = 0: Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols = 12
        Dim fectom As Long, fectin As Long
        fectom = 0
        fectin = fecini
        
        '-------> Traer Inventario del mes anterior
        
        If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
        RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
        vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
        
        RS1.Open "SELECT tin.tin_fectom, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, tin.tin_stofis, tin_propon " & _
                 "FROM b_tomainv tin, b_productos pro " & _
                 "WHERE tin.tin_codpro = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                 "AND   tin.tin_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                 "AND   tin.tin_codpro = '" & codpro & "' " & _
                 "AND   tin.tin_fectom <= " & fecini & " " & _
                 "ORDER BY tin.tin_fectom DESC", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                 
        If Not RS1.EOF Then
            
            fectin = RS1!tin_fectom
            Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
            Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tin_fectom
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Inventario Inicial"
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = ""
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "....."
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tin_stofis
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tin_propon
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "00"
        
        End If
        RS1.Close
        Set RS1 = Nothing
        
        '-------> Fin traer inventario del mes anterior
        '-------> Traer ajuste inventario
        sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fectin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fectin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
        sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
        
        If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
        RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
        vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

        RS1.Open "SELECT tov.tov_fecemi, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, aju.aju_nombre, aju.aju_tipo, tov.tov_numdoc, dev.dev_canmin, dev.dev_precos " & _
                 "FROM b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro, a_tipoajuste aju " & _
                 "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_codser = aju.aju_codigo " & _
                 "AND   dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                 "AND   dev.dev_codmer = '" & codpro & "' " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_fecemi >  " & sql1 & " " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_fecemi <= " & sql2 & " " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_tipdoc = 'AI' " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
                 "ORDER BY tov.tov_fecemi, pro.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            
            Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
            Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!tov_fecemi, "yyyymmdd")
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = IIf(RS1!aju_tipo = "A", "Ajuste Inventario (+)", "Ajuste Inventario (-)")
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = ""
