            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tov_numdoc
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_canmin
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_precos
'            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = IIf(RS1!aju_tipo = "A", "25", "90")
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = IIf(RS1!aju_tipo = "A", "90", "90")
            RS1.MoveNext
        
        Loop
        RS1.Close
        Set RS1 = Nothing
        
        '-------> Fin ajuste inventario
        '-------> Traer Documento Proveedor
        Dim pctimp As Double, pctdes  As Double
        
        If RS.State = 1 Then RS.Close
        RS.CursorLocation = adUseClient
        vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
        
'        RS1.Open "SELECT toc.toc_fecdig, toc.toc_fecrem, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, de.dec_numdoc, " & _
'                 "de.dec_codmer, de.dec_canmer, de.dec_precom, de.dec_pctdes, de.dec_numlin, " & _
'                 "de.dec_canrec, de.dec_prerec, de.dec_prefle, de.dec_rutpro, de.dec_tipdoc " & _
'                 "FROM b_totcompras toc, b_detcompras de, b_productos pro " & _
'                 "WHERE toc.toc_rutpro = de.dec_rutpro AND toc.toc_tipdoc=de.dec_tipdoc " & _
'                 "AND   toc.toc_numdoc = de.dec_numdoc AND de.dec_codmer=pro.pro_codigo " & _
'                 "AND   toc.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
'                 "AND   pro.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' " & _
'                 "AND   de.dec_mueinv = 'S' AND toc.toc_tipdoc <> 'SN' AND de.dec_canrec > 0 " & _
'                 "AND   toc.toc_fecrem > " & sql1 & " " & _
'                 "AND   toc.toc_fecrem <= " & sql2 & " " & _
'                 "ORDER BY toc.toc_fecdig, toc.toc_fecrem, pro.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        
        RS1.Open "SELECT toc.toc_fecdig, toc.toc_fecrem, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, de.dec_numdoc, " & _
                 "de.dec_codmer, de.dec_canmer, de.dec_precom, de.dec_pctdes, de.dec_numlin, " & _
                 "de.dec_canrec, de.dec_prerec, de.dec_prefle, de.dec_rutpro, de.dec_tipdoc " & _
                 "FROM b_totcompras toc, b_detcompras de, b_productos pro " & _
                 "WHERE toc.toc_rutpro = de.dec_rutpro AND toc.toc_tipdoc=de.dec_tipdoc " & _
                 "AND   toc.toc_numdoc = de.dec_numdoc AND de.dec_codmer=pro.pro_codigo " & _
                 "AND   toc.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                 "AND   pro.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' " & _
                 "AND   de.dec_mueinv = 'S' AND toc.toc_tipdoc in (select tdo_codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_IdCodigo <> 'SN') AND de.dec_canrec > 0 " & _
                 "AND   toc.toc_fecrem > " & sql1 & " " & _
                 "AND   toc.toc_fecrem <= " & sql2 & " " & _
                 "ORDER BY toc.toc_fecdig, toc.toc_fecrem, pro.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            
            pctimp = 0
            
            If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
            RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
            vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

            RS2.Open "SELECT b.imp_inccos, SUM(a.imd_monimp) AS imd_monimp " & _
                     "FROM  b_detcomprasimp a, a_impuesto b " & _
                     "WHERE a.imd_rutdoc = '" & RS1!dec_rutpro & "' " & _
                     "AND   a.imd_tipdoc = '" & RS1!dec_tipdoc & "' " & _
                     "AND   a.imd_numdoc = " & RS1!dec_numdoc & " " & _
                     "AND   a.imd_numlin = " & RS1!dec_numlin & " " & _
                     "AND   a.imd_codpro = '" & RS1!pro_codigo & "' " & _
                     "AND   a.imd_codimp = b.imp_codigo " & _
                     "AND   b.imp_inccos = 1  GROUP BY b.imp_inccos", vg_db, adOpenStatic
            
            If RS2.EOF Then RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing Else pctimp = RS2!imd_monimp: RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
            pctdes = 0
            tanali = 0
            If RS1!dec_pctdes > 0 Then pctdes = RS1!dec_pctdes
            
            Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
            Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!toc_fecrem, "yyyymmdd")
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Entrada"
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!dec_tipdoc)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dec_numdoc
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dec_canrec
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8
            
            If RS1!dec_prefle > 0 Then
               
               Preview.vaSpread1.text = ((RS1!dec_prerec) - (RS1!dec_prerec * (pctdes / 100)) + (pctimp / RS1!dec_canrec)) + (RS1!dec_prefle / RS1!dec_canrec)
            
            Else
               
               Preview.vaSpread1.text = ((RS1!dec_prerec) - (RS1!dec_prerec * (pctdes / 100)) + (pctimp / RS1!dec_canrec))
            
            End If
            
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9
            Preview.vaSpread1.text = "10"
            
            RS1.MoveNext
        
        Loop
        RS1.Close
        Set RS1 = Nothing
        '-------> Fin traer Documento Proveedor
        '-------> Traer documento traspaso entrada
        
        If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
        RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
        vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

        RS1.Open "SELECT tov.tov_fecemi, tov.tov_codser, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, tov.tov_numdoc, dev.dev_canmer, dev.dev_precos " & _
                 "FROM   b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro " & _
                 "WHERE  tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                 "AND    tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc AND dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                 "AND    tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND pro.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' " & _
                 "AND    tov.tov_tipdoc = 'TR' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
                 "AND    tov.tov_fecemi > " & sql1 & " " & _
                 "AND    tov.tov_fecemi <= " & sql2 & " AND dev.dev_mueinv = 'S' " & _
                 "ORDER BY tov.tov_fecemi, pro.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            
            Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
            Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!tov_fecemi, "yyyymmdd")
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
            
            If RS1!tov_codser = 1 Then
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Entrada"
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "20"
            
            Else
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Salida"
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "60"
            
            End If
            
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "TR"
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tov_numdoc
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_canmer
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_precos
            RS1.MoveNext
        
        Loop
        RS1.Close
        Set RS1 = Nothing
        
        '-------> Fin traer documento traspaso entrada
        '-------> Traer devoluciones de entrada y salida
        
        If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
        RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
        vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

        RS1.Open "SELECT tov.tov_fecpro, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, tov.tov_numdoc, tov.tov_tipdoc, dev.dev_canmer, dev.dev_precos " & _
                 "FROM b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro " & _
                 "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc AND dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                 "AND   pro.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' AND dev.dev_mueinv = 'S' " & _
                 "AND  (tov.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' OR tov.tov_tipdoc = 'DP') " & _
                 "AND   dev.dev_canmer <> 0 AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_fecpro > " & sql1 & " " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_fecpro <= " & sql2 & " " & _
                 "ORDER BY tov.tov_fecemi, pro.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            
            Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
            Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd")
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
            
            If RS1!tov_tipdoc = "SP" Then
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Salida"
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "40"
            
            Else
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Entrada"
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "50"
            
            End If
            
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!tov_tipdoc)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tov_numdoc
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_canmer
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_precos
            RS1.MoveNext
        
        Loop
        RS1.Close
        Set RS1 = Nothing
        
        '-------> Fin traer devoluciones de entrada y salida
        '-------> Traer Ventas Cafeterias
        If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
        RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
        vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

        RS1.Open "SELECT tvc.tvc_fecing, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, 0 as tvc_numdoc, 'VC' as tvc_tipdoc, dvp.dvp_candig, dvp.dvp_precos " & _
                 "FROM b_totventascaf tvc, b_detventascafpro dvp, b_productos pro " & _
                 "WHERE tvc.tvc_cencos = dvp.dvp_cencos " & _
                 "AND   tvc.tvc_fecing = dvp.dvp_fecing " & _
                 "AND   dvp.dvp_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                 "AND   tvc.tvc_fecing > " & sql1 & " " & _
                 "AND   tvc.tvc_fecing <= " & sql2 & " " & _
                 "AND   tvc.tvc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                 "AND   pro.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' AND pro.pro_ctrsto = 1 " & _
                 "AND   tvc.tvc_estado = 'C' AND dvp.dvp_candig <> 0 " & _
                 "ORDER BY tvc.tvc_fecing, pro.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            
            Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
            Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!tvc_fecing, "yyyymmdd")
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
            
            If RS1!tvc_tipdoc = "VC" Then
               
               Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Salida"
               Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "40"
            
            End If
            
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!tvc_tipdoc)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = IIf(RS1!tvc_numdoc = 0, "", RS1!tvc_numdoc)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dvp_candig
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dvp_precos
            RS1.MoveNext
        
        Loop
        RS1.Close
        Set RS1 = Nothing
        
        '-------> Fin traer Ventas Cafeterias
        '-------> Traer Mermas
        
        If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
        RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
        vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

        RS1.Open "SELECT tov.tov_fecemi, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, tov.tov_numdoc, tov.tov_tipdoc, dev.dev_canmer, dev.dev_precos " & _
                 "FROM  b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro " & _
                 "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc AND dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                 "AND   pro.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' AND tov.tov_tipdoc = 'ME' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_fecemi > " & sql1 & " " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_fecemi <= " & sql2 & " " & _
                 "ORDER BY tov.tov_fecemi, pro.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            
            Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
            Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!tov_fecemi, "yyyymmdd")
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Salida"
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "70"
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!tov_tipdoc)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tov_numdoc
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_canmer
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_precos
            RS1.MoveNext
        
        Loop
        RS1.Close
        Set RS1 = Nothing
        
        '-------> Fin traer Mermas
        '-------> Traer ventas directas

        If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
        RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
        vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
        
        RS1.Open "SELECT tov.tov_fecemi, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, tov.tov_numdoc, tov.tov_tipdoc, dev.dev_canmer, dev.dev_precos " & _
                 "FROM  b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro " & _
                 "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc AND dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND pro.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' " & _
                 "AND  (tov.tov_tipdoc = 'FA' OR tov.tov_tipdoc = 'FE' or tov.tov_tipdoc = 'GD') AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' AND dev.dev_mueinv = 'S' " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_fecemi > " & sql1 & " " & _
                 "AND   tov.tov_fecemi <= " & sql2 & " " & _
                 "ORDER BY tov.tov_fecemi, pro.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            
            Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
            Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!tov_fecemi, "yyyymmdd")
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Salida"
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "80"
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!tov_tipdoc)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tov_numdoc
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_canmer
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_precos
            RS1.MoveNext
        
        Loop
        RS1.Close
        Set RS1 = Nothing
        '-------> Fin traer ventas directas
        
        Dim SortKeys, SortKeyOrder As Variant
        SortKeys = Array(1, 2, 9, 6)
        SortKeyOrder = Array(1, 1, 1, 1)
        
        '-------> Sort data in first five columns and rows by column 1 and 3
        Preview.vaSpread1.Sort 1, 1, Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols, Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows, SS_SORT_BY_ROW, SortKeys, SortKeyOrder
        
        Dim CosMov As Double, CanMov As Double, canbod As Double, pmp As Long, FecMov As Long, tipdoc As String
        Dim PCosMov As Double, PCanMov As Double
        Dim SBod As Double, SMov As Double
        
        tipdoc = ""
        FecMov = 0
        CosMov = 0
        CanMov = 0
        canbod = 0
        pmp = 0
        PCosMov = 0
        PCanMov = 0
        
        i = 1
        Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: CanMov = Val(Preview.vaSpread1.Value)
        Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4
        
        If Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows > 1 Or (Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = 1 And Trim(Preview.vaSpread1.text) <> "Inventario Inicial") Or CanMov <> 0 Then
            
            .StartTable
            .TableCell(tcCols) = 9: .TableCell(tcRows) = (Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 2) '10000
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 700: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
            Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 1
            .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True: .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 2) = 9
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(Preview.vaSpread1.text)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(Preview.vaSpread1.text)
            i = i + 1
            
            For j = 1 To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.Row = j
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: FecMov = Val(Preview.vaSpread1.Value)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: tipdoc = Trim(Preview.vaSpread1.text)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: CanMov = Val(Preview.vaSpread1.Value)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: CosMov = Val(Preview.vaSpread1.Value)
                
                If tipdoc = "Inventario Inicial" Then
                    
                    canbod = CanMov
                    pmp = CosMov
                
                Else
                    
                    If tipdoc = "Entrada" Or tipdoc = "Ajuste Inventario (+)" Then
                       
                       canbod = canbod + CanMov
                    
                    ElseIf tipdoc = "Salida" Or tipdoc = "Ajuste Inventario (-)" Then
                       
                       canbod = canbod - CanMov
                    
                    End If
                    
                    'PMP = ((canpro * IIf(canbod < 0, (canbod * -1), canbod)) + (cosmov * canmov)) / (IIf(canbod < 0, (canbod * -1), canbod) + canmov)
                    SBod = IIf(canbod < 0, 0, canbod)
                    SMov = IIf(CanMov < 0, 0, CanMov)
                    
                    If (SMov + SBod) = 0 Then
                        
                        pmp = CosMov
                    
                    Else
                        
                        pmp = ((SMov * CosMov) + (SBod * pmp)) / (SMov + SBod)
                    End If
                
                End If
                
                If (FecMov >= fecini And FecMov <= fecfin) Or tipdoc = "Inventario Inicial" Then
                    
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Mid(Preview.vaSpread1.text, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(Preview.vaSpread1.text, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(Preview.vaSpread1.text, 1, 4)
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Preview.vaSpread1.text
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Preview.vaSpread1.text
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Preview.vaSpread1.text
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(Preview.vaSpread1.text, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(Preview.vaSpread1.text, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(canbod, fg_Pict(6, 2))
'                    .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format((canbod * PMP), fg_Pict(6, 2))
'                    .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format(PMP, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    i = i + 1
                
                End If
             
             Next j
'            ValidaBod 1, codpro
'            vg_db.Execute "update b_bodegas set bod_canmer=" & canbod & " where bod_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " and bod_codpro='" & codpro & "'"
            
            .TableCell(tcRows) = i: .TableBorder = tbNone: .EndTable
        
        End If
        RS3.MoveNext
        DoEvents
        
    Loop
    RS3.Close
    Set RS3 = Nothing
    I_FicSto.fpayuda(1).Visible = False
    fg_descarga
    .EndDoc
    '-------> Borrar tablas temporales
    If Trim(aAp) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp & ""
    
End With
Preview.Show 1

Exit Function
Error_FicStock:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Exit Function

End Function

Public Function I_CierrePeriodo(cencos As String)
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_PeriodoCierre
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Calendario de Cierre de Mes"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Calendario de Cierre de Mes"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: fg_descarga: Exit Function
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Trim(RS1!cli_codigo) & " - " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_cierreperiodo WHERE cie_cencos='" & cencos & "' ORDER BY cie_periodo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: fg_descarga: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Periodo"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Inicio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Final"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Estado"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    i = 1
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Meses("01/" & Mid(RS1!cie_periodo, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!cie_periodo, 1, 4)) & "/" & Mid(RS1!cie_periodo, 1, 4)
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Mid(RS1!cie_fecini, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!cie_fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!cie_fecini, 1, 4)
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Mid(RS1!cie_fecter, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!cie_fecter, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!cie_fecter, 1, 4)
            If RS1!cie_estado = 0 Then
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Cerrado"
            ElseIf RS1!cie_estado = 1 Then
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Abierto"
            Else
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Inhalitado"
            End If
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4)
            RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
        Loop
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_PeriodoCierre:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_CFCCierre(cencos As String, fecper As Long)

Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
Dim totali As Double, totdes As Double, totgrl As Double, pctimp As Double
Dim tfpali As Double, tfpdes As Double, tfpgrl As Double, pctdes As Double
Dim tgdali As Double, tgddes As Double, tgdgrl As Double
Dim tscali As Double, tscdes As Double, tscgrl As Double
Dim tncali As Double, tncdes As Double, tncgrl As Double
Dim fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String, sql4 As String
Dim est As Boolean
Dim cLin As String

On Local Error GoTo Error_CFCCierre

fg_carga ""
'-------> Mover del periodo
fecini = 0
fecfin = 0

If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT cie_fecini, cie_fecter FROM b_cierreperiodo WHERE cie_cencos='" & cencos & "' AND cie_periodo=" & fecper & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
If Not RS1.EOF Then fecini = RS1!cie_fecini: fecfin = RS1!cie_fecter Else fecini = 0: fecfin = 0
RS1.Close
Set RS1 = Nothing

MsgTitulo = "Informe CFC Cierre de Mes"
Preview.Refresh

With Preview.VSPrinter
     
     vg_reporte = dir_trabajo_Inf & "CFCCIERREMES" & cencos & Format(Date, "yyyymm") & ".rtf"
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & vg_reporte
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    .HdrFontBold = False
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||Fecha : " & Format(Date, "dd/mm/yyyy")
    .Footer = fg_ponepiepagina & " Contrato : " & RS1!cli_nombre & " " & (RS1!cli_codigo) & "|VºBº ADC_______________________________________________|Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    nomcli = RS1!cli_nombre
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .FontSize = 8
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    If fecini > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Control Facturas Compras (Cierre de Mes) " & "Mes : " & Meses("01/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecini, 8), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecini, 8), 1, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecini, 8), 1, 4)
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 3, 1) = taLeftMiddle: .TableCell(tcFontSize, 3) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = Trim(nomcli) & "(" & Trim(cencos) & ")"
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 3, 2) = taLeftMiddle: .TableCell(tcFontSize, 3) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = ""
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 4, 1) = taLeftMiddle: .TableCell(tcFontSize, 4) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 4) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) = "Periodo : " & Mid(fecini, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4) & " al " & Mid(fecfin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 1, 4)
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 4, 2) = taLeftMiddle: .TableCell(tcFontSize, 4) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 4) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2) = ""
    
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|||||||" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    i = 1
    tfpali = 0
    tfpdes = 0
    tfpgrl = 0
    totali = 0
    totdes = 0
    totgrl = 0
    pctdes = 0
    tgdali = 0
    tgddes = 0
    tgdgrl = 0
    tscali = 0
    tscdes = 0
    tscgrl = 0
    tncali = 0
    tncdes = 0
    tncgrl = 0
    
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDATE('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDATE('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

    '-------> Traer compras mes actual (Facturas-Facturas Provisionada-Nota Debito-Nota Credito)
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.dec_rutpro, b.dec_tipdoc, b.dec_numdoc, " & _
             "b.dec_numlin, b.dec_codmer, b.dec_canmer, b.dec_precom, b.dec_ptotal, " & _
             "b.dec_pctdes, b.dec_canrec, b.dec_prerec, b.dec_prefle, c.pro_ctacon, c.pro_ctrsto, " & _
             "d.prv_nombre, b.dec_mueinv, a.toc_docaso, a.toc_fecrem " & _
             "FROM  b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c, b_proveedor d " & _
             "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
             "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
             "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.dec_rutpro = d.prv_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.toc_tipinf IN ('C','P') AND a.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND  (a.toc_tipdoc in (select tdo_Codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_idCodigo in ('FA','FE','NC','CE','ND','DE'))) " & _
             "AND   a.toc_fecrem >= " & sql1 & " " & _
             "AND   a.toc_fecrem <= " & sql2 & " " & _
             "ORDER BY b.dec_rutpro, b.dec_numdoc, c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          pctimp = 0
          '------- Traer Impuesto adicionales
          
          If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
          RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

          RS2.Open "SELECT  b.imp_inccos, SUM(a.imd_monimp) AS imd_monimp " & _
                   "FROM b_detcomprasimp a, a_impuesto b " & _
                   "WHERE a.imd_rutdoc = '" & RS1!dec_rutpro & "' " & _
                   "AND   a.imd_tipdoc = '" & RS1!dec_tipdoc & "' " & _
                   "AND   a.imd_numdoc = " & RS1!dec_numdoc & " " & _
                   "AND   a.imd_numlin = " & RS1!dec_numlin & " " & _
                   "AND   a.imd_codpro = '" & RS1!dec_codmer & "' " & _
                   "AND   a.imd_codimp = b.imp_codigo " & _
                   "AND   b.imp_inccos = 1 GROUP BY b.imp_inccos", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If RS2.EOF Then RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing Else pctimp = RS2!imd_monimp: RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          '------- Fin traer Impuesto adicionales
          pctdes = 0
          If RS1!dec_pctdes > 0 Then pctdes = RS1!dec_pctdes
          If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             totali = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "DE", Round(totali + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DCa), Round(totali - (RS1!dec_prefle + (RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr)) 'vg_DCa))
             
             If (fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FE") And Trim(RS1!toc_docaso) <> "" Then
                
                tfpali = Round(tfpali + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             End If
             
             If (fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "NC" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "CE") Then
                
                tncali = Round(tncali + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             End If
          
          ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             totdes = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "DE", Round(totdes + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DCa), Round(totdes - (RS1!dec_prefle + (RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr)) 'vg_DCa))
             
             If (fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FE") And Trim(RS1!toc_docaso) <> "" Then tfpdes = Round(tfpdes + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_dpre) 'vg_DCa)
             
             If fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "NC" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "CE" Then tncdes = Round(tncdes + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
          
          ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon <> (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) And RS1!pro_ctacon <> (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
             
             totgrl = IIf(fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FE" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "ND" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "DE", Round(totgrl + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DCa), Round(totgrl - (RS1!dec_prefle + (RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr)) 'vg_DCa))
             
             If (fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FA" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "FE") And Trim(RS1!toc_docaso) <> "" Then tfpgrl = Round(tfpgrl + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             If fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "NC" Or fg_TraerRelacionTipoDocumento(RS1!dec_tipdoc) = "CE" Then tncgrl = Round(tncgrl + RS1!dec_prefle + ((RS1!dec_ptotal) - ((RS1!dec_ptotal) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
          
          End If
          
          RS1.MoveNext
       
       Loop
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    '-------> Fin traer compras mes actual (Facturas-Facturas Provisionada-Nota Debito-Nota Credito)
    
    '-------> Traer información del mes
    Dim tgdmesactali As Double, tgdmesactdes As Double, tgdmesactgrl As Double, tgdmesantali As Double, tgdmesantdes As Double, tgdmesantgrl As Double
    Dim tsncmesactali As Double, tsncmesactdes As Double, tsncmesactgrl As Double, tsncmesantali As Double, tsncmesantdes As Double, tsncmesantgrl As Double
    est = False
    tgdmesactali = 0
    tgdmesactdes = 0
    tgdmesactgrl = 0
    tgdmesantali = 0
    tgdmesantdes = 0
    tgdmesantgrl = 0
    
    If fecini > 0 Then
       
       If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
       RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

       RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_cierreperiodo WHERE cie_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND cie_periodo = " & Format(dEoM(CDate("01/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4))), "yyyymm") & " AND cie_estado = 0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS1.EOF Then
          
          est = True
          tgdmesactali = RS1!cie_gdpenmesali: tgdmesactdes = RS1!cie_gdpenmesdes: tgdmesactgrl = RS1!cie_gdpenmesgrl: tgdmesantali = RS1!cie_gdpenmesantali: tgdmesantdes = RS1!cie_gdpenmesantdes: tgdmesantgrl = RS1!cie_gdpenmesantgrl
          tsncmesactali = RS1!cie_sncpenmesali: tsncmesactdes = cie_sncpenmesdes: tsncmesactgrl = RS1!cie_sncpenmesgrl: tsncmesantali = RS1!cie_sncpenmesantali: tsncmesantdes = RS1!cie_sncpenmesantdes: tsncmesantgrl = RS1!cie_sncpenmesantgrl
       
       End If
       
       RS1.Close
       Set RS1 = Nothing
       
    End If
    
    '-------> Fin traer información del mes
    
    If Not est Then
       
       '-------> Traer guías pendientes del mes
       sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDATE('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
       sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDATE('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
       sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " trim(a.toc_docaso) ", " ltrim(a.toc_docaso) ")
       
       If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
       RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       
       RS1.Open "SELECT b.dec_canmer, b.dec_precom, b.dec_pctdes, " & _
                "b.dec_canrec, b.dec_prerec, b.dec_ptotrec, c.pro_ctacon, c.pro_ctrsto " & _
                "FROM  b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c " & _
                "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
                "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
                "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
                "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
                "AND   a.toc_tipinf IN ('C','P') " & _
                "AND   a.toc_tipdoc in (select tdo_Codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_idCodigo = 'GD') AND a.toc_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " " & _
                "AND   a.toc_fecrem >= " & sql1 & " " & _
                "AND   a.toc_fecrem <= " & sql2 & " " & _
                "AND  (" & sql3 & " = '' or (a.toc_docaso) IS NULL) order by c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       
       If Not RS1.EOF Then
          
          Do While Not RS1.EOF
             
             pctdes = 0
             If RS1!dec_pctdes > 0 Then pctdes = RS1!dec_pctdes
             
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                tgdmesactali = Round(tgdmesactali + (RS1!dec_ptotrec) - ((RS1!dec_ptotrec) * (pctdes / 100)), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                tgdmesactdes = Round(tgdmesactdes + ((RS1!dec_ptotrec) - ((RS1!dec_ptotrec) * (pctdes / 100))), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon <> (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) And RS1!pro_ctacon <> (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                tgdmesactgrl = Round(tgdmesactgrl + ((RS1!dec_ptotrec) - ((RS1!dec_ptotrec) * (pctdes / 100))), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             End If
             RS1.MoveNext
          
          Loop
       
       End If
       RS1.Close
       Set RS1 = Nothing
       '-------> Fin traer guías pendientes del mes
    
       '-------> Traer guías pendientes del meses anteriores
       sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDATE('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
       sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " trim(a.toc_docaso) ", " ltrim(a.toc_docaso) ")
       
       If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
       RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

       RS1.Open "SELECT b.dec_canmer, b.dec_precom, b.dec_pctdes, " & _
                "b.dec_canrec, b.dec_prerec, b.dec_ptotrec, c.pro_ctacon, c.pro_ctrsto " & _
                "FROM  b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c " & _
                "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
                "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
                "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
                "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
                "AND   a.toc_tipinf IN ('C','P') " & _
                "AND   a.toc_tipdoc in (select tdo_Codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_idCodigo = 'GD') AND a.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                "AND   a.toc_fecrem < " & sql1 & " " & _
                "AND  (" & sql2 & " = '' OR (a.toc_docaso) IS NULL) ORDER BY c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS1.EOF Then
          
          Do While Not RS1.EOF
             
             pctdes = 0
             
             If RS1!dec_pctdes > 0 Then pctdes = RS1!dec_pctdes
             
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                tgdmesantali = Round(tgdmesantali + (RS1!dec_ptotrec) - ((RS1!dec_ptotrec) * (pctdes / 100)), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                tgdmesantdes = Round(tgdmesantdes + ((RS1!dec_ptotrec) - ((RS1!dec_ptotrec) * (pctdes / 100))), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon <> (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) And RS1!pro_ctacon <> (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                tgdmesantgrl = Round(tgdmesantgrl + ((RS1!dec_ptotrec) - ((RS1!dec_ptotrec) * (pctdes / 100))), vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             End If
             RS1.MoveNext
          
          Loop
       
       End If
       
       RS1.Close
       Set RS1 = Nothing
       '-------> Fin traer guías pendientes del meses anteriores
    
       '-------> Traer solicitud nota creditos pendientes mes actual
       sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDATE('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
       sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDATE('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
       sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " TRIM(a.toc_docaso) ", " LTRIM(a.toc_docaso) ")
       sql4 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " TRIM(a.toc_docsnc) ", " LTRIM(a.toc_docsnc) ")
       
       If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
       RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

'       RS1.Open "SELECT b.dec_rutpro, b.dec_tipdoc, b.dec_numdoc, b.dec_numlin, b.dec_canmer, " & _
'                "b.dec_precom, b.dec_ptotal, b.dec_pctdes, b.dec_codmer, b.dec_canrec, b.dec_prerec, b.dec_ptotrec, c.pro_ctacon, c.pro_ctrsto " & _
'                "FROM  b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c " & _
'                "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
'                "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
'                "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
'                "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
'                "AND   a.toc_fecrem >= " & sql1 & " " & _
'                "AND   a.toc_fecrem <= " & sql2 & " " & _
'                "AND   b.dec_prerec > 0 " & _
'                "AND   a.toc_tipinf IN ('C','P') AND a.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
'                "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = 'SN' AND  (" & sql3 & " = '' OR " & sql4 & " = '' OR (a.toc_docsnc) IS NULL) " & _
'                "ORDER BY c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       
       RS1.Open "SELECT b.dec_rutpro, b.dec_tipdoc, b.dec_numdoc, b.dec_numlin, b.dec_canmer, " & _
                "b.dec_precom, b.dec_ptotal, b.dec_pctdes, b.dec_codmer, b.dec_canrec, b.dec_prerec, b.dec_ptotrec, c.pro_ctacon, c.pro_ctrsto " & _
                "FROM  b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c " & _
                "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
                "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
                "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
                "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
                "AND   a.toc_fecrem >= " & sql1 & " " & _
                "AND   a.toc_fecrem <= " & sql2 & " " & _
                "AND   b.dec_prerec > 0 " & _
                "AND   a.toc_tipinf IN ('C','P') AND a.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                "AND   a.toc_tipdoc in (select tdo_codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_IdCodigo = 'SN') AND  (" & sql3 & " = '' OR " & sql4 & " = '' OR (a.toc_docsnc) IS NULL) " & _
                "ORDER BY c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       
       If Not RS1.EOF Then
          
          Do While Not RS1.EOF
             
             pctimp = 0
             
              If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
              RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
              vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

             '-------> Traer Impuesto adicionales
              RS2.Open "SELECT b.imp_inccos, SUM(a.imd_monimp) AS imd_monimp " & _
                      "FROM b_detcomprasimp a, a_impuesto b " & _
                      "WHERE a.imd_rutdoc = '" & RS1!dec_rutpro & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.imd_tipdoc = '" & RS1!dec_tipdoc & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.imd_numdoc = " & RS1!dec_numdoc & " " & _
                      "AND   a.imd_numlin = " & RS1!dec_numlin & " " & _
                      "AND   a.imd_codpro = '" & RS1!dec_codmer & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.imd_codimp = b.imp_codigo " & _
                      "AND   b.imp_inccos = 1 GROUP BY b.imp_inccos", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If RS2.EOF Then RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing Else pctimp = RS2!imd_monimp: RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
             '-------> Fin traer Impuesto adicionales
             pctdes = 0
             If RS1!dec_pctdes > 0 Then pctdes = RS1!dec_pctdes
             
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                tsncmesactali = Round(tsncmesactali + ((RS1!dec_ptotal - RS1!dec_ptotrec)) - (((RS1!dec_ptotal - RS1!dec_ptotrec)) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                tsncmesactdes = Round(tsncmesactdes + ((RS1!dec_ptotal - RS1!dec_ptotrec)) - (((RS1!dec_ptotal - RS1!dec_ptotrec)) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon <> (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) And RS1!pro_ctacon <> (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                tsncmesactgrl = Round(tsncmesactgrl + (((RS1!dec_ptotal - RS1!dec_ptotrec)) - (((RS1!dec_ptotal - RS1!dec_ptotrec))) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             End If
             RS1.MoveNext
             
          Loop
          
       End If
       RS1.Close
       Set RS1 = Nothing
       '-------> Fin traer solicitud nota creditos pendientes mes actual
    
       '-------> Traer solicitud nota creditos pendientes meses anterioes
       sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDATE('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
       sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " trim(a.toc_docaso) ", " ltrim(a.toc_docaso) ")
       sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " trim(a.toc_docsnc) ", " ltrim(a.toc_docsnc) ")
       
       If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
       RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       
'       RS1.Open "SELECT b.dec_rutpro, b.dec_tipdoc, b.dec_numdoc, b.dec_numlin, b.dec_canmer, " & _
'                "b.dec_precom, b.dec_ptotal, b.dec_pctdes, b.dec_codmer, b.dec_canrec, b.dec_prerec, b.dec_ptotrec, c.pro_ctacon, c.pro_ctrsto " & _
'                "FROM  b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c " & _
'                "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
'                "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
'                "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
'                "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
'                "AND   a.toc_fecrem < " & sql1 & " " & _
'                "AND   b.dec_prerec > 0 " & _
'                "AND   a.toc_tipinf IN ('C','P') AND a.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
'                "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = 'SN' AND (" & sql2 & " = '' OR " & sql3 & " = '' OR (a.toc_docsnc) IS NULL) " & _
'                "order by c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       
       RS1.Open "SELECT b.dec_rutpro, b.dec_tipdoc, b.dec_numdoc, b.dec_numlin, b.dec_canmer, " & _
                "b.dec_precom, b.dec_ptotal, b.dec_pctdes, b.dec_codmer, b.dec_canrec, b.dec_prerec, b.dec_ptotrec, c.pro_ctacon, c.pro_ctrsto " & _
                "FROM  b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c " & _
                "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
                "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
                "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
                "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
                "AND   a.toc_fecrem < " & sql1 & " " & _
                "AND   b.dec_prerec > 0 " & _
                "AND   a.toc_tipinf IN ('C','P') AND a.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                "AND   a.toc_tipdoc in (select tdo_codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_IdCodigo = 'SN') AND (" & sql2 & " = '' OR " & sql3 & " = '' OR (a.toc_docsnc) IS NULL) " & _
                "order by c.pro_ctacon", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       
       If Not RS1.EOF Then
          
          Do While Not RS1.EOF
             
             pctimp = 0
             '-------> Traer Impuesto adicionales
             
             If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
             RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
             vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
             
             RS2.Open "SELECT b.imp_inccos, SUM(a.imd_monimp) AS imd_monimp " & _
                      "FROM b_detcomprasimp a, a_impuesto b " & _
                      "WHERE a.imd_rutdoc = '" & RS1!dec_rutpro & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.imd_tipdoc = '" & RS1!dec_tipdoc & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.imd_numdoc = " & RS1!dec_numdoc & " " & _
                      "AND   a.imd_numlin = " & RS1!dec_numlin & " " & _
                      "AND   a.imd_codpro = '" & RS1!dec_codmer & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.imd_codimp = b.imp_codigo " & _
                      "AND   b.imp_inccos = 1 GROUP BY b.imp_inccos", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If RS2.EOF Then RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing Else pctimp = RS2!imd_monimp: RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
             '-------> Fin traer Impuesto adicionales
             pctdes = 0
             
             If RS1!dec_pctdes > 0 Then pctdes = RS1!dec_pctdes
             
             If RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                tsncmesantali = Round(tsncmesantali + ((RS1!dec_ptotal - RS1!dec_ptotrec)) - (((RS1!dec_ptotal - RS1!dec_ptotrec)) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                tsncmesantdes = Round(tsncmesantdes + ((RS1!dec_ptotal - RS1!dec_ptotrec)) - (((RS1!dec_ptotal - RS1!dec_ptotrec)) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             ElseIf RS1!pro_ctacon <> (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) And RS1!pro_ctacon <> (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) Then
                
                tsncmesantgrl = Round(tsncmesantgrl + ((RS1!dec_ptotal - RS1!dec_ptotrec)) - (((RS1!dec_ptotal - RS1!dec_ptotrec)) * (pctdes / 100)) + pctimp, vg_DPr) 'vg_DCa)
             
             End If
             RS1.MoveNext
          
          Loop
          
       End If
       
       RS1.Close
       Set RS1 = Nothing
       tsncmesantali = (tsncmesantali) * -1: tsncmesantdes = (tsncmesantdes) * -1: tsncmesantgrl = (tsncmesantgrl * -1)
       '-------> Fin traer solicitud nota creditos pendientes meses anteriores
    
    End If
    
    '-------> Traer información de un mes anterior
    Dim proantali As Double, proantdes As Double, proantgrl As Double
    proantali = 0
    proantdes = 0
    proantgrl = 0
    If fecini > 0 Then
       
       If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
       RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       
       RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_cierreperiodo WHERE cie_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND cie_periodo = " & Format(dEoM(CDate("01/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)) - 1), "yyyymm") & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS1.EOF Then proantali = RS1!cie_proantali: proantdes = RS1!cie_proantdes: proantgrl = RS1!cie_proantgrl
       RS1.Close
       Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    End If
    '-------> Fin traer información de un mes anterior
    
    i = 1
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 5200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    
    '-------> Alimentos & Bebidas
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "GRUPO ALIMENTOS & BEBIDAS"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
    i = i + 2
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL DE FACTURAS"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round(totali), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "REVERSO DE LA PROVISION"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(proantali, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "PROVISION PENDIENTE"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round(tgdmesantali + tsncmesantali), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "GUIAS PENDIENTES MES ACTUAL"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(tgdmesactali, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "NOTAS DE CREDITOS PENDIENTES"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format((tsncmesactali * -1), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL PROVISION"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round((tgdmesantali + tsncmesantali) + (tgdmesactali - tsncmesactali)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL GASTOS"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round(totali) + (proantali) + ((tgdmesantali + tsncmesantali) + (tgdmesactali - tsncmesactali)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    
    '-------> Gastos Generales
    i = i + 2
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "GRUPO GASTOS GENERALES"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
    i = i + 2
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL DE FACTURAS"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round(totgrl), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "REVERSO DE LA PROVISION"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(proantgrl, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "PROVISION PENDIENTE"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round(tgdmesantgrl + tsncmesantgrl), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "GUIAS PENDIENTES MES ACTUAL"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(tgdmesactgrl, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "NOTA DE CREDITO PENDIENTE"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format((tsncmesactgrl * -1), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL PROVISION"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round((tgdmesantgrl + tsncmesantgrl) + (tgdmesactgrl - tsncmesactgrl)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL GASTOS"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round(totgrl) + (proantgrl) + ((tgdmesantgrl + tsncmesantgrl) + (tgdmesactgrl - tsncmesactgrl)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    
    '-------> Limpieza & Desechable
    i = i + 2
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "GRUPO LIMPIEZA & DESECHABLE"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
    i = i + 2
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL DE FACTURAS"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round(totdes), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "REVERSO DE LA PROVISION"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(proantdes, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "PROVISION PENDIENTE"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round(tgdmesantdes + tsncmesantdes), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "GUIAS PENDIENTES MES ACTUAL"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(tgdmesactdes, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "NOTA DE CREDITO PENDIENTE"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format((tsncmesactdes * -1), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL PROVISION"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round((tgdmesantdes + tsncmesantdes) + (tgdmesactdes - tsncmesactdes)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL GASTOS"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round(totdes) + (proantdes) + ((tgdmesantdes + tsncmesantdes) + (tgdmesactdes - tsncmesactdes)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    
    '-------> Totales
    i = i + 2: i = i + 2
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL DE FACTURAS"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round(totali + totgrl + totdes), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL REVERSO DE LA PROVISION"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round(proantali + proantgrl + proantdes), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL PROVISION PENDIENTE"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round(tgdmesantali + tsncmesantali + tgdmesantgrl + tsncmesantgrl + tgdmesantdes + tsncmesantdes), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL GUIAS PENDIENTE MES ACTUAL"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round(tgdmesactali + tgdmesactgrl + tgdmesactdes), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL NOTA DE CREDITO PENDIENTE"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round((tsncmesactali + tsncmesactgrl + tsncmesactdes) * -1), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL PROVISION"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round((tgdmesantali + tsncmesantali) + (tgdmesactali - tsncmesactali) + (tgdmesantgrl + tsncmesantgrl) + (tgdmesactgrl - tsncmesactgrl) + (tgdmesantdes + tsncmesantdes) + (tgdmesactdes - tsncmesactdes)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TOTAL GASTOS"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(Round(totali) + (proantali) + ((tgdmesantali + tsncmesantali) + (tgdmesactali - tsncmesactali) + (totgrl) + (proantgrl) + ((tgdmesantgrl + tsncmesantgrl) + (tgdmesactgrl - tsncmesactgrl) + (totdes + tfpdes) + (proantdes) + ((tgdmesantdes + tsncmesantdes) + (tgdmesactdes - tsncmesactdes)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
    
End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1

Exit Function
Error_CFCCierre:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & "|" & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function

End Function

Public Function I_RA13B(cencos As String, fecper As Long, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tgrval As Double, cmeali As Double, cmedes As Double, tosali As Double, tosdes As Double, ajuali As Double, ajudes As Double, todali As Double, toddes As Double, infali As Double, infdes As Double, cosans As Double, cosdns As Double, X As Long, y As Long, opppto As Boolean, opproy As Boolean, nArch As String, crenal As Double, cennde As Double, opcosban As Boolean, ctogas As Double, totdep As Double, totgas As Double, vTUtili As Double, totuti As Double, tocope As Double, iniali As Double, inides As Double, cosalc As Double, cosalf As Double, cosdec As Double, cosdef As Double, crecal As Double, crecde As Double, cemtal As Double, cemtde As Double, totven As Double, totcaf As Double, tomali As Double, tomdes As Double, CostoFleteInsumo As Double, CosLog As Double, TotalVentaServiciosEspeciales As Double _
, TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial As Double, TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial As Double, TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial As Double, TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial As Double)

On Local Error GoTo Error_RA13B

Dim RS1 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim RS2 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim auxreg As Long, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String

With Preview.VSPrinter
    
    '-------> imprimir ventas
    .CurrentX = X: .CurrentY = y
    .MarginLeft = "0.9cm"
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 1) = 4: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "VENTAS"
    .TableBorder = tbNone: .EndTable: .text = Chr(13)
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 3340: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 610: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 810: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    
    i = 1
    
    If TotalVentaServiciosEspeciales > 0 Then
    
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Ventas Servicios Especiales"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(TotalVentaServiciosEspeciales, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       i = i + 1
    
    End If
    
    If totven > 0 Then
       
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Ventas al contado"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(totven, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       i = i + 1
    
    End If
    
    '-------> Fim imprimir ventas
    For j = 1 To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
        
        Preview.vaSpread1.Row = j
        Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9
        
        If Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Traer ventas directas" Then
           
           Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Preview.vaSpread1.text
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
           Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Preview.vaSpread1.text, fg_Pict(6, 0))
           i = i + 1
        
        Else
           
           Exit For
        
        End If
    
    Next j
    
    If totcaf <> 0 Then
       
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Ventas cafetería"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(totcaf, fg_Pict(6, 0))
        i = i + 1
    
    End If
    .TableCell(tcRows) = IIf(i - 1 <= 0, 1, (i - 1))
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable: '.text = Chr(13)
    '-------> Fin traer ventas cafetería
    
    '-------> Impirmir Nº racion x precio venta
    i = 1
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 3340: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 610: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 810: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, "", "Cant."): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, "", "P. Vta."): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Total"
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i: .TableBorder = tbNone: .EndTable
    
    i = 1
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 3340: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 610: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 810: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Preview.vaSpread1.text: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
    For j = j To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
        Preview.vaSpread1.Row = j
        Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: auxreg = Val(Preview.vaSpread1.text)
        Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9
        If Preview.vaSpread1.text = "numero raciones" And Val(auxreg) = 0 Then
           Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Preview.vaSpread1.text: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
           i = i + 1
        ElseIf Preview.vaSpread1.text = "numero raciones" Then
           Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Preview.vaSpread1.text
           Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, "", Format(Preview.vaSpread1.text, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
           Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(Preview.vaSpread1.text, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Preview.vaSpread1.text, fg_Pict(6, 0))
           i = i + 1
        Else
           Exit For
        End If
    Next j
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(tgrval, fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable: .text = Chr(13)
    
    '-------> Imprimir detalle de insumo
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "INSUMOS": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Alimentos": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Lim.-Des.": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "TOTAL": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "%": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True
    .TableBorder = tbNone: .EndTable

    i = 1
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop

    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Inventario Inicial"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(iniali, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(inides, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(iniali + inides, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((iniali + inides) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Centralización Compras"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(cosalc, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(cosdec, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(cosalc + cosdec, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((cosalc + cosdec) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Compras Fofi"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(cosalf, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(cosdef, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(cosalf + cosdef, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((cosalf + cosdef) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Compras No Estoqueable"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(cosans, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(cosdns, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(cosans + cosdns, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((cosans + cosdns) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Traspasos recibido"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(crecal, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(crecde, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(crecal + crecde, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)) 'vg_DCa), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((crecal + crecde) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Costo Logistico"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(CosLog, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(CosLog, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)) 'vg_DCa), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((CosLog) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
        
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Traspasos emitidos"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "(" & Format(cemtal, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "(" & Format(cemtde, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "(" & Format(Round(cemtal + cemtde, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")" 'vg_DCa), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((cemtal + cemtde) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Traspaso Prod. Term."
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(crenal > 1, "", "(") & Format((crenal * -1), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & IIf(crenal > 1, "", ")")
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(cennde > 1, "", "(") & Format((cennde * -1), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & IIf(cennde > 1, "", ")")
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf((crenal + cennde) > 1, "", "(") & Format(Round((crenal + cennde) * -1, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & IIf((crenal + cennde) > 1, "", ")") 'vg_DCa), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & IIf((crenal + cennde) > 1, "", ")")
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(((((crenal + cennde) * -1) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Mermas"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "(" & Format(cmeali, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "(" & Format(cmedes, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "(" & Format(Round(cmeali + cmedes, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((cmeali + cmedes) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Salida Producción"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "(" & Format(tosali + TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "( " & Format(tosdes + TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "(" & Format(Round(tosali + TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial + tosdes + TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((tosali + TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial + tosdes + TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Devolución Producción"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(todali + TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(toddes + TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(todali + TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial + toddes + TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((todali + TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial + toddes + TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Ajuste Inventario "
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
    
    If ajuali <> 0 Or ajudes <> 0 Then
       
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Ajuste Inventario"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(ajuali > 0, Format(ajuali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "(" & Format(Abs(ajuali), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(ajudes > 0, Format(ajudes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "(" & Format(Abs(ajudes), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf((ajuali + ajudes) > 0, Format(Round(ajuali + ajudes, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)), "(" & Format(Round(Abs(ajuali + ajudes), vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")")
       If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((Abs(ajuali + ajudes)) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    
    End If
    
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Toma Inventario "
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
    
    If tomali > 0 Or tomdes > 0 Then
         
         .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Toma Inventario"
         .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(tomali, fg_Pict(6, 0))
         .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(tomdes, fg_Pict(6, 0))
         .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(tomali + tomdes, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    
    End If
    
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((tomali + tomdes) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    '------- Fin imprimir detalle de insumo
    
    '------- % Relación salida producción & devolución
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "F.Cost (Sal. & Dev.)"
    
    If tgrval > 0 Then
       
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Format((((tosali - todali) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format((((tosdes - toddes) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format(((tosali + tosdes) - (todali + toddes)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = Format(((((tosali + tosdes) - (todali + toddes)) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True
    
    End If
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    '------- Fin % relación salida producción & devolución
    
    '------- % Relación salida venta especiales & devolución (17/03/2021)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "F.Cost(Sal.&Dev. Ser.Esp.)"
    
    If tgrval > 0 Then
       
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Format((((TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial - TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format((((TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial - TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format(((TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial + TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial) - (TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial + TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
