       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = Format(((((TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial + TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial) - (TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial + TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial)) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True
    
    End If
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    '------- Fin % relación salida venta especiales & devolución
    
    '------- % Relación mermas
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "F.Cost (Merm. & Aju.)"
    ajuali = ajuali * -1: ajudes = ajudes * -1
    
    If tgrval > 0 Then
       
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Format((((cmeali + ajuali) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format((((cmedes + ajudes) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True:
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format(((cmeali + cmedes + ajuali + ajudes)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True:
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = Format((((cmeali + cmedes + ajuali + ajudes) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True
    
    End If
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    'Fin % relación mermas
    
    '------- % Traspasos productos terminos
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "F.Cost Tras.Prod.Term."
    If tgrval > 0 Then
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = IIf(crenal < 0, Format((((crenal) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%", Format((((crenal) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%")
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = IIf(cennde < 0, Format((((cennde) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%", Format((((cennde) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%")
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = IIf((crenal + cennde) < 0, Format(((crenal + cennde)), fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(((crenal + cennde)), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & "")
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = IIf((((crenal + cennde) / tgrval) * 100) < 0, Format((((crenal + cennde) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%", Format((((crenal + cennde) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%")
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True
    End If
    cennde = (cennde * -1): crenal = (crenal * -1)
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    '------- % Fin traspasos productos terminos
    
    '------- % Compras no estoqueables
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "F.Cost C. No Estoq."
    If tgrval > 0 Then
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Format((((cosans) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format((((cosdns) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format(((cosans + cosdns)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = Format((((cosans + cosdns) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True
    End If
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    '------- % Fin compras no estoqueables
    
    '------- % Flete Insumos 20130709
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "F.Cost Flete Insumo"
    If tgrval > 0 Then
       
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Format((((CostoFleteInsumo) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format(((0)), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format(((CostoFleteInsumo)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = Format((((CostoFleteInsumo) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True
    
    End If
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    '------- % Fin Fletes Insumos 20130709
    
    '------- % Total Food Cost
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "F.Cost Total"
    
    Dim vTFCost As Double, vTFCostP As Double
    
    vTFCost = 0
    
    If tgrval > 0 Then

      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Format((((CosLog + CostoFleteInsumo + cmeali + ajuali + tosali + TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial + cosans - todali - TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial - crenal) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format((((cmedes + ajudes + tosdes + TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial + cosdns - toddes - TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial - cennde) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format((((CosLog + CostoFleteInsumo + cmeali + cmedes + tosali + TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial + tosdes + TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial + ajuali + ajudes + cosans + cosdns - todali - TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial - toddes - TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial - (crenal + cennde)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = Format(((((CosLog + CostoFleteInsumo + cmeali + cmedes + tosali + TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial + tosdes + TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial + ajuali + ajudes + cosans + cosdns - todali - TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial - toddes - TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial - (crenal + cennde))) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True
    
    End If
    
    vTFCost = Round((((cmeali + cmedes + tosali + TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial + tosdes + TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial + ajuali + ajudes + cosans + cosdns - todali - TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial - toddes - TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial - (crenal + cennde)))), 0)
    If tgrval > 0 Then vTFCostP = Round(((((cmeali + cmedes + tosali + TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial + tosdes + TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial + ajuali + ajudes + cosans + cosdns - todali - TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial - toddes - TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial - (crenal + cennde))) / tgrval) * 100), 2)
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    '------- Fin % Food Cost
    
    .text = Chr(13)
    '------- Totales nominales
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Totales Nominales"
    If tgrval > 0 Then 'Inicio incluir costo flete insumo 20140114
    
          'TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial As Double, TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial As Double, TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial As Double, TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial As Double
      
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Format((((CosLog + CostoFleteInsumo + cmeali + ajuali + tosali + TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial + cosans - todali - TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial - crenal))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format((((cmedes + ajudes + tosdes + TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial + cosdns - toddes - TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial - cennde))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format((((CosLog + CostoFleteInsumo + cmeali + cmedes + tosali + TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial + tosdes + TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial + ajuali + ajudes + cosans + cosdns - todali - TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial - toddes - TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial - (crenal + cennde)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = Format(((((CosLog + CostoFleteInsumo + cmeali + cmedes + tosali + TotSalidaAlimentoVtaEspecial + tosdes + TotSalidaDesechableVtaEspecial + ajuali + ajudes + cosans + cosdns - todali - TotDevolucionAlimentoVtaEspecial - toddes - TotDevoluciondesechableVtaEspecial - (crenal + cennde))) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True
    
    End If 'Fin incluir costo flete insumo 20140114
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    '------- Fin totales nominales

    .text = Chr(13)
    '------- Número días stock
    Dim totinv As Double, totsal5 As Double, totmer As Double, totaju As Double
    totinv = 0: totsal5 = 0: totmer = 0: totaju = 0
    '-------> Calcular stock ultimo 3 meses
'    totinv = totinv + TraerStock(vg_codbod, Format(BoM(fg_Ctod1(fecini)), "yyyymmdd"))
'    totinv = totinv + TraerStock(vg_codbod, fecini)
    totinv = totinv + tomali + tomdes
    '-------> Calcular Salidas Ultimos 3 meses
    totsal5 = TraerDocumentoSalida(vg_codbod, Format(BoM(BoM(fg_Ctod1(fecini))), "yyyymmdd"), fecfin, " a.tov_tipdoc IN ('SP') ", " a.tov_fecpro ", "1")
    '-------> Calcular Ventas Cafeteria Ultimos 3 meses
    totsal5 = totsal5 + TraerDocumentoSalida(vg_codbod, Format(BoM(BoM(fg_Ctod1(fecini))), "yyyymmdd"), fecfin, "", "", "3")
    '-------> Calcular Mermas Ultimos 3 meses
    totmer = TraerDocumentoSalida(vg_codbod, Format(BoM(BoM(fg_Ctod1(fecini))), "yyyymmdd"), fecfin, " a.tov_tipdoc IN ('ME') ", " a.tov_fecemi ", "1")
    '-------> Calcular Ajuste Ultimos 3 Meses
    totaju = TraerDocumentoSalida(vg_codbod, Format(BoM(BoM(fg_Ctod1(fecini))), "yyyymmdd"), fecfin, " a.tov_tipdoc IN ('AI') ", " a.tov_fecemi ", "2")
    ndiast = Val(Mid(dEoM(Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecini, 2), 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)), 1, 2))
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 4) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Nº de días Trabajados"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format(Round(ndiast, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Nº de días de Stock"
    If totsal5 > 0 Or totmer > 0 Or totaju > 0 Then
' .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = Format((totinv / (totsal5 + totmer + ((totaju) * -1))) * 90, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       
       .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = Format((totinv) / ((totsal5 + totmer + ((totaju) * -1)) / 90), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    
    Else
       
       .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = 0
    
    End If
'    If (infali > 0 Or infdes > 0) And ((tosali + tosdes) - (todali + toddes)) > 0 Then
'        .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = Format(Round((infali + infdes) / (((tosali + tosdes) - (todali + toddes) + (cmeali + cmedes + ajuali + ajudes)) / ndiast), vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
'    Else
'        .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = 0
'    End If
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    '------- Fin número días stock
    
    If opcosban Then
    If yy > .CurrentY Then .CurrentY = yy
    .MarginLeft = "0.9cm"
    
    '-------> Detalle planificado - realizado
    Dim aAp As String
    '-------> Insert tabla productospmpdia
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       
       aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ProductoPMPRa13B"
       fg_CheckTmp aAp
       vg_db.Execute "SELECT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, 0 AS ppd_propon, Max(ppd_fecdia) AS ppd_fecdia " & _
                     "INTO " & aAp & " " & _
                     "FROM b_productospmpdia " & _
                     "WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                     "AND   ppd_fecdia >= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_fecdia <= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia), "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                     "AND   ppd_propon>0 " & _
                     "GROUP BY ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro"
       vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp & " ADD Constraint pmp_pk Primary Key (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_fecdia)"
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " INNER JOIN b_productospmpdia ON (" & aAp & ".ppd_fecdia = b_productospmpdia.ppd_fecdia) AND (" & aAp & ".ppd_codpro = b_productospmpdia.ppd_codpro) AND (" & aAp & ".ppd_cencos = b_productospmpdia.ppd_cencos) SET " & aAp & ".ppd_propon=b_productospmpdia.ppd_propon"
       vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia) SELECT DISTINCT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_codpro NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_codpro FROM " & aAp & ")"
    
    End If
    '-------> Mover costo planificación real
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " val(mid(a.min_fecmin,1,6)) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),a.min_fecmin),1,6)) ")
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.min_codreg, c.reg_nombre, a.min_codser, d.ser_nombre, " & _
             "ROUND(SUM((b.mid_cosrec+b.mid_cosdes)*b.mid_numrac),2) AS mid_cosrec " & _
             "FROM b_minuta a, b_minutadet b, a_regimen c, a_servicio d " & _
             "WHERE a.min_codigo=b.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.min_codreg=c.reg_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.min_codser=d.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   " & sql1 & "=" & fecper & " " & _
             "AND   b.mid_tipmin='2' AND a.min_racrea>0 GROUP BY a.min_codreg, c.reg_nombre, a.min_codser, d.ser_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Dim totsal As Double, totsal1 As Double, totrea As Double, nrorac As Long, fecesf As Long, cosefj As Double, totadi As Double
       Dim diaini As Long, diafin As Long, nracre As Long, preven As Double, totcon As Double, estfij As Boolean
       
       auxreg = 0: totrea = 0: nrorac = 0: totadi = 0: nracre = 0
       .text = Chr(13)
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 7200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Detalle Costo Bandeja"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Planificado"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Realizado"
       .TableBorder = tbAll '= tbNone
       .EndTable
    
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 17: .TableCell(tcRows) = 500
       .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 5
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taCenterTop
'       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 12) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 12) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 13) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 13) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 14) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 14) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 15) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 15) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 16) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 16) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 17) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 17) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True ': .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Servicio                     "
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Costo Piso   (Input 5 Etapas)"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Costo Techo (Input subgerencia)"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Costo Plan.  (Input del ADC) "
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Costo Adicional Plan."
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Realizado ($)"
'       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "   Desv.Realizado - Planif.  "
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "% Food Cost"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Costo Desechable ($)"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = "%Desch."
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) = "Costo G.G. ($)"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11) = "% G.G."
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 12) = "Costo Depreciación ($)"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 13) = "% Deprec."
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 14) = "Costo Personal ($)"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 15) = "% Personal"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 16) = "Utilidad Bandeja ($)"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 17) = "% Util."
       i = 2
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          If RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Then
             
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!reg_nombre): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
             
             For j = 2 To 17
                 
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, j) = ""
             
             Next j
             
             i = i + 1
             auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
          
          End If
          
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
          '-------> Traer costo piso
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
          
          If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
          RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          
          RS2.Open "SELECT cpa_valor FROM b_costopatron " & _
                   "WHERE cpa_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   cpa_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   cpa_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   cpa_anomes=" & Val(Mid(fecfin, 1, 6)) & " " & _
                   "AND   cpa_descripcion='PISO'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(IIf(IsNull(RS2!cpa_valor), 0, RS2!cpa_valor), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          RS2.Close
          Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          '-------> Traer costo techo
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
          
          If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
          RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          
          RS2.Open "SELECT cpa_valor FROM b_costopatron " & _
                   "WHERE cpa_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   cpa_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   cpa_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   cpa_anomes=" & Val(Mid(fecfin, 1, 6)) & " " & _
                   "AND   cpa_descripcion='TECHO'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(IIf(IsNull(RS2!cpa_valor), 0, RS2!cpa_valor), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          RS2.Close
          Set RS2 = Nothing
          '-------> Traer raciones minuta real
          nrorac = 0
          sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " val(mid(min_fecmin,1,6)) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),min_fecmin),1,6)) ")
          
          If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
          RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          
          RS2.Open "SELECT min_codreg, min_codser, SUM(min_racrea) AS min_racrea " & _
                   "FROM b_minuta " & _
                   "WHERE min_codigo IN (SELECT mid_codigo FROM b_minutadet) " & _
                   "AND   min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   min_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   min_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   " & sql1 & "=" & fecper & " " & _
                   "AND   min_racrea>0 GROUP BY min_codreg, min_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then nrorac = Format(IIf(IsNull(RS2!min_racrea), 0, RS2!min_racrea), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          RS2.Close
          Set RS2 = Nothing
          estfij = False
          
          '-------> Buscar datos estructura fija día
          sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " val(mid(mfd_fecha,1,6)) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),mfd_fecha),1,6)) ")
          
          If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
          RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          
          RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT mfd_cencos FROM b_minutafijadia " & _
                   "WHERE mfd_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   mfd_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   mfd_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   " & sql1 & "=" & fecper & " AND mfd_tipmin='2'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then estfij = True
          RS2.Close
          Set RS2 = Nothing
          fecesf = 0
          
          If Not estfij Then
             
             If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
             RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
             vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
             
             RS2.Open "SELECT MAX(mif_fecval) AS fecval FROM b_minutafija " & _
                      "WHERE mif_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   mif_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   mif_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then fecesf = IIf(IsNull(RS2!fecval), 0, RS2!fecval)
             RS2.Close
             Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          End If
          diaini = 0
          diafin = 0
          cosefj = 0
          diaini = 1
          diafin = Mid(dEoM("01/" & Mid(fecper, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecper, 1, 4)), 1, 2)
          
          For j = diaini To diafin
             
                If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
                RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
                vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
             
             If estfij Then
                
                '-------> Calcular datos desde tabla estructura fija día
                sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " val(mid(c.min_fecmin,1,6)) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),c.min_fecmin),1,6)) ")
                RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(a.mfd_canpro*a.mfd_cospro) AS cosfij " & _
                        "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos b, b_minuta c " & _
                        "WHERE a.mfd_cencos=c.min_cencos " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_codreg=c.min_codreg " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_codser=c.min_codser " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_fecha=c.min_fecmin " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_codpro=b.pro_codigo " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                        "AND   " & sql1 & "=" & fecper & "  AND a.mfd_tipmin='2' " & _
                        "AND   b.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "')", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                If Not RS2.EOF And Not IsNull(RS2!cosfij) Then cosefj = cosefj + IIf(IsNull(RS2!cosfij), 0, RS2!cosfij)
                RS2.Close
                Set RS2 = Nothing
                Exit For
                
             ElseIf Not estfij And fecesf > 0 Then
                
                '-------> Calcular datos desde tabla estructura fija
                If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
                   
                   RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(d.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro) AS cosfij " & _
                            "FROM  b_minutafija a, b_productos c, b_minuta b, " & aAp & " d " & _
                            "WHERE a.mif_cencos=b.min_cencos " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codreg=b.min_codreg " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codser=b.min_codser " & _
                            "AND   b.min_codigo IN (SELECT mid_codigo FROM b_minutadet) " & _
                            "AND   b.min_fecmin=" & fecper & Right("0" & j, 2) & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codpro=c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo=d.ppd_codpro AND d.ppd_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_fecval=" & fecesf & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_dianro=" & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                            "AND   c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "')", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                
                Else
                   
                   RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(d.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro) AS cosfij " & _
                            "FROM  b_minutafija a, b_productos c, b_minuta b, b_productospmpdia d " & _
                            "WHERE a.mif_cencos=b.min_cencos " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codreg=b.min_codreg " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codser=b.min_codser " & _
                            "AND   b.min_codigo IN (SELECT mid_codigo FROM b_minutadet) " & _
                            "AND   b.min_fecmin=" & fecper & Right("0" & j, 2) & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codpro=c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo=d.ppd_codpro AND d.ppd_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND d.ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_fecval=" & fecesf & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_dianro=" & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                            "AND   c.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "')", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                
                End If
                If Not RS2.EOF And Not IsNull(RS2!cosfij) Then cosefj = cosefj + IIf(IsNull(RS2!cosfij), 0, RS2!cosfij)
                RS2.Close
                Set RS2 = Nothing
                
              End If
              
          Next j
          
          '-------> Traer salida & devolución
          totsal = 0: totsal1 = 0
          sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
          sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
          sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " SUM(IIf(a.tov_tipdoc='SP',b.dev_ptotal,'-' & b.dev_ptotal)) AS totdoc ", " SUM(CASE WHEN a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' THEN b.dev_ptotal ELSE (-1 * b.dev_ptotal) END) AS totdoc ")
          
          If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
          RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          
          RS2.Open "SELECT a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser, " & _
                   "" & sql3 & " " & _
                   "FROM  b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c " & _
                   "WHERE a.tov_rutcli=b.dev_rutcli " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_tipdoc=b.dev_tipdoc " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_numdoc=b.dev_numdoc " & _
                   "AND   b.dev_codmer=c.pro_codigo " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_rutcli='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND  (a.tov_tipdoc='SP' OR a.tov_tipdoc='DP') " & _
                   "AND   b.dev_canmer<>0 AND  a.tov_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND a.tov_estdoc<>'A' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'P' " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_fecpro>=" & sql1 & " AND a.tov_fecpro<=" & sql2 & " " & _
                   "AND   c.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') GROUP BY a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then totsal = RS2!totdoc: totsal1 = RS2!totdoc
          RS2.Close
          Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          '-------> Traer raciones reales
          preven = 0
          
          If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
          RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          
          RS2.Open "SELECT mir.prv_fecvig, mir.mir_rutcli, prv.prv_preven, SUM(mir.mir_nrorac) AS nrorac " & _
                    "FROM " & nArch & " mir, b_preciovta prv " & _
                    "WHERE mir.mir_rutcli=prv.prv_rutcli " & _
                    "AND   mir.mir_codser=prv.prv_codser " & _
                    "AND   mir.mir_codreg=prv.prv_codreg " & _
                    "AND   mir.mir_cencos=prv.prv_cencos " & _
                    "AND   mir.prv_fecvig=prv.prv_fecvig " & _
                    "AND   mir.mir_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                    "AND   mir.mir_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                    "AND   mir.mir_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                    "AND   mir.mir_fecmin>=" & fecini & " AND mir.mir_fecmin<=" & fecfin & " " & _
                    "GROUP BY mir.prv_fecvig, mir.mir_rutcli, prv.prv_preven", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then
             
             Do While Not RS2.EOF
                
                preven = (preven + (IIf(IsNull(RS2!prv_preven), 0, RS2!prv_preven) * IIf(IsNull(RS2!nrorac), 0, RS2!nrorac)))
                RS2.MoveNext
             
             Loop
          End If
          
          RS2.Close
          Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          '-------> Traer venta contado
          totcon = 0
          
          If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
          RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          
          RS2.Open "SELECT vtc_codser, SUM(vtc_totmon) AS totmon FROM b_ventacontado " & _
                   "WHERE vtc_fecvta>=" & fecini & " and vtc_fecvta<=" & fecfin & " " & _
                   "AND   vtc_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   vtc_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " GROUP BY vtc_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then totcon = IIf(IsNull(RS2!totmon), 0, RS2!totmon)
          RS2.Close
          Set RS2 = Nothing
          preven = preven + totcon
          
          '-------> Traer raciones reales
          nracre = 0
          
          If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
          RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

          RS2.Open "SELECT mir_codreg, mir_codser, SUM(mir_nrorac) AS mir_nrorac FROM b_minutaraciones " & _
                   "WHERE mir_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   mir_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   mir_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   mir_rutcli IN ('PRODUCIDAS') " & _
                   "AND   mir_nrorac>0 AND mir_fecmin>=" & fecini & " AND mir_fecmin<=" & fecfin & " GROUP BY mir_codreg, mir_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then totsal = (totsal / IIf(IsNull(RS2!mir_nrorac), 0, RS2!mir_nrorac)): nracre = IIf(IsNull(RS2!mir_nrorac), 0, RS2!mir_nrorac)
          RS2.Close
          Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          totrea = 0: totadi = 0
          totrea = ((cosefj + IIf(IsNull(RS1!mid_cosrec), 0, RS1!mid_cosrec)) / nrorac)

          '-------> Traer recetas adicionales
          sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " val(mid(a.min_fecmin,1,6)) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),a.min_fecmin),1,6)) ")
          
          If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
          RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          
          RS2.Open "SELECT a.min_codreg, a.min_codser, " & _
                   "ROUND(SUM((b.mid_cosrec+b.mid_cosdes)*b.mid_numrac),2) AS mid_cosrec " & _
                   "FROM b_minuta a, b_minutadet b " & _
                   "WHERE a.min_codigo=b.mid_codigo " & _
                   "AND   a.min_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   a.min_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   a.min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   " & sql1 & "=" & fecper & " " & _
                   "AND   b.mid_tipmin='2' AND b.mid_rec5eta='0' AND a.min_racrea>0 AND " & RS1!min_codreg & ">9999 AND " & RS1!min_codser & ">9999 GROUP BY a.min_codreg, a.min_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then
             totrea = ((cosefj + (IIf(IsNull(RS1!mid_cosrec), 0, RS1!mid_cosrec) - IIf(IsNull(RS2!mid_cosrec), 0, RS2!mid_cosrec))) / nrorac): totadi = (IIf(IsNull(RS2!mid_cosrec), 0, RS2!mid_cosrec))
          End If
          RS2.Close
          Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " val(mid(min_fecmin,1,6)) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),min_fecmin),1,6)) ")
          '-------> Traer raciones recetas adicionales
          
          If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
          RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

          RS2.Open "SELECT min_codreg, min_codser, SUM(min_racrea) AS min_racrea " & _
                   "FROM b_minuta " & _
                   "WHERE min_codigo IN (SELECT mid_codigo FROM b_minutadet WHERE mid_rec5eta='0' ) " & _
                   "AND   min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   min_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   min_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   " & sql1 & "=" & fecper & " " & _
                   "AND   min_racrea>0 AND " & RS1!min_codreg & ">9999 AND " & RS1!min_codser & ">9999 GROUP BY min_codreg, min_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then
             totadi = (totadi / nrorac) 'RS2!min_racrea)
          End If
          RS2.Close
          Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          Dim por2 As Double, por4 As Double, por6 As Double, por8 As Double, por10 As Double
          por2 = 0
          por4 = 0
          por6 = 0
          por8 = 0
          por10 = 0
          
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(totadi, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(IIf(nracre > 0, totsal, 0), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          
          If preven > 0 Then por2 = (totsal1 / preven) * 100
          If preven > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(por2, fg_Pict(3, 2))
          If tgrval > 0 Then por4 = (((cmedes + ajudes + tosdes + cosdns - toddes - cennde) / tgrval) * 100)
          If tgrval > 0 And preven > 0 And totsal > 0 And totsal1 > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(((totsal * por4) / por2), fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format(por4, fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If tgrval > 0 Then por6 = (ctogas / tgrval) * 100
          If tgrval > 0 And totsal1 > 0 And preven > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) = Format(((totsal * por6) / por2), fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 11) = Format(por6, fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If tgrval > 0 Then por8 = (totdep / tgrval) * 100
          If tgrval > 0 And totsal1 > 0 And preven > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 12) = Format(((totsal * por8) / por2), fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 13) = Format(por8, fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If tgrval > 0 Then por10 = (tocope / tgrval) * 100
          If tgrval > 0 And totsal1 > 0 And preven > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 14) = Format(((totsal * por10) / por2), fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 15) = Format(por10, fg_Pict(3, 1))
          por12 = (100 - por2 - por4 - por6 - por8 - por10)
          If tgrval > 0 And totsal1 > 0 And preven > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 16) = Format(((totsal * por12) / por2), fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If por12 <> 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 17) = Format(por12, fg_Pict(3, 1))
          i = i + 1
          RS1.MoveNext
          
       Loop
       .TableCell(tcRows) = i - IIf(i > 1, 1, 0)
       .TableBorder = tbAll
       .EndTable
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    End If
    '-------> Fin detalle teórico/planificado/realizado
    
    '-------> Raciones no Vendidas
    Dim vTotMer As Double
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

    RS1.Open "SELECT b.min_fecmin, ROUND(SUM((c.mid_cosrec+c.mid_cosdes)* c.mid_nummer),0) AS totmer " & _
             "FROM  b_receta a, b_minuta b, b_minutadet c " & _
             "WHERE b.min_codigo=c.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.mid_codrec=a.rec_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin>=" & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin<=" & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   c.mid_tipmin='2' " & _
             "AND   c.mid_numrac>0 AND c.mid_nummer>0 GROUP BY b.min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          vTotMer = Round(vTotMer + IIf(IsNull(RS1!totmer), 0, RS1!totmer), 0)
          RS1.MoveNext
       
       Loop
       
       .text = Chr(13)
       .text = Chr(13)
       
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 3) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 4) = True
       .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 9: .TableCell(tcFontSize, 3) = 9: .TableCell(tcFontSize, 4) = 9
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Raciones no Vendidas"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format(vTotMer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format(((vTotMer / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(3, 2)) & "%"
       .TableBorder = tbNone
       .EndTable
       
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    '-------> Presupuesto y proyección ventas
    If (opppto Or opproy) And fecper > 0 Then
       
       Dim codigo As Long, vFecPos As Double, vTPrePro As Double, Tipo As String, vPPrePro As Double, vValPre As Double, vValPro As Double
       Dim GloEnc1 As String, GloEnc2 As String, GloEnc3 As String, GloEnc4 As String, GloDet As String, nomarch As String, nomarchzip As String
       .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
       .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 12: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Cuadro Comparativo Real - " & IIf(opppto And opproy, "Presupuesto - Proyección", IIf(opppto And Not opproy, "Presupuesto", "Proyección"))
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
       .TableBorder = tbNone
       .EndTable
       .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
       vFecPos = 0
       If fecper > 0 Then vFecPos = Format(BEoM(fg_Ctod(fecper & "25")), "yyyymm")
       Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = IIf(opppto And opproy, 7, 5): .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
       
       For i = 1 To IIf(opppto And opproy, 7, 5)
           
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , i) = IIf(i = 3 Or i = 5 Or i = 7, 700, 1418): .TableCell(tcAlign, , i) = taCenterTop
       
       Next i
       
       GloEnc1 = "": GloEnc2 = "": GloEnc1 = "": GloEnc2 = "" & ";" & "Contrato" & ";"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = IIf(opppto, "Presupuesto  " & "(" & Meses("01/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4) & ")", "Proyección " & "(" & Meses("01/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(vFecPos, 6), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(vFecPos, 6), 1, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(vFecPos, 6), 1, 4) & ")"): .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
       GloEnc1 = GloEnc1 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & ";"
       GloEnc2 = GloEnc2 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & ";"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "%": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True
       GloEnc1 = GloEnc1 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & ";"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Real A13     " & "(" & Meses("01/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4) & ")": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True
       GloEnc1 = GloEnc1 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & ";"
       GloEnc2 = GloEnc2 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & ";"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "%": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True
       GloEnc1 = GloEnc1 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & ";"
       If opppto And opproy Then
          
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Proyección " & "(" & Meses("01/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4) & ")": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 6) = True
          GloEnc1 = GloEnc1 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & ";"
          GloEnc2 = GloEnc2 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & ";"
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "%": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 7) = True
          GloEnc1 = GloEnc1 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & ";"
       
       End If
       GloEnc2 = GloEnc2 & "Difer." & ";"
       .TableBorder = tbAll
       .EndTable
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = IIf(opppto And opproy, 7, 5): .TableCell(tcRows) = 10
       
       For i = 1 To IIf(opppto And opproy, 7, 5)
           
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , i) = IIf(i = 3 Or i = 5 Or i = 7, 700, 1418): .TableCell(tcAlign, , i) = IIf(i = 1, taLeftTop, taRightTop)
       
       Next i
'RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_presupuestoproyeccion WHERE ppr_cencos='" & cencos & "' AND (ppr_anomes=" & fecper & " AND ppr_tipo='1') OR (ppr_anomes=" & vFecPos & " AND ppr_tipo='2') ORDER BY ppr_codigo, ppr_tipo ", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       
       If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
       RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

       RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_presupuestoproyeccion WHERE ppr_cencos='" & cencos & "' AND ppr_anomes=" & fecper & " AND (ppr_tipo='1' OR ppr_tipo='2') ORDER BY ppr_codigo, ppr_tipo ", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       i = 1
       codigo = 0
       vTPrePro = 0
       vPPrePro = 0
       vValPre = 0
       vValPro = 0
       
       If Not RS1.EOF Then
          
          Do While Not RS1.EOF
             
             If RS1!ppr_codigo <> codigo Then
                
                If codigo > 0 Then i = i + 1
                codigo = RS1!ppr_codigo
             
             End If
             If RS1!ppr_codigo = 10 And RS1!ppr_tipo = "1" Then vValPre = RS1!ppr_valor
             If RS1!ppr_codigo = 10 And RS1!ppr_tipo = "2" Then vValPro = RS1!ppr_valor
             vPPrePro = 0
             vTPrePro = IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 10, tgrval, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 20, vTFCost, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 30, ctogas, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 40, totdep, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 50, tocope, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 60, totgas, vTUtili))))))
             If vTPrePro <> 0 And tgrval <> 0 Then vPPrePro = Round((vTPrePro / tgrval) * 100, 2)
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!ppr_descripcion)
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 10, Format(tgrval, fg_Pict(9, 0)), IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 20, Format(vTFCost, fg_Pict(9, 0)), IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 30, Format(ctogas, fg_Pict(9, 0)), IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 40, Format(totdep, fg_Pict(9, 0)), IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 50, Format(tocope, fg_Pict(9, 0)), IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 60, Format(totgas, fg_Pict(9, 0)), Format(vTUtili, fg_Pict(9, 0))))))))
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = vPPrePro
             .TableCell(tcText, i, IIf(RS1!ppr_tipo = "1", 2, IIf(Not opppto And opproy, 2, 6))) = Format(RS1!ppr_valor, fg_Pict(9, 0))
             vPPrePro = 0
             If RS1!ppr_valor <> 0 And vValPre <> 0 And RS1!ppr_tipo = "1" Then
                vPPrePro = Round((RS1!ppr_valor / vValPre) * 100, 2)
             ElseIf RS1!ppr_valor <> 0 And vValPro <> 0 And RS1!ppr_tipo = "2" Then
                vPPrePro = Round((RS1!ppr_valor / vValPro) * 100, 2)
             End If
             .TableCell(tcText, i, IIf(RS1!ppr_tipo = "1", 3, IIf(Not opppto And opproy, 3, 7))) = Format(vPPrePro, fg_Pict(3, 2))
             RS1.MoveNext
          
          Loop
          '-------> Crear directorio si no existe
          '------->
          
          mdir = Dir(dir_trabajo_Inf & "\" & "Presupuesto-Proyeccion", vbDirectory)
          If mdir = "" Then MkDir dir_trabajo_Inf & "\" & "Presupuesto-Proyeccion"
          mdir = dir_trabajo_Inf & "Presupuesto-Proyeccion" & "\"
          '------->
          '-------> Fin crear directorio si no existe
          '------->
          nomarch = "Presupuesto-Proyeccion" & Format(Date, "yyyymmdd") & Trim(cencos) & ".txt"
          nomarchzip = "Presupuesto-Proyeccion" & Format(Date, "yyyymmdd") & Trim(cencos) & ".zip"
          If Dir(mdir & nomarch) <> "" Then Kill mdir & nomarch
          If Dir(mdir & Mid(nomarch, 1, Len(nomarch) - 4) & ".xls") <> "" Then Kill mdir & Mid(nomarch, 1, Len(nomarch) - 4) & ".xls"
          Open mdir & nomarch For Output As #2
          GloEnc3 = "": GloEnc3 = ";" & ";": GloEnc4 = "": GloEnc4 = GloEnc2 '& ";"
          GloDet = ""
          
          If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
          RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
          vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

          RS2.Open "SELECT cli_codigo, cli_nombre FROM b_clientes WHERE cli_codigo='" & cencos & "' AND cli_tipo=0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then GloDet = Trim(RS2!cli_codigo) & ";" & Trim(RS2!cli_nombre) & ";"
          RS2.Close
          Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          For j = 1 To i
              
              If j > 1 Then GloEnc4 = GloEnc4 & GloEnc1
              
              GloEnc3 = GloEnc3 & .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) & IIf(j = 1 And opppto And Not opproy, ";;", IIf(j = 1 And Not opppto And opproy, ";;", IIf(j = 1 And opppto And opproy, ";;;", IIf(j > 1 And Not opppto And opproy, ";;;", IIf(j > 1 And opppto And Not opproy, ";;;", ";;;;;"))))) & ";"
              GloDet = GloDet & IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 2)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 2)) & ";"
              If j > 1 Then GloDet = GloDet & IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 3)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 3)) & ";"
              GloDet = GloDet & IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 4)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 4)) & ";"
              If j > 1 Then GloDet = GloDet & IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 5)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 5)) & ";"
              If opppto And opproy Then
                 
                 GloDet = GloDet & IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 6)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 6)) & ";"
                 
                 If j = 1 Then
                    
                    GloDet = GloDet & (IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 6)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 6)) - IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 2)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 4))) & ";"
                 
                 Else
                    
                    GloDet = GloDet & IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 7)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 7)) & ";"
                 
                 End If
              
              ElseIf j = 1 Then
                 
                 GloDet = GloDet & 0 & ";"
              
              End If
          
          Next j
          Print #2, GloEnc3
          Print #2, GloEnc4
          Print #2, GloDet
          Close #2
          Set XL = CreateObject("Excel.application")
          XL.Workbooks.OpenText mdir & nomarch, , 1, 1, , , , , , , True, ";"
          XL.ActiveWorkbook.SaveAs FileName:=mdir & Mid(nomarch, 1, Len(nomarch) - 4) & ".xls", _
                                            FileFormat:=xlNormal, password:="", WriteResPassword:="", _
                                            ReadOnlyRecommended:=False, CreateBackup:=False
          XL.Quit
          Set XL = Nothing
          If Dir(mdir & nomarchzip) <> "" Then Kill mdir & nomarchzip
          Preview.AZ1.CreateZip mdir & nomarchzip, "": Preview.AZ1.AddFile mdir & Mid(nomarch, 1, Len(nomarch) - 4) & ".xls", "", True, "": Preview.AZ1.Close
          '-------> verificar si existe archivo mdb destino si existe borrar
          If Dir(mdir & nomarch) <> "" Then Kill mdir & nomarch
          If Dir(mdir & Mid(nomarch, 1, Len(nomarch) - 4) & ".xls") <> "" Then Kill mdir & Mid(nomarch, 1, Len(nomarch) - 4) & ".xls"
       
       End If
       RS1.Close
       Set RS1 = Nothing
       
       .TableCell(tcRows) = i
       .TableBorder = tbAll
       .EndTable
    
    End If
    '-------> Borrar tablas temporales
    If Trim(aAp) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp & ""
    
End With
Exit Function
Error_RA13B:
    fg_descarga
    If Err = 70 Then
       Resume Next
    End If
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_RA13BColombia(cencos As String, fecper As Long, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tgrval As Double, cmeali As Double, cmedes As Double, tosali As Double, tosdes As Double, ajuali As Double, ajudes As Double, todali As Double, toddes As Double, infali As Double, infdes As Double, cosans As Double, cosdns As Double, X As Long, y As Long, opppto As Boolean, opproy As Boolean, nArch As String, crenal As Double, cennde As Double, opcosban As Boolean, ctogas As Double, iniali As Double, inides As Double, cosalc As Double, cosalf As Double, cosdec As Double, cosdef As Double, crecal As Double, crecde As Double, cemtal As Double, cemtde As Double, totven As Double, totcaf As Double, tomali As Double, tomdes As Double, vecgas() As Variant, tgrteo As Double, ggepro As Double, diapro As Long)
Dim RS1 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim RS2 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim auxreg As Long, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String
With Preview.VSPrinter
    '-------> imprimir ventas
    .CurrentX = X: .CurrentY = y
    .MarginLeft = "0.9cm"
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 1) = 5: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "A.- VENTAS"
    .TableBorder = tbNone: .EndTable
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    i = 1
    If totven > 0 Then
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Ventas al contado"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(totven, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
       i = i + 1
    End If
    '-------> Fim imprimir ventas
    For j = 1 To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
        Preview.vaSpread1.Row = j
        Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9
        If Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Traer ventas directas" Then
           Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Preview.vaSpread1.text
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
           Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Preview.vaSpread1.text, fg_Pict(6, 0))
           i = i + 1
        Else
           Exit For
        End If
    Next j
    If totcaf <> 0 Then
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Ventas cafetería"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(totcaf, fg_Pict(6, 0))
        i = i + 1
    End If
    .TableCell(tcRows) = IIf(i - 1 <= 0, 1, (i - 1))
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable: '.text = Chr(13)
    '-------> Fin traer ventas cafetería
    
    '-------> Impirmir Nº racion x precio venta
    i = 1
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(I_A13.Check1(3).Value = 1, "", "Cantidad")

           .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""

           Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(Preview.vaSpread1.text, fg_Pict(6, 2))

           i = i + 1
        Else
           Exit For
        End If
    Next j

    i = 1
    .StartTable

    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    '-------> Salida Producción

    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "( " & Format(tosdes, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "(" & Format(Round(tosali + tosdes, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((tosali + tosdes) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    '-------> Mermas
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Mermas"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "(" & Format(cmeali, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "(" & Format(cmedes, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "(" & Format(Round(cmeali + cmedes, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((cmeali + cmedes) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    '-------> Devolución Producción
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Devolución Producción"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(todali, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(toddes, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(todali + toddes, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((todali + toddes) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    i = i + 1
    '-------> Ajuste Inventario
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Ajuste Inventario "
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
     ajuali = ajuali * -1: ajudes = ajudes * -1
    If ajuali <> 0 Or ajudes <> 0 Then
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Ajuste Inventario"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(ajuali > 0, Format(ajuali, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "(" & Format(Abs(ajuali), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(ajudes > 0, Format(ajudes, fg_Pict(6, 0)), "(" & Format(Abs(ajudes), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf((ajuali + ajudes) > 0, Format(Round(ajuali + ajudes, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)), "(" & Format(Round(Abs(ajuali + ajudes), vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")")
       If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((Abs(ajuali + ajudes)) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    End If
    '-------> Total Costo
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total Costo": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format((tosali + cmeali - todali + ajuali), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format((tosdes + cmedes - toddes + ajudes), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round((tosali + cmeali - todali + ajuali) + (tosdes + cmedes - toddes + ajudes), vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    '-------> % Costo
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "% Costo": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format((((tosali + cmeali - todali + ajuali) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & "%"
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format((((tosdes + cmedes - toddes + ajudes) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & "%"
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round((((tosali + cmeali - todali + ajuali) + (tosdes + cmedes - toddes + ajudes)) / tgrval) * 100, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & "%"
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i

    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop

       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True

       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True

       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = IIf((crenal + cennde) < 0, Format(((crenal + cennde)), fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format(((crenal + cennde)), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & "")
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = IIf((((crenal + cennde) / tgrval) * 100) < 0, Format((((crenal + cennde) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%", Format((((crenal + cennde) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%")

    cennde = (cennde * -1): crenal = (crenal * -1)

    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop

    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "F.Cost Total"
    Dim vTFCost As Double, vTFCostP As Double
    vTFCost = 0
    If tgrval > 0 Then
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Format((((cmeali + ajuali + tosali + cosans - todali - crenal) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format((((cmedes + ajudes + tosdes + cosdns - toddes - cennde) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format((((cmeali + cmedes + tosali + tosdes + ajuali + ajudes + cosans + cosdns - todali - toddes - (crenal + cennde)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = Format(((((cmeali + cmedes + tosali + tosdes + ajuali + ajudes + cosans + cosdns - todali - toddes - (crenal + cennde))) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True
    End If
    vTFCost = Round((((cmeali + cmedes + tosali + tosdes + ajuali + ajudes + cosans + cosdns - todali - toddes - (crenal + cennde)))), 0)
    If tgrval > 0 Then vTFCostP = Round(((((cmeali + cmedes + tosali + tosdes + ajuali + ajudes + cosans + cosdns - todali - toddes - (crenal + cennde))) / tgrval) * 100), 2)
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable

    '------- Totales nominales
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop

    If tgrval > 0 Then

      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format((((cmedes + ajudes + tosdes + cosdns - toddes - cennde))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format((((cmeali + cmedes + tosali + tosdes + ajuali + ajudes + cosans + cosdns - todali - toddes - (crenal + cennde)))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = Format(((((cmeali + cmedes + tosali + tosdes + ajuali + ajudes + cosans + cosdns - todali - toddes - (crenal + cennde))) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True
    End If
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable

    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    
    .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 5: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "B) Consumo por diferencia de inventarios"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
    i = i + 1
    
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Inventario Inicial"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(iniali, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(inides, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(iniali + inides, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((iniali + inides) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Centralización Compras"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(cosalc, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(cosdec, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(cosalc + cosdec, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((cosalc + cosdec) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Compras Fofi"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(cosalf, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(cosdef, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(cosalf + cosdef, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((cosalf + cosdef) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Compras No Estoqueable"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(cosans, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(cosdns, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(cosans + cosdns, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((cosans + cosdns) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Traspasos recibido"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(crecal, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(crecde, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(crecal + crecde, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)) 'vg_DCa), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((crecal + crecde) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Traspasos emitidos"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "(" & Format(cemtal, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "(" & Format(cemtde, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "(" & Format(Round(cemtal + cemtde, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")" 'vg_DCa), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & ")"
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((cemtal + cemtde) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Traspaso Prod. Term."
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(crenal > 1, "", "(") & Format((crenal * -1), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & IIf(crenal > 1, "", ")")
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(cennde > 1, "", "(") & Format((cennde * -1), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & IIf(cennde > 1, "", ")")
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf((crenal + cennde) > 1, "", "(") & Format(Round((crenal + cennde) * -1, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & IIf((crenal + cennde) > 1, "", ")") 'vg_DCa), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & IIf((crenal + cennde) > 1, "", ")")
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(((((crenal + cennde) * -1) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    i = i + 1
    
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Inventario Final"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
    If tomali > 0 Or tomdes > 0 Then
         .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Inventario Final"
         .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(tomali, fg_Pict(6, 0))
         .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(tomdes, fg_Pict(6, 0))
         .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(Round(tomali + tomdes, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    End If
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((((tomali + tomdes) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Consumo"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format((iniali + cosalc + cosalf + cosans + crecal) - (cemtal + crenal + tomali), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format((inides + cosdec + cosdef + cosdns + crecde) - (cemtde + cennde + tomdes), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format((iniali + cosalc + cosalf + cosans + crecal) - (cemtal + crenal + tomali) + (inides + cosdec + cosdef + cosdns + crecde) - (cemtde + cennde + tomdes), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "% Consumo"
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format((((iniali + cosalc + cosalf + cosans + crecal) - (cemtal + crenal + tomali)) / tgrval) * 100, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & "%"
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format((((inides + cosdec + cosdef + cosdns + crecde) - (cemtde + cennde + tomdes)) / tgrval) * 100, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & "%"
    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format((((iniali + cosalc + cosalf + cosans + crecal) - (cemtal + crenal + tomali) + (inides + cosdec + cosdef + cosdns + crecde) - (cemtde + cennde + tomdes)) / tgrval) * 100, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & "%"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    
    
    .text = Chr(13)
    '-------> Dif. cons-acum (A)-(B)
    Dim DifABAli As Double, DifABDes As Double
    DifABAli = ((tosali + cmeali - todali + ajuali) - ((iniali + cosalc + cosalf + cosans + crecal) - (cemtal + crenal + tomali)))
    DifABDes = ((tosdes + cmedes - toddes + ajudes) - ((inides + cosdec + cosdef + cosdns + crecde) - (cemtde + cennde + tomdes)))
    i = 1
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Dif. CONS-ACUM.(A)-(B)"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Format(Round(DifABAli, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format(Round(DifABDes, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format(Round(DifABAli - DifABDes, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "VARIACION DE STOCK"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format((tomali - iniali), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format((tomdes - inides), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format((tomali - iniali) - (tomdes - inides), fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
    i = i + 1
    Dim DiaStockAli As Double, DiaStockDes As Double, DiaStockTot As Double, DiasPeriodo As Integer, DiasMes As Integer
    DiaStockAli = 0: DiaStockDes = 0: DiaStockTot = 0: DiasPeriodo = 0: DiasMes = 0
    
    DiasPeriodo = DateDiff("d", CDate(Mid(fecini, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)), CDate(Mid(fecfin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 1, 4))) + 1
    DiasMes = fg_mes(Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4))

    If ((iniali + cosalc + cosalf + cosans + crecal) - (cemtal + crenal + tomali)) <> 0 Then
       'DiaStockAli = ((tomali) / ((iniali + cosalc + cosalf + cosans + crecal) - (cemtal + crenal + tomali))) * 30.5
       DiaStockAli = ((tomali) / ((iniali + cosalc + cosalf + cosans + crecal) - (cemtal + crenal + tomali))) * ((30.5 / DiasMes) * DiasPeriodo)
    End If
    If ((inides + cosdec + cosdef + cosdns + crecde) - (cemtde + cennde + tomdes)) <> 0 Then
       'DiaStockDes = ((tomdes) / ((inides + cosdec + cosdef + cosdns + crecde) - (cemtde + cennde + tomdes))) * 30.5
       DiaStockDes = ((tomdes) / ((inides + cosdec + cosdef + cosdns + crecde) - (cemtde + cennde + tomdes))) * ((30.5 / DiasMes) * DiasPeriodo)
    End If
    If ((inides + cosdec + cosdef + cosdns + crecde) - (cemtde + cennde + tomdes)) + ((iniali + cosalc + cosalf + cosans + crecal) - (cemtal + crenal + tomali)) <> 0 Then
       'DiaStockTot = ((tomali + tomdes) / (((inides + cosdec + cosdef + cosdns + crecde) - (cemtde + cennde + tomdes)) - ((iniali + cosalc + cosalf + cosans + crecal) - (cemtal + crenal + tomali)))) * 30.5
       DiaStockTot = ((tomali + tomdes) / (((inides + cosdec + cosdef + cosdns + crecde) - (cemtde + cennde + tomdes)) - ((iniali + cosalc + cosalf + cosans + crecal) - (cemtal + crenal + tomali)))) * ((30.5 / DiasMes) * DiasPeriodo)
    End If
    
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Días Stock ((I.F/Con.)*30.5)"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(DiaStockAli, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(DiaStockDes, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(DiaStockTot, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i: .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)

'    '------- Número días stock
'    ndiast = Val(Mid(dEoM(Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecini, 2), 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 7, 2)), 1, 2))
'    .StartTable
'    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2

'    If (infali > 0 Or infdes > 0) And ((tosali + tosdes) - (todali + toddes)) > 0 Then
'        .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = Format(Round((infali + infdes) / (((tosali + tosdes) - (todali + toddes) + (cmeali + cmedes + ajuali + ajudes)) / ndiast), vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
'    Else
'        .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = 0
'    End If
'    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
'    .text = Chr(13)
    '------- Fin número días stock
    
    If ctogas <> 0 Then
        .StartTable
        .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
        .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "GASTOS GENERALES"
        .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "CUENTA"
        .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "REAL"
        .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "PROYECCION"
        .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
        i = 1
        .StartTable
        .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
        For j = 1 To UBound(vecgas)
            If vecgas(j, 1) <> "" Then
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = vecgas(j, 2)
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = vecgas(j, 1)
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(vecgas(j, 3), fg_Pict(6, 0))
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(vecgas(j, 4), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                i = i + 1
            End If
        Next j
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total Gastos Generales": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(ctogas, fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(ggepro, fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
       
       If tgrval > 0 Then i = i + 1: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(((ctogas / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
       .TableCell(tcRows) = i
       .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    End If
    '-------> Fin traer gastos generales compras centralizadas & fofi
    Dim totdep As Double
    totdep = 0
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_gastosa13 WHERE gas_cencos='" & cencos & "' AND gas_anomes=" & fecper & " ORDER BY gas_orden", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        .text = Chr(13)
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            '-------> depreciación
            If RS1!gas_codigo = 1 Then
               .StartTable
               .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
               .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
               .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
               .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
               .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
               .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
               .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Depreciación"
               .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format(CalcularProrroteoGrlPerDep(diapro, IIf(IsNull(RS1!gas_valor), 0, RS1!gas_valor), fecini, fecfin), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
               .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format(CalcularProrroteoGrlPerDep(diapro, IIf(IsNull(RS1!gas_valpro), 0, RS1!gas_valpro), fecini, fecfin), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
               totdep = totdep + RS1!gas_valor
               If tgrval > 0 Then i = i + 1: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format((CalcularProrroteoGrlPerDep(diapro, IIf(IsNull(RS1!gas_valor), 0, RS1!gas_valor), fecini, fecfin) / tgrval) * 100, fg_Pict(9, 2)) & "%"
               .TableBorder = tbAll
               .EndTable
            End If
            RS1.MoveNext
        Loop
        '-------> Fin depreciación
        .text = Chr(13)
        '-------> Traer costo personal
        .StartTable
        .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 4750: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 2) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 2) = taCenterTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 3) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 3) = taCenterTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 4) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 4) = taCenterTop
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
        .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "COSTO PERSONAL"
        .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "REAL"
        .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "PROYECCION"
        .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
        
        .StartTable
        .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 5
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcText, , 3) = "0"
        Dim tocope As Double, tocpro As Double
        i = 1: tocope = 0: tocpro = 0
        RS1.MoveFirst
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            If RS1!gas_codigo >= 2 And RS1!gas_codigo <= 5 Then
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!gas_descri
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(CalcularProrroteoGrlPerDep(diapro, IIf(IsNull(RS1!gas_valor), 0, RS1!gas_valor), fecini, fecfin), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(CalcularProrroteoGrlPerDep(diapro, IIf(IsNull(RS1!gas_valpro), 0, RS1!gas_valpro), fecini, fecfin), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
               tocope = tocope + CalcularProrroteoGrlPerDep(diapro, IIf(IsNull(RS1!gas_valor), 0, RS1!gas_valor), fecini, fecfin)
               tocpro = tocpro + CalcularProrroteoGrlPerDep(diapro, IIf(IsNull(RS1!gas_valpro), 0, RS1!gas_valpro), fecini, fecfin)
                i = i + 1
            End If
            RS1.MoveNext
        Loop
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total Costo Personal"
