        .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(tocope, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(tocpro, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
        If tgrval > 0 Then i = i + 1: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format((tocope / tgrval) * 100, fg_Pict(9, 2)) & "%": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
        .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
        
        .text = Chr(13)
        .StartTable
        .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
        i = 1
        RS1.MoveFirst
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            If RS1!gas_codigo >= 6 And RS1!gas_codigo <= 8 Then
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!gas_descri
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(RS1!gas_valor, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(RS1!gas_valpro, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
                i = i + 1
            End If
            RS1.MoveNext
        Loop
        .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
        '-------> Fin traer costo personal
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .text = Chr(13)
    '-------> Resumen
    Dim totgas As Double
    totgas = (cmeali + cmedes + ctogas + tosali + tosdes + (ajuali * -1) + (ajudes * -1) + tocope + totdep + cosans + cosdns) - (todali + toddes + (crenal * -1) + (cennde * -1))
    Dim totuti As Double, vTUtili As Double
    vTUtili = 0
    vTUtili = Round((tgrval) - totgas, vg_DPr)
    i = 1
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 7
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 4750: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 2) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 2) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 3) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 4) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 4) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "RESUMEN": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "REAL": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "PROYECCION": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "VENTAS"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(tgrval, fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 3) = taRightTop
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "COSTOS Y GASTOS(1+2+3+4)"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(totgas, fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 3) = taRightTop
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "DIFERENCIA COSTOS DIRECTOS"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format((tgrval - totgas), fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 3) = taRightTop
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TREN DE VIDA REGIONAL"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 3) = taRightTop
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "RESULTADO OPERACIONAL"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format((tgrval - totgas), fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 3) = taRightTop
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "% S/VTA"
     If tgrval > 0 Then totuti = Format(((((tgrval) - totgas) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(9, 20))
     .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Left(Trim(Str(totuti)), InStr(1, Trim(Str(totuti)), vg_CDec) + 2) & "%": .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    
    '-------> Tendencia
    Dim TotInsumo As Double
    TotInsumo = 0
    TotInsumo = (((inides + cosdec + cosdef + cosdns + crecde) - (cemtde + cennde + tomdes)) - ((iniali + cosalc + cosalf + cosans + crecal) - (cemtal + crenal + tomali)))
    i = 1
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 7
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1313: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 4: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "TENDENCIA": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Meta días de stock"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Meses(BoM(BoM(fg_Ctod1(fecini))))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Meses((BoM(fg_Ctod1(fecini))))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Meses(((fg_Ctod1(fecini))))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
    If TotInsumo <> 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(((TraerStock(vg_codbod, Format(BoM(fg_Ctod1(fecini)), "yyyymmdd"))) / TotInsumo), fg_Pict(6, 2))
    If TotInsumo <> 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(((TraerStock(vg_codbod, fecini) / TotInsumo)), fg_Pict(6, 2))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(DiaStockTot, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    
'    '-------> Total de gastos
'    .StartTable
'    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
'    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
'    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
'    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
'    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
'    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
'    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "TOTAL DE GASTOS": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True
'    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format(Round(totgas, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
'    If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format(((totgas / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & "%"
'    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable: .text = Chr(13)
'    '-------> Fin total de gastos
'
'    '-------> Utilidad Operacional
'    .StartTable
'    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
'    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
'    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
'    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
'    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
'    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 910: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
'    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "UTILIDAD - OPERACIONAL": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
'    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format(Round((tgrval) - totgas, vg_DPr), fg_Pict(6, 0))
'
'    If tgrval > 0 Then
'       totuti = Format(((((tgrval) - totgas) / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(9, 20))
'       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Left(Trim(Str(totuti)), InStr(1, Trim(Str(totuti)), vg_CDec) + 2) & "%"
'       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 3) = True
'    End If
'    .TableBorder = tbAll: .EndTable: .text = Chr(13)
    '-------> Fin utilidad
    I_RA13BColombiaII cencos, fecper, fecini, fecfin, tgrval, cmeali, cmedes, tosali, tosdes, ajuali, ajudes, todali, toddes, infali, infdes, cosans, cosdns, X, y, opppto, opproy, nArch, crenal, cennde, opcosban, ctogas, iniali, inides, cosalc, cosalf, cosdec, cosdef, crecal, crecde, cemtal, cemtde, totven, totcaf, tomali, tomdes, vecgas, tgrteo, ggepro, totdep, tocope, totgas, diapro
End With
End Function

Public Function I_RA13BColombiaII(cencos As String, fecper As Long, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tgrval As Double, cmeali As Double, cmedes As Double, tosali As Double, tosdes As Double, ajuali As Double, ajudes As Double, todali As Double, toddes As Double, infali As Double, infdes As Double, cosans As Double, cosdns As Double, X As Long, y As Long, opppto As Boolean, opproy As Boolean, nArch As String, crenal As Double, cennde As Double, opcosban As Boolean, ctogas As Double, iniali As Double, inides As Double, cosalc As Double, cosalf As Double, cosdec As Double, cosdef As Double, crecal As Double, crecde As Double, cemtal As Double, cemtde As Double, totven As Double, totcaf As Double, tomali As Double, tomdes As Double, vecgas() As Variant, tgrteo As Double, ggepro As Double, totdep As Double, tocope As Double, totgas As Double, diapro As Long)
Dim RS1 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim RS2 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim auxreg As Long, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String
Dim vTFCost As Double, vTFCostP As Double
vTFCost = 0: vTFCostP = 0
vTFCost = Round((((cmeali + cmedes + tosali + tosdes + ajuali + ajudes + cosans + cosdns - todali - toddes - (crenal + cennde)))), 0)
If tgrval > 0 Then vTFCostP = Round(((((cmeali + cmedes + tosali + tosdes + ajuali + ajudes + cosans + cosdns - todali - toddes - (crenal + cennde))) / tgrval) * 100), 2)
Dim vTUtili As Double
vTUtili = 0
vTUtili = Round((tgrval) - totgas, vg_DPr)
With Preview.VSPrinter

  
    If opcosban Then
    If yy > .CurrentY Then .CurrentY = yy
    .MarginLeft = "0.9cm"
    
    '-------> Detalle planificado - realizado
    Dim aAp As String
    '-------> Insert tabla productospmpdia
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ProductoPMPRa13B"
       fg_CheckTmp aAp
       vg_db.Execute "SELECT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, 0 AS ppd_propon, Max(ppd_fecdia) AS ppd_fecdia " & _
                     "INTO " & aAp & " " & _
                     "FROM b_productospmpdia " & _
                     "WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                     "AND   ppd_fecdia >= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_fecdia <= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia), "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                     "AND   ppd_propon>0 " & _
                     "GROUP BY ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro"
       vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp & " ADD Constraint pmp_pk Primary Key (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_fecdia)"
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " INNER JOIN b_productospmpdia ON (" & aAp & ".ppd_fecdia = b_productospmpdia.ppd_fecdia) AND (" & aAp & ".ppd_codpro = b_productospmpdia.ppd_codpro) AND (" & aAp & ".ppd_cencos = b_productospmpdia.ppd_cencos) SET " & aAp & ".ppd_propon=b_productospmpdia.ppd_propon"
       vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia) SELECT DISTINCT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_codpro NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_codpro FROM " & aAp & ")"
    End If
    '-------> Mover costo planificación real
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " val(mid(a.min_fecmin,1,6)) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),a.min_fecmin),1,6)) ")
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.min_codreg, c.reg_nombre, a.min_codser, d.ser_nombre, " & _
             "ROUND(SUM((b.mid_cosrec+b.mid_cosdes)*b.mid_numrac),2) AS mid_cosrec " & _
             "FROM b_minuta a, b_minutadet b, a_regimen c, a_servicio d " & _
             "WHERE a.min_codigo=b.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.min_codreg=c.reg_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.min_codser=d.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   " & sql1 & "=" & fecper & " " & _
             "AND   b.mid_tipmin='2' AND a.min_racrea>0 GROUP BY a.min_codreg, c.reg_nombre, a.min_codser, d.ser_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Dim totsal As Double, totsal1 As Double, totrea As Double, nrorac As Long, fecesf As Long, cosefj As Double, totadi As Double
       Dim diaini As Long, diafin As Long, nracre As Long, preven As Double, totcon As Double, estfij As Boolean
       auxreg = 0: totrea = 0: nrorac = 0: totadi = 0: nracre = 0
       .text = Chr(13)
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 7200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Detalle Costo Bandeja"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Planificado"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Realizado"
       .TableBorder = tbAll '= tbNone
       .EndTable
    
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 17: .TableCell(tcRows) = 500
       .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 5
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taCenterTop
'       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 12) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 12) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 13) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 13) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 14) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 14) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 15) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 15) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 16) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 16) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 17) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 17) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True ': .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Servicio                     "
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Costo Piso   (Input 5 Etapas)"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Costo Techo (Input subgerencia)"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Costo Plan.  (Input del ADC) "
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Costo Adicional Plan."
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Realizado ($)"
'       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "   Desv.Realizado - Planif.  "
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "% Food Cost"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Costo Desechable ($)"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = "%Desch."
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) = "Costo G.G. ($)"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11) = "% G.G."
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 12) = "Costo Depreciación ($)"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 13) = "% Deprec."
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 14) = "Costo Personal ($)"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 15) = "% Personal"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 16) = "Utilidad Bandeja ($)"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 17) = "% Util."
       i = 2
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Then
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!reg_nombre): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
             For j = 2 To 17
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, j) = ""
             Next j
             i = i + 1
             auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
          End If
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
          '-------> Traer costo piso
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
          RS2.Open "SELECT cpa_valor FROM b_costopatron " & _
                   "WHERE cpa_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   cpa_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   cpa_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   cpa_anomes=" & Val(Mid(fecfin, 1, 6)) & " " & _
                   "AND   cpa_descripcion='PISO'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(IIf(IsNull(RS2!cpa_valor), 0, RS2!cpa_valor), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          '-------> Traer costo techo
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
          RS2.Open "SELECT cpa_valor FROM b_costopatron " & _
                   "WHERE cpa_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   cpa_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   cpa_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   cpa_anomes=" & Val(Mid(fecfin, 1, 6)) & " " & _
                   "AND   cpa_descripcion='TECHO'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(IIf(IsNull(RS2!cpa_valor), 0, RS2!cpa_valor), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          '-------> Traer raciones minuta real
          nrorac = 0
          sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " val(mid(min_fecmin,1,6)) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),min_fecmin),1,6)) ")
          RS2.Open "SELECT min_codreg, min_codser, SUM(min_racrea) AS min_racrea " & _
                   "FROM b_minuta " & _
                   "WHERE min_codigo IN (SELECT mid_codigo FROM b_minutadet) " & _
                   "AND   min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   min_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   min_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   " & sql1 & "=" & fecper & " " & _
                   "AND   min_racrea>0 GROUP BY min_codreg, min_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then nrorac = Format(IIf(IsNull(RS2!min_racrea), 0, RS2!min_racrea), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          estfij = False
          '-------> Buscar datos estructura fija día
          sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " val(mid(mfd_fecha,1,6)) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),mfd_fecha),1,6)) ")
          RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT mfd_cencos FROM b_minutafijadia " & _
                   "WHERE mfd_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   mfd_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   mfd_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   " & sql1 & "=" & fecper & " AND mfd_tipmin='2'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then estfij = True
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          fecesf = 0
          If Not estfij Then
             RS2.Open "SELECT MAX(mif_fecval) AS fecval FROM b_minutafija " & _
                      "WHERE mif_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   mif_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   mif_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then fecesf = IIf(IsNull(RS2!fecval), 0, RS2!fecval)
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          End If
          diaini = 0: diafin = 0: cosefj = 0
          diaini = 1: diafin = Mid(dEoM("01/" & Mid(fecper, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecper, 1, 4)), 1, 2)
          For j = diaini To diafin
             If estfij Then
                '-------> Calcular datos desde tabla estructura fija día
                sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " val(mid(c.min_fecmin,1,6)) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),c.min_fecmin),1,6)) ")
                RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(a.mfd_canpro*a.mfd_cospro) AS cosfij " & _
                        "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos b, b_minuta c " & _
                        "WHERE a.mfd_cencos=c.min_cencos " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_codreg=c.min_codreg " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_codser=c.min_codser " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_fecha=c.min_fecmin " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_codpro=b.pro_codigo " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                        "AND   " & sql1 & "=" & fecper & "  AND a.mfd_tipmin='2' " & _
                        "AND   b.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "')", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                If Not RS2.EOF And Not IsNull(RS2!cosfij) Then cosefj = cosefj + IIf(IsNull(RS2!cosfij), 0, RS2!cosfij)
                RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
                Exit For
             ElseIf Not estfij And fecesf > 0 Then
                '-------> Calcular datos desde tabla estructura fija
                If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
                   RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(d.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro) AS cosfij " & _
                            "FROM  b_minutafija a, b_productos c, b_minuta b, " & aAp & " d " & _
                            "WHERE a.mif_cencos=b.min_cencos " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codreg=b.min_codreg " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codser=b.min_codser " & _
                            "AND   b.min_codigo IN (SELECT mid_codigo FROM b_minutadet) " & _
                            "AND   b.min_fecmin=" & fecper & Right("0" & j, 2) & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codpro=c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo=d.ppd_codpro AND d.ppd_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_fecval=" & fecesf & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_dianro=" & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                            "AND   c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "')", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                Else
                   RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(d.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro) AS cosfij " & _
                            "FROM  b_minutafija a, b_productos c, b_minuta b, b_productospmpdia d " & _
                            "WHERE a.mif_cencos=b.min_cencos " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codreg=b.min_codreg " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codser=b.min_codser " & _
                            "AND   b.min_codigo IN (SELECT mid_codigo FROM b_minutadet) " & _
                            "AND   b.min_fecmin=" & fecper & Right("0" & j, 2) & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codpro=c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo=d.ppd_codpro AND d.ppd_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND d.ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_fecval=" & fecesf & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mif_dianro=" & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                            "AND   c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "')", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                End If
                If Not RS2.EOF And Not IsNull(RS2!cosfij) Then cosefj = cosefj + IIf(IsNull(RS2!cosfij), 0, RS2!cosfij)
                RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
              End If
          Next j
          '-------> Traer salida & devolución
          totsal = 0: totsal1 = 0
          sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
          sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
          sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " SUM(IIf(a.tov_tipdoc='SP',b.dev_ptotal,'-' & b.dev_ptotal)) AS totdoc ", " SUM(CASE WHEN a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' THEN b.dev_ptotal ELSE (-1 * b.dev_ptotal) END) AS totdoc ")
          RS2.Open "SELECT a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser, " & _
                   "" & sql3 & " " & _
                   "FROM  b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c " & _
                   "WHERE a.tov_rutcli=b.dev_rutcli " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_tipdoc=b.dev_tipdoc " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_numdoc=b.dev_numdoc " & _
                   "AND   b.dev_codmer=c.pro_codigo " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_rutcli='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND  (a.tov_tipdoc='SP' OR a.tov_tipdoc='DP') " & _
                   "AND   b.dev_canmer<>0 AND  a.tov_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND a.tov_estdoc<>'A' AND a.tov_estdoc<>'P' " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_fecpro>=" & sql1 & " AND a.tov_fecpro<=" & sql2 & " " & _
                   "AND   c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') GROUP BY a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then totsal = IIf(IsNull(RS2!totdoc), 0, RS2!totdoc): totsal1 = IIf(IsNull(RS2!totdoc), 0, RS2!totdoc)
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          '-------> Traer raciones reales
          preven = 0
          RS2.Open "SELECT mir.prv_fecvig, mir.mir_rutcli, prv.prv_preven, SUM(mir.mir_nrorac) AS nrorac " & _
                    "FROM " & nArch & " mir, b_preciovta prv " & _
                    "WHERE mir.mir_rutcli=prv.prv_rutcli " & _
                    "AND   mir.mir_codser=prv.prv_codser " & _
                    "AND   mir.mir_codreg=prv.prv_codreg " & _
                    "AND   mir.mir_cencos=prv.prv_cencos " & _
                    "AND   mir.prv_fecvig=prv.prv_fecvig " & _
                    "AND   mir.mir_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                    "AND   mir.mir_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                    "AND   mir.mir_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                    "AND   mir.mir_fecmin>=" & fecini & " AND mir.mir_fecmin<=" & fecfin & " " & _
                    "GROUP BY mir.prv_fecvig, mir.mir_rutcli, prv.prv_preven", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then
             Do While Not RS2.EOF
                preven = (preven + (IIf(IsNull(RS2!prv_preven), 0, RS2!prv_preven) * IIf(IsNull(RS2!nrorac), 0, RS2!nrorac)))
                RS2.MoveNext
             Loop
          End If
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          '-------> Traer venta contado
          totcon = 0
          RS2.Open "SELECT vtc_codser, SUM(vtc_totmon) AS totmon FROM b_ventacontado " & _
                   "WHERE vtc_fecvta>=" & fecini & " and vtc_fecvta<=" & fecfin & " " & _
                   "AND   vtc_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   vtc_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " GROUP BY vtc_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then totcon = IIf(IsNull(RS2!totmon), 0, RS2!totmon)
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          preven = preven + totcon
          '-------> Traer raciones reales
          nracre = 0
          RS2.Open "SELECT mir_codreg, mir_codser, SUM(mir_nrorac) AS mir_nrorac FROM b_minutaraciones " & _
                   "WHERE mir_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   mir_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   mir_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   mir_rutcli IN ('PRODUCIDAS') " & _
                   "AND   mir_nrorac>0 AND mir_fecmin>=" & fecini & " AND mir_fecmin<=" & fecfin & " GROUP BY mir_codreg, mir_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then totsal = (totsal / IIf(IsNull(RS2!mir_nrorac), 0, RS2!mir_nrorac)): nracre = IIf(IsNull(RS2!mir_nrorac), 0, RS2!mir_nrorac)
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          totrea = 0: totadi = 0
          totrea = ((cosefj + IIf(IsNull(RS1!mid_cosrec), 0, RS1!mid_cosrec)) / nrorac)

          '-------> Traer recetas adicionales
          sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " val(mid(a.min_fecmin,1,6)) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),a.min_fecmin),1,6)) ")
          RS2.Open "SELECT a.min_codreg, a.min_codser, " & _
                   "ROUND(SUM((b.mid_cosrec+b.mid_cosdes)*b.mid_numrac),2) AS mid_cosrec " & _
                   "FROM b_minuta a, b_minutadet b " & _
                   "WHERE a.min_codigo=b.mid_codigo " & _
                   "AND   a.min_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   a.min_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   a.min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   " & sql1 & "=" & fecper & " " & _
                   "AND   b.mid_tipmin='2' AND b.mid_rec5eta='0' AND a.min_racrea>0 AND " & RS1!min_codreg & ">9999 AND " & RS1!min_codser & ">9999 GROUP BY a.min_codreg, a.min_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then
             totrea = ((cosefj + (IIf(IsNull(RS1!mid_cosrec), 0, RS1!mid_cosrec) - IIf(IsNull(RS2!mid_cosrec), 0, RS2!mid_cosrec))) / nrorac): totadi = (IIf(IsNull(RS2!mid_cosrec), 0, RS2!mid_cosrec))
          End If
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " val(mid(min_fecmin,1,6)) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),min_fecmin),1,6)) ")
          '-------> Traer raciones recetas adicionales
          RS2.Open "SELECT min_codreg, min_codser, SUM(min_racrea) AS min_racrea " & _
                   "FROM b_minuta " & _
                   "WHERE min_codigo IN (SELECT mid_codigo FROM b_minutadet WHERE mid_rec5eta='0' ) " & _
                   "AND   min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   min_codreg=" & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   min_codser=" & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   " & sql1 & "=" & fecper & " " & _
                   "AND   min_racrea>0 AND " & RS1!min_codreg & ">9999 AND " & RS1!min_codser & ">9999 GROUP BY min_codreg, min_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then
             totadi = (totadi / nrorac) 'RS2!min_racrea)
          End If
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          Dim por2 As Double, por4 As Double, por6 As Double, por8 As Double, por10 As Double
          por2 = 0: por4 = 0: por6 = 0: por8 = 0: por10 = 0
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(totrea, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(totadi, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(IIf(nracre > 0, totsal, 0), fg_Pict(6, 0))
          If preven > 0 Then por2 = (totsal1 / preven) * 100
          If preven > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(por2, fg_Pict(3, 2))
          If tgrval > 0 Then por4 = (((cmedes + ajudes + tosdes + cosdns - toddes - cennde) / tgrval) * 100)
          If tgrval > 0 And preven > 0 And totsal > 0 And totsal1 > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(((totsal * por4) / por2), fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format(por4, fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If tgrval > 0 Then por6 = (ctogas / tgrval) * 100
          If tgrval > 0 And totsal1 > 0 And preven > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) = Format(((totsal * por6) / por2), fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 11) = Format(por6, fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If tgrval > 0 Then por8 = (totdep / tgrval) * 100
          If tgrval > 0 And totsal1 > 0 And preven > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 12) = Format(((totsal * por8) / por2), fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 13) = Format(por8, fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If tgrval > 0 Then por10 = (tocope / tgrval) * 100
          If tgrval > 0 And totsal1 > 0 And preven > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 14) = Format(((totsal * por10) / por2), fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 15) = Format(por10, fg_Pict(3, 1))
          por12 = (100 - por2 - por4 - por6 - por8 - por10)
          If tgrval > 0 And totsal1 > 0 And preven > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 16) = Format(((totsal * por12) / por2), fg_Pict(3, 1))
          If por12 <> 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 17) = Format(por12, fg_Pict(3, 1))
          i = i + 1: RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
       .TableCell(tcRows) = i - IIf(i > 1, 1, 0)
       .TableBorder = tbAll
       .EndTable
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    End If
    '-------> Fin detalle teórico/planificado/realizado
    
    '-------> Raciones no Vendidas
    Dim vTotMer As Double
    RS1.Open "SELECT b.min_fecmin, ROUND(SUM((c.mid_cosrec+c.mid_cosdes)* c.mid_nummer),0) AS totmer " & _
             "FROM  b_receta a, b_minuta b, b_minutadet c " & _
             "WHERE b.min_codigo=c.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.mid_codrec=a.rec_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin>=" & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin<=" & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   c.mid_tipmin='2' " & _
             "AND   c.mid_numrac>0 AND c.mid_nummer>0 GROUP BY b.min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          vTotMer = Round(vTotMer + RS1!totmer, 0)
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
       .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1010: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 3) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 4) = True
       .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 9: .TableCell(tcFontSize, 3) = 9: .TableCell(tcFontSize, 4) = 9
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Raciones no Vendidas"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format(vTotMer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       If tgrval > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format(((vTotMer / tgrval) * 100), fg_Pict(3, 2)) & "%"
       .TableBorder = tbNone
       .EndTable
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Presupuesto y proyección ventas
    If (opppto Or opproy) And fecper > 0 Then
       Dim codigo As Long, vFecPos As Double, vTPrePro As Double, Tipo As String, vPPrePro As Double, vValPre As Double, vValPro As Double
       Dim GloEnc1 As String, GloEnc2 As String, GloEnc3 As String, GloEnc4 As String, GloDet As String, nomarch As String, nomarchzip As String
       .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
       .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 12: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Cuadro Comparativo Real - " & IIf(opppto And opproy, "Presupuesto - Proyección", IIf(opppto And Not opproy, "Presupuesto", "Proyección"))
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
       .TableBorder = tbNone
       .EndTable
       .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
       vFecPos = 0
       If fecper > 0 Then vFecPos = Format(BEoM(fg_Ctod(fecper & "25")), "yyyymm")
       Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = IIf(opppto And opproy, 7, 5): .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
       For i = 1 To IIf(opppto And opproy, 7, 5)
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , i) = IIf(i = 3 Or i = 5 Or i = 7, 700, 1418): .TableCell(tcAlign, , i) = taCenterTop
       Next i
       GloEnc1 = "": GloEnc2 = "": GloEnc1 = "": GloEnc2 = "" & ";" & "Contrato" & ";"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = IIf(opppto, "Presupuesto  " & "(" & Meses("01/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4) & ")", "Proyección " & "(" & Meses("01/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(vFecPos, 6), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(vFecPos, 6), 1, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(vFecPos, 6), 1, 4) & ")"): .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
       GloEnc1 = GloEnc1 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & ";"
       GloEnc2 = GloEnc2 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & ";"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "%": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True
       GloEnc1 = GloEnc1 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & ";"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Real A13     " & "(" & Meses("01/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4) & ")": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True
       GloEnc1 = GloEnc1 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & ";"
       GloEnc2 = GloEnc2 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & ";"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "%": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True
       GloEnc1 = GloEnc1 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & ";"
       If opppto And opproy Then
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Proyección " & "(" & Meses("01/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecper, 6), 1, 4) & ")": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 6) = True
          GloEnc1 = GloEnc1 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & ";"
          GloEnc2 = GloEnc2 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & ";"
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "%": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 7) = True
          GloEnc1 = GloEnc1 & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & ";"
       End If
       GloEnc2 = GloEnc2 & "Difer." & ";"
       .TableBorder = tbAll
       .EndTable
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = IIf(opppto And opproy, 7, 5): .TableCell(tcRows) = 10
       For i = 1 To IIf(opppto And opproy, 7, 5)
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , i) = IIf(i = 3 Or i = 5 Or i = 7, 700, 1418): .TableCell(tcAlign, , i) = IIf(i = 1, taLeftTop, taRightTop)
       Next i
'       RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_presupuestoproyeccion WHERE ppr_cencos='" & cencos & "' AND (ppr_anomes=" & fecper & " AND ppr_tipo='1') OR (ppr_anomes=" & vFecPos & " AND ppr_tipo='2') ORDER BY ppr_codigo, ppr_tipo ", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_presupuestoproyeccion WHERE ppr_cencos='" & cencos & "' AND ppr_anomes=" & fecper & " AND (ppr_tipo='1' OR ppr_tipo='2') ORDER BY ppr_codigo, ppr_tipo ", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       i = 1
       codigo = 0: vTPrePro = 0: vPPrePro = 0: vValPre = 0: vValPro = 0
       If Not RS1.EOF Then
          Do While Not RS1.EOF
             If RS1!ppr_codigo <> codigo Then
                If codigo > 0 Then i = i + 1
                codigo = RS1!ppr_codigo
             End If
             If RS1!ppr_codigo = 10 And RS1!ppr_tipo = "1" Then vValPre = RS1!ppr_valor
             If RS1!ppr_codigo = 10 And RS1!ppr_tipo = "2" Then vValPro = RS1!ppr_valor
             vPPrePro = 0
             vTPrePro = IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 10, tgrval, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 20, vTFCost, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 30, ctogas, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 40, totdep, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 50, tocope, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 60, totgas, vTUtili))))))
             If vTPrePro <> 0 And tgrval <> 0 Then vPPrePro = Round((vTPrePro / tgrval) * 100, 2)
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!ppr_descripcion)
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 10, Format(tgrval, fg_Pict(9, 0)), IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 20, Format(vTFCost, fg_Pict(9, 0)), IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 30, Format(ctogas, fg_Pict(9, 0)), IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 40, Format(totdep, fg_Pict(9, 0)), IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 50, Format(tocope, fg_Pict(9, 0)), IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 60, Format(totgas, fg_Pict(9, 0)), Format(vTUtili, fg_Pict(9, 0))))))))
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = vPPrePro
             .TableCell(tcText, i, IIf(RS1!ppr_tipo = "1", 2, IIf(Not opppto And opproy, 2, 6))) = Format(RS1!ppr_valor, fg_Pict(9, 0))
             vPPrePro = 0
             If RS1!ppr_valor <> 0 And vValPre <> 0 And RS1!ppr_tipo = "1" Then
                vPPrePro = Round((RS1!ppr_valor / vValPre) * 100, 2)
             ElseIf RS1!ppr_valor <> 0 And vValPro <> 0 And RS1!ppr_tipo = "2" Then
                vPPrePro = Round((RS1!ppr_valor / vValPro) * 100, 2)
             End If
             .TableCell(tcText, i, IIf(RS1!ppr_tipo = "1", 3, IIf(Not opppto And opproy, 3, 7))) = Format(vPPrePro, fg_Pict(3, 2))
             RS1.MoveNext
          Loop
          '-------> Crear directorio si no existe
          '------->
          mdir = Dir(dir_trabajo_Inf & "\" & "Presupuesto-Proyeccion", vbDirectory)
          If mdir = "" Then MkDir dir_trabajo_Inf & "\" & "Presupuesto-Proyeccion"
          mdir = dir_trabajo_Inf & "Presupuesto-Proyeccion" & "\"
          '------->
          '-------> Fin crear directorio si no existe
          '------->
          nomarch = "Presupuesto-Proyeccion" & Format(Date, "yyyymmdd") & Trim(cencos) & ".txt"
          nomarchzip = "Presupuesto-Proyeccion" & Format(Date, "yyyymmdd") & Trim(cencos) & ".zip"
          If Dir(mdir & nomarch) <> "" Then Kill mdir & nomarch
          If Dir(mdir & Mid(nomarch, 1, Len(nomarch) - 4) & ".xls") <> "" Then Kill mdir & Mid(nomarch, 1, Len(nomarch) - 4) & ".xls"
          Open mdir & nomarch For Output As #2
          GloEnc3 = "": GloEnc3 = ";" & ";": GloEnc4 = "": GloEnc4 = GloEnc2 '& ";"
          GloDet = ""
          RS2.Open "SELECT cli_codigo, cli_nombre FROM b_clientes WHERE cli_codigo='" & cencos & "' AND cli_tipo=0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then GloDet = Trim(RS2!cli_codigo) & ";" & Trim(RS2!cli_nombre) & ";"
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          For j = 1 To i
              If j > 1 Then GloEnc4 = GloEnc4 & GloEnc1
              GloEnc3 = GloEnc3 & .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) & IIf(j = 1 And opppto And Not opproy, ";;", IIf(j = 1 And Not opppto And opproy, ";;", IIf(j = 1 And opppto And opproy, ";;;", IIf(j > 1 And Not opppto And opproy, ";;;", IIf(j > 1 And opppto And Not opproy, ";;;", ";;;;;"))))) & ";"
              GloDet = GloDet & IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 2)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 2)) & ";"
              If j > 1 Then GloDet = GloDet & IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 3)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 3)) & ";"
              GloDet = GloDet & IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 4)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 4)) & ";"
              If j > 1 Then GloDet = GloDet & IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 5)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 5)) & ";"
              If opppto And opproy Then
                 GloDet = GloDet & IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 6)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 6)) & ";"
                 If j = 1 Then
                    GloDet = GloDet & (IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 6)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 6)) - IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 2)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 4))) & ";"
                 Else
                    GloDet = GloDet & IIf(Trim(.TableCell(tcText, j, 7)) = "", 0, .TableCell(tcText, j, 7)) & ";"
                 End If
              ElseIf j = 1 Then
                 GloDet = GloDet & 0 & ";"
              End If
          Next j
          Print #2, GloEnc3
          Print #2, GloEnc4
          Print #2, GloDet
          Close #2
          Set XL = CreateObject("Excel.application")
          XL.Workbooks.OpenText mdir & nomarch, , 1, 1, , , , , , , True, ";"
          XL.ActiveWorkbook.SaveAs FileName:=mdir & Mid(nomarch, 1, Len(nomarch) - 4) & ".xls", _
                                            FileFormat:=xlNormal, password:="", WriteResPassword:="", _
                                            ReadOnlyRecommended:=False, CreateBackup:=False
          XL.Quit
          Set XL = Nothing
          If Dir(mdir & nomarchzip) <> "" Then Kill mdir & nomarchzip
          Preview.AZ1.CreateZip mdir & nomarchzip, "": Preview.AZ1.AddFile mdir & Mid(nomarch, 1, Len(nomarch) - 4) & ".xls", "", True, "": Preview.AZ1.Close
          '-------> verificar si existe archivo mdb destino si existe borrar
          If Dir(mdir & nomarch) <> "" Then Kill mdir & nomarch
          If Dir(mdir & Mid(nomarch, 1, Len(nomarch) - 4) & ".xls") <> "" Then Kill mdir & Mid(nomarch, 1, Len(nomarch) - 4) & ".xls"
       End If
       RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
       .TableCell(tcRows) = i
       .TableBorder = tbAll
       .EndTable
    End If
    '-------> Borrar tablas temporales
    If Trim(aAp) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp & ""
End With
End Function

Public Function I_ListaRecetaPlanificacion(codcas As String, codreg As Long, codser As Long, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, numreg As Long, tipmin As String)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, X As Long, z As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
Dim nomR As String
Dim veccatdie() As Variant
Dim vectippla() As Variant
On Local Error GoTo Error_RecetaPlanificacion
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Recetas Planificación"
fg_carga ""
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Informe de recetas Planificación " & IIf(tipmin = "1", " Teórica ", " Real ") & "Mes : " & Meses("01/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecini, 8), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecini, 8), 1, 4)) & " " & Mid(fg_pone_cero(fecini, 8), 1, 4)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 12000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Servicio"
    RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, codcas, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Trim(RS2!cli_nombre)
    RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
    RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Regimen(2, codreg, ""), vg_db, adOpenForwardOnly ', adOpenStatic
    If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Trim(RS2!reg_nombre)
    RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
    RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Servicio(8, codser, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = Trim(RS2!ser_nombre)
    RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
    
    RS2.Open RutinaLectura.Servicio(8, codser, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS2.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = Trim(RS2!ser_nombre)
    RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
    
    RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT rec_catdie FROM b_receta", vg_db, adOpenForwardOnly ', adOpenStatic
    i = 0
    If Not RS2.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS2.EOF
          RS2.MoveNext: i = i + 1
       Loop
    End If
    ReDim veccatdie(i, 2)
    i = 1
    RS2.MoveFirst
    If Not RS2.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS2.EOF
          veccatdie(i, 1) = RS2!rec_catdie
          veccatdie(i, 2) = fg_BuscaenArbol(RS2!rec_catdie, "a_recetacatdie", "car_codigo")
          RS2.MoveNext: i = i + 1
       Loop
    End If
    RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
    
    RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT rec_tippla FROM b_receta", vg_db, adOpenForwardOnly ', adOpenStatic
    i = 0
    If Not RS2.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS2.EOF
          RS2.MoveNext: i = i + 1
       Loop
    End If
    ReDim vectippla(i, 2)
    i = 1
    RS2.MoveFirst
    If Not RS2.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS2.EOF
          vectippla(i, 1) = RS2!rec_tippla
          vectippla(i, 2) = fg_BuscaenArbol(RS2!rec_tippla, "a_recetatippla", "tip_codigo")
          RS2.MoveNext: i = i + 1
       Loop
    End If
    RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
    
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|"; .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|"; .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|"; .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 100000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    j = 1
    RS_Dato.MoveFirst
    nomR = ""
    C_ExpRec.Bar1(0).Min = 0: C_ExpRec.Bar1(0).Value = 0: C_ExpRec.Bar1(0).max = numreg: C_ExpRec.Bar1(0).Visible = True
    Do While Not RS_Dato.EOF
       C_ExpRec.Bar1(0).Value = C_ExpRec.Bar1(0).Value + 1
       If nomR <> Trim(RS_Dato!rec_nomfan) Then
         If nomR <> "" Then
            .TableCell(tcRows) = fil
            .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
            .TableBorder = tbAll
            totLineas = totLineas + .TableCell(tcRows)
            .EndTable
            .StartTable
            .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 6200
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1150
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2150
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000
            .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "": .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Format(totcanser, fg_Pict(6, vg_RDCa)): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format(totcannet, fg_Pict(6, vg_RDCa)): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format(totcosto, fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa)): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
            Print #1, "|" & "|" & "|"; .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "||" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4)
            .TableBorder = tbNone
            totLineas = totLineas + .TableCell(tcRows)
            .EndTable
         
            If Trim(Preview.rtfPic.text) <> "" Then
               .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
               .StartTable
               .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
               .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
               .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 9: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
               .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = Chr(13) + Preview.rtfPic.text
               Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
               .TableBorder = tbBox
               totLineas = totLineas + .TableCell(tcRows)
               .EndTable
               For X = 1 To Len(Preview.rtfPic.text)
                   If Asc(Mid(Preview.rtfPic.text, X, 1)) = 13 Then totLineas = totLineas + 1
               Next X
            End If
           If totLineas > 33 And .CurrentY < 14500 Then totLineas = 0: .NewPage
         End If
         totLineas = 0
         Preview.rtfPic.TextRTF = ""
         If IsNull(RS_Dato!rec_metpre) Or Trim(RS_Dato!rec_metpre) = "" Then
            Preview.rtfPic.TextRTF = ""
         ElseIf Not IsNull(RS_Dato!rec_metpre) Then
            Preview.rtfPic.TextRTF = Trim(RS_Dato!rec_metpre)
         End If
         lc_codrec = RS_Dato!mid_codrec
         .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
         NomFan = Trim(RS_Dato!rec_nomfan)
         'CATEGORIA DIETETICA,TIPO PLATO Y TIPO RACIONES
         .StartTable
         .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
         .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Cat. Dietetica"
         .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Tipo Plato"
         .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Nro. Raciones"
         'buscar categoria dietetica
         For z = 1 To UBound(veccatdie)
             If veccatdie(z, 1) = RS_Dato!rec_catdie Then .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = veccatdie(z, 2): Exit For
         Next z
         'buscar tipo plato
         For z = 1 To UBound(vectippla)
             If vectippla(z, 1) = RS_Dato!rec_tippla Then .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = vectippla(z, 2): Exit For
         Next z
         .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = 1
         Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
         Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
         Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
         .TableBorder = tbNone
         totLineas = totLineas + .TableCell(tcRows) + 3
         .EndTable
         'NOMBRE RECETA
         .StartTable
         .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
         .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 9: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
         .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "* " & nomrec & " *"
         .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "* " & NomFan & " *"
         Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
         .TableBorder = tbNone
         totLineas = totLineas + .TableCell(tcRows)
         .EndTable
         .text = Chr(13)
         .StartTable
         .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
         
         .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
         .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Nombre Ingrediente"
         .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "C.Bruta"
         .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "%Aprov."
         .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "%A.Coc."
         .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "C.Servir"
         .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "%P.Nut."
         .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "C.Neta"
         .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Costo"
         Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & _
                   .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8)
         .TableBorder = tbAll
         totLineas = totLineas + .TableCell(tcRows)
         .EndTable
         .StartTable
         .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 150
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
         .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
         fil = 0: totcanser = 0: totcannet = 0: totcosto = 0
         nomR = Trim(RS_Dato!rec_nomfan)
       End If
       fil = fil + 1
       canpro = Format(RS_Dato!red_canpro, fg_Pict(6, vg_RDCa))
       canser = Format((RS_Dato!red_pctapr / 100) * canpro * (RS_Dato!red_pctcoc / 100), fg_Pict(6, vg_RDCa))
       cannet = Format((RS_Dato!red_pctnut / 100) * canpro, fg_Pict(6, vg_RDCa))
       .TableCell(tcText, fil, 1) = RS_Dato!ing_nombre
       .TableCell(tcText, fil, 2) = canpro
       .TableCell(tcText, fil, 3) = RS_Dato!red_pctapr
       .TableCell(tcText, fil, 4) = RS_Dato!red_pctcoc
       .TableCell(tcText, fil, 5) = canser
       .TableCell(tcText, fil, 6) = RS_Dato!red_pctnut
       .TableCell(tcText, fil, 7) = cannet
       .TableCell(tcText, fil, 8) = Format(canpro * RS_Dato!cpi_precos, fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, fil, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, fil, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, fil, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, fil, 4) & "|" & _
                 .TableCell(tcText, fil, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, fil, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, fil, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, fil, 8)
       totcanser = totcanser + canser
       totcannet = totcannet + cannet
       totcosto = Format(totcosto + canpro * RS_Dato!cpi_precos, fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
       RS_Dato.MoveNext
    Loop
    
    .TableCell(tcRows) = fil
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    totLineas = totLineas + .TableCell(tcRows)
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 6200
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1150
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2150
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "": .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Format(totcanser, fg_Pict(6, vg_RDCa)): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format(totcannet, fg_Pict(6, vg_RDCa)): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Format(totcosto, fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa)): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    Print #1, "|" & "|" & "|"; .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "||" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    totLineas = totLineas + .TableCell(tcRows)
    .EndTable

    If Trim(Preview.rtfPic.text) <> "" Then
      .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
      .StartTable
      .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
      .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
      .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 9: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
      .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = Chr(13) + Preview.rtfPic.text
      Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
      .TableBorder = tbBox
      totLineas = totLineas + .TableCell(tcRows)
      .EndTable
      For X = 1 To Len(Preview.rtfPic.text)
          If Asc(Mid(Preview.rtfPic.text, X, 1)) = 13 Then totLineas = totLineas + 1
      Next X
    End If
    If totLineas > 33 And .CurrentY < 14500 Then totLineas = 0: .NewPage
    totLineas = 0
    .EndDoc
    Close #1
End With
fg_descarga
C_ExpRec.Bar1(0).Visible = False
Preview.Toolbar1_ButtonClick Preview.Toolbar1.Buttons("word")
Exit Function
Error_RecetaPlanificacion:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_ComprobanteGasto()

Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, X As Long, y As Long

On Local Error GoTo Error_ComprobanteGasto

fg_carga ""
mgstitulo = "Comprobante de Gasto"
Preview.Refresh

With Preview.VSPrinter
    
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500
    .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Comprobante de Gasto"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    X = .CurrentX
    y = .CurrentY

    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.* FROM b_totcompras a WHERE a.toc_rutpro = '" & vg_RDC & "' AND a.toc_tipdoc = '" & vg_TDC & "' AND a.toc_numdoc = " & vg_NDC & " AND a.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then
       
       RS1.Close
       Set RS1 = Nothing
       Close #1
       GoTo Fin_Docto 'Cierra Docto.
       
    End If
    
    .FontName = "Tahoma"
    .BrushStyle = bsTransparent
    .FontSize = 12
    .DrawRectangle X, y, X + 500, y + 500
    SetCursorBaseline Preview.VSPrinter, X + 700, y + 500
    .text = "SODEXHO"
    'dibujar formato fecha
    X = 8400
    .DrawRectangle X, y, X + 700, y + 500
    .DrawRectangle X, y, X + 1400, y + 500
    .DrawRectangle X, y, X + 2100, y + 500
    SetCursorBaseline Preview.VSPrinter, X + 1, y + 1
    .text = "Día     Mes    Año"
    SetCursorBaseline Preview.VSPrinter, X + 200, y + 400
    .text = Mid(RS1!toc_fecemi, 1, 2) & "     " & Mid(RS1!toc_fecemi, 4, 2) & "     " & Mid(RS1!toc_fecemi, 7, 4)
    'fin dibujar formato fecha
    
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    X = 499
    y = 2800
    .DrawRectangle X, y, X + 500, y + 500
    SetCursorBaseline Preview.VSPrinter, X + 700, y + 500
    .text = "SAI"
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    y = 3500
    .DrawRectangle X, y, X + 500, y + 500
    SetCursorBaseline Preview.VSPrinter, X + 700, y + 500
    .text = "SAN"
    
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    .FontSize = 10
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1) = 6500
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Nº Documento : " & Trim(RS1!toc_numdoc)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    
    If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
    RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    RS2.Open "SELECT * FROM b_clientes WHERE cli_tipo = 0 ORDER BY cli_codigo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS2.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2
    .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1) = 6500
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 2) = 9000
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 2) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato : " & Trim(RS2!cli_nombre)
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Código : " & Trim(RS2!cli_codigo)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    
    RS2.Close
    Set RS2 = Nothing
    .EndTable

    .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1) = 13500
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1) = "____________________________________________________________________________________"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    
    .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1) = 13500
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1) = "Se ha pagado a : " & "    " & "_____________________________________________________________________"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable

    .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1) = 13500
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1) = "La cantidad de : " & " " & fg_aletras(RS1!toc_totdoc, "PESO", "PESOS", "", "")
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable

    X = .CurrentX
    y = .CurrentY
    X = 8500
    y = 5900 '5650
    .DrawRectangle X, y, X + 2100, y + 400
    SetCursorBaseline Preview.VSPrinter, X + 500, y + 300
    .text = " $   " & Format(RS1!toc_totdoc, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    X = .CurrentX
    y = .CurrentY
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1) = 13500
    .TableCell(tcAlign, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1) = "Por concepto de : " & " " & "_____________________________________________________________________"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable

    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    RS1.Open "SELECT e.cta_nombre, d.pro_ctacon, SUM(b.dec_canmer*b.dec_precom) AS totdoc " & _
             "FROM b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos d, a_ctacontable e " & _
             "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
             "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
             "AND   b.dec_codmer = d.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   d.pro_ctacon = e.cta_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.toc_rutpro = '" & vg_RDC & "' " & _
             "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = '" & vg_TDC & "' " & _
             "AND   a.toc_numdoc = " & vg_NDC & " " & _
             "AND   a.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "GROUP BY e.cta_nombre, d.pro_ctacon ORDER BY e.cta_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then
        
        RS1.Close
        Set RS1 = Nothing
        Close #1
        GoTo Fin_Docto 'Cierra Docto.
        
    End If

    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    X = .CurrentX
    y = .CurrentY
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2
    .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4200
    .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2500
    .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Cuenta Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Valor"
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4200
    .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2500
    .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    
    i = 1
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!cta_nombre) & " (" & Trim(RS1!pro_ctacon) & ")"
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(RS1!totdoc, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          RS1.MoveNext
          i = i + 1
       
       Loop
    
    Else
        
        i = i + 1
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i + 1
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
     
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    .text = Chr(13)
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 3
    .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 3500
    .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterTop
    
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500
    .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop
    
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 3500
    .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Confeccionado Por"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Vº Bº ADC "
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Vº Bº JOP "
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable

    .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500
    .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True:
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "IMPORTANTE : Este documento no reemplaza boletas ni facturas. Se utiliza en gastos como movilización"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable

    .MarginLeft = "13.2cm"
    .CurrentX = X
    .CurrentY = y

    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Recibidos por"
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable

Fin_Docto:
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1

Exit Function
Error_ComprobanteGasto:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function

End Function

Public Function I_FoodCostOld(CodCon As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, AliDes As Integer)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, rutcli As String, sql1 As String, Fecha As Long, vTotCos As Double, vGrlCos As Double, vTotVta As Double, vGrlVta As Double
Dim MaxFil As Long, auxfec As String, auxser As Long, auxreg As Long
Dim vecfoocost() As Variant
On Local Error GoTo Error_FoodCost
MsgTitulo = "Food Cost"
fg_carga ""
sql1 = IIf(AliDes = 0, "c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') ", IIf(AliDes = 1, "c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "') ", "(c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') OR c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "')) "))
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 13: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Food Cost " & IIf(AliDes = 2, " (Alimento-Desechable)", IIf(AliDes = 0, " (Alimento) ", " (Desechable)"))
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    RS1.Open "SELECT cli_codigo, cli_nombre FROM b_clientes WHERE cli_codigo = '" & CodCon & "' AND cli_tipo = 0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Trim(RS1!cli_codigo) & " - " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Rango Fecha"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Mid(fecini, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4) & " - " & Mid(fecfin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 1, 4)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 6: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Servicio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Costo Día"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Venta Día"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Food Cost"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 6: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    MaxFil = 0
    For i = fecini To fecfin: MaxFil = MaxFil + 1: Next i
    ReDim vecfoocost(MaxFil, 4)
    j = fecini
    For i = 1 To MaxFil
        vecfoocost(i, 1) = j: j = j + 1
        vecfoocost(i, 2) = 0
        vecfoocost(i, 3) = 0
        vecfoocost(i, 4) = 0
    Next i
    'Gerenar Precio Venta
     nArch = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmpfoodcost"
     fg_CheckTmp (nArch)
     vg_db.Execute "SELECT mir.mir_cencos, mir.mir_codreg, mir.mir_codser, mir.mir_fecmin, mir.mir_rutcli, mir.mir_nrorac, max(b_preciovta.prv_fecvig) as prv_fecvig into " & nArch & " " & _
                   "FROM b_minutaraciones mir INNER JOIN b_preciovta ON (mir.mir_rutcli = b_preciovta.prv_rutcli) AND (mir.mir_codser = b_preciovta.prv_codser) AND (mir.mir_codreg = b_preciovta.prv_codreg) AND (mir.mir_cencos = b_preciovta.prv_cencos and mir.mir_fecmin>=b_preciovta.prv_fecvig) " & _
                   "WHERE mir.mir_cencos = '" & CodCon & "' " & _
                   "AND   mir.mir_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ")  " & _
                   "AND   mir.mir_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ")  " & _
                   "AND   mir.mir_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
                   "AND   mir.mir_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                   "AND  (mir.mir_rutcli <> 'PRODUCIDAS' OR mir.mir_rutcli <> 'PERSONAL') " & _
                   "AND   mir.mir_nrorac > 0 " & _
                   "GROUP BY mir.mir_cencos, mir.mir_codreg, mir.mir_codser, mir.mir_fecmin, mir.mir_rutcli, mir.mir_nrorac"
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_codreg, f.reg_nombre, a.tov_codser, e.ser_nombre, a.tov_fecpro, " & _
             "SUM(IIf(a.tov_tipdoc='SP',b.dev_ptotal,'-' & b.dev_ptotal)) AS totdoc " & _
             "FROM  b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c, a_servicio e, a_regimen f " & _
             "WHERE a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
             "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codreg = f.reg_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codser = e.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.dev_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   " & sql1 & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_rutcli = '" & CodCon & "' " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ")  " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ")  " & _
             "AND  (a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' or a.tov_tipdoc = 'DP') " & _
             "AND   b.dev_canmer <> 0 " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro >= cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro <= cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_codreg, f.reg_nombre, a.tov_codser, e.ser_nombre, a.tov_fecpro ORDER BY a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser, a.tov_fecpro", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    i = 1: auxser = 0: vTotCos = 0: vGrlCos = 0: vTotVta = 0: vGrlVta = 0
    Fecha = 0
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!tov_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!tov_codser <> auxser Then
             If auxser > 0 Then
                For j = 1 To MaxFil
                    If vecfoocost(j, 2) > 0 Or vecfoocost(j, 3) > 0 Then
                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Mid(vecfoocost(j, 1), 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(vecfoocost(j, 1), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(vecfoocost(j, 1), 1, 4)
                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(vecfoocost(j, 2) > 0, Format(vecfoocost(j, 2), fg_Pict(9, 0)), "")
                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(vecfoocost(j, 3) > 0, Format(vecfoocost(j, 3), fg_Pict(9, 0)), "")
                       vTotCos = (vTotCos + vecfoocost(j, 2))
                       vGrlCos = (vGrlCos + vecfoocost(j, 2))
                       vTotVta = (vTotVta + vecfoocost(j, 3))
                       vGrlVta = (vGrlVta + vecfoocost(j, 3))
                       If vecfoocost(j, 3) > 0 And vecfoocost(j, 2) > 0 Then
                         .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(((vecfoocost(j, 2) / vecfoocost(j, 3)) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
                       End If
                       i = i + 1
                    End If
                Next j
                For j = 1 To MaxFil
                    vecfoocost(j, 2) = 0
                    vecfoocost(j, 3) = 0
                    vecfoocost(j, 4) = 0
                    vecfoocost(j, 5) = 0
                    vecfoocost(j, 6) = 0
                    vecfoocost(j, 7) = 0
                    vecfoocost(j, 8) = 0
                Next j
                i = i + 1
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total Servicio"
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(vTotCos > 0, Format(vTotCos, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(vTotVta > 0, Format(vTotVta, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
                If vTotCos > 0 And vTotVta > 0 Then
                   .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(((vTotCos / vTotVta) * 100), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa)) & " %"
                Else
                   .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
                End If
                i = i + 1
                vTotCos = 0: vTotVta = 0
             End If
             'Traer Raciones Vs Ventas
             RS2.Open "SELECT mir.mir_fecmin, mir.prv_fecvig, mir.mir_rutcli, SUM(mir.mir_nrorac) AS nrorac, SUM(prv.prv_preven) AS preven " & _
                      "FROM " & nArch & " mir, b_preciovta prv " & _
                      "WHERE mir.mir_rutcli = prv.prv_rutcli " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_codser = prv.prv_codser " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_codreg = prv.prv_codreg " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_cencos = prv.prv_cencos " & _
                      "AND   mir.prv_fecvig = prv.prv_fecvig " & _
