                      "AND   mir.mir_cencos = '" & CodCon & "' " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_codreg = " & RS1!tov_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_codser = " & RS1!tov_codser & " " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                      "GROUP BY mir.mir_fecmin, mir.prv_fecvig, mir.mir_rutcli", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then
                Do While Not RS2.EOF
                   vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!mir_fecmin, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 3) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!mir_fecmin, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 3) + (RS2!nrorac * RS2!preven))
                   RS2.MoveNext
                Loop
             End If
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
             'Traer ventas contado
             RS2.Open "SELECT vtc_fecvta, vtc_codser, SUM(vtc_totmon) AS totmon FROM b_ventacontado " & _
                      "WHERE vtc_codreg = " & RS1!tov_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   vtc_codser = " & RS1!tov_codser & " " & _
                      "AND   vtc_fecvta >= " & fecini & " AND vtc_fecvta <= " & fecfin & " GROUP BY vtc_fecvta, vtc_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then
                Do While Not RS2.EOF
                   vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!vtc_fecvta, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 3) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!vtc_fecvta, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 3) + RS2!totmon)
                   RS2.MoveNext
                Loop
             End If
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
             If RS1!tov_codreg <> auxreg Then
                If auxreg > 0 Then i = i + 1
                .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 3
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!tov_codreg & " - " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre)
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
                Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3)
                i = i + 1
             End If
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!tov_codser & " - " & Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
             .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
             .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
             Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3)
             auxreg = RS1!tov_codreg
             auxser = RS1!tov_codser
             i = i + 1
          End If
          vecfoocost(Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "dd") - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 2) = (vecfoocost(Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "dd") - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 2) + RS1!totdoc)
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
       For j = 1 To MaxFil
           If vecfoocost(j, 2) > 0 Or vecfoocost(j, 3) > 0 Then
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Mid(vecfoocost(j, 1), 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(vecfoocost(j, 1), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(vecfoocost(j, 1), 1, 4)
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(vecfoocost(j, 2) > 0, Format(vecfoocost(j, 2), fg_Pict(9, 0)), "")
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(vecfoocost(j, 3) > 0, Format(vecfoocost(j, 3), fg_Pict(9, 0)), "")
              vTotCos = (vTotCos + vecfoocost(j, 2))
              vGrlCos = (vGrlCos + vecfoocost(j, 2))
              vTotVta = (vTotVta + vecfoocost(j, 3))
              vGrlVta = (vGrlVta + vecfoocost(j, 3))
              If vecfoocost(j, 3) > 0 And vecfoocost(j, 2) > 0 Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(((vecfoocost(j, 2) / vecfoocost(j, 3)) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
              End If
              i = i + 1
           End If
       Next j
       For j = 1 To MaxFil
           vecfoocost(j, 2) = 0
           vecfoocost(j, 3) = 0
           vecfoocost(j, 4) = 0
       Next j
       i = i + 1
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total Servicio"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(vTotCos > 0, Format(vTotCos, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(vTotVta > 0, Format(vTotVta, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
       If vTotCos > 0 And vTotVta > 0 Then
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(((vTotCos / vTotVta) * 100), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa)) & " %"
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
       End If

       i = i + 2
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total General"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(vGrlCos > 0, Format(vGrlCos, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(vGrlVta > 0, Format(vGrlVta, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
       If vGrlCos > 0 And vGrlVta > 0 Then
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(((vGrlCos / vGrlVta) * 100), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa)) & " %"
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
       End If
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbBottom
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Refresh
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_FoodCost:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_FoodCost(CodCon As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, AliDes As Integer)

Dim i As Long, j As Long, rutcli As String, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String, sql4 As String, Fecha As Long
Dim vTotRacVen As Double, vTotVtaDia As Double, vTotRacPro As Double, vTotCosDia As Double
Dim vGrlRacVen As Double, vGrlVtaDia As Double, vGrlRacPro As Double, vGrlCosDia As Double
Dim MaxFil As Long, auxfec As String, auxser As Long, auxreg As Long
Dim vecfoocost() As Variant

On Local Error GoTo Error_FoodCost

MsgTitulo = "Food Cost"
fg_carga ""

sql1 = IIf(AliDes = 0, "c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') ", IIf(AliDes = 1, "c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "') ", "(c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') OR c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "')) "))

With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 13: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Food Cost " & IIf(AliDes = 2, " (Alimento-Desechable)", IIf(AliDes = 0, " (Alimento) ", " (Desechable)"))
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, CodCon, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Trim(RS1!cli_codigo) & " - " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Rango Fecha"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Mid(fecini, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4) & " - " & Mid(fecfin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 1, 4)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 2) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Servicio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Rac. Vendidas"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Venta Día"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = "Valor Bandeja"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = "Rac. Producidas"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = "Costo Día"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = "Costo Bandeja"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 8) = "Food Cost"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 8)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    MaxFil = 0
    For i = fecini To fecfin: MaxFil = MaxFil + 1: Next i
    ReDim vecfoocost(MaxFil, 8)
    j = fecini
    For i = 1 To MaxFil
        vecfoocost(i, 1) = j: j = j + 1 '-------> Fecha
        vecfoocost(i, 2) = 0 '-------> Rac. Vendidas
        vecfoocost(i, 3) = 0 '-------> Venta día
        vecfoocost(i, 4) = 0 '-------> Rac. Producidas
        vecfoocost(i, 5) = 0 '-------> Costo Día
        vecfoocost(i, 6) = 0
        vecfoocost(i, 7) = 0
        vecfoocost(i, 8) = 0
    Next i
    '-------> Gerenar Precio Venta Vendidas & Producidas
     nArch = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_foodcost"
     fg_CheckTmp (nArch)
     vg_db.Execute "SELECT mir.mir_cencos, mir.mir_codreg, mir.mir_codser, mir.mir_fecmin, mir.mir_rutcli, isnull(mir.mir_nrorac,0) as mir_nrorac, max(b_preciovta.prv_fecvig) as prv_fecvig into " & nArch & " " & _
                   "FROM b_minutaraciones mir INNER JOIN b_preciovta ON (mir.mir_rutcli = b_preciovta.prv_rutcli) AND (mir.mir_codser = b_preciovta.prv_codser) AND (mir.mir_codreg = b_preciovta.prv_codreg) AND (mir.mir_cencos = b_preciovta.prv_cencos and mir.mir_fecmin>=b_preciovta.prv_fecvig) " & _
                   "WHERE mir.mir_cencos = '" & CodCon & "' " & _
                   "AND   mir.mir_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ")  " & _
                   "AND   mir.mir_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ")  " & _
                   "AND   mir.mir_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
                   "AND   mir.mir_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                   "AND   mir.mir_rutcli NOT IN ('PERSONAL', 'PRODUCIDAS') " & _
                   "AND   mir.mir_nrorac > 0 " & _
                   "GROUP BY mir.mir_cencos, mir.mir_codreg, mir.mir_codser, mir.mir_fecmin, mir.mir_rutcli, mir.mir_nrorac"
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " SUM(IIf(a.tov_tipdoc='SP',b.dev_ptotal,'-' & b.dev_ptotal)) AS totdoc ", " SUM(CASE WHEN a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' THEN b.dev_ptotal ELSe (-1 * b.dev_ptotal) END) AS totdoc ")
    sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sql4 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_codreg, f.reg_nombre, a.tov_codser, e.ser_nombre, a.tov_fecpro, " & _
             "  " & sql2 & " " & _
             "FROM  b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c, a_servicio e, a_regimen f " & _
             "WHERE a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
             "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codreg = f.reg_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codser = e.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.dev_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   " & sql1 & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_rutcli = '" & CodCon & "' " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ")  " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ")  " & _
             "AND  (a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' or a.tov_tipdoc = 'DP') " & _
             "AND   b.dev_canmer <> 0 " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro >= " & sql3 & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro <= " & sql4 & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_codreg, f.reg_nombre, a.tov_codser, e.ser_nombre, a.tov_fecpro ORDER BY a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser, a.tov_fecpro", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    i = 1: auxreg = 0: auxser = 0: auxfec = ""
    vTotRacVen = 0: vTotVtaDia = 0: vTotRacPro = 0: vTotCosDia = 0
    vGrlRacVen = 0: vTotGrlDia = 0: vGrlRacPro = 0: vGrlCosDia = 0
    Fecha = 0
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          '-------> Imprimir servicio
          If RS1!tov_codreg <> auxreg Then
             If auxreg > 0 Then i = i + 1
          End If
          
          auxfec = RS1!tov_fecpro
          auxreg = RS1!tov_codreg
          auxser = RS1!tov_codser
          
          '-------> Imprimir regimen
          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 3
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!tov_codreg & " - " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre)
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3)
          i = i + 1
          
          '-------> Imprimir servicio
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
          .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 2) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 2) = 3
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!tov_codser & " - " & Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3)
          i = i + 1
          
          Do While Not RS1.EOF And RS1!tov_codreg = auxreg And RS1!tov_codser = auxser
             
             '-------> Traer Raciones Vs Ventas
             If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
             RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
             vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
             
             RS2.Open "SELECT mir.mir_fecmin, mir.prv_fecvig, mir.mir_rutcli, SUM(mir.mir_nrorac) AS nrorac, SUM(prv.prv_preven) AS preven " & _
                      "FROM " & nArch & " mir, b_preciovta prv " & _
                      "WHERE mir.mir_rutcli = prv.prv_rutcli " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_codser = prv.prv_codser " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_codreg = prv.prv_codreg " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_cencos = prv.prv_cencos " & _
                      "AND   mir.prv_fecvig = prv.prv_fecvig " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_cencos = '" & CodCon & "' " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_codreg = " & RS1!tov_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_codser = " & RS1!tov_codser & " " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_fecmin >= " & Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                      "AND   mir.mir_fecmin <= " & Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                      "GROUP BY mir.mir_fecmin, mir.prv_fecvig, mir.mir_rutcli", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then
                Do While Not RS2.EOF
                   vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!mir_fecmin, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 2) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!mir_fecmin, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 2) + RS2!nrorac)
                   vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!mir_fecmin, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 3) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!mir_fecmin, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 3) + (RS2!preven * RS2!nrorac))
                   vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!mir_fecmin, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!mir_fecmin, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) + 1)
                   RS2.MoveNext
                Loop
             End If
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
             
             '-------> Traer ventas contado
             If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
             RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
             vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
             
             RS2.Open "SELECT vtc_fecvta, vtc_codser, SUM(vtc_totmon) AS totmon FROM b_ventacontado " & _
                      "WHERE vtc_codreg = " & RS1!tov_codreg & " AND vtc_cencos='" & CodCon & "'" & _
                      "AND   vtc_codser = " & RS1!tov_codser & " " & _
                      "AND   vtc_fecvta >= " & Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd") & " AND vtc_fecvta <= " & Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd") & " GROUP BY vtc_fecvta, vtc_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then
                Do While Not RS2.EOF
                   vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!vtc_fecvta, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 3) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!vtc_fecvta, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 3) + RS2!totmon)
                   vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!vtc_fecvta, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!vtc_fecvta, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) + 1)
                   RS2.MoveNext
                Loop
             End If
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
             
             vecfoocost(Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "dd") - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 5) = (vecfoocost(Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "dd") - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 5) + RS1!totdoc)
             vecfoocost(Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "dd") - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) = (vecfoocost(Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "dd") - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) + 1)
             
             '-------> Traer raciones producidas
             
             If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
             RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
             vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
             
             RS2.Open "SELECT b.min_fecmin, b.min_racrea, " & _
                      "ROUND(SUM(isnull(c.mid_cosrec,0)*isnull(c.mid_numrac,0)),2) AS mid_cosali, ROUND(SUM(isnull(c.mid_cosdes,0)*isnull(c.mid_numrac,0)),2) AS mid_cosdes " & _
                      "FROM b_minuta b, b_minutadet c " & _
                      "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
                      "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & CodCon & "' " & _
                      "AND   b.min_codreg = " & RS1!tov_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   b.min_codser = " & RS1!tov_codser & " " & _
                      "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                      "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                      "AND   c.mid_tipmin  = '2' " & _
                      "GROUP BY b.min_fecmin, b.min_racrea " & _
                      "ORDER BY b.min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then
                Do While Not RS2.EOF
                   vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!min_fecmin, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 4) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!min_fecmin, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 4) + IIf(IsNull(RS2!min_racrea), 0, RS2!min_racrea))
                   vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!min_fecmin, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS2!min_fecmin, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) + 1)
                   RS2.MoveNext
                Loop
             End If
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
             RS1.MoveNext
             If RS1.EOF Then Exit Do
          Loop
          
          .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 2) = taRightTop
          For j = 1 To MaxFil
              If vecfoocost(j, 8) > 0 Then
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Mid(vecfoocost(j, 1), 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(vecfoocost(j, 1), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(vecfoocost(j, 1), 1, 4)
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(vecfoocost(j, 2) > 0, Format(vecfoocost(j, 2), fg_Pict(9, 0)), "")
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(vecfoocost(j, 3) > 0, Format(vecfoocost(j, 3), fg_Pict(9, 0)), "")
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
                If vecfoocost(j, 2) > 0 And vecfoocost(j, 3) > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(((vecfoocost(j, 3) / vecfoocost(j, 2))), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(vecfoocost(j, 4) > 0, Format(vecfoocost(j, 4), fg_Pict(9, 0)), "")
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(vecfoocost(j, 5) > 0, Format(vecfoocost(j, 5), fg_Pict(9, 0)), "")
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = ""
                If vecfoocost(j, 5) > 0 And vecfoocost(j, 4) > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(((vecfoocost(j, 5) / vecfoocost(j, 4))), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
                If vecfoocost(j, 5) > 0 And vecfoocost(j, 3) > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(((vecfoocost(j, 5) / vecfoocost(j, 3)) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
                '-------> Totales
                vTotRacVen = vTotRacVen + vecfoocost(j, 2)
                vTotVtaDia = vTotVtaDia + vecfoocost(j, 3)
                vTotRacPro = vTotRacPro + vecfoocost(j, 4)
                vTotCosDia = vTotCosDia + vecfoocost(j, 5)
                '-------> Totales Gral.
                vGrlRacVen = vGrlRacVen + vecfoocost(j, 2)
                vGrlVtaDia = vGrlVtaDia + vecfoocost(j, 3)
                vGrlRacPro = vGrlRacPro + vecfoocost(j, 4)
                vGrlCosDia = vGrlCosDia + vecfoocost(j, 5)
                '-------> Contrador de impresión
                i = i + 1
              End If
          Next j
          '-------> Limpiar Vector
          For j = 1 To MaxFil
              vecfoocost(j, 2) = 0
              vecfoocost(j, 3) = 0
              vecfoocost(j, 4) = 0
              vecfoocost(j, 5) = 0
              vecfoocost(j, 6) = 0
              vecfoocost(j, 7) = 0
              vecfoocost(j, 8) = 0
          Next j
          
          i = i + 1
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Tot. Serv."
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(vTotRacVen > 0, Format(vTotRacVen, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(vTotVtaDia > 0, Format(vTotVtaDia, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
          If vTotRacVen > 0 And vTotVtaDia > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(((vTotVtaDia / vTotRacVen)), fg_Pict(9, 2))
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(vTotRacPro > 0, Format(vTotRacPro, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(vTotCosDia > 0, Format(vTotCosDia, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = ""
          If vTotRacPro > 0 And vTotCosDia > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(((vTotCosDia / vTotRacPro)), fg_Pict(9, 2))
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
          If vTotVtaDia > 0 And vTotCosDia > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(((vTotCosDia / vTotVtaDia) * 100), fg_Pict(9, 2)) & " %"
         
          i = i + 1
          '-------> Limpiar Variables
          vTotRacVen = 0: vTotVtaDia = 0: vTotRacPro = 0: vTotCosDia = 0
          If Not RS1.EOF Then i = i + 1
       Loop
       i = i + 2
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Tot. Gral."
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(vGrlRacVen > 0, Format(vGrlRacVen, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(vGrlVtaDia > 0, Format(vGrlVtaDia, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
       If vGrlRacVen > 0 And vGrlVtaDia > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(((vGrlVtaDia / vGrlRacVen)), fg_Pict(9, 2))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(vGrlRacPro > 0, Format(vGrlRacPro, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(vGrlCosDia > 0, Format(vGrlCosDia, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = ""
       If vGrlRacPro > 0 And vGrlCosDia > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(((vGrlCosDia / vGrlRacPro)), fg_Pict(9, 2))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
       If vGrlVtaDia > 0 And vGrlCosDia > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(((vGrlCosDia / vGrlVtaDia) * 100), fg_Pict(9, 2)) & " %"
       '-------> Limpiar Variables
       vTotRacVen = 0: vTotVtaDia = 0: vTotRacPro = 0: vTotCosDia = 0
       vGrlRacVen = 0: vTotGrlDia = 0: vGrlRacPro = 0: vGrlCosDia = 0
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    '---------> Ini Ventas servicios contados
    Dim cuenta1 As String
    Dim cuenta2 As String
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

    If AliDes = 0 Then
    
       cuenta1 = fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")
       cuenta2 = ""
       
    ElseIf AliDes = 1 Then
    
       cuenta1 = fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")
       cuenta2 = ""
    
    ElseIf AliDes = 2 Then
    
       cuenta1 = fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")
       cuenta2 = fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")
    
    End If
   
    Dim ind As Long
    MaxFil = 0
    For ind = fecini To fecfin: MaxFil = MaxFil + 1: Next ind
    
    ReDim vecfoocost(MaxFil, 8)
    j = fecini
    For ind = 1 To MaxFil
        vecfoocost(ind, 1) = j: j = j + 1 '-------> Fecha
        vecfoocost(ind, 2) = 0 '-------> Rac. Vendidas
        vecfoocost(ind, 3) = 0 '-------> Venta día
        vecfoocost(ind, 4) = 0 '-------> Rac. Producidas
        vecfoocost(ind, 5) = 0 '-------> Costo Día
        vecfoocost(ind, 6) = 0
        vecfoocost(ind, 7) = 0
        vecfoocost(ind, 8) = 0
    Next ind
   
    Set RS1 = vg_db.Execute("sgp_Sel_InfFoodCostSalidaDevolucionVentaServicioEspeciales '" & CodCon & "', " & vg_codbod & ", " & sql3 & ", " & sql4 & ", '" & cuenta1 & "', '" & cuenta2 & "'")
    Dim auxservicios As String
    auxservicios = ""
    
    i = i + 1
    auxfec = ""
    vTotRacVen = 0: vTotVtaDia = 0: vTotRacPro = 0: vTotCosDia = 0
    vGrlRacVen = 0: vTotGrlDia = 0: vGrlRacPro = 0: vGrlCosDia = 0
    vGrlVtaDia = 0
    Fecha = 0
    
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          
          '-------> Imprimir servicio
          If RS1!tos_Venta_servicio_Especiales <> auxservicio Then
          
             i = i + 1
          
          End If
          
          auxfec = RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion
          auxservicio = RS1!tos_Venta_servicio_Especiales
          
          '-------> Imprimir servicio
          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 3
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Ventas Servicios Especiales : " & RS1!tos_Venta_servicio_Especiales
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3)
          i = i + 1
          
          Do While Not RS1.EOF And RS1!tos_Venta_servicio_Especiales = auxservicio
             
             vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 2) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 2) + RS1!TotComensales)
             vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 3) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 3) + RS1!TotPrecioServicio)
             vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) + 1)
             
             vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 3) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 3) + 0)
             vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) + 1)
             
             vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 5) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 5) + RS1!totdoc)
             vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) + 1)
             
             vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 4) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 4) + IIf(IsNull(RS1!TotComensales), 0, RS1!TotComensales))
             vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) = (vecfoocost(Mid(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, 7, 2) - Mid(fecini, 7, 2) + 1, 8) + 1)
             
             RS1.MoveNext
             
             If RS1.EOF Then Exit Do
          
          Loop
          
          .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 2) = taRightTop
          For j = 1 To MaxFil
              
              If vecfoocost(j, 8) > 0 Then
                
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Mid(vecfoocost(j, 1), 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(vecfoocost(j, 1), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(vecfoocost(j, 1), 1, 4)
                '.TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(vecfoocost(j, 2) > 0, Format(vecfoocost(j, 2), fg_Pict(9, 0)), "")
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(vecfoocost(j, 3) > 0, Format(vecfoocost(j, 3), fg_Pict(9, 0)), "")
                
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
                If vecfoocost(j, 2) > 0 And vecfoocost(j, 3) > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(((vecfoocost(j, 3) / vecfoocost(j, 2))), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(vecfoocost(j, 4) > 0, Format(vecfoocost(j, 4), fg_Pict(9, 0)), "")
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(vecfoocost(j, 5) > 0, Format(vecfoocost(j, 5), fg_Pict(9, 0)), "")
                
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = ""
                If vecfoocost(j, 5) > 0 And vecfoocost(j, 4) > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(((vecfoocost(j, 5) / vecfoocost(j, 4))), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
                If vecfoocost(j, 5) > 0 And vecfoocost(j, 3) > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(((vecfoocost(j, 5) / vecfoocost(j, 3)) * 100), fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
                
                '-------> Totales
                vTotRacVen = vTotRacVen + vecfoocost(j, 2)
                vTotVtaDia = vTotVtaDia + vecfoocost(j, 3)
                vTotRacPro = vTotRacPro + vecfoocost(j, 4)
                vTotCosDia = vTotCosDia + vecfoocost(j, 5)
                
                '-------> Totales Gral.
                vGrlRacVen = vGrlRacVen + vecfoocost(j, 2)
                vGrlVtaDia = vGrlVtaDia + vecfoocost(j, 3)
                vGrlRacPro = vGrlRacPro + vecfoocost(j, 4)
                vGrlCosDia = vGrlCosDia + vecfoocost(j, 5)
                '-------> Contrador de impresión
                
                i = i + 1
              
              End If
          
          Next j
          
          '-------> Limpiar Vector
          For j = 1 To MaxFil
              
              vecfoocost(j, 2) = 0
              vecfoocost(j, 3) = 0
              vecfoocost(j, 4) = 0
              vecfoocost(j, 5) = 0
              vecfoocost(j, 6) = 0
              vecfoocost(j, 7) = 0
              vecfoocost(j, 8) = 0
          
          Next j
          
          i = i + 1
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Tot. Serv. Vta. Especial"
          '.TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(vTotRacVen > 0, Format(vTotRacVen, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(vTotVtaDia > 0, Format(vTotVtaDia, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
          If vTotRacVen > 0 And vTotVtaDia > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(((vTotVtaDia / vTotRacVen)), fg_Pict(9, 2))
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(vTotRacPro > 0, Format(vTotRacPro, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(vTotCosDia > 0, Format(vTotCosDia, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = ""
          If vTotRacPro > 0 And vTotCosDia > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(((vTotCosDia / vTotRacPro)), fg_Pict(9, 2))
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
          If vTotVtaDia > 0 And vTotCosDia > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(((vTotCosDia / vTotVtaDia) * 100), fg_Pict(9, 2)) & " %"
         
          i = i + 1
          '-------> Limpiar Variables
          vTotRacVen = 0: vTotVtaDia = 0: vTotRacPro = 0: vTotCosDia = 0
          If Not RS1.EOF Then i = i + 1
       
       Loop
       
       i = i + 2
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Tot. Gral. Vta. Especial"
       '.TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(vGrlRacVen > 0, Format(vGrlRacVen, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(vGrlVtaDia > 0, Format(vGrlVtaDia, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
       If vGrlRacVen > 0 And vGrlVtaDia > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(((vGrlVtaDia / vGrlRacVen)), fg_Pict(9, 2))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(vGrlRacPro > 0, Format(vGrlRacPro, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(vGrlCosDia > 0, Format(vGrlCosDia, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)), "")
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = ""
       If vGrlRacPro > 0 And vGrlCosDia > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(((vGrlCosDia / vGrlRacPro)), fg_Pict(9, 2))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
       If vGrlVtaDia > 0 And vGrlCosDia > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(((vGrlCosDia / vGrlVtaDia) * 100), fg_Pict(9, 2)) & " %"
       '-------> Limpiar Variables
       vTotRacVen = 0: vTotVtaDia = 0: vTotRacPro = 0: vTotCosDia = 0
       vGrlRacVen = 0: vTotGrlDia = 0: vGrlRacPro = 0: vGrlCosDia = 0
    
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
        
    '---------> Fin Ventas servicios contados
    
    Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbBottom
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc

End With
Preview.Refresh
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga

Exit Function
Error_FoodCost:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function

End Function

Sub I_PresupuestoProyeccion(cencos As String, ano As Long)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, Tipo As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_PresupuestoProyeccion
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Presupuesto y Proyección"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .FontSize = 7
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Presupuesto y Proyección " & ano
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Presupuesto"
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Trim(RS1!cli_codigo) & " " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_presupuestoproyeccion WHERE ppr_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND mid(ppr_anomes,1,4) = " & ano & " ORDER BY ppr_tipo, ppr_codigo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Else
       RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_presupuestoproyeccion WHERE ppr_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),ppr_anomes),1,4)) = " & ano & " ORDER BY ppr_tipo, ppr_codigo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    End If
    Tipo = ""
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If Tipo <> RS1!ppr_tipo Then
             If Trim(Tipo) <> "" Then
                .TableBorder = tbAll
                .EndTable
                .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
                .StartTable
                .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Proyección"
                .TableBorder = tbNone
                .EndTable
                .text = Chr(13)
             End If
            .StartTable
            .TableCell(tcCols) = 13: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
            For i = 1 To 13
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , i) = IIf(i = 1, 1500, 1200): .TableCell(tcAlign, , i) = IIf(i = 1, taLeftTop, taCenterTop)
            Next i
            .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Descripción"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Enero"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Febrero"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Marzo"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Abril"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Mayo"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Junio"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Julio"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = "Agosto"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) = "Septiembre"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11) = "Octubre"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 12) = "Noviembre"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 13) = "Diciembre"
            .TableBorder = tbBox
            .EndTable
            .StartTable
            .TableCell(tcCols) = 13: .TableCell(tcRows) = 7
            For i = 1 To 13
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , i) = IIf(i = 1, 1500, 1200): .TableCell(tcAlign, , i) = IIf(i = 1, taLeftTop, taRightTop)
            Next i
            Tipo = RS1!ppr_tipo
          End If
          i = IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 10, 1, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 20, 2, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 30, 3, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 40, 4, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 50, 5, IIf(RS1!ppr_codigo = 60, 6, 7))))))
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!ppr_descripcion)
          .TableCell(tcText, i, Val(Mid(RS1!ppr_anomes, 5, 2)) + 1) = IIf(RS1!ppr_valor <= 0, "", Format(RS1!ppr_valor, fg_Pict(9, 0)))
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1
Exit Sub
Error_PresupuestoProyeccion:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Sub
End Sub

Sub I_MermaPreparacion(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipopc As Long)
Dim i As Long, vTotCos As Double, vTCosSer As Double, vTMerSer As Double, vTotMer As Double, vTgrCos As Double, vTgrMer As Double, auxfec As Long, auxser As Long, auxreg As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_MermaPreparacion
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Raciones no Vendidas"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .FontSize = 7
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Raciones no Vendidas " & IIf(tipopc = 1, " Detallado", " Resumido")
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = ""
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = ": " & Trim(RS1!cli_codigo) & " " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    If tipopc = 1 Then
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Recetas"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Programado"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Costo"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Total Costo"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Merma"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Total Merma"
       .TableBorder = tbAll
       .EndTable
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
       RS1.Open "SELECT a.rec_codigo, a.rec_nombre, d.ser_nombre, isnull(c.mid_numrac,0) as mid_numrac, isnull(c.mid_cosrec,0) as mid_cosrec, isnull(c.mid_cosdes,0) as mid_cosdes, c.mid_numlin, isnull(c.mid_nummer,0) as mid_nummer, b.min_fecmin, b.min_codreg, e.reg_nombre, b.min_codser " & _
                "FROM  b_receta a, b_minuta b, b_minutadet c, a_servicio d, a_regimen e " & _
                "WHERE b.min_codigo=c.mid_codigo " & _
                "AND   c.mid_codrec=a.rec_codigo " & _
                "AND   b.min_codreg=e.reg_codigo " & _
                "AND   b.min_codser=d.ser_codigo " & _
                "AND   b.min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND   b.min_fecmin>=" & fecini & " " & _
                "AND   b.min_fecmin<=" & fecfin & " " & _
                "AND   c.mid_tipmin='2' " & _
                "AND   c.mid_numrac>0 AND c.mid_nummer>0  " & _
                "ORDER BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, b.min_fecmin, c.mid_numlin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Else
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Total Costo"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Total Merma"
       .TableBorder = tbAll
       .EndTable
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
       RS1.Open "SELECT b.min_fecmin, b.min_codreg, e.reg_nombre, b.min_codser, d.ser_nombre, ROUND(SUM(isnull(c.mid_numrac,0)*(isnull(c.mid_cosrec,0)+isnull(c.mid_cosdes,0))),0) AS totcos, ROUND(SUM((isnull(c.mid_cosrec,0)+isnull(c.mid_cosdes,0))* isnull(c.mid_nummer,0)),0) AS totmer " & _
                "FROM  b_receta a, b_minuta b, b_minutadet c, a_servicio d, a_regimen e " & _
                "WHERE b.min_codigo=c.mid_codigo " & _
                "AND   c.mid_codrec=a.rec_codigo " & _
                "AND   b.min_codreg=e.reg_codigo " & _
                "AND   b.min_codser=d.ser_codigo " & _
                "AND   b.min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND   b.min_fecmin>=" & fecini & " " & _
                "AND   b.min_fecmin<=" & fecfin & " " & _
                "AND   c.mid_tipmin='2' " & _
                "AND   c.mid_numrac>0 AND c.mid_nummer>0  " & _
                "GROUP BY b.min_fecmin, b.min_codreg, e.reg_nombre, b.min_codser, d.ser_nombre ORDER BY b.min_fecmin, b.min_codreg, b.min_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    End If
    i = 1: vTotCos = 0: vTotMer = 0: vTCosSer = 0: vTMerSer = 0: vTgrCos = 0: vTgrMer = 0: auxfec = 0: auxser = 0: auxreg = 0
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!min_codser <> auxser Or RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Then
             If auxser > 0 Then
                i = i + 1
                If tipopc = 1 Then
                   .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 4) = taLeftTop: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Total"
                   .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(vTotCos, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                   .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(vTotMer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                   i = i + 2
                   .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 4) = taLeftTop: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Total Servicio"
                   .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(vTCosSer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                   .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(vTMerSer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                   vTCosSer = 0: vTMerSer = 0
                Else
                   .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 1) = taLeftTop: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total"
                   .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(vTotCos, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                   .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(vTotMer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                End If
             End If
             i = i + 2
            .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = IIf(tipopc = 1, 7, 3): .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 4) = taLeftTop: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Regimen: " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre) & "\Servicio : " & Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
            i = i + 1
            If tipopc = 1 Then
               .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)
               i = i + 1
            End If
             auxfec = RS1!min_fecmin
             auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
             auxser = RS1!min_codser
             vTotCos = 0: vTotMer = 0
          End If
          If (RS1!min_fecmin <> auxfec Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Or RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg) And tipopc = 1 Then
             If auxfec > 0 Then
                i = i + 1
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 4) = taLeftTop: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Total"
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(vTotCos, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(vTotMer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
             End If
            i = i + 1
            .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)
            i = i + 1
             auxfec = RS1!min_fecmin
             auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
             auxser = RS1!min_codser
             vTotCos = 0: vTotMer = 0
          End If
          If tipopc = 1 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!rec_codigo
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!rec_nombre)
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(RS1!mid_numrac, fg_Pict(6, 0))
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format((RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes), fg_Pict(6, 2))
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((RS1!mid_numrac * (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes)), fg_Pict(6, 0))
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!mid_nummer) Or RS1!mid_nummer = 0, "", Format(RS1!mid_nummer, fg_Pict(6, 0)))
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!mid_nummer) Or RS1!mid_nummer = 0, "", Format((RS1!mid_nummer * (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes)), fg_Pict(6, 0)))
             vTotCos = Round(vTotCos + RS1!mid_numrac * (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes), 0)
             vTotMer = Round(vTotMer + RS1!mid_nummer * (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes), 0)
             vTCosSer = Round(vTCosSer + RS1!mid_numrac * (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes), 0)
             vTMerSer = Round(vTMerSer + RS1!mid_nummer * (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes), 0)
             vTgrCos = Round(vTgrCos + RS1!mid_numrac * (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes), 0)
             vTgrMer = Round(vTgrMer + RS1!mid_nummer * (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes), 0)
          Else
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(RS1!totcos, fg_Pict(6, 0))
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(RS1!totmer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
             vTotCos = Round(vTotCos + RS1!totcos, 0)
             vTotMer = Round(vTotMer + RS1!totmer, 0)
             vTCosSer = Round(vTCosSer + RS1!totcos, 0)
             vTMerSer = Round(vTMerSer + RS1!totmer, 0)
          End If
          RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
       Loop
       i = i + 1
       If tipopc = 1 Then
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 4) = taLeftTop: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Total"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(vTotCos, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(vTotMer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          i = i + 2
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 4) = taLeftTop: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Total Servicio"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(vTCosSer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(vTMerSer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          i = i + 2
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 4) = taLeftTop: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Total General"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(vTgrCos, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(vTgrMer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       Else
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 1) = taLeftTop: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(vTotCos, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(vTotMer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          i = i + 2
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcAlign, i, 1) = taLeftTop: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total General"
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(vTCosSer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(vTMerSer, fg_Pict(6, 0))
       End If
       .TableCell(tcRows) = i
       .TableBorder = tbNone
       .EndTable
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .EndDoc
End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1
Exit Sub
Error_MermaPreparacion:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Sub
End Sub

Public Function I_ParametroDespacho(cencos As String)
Dim i As Long, est As Boolean
On Local Error GoTo Error_ParametroDespacho
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Parametro Despacho"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    .FontSize = 8
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Parametro Despacho"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = ""
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = ": " & Trim(RS1!cli_codigo) & " " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 10: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 5800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Tipo Despacho"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Lun."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Mar."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Mie."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Jue."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Vie."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = "Sab."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) = "Dom."
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & _
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) & "|" & _
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 10: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 5800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taCenterTop
    i = 1
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM a_tipopro WHERE tip_previo = 0 AND tip_activo in ('1','S')", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          est = True
          RS2.Open "SELECT a.pad_tipo, a.pad_diario, b.tip_codigo, b.tip_previo, b.tip_nombre FROM b_paramdesp a, a_tipopro b WHERE a.pad_codigo=b.tip_codigo AND a.pad_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND b.tip_previo = " & RS1!tip_codigo & " AND b.tip_activo in ('1','S') ORDER BY b.tip_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then
             Do While Not RS2.EOF
                If est Then
                   .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 3
                   .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!tip_nombre)
                   .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
                   Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
                   i = i + 1: est = False
                End If
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS2!tip_codigo
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!tip_nombre)
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(Trim(RS2!pad_tipo) = "M", "MENSUAL", IIf(Trim(RS2!pad_tipo) = "Q1", "QINCENAL 1-15", IIf(Trim(RS2!pad_tipo) = "S", "SEMANAL", IIf(Trim(RS2!pad_tipo) = "D", "Cada Diez Día", IIf(Trim(RS2!pad_tipo) = "Q2", "Qincenal 2-16", IIf(Trim(RS2!pad_tipo = "Q3"), "Quincenal 3-17", IIf(Trim(RS2!pad_tipo = "Q4"), "Quincenal 4-18", "Extra")))))))
                If Trim(RS2!pad_tipo) = "E" Or Trim(RS2!pad_tipo) = "S" Then
                   .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(IsNull(RS2!pad_diario), " ", IIf(Mid(RS2!pad_diario, 1, 1) = "1", "X", ""))
                   .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(IsNull(RS2!pad_diario), " ", IIf(Mid(RS2!pad_diario, 2, 1) = "2", "X", ""))
                   .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(IsNull(RS2!pad_diario), " ", IIf(Mid(RS2!pad_diario, 3, 1) = "3", "X", ""))
                   .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(IsNull(RS2!pad_diario), " ", IIf(Mid(RS2!pad_diario, 4, 1) = "4", "X", ""))
                   .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = IIf(IsNull(RS2!pad_diario), " ", IIf(Mid(RS2!pad_diario, 5, 1) = "5", "X", ""))
                   .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = IIf(IsNull(RS2!pad_diario), " ", IIf(Mid(RS2!pad_diario, 6, 1) = "6", "X", ""))
                   .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) = IIf(IsNull(RS2!pad_diario), " ", IIf(Mid(RS2!pad_diario, 7, 1) = "7", "X", ""))
                End If
                Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & _
                    "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 10)
                RS2.MoveNext: i = i + 1
             Loop
          End If
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_ParametroDespacho:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_CostoTecho(cencos As String, codreg As Long, codser As Long, Fecha As Long)
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_CostoTecho
fg_carga ""
mgstitulo = "Informe de Costo Techo"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Costo Techo"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Servicio"
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS1!cli_nombre
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Regimen(2, codreg, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = RS1!reg_nombre
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Servicio(8, codser, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = RS1!ser_nombre
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_costopatron WHERE cpa_cencos='" & cencos & "' AND cpa_codreg=" & codreg & " AND cpa_codser =" & codser & " AND cpa_descripcion='TECHO' ORDER BY cpa_anomes", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Valor"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    i = 1
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Mid(RS1!cpa_anomes, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!cpa_anomes, 1, 4)
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(IIf(IsNull(RS1!cpa_valor), 0, RS1!cpa_valor), fg_Pict(6, 2))
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2)
            RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
        Loop
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_CostoTecho:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Sub I_ResumenTraspasos(fecini As String, fecfin As String, codbod As Long, cencos As String, tiptra As Long)
Dim RS1 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim codcas As String, i As Long, vTotCen As Double, vTotGrl As Double, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String
fg_carga ""
On Local Error GoTo Error_ResumenTraspasos
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Resumen Traspasos"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    LogoEmp
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    .FontSize = 7
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Resumen Traspasos por Período "
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 5
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    i = 1
    i = i + 1
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Bodega(3, codbod, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Bodega : " & RS1!bod_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!bod_nombre)
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    i = i + 1
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(4, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Contrato : " & RS1!cli_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    Else
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Contrato : " & "TODOS"
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Tipo Traspasos : " & IIf(tiptra = -1, "TODOS", IIf(tiptra = 1, "ENTRADA", "SALIDA"))
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Traspasos entre " & fecini & " y el " & fecfin
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbBottom
    .EndTable
    Dim auxttr As String
    If tiptra = -1 Then auxttr = "0,1" Else auxttr = tiptra
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDate('" & fecini & "') ", " '" & Format(fecini, "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDate('" & fecfin & "') ", " '" & Format(fecfin, "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " SUM(iif(a.tov_codser=1,b.dev_canmer,b.dev_canmer)*b.dev_precos) AS total ", " SUM(CASE WHEN a.tov_codser = 1 THEN b.dev_canmer ELSE b.dev_canmer END*b.dev_precos) AS total ")
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_numdoc, a.tov_numinf, a.tov_codser, a.tov_codcas, c.cli_nombre, a.tov_fecemi, " & sql3 & " " & _
             "FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_clientes c  " & _
             "WHERE  a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
             "AND    a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND    a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND    a.tov_codcas = c.cli_codigo " & _
             "AND    a.tov_codbod = " & codbod & " " & _
             "AND   (a.tov_codcas = '" & cencos & "' OR '" & cencos & "' = '') " & _
             "AND    a.tov_tipdoc = 'TR' " & _
             "AND    a.tov_codser IN (" & auxttr & ") " & _
             "AND    a.tov_fecemi >= " & sql1 & " AND a.tov_fecemi <= " & sql2 & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_numdoc, a.tov_numinf, a.tov_codser, a.tov_codcas, c.cli_nombre, a.tov_fecemi ORDER BY a.tov_codcas, a.tov_codser, a.tov_fecemi", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: MsgBox "No existen datos para la consulta...", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo: Close #1: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Sub
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 6: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 4500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True:  .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Nº Doc."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Nº Folio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "T. Doc."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Contratos"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "F.Emisión"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Total"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 6: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 4500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    i = 1: codcas = "": vTotCen = 0: vTotGrl = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
        codcas = RS1!tov_codcas
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            If RS1!tov_codcas = codcas Then
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!tov_numdoc
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!tov_numinf
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(RS1!tov_codser = 1, "ENTRADA", "SALIDA")
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = RS1!tov_codcas & " - " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS1!tov_fecemi, "dd/mm/yyyy")
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(RS1!total, fg_Pict(8, vg_DPr))
                Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6)
                vTotCen = vTotCen + RS1!total
                vTotGrl = vTotGrl + RS1!total
                RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
            Else
                Exit Do
            End If
        Loop
        If vTotCen <> 0 Then
            .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Total Contrato"
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(vTotCen, fg_Pict(8, vg_DPr))
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & _
                      .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6)
            vTotCen = 0
            i = i + 2
            Print #1, " "
        End If
     Loop
     i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Total General"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(vTotGrl, fg_Pict(8, vg_DPr))
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
fg_descarga
Preview.Show 1
Exit Sub
Error_ResumenTraspasos:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Sub
End Sub

Sub I_DetalleTraspasos(fecini As String, fecfin As String, codbod As Long, cencos As String, tiptra As Long, codpro As String)
Dim RS1 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim NumDoc As String, i As Long, vTotCen As Double, vTotGrl As Double, sql1 As String, sql2 As String
fg_carga ""
On Local Error GoTo Error_DetalleTraspasos
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Detalle Traspasos"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    LogoEmp
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    .FontSize = 7
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Detallado Traspasos por Período "
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 5
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    i = 1
    i = i + 1
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Bodega(3, codbod, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Bodega : " & RS1!bod_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!bod_nombre)
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    i = i + 1
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(4, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Contrato : " & RS1!cli_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    Else
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Contrato : " & "TODOS"
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Tipo Traspasos : " & IIf(tiptra = -1, "TODOS", IIf(tiptra = 1, "ENTRADA", "SALIDA"))
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Traspasos entre " & fecini & " y el " & fecfin
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbBottom
    .EndTable
    Dim auxttr As String
    If tiptra = -1 Then auxttr = "0,1" Else auxttr = tiptra
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDate('" & fecini & "') ", " '" & Format(fecini, "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDate('" & fecfin & "') ", " '" & Format(fecfin, "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_numdoc, a.tov_numinf, a.tov_codser, a.tov_codcas, c.cli_nombre, a.tov_fecemi, d.pro_codigo, d.pro_nombre, e.uni_codigo, e.uni_nombre, b.dev_canmin, b.dev_canmer, b.dev_precos " & _
             "FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_clientes c, b_productos d, a_unidad e " & _
             "WHERE  a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
