             "AND    a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND    a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND    a.tov_codcas = c.cli_codigo " & _
             "AND    b.dev_codmer = d.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND    d.pro_coduni = e.uni_codigo " & _
             "AND   (b.dev_codmer = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "'='') " & _
             "AND    a.tov_codbod = " & codbod & " " & _
             "AND   (a.tov_codcas = '" & cencos & "' OR '" & cencos & "'='') " & _
             "AND    a.tov_tipdoc = 'TR' " & _
             "AND    a.tov_codser IN (" & auxttr & ") " & _
             "AND    a.tov_fecemi >= " & sql1 & " AND a.tov_fecemi <= " & sql2 & " " & _
             "ORDER BY a.tov_fecemi, a.tov_numdoc", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: MsgBox "No existen datos para la consulta...", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo: Close #1: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Sub
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 9: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True:  .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Nº Doc."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Nº Folio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "T. Doc."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Contratos"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "F.Emisión"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Unidad"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Cant. Rec."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Precio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = "Total"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & _
              "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 9: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
    i = 1: NumDoc = 0: vTotCen = 0: vTotGrl = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       If Not RS1.EOF Then
          i = i + 1
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!tov_numdoc
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!tov_numinf
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(RS1!tov_codser = 1, "ENTRADA", "SALIDA")
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = RS1!tov_codcas & " - " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS1!tov_fecemi, "dd/mm/yyyy")
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6)
          i = i + 1
       End If
        NumDoc = RS1!tov_numdoc
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            If RS1!tov_numdoc = NumDoc Then
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
               .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 2
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = RS1!pro_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Trim(RS1!uni_nombre)
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(IIf(RS1!tov_codser = 1, RS1!dev_canmer, RS1!dev_canmer), fg_Pict(8, vg_DCa))
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(RS1!dev_precos, fg_Pict(8, 2))
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format((IIf(RS1!tov_codser = 1, RS1!dev_canmer, RS1!dev_canmer) * RS1!dev_precos), fg_Pict(8, vg_DPr))
                Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & _
                         .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9)
                vTotCen = vTotCen + (IIf(RS1!tov_codser = 1, RS1!dev_canmer, RS1!dev_canmer) * RS1!dev_precos)
                vTotGrl = vTotGrl + (IIf(RS1!tov_codser = 1, RS1!dev_canmer, RS1!dev_canmer) * RS1!dev_precos)
                RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
            Else
                Exit Do
            End If
        Loop
        If vTotCen <> 0 Then
            .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Total Traspaso"
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = ""
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format(vTotCen, fg_Pict(8, vg_DPr))
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & _
                      .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 9)
            vTotCen = 0
            i = i + 2
            Print #1, " "
        End If
     Loop
     i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Total General"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format(vTotGrl, fg_Pict(8, vg_DPr))
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & _
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 9)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
fg_descarga
Preview.Show 1
Exit Sub
Error_DetalleTraspasos:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Sub
End Sub

Sub I_DiferenciaTraspasos(fecini As String, fecfin As String, codbod As Long, cencos As String, tiptra As Long, codpro As String)
Dim RS1 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim NumDoc As String, i As Long, vTotCen As Double, vTotGrl As Double, sql1 As String, sql2 As String
fg_carga ""
On Local Error GoTo Error_DiferenciaTraspasos
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Diferencia Traspasos"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    LogoEmp
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    .FontSize = 7
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Diferencia Traspasos por Período "
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 5
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    i = 1
    i = i + 1
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Bodega(3, codbod, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Bodega : " & RS1!bod_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!bod_nombre)
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    i = i + 1
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(4, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Contrato : " & RS1!cli_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    Else
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Contrato : " & "TODOS"
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Tipo Traspasos : " & IIf(tiptra = -1, "TODOS", IIf(tiptra = 1, "ENTRADA", "SALIDA"))
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Traspasos entre " & fecini & " y el " & fecfin
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1)
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbBottom
    .EndTable
    Dim auxttr As String
    If tiptra = -1 Then auxttr = "0,1" Else auxttr = tiptra
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDate('" & fecini & "') ", " '" & Format(fecini, "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDate('" & fecfin & "') ", " '" & Format(fecfin, "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_numdoc, a.tov_numinf, a.tov_codser, a.tov_codcas, c.cli_nombre, a.tov_fecemi, d.pro_codigo, d.pro_nombre, e.uni_codigo, e.uni_nombre, b.dev_canmin, b.dev_canmer, b.dev_precos " & _
             "FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_clientes c, b_productos d, a_unidad e " & _
             "WHERE  a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
             "AND    a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND    a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND    a.tov_codcas = c.cli_codigo " & _
             "AND    b.dev_codmer = d.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND    d.pro_coduni = e.uni_codigo " & _
             "AND    b.dev_canmin <> b.dev_canmer " & _
             "AND   (b.dev_codmer = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "'='') " & _
             "AND    a.tov_codbod = " & codbod & " " & _
             "AND   (a.tov_codcas = '" & cencos & "' OR '" & cencos & "'='') " & _
             "AND    a.tov_tipdoc = 'TR' " & _
             "AND    a.tov_codser IN (" & auxttr & ") " & _
             "AND    a.tov_fecemi >= " & sql1 & " AND a.tov_fecemi <= " & sql2 & " " & _
             "ORDER BY a.tov_fecemi, a.tov_numdoc", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: MsgBox "No existen datos para la consulta...", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo: Close #1: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Sub
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 11: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 4500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True:  .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Nº Doc."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Nº Folio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "T. Doc."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Contratos"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "F.Emisión"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Unidad"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Cantidad Guia"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "C. Recibida"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = "Diferencia"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) = "Precio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11) = "Total"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & _
              "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 11: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 4500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taRightTop
    i = 1: NumDoc = 0: vTotCen = 0: vTotGrl = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       If Not RS1.EOF Then
          i = i + 1
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!tov_numdoc
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!tov_numinf
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(RS1!tov_codser = 1, "ENTRADA", "SALIDA")
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = RS1!tov_codcas & " - " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS1!tov_fecemi, "dd/mm/yyyy")
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6)
          i = i + 1
       End If
        NumDoc = RS1!tov_numdoc
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            If RS1!tov_numdoc = NumDoc Then
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
               .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 2
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = RS1!pro_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Trim(RS1!uni_nombre)
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(RS1!dev_canmin, fg_Pict(8, vg_DCa))
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(RS1!dev_canmer, fg_Pict(8, vg_DCa))
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format((RS1!dev_canmin - RS1!dev_canmer), fg_Pict(8, vg_DCa))
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) = Format(RS1!dev_precos, fg_Pict(8, 2))
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 11) = Format(((RS1!dev_canmin - RS1!dev_canmer) * RS1!dev_precos), fg_Pict(8, vg_DPr))
                Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & _
                         .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11)
                vTotCen = vTotCen + ((RS1!dev_canmin - RS1!dev_canmer) * RS1!dev_precos)
                vTotGrl = vTotGrl + ((RS1!dev_canmin - RS1!dev_canmer) * RS1!dev_precos)
                RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
            Else
                Exit Do
            End If
        Loop
        If vTotCen <> 0 Then
            .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Total Diferencia"
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = ""
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = ""
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) = ""
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 11) = Format(vTotCen, fg_Pict(8, vg_DPr))
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & _
                      .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11)
            vTotCen = 0
            i = i + 2
            Print #1, " "
        End If
     Loop
     i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Total General"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 11) = Format(vTotGrl, fg_Pict(8, vg_DPr))
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & _
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
fg_descarga
Preview.Show 1
Exit Sub
Error_DiferenciaTraspasos:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Sub
End Sub

Public Function I_CostoxSector(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, opc As Integer)
Dim i As Long, auxfec As Long, auxest As Long, vTotTeo As Double, vtotrea As Double, vTotFoo As Double, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String, sql4 As String
Dim racteo As Long, racrea As Long, racfoo As Long, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long, aAp As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_CostoxSector
MsgTitulo = "Costo x Sector"
fg_carga ""
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 13: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Costo x Sector " & IIf(opc = 0, " (Detallado)", " (Resumido)")
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Trim(RS1!cli_codigo) & " - " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Rango Fecha"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Mid(fecini, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4) & " - " & Mid(fecfin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 1, 4)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    '-------> Insert tabla productospmpdia
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ProductoPMPCostoxSector"
       fg_CheckTmp aAp
       vg_db.Execute "SELECT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, 0 AS ppd_propon, Max(ppd_fecdia) AS ppd_fecdia " & _
                     "INTO " & aAp & " " & _
                     "FROM b_productospmpdia " & _
                     "WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                     "AND   ppd_fecdia >= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_fecdia <= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia), "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                     "AND   ppd_propon > 0 " & _
                     "GROUP BY ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro"
       vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp & " ADD Constraint pmp_pk Primary Key (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_fecdia)"
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " INNER JOIN b_productospmpdia ON (" & aAp & ".ppd_fecdia = b_productospmpdia.ppd_fecdia) AND (" & aAp & ".ppd_codpro = b_productospmpdia.ppd_codpro) AND (" & aAp & ".ppd_cencos = b_productospmpdia.ppd_cencos) SET " & aAp & ".ppd_propon=b_productospmpdia.ppd_propon"
       vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia) SELECT DISTINCT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_codpro NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_codpro FROM " & aAp & ")"
    End If
    '-------> Gerenar Precio Venta
    nArch = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmpcostoxsector"
    fg_CheckTmp (nArch)
    '-------> Consulta salida produccción
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " SUM(IIf(tov.tov_tipdoc='SP',dev.dev_ptotal,'-' & dev.dev_ptotal)) AS dev_ptotal ", " SUM(CASE WHEN tov.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' THEN dev.dev_ptotal ELSE (-1 * dev.dev_ptotal) END) AS dev_ptotal ")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " val(format(tov.tov_fecpro,'yyyymmdd')) AS tov_fecpro ", " convert(int,CONVERT(varchar(10),tov.tov_fecpro,112)) AS tov_fecpro ")
    sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sql4 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    RS2.Open "SELECT " & sql2 & ", tov.tov_codreg, tov.tov_codser, sec.sec_codigo, sec.sec_nombre, sec.sec_orden, " & sql1 & " , 3 AS tipo INTO " & nArch & " " & _
             "FROM   b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro, a_sector sec " & _
             "WHERE  tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli " & _
             "AND    tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND    tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND    dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND    dev.dev_codsec = sec.sec_codigo " & _
             "AND    tov.tov_rutcli = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND    tov.tov_fecpro >= " & sql3 & " " & _
             "AND    tov.tov_fecpro <= " & sql4 & " " & _
             "AND    tov.tov_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND    tov.tov_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   (tov.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' OR tov.tov_tipdoc = 'DP') " & _
             "AND    tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' AND dev.dev_ptotal > 0 AND dev.dev_canmer <> 0 " & _
             "AND    pro.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') GROUP BY tov.tov_fecpro, tov.tov_codreg, tov.tov_codser, sec.sec_codigo, sec.sec_nombre, sec.sec_orden ORDER BY sec.sec_orden", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Consulta estructura fija
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " IIf(tov.tov_tipdoc='SP',dev.dev_ptotal,'-' & dev.dev_ptotal) AS dev_ptotal ", " CASE WHEN tov.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' THEN dev.dev_ptotal ELSE (-1*  dev.dev_ptotal) END AS dev_ptotal ")
    vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & nArch & " SELECT " & sql2 & ", tov.tov_codreg as tov_codreg, tov.tov_codser As tov_codser, -1 AS sec_codigo, 'Estructura Fija' AS sec_nombre, 999999999 AS sec_orden, " & sql1 & ", 3 AS tipo " & _
                  "FROM  b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro " & _
                  "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli " & _
                  "AND   tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                  "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc " & _
                  "AND   dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                  "AND   tov.tov_rutcli = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                  "AND   tov.tov_fecpro >= " & sql3 & " " & _
                  "AND   tov.tov_fecpro <= " & sql4 & " " & _
                  "AND   tov.tov_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                  "AND   tov.tov_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                  "AND  (tov.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' OR tov.tov_tipdoc = 'DP') " & _
                  "AND   tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
                  "AND  (dev.dev_coding = '' OR (dev.dev_coding) IS NULL) AND dev.dev_canmer <> 0 " & _
                  "AND   pro.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "')"
    '-------> Consulta planificación teorica & estructura fija
    vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & nArch & " SELECT mi.min_fecmin AS tov_fecpro, mi.min_codreg AS tov_codreg, mi.min_codser AS tov_codser, sec.sec_codigo AS sec_codigo, sec.sec_nombre AS sec_nombre, sec.sec_orden AS sec_orden, SUM(mid.mid_numrac*mid.mid_cosrec) AS dev_ptotal, 1 AS tipo " & _
                  "FROM b_minuta mi, b_minutadet mid, a_servicio ser, a_estservicio ess, a_sector sec " & _
                  "WHERE mi.min_codigo = mid.mid_codigo " & _
                  "AND   mi.min_codser = ser.ser_codigo " & _
                  "AND   mid.mid_estser = ess.ess_codigo AND mi.min_cencos = ess.ess_cencos " & _
                  "AND   ess.ess_codsec = sec.sec_codigo " & _
                  "AND   mi.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                  "AND   mi.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                  "AND   mi.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                  "AND   mi.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
                  "AND   mi.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                  "AND   mid.mid_tipmin = '1' AND mid.mid_numrac > 0 AND mi.min_racteo > 0 AND mid.mid_cosrec > 0 " & _
                  "GROUP BY mi.min_fecmin, mi.min_codreg, mi.min_codser, sec.sec_codigo, sec.sec_nombre, sec.sec_orden"
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    Dim fecper As Long, estfij As Boolean
    fecper = Mid(fecini, 1, 6)
    '-------> Traer estructura fija minuta teórica
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.min_codreg, b.min_codser " & _
             "FROM b_minuta b, b_minutadet c " & _
             "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   c.mid_tipmin = '1' AND c.mid_numrac > 0 AND b.min_racteo > 0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       estfij = False
       '-------> Buscar datos estructura fija día
       RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT mfd_cencos FROM b_minutafijadia " & _
                "WHERE mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                "AND   mfd_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                "AND   mfd_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                "AND   mfd_fecha >= " & fecini & " AND mfd_fecha <= " & fecfin & " AND mfd_tipmin = '1'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS2.EOF Then estfij = True
       RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
       fecesf = 0
       If Not estfij Then
          RS2.Open "SELECT MAX(mif_fecval) AS fecval FROM b_minutafija " & _
                   "WHERE mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then fecesf = IIf(IsNull(RS2!fecval), 0, RS2!fecval)
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
       End If
       diaini = 0: diafin = 0: cosefj = 0
       diaini = Mid(fecini, 7, 2): diafin = Mid(fecfin, 7, 2)
       For j = diaini To diafin
           If estfij Then
              '-------> Calcular datos desde tabla estructura fija día
              vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & nArch & " SELECT a.mfd_fecha AS tov_fecpro, a.mfd_codreg AS tov_codreg, a.mfd_codser AS tov_codser, -1 AS sec_codigo, 'Estructura Fija' AS sec_nombre, 999999999 AS sec_orden, (a.mfd_cospro*a.mfd_canpro) AS dev_ptotal, 1 AS tipo " & _
                            "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos b " & _
                            "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = b.pro_codigo " & _
                            "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                            "AND   a.mfd_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mfd_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mfd_fecha = " & Val(Mid(fecini, 1, 6)) & Right("0" & j, 2) & " AND a.mfd_tipmin = '1' " & _
                            "AND   b.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "')"
           Else
              If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
                 vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & nArch & " SELECT " & fecper & fg_pone_cero(j, 2) & " AS tov_fecpro, " & RS1!min_codreg & " AS tov_codreg, " & RS1!min_codser & " AS tov_codser, -1 AS sec_codigo, 'Estructura Fija' AS sec_nombre, 999999999 AS sec_orden, (d.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro)  AS dev_ptotal, 1 AS tipo " & _
                               "FROM  b_minutafija a, b_productos c, b_minuta b, " & aAp & " d " & _
                               "WHERE a.mif_cencos = b.min_cencos " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codreg = b.min_codreg " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codser = b.min_codser " & _
                               "AND   b.min_codigo IN (SELECT mid_codigo FROM b_minutadet) " & _
                               "AND   b.min_fecmin = " & fecini & Right("0" & j, 2) & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codpro = c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo = d.ppd_codpro AND d.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_fecval = " & fecesf & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_dianro = " & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                               "AND   c.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "')"
              Else
                 vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & nArch & " SELECT " & fecper & fg_pone_cero(j, 2) & " AS tov_fecpro, " & RS1!min_codreg & " AS tov_codreg, " & RS1!min_codser & " AS tov_codser, -1 AS sec_codigo, 'Estructura Fija' AS sec_nombre, 999999999 AS sec_orden, (d.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro)  AS dev_ptotal, 1 AS tipo " & _
                               "FROM  b_minutafija a, b_productos c, b_minuta b, b_productospmpdia d " & _
                               "WHERE a.mif_cencos = b.min_cencos " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codreg = b.min_codreg " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codser = b.min_codser " & _
                               "AND   b.min_codigo IN (SELECT mid_codigo FROM b_minutadet) " & _
                               "AND   b.min_fecmin = " & fecini & Right("0" & j, 2) & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codpro = c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo = d.ppd_codpro AND d.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND d.ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_fecval = " & fecesf & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_dianro = " & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                               "AND   c.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "')"
              End If
           End If
       Next j
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Consultar planificación real & estructura fija
    vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & nArch & " SELECT mi.min_fecmin AS tov_fecpro, mi.min_codreg AS tov_codreg, mi.min_codser AS tov_codser, sec.sec_codigo AS sec_codigo,  sec.sec_nombre AS sec_nombre, sec.sec_orden AS sec_orden, SUM(mid.mid_numrac*mid.mid_cosrec) AS dev_ptotal, 2 AS tipo " & _
                  "FROM b_minuta mi, b_minutadet mid, a_servicio ser, a_estservicio ess, a_sector sec " & _
                  "WHERE mi.min_codigo = mid.mid_codigo " & _
                  "AND   mi.min_codser = ser.ser_codigo " & _
                  "AND   mid.mid_estser = ess.ess_codigo AND mi.min_cencos = ess.ess_cencos " & _
                  "AND   ess.ess_codsec = sec.sec_codigo " & _
                  "AND   mi.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                  "AND   mi.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                  "AND   mi.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                  "AND   mi.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
                  "AND   mi.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                  "AND   mid.mid_tipmin = '2' AND mid.mid_numrac > 0 AND mi.min_racrea > 0 AND mid.mid_cosrec > 0 " & _
                  "GROUP BY mi.min_fecmin, mi.min_codreg, mi.min_codser, sec.sec_codigo, sec.sec_nombre, sec.sec_orden"
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Traer estructura fija minuta real
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.min_codreg, b.min_codser " & _
             "FROM b_minuta b, b_minutadet c " & _
             "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   c.mid_tipmin = '2' AND c.mid_numrac > 0 AND b.min_racteo > 0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       estfij = False
       '-------> Buscar datos estructura fija día
       RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT mfd_cencos FROM b_minutafijadia " & _
                "WHERE mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                "AND   mfd_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                "AND   mfd_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                "AND   mfd_fecha >= " & fecini & " AND mfd_fecha <= " & fecfin & " AND mfd_tipmin = '2'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS2.EOF Then estfij = True
       RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
       fecesf = 0
       If Not estfij Then
          RS2.Open "SELECT MAX(mif_fecval) AS fecval FROM b_minutafija " & _
                   "WHERE mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then fecesf = IIf(IsNull(RS2!fecval), 0, RS2!fecval)
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
       End If
       diaini = 0: diafin = 0: cosefj = 0
       diaini = Mid(fecini, 7, 2): diafin = Mid(fecfin, 7, 2)
       For j = diaini To diafin
           If estfij Then
              '-------> Calcular datos desde tabla estructura fija día
              vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & nArch & " SELECT a.mfd_fecha AS tov_fecpro, a.mfd_codreg AS tov_codreg, a.mfd_codser AS tov_codser, -1 AS sec_codigo, 'Estructura Fija' AS sec_nombre, 999999999 AS sec_orden, (a.mfd_cospro*a.mfd_canpro) AS dev_ptotal, 2 AS tipo " & _
                            "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos b " & _
                            "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = b.pro_codigo " & _
                            "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                            "AND   a.mfd_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mfd_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                            "AND   a.mfd_fecha = " & Val(Mid(fecini, 1, 6)) & Right("0" & j, 2) & " AND a.mfd_tipmin = '2' " & _
                            "AND   b.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "')"
           Else
              If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
                 vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & nArch & " SELECT " & fecper & fg_pone_cero(j, 2) & " AS tov_fecpro, " & RS1!min_codreg & " AS tov_codreg, " & RS1!min_codser & " AS tov_codser, -1 AS sec_codigo, 'Estructura Fija' AS sec_nombre, 999999999 AS sec_orden, (d.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro)  AS dev_ptotal, 2 AS tipo " & _
                               "FROM  b_minutafija a, b_productos c, b_minuta b, " & aAp & " d " & _
                               "WHERE a.mif_cencos = b.min_cencos " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codreg = b.min_codreg " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codser = b.min_codser " & _
                               "AND   b.min_codigo IN (SELECT mid_codigo FROM b_minutadet) " & _
                               "AND   b.min_fecmin = " & fecper & Right("0" & j, 2) & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codpro = c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo = d.ppd_codpro AND d.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_fecval = " & fecesf & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_dianro = " & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                               "AND   c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "')"
              Else
                 vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & nArch & " SELECT " & fecper & fg_pone_cero(j, 2) & " AS tov_fecpro, " & RS1!min_codreg & " AS tov_codreg, " & RS1!min_codser & " AS tov_codser, -1 AS sec_codigo, 'Estructura Fija' AS sec_nombre, 999999999 AS sec_orden, (d.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro)  AS dev_ptotal, 2 AS tipo " & _
                               "FROM  b_minutafija a, b_productos c, b_minuta b, b_productospmpdia d " & _
                               "WHERE a.mif_cencos = b.min_cencos " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codreg = b.min_codreg " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codser = b.min_codser " & _
                               "AND   b.min_codigo IN (SELECT mid_codigo FROM b_minutadet) " & _
                               "AND   b.min_fecmin = " & fecper & Right("0" & j, 2) & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codpro = c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo=d.ppd_codpro AND d.ppd_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND d.ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_fecval = " & fecesf & " " & _
                               "AND   a.mif_dianro = " & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(fecper & Right("0" & j, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                               "AND   c.pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "')"
              End If
           End If
       Next j
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    If opc = 0 Then
       RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.tipo, a.tov_fecpro, a.tov_codreg, c.reg_nombre, a.tov_codser, b.ser_nombre, a.sec_codigo, a.sec_nombre, a.sec_orden, SUM(a.dev_ptotal) AS dev_ptotal " & _
                "FROM " & nArch & " a, a_servicio b, a_regimen c " & _
                "WHERE a.tov_codser = b.ser_codigo " & _
                "AND   a.tov_codreg = c.reg_codigo " & _
                "GROUP BY a.tipo, a.tov_fecpro, a.tov_codreg, c.reg_nombre, a.tov_codser, b.ser_nombre, a.sec_codigo, a.sec_nombre, a.sec_orden " & _
                "ORDER BY a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser, a.tov_fecpro, a.sec_orden, a.tipo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
   Else
       RS1.Open "SELECT a.tipo, a.tov_codreg, c.reg_nombre, a.tov_codser, b.ser_nombre, a.sec_codigo, a.sec_nombre, a.sec_orden, SUM(a.dev_ptotal) AS dev_ptotal, " & Mid(fecfin, 1, 6) & " AS tov_fecpro " & _
                "FROM " & nArch & " a, a_servicio b, a_regimen c " & _
                "WHERE a.tov_codser = b.ser_codigo " & _
                "AND   a.tov_codreg = c.reg_codigo " & _
                "GROUP BY a.tipo, a.tov_codreg, c.reg_nombre, a.tov_codser, b.ser_nombre, a.sec_codigo, a.sec_nombre, a.sec_orden " & _
                "ORDER BY a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser, a.sec_orden, a.tipo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
   End If
    i = 0: auxfec = 0: auxser = 0: vTotTeo = 0: vtotrea = 0: vTotFoo = 0: auxser = 0: auxreg = 0
    racteo = 0: racrea = 0: racfoo = 0
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!tov_fecpro <> auxfec Or RS1!tov_codser <> auxser Or RS1!tov_codreg <> auxreg Then
             If auxfec > 0 Then
                i = i + 1
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "TOTAL "
                If vTotTeo > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(vTotTeo, fg_Pict(9, 0))
                If racteo > 0 And vTotTeo > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format((vTotTeo / racteo), fg_Pict(9, 1))
                If vtotrea > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(vtotrea, fg_Pict(9, 0))
                If racrea > 0 And vtotrea > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format((vtotrea / racrea), fg_Pict(9, 1))
                If vTotFoo > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(vTotFoo, fg_Pict(9, 0))
                If racfoo > 0 And vTotFoo > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format((vTotFoo / racfoo), fg_Pict(9, 1))
                vTotTeo = 0: vtotrea = 0: vTotFoo = 0: racfoo = 0: racrea = 0: racteo = 0
                .TableCell(tcRows) = i
                .TableBorder = tbAll
                .EndTable
                .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
                i = 0
             End If
'             .MarginLeft = "7.23cm"
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 3600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
             .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = RS1!tov_codreg & " - " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre)
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Plan. Teòrico"
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Plan. Real"
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Realizado"
             Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) '& "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6)
             .TableBorder = tbAll
             .EndTable
             racfoo = 0: racrea = 0: racteo = 0
             '-------> Consultar raciones teorica
             RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(min_racteo) AS min_racteo, SUM(min_racrea) AS min_racrea FROM b_minuta " & _
                      "WHERE min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   min_codreg = " & RS1!tov_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   min_codser = " & RS1!tov_codser & " " & _
                      "AND   min_fecmin >= " & IIf(opc = 0, RS1!tov_fecpro, fecini) & " AND min_fecmin <= " & IIf(opc = 0, RS1!tov_fecpro, fecfin) & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF And IsNumeric(RS2!min_racteo) Then racteo = RS2!min_racteo
             If Not RS2.EOF And IsNumeric(RS2!min_racrea) Then racrea = RS2!min_racrea
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
            
             '-------> Consultar raciones food cost
             RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(mir_nrorac) AS nrorac FROM b_minutaraciones " & _
                      "WHERE mir_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   mir_codreg = " & RS1!tov_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   mir_codser = " & RS1!tov_codser & " " & _
                      "AND  (mir_rutcli = 'PRODUCIDAS') " & _
                      "AND  mir_fecmin >= " & IIf(opc = 0, RS1!tov_fecpro, fecini) & " AND mir_fecmin <= " & IIf(opc = 0, RS1!tov_fecpro, fecfin) & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF And IsNumeric(RS2!nrorac) Then racfoo = RS2!nrorac
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
            
             .MarginLeft = 500
             .StartTable
             .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 3600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
             .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taCenterTop
             .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre) & " " & IIf(opc = 0, fg_Ctod1(RS1!tov_fecpro), "")
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = IIf(racteo > 0, racteo & " Raciones", "Raciones " & "")
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = IIf(racrea > 0, racrea & " Raciones", "Raciones " & "")
             .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = IIf(racfoo > 0, racfoo & " Raciones", "Raciones " & "")
             Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) '& "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6)
             .TableBorder = tbAll
             .EndTable
            
            .MarginLeft = 500
            .StartTable
            .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Total"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Cto. Per Capita"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Total"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Cto. Per Capita"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Total"
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Cto. Per Capita"
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6)
            .TableBorder = tbAll
            .EndTable
            
            .StartTable
            .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 100
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
             auxfec = RS1!tov_fecpro
             auxreg = RS1!tov_codreg
             auxser = RS1!tov_codser
             auxsec = 0
          End If
          If RS1!Tipo = 1 Then vTotTeo = vTotTeo + IIf(IsNull(RS1!dev_ptotal), 0, RS1!dev_ptotal)
          If RS1!Tipo = 2 Then vtotrea = vtotrea + IIf(IsNull(RS1!dev_ptotal), 0, RS1!dev_ptotal)
          If RS1!Tipo = 3 Then vTotFoo = vTotFoo + IIf(IsNull(RS1!dev_ptotal), 0, RS1!dev_ptotal)
          If RS1!sec_codigo <> auxsec Then auxsec = RS1!sec_codigo: i = i + 1
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = IIf(RS1!sec_codigo = -1, "", RS1!sec_codigo)
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!sec_nombre
          .TableCell(tcText, i, IIf(RS1!Tipo = 1, 3, IIf(RS1!Tipo = 2, 5, 7))) = Format(RS1!dev_ptotal, fg_Pict(9, 0))
          If racteo > 0 And RS1!Tipo = 1 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, i, IIf(RS1!Tipo = 1, 4, IIf(RS1!Tipo = 2, 6, 8))) = Format((RS1!dev_ptotal / racteo), fg_Pict(9, 1))
          ElseIf racrea > 0 And RS1!Tipo = 2 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, i, IIf(RS1!Tipo = 1, 4, IIf(RS1!Tipo = 2, 6, 8))) = Format((RS1!dev_ptotal / racrea), fg_Pict(9, 1))
          ElseIf racfoo > 0 And RS1!Tipo = 3 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, i, IIf(RS1!Tipo = 1, 4, IIf(RS1!Tipo = 2, 6, 8))) = Format((RS1!dev_ptotal / racfoo), fg_Pict(9, 1))
          End If
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
       i = i + 1
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "TOTAL "
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(vTotTeo, fg_Pict(9, 0))
       If racteo > 0 Then
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format((vTotTeo / racteo), fg_Pict(9, 1))
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(0, fg_Pict(9, 0))
       End If
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(vtotrea, fg_Pict(9, 0))
       If racrea > 0 Then
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format((vtotrea / racrea), fg_Pict(9, 1))
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(0, fg_Pict(9, 0))
       End If
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(vTotFoo, fg_Pict(9, 0))
       If racfoo > 0 Then
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format((vTotFoo / racfoo), fg_Pict(9, 1))
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(0, fg_Pict(9, 0))
       End If
       vTotTeo = 0: vtotrea = 0: vTotFoo = 0: racfoo = 0: racrea = 0: racteo = 0
       .TableCell(tcRows) = i
       .TableBorder = tbAll
       .EndTable
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Close #1
    .EndDoc
    '-------> Borrar tablas temporales
    If Trim(aAp) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp & ""
End With
Preview.Refresh
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_CostoxSector:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_InsumoNoPlanifSalBod(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long)
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxfec As String, auxser As Long, auxreg As Long, auxcan As String, cossal As Double, totcos As Double, totpor As Double, nrorac As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_InsumoNoPlanifSalBod
fg_carga ""
mgstitulo = "Informe de Insumos no Planificados en Salida Bodega"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Insumos no Planificados en Salida Bodega"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2 '4
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    RS1.Open "SELECT cli_codigo, cli_nombre FROM b_clientes WHERE cli_codigo='" & cencos & "' AND cli_tipo=0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Trim(RS1!cli_codigo) & " - " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = ""
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "" 'Mid(fecini, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4) & " - " & Mid(fecfin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 1, 4)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    '------- Consulta insumos no planificados en salida producccion
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.tov_fecpro, b.tov_codreg, f.reg_nombre, b.tov_codser, d.ser_nombre, c.dev_numlin, c.dev_canmin, c.dev_canmer, a.pro_codigo, a.pro_nombre, a.pro_coduni, e.uni_nombre, c.dev_precos, SUM(c.dev_canmer) AS dev_canmer " & _
             "FROM b_productos a, b_totventas b, b_detventas c, a_servicio d, a_unidad e, a_regimen f " & _
             "WHERE b.tov_numdoc = c.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND   b.tov_tipdoc = c.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   b.tov_rutcli = c.dev_rutcli " & _
             "AND   a.pro_codigo = c.dev_codmer " & _
             "AND   a.pro_coduni = e.uni_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.tov_codreg = f.reg_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.tov_codser = d.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.tov_rutcli = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   b.tov_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.tov_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' AND b.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND  ((c.dev_canmer > 0 And c.dev_canmin = 0) Or (c.dev_canmer = 0 And c.dev_canmin > 0)) " & _
             "AND   b.tov_fecpro >= " & sql1 & " " & _
             "AND   b.tov_fecpro <= " & sql2 & " " & _
             "GROUP BY b.tov_fecpro, b.tov_codreg, f.reg_nombre, b.tov_codser, d.ser_nombre, c.dev_numlin, c.dev_canmin, c.dev_canmer, a.pro_codigo, a.pro_nombre, a.pro_coduni, e.uni_nombre, c.dev_precos " & _
             "ORDER BY b.tov_codreg, b.tov_codser, b.tov_fecpro, c.dev_canmin, a.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 2) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Producto"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Unidad"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Medida"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = "Cantidad"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = "P.M.P."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = "Total"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "% Sobre"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = "Costo"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & _
              "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6); "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) & _
              "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6); "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 20000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 750: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    i = 1: auxfec = "": auxreg = 0: auxser = 0: auxcan = "": totcos = 0: totpor = 0
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
           If RS1!tov_fecpro <> auxfec Or RS1!tov_codser <> auxser Or RS1!tov_codreg <> auxreg Then
              If Trim(auxcan) <> "" Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = "Total $ ": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True:
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(totcos, fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 6) = True
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totpor, fg_Pict(3, 2)) & " %": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True
                 i = i + 1
              End If
              cossal = 0: totpor = 0
              sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & RS1!tov_fecpro & "') ", " '" & Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
              RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.dev_rutcli, SUM(b.dev_canmer*b.dev_precos) AS dev_cossal " & _
                       "FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b " & _
                       "WHERE a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
                       "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
                       "AND   a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
                       "AND   a.tov_rutcli = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                       "AND   a.tov_codreg = " & RS1!tov_codreg & " " & _
                       "AND   a.tov_codser = " & RS1!tov_codser & " " & _
                       "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' AND a.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                       "AND   a.tov_fecpro = " & sql1 & " " & _
                       "GROUP BY b.dev_rutcli", vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS2.EOF Then cossal = RS2!dev_cossal
              RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
              nrorac = 0
              RS2.Open "SELECT mir.mir_codser, SUM(mir.mir_nrorac) AS mir_nrorac " & _
                       "FROM b_minutaraciones mir " & _
                       "WHERE mir.mir_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                       "AND   mir.mir_codreg = " & RS1!tov_codreg & " " & _
                       "AND   mir.mir_codser = " & RS1!tov_codser & " " & _
                       "AND   mir.mir_fecmin = " & Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                       "AND   mir.mir_rutcli IN ('PRODUCIDAS') AND mir.mir_nrorac > 0 " & _
                       "GROUP BY mir.mir_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS2.EOF Then nrorac = RS2!mir_nrorac
              RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
                  
              If auxser <> 0 Then i = i + 2
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!tov_fecpro & " (" & RS1!tov_codreg & ") " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre) & " \ (" & RS1!tov_codser & ") " & Trim(RS1!ser_nombre) & Space(10) & " Nº RACIONES " & Format(nrorac, fg_Pict(6, 0)) & Space(20) & " Costo Salida  $ " & Format(cossal, fg_Pict(6, 0))
              .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 7
              auxfec = RS1!tov_fecpro
              auxreg = RS1!tov_codreg
              auxser = RS1!tov_codser
              auxcan = ""
              i = i + 2
           End If
           
           If auxcan <> IIf(RS1!dev_canmin = 0, "0", "1") Then
              If Trim(auxcan) <> "" Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = "Total $ ": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(totcos, fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 6) = True
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totpor, fg_Pict(3, 2)) & " %": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True
                 i = i + 1
              End If
              totcos = 0: totpor = 0
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = IIf(RS1!dev_canmin = 0, "INSUMOS NO PLANIFICADOS UTILIZADOS", "INSUMOS PLANIFICADOS NO UTILIZADOS")
              .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 7
              auxcan = IIf(RS1!dev_canmin = 0, "0", "1")
              i = i + 1
           End If
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!pro_codigo
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!uni_nombre)
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(IIf(auxcan = "0", RS1!dev_canmer, RS1!dev_canmin), fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS1!dev_precos, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(auxcan = "0", Format((RS1!dev_canmer * RS1!dev_precos), fg_Pict(6, 0)), Format((RS1!dev_canmin * RS1!dev_precos), fg_Pict(6, 0)))
           If cossal > 0 Then
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(auxcan = "0", Format((((RS1!dev_canmer * RS1!dev_precos) / cossal) * 100), fg_Pict(3, 2)), Format((((RS1!dev_canmin * RS1!dev_precos) / cossal) * 100), fg_Pict(3, 2))) & " %"
              totpor = (totpor + IIf(auxcan = "0", Format((((RS1!dev_canmer * RS1!dev_precos) / cossal) * 100), fg_Pict(3, 2)), Format((((RS1!dev_canmin * RS1!dev_precos) / cossal) * 100), fg_Pict(3, 2))))
           Else
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = ""
           End If
           totcos = (totcos + IIf(auxcan = "0", ((RS1!dev_canmer * RS1!dev_precos)), ((RS1!dev_canmin * RS1!dev_precos))))
           Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & _
                 "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6); "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7)
           RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
        Loop
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ""
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = "Total $ ": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True:
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(totcos, fg_Pict(6, 0)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 6) = True
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totpor, fg_Pict(3, 2)) & " %": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True
        i = i + 1
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_InsumoNoPlanifSalBod:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_NewFoFi(codcas As String, FechaFol As Long, Folio As Long)
Dim RS1 As New ADODB.Recordset, RS2 As New ADODB.Recordset  'Recordset para Consulta
Dim Fecha As Date, i As Double, tDesc As Double, tAlim As Double, tVarios As Double, cCta As String, tipdoc  As String, descri As String
Dim TotDesc As Double, TotAlim As Double, TotVarios As Double, TotEgre As Double, TotIva As Double, pctimp As Double, codcli As String, nomcli As String
Dim tIVA As Double, tEgre As Double, NumDoc As Double, aAp As String, j As Long
Dim tMovil As Double, TotMovil As Double, crut As String, X As Long, y As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_SalirFoFi
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informes de Rendición de Gastos FOFI"
j = Len(Trim(Str(FechaFol)))
If j = 7 Then
    Fecha = CDate("0" + Mid(Trim(Str(FechaFol)), 1, 1) + "/" + Mid(Trim(Str(FechaFol)), 2, 2) + "/" + Mid(Trim(Str(FechaFol)), 4, 4))
Else
   Fecha = CDate(Mid(Trim(Str(FechaFol)), 1, 2) + "/" + Mid(Trim(Str(FechaFol)), 3, 2) + "/" + Mid(Trim(Str(FechaFol)), 5, 4))
End If
RS2.Open "SELECT cli_codigo, cli_nombre FROM b_clientes WHERE cli_codigo = '" & codcas & "' AND cli_tipo = 0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
If RS2.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing: Exit Function
codcli = Trim(RS2!cli_codigo)
nomcli = Trim(RS2!cli_nombre)
aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_InfFoFi"
'---Cheque la existencia de tablas temporales. Si existen las elimina---
fg_CheckTmp aAp
vg_db.BeginTrans
'vg_db.Execute "SELECT a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, a.toc_fecemi, a.toc_ivadoc, a.toc_fledoc, b.dec_codmer, b.dec_numlin, b.dec_ptotal, c.pro_ctacon, d.prv_nombre, a.toc_totdoc INTO " & aAp & _
'              " FROM b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c, b_proveedor d WHERE a.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND a.toc_tipinf = 'F' AND a.toc_tipdoc <> 'SN' AND a.toc_numinf = " & Folio & _
'              " AND a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro AND a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc AND a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc AND a.toc_rutpro = d.prv_codigo AND b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
'              " GROUP BY  a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, c.pro_ctacon, a.toc_fecemi, a.toc_fledoc, b.dec_codmer, b.dec_numlin, b.dec_ptotal, a.toc_totdoc, a.toc_ivadoc, d.prv_nombre"
vg_db.Execute "SELECT a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, a.toc_fecemi, a.toc_ivadoc, a.toc_fledoc, b.dec_codmer, b.dec_numlin, b.dec_ptotal, c.pro_ctacon, d.prv_nombre, a.toc_totdoc INTO " & aAp & _
              " FROM b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c, b_proveedor d WHERE a.toc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND a.toc_tipinf = 'F' AND a.toc_tipdoc in (select tdo_codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_IdCodigo <> 'SN') AND a.toc_numinf = " & Folio & _
              " AND a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro AND a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc AND a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc AND a.toc_rutpro = d.prv_codigo AND b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
              " GROUP BY  a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, c.pro_ctacon, a.toc_fecemi, a.toc_fledoc, b.dec_codmer, b.dec_numlin, b.dec_ptotal, a.toc_totdoc, a.toc_ivadoc, d.prv_nombre"
vg_db.CommitTrans
vg_db.BeginTrans
If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
   vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp & " ADD COLUMN Cuenta CHAR(20)"
Else
   vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp & " ADD Cuenta varchar(20)"
End If
vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " SET Cuenta='Alimentos' WHERE pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "')"
vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " SET Cuenta='Desechables' WHERE pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "')"
vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " SET Cuenta='Movilizacion' WHERE pro_ctacon IN ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctamovil"), ";", "','") & "')"
vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " SET Cuenta='Varios' WHERE cuenta = '' OR (cuenta) IS NULL"
vg_db.CommitTrans
RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM " & aAp & " ORDER BY toc_rutpro, toc_tipdoc, toc_numdoc, pro_ctacon, toc_fecemi", vg_db, adOpenStatic
'---------------------Fin Carga de Datos -----------------
If RS1.EOF Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: fg_descarga: MsgBox "No existen datos para consulta...", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo: Exit Function
Preview.Refresh
Preview.Cls
With Preview.VSPrinter
     vg_reporte = dir_trabajo_Inf & "FOFI" & codcas & Format(Date, "yyyymm") & ".rtf"
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & vg_reporte
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .TextAlign = taLeftTop
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "  Folio : " & Folio & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcForeColor, 2) = &H4080&
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "RENDICION DE GASTOS"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    
    .text = Chr(13)
    y = .CurrentY
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 2, 1) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 3, 1) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, 3, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 2) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 2, 2) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 3, 2) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 3, 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Rendición de Fondo a Rendir"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Rendición de Fondo Fijo"
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = "Recuperación de Gastos"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    X = .CurrentX
    .CurrentY = y
    .MarginLeft = "07.1cm"
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 2, 1) = 500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 3, 1) = 500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 3, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = ""
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    
    .CurrentY = y
    .MarginLeft = "08.1cm"
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 2, 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 3, 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 3, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Sodexho"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "San"
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "SSGL"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    
    .CurrentY = y
    .MarginLeft = "10.1cm"
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 2, 1) = 500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = ""
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = ""
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    
    .CurrentY = y
    .MarginLeft = "11.1cm"
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 2, 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "SEJE"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "SIGES"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    
    .CurrentY = y
    .MarginLeft = "15.1cm"
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 2) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Format(Date, "dd/mm/yyyy")

          descri = ""

          RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing

                tAlim = Format(tAlim + RS1!dec_ptotal + pctimp + RS1!toc_fledoc, fg_Pict(9, 0))
                TotAlim = Format(TotAlim + RS1!dec_ptotal + pctimp + RS1!toc_fledoc, fg_Pict(9, 0))
            End If
            If Trim(RS1!cuenta) = "Desechables" Then
