                TotDesc = Format(TotDesc + RS1!dec_ptotal + pctimp + RS1!toc_fledoc, fg_Pict(9, 0))
            End If
            If Trim(RS1!cuenta) = "Movilizacion" Then
                tMovil = Format(tMovil + RS1!dec_ptotal + pctimp + RS1!toc_fledoc, fg_Pict(9, 0))
                TotMovil = Format(TotMovil + RS1!dec_ptotal + pctimp + RS1!toc_fledoc, fg_Pict(9, 0))
            End If
            If Trim(RS1!cuenta) = "Varios" Then
                tVarios = Format(tVarios + RS1!dec_ptotal + pctimp + RS1!toc_fledoc, fg_Pict(9, 0))
                TotVarios = Format(TotVarios + RS1!dec_ptotal + pctimp + RS1!toc_fledoc, fg_Pict(9, 0))
            End If
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!toc_tipdoc) & " Nº " & RS1!toc_numdoc & ": " & Trim(descri)
            
            If Trim(RS1!cuenta) = "Varios" Then
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(tAlim > 0, Format(tAlim, fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr)), "") '""
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(tDesc > 0, Format(tDesc, fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr)), "") '""
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(tMovil > 0, Format(tMovil, fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr)), "")
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(tVarios, fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = RS1!pro_ctacon
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(RS1!toc_ivadoc > 0 And (Trim(RS1!toc_tipdoc) = "FA" Or Trim(RS1!toc_tipdoc) = "FE"), Format(RS1!toc_ivadoc, fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr)), "") '""
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = IIf(Trim(RS1!toc_tipdoc) = "FA" Or Trim(RS1!toc_tipdoc) = "FE", Format(RS1!toc_totdoc, fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr)), Format(RS1!toc_totdoc, fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr))) 'Format((tVarios + tMovil), fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr)))
            Else
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(RS1!toc_totdoc, fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(tAlim > 0, Format(tAlim, fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr)), "")
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(tDesc > 0, Format(tDesc, fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr)), "")
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(tMovil > 0, Format(tMovil, fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr)), "")
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = ""
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(RS1!toc_ivadoc > 0, Format(RS1!toc_ivadoc, fg_Pict(6, vg_DPr)), "")
            End If
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & _
                      .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) & "|" & _
            tIVA = RS1!toc_ivadoc
            tEgre = RS1!toc_totdoc
            RS1.MoveNext
            If RS1.EOF Then Exit Do
        Loop
        i = i + 1
        TotIva = Format(TotIva + tIVA, fg_Pict(9, 0))
        TotEgre = Format(TotEgre + tEgre, fg_Pict(9, 0))
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i - 1
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable

Exit Function
Error_SalirFoFi:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox "Error:" & Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Resume Next
End Function

Public Function I_CostosTotPeriodo(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, AliDes As Integer, nroser As Long)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, MaxFil As Long, sql1 As String, auxser As Long, nomser As String, fecesf  As Long, estfij As Boolean, auxreg As Long
Dim vCosSer As Double, vCosFij As Double, vCosPla As Double, vCosRea As Double, aAp As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String, sql4 As String, sql5 As String, sql6 As String
Dim veccostot() As Variant
On Local Error GoTo Error_CostosTotPeriodo
fg_carga ""
sql1 = IIf(AliDes = 0, "c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') ", IIf(AliDes = 1, "c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "') ", "(c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') OR c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "')) "))
MsgTitulo = "Informe Costos Totales del Período"
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Costos Totales del Período"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1, 2, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 2) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato "
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = ": " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Período  ": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = ": " & Mid(fecini, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4) & " Hasta " & Mid(fecfin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 1, 4)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Servicio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Costos Planificación Real"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Costos Realizados"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    '-------> definir fila vector costo
    MaxFil = 0: auxser = 0: nomser = 0: vCosSer = 0
    For i = fecini To fecfin: MaxFil = MaxFil + 1: Next i
    MaxFil = nroser
    ReDim veccostot(MaxFil, 6)
    For i = 1 To MaxFil
        veccostot(i, 1) = 0
        veccostot(i, 2) = 0
        veccostot(i, 3) = ""
        veccostot(i, 4) = 0
        veccostot(i, 5) = 0
        veccostot(i, 6) = 0
    Next i
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       '-------> Insert tabla productospmpdia
       aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ProductoPMPCostosTotPeriodo"
       fg_CheckTmp aAp
       vg_db.Execute "SELECT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, 0 AS ppd_propon, Max(ppd_fecdia) AS ppd_fecdia " & _
                     "INTO " & aAp & " " & _
                     "FROM b_productospmpdia " & _
                     "WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                     "AND   ppd_fecdia >= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_fecdia <= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia), "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                     "AND   ppd_propon>0 " & _
                     "GROUP BY ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro"
       vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp & " ADD Constraint pmp_pk Primary Key (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_fecdia)"
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " INNER JOIN b_productospmpdia ON (" & aAp & ".ppd_fecdia = b_productospmpdia.ppd_fecdia) AND (" & aAp & ".ppd_codpro = b_productospmpdia.ppd_codpro) AND (" & aAp & ".ppd_cencos = b_productospmpdia.ppd_cencos) SET " & aAp & ".ppd_propon=b_productospmpdia.ppd_propon"
       vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia) SELECT DISTINCT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_codpro NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_codpro FROM " & aAp & ")"
    End If
    '-------> Traer costo planificación real
    sql5 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " ROUND(SUM(iif(isnull(c.mid_cosrec),0,c.mid_cosrec)*iif(isnull(c.mid_numrac),0,c.mid_numrac)),2) AS mid_cosrec, ROUND(SUM(iif(isnull(c.mid_cosdes),0,c.mid_cosdes)*iif(isnull(c.mid_numrac),0,c.mid_numrac)),2) AS mid_cosdes ", " ROUND(SUM(ISNULL(c.mid_cosrec,0)*ISNULL(c.mid_numrac,0)),2) AS mid_cosrec, ROUND(SUM(ISNULL(c.mid_cosdes,0)*ISNULL(c.mid_numrac,0)),2) AS mid_cosdes ")
    sql6 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " IIF(isnull(b.min_racrea),0,b.min_racrea) ", " ISNULL(b.min_racrea,0) ")
'    RS1.Open "SELECT b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, a.ser_nombre, b.min_fecmin, b.min_racrea, " & _
'             "ROUND(SUM(c.mid_cosrec*c.mid_numrac),2) AS mid_cosrec, ROUND(SUM(c.mid_cosdes*c.mid_numrac),2) AS mid_cosdes FROM a_servicio a, b_minuta b, b_minutadet c " & _
'             "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
'             "AND   b.min_codser = a.ser_codigo " & _
'             "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
'             "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
'             "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
'             "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
'             "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
'             "AND   c.mid_tipmin = '2' AND (not is null (mid_cosrec) or not is null(mid_cosdes) )" & _
'             "GROUP BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, a.ser_nombre, b.min_fecmin, b.min_racrea ORDER BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, a.ser_nombre, b.min_fecmin, " & sql6 & ", " & _
             " " & sql5 & " FROM a_servicio a, b_minuta b, b_minutadet c " & _
             "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_codser = a.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   c.mid_tipmin = '2' " & _
             "GROUP BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, a.ser_nombre, b.min_fecmin, b.min_racrea ORDER BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!min_codser <> auxser Or RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Then
             estfij = False
             '-------> Buscar datos estructura fija día
             RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT mfd_cencos FROM b_minutafijadia " & _
                      "WHERE mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   mfd_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   mfd_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                      "AND   mfd_fecha >= " & RS1!min_fecmin & " AND mfd_fecha <= " & RS1!min_fecmin & " AND mfd_tipmin = '2'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then estfij = True
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
             '-------> Buscar fecha estructura fija
             fecesf = 0
             If Not estfij Then
                RS2.Open "SELECT MAX(mif_fecval) AS fecval FROM b_minutafija " & _
                         "WHERE mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                         "AND   mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                         "AND   mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                If Not RS2.EOF Then fecesf = IIf(IsNull(RS2!fecval), 0, RS2!fecval)
                RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
             End If
             If auxser > 0 Then
                For i = 1 To MaxFil
                    If auxser = veccostot(i, 2) And auxreg = veccostot(i, 1) Then
                       veccostot(i, 4) = (veccostot(i, 4) + vCosSer)
                       veccostot(i, 5) = 0
                       veccostot(i, 6) = 1
                    ElseIf Trim(veccostot(i, 1)) = 0 And Trim(veccostot(i, 2)) = 0 Then
                       veccostot(i, 1) = auxreg
                       veccostot(i, 2) = auxser
                       veccostot(i, 3) = nomser
                       veccostot(i, 4) = (veccostot(i, 4) + vCosSer)
                       veccostot(i, 5) = 0
                       veccostot(i, 6) = 1
                       Exit For
                    End If
                Next i
             End If
             auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
             auxser = RS1!min_codser
             nomser = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
             vCosSer = 0
          End If
          vCosFij = 0
          If estfij Then
             '-------> Calcular datos desde tabla estructura fija día
             RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(a.mfd_canpro*a.mfd_cospro) AS cosfij " & _
                      "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos c " & _
                      "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = c.pro_codigo " & _
                      "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.mfd_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mfd_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mfd_fecha = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " AND a.mfd_tipmin = '2' " & _
                      "AND   " & sql1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          Else
             If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
                RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(b.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro) AS cosfij " & _
                         "FROM  b_minutafija a, " & aAp & " b, b_productos c " & _
                         "WHERE a.mif_codpro = c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo=b.ppd_codpro AND b.ppd_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                         "AND   a.mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                         "AND   a.mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                         "AND   a.mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                         "AND   a.mif_fecval = " & fecesf & " " & _
                         "AND   a.mif_dianro = " & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                         "AND   " & sql1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             Else
                RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(b.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro) AS cosfij " & _
                         "FROM  b_minutafija a, b_productospmpdia b, b_productos c " & _
                         "WHERE a.mif_codpro = c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo = b.ppd_codpro AND b.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND b.ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                         "AND   a.mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                         "AND   a.mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                         "AND   a.mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                         "AND   a.mif_fecval = " & fecesf & " " & _
                         "AND   a.mif_dianro = " & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                         "AND   " & sql1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             End If
          End If
          If Not RS2.EOF And Not IsNull(RS2!cosfij) Then vCosFij = RS2!cosfij
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          vCosSer = (vCosSer + IIf(AliDes = 0, RS1!mid_cosrec, IIf(AliDes = 1, RS1!mid_cosdes, (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes))) + vCosFij)
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
       If auxser > 0 Then
          For i = 1 To MaxFil
              If auxreg = veccostot(i, 1) And auxser = veccostot(i, 2) Then
                 veccostot(i, 4) = (veccostot(i, 4) + vCosSer)
                 veccostot(i, 5) = 0
                 veccostot(i, 6) = 1
              ElseIf Trim(veccostot(i, 1)) = 0 And Trim(veccostot(i, 2)) = 0 Then
                 veccostot(i, 1) = auxreg
                 veccostot(i, 2) = auxser
                 veccostot(i, 3) = nomser
                 veccostot(i, 4) = (veccostot(i, 4) + vCosSer)
                 veccostot(i, 5) = 0
                 veccostot(i, 6) = 1
                 Exit For
              End If
          Next i
       End If
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Traer salida y devolución producción
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "SUM(IIf(a.tov_tipdoc='SP',b.dev_ptotal,'-' & b.dev_ptotal)) AS totdoc", "SUM(CASE WHEN a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' THEN b.dev_ptotal ELSE -1 * b.dev_ptotal END) AS totdoc")
    sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "CDate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
    sql4 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "CDate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser, e.ser_nombre, " & _
             "" & sql2 & " " & _
             "FROM  b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c, a_servicio e " & _
             "WHERE a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
             "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codser = e.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.dev_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   " & sql1 & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_rutcli = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ")  " & _
             "AND  (a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' or a.tov_tipdoc = 'DP') " & _
             "AND   b.dev_canmer <> 0 " & _
             "AND   a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' AND a.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro >= " & sql3 & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro <= " & sql4 & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser, e.ser_nombre ORDER BY a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          For i = 1 To MaxFil
              If RS1!tov_codreg = veccostot(i, 1) And RS1!tov_codser = veccostot(i, 2) Then
                 veccostot(i, 5) = (veccostot(i, 5) + RS1!totdoc)
                 Exit For
              ElseIf Trim(veccostot(i, 1)) = 0 And Trim(veccostot(i, 2)) = 0 Then
                 veccostot(i, 1) = RS1!tov_codreg
                 veccostot(i, 2) = RS1!tov_codser
                 veccostot(i, 3) = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
                 veccostot(i, 5) = (veccostot(i, 5) + RS1!totdoc)
                 Exit For
              End If
          Next i
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    codser = ""
    For j = 1 To MaxFil
        If Trim(veccostot(j, 1)) <> 0 And Trim(veccostot(j, 2)) <> 0 And Trim(veccostot(j, 4)) <> 0 And veccostot(j, 6) = 0 Then
           codser = codser & "" & veccostot(j, 2) & ","
        End If
    Next j
    '-------> Traer salida que no esten planificación
    If Trim(codser) <> "" Then
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser, e.ser_nombre, a.tov_fecpro " & _
             "FROM  b_totventas a, a_servicio e " & _
             "WHERE a.tov_codser = e.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.tov_rutcli = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ")  " & _
             "AND  (a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' or a.tov_tipdoc = 'DP') " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro >= " & sql2 & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro <= " & sql3 & " " & _
             "ORDER BY a.tov_codreg, a.tov_codser", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    auxser = 0: auxreg = 0
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!tov_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!tov_codser <> auxser Then
             If auxser > 0 Then
                For i = 1 To MaxFil
                    If auxreg = veccostot(i, 1) And auxser = veccostot(i, 2) Then
                       veccostot(i, 4) = (veccostot(i, 4) + vCosFij)
                       Exit For
                    ElseIf Trim(veccostot(i, 2)) = 0 And Trim(veccostot(i, 1)) = 0 Then
                       veccostot(i, 1) = auxreg
                       veccostot(i, 2) = auxser
                       veccostot(i, 3) = nomser
                       veccostot(i, 4) = (veccostot(i, 4) + vCosFij)
                       Exit For
                    End If
                Next i
             End If
             fecesf = 0
             RS2.Open "SELECT MAX(mif_fecval) AS fecval FROM b_minutafija " & _
                      "WHERE mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   mif_codreg = " & RS1!tov_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   mif_codser = " & RS1!tov_codser & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then fecesf = IIf(IsNull(RS2!fecval), 0, RS2!fecval)
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
             auxreg = RS1!tov_codreg
             auxser = RS1!tov_codser
             nomser = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
             vCosFij = 0
          End If
          If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
             RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(b.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro) AS cosfij " & _
                      "FROM  b_minutafija a, " & aAp & " b, b_productos c " & _
                      "WHERE a.mif_codpro = c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo = b.ppd_codpro AND b.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_codreg = " & RS1!tov_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_codser = " & RS1!tov_codser & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_fecval = " & fecesf & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_dianro = " & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd") & Right("0" & i, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd") & Right("0" & i, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                      "AND   " & sql1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          Else
             RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(b.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro) AS cosfij " & _
                      "FROM  b_minutafija a, b_productospmpdia b, b_productos c " & _
                      "WHERE a.mif_codpro = c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo = b.ppd_codpro AND b.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND b.ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_codreg = " & RS1!tov_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_codser = " & RS1!tov_codser & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_fecval = " & fecesf & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_dianro = " & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd") & Right("0" & i, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd") & Right("0" & i, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                      "AND   " & sql1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          End If
          If Not RS2.EOF And Not IsNull(RS2!cosfij) Then vCosFij = (vCosFij + RS2!cosfij)
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
       If auxser > 0 Then
          For i = 1 To MaxFil
              If auxreg = veccostot(i, 1) And auxser = veccostot(i, 2) Then
                 veccostot(i, 4) = (veccostot(i, 4) + vCosFij)
                 Exit For
              ElseIf Trim(veccostot(i, 1)) = 0 And Trim(veccostot(i, 2)) = 0 Then
                 veccostot(i, 1) = auxreg
                 veccostot(i, 2) = auxser
                 veccostot(i, 3) = nomser
                 veccostot(i, 4) = (veccostot(i, 4) + vCosFij)
                 Exit For
              End If
          Next i
       End If
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    End If
    i = 1: vCosPla = 0: vCosRrea = 0
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT reg_codigo, reg_nombre FROM a_regimen WHERE reg_codigo IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ")", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    auxreg = 0
    Dim vtotpla As Double, vtotrea As Double
    vtotpla = 0: vtotrea = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       If RS1!reg_codigo <> auxreg Then
          If auxreg > 0 Then i = i + 1
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!reg_codigo & " " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre)
          i = i + 1 '2
          For j = 1 To MaxFil
              If veccostot(j, 1) <> 0 And veccostot(j, 2) <> 0 And veccostot(j, 1) = RS1!reg_codigo Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = veccostot(j, 2) & " " & veccostot(j, 3)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(veccostot(j, 4), fg_Pict(9, 0))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(veccostot(j, 5), fg_Pict(9, 0))
                 If Trim(veccostot(j, 4)) <> 0 Then vCosPla = vCosPla + veccostot(j, 4): vtotpla = vtotpla + veccostot(j, 4)
                 If Trim(veccostot(j, 5)) <> 0 Then vCosRea = vCosRea + veccostot(j, 5): vtotrea = vtotrea + veccostot(j, 5)
                 i = i + 1
              End If
          Next j
          i = i + 1
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total Regimen"
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(vtotpla, fg_Pict(9, 0))
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(vtotrea, fg_Pict(9, 0))
          i = i + 1
          auxreg = RS1!reg_codigo
          vtotpla = 0: vtotrea = 0
       End If
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    If i > 1 Then
       i = i + 2
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Format(vCosPla, fg_Pict(9, 0))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(vCosRea, fg_Pict(9, 0))
    End If
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    '.PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
    '-------> Borrar tablas temporales
    If Trim(aAp) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp & ""
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_CostosTotPeriodo:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_AjuInv(cencos As String, fecini As String, fecfin As String, codbod As Long, opimp As Boolean)
Dim i As Long, totfam As Double, totgrl As Double, totcco As Double, auxcco As String, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, ctanom As String
Dim sql3 As String, sql4 As String, sql5 As String, sql6 As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_AjuInv
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = IIf(opimp, "Informe Detalle Ajustes Inventario", "Informe Resumen Ajustes Inventario")
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = IIf(opimp, "Detalle Ajuste Inventario", "resumido Ajuste Inventario")
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 8500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1, 2, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 2) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato": .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = ""
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS1!cli_codigo & " " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Bodega": .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "TODOS"
    If codbod > 0 Then
       RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Bodega(3, codbod, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
       .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = RS1!bod_codigo & " " & Trim(RS1!bod_nombre)
       RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    End If
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Rango Fecha": .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = CDate(fecini) & " - " & CDate(fecfin)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 6: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 5500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 2100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Unidad"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Diferencia"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Total"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    Dim opfampro As String, estfpro As Boolean, codtip As Long
    opfampro = IIf(opimp, " ORDER BY pro.pro_ctacon, pro.pro_codtip, pro.pro_nombre", " ORDER BY pro.pro_ctacon, pro.pro_codtip") 'IIf(0 = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("opfampro"), ";", "','")), " ORDER BY dev.dev_numlin", " ORDER BY pro.pro_ctacon, pro.pro_codtip, pro.pro_nombre")
    estfpro = True 'IIf(0 = (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("opfampro"), ";", "','")), False, True)
    sql1 = IIf(opimp, "dev.dev_codmer, pro.pro_nombre, pro.pro_codtip, pro.pro_ctacon, cta.cta_nombre, uni.uni_nombre,", "pro.pro_codtip, pro.pro_ctacon, cta.cta_nombre,")
    sql2 = IIf(opimp, "GROUP BY dev.dev_codmer, pro.pro_nombre, pro.pro_codtip, pro.pro_ctacon, cta.cta_nombre, uni.uni_nombre", "GROUP BY pro.pro_codtip, pro.pro_ctacon, cta.cta_nombre")
    sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " SUM(IIf(aju.aju_tipo = 'A',dev.dev_canmer,(dev.dev_canmer*-1))) AS dev_canmer ", " SUM(CASE WHEN aju.aju_tipo = 'A' THEN dev.dev_canmer ELSE (dev.dev_canmer*-1)END) AS dev_canmer ")
    sql4 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " SUM(IIf(aju.aju_tipo = 'A',dev.dev_canmer,(dev.dev_canmer*-1))*dev.dev_precos) AS dev_precos ", " SUM(CASE WHEN aju.aju_tipo = 'A' THEN dev.dev_canmer ELSE (dev.dev_canmer*-1)END*dev.dev_precos) AS dev_precos ")
    sql5 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " Cdate('" & fecini & "') ", " '" & Format(fecini, "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    sql6 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " Cdate('" & fecfin & "') ", " '" & Format(fecfin, "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
    RS2.Open "SELECT " & sql1 & " " & _
             "" & sql3 & ", " & sql4 & " " & _
             "FROM b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro, a_unidad uni, a_tipoajuste aju, a_ctacontable cta " & _
             "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc AND tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND   pro.pro_codigo = dev.dev_codmer AND uni.uni_codigo = pro.pro_coduni AND pro.pro_ctacon = cta.cta_codigo " & _
             "AND   tov.tov_codser = aju.aju_codigo " & _
             "AND   tov.tov_fecemi >= " & sql5 & " AND tov.tov_fecemi <= " & sql6 & " " & _
             "AND   tov_codbod = " & codbod & " AND tov.tov_tipdoc = 'AI' " & _
             "AND   tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' AND dev.dev_canmer > 0 " & sql2 & " " & opfampro & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 5500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 2100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    i = 1: codtip = 0: totfam = 0: totgrl = 0: totcco = 0: auxcco = "": ctanom = 0
    Do While Not RS2.EOF
       If (RS2!pro_codtip <> codtip Or RS2!pro_ctacon <> auxcco) And estfpro Then
          If codtip > 0 Then
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total Familia ": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(totfam, fg_Pict(9, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True
             totfam = 0
             i = i + 1
          End If
          If Trim(auxcco) <> "" And RS2!pro_ctacon <> auxcco Then
              i = i + 1
             .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 2
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total Cuenta " & Trim(auxcco) & " " & ctanom: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(totcco, fg_Pict(9, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True
             totcco = 0
             i = i + 2
          End If
          If RS2!pro_ctacon <> auxcco Then
             .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 5
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Cuenta " & Trim(RS2!pro_ctacon) & " " & Trim(RS2!cta_nombre)
             .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
             i = i + 1
          End If
          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 5
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "   " & fg_BuscaenArbol(RS2!pro_codtip, "a_tipopro", "tip_codigo")
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
          i = i + 1
          codtip = RS2!pro_codtip
          auxcco = RS2!pro_ctacon
          ctanom = Trim(RS2!cta_nombre)
       End If
       If RS2!dev_precos <> 0 And opimp Then
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "      " & Trim(RS2!dev_codmer)
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS2!pro_nombre
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = RS2!uni_nombre
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(RS2!dev_canmer, fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS2!dev_precos, fg_Pict(9, 2))
          i = i + 1
       End If
       totfam = totfam + RS2!dev_precos
       totgrl = totgrl + RS2!dev_precos
       totcco = totcco + RS2!dev_precos
       RS2.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total Familia ": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(totfam, fg_Pict(9, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True
    totfam = 0
    
    i = i + 2
    .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 2
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total Cuenta " & Trim(auxcco) & " " & ctanom: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(totcco, fg_Pict(9, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True
    totcco = 0

    i = i + 2
    .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 2
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total General ": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(totgrl, fg_Pict(9, 2)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True
    totgrl = 0
    i = i + 1
    
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i - 1
    '.PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_AjuInv:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_ProduccionPaciente(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, codgrp As String, fecini As Date, fecfin As Date, opimp As Boolean)
Dim i As Long, codbod As Long, nombod As String, totfam As Double, totgrl As Double
Dim nomreg As String, nomser As String, nomgrp As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_ProduccionPaciente
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Producción"
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Informe de Producción " & IIf(opimp, "(Detalle)", "(Resumen)")
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    
    nomreg = strGetParamDescription(codreg)
    nomser = strGetParamDescription(codser)
    nomgrp = strGetParamDescription(codgrp)
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1, 2, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 2) = False
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 3) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 4) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Período  ": .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = fecini & " al " & fecfin
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Régimen       ": .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Trim(nomreg)
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Servicio ": .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Trim(nomser)
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Grupo Usuario ": .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = Trim(nomgrp)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = IIf(opimp, 6, 5): .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = IIf(opimp, 2000, 800): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = IIf(opimp, 800, 4100): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = IIf(opimp, 4100, 1100): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = IIf(opimp, taLeftTop, taRightTop)
    If opimp Then .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "F.Pedido"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Servicio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = IIf(opimp, "Grupo Usuario", "Tipo")
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = IIf(opimp, "Tipo", "Preparación")
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = IIf(opimp, "Preparación", "Cantidad")
    If opimp Then .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Cantidad"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    Dim sql1 As String, sql2 As String
    If opimp Then
       sql1 = "SELECT DISTINCT a.top_fecped, b.tpd_prorec, d.ser_codigo, d.ser_nombre, g.grp_codigo, g.grp_nombre, c.rec_codigo, c.rec_nombre, SUM(b.tpd_cansel) AS tpd_cansel " & _
              "FROM b_tomapedido a, b_tomapedidodet b, b_receta c, a_servicio d, a_grupopaciente g, b_pacientes h " & _
              "WHERE a.top_codigo=b.tpd_codigo " & _
              "AND   b.tpd_codser=d.ser_codigo " & _
              "AND   b.tpd_codrec=c.rec_codigo " & _
              "AND   a.top_codpac=h.pac_codigo " & _
              "AND   h.pac_codgrp=g.grp_codigo "
       If Trim(codreg) <> "" Then sql1 = sql1 & "AND  b.tpd_codreg IN ( " & codreg & " ) "
       If Trim(codser) <> "" Then sql1 = sql1 & "AND  b.tpd_codser IN ( " & codser & " ) "
       If Trim(codgrp) <> "" Then sql1 = sql1 & "AND  h.pac_codgrp IN ( " & codgrp & " ) "
       sql1 = sql1 & "AND   a.top_fecped>=cdate('" & fecini & "') " & _
                     "AND   a.top_fecped<=cdate('" & fecfin & "') " & _
                     "AND   b.tpd_prorec='R' AND b.tpd_cansel>0 GROUP BY a.top_fecped, b.tpd_prorec, d.ser_codigo, d.ser_nombre, g.grp_codigo, g.grp_nombre, c.rec_codigo, c.rec_nombre ORDER BY a.top_fecped, d.ser_codigo"
    
        sql2 = "SELECT DISTINCT a.top_fecped, b.tpd_prorec, d.ser_codigo, d.ser_nombre, g.grp_codigo, g.grp_nombre, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, SUM(b.tpd_cansel) AS tpd_cansel " & _
               "FROM b_tomapedido a, b_tomapedidodet b, b_productos c, a_servicio d, a_grupopaciente g, b_pacientes h " & _
               "WHERE a.top_codigo=b.tpd_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.tpd_codser=d.ser_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.tpd_codrec=val(c.pro_codigo) " & _
               "AND   a.top_codpac=h.pac_codigo " & _
               "AND   h.pac_codgrp=g.grp_codigo "
       If Trim(codreg) <> "" Then sql2 = sql2 & "AND  b.tpd_codreg IN ( " & codreg & " ) "
       If Trim(codser) <> "" Then sql2 = sql2 & "AND  b.tpd_codser IN ( " & codser & " ) "
       If Trim(codgrp) <> "" Then sql2 = sql2 & "AND  h.pac_codgrp IN ( " & codgrp & " ) "
       sql2 = sql2 & "AND   a.top_fecped>=cdate('" & fecini & "') " & _
                     "AND   a.top_fecped<=cdate('" & fecfin & "') " & _
                     "AND   b.tpd_prorec='P' AND b.tpd_cansel>0 GROUP BY a.top_fecped, b.tpd_prorec, d.ser_codigo, d.ser_nombre, g.grp_codigo, g.grp_nombre, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, b.tpd_cansel ORDER BY a.top_fecped, d.ser_codigo"
    Else
       sql1 = "SELECT DISTINCT a.top_fecped, b.tpd_prorec, d.ser_codigo, d.ser_nombre, c.rec_codigo, c.rec_nombre, SUM(b.tpd_cansel) AS tpd_cansel " & _
              "FROM b_tomapedido a, b_tomapedidodet b, b_receta c, a_servicio d, a_grupopaciente g, b_pacientes h " & _
              "WHERE a.top_codigo=b.tpd_codigo " & _
              "AND   b.tpd_codser=d.ser_codigo " & _
              "AND   b.tpd_codrec=c.rec_codigo " & _
              "AND   a.top_codpac=h.pac_codigo " & _
              "AND   h.pac_codgrp=g.grp_codigo "
       If Trim(codreg) <> "" Then sql1 = sql1 & "AND  b.tpd_codreg IN ( " & codreg & " ) "
       If Trim(codser) <> "" Then sql1 = sql1 & "AND  b.tpd_codser IN ( " & codser & " ) "
       If Trim(codgrp) <> "" Then sql1 = sql1 & "AND  h.pac_codgrp IN ( " & codgrp & " ) "
       sql1 = sql1 & "AND   a.top_fecped>=cdate('" & fecini & "') " & _
                     "AND   a.top_fecped<=cdate('" & fecfin & "') " & _
                     "AND   b.tpd_prorec='R' AND b.tpd_cansel>0 GROUP BY a.top_fecped, b.tpd_prorec, d.ser_codigo, d.ser_nombre, c.rec_codigo, c.rec_nombre ORDER BY a.top_fecped, d.ser_codigo"
    
        sql2 = "SELECT DISTINCT a.top_fecped, b.tpd_prorec, d.ser_codigo, d.ser_nombre, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, SUM(b.tpd_cansel) AS tpd_cansel " & _
               "FROM b_tomapedido a, b_tomapedidodet b, b_productos c, a_servicio d, a_grupopaciente g, b_pacientes h " & _
               "WHERE a.top_codigo=b.tpd_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.tpd_codser=d.ser_codigo " & _
               "AND   b.tpd_codrec=val(c.pro_codigo) " & _
               "AND   a.top_codpac=h.pac_codigo " & _
               "AND   h.pac_codgrp=g.grp_codigo "
    If Trim(codreg) <> "" Then sql2 = sql2 & "AND  b.tpd_codreg IN ( " & codreg & " ) "
       If Trim(codser) <> "" Then sql2 = sql2 & "AND  b.tpd_codser IN ( " & codser & " ) "
       If Trim(codgrp) <> "" Then sql2 = sql2 & "AND  h.pac_codgrp IN ( " & codgrp & " ) "
       sql2 = sql2 & "AND   a.top_fecped>=cdate('" & fecini & "') " & _
                     "AND   a.top_fecped<=cdate('" & fecfin & "') " & _
                     "AND   b.tpd_prorec='P' AND b.tpd_cansel>0 GROUP BY a.top_fecped, b.tpd_prorec, d.ser_codigo, d.ser_nombre, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, b.tpd_cansel ORDER BY a.top_fecped, d.ser_codigo"
    End If
    RS1.Open sql1 & " UNION " & sql2, vg_db, adOpenStatic
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = IIf(opimp, 6, 5): .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = IIf(opimp, 2000, 800): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = IIf(opimp, 800, 4100): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = IIf(opimp, 4100, 1100): .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = IIf(opimp, taLeftTop, taRightTop)
    If opimp Then .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    i = 1
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!top_fecped
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
       If opimp Then
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!grp_nombre)
       Else
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!tpd_prorec)
       End If
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(opimp, Trim(RS1!tpd_prorec), Trim(RS1!rec_nombre))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(opimp, Trim(RS1!rec_nombre), Format(RS1!tpd_cansel, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)))
       If opimp Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(RS1!tpd_cansel, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
       RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_ProduccionPaciente:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_DetalleConsumoPaciente(cencos As String, codpac As String, codreg As String, codser As String, codgrp As String, fecini As Date, fecfin As Date)
Dim i As Long, codbod As Long, nombod As String, totfam As Double, totgrl As Double
Dim nomreg As String, nomser As String, nomgrp As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_DetalleConsumoPaciente
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Detalle Consumo"
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Informe de Detalle Consumo "
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    
    nomreg = strGetParamDescription(codreg)
    nomser = strGetParamDescription(codser)
    nomgrp = strGetParamDescription(codgrp)
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1, 2, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 2) = False
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 3) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 4) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Período  ": .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = fecini & " al " & fecfin
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Régimen       ": .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Trim(nomreg)
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Servicio ": .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Trim(nomser)
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Grupo Usuario ": .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = Trim(nomgrp)
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Pacientes ": .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = "[Todos]"
    '------- Traer paciente
    RS1.Open "SELECT pac_nombre, pac_appaterno, pac_apmaterno FROM b_pacientes WHERE  pac_codigo= '" & codpac & "'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = fg_PintaRut(codpac) & " " & Trim(RS1!pac_nombre) & " " & Trim(RS1!pac_appaterno) & " " & Trim(RS1!pac_apmaterno)
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "F.Pedido"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Grp. Paciente"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Paciente"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Servicio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Tipo"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Preparación"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Cantidad"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    Dim sql1 As String, sql2 As String
    sql1 = "SELECT DISTINCT a.top_fecped, a.top_codpac, h.pac_nombre, h.pac_appaterno, h.pac_apmaterno, b.tpd_prorec, d.ser_codigo, d.ser_nombre, g.grp_codigo, g.grp_nombre, c.rec_codigo, c.rec_nombre, SUM(b.tpd_cansel) AS tpd_cansel " & _
           "FROM b_tomapedido a, b_tomapedidodet b, b_receta c, a_servicio d, a_grupopaciente g, b_pacientes h " & _
           "WHERE a.top_codigo=b.tpd_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codser=d.ser_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codrec=c.rec_codigo " & _
           "AND   a.top_codpac=h.pac_codigo " & _
           "AND   h.pac_codgrp=g.grp_codigo "
    If Trim(codpac) <> "" Then sql1 = sql1 & "AND  a.top_codpac IN ( '" & codpac & "' ) "
    If Trim(codreg) <> "" Then sql1 = sql1 & "AND  b.tpd_codreg IN ( " & codreg & " ) "
    If Trim(codser) <> "" Then sql1 = sql1 & "AND  b.tpd_codser IN ( " & codser & " ) "
    If Trim(codgrp) <> "" Then sql1 = sql1 & "AND  h.pac_codgrp IN ( " & codgrp & " ) "
    sql1 = sql1 & "AND   a.top_fecped>=cdate('" & fecini & "') " & _
                  "AND   a.top_fecped<=cdate('" & fecfin & "') " & _
                  "AND   b.tpd_prorec='R' AND b.tpd_cansel>0 GROUP BY a.top_fecped, a.top_codpac, h.pac_nombre, h.pac_appaterno, h.pac_apmaterno, b.tpd_prorec, d.ser_codigo, d.ser_nombre, g.grp_codigo, g.grp_nombre, c.rec_codigo, c.rec_nombre ORDER BY a.top_fecped, d.ser_codigo"
    
    sql2 = "SELECT DISTINCT a.top_fecped, a.top_codpac, h.pac_nombre, h.pac_appaterno, h.pac_apmaterno, b.tpd_prorec, d.ser_codigo, d.ser_nombre, g.grp_codigo, g.grp_nombre, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, SUM(b.tpd_cansel) AS tpd_cansel " & _
           "FROM b_tomapedido a, b_tomapedidodet b, b_productos c, a_servicio d, a_grupopaciente g, b_pacientes h " & _
           "WHERE a.top_codigo=b.tpd_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codser=d.ser_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codrec=val(c.pro_codigo) " & _
           "AND   a.top_codpac=h.pac_codigo " & _
           "AND   h.pac_codgrp=g.grp_codigo "
    If Trim(codpac) <> "" Then sql2 = sql2 & "AND  a.top_codpac IN ( '" & codpac & "' ) "
    If Trim(codreg) <> "" Then sql2 = sql2 & "AND  b.tpd_codreg IN ( " & codreg & " ) "
    If Trim(codser) <> "" Then sql2 = sql2 & "AND  b.tpd_codser IN ( " & codser & " ) "
    If Trim(codgrp) <> "" Then sql2 = sql2 & "AND  h.pac_codgrp IN ( " & codgrp & " ) "
    sql2 = sql2 & "AND   a.top_fecped>=cdate('" & fecini & "') " & _
                  "AND   a.top_fecped<=cdate('" & fecfin & "') " & _
                  "AND   b.tpd_prorec='P' AND b.tpd_cansel>0 GROUP BY a.top_fecped, a.top_codpac, h.pac_nombre, h.pac_appaterno, h.pac_apmaterno, b.tpd_prorec, d.ser_codigo, d.ser_nombre, g.grp_codigo, g.grp_nombre, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, b.tpd_cansel ORDER BY a.top_fecped, d.ser_codigo"
    RS1.Open sql1 & " UNION " & sql2, vg_db, adOpenStatic
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    i = 1
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!top_fecped
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!grp_nombre)
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!pac_nombre) & " " & Trim(RS1!pac_appaterno) & " " & Trim(RS1!pac_apmaterno)
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Trim(RS1!tpd_prorec)
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Trim(RS1!rec_nombre)
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(RS1!tpd_cansel, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
       RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_DetalleConsumoPaciente:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_AporteNutPaciente(cencos As String, nomcas As String, codpac As String, nompac As String, codreg As String, codser As String, codgrp As String, codapo As String, fecini As Date, fecfin As Date)
Dim cFor As String, cHea As String, cBod As String, TCasino As String, nomservicio As String, TRegimen As String, nompventa As String
Dim NomIngrediente As String, nomcasino As String, Casino As String, cabecera As String
Dim cRow As Long, FechaIni As Long, FechaFin As Long, MnitmRef As Long, ctrfecha As Date, MnitmNo As Long, indini As Long, indfin As Long, p As Long, z As Long, ipventa As Long, CodServicio As Long, nservicio As Long, auxcodservicio As Long
Dim iprocesa As Long, icatr As Long, totreg As Long, i As Long, j As Long, Idietetico As Long, codregimen As Long
Dim numdia As Integer, SwSalto As Integer, SwTotal As Integer, exdiet As Integer, npage As Integer, iglosa As Integer
Dim dAporte As String, vAporte As String, sAporte As String, auxpac As String
Dim DietItemYldVal1 As Double, NtrntVal As Double, DietItemConvVal As Double, cantcalorias As Double, cantproteinas As Double, cantlipidos As Double, canthidratos As Double, cantacgrsat As Double
Dim porsolida As Double, porliquida As Double, totserporsolida As Double, totserporliquida As Double, totdiaporsolida As Double, totdiaporliquida As Double
Dim pneto As Double, totserpneto As Double, totdiapneto As Double, canpavb As Double, totpavb As Double
Dim cantotp As Double, cantotg As Double, cantotcho As Double, cantotdensidad As Double, cantotsacarosa As Double, cantotagrs As Double
Dim cantotcalorias As Double, cantotproteinas As Double, cantotlipidos As Double, cantothidratos As Double, cantotacgrsat As Double
Dim nomreg As String, nomser As String, nomgrp As String, nomapo As String, sql1 As String, sql2 As String

Dim MatrizCodDietetico() As Long
Dim MatrizMenuAporte() As Double
Dim Matrizaporteservicio() As Double
Dim MatrizMenuTotAporte() As Double
Dim matrizcatr() As Long
Dim matrizglosa() As String
dAporte = "": vAporte = "": npage = 0
MsgTitulo = "Informe Aporte Nutricional Paciente"
On Local Error GoTo Error_AporteNutPaciente
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .MarginHeader = 500
    .MarginTop = 1850
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .MarginBottom = 1000
    .MarginFooter = 500
    .MarginRight = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 10
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Action = 3
    .IndentLeft = 0
    .IndentRight = 0
    .SpaceAfter = 0
    .TableBorder = 0
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Informe Aporte Nutriconal Paciente "
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    cabecera = ""
    cabecera = "~<2400|~>100|~>1000|~>1000"
    dAporte = "Fecha    Servicio||Cant. Servir|Cant. Neto"
    Idietetico = 1
    fg_carga ""
    nomreg = strGetParamDescription(codreg)
    nomser = strGetParamDescription(codser)
    nomgrp = strGetParamDescription(codgrp)
    nomapo = strGetParamDescription(codapo)
    If Trim(codapo) <> "" Then
       RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM a_nutriente WHERE nut_codigo IN (" & codapo & " ) ORDER BY nut_secnro", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Else
       RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM a_nutriente WHERE ORDER BY nut_secnro", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    End If
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       ReDim Preserve MatrizCodDietetico(Idietetico)
       MatrizCodDietetico(Idietetico) = RS1!nut_codigo
       dAporte = dAporte & "|" & Trim(RS1!nut_nombre)
       Idietetico = Idietetico + 1
       cabecera = cabecera & "|~>800"
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    cabecera = cabecera & "|~>600|~>600|~>600|~>600|~>600|~>600" & ";"
    dAporte = dAporte & "|Pavb|Pavb%|P%|G%|Cho%|AGS % " & ";"
    Idietetico = Idietetico - 1
    If Idietetico < 1 Then Idietetico = 1
    indfin = (((Idietetico) * 3) + 2)
    ReDim Preserve MatrizMenuAporte(Idietetico)
    ReDim Preserve Matrizaporteservicio(Idietetico)
    ReDim Preserve MatrizMenuTotAporte(Idietetico)
    vg_ArchTxt = ""
    vg_ArchTxt = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_ArchTxt For Output As #1
    RS1.Open "SELECT COUNT(*) AS nreg FROM b_ingrediente", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then totreg = RS1!nreg: ReDim matrizdiet(RS1!nreg, indfin) As Double
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Preview.VSPrinter.FontSize = 8
    Preview.VSPrinter.FontName = "Arial"
    Preview.VSPrinter.FontSize = 8
    
    MnitmRef = 0: ctrfecha = 0: numdia = 1: SwSalto = 0: SwTotal = 0: exdiet = 0: CodServicio = 0: nservicio = 0
    totserporsolida = 0: totserporliquida = 0
    totdiaporsolida = 0: totdiaporliquida = 0
    pneto = 0: totdiapneto = 0: totserpneto = 0
    porsolida = 0: porliquida = 0: totserporsolida = 0: totserporliquida = 0: totdiaporsolida = 0: totdiaporliquida = 0
    cantotp = 0: cantotg = 0: cantotcho = 0: cantotdensidad = 0: cantotsacarosa = 0: cantotagrs = 0
    cantotcalorias = 0: cantotproteinas = 0: cantotlipidos = 0: cantothidratos = 0: cantotacgrsat = 0
    iprocesa = 0
    ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(0)
    iglosa = 1
    YCurrentPage = 1: WsLinea = 8
    sql1 = "": sql2 = ""
    sql1 = "SELECT DISTINCT a.top_fecped, g.pac_codigo, g.pac_nombre, g.pac_appaterno, g.pac_apmaterno, e.reg_codigo, e.reg_nombre, " & _
           "f.ser_codigo, f.ser_nombre, f.ser_orden, b.tpd_numlin, d.rec_codigo, d.rec_nombre, h.ing_codigo, h.ing_nombre, h.ing_indpav, h.ing_facnut, c.tdr_canpro, c.tdr_pctapr, c.tdr_pctcoc, " & _
           "c.tdr_pctnut, (((c.tdr_pctapr/100)*c.tdr_canpro)*(c.tdr_pctcoc/100)) AS canser, ((c.tdr_pctnut/100)*(c.tdr_canpro)) AS cannet, (SELECT DISTINCT ((c.tdr_pctnut/100)*(nut.pnu_canapo*c.tdr_canpro)/h.ing_facnut) AS cancalorias FROM b_productonut nut WHERE nut.pnu_codpro=h.ing_codigo AND nut.pnu_codapo=2), " & _
           "(SELECT SUM((c.tdr_pctnut/100)*(nut.pnu_canapo*c.tdr_canpro)/h.ing_facnut) AS proteinas FROM b_productonut nut WHERE nut.pnu_codpro=h.ing_codigo AND nut.pnu_codapo=3), " & _
           "(SELECT SUM((c.tdr_pctnut/100)*(nut.pnu_canapo*c.tdr_canpro)/h.ing_facnut) AS lipidos FROM b_productonut nut WHERE nut.pnu_codpro=h.ing_codigo AND nut.pnu_codapo=6), " & _
           "(SELECT SUM((c.tdr_pctnut/100)*(nut.pnu_canapo*c.tdr_canpro)/h.ing_facnut) AS hidratos FROM b_productonut nut WHERE nut.pnu_codpro=h.ing_codigo AND nut.pnu_codapo=4), " & _
           "(SELECT SUM((c.tdr_pctnut/100)*(nut.pnu_canapo*c.tdr_canpro)/h.ing_facnut) AS acgrsat FROM b_productonut nut WHERE nut.pnu_codpro=h.ing_codigo AND nut.pnu_codapo=8) " & _
           "FROM b_tomapedido a, b_tomapedidodet b, b_tomapedidodetrec c, b_receta d, a_regimen e, a_servicio f, b_pacientes g, b_ingrediente h, a_estservicio i " & _
           "WHERE a.top_codigo=b.tpd_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codigo=c.tdr_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_numlin=c.tdr_numlin " & _
           "AND   c.tdr_codrec=d.rec_codigo " & _
           "AND   c.tdr_coding=h.ing_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codser=f.ser_codigo " & _
           "AND   f.ser_codigo=i.ess_codser AND i.ess_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codreg=e.reg_codigo " & _
           "AND   a.top_codpac=g.pac_codigo "
    If Trim(codpac) <> "" Then sql1 = sql1 & "AND  a.top_codpac IN ( '" & codpac & "' ) "
    If Trim(codreg) <> "" Then sql1 = sql1 & "AND  b.tpd_codreg IN ( " & codreg & " ) "
    If Trim(codser) <> "" Then sql1 = sql1 & "AND  b.tpd_codser IN ( " & codser & " ) "
    If Trim(codgrp) <> "" Then sql1 = sql1 & "AND  g.pac_codgrp IN ( " & codgrp & " ) "
    sql1 = sql1 & "AND   a.top_fecped>=cdate('" & fecini & "') " & _
                  "AND   a.top_fecped<=cdate('" & fecfin & "') " & _
                  "AND   b.tpd_prorec='R' AND b.tpd_cansel>0 ORDER BY a.top_fecped, g.pac_codigo, b.tpd_numlin, f.ser_orden"
    
    sql2 = "SELECT DISTINCT a.top_fecped, g.pac_codigo, g.pac_nombre, g.pac_appaterno, g.pac_apmaterno, e.reg_codigo, e.reg_nombre, " & _
           "f.ser_codigo, f.ser_nombre, f.ser_orden, b.tpd_numlin, d.pro_codigo, d.pro_nombre, h.ing_codigo, h.ing_nombre, h.ing_indpav, h.ing_facnut, c.tdr_canpro, c.tdr_pctapr, c.tdr_pctcoc, " & _
           "c.tdr_pctnut, (((c.tdr_pctapr/100)*c.tdr_canpro)*(c.tdr_pctcoc/100)) AS canser, ((c.tdr_pctnut/100)*(c.tdr_canpro)) AS cannet, (SELECT DISTINCT ((c.tdr_pctnut/100)*(nut.pnu_canapo*c.tdr_canpro)/h.ing_facnut) AS cancalorias FROM b_productonut nut WHERE nut.pnu_codpro=h.ing_codigo AND nut.pnu_codapo=2), " & _
           "(SELECT SUM((c.tdr_pctnut/100)*(nut.pnu_canapo*c.tdr_canpro)/h.ing_facnut) AS proteinas FROM b_productonut nut WHERE nut.pnu_codpro=h.ing_codigo AND nut.pnu_codapo=3), " & _
           "(SELECT SUM((c.tdr_pctnut/100)*(nut.pnu_canapo*c.tdr_canpro)/h.ing_facnut) AS lipidos FROM b_productonut nut WHERE nut.pnu_codpro=h.ing_codigo AND nut.pnu_codapo=6), " & _
           "(SELECT SUM((c.tdr_pctnut/100)*(nut.pnu_canapo*c.tdr_canpro)/h.ing_facnut) AS hidratos FROM b_productonut nut WHERE nut.pnu_codpro=h.ing_codigo AND nut.pnu_codapo=4), " & _
           "(SELECT SUM((c.tdr_pctnut/100)*(nut.pnu_canapo*c.tdr_canpro)/h.ing_facnut) AS acgrsat FROM b_productonut nut WHERE nut.pnu_codpro=h.ing_codigo AND nut.pnu_codapo=8) " & _
           "FROM b_tomapedido a, b_tomapedidodet b, b_tomapedidodetrec c, b_productos d, a_regimen e, a_servicio f, b_pacientes g, b_ingrediente h, a_estservicio i " & _
           "WHERE a.top_codigo=b.tpd_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codigo=c.tdr_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_numlin=c.tdr_numlin " & _
           "AND   c.tdr_codrec=val(d.pro_codigo) " & _
           "AND   c.tdr_coding=h.ing_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codser=f.ser_codigo " & _
           "AND   f.ser_codigo=i.ess_codser AND i.ess_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codreg=e.reg_codigo " & _
           "AND   a.top_codpac=g.pac_codigo "
    If Trim(codpac) <> "" Then sql2 = sql2 & "AND  a.top_codpac IN ( '" & codpac & "' ) "
    If Trim(codreg) <> "" Then sql2 = sql2 & "AND  b.tpd_codreg IN ( " & codreg & " ) "
    If Trim(codser) <> "" Then sql2 = sql2 & "AND  b.tpd_codser IN ( " & codser & " ) "
    If Trim(codgrp) <> "" Then sql2 = sql2 & "AND  g.pac_codgrp IN ( " & codgrp & " ) "
    sql2 = sql2 & "AND   a.top_fecped>=cdate('" & fecini & "') " & _
                  "AND   a.top_fecped<=cdate('" & fecfin & "') " & _
                  "AND   b.tpd_prorec='P' AND b.tpd_cansel>0 ORDER BY a.top_fecped, g.pac_codigo, b.tpd_numlin, f.ser_orden"
    
    RS1.Open sql1 & " UNION " & sql2, vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       npage = 1
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftMiddle
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftMiddle
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftMiddle
       .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1, 2, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 2) = False
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 3) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 4) = False
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato  ": .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = cencos & " " & nomcas
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Régimen       ": .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Trim(nomreg)
       .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Servicio ": .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Trim(nomser)
       .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Grupo Usuario ": .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = Trim(nomgrp)
       .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Pacientes ": .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = IIf(Trim(codpac) = "", "[Todos]", fg_PintaRut(codpac) & " " & nompac)
       .TableCell(tcText, 3, 3) = "Período  ": .TableCell(tcText, 3, 4) = fecini & " al " & fecfin
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1): Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & Chr(13)
       .TableBorder = tbNone
       .EndTable
       .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
'       .Header = "||" & "Fecha : " & Date
       Preview.VSPrinter.FontSize = 7
       Preview.VSPrinter.FontName = "Arial"
       Preview.VSPrinter.FontSize = 7
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
         If RS1!top_fecped <> ctrfecha Or RS1!pac_codigo <> auxpac Then
            If SwSalto = 1 Then
               numdia = numdia + 1
               If SwTotal > 0 Then
                  vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(pneto, fg_Pict(4, 2))
                  For i = 1 To Idietetico
                      vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(MatrizMenuAporte(i), fg_Pict(4, 2))
                  Next i
                  cBod = ""
                  cBod = vAporte & ";"
                  cFor = cabecera
                      
                  ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
                  matrizglosa(iglosa) = cBod
                  iglosa = iglosa + 1
                  vAporte = ""
                  For i = 1 To Idietetico
                      MatrizMenuAporte(i) = 0
                  Next i
               End If
               ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
               matrizglosa(iglosa) = ""
               iglosa = iglosa + 1
               sAporte = "Total " & "|" & ":" & "|" & Format(totserporsolida, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(totserpneto, fg_Pict(4, 2))
               For i = 1 To Idietetico
                   sAporte = sAporte & "|" & Format(Matrizaporteservicio(i), fg_Pict(4, 2))
               Next i
               cantotp = 0: cantotg = 0: cantotcho = 0: cantotagrs = 0
               If cantproteinas > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then cantotp = CCur(((cantproteinas * 4) / cantcalorias) * 100)
               If cantlipidos > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then cantotg = CCur(((cantlipidos * 9) / cantcalorias) * 100)
               If canthidratos > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then cantotcho = CCur(((canthidratos * 4) / cantcalorias) * 100)
               If cantacgrsat > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then cantotagrs = CCur(((cantacgrsat * 9) / cantcalorias) * 100)
               cBod = ""
               sAporte = sAporte & "|" & Format(canpavb, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(CCur((canpavb / cantproteinas) * 100), fg_Pict(4, 2))
               cHea = sAporte & "|" & Format(cantotp, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotg, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotcho, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotagrs, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & ";"
               cFor = cabecera
               ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
               matrizglosa(iglosa) = cHea
               iglosa = iglosa + 1
               totserporsolida = 0: totserporliquida = 0: totserpneto = 0: porsolida = 0: pneto = 0: canpavb = 0
               cantcalorias = 0: cantproteinas = 0: cantlipidos = 0: canthidratos = 0: cantacgrsat = 0
               ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
               matrizglosa(iglosa) = ""
               iglosa = iglosa + 1
               For i = 1 To Idietetico
                   Matrizaporteservicio(i) = 0
               Next i
               sAporte = ""
               '------- Imprimir totales del día aportes nutricionales
               ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
               matrizglosa(iglosa) = ""
               iglosa = iglosa + 1
               vAporte = "A. Nutricional del Día" & "|" & ":" & "|" & Format(totdiaporsolida, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(totdiapneto, fg_Pict(4, 2))
               For i = 1 To Idietetico
                   vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(MatrizMenuTotAporte(i), fg_Pict(4, 2))
               Next i
               cantotp = 0: cantotg = 0: cantotcho = 0: cantotagrs = 0
               If cantotproteinas > 0 And cantotcalorias > 0 Then cantotp = CCur(((cantotproteinas * 4) / cantotcalorias) * 100)
               If cantotlipidos > 0 And cantotcalorias > 0 Then cantotg = CCur(((cantotlipidos * 9) / cantotcalorias) * 100)
               If cantothidratos > 0 And cantotcalorias > 0 Then cantotcho = CCur(((cantothidratos * 4) / cantotcalorias) * 100)
               If cantotacgrsat > 0 And cantotcalorias > 0 Then cantotagrs = CCur(((cantotacgrsat * 9) / cantotcalorias) * 100)
               cBod = ""
               vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(totpavb, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(CCur((totpavb / cantotproteinas) * 100), fg_Pict(4, 2))
               cHea = vAporte & "|" & Format(cantotp, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotg, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotcho, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotagrs, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & ";"
               cFor = cabecera
               ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
               matrizglosa(iglosa) = cHea
               iglosa = iglosa + 1
               vAporte = ""
               cantotcalorias = 0: cantotproteinas = 0: cantotlipidos = 0: cantothidratos = 0: cantotacgrsat = 0
               totserporsolida = 0: totserporliquida = 0: totdiaporliquida = 0: totdiaporsolida = 0
               totserpneto = 0: totdiapneto = 0: porsolida = 0: pneto = 0: totpavb = 0: canpavb = 0
               '------- Fin imprimir totales del día aportes nutricionales
               For i = 1 To Idietetico
                   MatrizMenuTotAporte(i) = 0
               Next i
               '------- Imprimir totales Servicios P%, G%, CHO%, Densidad, Sacarosa, Ac.Grasos
               WsLinea = WsLinea + iglosa - 1
               If WsLinea > 58 Then
                  WsLinea = 8 + iglosa - 1
                  Preview.VSPrinter.NewPage
                  YCurrentPage = Preview.VSPrinter.CurrentPage
               End If
               For i = 1 To iglosa - 1
                   If matrizglosa(i) = "" Then
                      cFor = "~<3500;"
                      cBod = "" & ";"
                      .AddTable cFor, cHea, cBod, RGB(256, 256, 0), , True
                      Print #1, "|"
                   Else
                      If i = 1 Then
                         cFor = cabecera
                         cBod = ""
                         cHea = dAporte
                         .AddTable cFor, cHea, cBod, RGB(256, 256, 0) ', , True
                         Print #1, Mid(dAporte, 1, Len(dAporte) - 1)
                      ElseIf i = iglosa - 1 Then
                         cFor = cabecera
                         cBod = ""
                         cHea = matrizglosa(i)
                         .AddTable cFor, cHea, cBod, RGB(128, 255, 218) ', , True
                         Print #1, Mid(matrizglosa(i), 1, Len(matrizglosa(i)) - 1)
                      Else
                         cBod = ""
                         .FontBold = IIf(Mid(matrizglosa(i), 1, 1) = ";", True, False)
                         Preview.VSPrinter.FontSize = IIf(Mid(matrizglosa(i), 1, 1) = ";", 8, 7)
                         cBod = IIf(Mid(matrizglosa(i), 1, 1) = ";", Mid(matrizglosa(i), 2, Len(matrizglosa(i))), matrizglosa(i))
                         cFor = IIf(Mid(matrizglosa(i), 1, 1) = ";", 13500, cabecera)
                         .AddTable cFor, cHea, cBod, RGB(256, 256, 0), , True
                         .FontBold = False
                         Print #1, Mid(matrizglosa(i), 1, Len(matrizglosa(i)) - 1)
                      End If
                   End If
               Next i
               cFor = "~<3500;"
               cBod = "" & ";"
               .AddTable cFor, cHea, cBod, RGB(256, 256, 0), , True
               Print #1, "|"
               ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(0)
               iglosa = 1
            End If

            cFor = cabecera
            cBod = ""
            cHea = dAporte
            ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
            matrizglosa(iglosa) = cHea
            iglosa = iglosa + 1
            cFor = "~<3500;"
            cBod = ";" & RS1!top_fecped & "  " & fg_PintaRut(RS1!pac_codigo) & " " & Trim(RS1!pac_nombre) & " " & Trim(RS1!pac_appaterno) & " " & Trim(RS1!pac_apmaterno) & ";"
            ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
            matrizglosa(iglosa) = cBod
            iglosa = iglosa + 1
            MnitmRef = 0: MnitmNo = 0: SwTotal = 0: CodServicio = 0: codregimen = 0
            ctrfecha = RS1!top_fecped
            auxpac = RS1!pac_codigo
            SwSalto = 1
         End If
         If RS1!ser_codigo <> CodServicio Or RS1!reg_codigo <> codregimen Then
            If CodServicio > 0 Then
               vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(porsolida, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(pneto, fg_Pict(4, 2))
               For i = 1 To Idietetico
                   vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(MatrizMenuAporte(i), fg_Pict(4, 2))
               Next i
               cBod = ""
               cBod = vAporte & ";"
               cFor = cabecera
               ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
               matrizglosa(iglosa) = cBod
               iglosa = iglosa + 1
               vAporte = ""
               For i = 1 To Idietetico
                   MatrizMenuAporte(i) = 0
               Next i
               SwTotal = 0
                 
               ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
               matrizglosa(iglosa) = ""
               iglosa = iglosa + 1
               sAporte = "Total " & "|" & ":" & "|" & Format(totserporsolida, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(totserpneto, fg_Pict(4, 2))
               For i = 1 To Idietetico
                   sAporte = sAporte & "|" & Format(Matrizaporteservicio(i), fg_Pict(4, 2))
               Next i
               cantotp = 0: cantotg = 0: cantotcho = 0: cantotagrs = 0
               If cantproteinas > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then cantotp = CCur(((cantproteinas * 4) / cantcalorias) * 100)
               If cantlipidos > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then cantotg = CCur(((cantlipidos * 9) / cantcalorias) * 100)
               If canthidratos > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then cantotcho = CCur(((canthidratos * 4) / cantcalorias) * 100)
               If cantacgrsat > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then cantotagrs = CCur(((cantacgrsat * 9) / cantcalorias) * 100)
               cBod = ""
               sAporte = sAporte & "|" & Format(canpavb, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(CCur((canpavb / cantproteinas) * 100), fg_Pict(4, 2))
               cHea = sAporte & "|" & Format(cantotp, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotg, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotcho, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotagrs, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & ";"
               cFor = cabecera
                   
               ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
               matrizglosa(iglosa) = cHea
               iglosa = iglosa + 1
               ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
               matrizglosa(iglosa) = ""
               iglosa = iglosa + 1
               For i = 1 To Idietetico
                   Matrizaporteservicio(i) = 0
               Next i
               totserporsolida = 0: totserporliquida = 0: totserpneto = 0: porsolida = 0: pneto = 0: canpavb = 0
               cantcalorias = 0: cantproteinas = 0: cantlipidos = 0: canthidratos = 0: cantacgrsat = 0
               sAporte = ""
               MnitmRef = 0: MnitmNo = 0: SwTotal = 0: canpavb = 0
            End If
            CodServicio = RS1!ser_codigo
            codregimen = RS1!reg_codigo
            cFor = "~<3500;"
            cBod = "; " & Trim(RS1!ser_nombre) & " " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre) & ";"
            ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
            matrizglosa(iglosa) = cBod
            iglosa = iglosa + 1
            nomservicio = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre) & " " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre)
         End If
             
         If RS1!rec_codigo <> MnitmRef Or RS1!tpd_numlin <> MnitmNo Then
            If SwTotal > 0 Then
               vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(porsolida, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(pneto, fg_Pict(4, 2))
               For i = 1 To Idietetico
                   vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(MatrizMenuAporte(i), fg_Pict(4, 2))
               Next i
               cBod = ""
               cBod = vAporte & ";"
               cFor = cabecera
               ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
               matrizglosa(iglosa) = cBod
               iglosa = iglosa + 1
               vAporte = ""
               For i = 1 To Idietetico
                   MatrizMenuAporte(i) = 0
               Next i
            End If
            MnitmRef = RS1!rec_codigo
            MnitmNo = RS1!tpd_numlin
            porsolida = 0: porliquida = 0: pneto = 0
            vAporte = "  " & Fg_SacaParentesis(Trim(RS1!rec_nombre)) & "|" & " " '& "|" & Format(porsolida, fg_Pict(4, 2)) ' & "|" & Format(pneto, fg_Pict(4, 2))
