            SwTotal = 1
         End If
         porsolida = CCur(porsolida + RS1!canser)
         totserporsolida = CCur(totserporsolida + RS1!canser)
         totdiaporsolida = CCur(totdiaporsolida + RS1!canser)
         
         pneto = CCur(pneto + RS1!cannet)
         totserpneto = CCur(totserpneto + RS1!cannet)
         totdiapneto = CCur(totdiapneto + RS1!cannet)
             
         cantcalorias = CCur(cantcalorias + IIf(IsNull(RS1(21)), 0, RS1(21)))
         cantproteinas = CCur(cantproteinas + IIf(IsNull(RS1(22)), 0, RS1(22)))
         cantlipidos = CCur(cantlipidos + IIf(IsNull(RS1(23)), 0, RS1(23)))
         canthidratos = CCur(canthidratos + IIf(IsNull(RS1(24)), 0, RS1(24)))
         cantacgrsat = CCur(cantacgrsat + IIf(IsNull(RS1(25)), 0, RS1(25)))
             
         cantotcalorias = CCur(cantotcalorias + IIf(IsNull(RS1(21)), 0, RS1(21)))
         cantotproteinas = CCur(cantotproteinas + IIf(IsNull(RS1(22)), 0, RS1(22)))
         cantotlipidos = CCur(cantotlipidos + IIf(IsNull(RS1(23)), 0, RS1(23)))
         cantothidratos = CCur(cantothidratos + IIf(IsNull(RS1(24)), 0, RS1(24)))
         cantotacgrsat = CCur(cantotacgrsat + IIf(IsNull(RS1(25)), 0, RS1(25)))
             
         If RS1!ing_indpav = 1 Then canpavb = CCur(canpavb + IIf(IsNull(RS1(22)), 0, RS1(22))): totpavb = CCur(totpavb + IIf(IsNull(RS1(22)), 0, RS1(22)))
         If RS1!ing_codigo > 0 Then
            For i = 1 To totreg
                If matrizdiet(i, 1) = RS1!ing_codigo Then
                   p = 3
                   For z = 1 To Idietetico
                       DietItemYldVal1 = RS1!tdr_pctnut
                       p = p + 1
                       NtrntVal = matrizdiet(i, p)
                       p = p + 1
                       DietItemConvVal = matrizdiet(i, p)
                       p = p + 1
                       If DietItemConvVal > 0 Then
                          MatrizMenuAporte(z) = CCur(((DietItemYldVal1 / 100) * (NtrntVal * RS1!tdr_canpro) / DietItemConvVal)) + MatrizMenuAporte(z)
                          MatrizMenuTotAporte(z) = CCur(((DietItemYldVal1 / 100) * (NtrntVal * RS1!tdr_canpro) / DietItemConvVal)) + MatrizMenuTotAporte(z)
                          Matrizaporteservicio(z) = CCur(((DietItemYldVal1 / 100) * (NtrntVal * RS1!tdr_canpro) / DietItemConvVal)) + Matrizaporteservicio(z)
                       End If
                       j = j + 1
                   Next z
                   exdiet = 1
                   Exit For
                ElseIf matrizdiet(i, 1) = 0 Then
                   indini = i
                   exdiet = 0
                   Exit For
                End If
            Next i
         End If
         If exdiet = 0 Then
            p = 3
            RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.nut_nombre, b.nut_codigo, a.ing_indgrv, a.ing_indpav, b.nut_secnro, " & _
                     "c.pnu_canapo " & _
                     "FROM  b_ingrediente a, a_nutriente b, b_productonut c " & _
                     "WHERE a.ing_codigo=c.pnu_codpro " & _
                     "AND   c.pnu_codapo=b.nut_codigo " & _
                     "AND   a.ing_codigo='" & RS1!ing_codigo & "' " & _
                     "ORDER BY b.nut_codigo", vg_db, adOpenStatic
            If Not RS2.EOF Then
               Do While Not RS2.EOF
                  For i = 1 To Idietetico
                      If MatrizCodDietetico(i) = RS2!nut_codigo Then
                         cBod = cBod & "|" & Format(CCur(((RS1!tdr_pctnut / 100) * (RS2!pnu_canapo * RS1!tdr_canpro) / RS1!tdr_pctnut)), fg_Pict(4, 2))
                         MatrizMenuAporte(i) = CCur(((RS1!tdr_pctnut / 100) * (RS2!pnu_canapo * RS1!tdr_canpro) / RS1!tdr_pctnut)) + MatrizMenuAporte(i)
                         MatrizMenuTotAporte(i) = CCur(((RS1!tdr_pctnut / 100) * (RS2!pnu_canapo * RS1!tdr_canpro) / RS1!tdr_pctnut)) + MatrizMenuTotAporte(i)
                         Matrizaporteservicio(i) = CCur(((RS1!tdr_pctnut / 100) * (RS2!pnu_canapo * RS1!tdr_canpro) / RS1!tdr_pctnut)) + Matrizaporteservicio(i)
                         matrizdiet(indini, 1) = RS1!ing_codigo
                         matrizdiet(indini, 2) = RS2!nut_codigo
                         matrizdiet(indini, p) = RS1!tdr_pctnut
                         p = p + 1
                         matrizdiet(indini, p) = RS2!pnu_canapo
                         p = p + 1
                         matrizdiet(indini, p) = RS1!ing_facnut
                         p = p + 1
                         Exit For
                      End If
                  Next i
                  RS2.MoveNext
               Loop
            End If
            RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
         End If
         RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
       If SwTotal > 0 Then
          vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(porsolida, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(pneto, fg_Pict(4, 2))
          For i = 1 To Idietetico
              vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(MatrizMenuAporte(i), fg_Pict(4, 2))
          Next i
          cBod = ""
          cBod = vAporte & ";"
          cFor = cabecera
          ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
          matrizglosa(iglosa) = cBod
          iglosa = iglosa + 1
          vAporte = ""
          For i = 1 To Idietetico
              MatrizMenuAporte(i) = 0
          Next i
       End If
             
       ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
       matrizglosa(iglosa) = ""
       iglosa = iglosa + 1
       sAporte = "Total " & "|" & ":" & "|" & Format(totserporsolida, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(totserpneto, fg_Pict(4, 2))
       For i = 1 To Idietetico
           sAporte = sAporte & "|" & Format(Matrizaporteservicio(i), fg_Pict(4, 2))
       Next i
       cantotp = 0: cantotg = 0: cantotcho = 0: cantotagrs = 0
       If cantproteinas > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then cantotp = CCur(((cantproteinas * 4) / cantcalorias) * 100)
       If cantlipidos > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then cantotg = CCur(((cantlipidos * 9) / cantcalorias) * 100)
       If canthidratos > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then cantotcho = CCur(((canthidratos * 4) / cantcalorias) * 100)
       If cantacgrsat > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then cantotagrs = CCur(((cantacgrsat * 9) / cantcalorias) * 100)
       cBod = ""
       sAporte = sAporte & "|" & Format(canpavb, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(CCur((canpavb / cantproteinas) * 100), fg_Pict(4, 2))
       cHea = sAporte & "|" & Format(cantotp, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotg, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotcho, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotagrs, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & ";"
       cFor = cabecera
              
       ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
       matrizglosa(iglosa) = cHea
       iglosa = iglosa + 1
       ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
       matrizglosa(iglosa) = ""
       iglosa = iglosa + 1
       totserporsolida = 0: totserporliquida = 0: totserpneto = 0
       cantcalorias = 0: cantproteinas = 0: cantlipidos = 0: canthidratos = 0: cantacgrsat = 0
                       
       For i = 1 To Idietetico
           Matrizaporteservicio(i) = 0
       Next i
       sAporte = ""

       '------- Imprimir totales del día aportes nutricionales
       cFor = "~<3500;"
       cBod = "" & ";"
       ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
       matrizglosa(iglosa) = ""
       iglosa = iglosa + 1
              
       vAporte = "A. Nutricional del Día" & "|" & ":" & "|" & Format(totdiaporsolida, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(totdiapneto, fg_Pict(4, 2))
       For i = 1 To Idietetico
           vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(MatrizMenuTotAporte(i), fg_Pict(4, 2))
       Next i
       cantotp = 0: cantotg = 0: cantotcho = 0: cantotagrs = 0
       If cantotproteinas > 0 And cantotcalorias > 0 Then cantotp = CCur(((cantotproteinas * 4) / cantotcalorias) * 100)
       If cantotlipidos > 0 And cantotcalorias > 0 Then cantotg = CCur(((cantotlipidos * 9) / cantotcalorias) * 100)
       If cantothidratos > 0 And cantotcalorias > 0 Then cantotcho = CCur(((cantothidratos * 4) / cantotcalorias) * 100)
       If cantotacgrsat > 0 And cantotcalorias > 0 Then cantotagrs = CCur(((cantotacgrsat * 9) / cantotcalorias) * 100)
       cBod = ""
       vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(totpavb, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(CCur((totpavb / cantotproteinas) * 100), fg_Pict(4, 2))
       cHea = vAporte & "|" & Format(cantotp, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotg, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotcho, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotagrs, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & ";"
       cFor = cabecera
       ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
       matrizglosa(iglosa) = cHea
       iglosa = iglosa + 1
              
       vAporte = ""
       WsLinea = WsLinea + iglosa - 1
       If WsLinea > 58 Then
          WsLinea = 7 + iglosa - 1
          Preview.VSPrinter.NewPage
          YCurrentPage = Preview.VSPrinter.CurrentPage
       End If
       For i = 1 To iglosa - 1
           If matrizglosa(i) = "" Then
              cFor = "~<3500;"
              cBod = "" & ";"
              .AddTable cFor, cHea, cBod, RGB(256, 256, 0), , True
              Print #1, "|"
           Else
              If i = 1 Then
                 cFor = cabecera
                 cBod = ""
                 cHea = dAporte
                 .AddTable cFor, cHea, cBod, RGB(256, 256, 0) ', , True
                 Print #1, Mid(dAporte, 1, Len(dAporte) - 1)
              ElseIf i = iglosa - 1 Then
                 cFor = cabecera
                 cBod = ""
                 cHea = matrizglosa(i)
                 .AddTable cFor, cHea, cBod, RGB(128, 255, 218) ', , True
                 Print #1, Mid(matrizglosa(i), 1, Len(matrizglosa(i)) - 1)
              Else
                 cBod = ""
                 Preview.VSPrinter.FontSize = IIf(Mid(matrizglosa(i), 1, 1) = ";", 8, 7)
                 cBod = IIf(Mid(matrizglosa(i), 1, 1) = ";", Mid(matrizglosa(i), 2, Len(matrizglosa(i))), matrizglosa(i))
                 cFor = IIf(Mid(matrizglosa(i), 1, 1) = ";", 13500, cabecera)
                 .FontBold = IIf(Mid(matrizglosa(i), 1, 1) = ";", True, False)
'                 cBod = matrizglosa(i)
'                 cFor = cabecera
                 .AddTable cFor, cHea, cBod, RGB(256, 256, 0), , True
                 .FontBold = False
                 Print #1, Mid(matrizglosa(i), 1, Len(matrizglosa(i)) - 1)
              End If
           End If
       Next i
       Print #1, "|"
       ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(0)
       iglosa = 1
       cantotcalorias = 0: cantotproteinas = 0: cantotlipidos = 0: cantothidratos = 0: cantotacgrsat = 0
       totserporsolida = 0: totserporliquida = 0: totdiaporliquida = 0: totdiaporsolida = 0
       totserpneto = 0: totdiapneto = 0
       For i = 1 To Idietetico
           MatrizMenuTotAporte(i) = 0
       Next i
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Close #1
    fg_descarga
    .PenColor = 0
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_AporteNutPaciente:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_ControlIngesta(cencos As String, codpac As String, nrocam As Long, nroped As Long)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String
Dim indfil As Long, indcol As Long, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long, auxess As Long, auxrec As Long, auxing As String
Dim vecapo() As Variant
On Local Error GoTo Error_ControlIngesta
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Control de Ingesta"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Control de Ingesta"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 5000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 5000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1, 2, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 2) = False
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 3) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 4) = False
    '------- Contrato
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_clientes WHERE cli_codigo='" & cencos & "' AND cli_tipo=0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato   ": .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Trim(RS1!cli_codigo) & " - " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '------- Paciente
    RS1.Open "SELECT b_pacientes.*, a_grupopaciente.grp_nombre, a_regimen.reg_nombre " & _
            "FROM (a_grupopaciente RIGHT JOIN b_pacientes ON a_grupopaciente.grp_codigo=b_pacientes.pac_codgrp) " & _
            "LEFT JOIN a_regimen ON b_pacientes.pac_codreg=a_regimen.reg_codigo WHERE b_pacientes.pac_codigo='" & codpac & "' AND b_pacientes.pac_estado='0'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Paciente       ": .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = fg_PintaRut(RS1!pac_codigo) & " - " & Trim(RS1!pac_nombre) & " " & Trim(RS1!pac_appaterno) & " " & Trim(RS1!pac_apmaterno)
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen  ": .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!reg_nombre), "", RS1!reg_nombre)
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Grupo Paciente ": .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!grp_nombre), "", RS1!grp_nombre)
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Nº Cama  ": .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!pac_nrocam), "", RS1!pac_nrocam)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '------- Pedido
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT top_codigo, top_fecped FROM b_tomapedido WHERE top_codigo=" & nroped & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 3) = "Nº Pedido      ": .TableCell(tcText, 3, 4) = RS1!top_codigo
    .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) = "Fecha  ": .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2) = RS1!top_fecped
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    '------- Llernar grilla recetas
    sql1 = "SELECT DISTINCT a.top_fecped, f.reg_codigo, f.reg_nombre, g.ser_codigo, g.ser_nombre, g.ser_orden, h.ess_codigo, h.ess_nombre, h.ess_orden, " & _
           "c.tdr_codrec, d.rec_nombre, c.tdr_nroite, c.tdr_coding, c.tdr_canpro, c.tdr_cospro, c.tdr_pctapr, c.tdr_pctcoc, c.tdr_pctnut, " & _
           "e.ing_nombre, i.unm_nomcor, b.tpd_codmin, b.tpd_tiprec , b.tpd_cansel, b.tpd_canser, b.tpd_caning, b.tpd_numlin, e.ing_facnut, c.tdr_cannco, c.tdr_cancon " & _
           "FROM b_tomapedido a, b_tomapedidodet b, b_tomapedidodetrec c, b_receta d, b_ingrediente e, a_regimen f, a_servicio g, a_estservicio h, a_unidadmed i " & _
           "WHERE a.top_codigo = b.tpd_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codigo=c.tdr_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_numlin=c.tdr_numlin " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codrec=c.tdr_codrec " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codreg=f.reg_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codser=g.ser_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_estser=h.ess_codigo AND h.ess_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
           "AND   c.tdr_codrec=d.rec_codigo " & _
           "AND   c.tdr_coding=e.ing_codigo " & _
           "AND   e.ing_unimed=i.unm_codigo " & _
           "AND   a.top_codigo=" & nroped & " " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_prorec='R' AND c.tdr_canpro>0 " & _
           "ORDER BY f.reg_codigo, g.ser_codigo, g.ser_orden, h.ess_orden"

    sql2 = "SELECT  DISTINCT a.top_fecped, f.reg_codigo, f.reg_nombre, g.ser_codigo, g.ser_nombre, g.ser_orden, b.tpd_estser AS ess_codigo, " & _
           "'Adicionales' AS ess_nombre, 99999999 AS ess_orden, c.tdr_codrec, d.rec_nombre, c.tdr_nroite, c.tdr_coding, " & _
           "c.tdr_canpro, c.tdr_cospro, c.tdr_pctapr, c.tdr_pctcoc, c.tdr_pctnut, e.ing_nombre, i.unm_nomcor, b.tpd_codmin, " & _
           "b.tpd_tiprec , b.tpd_cansel, b.tpd_canser, b.tpd_caning, b.tpd_numlin, e.ing_facnut, c.tdr_cannco, c.tdr_cancon " & _
           "FROM b_tomapedido a, b_tomapedidodet b, b_tomapedidodetrec c, b_receta d, b_ingrediente e, a_regimen f, a_servicio g, a_unidadmed i " & _
           "WHERE a.top_codigo = b.tpd_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codigo=c.tdr_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_numlin=c.tdr_numlin " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codrec=c.tdr_codrec " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codreg=f.reg_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codser=g.ser_codigo " & _
           "AND   c.tdr_codrec=d.rec_codigo " & _
           "AND   c.tdr_coding=e.ing_codigo " & _
           "AND   e.ing_unimed=i.unm_codigo " & _
           "AND   a.top_codigo=" & nroped & " " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_prorec='R' AND c.tdr_canpro>0 AND b.tpd_estser=-99999999 " & _
           "ORDER BY f.reg_codigo, g.ser_codigo, g.ser_orden, ess_orden"

    sql3 = "SELECT DISTINCT a.top_fecped, f.reg_codigo, f.reg_nombre, g.ser_codigo, g.ser_nombre, g.ser_orden, b.tpd_estser AS ess_codigo, " & _
           "'Adicionales' AS ess_nombre, 99999999 AS ess_orden, c.tdr_codrec, d.pro_nombre, c.tdr_nroite, c.tdr_coding, " & _
           "c.tdr_canpro, c.tdr_cospro, c.tdr_pctapr, c.tdr_pctcoc, c.tdr_pctnut, e.ing_nombre, i.unm_nomcor, b.tpd_codmin, " & _
           "b.tpd_tiprec, b.tpd_cansel, b.tpd_canser, b.tpd_caning, b.tpd_numlin, e.ing_facnut, c.tdr_cannco, c.tdr_cancon " & _
           "FROM b_tomapedido a, b_tomapedidodet b, b_tomapedidodetrec c, b_productos d, b_ingrediente e, a_regimen f, a_servicio g, a_unidadmed i " & _
           "WHERE a.top_codigo = b.tpd_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codigo=c.tdr_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_numlin=c.tdr_numlin " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codrec=c.tdr_codrec " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codreg=f.reg_codigo " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_codser=g.ser_codigo " & _
           "AND   c.tdr_codrec=val(d.pro_codigo) " & _
           "AND   c.tdr_coding=e.ing_codigo " & _
           "AND   e.ing_unimed=i.unm_codigo " & _
           "AND   a.top_codigo=" & nroped & " " & _
           "AND   b.tpd_prorec='P' AND c.tdr_canpro>0 AND b.tpd_estser=-99999999 " & _
           "ORDER BY f.reg_codigo, g.ser_codigo, g.ser_orden, ess_orden"
       
    RS1.Open sql1 & " UNION " & sql2 & " UNION " & sql3, vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: fg_descarga: Exit Function
    
    RS2.Open "SELECT COUNT(*) as nreg FROM a_nutriente", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS2.EOF Or RS2!nreg < 1 Or IsNull(RS2!nreg) Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: fg_descarga: RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing: MsgBox "No existen nutrientes, proceso cancelado...", vbCritical, MsgTitulo: Exit Function
    ReDim Preserve vecapo(RS2!nreg, 3)
    indcol = 6 + RS2!nreg: indnut = 7
    RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = indcol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    For i = 7 To indcol
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , i) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , i) = taRightTop
    Next i
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Servicio Regimen"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Estructura"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Preparación"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "C.Serv."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "C.No Cons."
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "C.Cons.Dig."
    RS2.Open "SELECT * FROM a_nutriente ORDER BY nut_secnro", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    i = 7
    Do While Not RS2.EOF
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, i) = Trim(RS2!nut_nombre)
       vecapo(i - 6, 1) = RS2!nut_codigo
       vecapo(i - 6, 2) = (i)
       vecapo(i - 6, 3) = 0
       RS2.MoveNext: i = i + 1
    Loop
    RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
    
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = indcol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    For i = 7 To indcol
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , i) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , i) = taRightTop
    Next i
    i = 1: auxreg = 0: auxser = 0: auxess = 0: auxrec = 0: auxing = ""
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
           If RS1!reg_codigo <> auxreg Or RS1!ser_codigo <> auxser Then
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre) & " - " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre)
              auxreg = RS1!reg_codigo
              auxser = RS1!ser_codigo
           End If
           If RS1!ess_codigo <> auxess Then
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!ess_nombre)
              auxess = RS1!ess_codigo
           End If
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!rec_nombre)
           i = i + 1: indfil = i
           auxrec = RS1!tdr_codrec
           auxing = ""
           For indnut = 7 To indcol
               vecapo((indnut - 6), 3) = 0
           Next indnut
           Do While RS1!tdr_codrec = auxrec And Not RS1.EOF
              If RS1!tdr_coding <> auxing Then
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!ing_nombre)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format((((RS1!tdr_pctapr / 100) * RS1!tdr_canpro) * (RS1!tdr_pctcoc / 100)), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(IIf(IsNull(RS1!tdr_cannco), 0, RS1!tdr_cannco), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(IIf(IsNull(RS1!tdr_cancon) Or RS1!tdr_cancon = 0, (((RS1!tdr_pctapr / 100) * RS1!tdr_canpro) * (RS1!tdr_pctcoc / 100)), RS1!tdr_cancon), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 auxing = RS1!tdr_coding
              End If
              '------- Mover aportes nutricionales
              For indnut = 7 To indcol
                  .TableCell(tcText, i, indnut) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              Next indnut
              RS2.Open "SELECT a.* FROM b_productonut a, a_nutriente b WHERE a.pnu_codapo=b.nut_codigo AND a.pnu_codpro='" & RS1!tdr_coding & "' ORDER BY b.nut_secnro", vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS2.EOF Then
                 Do While Not RS2.EOF
                    For indnut = 1 To UBound(vecapo)
                        If RS2!pnu_codapo = vecapo(indnut, 1) Then
                           .TableCell(tcText, i, vecapo(indnut, 2)) = Format(((RS1!tdr_pctnut / 100) * (RS2!pnu_canapo * RS1!tdr_canpro) / RS1!ing_facnut), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                           vecapo(indnut, 3) = vecapo(indnut, 3) + Format(((RS1!tdr_pctnut / 100) * (RS2!pnu_canapo * RS1!tdr_canpro) / RS1!ing_facnut), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                           Exit For
                        End If
                    Next indnut
                    RS2.MoveNext
                 Loop
              End If
              RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
              RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
              If RS1.EOF Then Exit Do
           Loop
           '------- Mover totales aportes nutricionales
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "TOTALES"
           For j = 7 To indcol
               .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, j) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, j) = Format(vecapo(j - 6, 3), fg_Pict(6, 2))
           Next j
           i = i + 2
        Loop
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_ControlIngesta:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_GuiaVentaSAP(Form As Object)
Dim rutcli As String, NumDoc As Long, i As Long, total As Double
Dim numlin As Long, codmer As String, canmin As Double, canmer As Double, predoc As Double, ptotal As Double, descri As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_GuiaVentaSAP
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Guia Venta SAP"
Preview.Refresh
Preview.Cls
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .TextAlign = taLeftTop
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcForeColor, 2) = &H4080&
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Guìa Venta SAP"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = ""
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 3700: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 3) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Nº Documento"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(0).Value)
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Fecha Emisión"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Form.fpDateTime1(0)
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Cliente"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Trim(LimpiaDato(Form.fpText1(1).text)) & " - " & Trim(Form.fpayuda(1).Caption)
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Sucursal"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = Trim(LimpiaDato(Form.fpText1(0).text)) & " - " & Trim(Form.fpayuda(0).Caption)
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Glosa 1"
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = Trim(LimpiaDato(Form.fpText1(3).text))
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 3) = "Glosa 2"
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 4) = Trim(LimpiaDato(Form.fpText1(4).text))
    .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) = "Glosa 3"
    .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2) = Trim(LimpiaDato(Form.fpText1(5).text))
    
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 4)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 4, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 4, 4)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    rutcli = fg_DespintaRut(Trim(LimpiaDato(Form.fpText1(1).text)))
    NumDoc = Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(0).Value)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Cód. Servicio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Cód. SAP"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Nº Rac. SGP"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Nº Rac. Guìa"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Precio Venta"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Total"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & _
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7)
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.*, b.* " & _
             "FROM b_detguiavta a, a_regimen b " & _
             "WHERE a.dgv_codreg=b.reg_codigo AND a.dgv_rutcli='" & rutcli & "'" & _
             "AND   a.dgv_numdoc=" & NumDoc & " ORDER BY a.dgv_numlin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    i = 1: total = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!dgv_codser
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!dgv_desser)
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!dgv_codsap)
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(RS1!dgv_racsgp, fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS1!dgv_racguia, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(RS1!dgv_preguia, fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format((RS1!dgv_preguia * RS1!dgv_racguia), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
        Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & _
                  .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7)
        total = total + Format((RS1!dgv_preguia * RS1!dgv_racguia), fg_Pict(9, 0))
        RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i - 1
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    .TableBorder = tbAll
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1, 1, 3) = True
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 7400: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 2) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Total"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = Format(total, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
    Print #1, "|||||" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3)
    Print #1, " ": Print #1, " "
    Print #1, "|||||_____________________"
    Print #1, " "
    Print #1, "|||||" & "Entregado conforme"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 6
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 6900
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold) = True
    .TableCell(tcFontUnderline, 5, 2) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 5, 2) = Space(40)
    .TableCell(tcText, 6, 2) = "Entregado conforme"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
    Close #1
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_GuiaVentaSAP:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_EnvioSap(op As String)
Dim rutcli As String, NumDoc As Long, i As Long, total As Double
Dim numlin As Long, codmer As String, canmin As Double, canmer As Double, predoc As Double, ptotal As Double, descri As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_EnvioSap
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Envio Cfc SAP"
I_EnvioCfcSap = True
Preview.Refresh
Preview.Cls
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .TextAlign = taLeftTop
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcForeColor, 2) = &H4080&
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = IIf(op = "1", "Generación Envio CFC a Oficina Central", IIf(op = "2", "Generación Envio Guía Ventas a Oficina Central", "Generación Envio Inventario a Oficina Central"))
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = ""
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
     i = 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = IIf(op = "1", I_CtrFCo.Text1(0).text, IIf(op = "3", M_TomInv.Text1(0).text, M_GuiVta.Text1(0).text))
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i - 1
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
    Close #1
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_EnvioSap:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_CostoDetPeriodoTeoRea(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String)
Dim auxreg As Long, auxser As Long, auxfec As Long, auxestser As Long, nomrec As String, nomsec As String
Dim totrec As Double, totsec As Double, numrac As Long, gtosec As Double
On Local Error GoTo Error_CostoPeriodoTeoRea
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Costo Detalle Periodo " & IIf(tipmin = "1", "Teórico", "Real")
Preview.Refresh
Preview.Cls
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Costos Detalle Período " & IIf(tipmin = "1", "Teórico", "Real")
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1, 2, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 2) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato "
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = ": " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Período  ": .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = ": " & Mid(fecini, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4) & " Hasta " & Mid(fecfin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 1, 4)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    '-------> Traer costo planificación teórico ó real
    '------- Creo tabla temporal y chequeo si existe antes
    aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_CostoxPeriodo"
    fg_CheckTmp aAp
    If tipmin = "1" Or tipmin = "2" Then
       RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, a.ser_codigo, a.ser_nombre, c.min_fecmin INTO " & aAp & " " & _
                "FROM a_servicio a, a_regimen b, b_minuta c, b_minutadet d " & _
                "WHERE  c.min_codigo=d.mid_codigo " & _
                "AND    c.min_codreg=b.reg_codigo " & _
                "AND    c.min_codser=a.ser_codigo " & _
                "AND    c.min_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                "AND    c.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND    c.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND    c.min_fecmin>=" & fecini & " " & _
                "AND    c.min_fecmin<=" & fecfin & " " & _
                "AND    d.mid_tipmin='" & tipmin & "'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       Set RS1 = Nothing
    
       vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " SELECT DISTINCT b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, a.ser_codigo, a.ser_nombre, c.mfd_fecha AS min_fecmin  " & _
                     "FROM a_servicio a, a_regimen b, b_minutafijadia c " & _
                     "WHERE c.mfd_codreg=b.reg_codigo " & _
                     "AND   c.mfd_codser=a.ser_codigo " & _
                     "AND   c.mfd_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                     "AND   c.mfd_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                     "AND   c.mfd_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                     "AND   c.mfd_fecha>=" & fecini & " " & _
                     "AND   c.mfd_fecha<=" & fecfin & " " & _
                     "AND   c.mfd_tipmin='" & tipmin & "'"
       Set RS1 = Nothing
    End If
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT reg_codigo, reg_nombre, ser_codigo, ser_nombre, min_fecmin FROM " & aAp & " ORDER BY reg_codigo, ser_codigo, min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Function
    auxfec = 0: totrec = 0: nomrec = "": nomsec = "": gtosec = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       If tipmin = "1" Or tipmin = "2" Then
          '-------> Validar si indice bloque para rescatar el costo de la minuta, si =0 entonce hay rescatar los precio del maestro de producto en caso contrario rescatar costo minuta
          indblo = 1
          If tipmin = "1" Then
             RS4.Open "SELECT DISTINCT min_indblo FROM b_minuta " & _
                      "WHERE min_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                      "AND   min_codreg=" & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                      "AND   min_codser=" & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                      "AND   min_fecmin=" & RS1!min_fecmin & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS4.EOF Then indblo = RS4!min_indblo
             RS4.Close: Set RS4 = Nothing
          End If
          If indblo = 0 And tipmin = "1" Then
             RS2.Open "SELECT i.mid_estser, j.ess_nombre, i.mid_numrac, a.rec_codigo, a.rec_nombre, a.rec_basrac, b.red_codigo, b.red_nroite, f.pro_codigo, f.pro_nombre, f.pro_facing, b.red_codpro, b.red_canpro, " & _
                      "b.red_cospro, b.red_pctapr, b.red_pctcoc, b.red_pctnut, a.rec_basrac AS cantprodxdia, " & _
                      "g.cpi_precos AS mic_cospro, (b.red_canpro*g.cpi_precos) AS precos, " & _
                      "c.ing_nombre, d.unm_codigo, d.unm_nomcor, f.pro_codtip, l.uni_nomcor " & _
                      "FROM  b_receta a, b_recetadet b, b_ingrediente c, a_unidadmed d, b_productos f, b_contlistpreing g, b_minuta h, b_minutadet i, a_estservicio j, a_sector k, a_unidad l " & _
                      "WHERE h.min_codigo=i.mid_codigo " & _
                      "AND   i.mid_tipmin='" & tipmin & "' AND h.min_codser=j.ess_codser " & _
                      "AND   i.mid_estser=j.ess_codigo     AND j.ess_codsec=k.sec_codigo AND i.mid_numrac>0 " & _
                      "AND   b.red_codigo=a.rec_codigo     AND b.red_codpro=c.ing_codigo " & _
                      "AND   c.ing_codigo=g.cpi_coding " & _
                      "AND   c.ing_unimed=d.unm_codigo     AND g.cpi_codped=f.pro_codigo " & _
                      "AND   f.pro_coduni=l.uni_codigo     AND b.red_codigo=i.mid_codrec " & _
                      "AND   b.red_tiprec=i.mid_tiprec AND b.red_cencos=IIf(b.red_tiprec = 0, '0', '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') " & _
                      "AND   g.cpi_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                      "AND   h.min_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND h.min_codreg=" & RS1!reg_codigo & " AND h.min_codser=" & RS1!ser_codigo & " AND h.min_fecmin=" & RS1!min_fecmin & " ORDER BY i.mid_numlin, i.mid_estser, b.red_nroite", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          Else
             RS2.Open "SELECT i.mid_estser, j.ess_nombre, i.mid_numrac, a.rec_codigo, a.rec_nombre, a.rec_basrac, b.red_codigo, b.red_nroite, f.pro_codigo, f.pro_nombre, f.pro_facing, b.red_codpro, b.red_canpro, " & _
                      "b.red_cospro, b.red_pctapr, b.red_pctcoc, b.red_pctnut, a.rec_basrac AS cantprodxdia, " & _
                      "e.mic_cospro, (b.red_canpro*e.mic_cospro) AS precos, " & _
                      "c.ing_nombre, d.unm_codigo, d.unm_nomcor, f.pro_codtip, l.uni_nomcor " & _
                      "FROM  b_receta a, b_recetadet b, b_ingrediente c, a_unidadmed d, b_minutacosto e, b_productos f, b_contlistpreing g, b_minuta h, b_minutadet i, a_estservicio j, a_sector k, a_unidad l " & _
                      "WHERE h.min_codigo=i.mid_codigo " & _
                      "AND   i.mid_tipmin='" & tipmin & "' AND h.min_codser=j.ess_codser " & _
                      "AND   i.mid_estser=j.ess_codigo     AND j.ess_codsec=k.sec_codigo AND i.mid_numrac>0 " & _
                      "AND   b.red_codigo=a.rec_codigo     AND b.red_codpro=e.mic_codpro " & _
                      "AND   e.mic_codpro=c.ing_codigo     AND c.ing_codigo=g.cpi_coding " & _
                      "AND   c.ing_unimed=d.unm_codigo     AND g.cpi_codped=f.pro_codigo " & _
                      "AND   f.pro_coduni=l.uni_codigo     AND b.red_codigo=i.mid_codrec " & _
                      "AND   e.mic_cencos=h.min_cencos " & _
                      "AND   b.red_tiprec=i.mid_tiprec AND b.red_cencos=IIf(b.red_tiprec = 0, '0', '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') " & _
                      "AND   e.mic_fecval=i.mid_fecval " & _
                      "AND   e.mic_tipmin=i.mid_tipmin AND g.cpi_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                      "AND   h.min_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND h.min_codreg=" & RS1!reg_codigo & " AND h.min_codser=" & RS1!ser_codigo & " And h.min_fecmin = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " ORDER BY i.mid_numlin, i.mid_estser, b.red_nroite", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          End If
          RS3.Open "SELECT b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, b.pro_facing, c.uni_nomcor, a.mfd_canpro, a.mfd_cospro " & _
                   "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos b, a_unidad c " & _
                   "WHERE a.mfd_codpro=b.pro_codigo AND b.pro_coduni=c.uni_codigo " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_cencos='" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_codreg=" & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_codser=" & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_fecha=" & RS1!min_fecmin & " AND a.mfd_tipmin='" & tipmin & "' " & _
                   "AND  (b.pro_fecven>" & Format(Date, "yyyymmdd") & " OR b.pro_fecven <= 0 OR (b.pro_codigo IN (SELECT bod_codpro FROM b_bodegas WHERE bod_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND bod_canmer>0)))", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       End If
        auxreg = 0: auxser = 0: auxfec = 0
        If Not RS2.EOF Or Not RS3.EOF Then
           If RS1!ser_codigo <> auxser Or RS1!min_fecmin <> auxfec Or RS1!reg_codigo <> auxreg Then
              If auxfec > 0 Then
                 .NewPage
                 .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
                 .StartTable
                 .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
                 .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = cencos & " " & nomcen
                 .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Rango Facha"
                 .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = fecini & " - " & fecter
                 .TableBorder = tbNone
                 .EndTable
              End If
              If i > 1 Then .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 3, , 3) = True
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow:: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 200
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Regimen : " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre) & "- Servicio : " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & Trim(RS1!ser_nombre) & " - " & "Fecha : " & fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin)
              .TableBorder = tbNone
              .EndTable
              auxreg = RS1!reg_codigo
              auxser = RS1!ser_codigo
              auxfec = RS1!min_fecmin
           End If
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 4300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Código"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Descripción"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = "UN"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = "Costo Unit."
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = "Cantidad"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = "Costo Total"
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
           
           '-------> Imprimir linea separación estructura servicio
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = Space(225)
           .TableCell(tcFontUnderline, 1) = True
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
                
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 500
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 4300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
           i = 1: auxestser = 0: auxrecod = 0
           If Not RS2.EOF Then
              i = 2
              Do While Not RS2.EOF
                 If RS2!mid_estser <> auxestser Then
                    If auxestser > 0 Then
                       If auxrecod > 0 Then
                          i = i + 1
                          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
                          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Trim(nomrec)
                          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
                          .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totrec, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                          i = i + 1
                          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
                          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Comensales Efectivos "
                          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
                          .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(numrac, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                          i = i + 1
                          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
                          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Coto Plato "
                          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
                          .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format((totrec / numrac), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                          gtosec = gtosec + (totrec / numrac)
                          totrec = 0: auxrecod = 0: numrac = 0
                          i = i + 1
                       End If
                       i = i + 1
                       .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Trim(nomsec)
                       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totsec, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                       i = i + 1
                       .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Costo Plato x Estruc. "
                       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(gtosec, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                       totsec = 0: gtosec = 0
                       i = i + 1
                       '-------> Imprimir linea separación estructura servicio
                       .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 7
                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Space(235)
                       .TableCell(tcFontUnderline, i, 1) = True
'                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Space(235)
'                       .TableCell(tcFontUnderline, i, 2) = True
'                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Space(235)
'                       .TableCell(tcFontUnderline, i, 3) = True
'                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Space(235)
 '                      .TableCell(tcFontUnderline, i, 4) = True
'                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Space(235)
'                       .TableCell(tcFontUnderline, i, 5) = True
'                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Space(235)
'                       .TableCell(tcFontUnderline, i, 6) = True
'                       .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Space(235)
'                       .TableCell(tcFontUnderline, i, 7) = True
                       
                       i = i + 1
                    End If
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!ess_nombre)
                    auxestser = RS2!mid_estser
                    nomsec = Trim(RS2!ess_nombre)
                    i = i + 1
                 End If
                 If tipinf = 0 Then
                    If RS2!rec_codigo <> auxrecod Then
                       If auxrecod > 0 Then
                          i = i + 1
                          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
                          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Trim(nomrec)
                          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
                          .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totrec, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                          i = i + 1
                          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
                          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Comensales Efectivos "
                          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
                          .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(numrac, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                          i = i + 1
                          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
                          .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Costo Plato "
                          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
                          .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format((totrec / numrac), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                          gtosec = gtosec + (totrec / numrac)
                          totrec = 0: numrac = 0
                          i = i + 1
                       End If
                       Preview.rtfPic.TextRTF = ""
                       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!rec_codigo)
                       If Trim(Preview.rtfPic.text) = "" Then
                          .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS2!rec_nombre)
                       End If
                       auxrecod = RS2!rec_codigo
                       nomrec = Trim(RS2!rec_nombre)
                       numrac = RS2!mid_numrac
                       i = i + 1
                    End If
                 End If
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!pro_codigo) 'Trim(RS2!red_codpro)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "  " & Trim(RS2!pro_nombre) 'Trim(RS2!ing_nombre)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Trim(RS2!uni_nomcor) 'Trim(RS2!unm_nomcor)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((RS2!mic_cospro), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format((((RS2!red_canpro / RS2!rec_basrac) * RS2!mid_numrac)), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 'IIf(tipinf = 0, Format(Round(TipoDato((((RS2!red_canpro / RS2!rec_basrac) * RS2!mid_numrac) / RS2!pro_facing), 0), vg_DCa), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa)), Format(Round(TipoDato(RS2!cantprodxdia, 0), vg_DCa), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa)))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format((((RS2!red_canpro / RS2!rec_basrac) * RS2!mid_numrac) * RS2!mic_cospro), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 totrec = totrec + (((RS2!red_canpro / RS2!rec_basrac) * RS2!mid_numrac) * RS2!mic_cospro)
                 totsec = totsec + (((RS2!red_canpro / RS2!rec_basrac) * RS2!mid_numrac) * RS2!mic_cospro)
                 i = i + 1
                 RS2.MoveNext
              Loop
              If auxrecod > 0 Then
                 i = i + 1
                 .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Trim(nomrec)
                 .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totrec, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 i = i + 1
                 .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Comensales Estimados "
                 .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(numrac, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 i = i + 1
                 .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Costo Plato "
                 .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format((totrec / numrac), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 gtosec = gtosec + (totrec / numrac)
                 totrec = 0: numrac = 0
                 i = i + 1
              End If
              i = i + 1
              .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Trim(nomsec)
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totsec, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              i = i + 1
              .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Costo Plato x Estruc. "
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(gtosec, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              totsec = 0: gtosec = 0
           End If
           If Not RS3.EOF Then
              i = i + 1
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Estructura Fija": .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
              i = i + 1
              totrec = 0: totsec = 0: numrac = 1
              Do While Not RS3.EOF
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS3!pro_codigo)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS3!pro_nombre)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Trim(RS3!uni_nomcor)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((RS3!mfd_cospro), fg_Pict(9, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(TipoDato((RS3!mfd_canpro), 0), fg_Pict(9, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(((RS3!mfd_canpro) * (RS3!mfd_cospro)), fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
                 totrec = totrec + (RS3!mfd_canpro * RS3!mfd_cospro)
                 RS3.MoveNext: i = i + 1
              Loop
              i = i + 1
              .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Estructura Fija"
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totrec, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              i = i + 1
              .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Comensales Estimados "
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(numrac, fg_Pict(6, 0))
              i = i + 1
              .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 4) = 3
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = "Costo Estructura Fija "
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 4) = True
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format((totrec / numrac), fg_Pict(6, 2))
              gtosec = gtosec + (totrec / numrac)
              totrec = 0: numrac = 0
              i = i + 1
           End If
           .TableCell(tcRows) = i
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
        End If
        RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
        RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_CostoPeriodoTeoRea:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_CurvaABC(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String)
Dim estpag As Boolean, nomcec As String, aAp  As String, aAp1 As String, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String, sql4 As String, sql5 As String
Dim totgrl As Double, totcur As Double, curva As Double, CurvaABC As Long, indcur As Long, curvaa As Long, curvab As Long, curvac As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_CurvaABC
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Curva ABC " & IIf(tipmin = "1", "Teórico", IIf(tipmin = "2", "Real", "Realizado"))
Preview.Refresh
Preview.Cls
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    LogoEmp
    '-------> Traer curva ABC
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM a_curvaabc", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!abc_codigo = "A" Then curvaa = RS1!abc_porce
          If RS1!abc_codigo = "B" Then curvab = RS1!abc_porce
          If RS1!abc_codigo = "C" Then curvac = RS1!abc_porce
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then nomcec = Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Traer costo planificación teórico ó real
    '-------> Creo tabla temporal y chequeo si existe antes
    aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_EncCurvaABC"
    fg_CheckTmp aAp
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "mid(c.min_fecmin,1,6) ", "convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),c.min_fecmin),1,6)) ")
    If tipmin = "1" Or tipmin = "2" Then
       RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, a.ser_codigo, a.ser_nombre, " & sql1 & " AS min_fecmin INTO " & aAp & " " & _
                "FROM a_servicio a, a_regimen b, b_minuta c, b_minutadet d " & _
                "WHERE  c.min_codigo = d.mid_codigo " & _
                "AND    c.min_codreg = b.reg_codigo " & _
                "AND    c.min_codser = a.ser_codigo " & _
                "AND    c.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                "AND    c.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND    c.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND    c.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
                "AND    c.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                "AND    d.mid_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        Set RS1 = Nothing
        
        sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "mid(c.mfd_fecha,1,6) ", "convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),c.mfd_fecha),1,6)) ")
        vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " SELECT DISTINCT b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, a.ser_codigo, a.ser_nombre, " & sql1 & " AS min_fecmin " & _
                      "FROM a_servicio a, a_regimen b, b_minutafijadia c " & _
                      "WHERE c.mfd_codreg = b.reg_codigo " & _
                      "AND   c.mfd_codser = a.ser_codigo " & _
                      "AND   c.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   c.mfd_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                      "AND   c.mfd_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                      "AND   c.mfd_fecha >= " & fecini & " " & _
                      "AND   c.mfd_fecha <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                      "AND   c.mfd_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "'"
        Set RS1 = Nothing
    Else
       sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "format(c.tov_fecemi,'yyyymm') ", "datepart(year,c.tov_fecemi) + datepart(mm,c.tov_fecemi) ")
       sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "CDate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
       sql4 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "CDate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
       
       RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, a.ser_codigo, a.ser_nombre , " & sql2 & " AS min_fecmin INTO " & aAp & " " & _
                "FROM a_servicio a, a_regimen b, b_totventas c " & _
                "WHERE c.tov_codreg = b.reg_codigo " & _
                "AND   c.tov_codser = a.ser_codigo " & _
                "AND   c.tov_rutcli = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                "AND  (c.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' OR c.tov_tipdoc='DP') " & _
                "AND   c.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                "AND   c.tov_fecemi >= " & sql3 & " " & _
                "AND   c.tov_fecemi <= " & sql4 & " " & _
                "AND   c.tov_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND   c.tov_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND   c.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND c.tov_estdoc <> 'P'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    End If
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT reg_codigo, reg_nombre, ser_codigo, ser_nombre, min_fecmin FROM " & aAp & " ORDER BY reg_codigo, ser_codigo, min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Function
    gtosec = 0: estpag = False
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       aAp1 = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_DetCurvaABC"
       fg_CheckTmp aAp1
       If tipmin = "1" Or tipmin = "2" Then
          '-------> Insertar planificación minutas
          DoEvents
          sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "IIf(b.red_tiprec = 0, '0', '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') ", "CASE WHEN b.red_tiprec = 0 THEN  '0' ELSE  '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' END")
          RS2.Open "SELECT f.pro_codigo, f.pro_nombre, f.pro_coduni, b.red_codpro, c.ing_nombre, c.ing_unimed, e.mic_cospro, '' AS uni_nomcor, SUM(((b.red_canpro / a.rec_basrac) * i.mid_numrac)*f.pro_facsto) AS cantidad, SUM(((b.red_canpro / a.rec_basrac) * i.mid_numrac)*e.mic_cospro) AS costot " & _
                   "INTO " & aAp1 & " FROM  b_receta a, b_recetadet b, b_ingrediente c, b_minutacosto e, b_productos f, b_contlistpreing g, b_minuta h, b_minutadet i " & _
                   "WHERE h.min_codigo = i.mid_codigo " & _
                   "AND   b.red_codigo = a.rec_codigo " & _
                   "AND   b.red_codpro = e.mic_codpro " & _
                   "AND   e.mic_codpro = c.ing_codigo " & _
                   "AND   c.ing_codigo = g.cpi_coding " & _
                   "AND   g.cpi_codped = f.pro_codigo " & _
                   "AND   b.red_codigo = i.mid_codrec " & _
                   "AND   e.mic_cencos = h.min_cencos " & _
                   "AND   b.red_tiprec = i.mid_tiprec " & _
                   "AND   b.red_cencos = " & sql1 & " " & _
                   "AND   e.mic_cencos = h.min_cencos " & _
                   "AND   e.mic_fecval = i.mid_fecval " & _
                   "AND   e.mic_tipmin = i.mid_tipmin " & _
                   "AND   g.cpi_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                   "AND   h.min_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                   "AND   h.min_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                   "AND   h.min_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                   "AND   h.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " AND h.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                   "AND   i.mid_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "' " & _
                   "AND   i.mid_numrac > 0 " & _
                   "GROUP BY f.pro_codigo, f.pro_nombre, f.pro_coduni, b.red_codpro, c.ing_nombre, c.ing_unimed, e.mic_cospro", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          '-------> Actualizar precio producto y cantidad
          If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
             vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp1 & " INNER JOIN b_productos ON " & aAp1 & ".pro_codigo = b_productos.pro_codigo SET " & aAp1 & ".mic_cospro = (" & aAp1 & ".mic_cospro*b_productos.pro_facing), " & aAp1 & ".cantidad = (" & aAp1 & ".cantidad/b_productos.pro_facing)"
          Else
             vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp1 & " SET " & aAp1 & ".mic_cospro = (" & aAp1 & ".mic_cospro*b_productos.pro_facing), " & aAp1 & ".cantidad = (" & aAp1 & ".cantidad/b_productos.pro_facing) FROM b_productos, " & aAp1 & " WHERE  " & aAp1 & ".pro_codigo = b_productos.pro_codigo"
          End If
          '-------> Insertar estructura fija
          DoEvents
          vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp1 & " SELECT b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, b.pro_coduni, '' AS red_codpro, '' AS ing_nombre, 0 AS ing_unimed, a.mfd_cospro AS mic_cospro, '' AS uni_nomcor, SUM(a.mfd_canpro) AS cantidad, SUM(a.mfd_cospro*a.mfd_canpro) AS costot " & _
                        "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos b " & _
                        "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = b.pro_codigo " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_fecha >= " & fecini & " AND a.mfd_fecha <= " & fecfin & " AND a.mfd_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "' " & _
                        "AND  (b.pro_fecven > " & Format(Date, "yyyymmdd") & " OR b.pro_fecven <= 0 OR (b.pro_codigo IN (SELECT bod_codpro FROM b_bodegas WHERE bod_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " AND bod_canmer>0))) GROUP BY b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, b.pro_coduni, a.mfd_cospro"
       Else
          '-------> Insertar salida producción
          DoEvents
'          avg
'SUM(IIf(a.tov_tipdoc='SP',b.dev_ptotal,'-' & b.dev_ptotal)) AS dev_ptotal
          sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " SUM(IIF(a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP',b.dev_canmer,'-' & b.dev_canmer)) AS cantidad ", " SUM(CASE WHEN a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' THEN b.dev_canmer ELSE (-1*  b.dev_canmer) END ) AS cantidad ")
          sql5 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " SUM(IIF(a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP',b.dev_canmer,'-' & b.dev_canmer)*b.dev_precos) AS costot ", " SUM(CASE WHEN a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' THEN b.dev_canmer ELSE (-1 * b.dev_canmer) END * b.dev_precos) AS costot ")
          RS2.Open "SELECT c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, '' AS red_codpro, '' AS ing_nombre, 0 AS ing_unimed, " & _
                   "b.dev_precos AS mic_cospro, '' AS uni_nomcor, " & sql1 & ", " & _
                   " " & sql5 & " " & _
                   "INTO " & aAp1 & " FROM  b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c " & _
                   "WHERE a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
                   "AND   b.dev_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_fecpro >= " & sql3 & " " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_fecpro <= " & sql4 & " " & _
                   "AND  (a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' OR a.tov_tipdoc = 'DP') " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' AND b.dev_canmer > 0 " & _
                   "GROUP BY c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dev_precos", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       End If
        '-------> Consultar total general curva ABC
        totgrl = 0
        RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(costot) AS totgra FROM " & aAp1 & "", vg_db
        If Not RS2.EOF Then totgrl = IIf(IsNull(RS2!totgra), 0, RS2!totgra)
        RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
        indcur = 1: CurvaABC = curvaa: curva = 0: totcur = 0
        RS2.Open "SELECT a.pro_codigo, a.pro_nombre, b.uni_nomcor, AVG(a.mic_cospro) AS mic_cospro, SUM(a.cantidad) AS xcantidad, round(SUM(a.costot),3) AS xcostot " & _
                 "FROM " & aAp1 & " a, a_unidad b " & _
                 "WHERE a.pro_coduni = b.uni_codigo " & _
                 "GROUP BY a.pro_codigo, a.pro_nombre, b.uni_nomcor ORDER BY Sum(a.costot) DESC, a.pro_nombre ASC", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        If Not RS2.EOF Then
           If estpag Then .NewPage
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Curva ABC " & IIf(tipmin = "1", "Planificación Teórico", IIf(tipmin = "2", "Planificación Real", "Realizado"))
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
           .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
           
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 8000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 8000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato "
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = ": " & cencos & " - " & nomcec
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Rango Facha "
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = ": " & Mid(fecini, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4) & " - " & Mid(fecfin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 1, 4)
           .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Regimen "
           .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = ": " & RS1!reg_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre)
           .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) = "Servicio "
           .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2) = ": " & RS1!ser_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
           .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
           
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 4500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow:: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 200
           .TableCell(tcBackColor, 2) = vbYellow:: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 200
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Código"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Descripción"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = "UN"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = "Consumo"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = "Costo Unit."
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = "Costo Total"
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "% Sobre"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 8) = "Total"
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
                
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 8: .TableCell(tcRows) = 5000
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 4500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
           i = 1
           If Not RS2.EOF Then
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Curva A"
              i = i + 1
              Do While Not RS2.EOF
                 If totgrl > 0 And Not IsNull(RS2!xcostot) Then
                    curva = curva + ((RS2!xcostot / totgrl) * 100)
                 Else
                    curva = curva + 0
                 End If
                 If curva > CurvaABC And CurvaABC <> curvac And curva <= 99 Then
                    CurvaABC = IIf(indcur = 1, curvab, curvac): curva = 0
                    curva = curva + ((RS2!xcostot / totgrl) * 100)
                    '------- Imprimir total curva
                    i = i + 1
                    .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 5) = 2
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(indcur = 1, "Total General Curva A ", IIf(indcur = 2, "Total General Curva B", "Total General Curva C"))
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totcur, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 8) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
                    If totgrl > 0 Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 8) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format((totcur / totgrl) * 100, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
                    indcur = indcur + 1: totcur = 0
                    i = i + 2
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(indcur = 2, "Curva B", "Curva C")
                    i = i + 1
                 End If
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!pro_codigo)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS2!pro_nombre)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Trim(RS2!uni_nomcor)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((RS2!xcantidad), fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(RS2!mic_cospro, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(RS2!xcostot, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
                 If totgrl > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(((RS2!xcostot / totgrl) * 100), fg_Pict(3, 2)) & " %"
                 totcur = totcur + IIf(IsNull(RS2!xcostot), 0, RS2!xcostot)
                 RS2.MoveNext: i = i + 1
              Loop
           End If
           '-------> Imprimir total curva
           i = i + 2
           .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 5) = 2
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(indcur = 1, "Total General Curva A ", IIf(indcur = 2, "Total General Curva B", "Total General Curva C"))
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totcur, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 8) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
           If totgrl > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format((totcur / totgrl) * 100, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
           '-------> Imprimir total general servicio
           i = i + 2
           .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 5) = 2
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = "Total General Servicio "
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totgrl, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           .TableCell(tcRows) = i
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
           estpag = True
        End If
        RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    If Trim(aAp) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp & ""
    If Trim(aAp1) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp1 & ""
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_CurvaABC:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function
