Public Function I_ComparativoCurvaABC(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String)
Dim estpag As Boolean, nomcec As String, anomes As String, aAp As String, aAp1 As String, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String, sql4 As String
Dim totgrl As Double, totcur As Double, curva As Double, CurvaABC As Long, indcur As Long, curvaa As Long, curvab As Long, curvac As Long
Dim totneg As Double, tgrneg As Double
On Local Error GoTo Error_ComparativoCurvaABC
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Comparativo Curva ABC " & IIf(tipmin = "1", "Teórico Vs Negociado", IIf(tipmin = "2", "Real  Vs Negociado", "Realizado  Vs Negociado"))
Preview.Refresh
Preview.Cls
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    LogoEmp
    '-------> Traer curva ABC
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM a_curvaabc", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          If RS1!abc_codigo = "A" Then curvaa = RS1!abc_porce
          If RS1!abc_codigo = "B" Then curvab = RS1!abc_porce
          If RS1!abc_codigo = "C" Then curvac = RS1!abc_porce
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then nomcec = Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Traer costo planificación teórico ó real
    '-------> Creo tabla temporal y chequeo si existe antes
    aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_EncCompCurvaABC"
    fg_CheckTmp aAp
    If tipmin = "1" Or tipmin = "2" Then
       sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " mid(c.min_fecmin,1,6) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),c.min_fecmin),1,6)) ")
       RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, a.ser_codigo, a.ser_nombre, " & sql1 & " AS min_fecmin INTO " & aAp & " " & _
                "FROM a_servicio a, a_regimen b, b_minuta c, b_minutadet d " & _
                "WHERE  c.min_codigo = d.mid_codigo " & _
                "AND    c.min_codreg = b.reg_codigo " & _
                "AND    c.min_codser = a.ser_codigo " & _
                "AND    c.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                "AND    c.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND    c.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND    c.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
                "AND    c.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                "AND    d.mid_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       Set RS1 = Nothing
        
       sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " mid(c.mfd_fecha,1,6) ", " convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),c.mfd_fecha),1,6)) ")
       vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " SELECT DISTINCT b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, a.ser_codigo, a.ser_nombre, " & sql1 & " AS min_fecmin " & _
                     "FROM a_servicio a, a_regimen b, b_minutafijadia c " & _
                     "WHERE c.mfd_codreg = b.reg_codigo " & _
                     "AND   c.mfd_codser = a.ser_codigo " & _
                     "AND   c.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                     "AND   c.mfd_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                     "AND   c.mfd_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                     "AND   c.mfd_fecha >= " & fecini & " " & _
                     "AND   c.mfd_fecha <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                     "AND   c.mfd_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "'"
       Set RS1 = Nothing
    Else
       sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "format(c.tov_fecemi,'yyyymm') ", "datepart(year,c.tov_fecemi) + datepart(mm,c.tov_fecemi) ")
       sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "CDate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
       sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "CDate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
       RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.reg_codigo, b.reg_nombre, a.ser_codigo, a.ser_nombre , " & sql1 & " AS min_fecmin INTO " & aAp & " " & _
                "FROM a_servicio a, a_regimen b, b_totventas c " & _
                "WHERE c.tov_codreg = b.reg_codigo " & _
                "AND   c.tov_codser = a.ser_codigo " & _
                "AND   c.tov_rutcli = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                "AND  (c.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' OR c.tov_tipdoc='DP') " & _
                "AND   c.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                "AND   c.tov_fecemi  >= " & sql2 & " " & _
                "AND   c.tov_fecemi <=  " & sql3 & " " & _
                "AND   c.tov_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND   c.tov_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                "AND   c.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND c.tov_estdoc <> 'P'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    End If
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT reg_codigo, reg_nombre, ser_codigo, ser_nombre, min_fecmin FROM " & aAp & " ORDER BY reg_codigo, ser_codigo, min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Function
    aAp = ""
    gtosec = 0: estpag = False
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       aAp1 = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_DetCompCurvaABC"
       fg_CheckTmp aAp1
       If tipmin = "1" Or tipmin = "2" Then
          '-------> Insertar planificación minutas
          DoEvents
          sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "IIf(b.red_tiprec = 0, '0', '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') ", "CASE WHEN b.red_tiprec = 0 THEN  '0' ELSE  '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' END")
          RS2.Open "SELECT f.pro_codigo, f.pro_nombre, f.pro_coduni, b.red_codpro, c.ing_nombre, c.ing_unimed, e.mic_cospro, '' AS uni_nomcor, " & _
                   "SUM(((b.red_canpro / a.rec_basrac) * i.mid_numrac) * f.pro_facsto) AS cantidad, SUM(((b.red_canpro / a.rec_basrac) * i.mid_numrac) * e.mic_cospro) AS costot, 0 AS preneg " & _
                   "INTO " & aAp1 & " FROM  b_receta a, b_recetadet b, b_ingrediente c, b_minutacosto e, b_productos f, b_contlistpreing g, b_minuta h, b_minutadet i " & _
                   "WHERE h.min_codigo = i.mid_codigo " & _
                   "AND   b.red_codigo = a.rec_codigo " & _
                   "AND   b.red_codpro = e.mic_codpro " & _
                   "AND   e.mic_codpro = c.ing_codigo " & _
                   "AND   c.ing_codigo = g.cpi_coding " & _
                   "AND   g.cpi_codped = f.pro_codigo " & _
                   "AND   b.red_codigo = i.mid_codrec " & _
                   "AND   e.mic_cencos = h.min_cencos " & _
                   "AND   b.red_tiprec = i.mid_tiprec " & _
                   "AND   b.red_cencos = " & sql1 & " " & _
                   "AND   e.mic_cencos = h.min_cencos " & _
                   "AND   e.mic_fecval = i.mid_fecval " & _
                   "AND   e.mic_tipmin = i.mid_tipmin " & _
                   "AND   g.cpi_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                   "AND   h.min_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                   "AND   h.min_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                   "AND   h.min_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                   "AND   h.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " AND h.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                   "AND   i.mid_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "' " & _
                   "AND   i.mid_numrac > 0 " & _
                   "GROUP BY f.pro_codigo, f.pro_nombre, f.pro_coduni, b.red_codpro, c.ing_nombre, c.ing_unimed, e.mic_cospro", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          '-------> Actualizar precio producto y cantidad
          If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
             vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp1 & " INNER JOIN b_productos ON " & aAp1 & ".pro_codigo = b_productos.pro_codigo SET " & aAp1 & ".mic_cospro=(" & aAp1 & ".mic_cospro * b_productos.pro_facing), " & aAp1 & ".cantidad=(" & aAp1 & ".cantidad/b_productos.pro_facing)"
          Else
             vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp1 & " SET " & aAp1 & ".mic_cospro = (" & aAp1 & ".mic_cospro * b_productos.pro_facing), " & aAp1 & ".cantidad = (" & aAp1 & ".cantidad/b_productos.pro_facing) FROM " & aAp1 & ", b_productos WHERE " & aAp1 & ".pro_codigo = b_productos.pro_codigo"
          End If
          '-------> Insertar estructura fija
          DoEvents
          vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp1 & " SELECT b.pro_codigo AS pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre AS pro_nombre, b.pro_coduni AS pro_coduni, '' AS red_codpro, '' AS ing_nombre, 0 AS ing_unimed, a.mfd_cospro AS mic_cospro, '' AS uni_nomcor, SUM(a.mfd_canpro) AS cantidad, SUM(a.mfd_cospro*a.mfd_canpro) AS costot, 0 AS preneg " & _
                        "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos b " & _
                        "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = b.pro_codigo " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                        "AND   a.mfd_fecha >= " & fecini & " AND a.mfd_fecha <= " & fecfin & " AND a.mfd_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "' " & _
                        "AND  (b.pro_fecven > " & Format(Date, "yyyymmdd") & " OR b.pro_fecven <= 0 OR (b.pro_codigo IN (SELECT bod_codpro FROM b_bodegas WHERE bod_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND bod_canmer > 0))) GROUP BY b.pro_codigo, b.pro_nombre, b.pro_coduni, a.mfd_cospro"
       Else
          '-------> Insertar salida producción
          DoEvents
          sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "SUM(IIF(a.tov_tipdoc='SP',b.dev_canmer,'-' & b.dev_canmer)) AS cantidad ", "SUM(CASE WHEN a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' THEN b.dev_canmer ELSE (-1 * b.dev_canmer) END) AS cantidad ")
          sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "SUM(IIF(a.tov_tipdoc='SP',b.dev_canmer,'-' & b.dev_canmer)*b.dev_precos) AS costot", "SUM(CASE WHEN a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' THEN b.dev_canmer ELSE (-1 * b.dev_canmer) END * b.dev_precos) AS costot")
          sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "CDate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
          sql4 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "CDate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
          RS2.Open "SELECT c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, '' AS red_codpro, '' AS ing_nombre, 0 AS ing_unimed, " & _
                   "b.dev_precos AS mic_cospro, '' AS uni_nomcor, " & sql1 & ", " & _
                   " " & sql2 & ", 0 AS preneg " & _
                   "INTO " & aAp1 & " FROM  b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c " & _
                   "WHERE a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
                   "AND   b.dev_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_fecpro >= " & sql3 & " " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_fecpro <= " & sql4 & " " & _
                   "AND  (a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' OR a.tov_tipdoc = 'DP') " & _
                   "AND   a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' AND b.dev_canmer > 0 " & _
                   "GROUP BY c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dev_precos", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       End If
       '-------> Actualizar precio negociado
       anomes = Mid(fecini, 1, 4) & Mid(fecini, 5, 2)
'       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp1 & " INNER JOIN ((b_formatocompras INNER JOIN b_formatocomprassgp ON b_formatocompras.foc_codsac = b_formatocomprassgp.fcs_codsac) INNER JOIN b_sac_listaprecio ON b_formatocompras.foc_codsac = b_sac_listaprecio.lps_codsac) ON " & aAp1 & ".pro_codigo = b_formatocomprassgp.fcs_codsgp SET " & aAp1 & ".preneg = b_sac_listaprecio.lps_precio " & _
'                     "WHERE b_sac_listaprecio.lps_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND format(b_sac_listaprecio.lps_fecini, 'mm/yyyy') = format('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "', 'mm/yyyy') AND format(b_sac_listaprecio.lps_fecfin, 'mm/yyyy') = format('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "', 'mm/yyyy')"
       If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
          vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp1 & " INNER JOIN ((b_formatocompras INNER JOIN b_formatocomprassgp ON b_formatocompras.foc_codsac = b_formatocomprassgp.fcs_codsac) INNER JOIN b_sac_listaprecio ON b_formatocompras.foc_codsac = b_sac_listaprecio.lps_codsac) ON " & aAp1 & ".pro_codigo = b_formatocomprassgp.fcs_codsgp SET " & aAp1 & ".preneg = b_sac_listaprecio.lps_precio " & _
                        "WHERE b_sac_listaprecio.lps_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND b_sac_listaprecio.lps_periodo = '" & anomes & "'"
       Else
          vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp1 & " SET " & aAp1 & ".preneg = b_sac_listaprecio.lps_precio FROM b_formatocompras, b_formatocomprassgp, b_sac_listaprecio WHERE b_formatocompras.foc_codsac = b_formatocomprassgp.fcs_codsac AND b_formatocompras.foc_codsac = b_sac_listaprecio.lps_codsac AND " & aAp1 & ".pro_codigo = b_formatocomprassgp.fcs_codsgp " & _
                        "AND b_sac_listaprecio.lps_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND b_sac_listaprecio.lps_periodo = '" & anomes & "'"
       End If

        '-------> Consultar total general curva ABC
        totgrl = 0
        RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(costot) AS totgra FROM " & aAp1 & "", vg_db
        If Not RS2.EOF Then totgrl = IIf(IsNull(RS2!totgra), 0, RS2!totgra)
        RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
        indcur = 1: CurvaABC = curvaa: curva = 0: totcur = 0
        RS2.Open "SELECT a.pro_codigo, a.pro_nombre, b.uni_nomcor, AVG(a.mic_cospro) AS mic_cospro, " & _
                 "SUM(a.cantidad) AS xcantidad, round(SUM(a.costot),3) AS xcostot, AVG(a.preneg) AS preneg " & _
                 "FROM " & aAp1 & " a, a_unidad b " & _
                 "WHERE a.pro_coduni = b.uni_codigo " & _
                 "GROUP BY a.pro_codigo, a.pro_nombre, b.uni_nomcor ORDER BY SUM(a.costot) DESC, a.pro_nombre ASC", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        If Not RS2.EOF Then
           If estpag Then .NewPage
           
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Comparativo Curva ABC " & IIf(tipmin = "1", "Planificación Teórico  Vs Negociado", IIf(tipmin = "2", "Planificación Real  Vs Negociado", "Realizado  Vs Negociado"))
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
           .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
           
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 8000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 8000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato "
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = ": " & cencos & " - " & nomcec
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Rango Facha "
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = ": " & Mid(fecini, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4) & " - " & Mid(fecfin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecfin, 1, 4)
           .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Regimen "
           .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = ": " & RS1!reg_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!reg_nombre)
           .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) = "Servicio "
           .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2) = ": " & RS1!ser_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
           .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
           
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 12: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 4200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 12) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 12) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow:: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 200
           .TableCell(tcBackColor, 2) = vbYellow:: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 200
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Código"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Descripción"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = "UN"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = "Consumo"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = "Costo Unit."
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = "Costo Total"
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "% Sobre"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 8) = "Total"
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 9) = "Costo Neg."
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 10) = "Costo Total"
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 11) = "% Difer."
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 11) = "Cost. Tot."
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 12) = "Difer."
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 12) = "Cost. Tot."
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
                
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 12: .TableCell(tcRows) = 5000
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 150: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 4200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 11) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 11) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 12) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 12) = taRightTop
           i = 1
           If Not RS2.EOF Then
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Curva A"
              i = i + 1
              Do While Not RS2.EOF
                 If totgrl > 0 And Not IsNull(RS2!xcostot) Then
                    curva = curva + ((RS2!xcostot / totgrl) * 100)
                 Else
                    curva = curva + 0
                 End If
                 If curva > CurvaABC And CurvaABC <> curvac And curva <= 99 Then
                    CurvaABC = IIf(indcur = 1, curvab, curvac): curva = 0
                    curva = curva + ((RS2!xcostot / totgrl) * 100)
                    '-------> Imprimir total curva
                    i = i + 1
                    .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 5) = 2
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(indcur = 1, "Total General Curva A ", IIf(indcur = 2, "Total General Curva B", "Total General Curva C"))
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totcur, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 8) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
                    If totgrl > 0 Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 8) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format((totcur / totgrl) * 100, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 10) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) = Format((totneg), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    If totneg > 0 And totcur > 0 And totcur > 0 Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 11) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 11) = Format((totneg / totcur - 1) * 100, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 12) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 12) = Format((totcur - totneg), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    indcur = indcur + 1: totcur = 0: totneg = 0
                    i = i + 2
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(indcur = 2, "Curva B", "Curva C")
                    i = i + 1
                 End If
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!pro_codigo)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS2!pro_nombre)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Trim(RS2!uni_nomcor)
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format((RS2!xcantidad), fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(RS2!mic_cospro, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(IIf(IsNull(RS2!xcostot), 0, RS2!xcostot), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format(IIf(IsNull(RS2!preneg), 0, RS2!preneg), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) = Format((RS2!xcantidad * IIf(IsNull(RS2!preneg), 0, RS2!preneg)), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 If RS2!preneg > 0 And Not IsNull(RS2!preneg) And RS2!xcantidad > 0 And RS2!xcostot > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 11) = Format(((RS2!xcantidad * RS2!preneg) / RS2!xcostot - 1) * 100, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 12) = Format((RS2!xcostot - (RS2!xcantidad * IIf(IsNull(RS2!preneg), 0, RS2!preneg))), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 If totgrl > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(((RS2!xcostot / totgrl) * 100), fg_Pict(3, 2)) & " %"
                 totcur = totcur + IIf(IsNull(RS2!xcostot), 0, RS2!xcostot)
                 totneg = totneg + (RS2!xcantidad * IIf(IsNull(RS2!preneg), 0, RS2!preneg))
                 tgrneg = tgrneg + (RS2!xcantidad * IIf(IsNull(RS2!preneg), 0, RS2!preneg))
                 RS2.MoveNext: i = i + 1
              Loop
           End If
           '-------> Imprimir total curva
           i = i + 2
           .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 5) = 2
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(indcur = 1, "Total General Curva A ", IIf(indcur = 2, "Total General Curva B", "Total General Curva C"))
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totcur, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 8) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
           If totgrl > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format((totcur / totgrl) * 100, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 10) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) = Format((totneg), fg_Pict(6, 2))
           If totneg > 0 And totcur > 0 Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 11) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 11) = Format((totneg / totcur - 1) * 100, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 12) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 12) = Format((totcur - totneg), fg_Pict(6, 0))
           '-------> Imprimir total general servicio
           i = i + 2
           .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 5) = 2
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = "Total General Servicio "
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(totgrl, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 10) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) = Format((tgrneg), fg_Pict(6, 2))
           If totgrl > 0 And tgrneg > 0 Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 11) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 11) = Format((tgrneg / totgrl - 1) * 100, fg_Pict(6, 2)) & " %"
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 12) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 12) = Format((totgrl - tgrneg), fg_Pict(6, 0))
           .TableCell(tcRows) = i
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
           estpag = True
           totneg = 0: tgrneg = 0
        End If
        RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .EndDoc
    If Trim(aAp) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp & ""
    If Trim(aAp1) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp1 & ""
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_ComparativoCurvaABC:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_InflacionInterna(codbod As Long, codpro As String, FecAnt As Long, fecact As Long)
Dim i As Long, finian As Long, ffinan As Long, finiac As Long, ffinac As Long, cosant As Double, cosact As Double
Dim aAp As String, estpre As Boolean, nomcen As String, NomPro As String, sql1 As String, sql2 As String
On Local Error GoTo Error_InflacionInterna
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Inflación Interna"
'-------> Poner formato a las fecha desde y hasta
finian = FecAnt & "01"
ffinan = Format(dEoM("01/" & Mid(FecAnt, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(FecAnt, 1, 4)), "yyyymmdd")
finiac = fecact & "01"
ffinac = Format(dEoM("01/" & Mid(finiac, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(finiac, 1, 4)), "yyyymmdd")
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Inflación Interna"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    '-------> Treaer nombre centro costo
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, MuestraCasino(1), ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then nomcen = RS1!cli_nombre
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Treaer nombre centro costo
    NomPro = ""
    If codpro <> "" Then
       
       If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
       RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       
       RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_productos WHERE pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS1.EOF Then NomPro = RS1!pro_nombre
       RS1.Close
       Set RS1 = Nothing
       
    End If
    
    '-------> Traer fecha del periodo desde

    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_cierreperiodo WHERE cie_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND cie_periodo = " & FecAnt & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then finian = RS1!cie_fecini: ffinan = RS1!cie_fecter
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    '-------> Traer fecha del periodo hasta
    estpre = False
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_cierreperiodo WHERE cie_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND cie_periodo = " & fecact & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       finiac = RS1!cie_fecini
       ffinac = RS1!cie_fecter
       estpre = IIf(RS1!cie_estado = 1, True, False)
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 8500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1, 2, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 2) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato": .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = MuestraCasino(1) & " - " & nomcen
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Periodo": .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = fg_Ctod1(ffinan) & "A " & fg_Ctod1(ffinac)
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Producto": .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = IIf(Trim(NomPro) = "", "TODOS", Trim(codpro) & " - " & NomPro)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 9: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 2) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 230
    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 5) = 2
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "-- Costo del " & fg_Ctod1(ffinan) & "--"
    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 7) = 2
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "-- Costo del " & fg_Ctod1(ffinac) & "--"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Compras"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = "Unidad"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = "Costo"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = "Valor Total"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = "Costo"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 8) = "Valor Total"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 9) = "Inflación"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    '-------> Creo tabla temporal y chequeo si existe antes
    aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_InflacionInterna"
    fg_CheckTmp aAp
    
    '-------> Traer Documento Proveedor
    Dim pctimp As Double, pctdes  As Double
    DoEvents
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(finiac) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(finiac), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(ffinac) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(ffinac), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
'    RS1.Open "SELECT a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dec_prerec AS preact, 0 AS preant, SUM(b.dec_canrec) AS cantidad " & _
'             "INTO " & aAp & " FROM b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c " & _
'             "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
'             "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_codbod = " & codbod & " " & _
'             "AND  (c.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "'='') " & _
'             "AND   b.dec_mueinv = 'S' AND a.toc_tipdoc<>'SN' AND b.dec_canrec>0 " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_fecrem >= " & sql1 & " " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_fecrem <= " & sql2 & " " & _
'             "GROUP BY a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dec_prerec", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

    RS1.Open "SELECT a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dec_prerec AS preact, 0 AS preant, SUM(b.dec_canrec) AS cantidad " & _
             "INTO " & aAp & " FROM b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c " & _
             "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
             "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
             "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.toc_codbod = " & codbod & " " & _
             "AND  (c.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "'='') " & _
             "AND   b.dec_mueinv = 'S' AND a.toc_tipdoc in (select tdo_codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_IdCodigo <> 'SN') AND b.dec_canrec>0 " & _
             "AND   a.toc_fecrem >= " & sql1 & " " & _
             "AND   a.toc_fecrem <= " & sql2 & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dec_prerec", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    '-------> Actualizar precio que tengan referencia impuesto recuperable
    DoEvents
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE (" & aAp & " INNER JOIN b_detcomprasimp ON (" & aAp & ".pro_codigo=b_detcomprasimp.imd_codpro) AND (" & aAp & ".toc_numdoc=b_detcomprasimp.imd_numdoc) AND (" & aAp & ".toc_tipdoc=b_detcomprasimp.imd_tipdoc) " & _
                     "AND (" & aAp & ".toc_rutpro=b_detcomprasimp.imd_rutdoc)) INNER JOIN a_impuesto ON b_detcomprasimp.imd_codimp=a_impuesto.imp_codigo SET " & aAp & ".preact=(" & aAp & ".preact+(b_detcomprasimp.imd_monimp/" & aAp & ".cantidad)) " & _
                     "WHERE a_impuesto.imp_inccos=1"
    
    Else
       
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " SET " & aAp & ".preact=(" & aAp & ".preact+(b_detcomprasimp.imd_monimp/" & aAp & ".cantidad)) FROM " & aAp & ", b_detcomprasimp, a_impuesto WHERE " & aAp & ".pro_codigo = b_detcomprasimp.imd_codpro AND " & aAp & ".toc_numdoc = b_detcomprasimp.imd_numdoc AND " & aAp & ".toc_tipdoc = b_detcomprasimp.imd_tipdoc " & _
                     "AND " & aAp & ".toc_rutpro = b_detcomprasimp.imd_rutdoc  AND b_detcomprasimp.imd_codimp = a_impuesto.imp_codigo AND a_impuesto.imp_inccos = 1"
    
    End If
    DoEvents
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    '-------> Fin traer Documento Proveedor
    '-------> Traer documento traspaso entrada
    vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " SELECT '' AS toc_rutpro, '' AS toc_tipdoc, 0 AS toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dev_predoc AS preact, 0 AS preant, SUM(b.dev_canmer) AS cantidad " & _
                  "FROM   b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c " & _
                  "WHERE  a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
                  "AND    b.dev_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_codbod = " & codbod & " " & _
                  "AND   (c.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "' = '') " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_tipdoc = 'TR' " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_fecemi >= " & sql1 & " " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_fecemi <= " & sql2 & " AND b.dev_mueinv = 'S' " & _
                  "GROUP BY c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dev_predoc"
    '-------> Fin traer documento traspaso entrada
    
    DoEvents
    '-------> Traer precio del Inventario
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " INNER JOIN b_tomainv ON " & aAp & ".pro_codigo = b_tomainv.tin_codpro SET " & aAp & ".preant = b_tomainv.tin_propon " & _
                     "WHERE b_tomainv.tin_fectom = " & ffinan & " AND b_tomainv.tin_codbod = " & codbod & " AND b_tomainv.tin_ciemes <> 0"
    
    Else
       
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " SET " & aAp & ".preant = b_tomainv.tin_propon FROM " & aAp & ", b_tomainv WHERE " & aAp & ".pro_codigo = b_tomainv.tin_codpro " & _
                     "AND b_tomainv.tin_fectom = " & ffinan & " AND b_tomainv.tin_codbod = " & codbod & " AND b_tomainv.tin_ciemes <> 0"
    
    End If
    DoEvents
    '-------> Buscar precio desde
'*    If Not estpre Then
'*       '-------> Traer precio del Inventario
'*       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " INNER JOIN b_tomainv ON " & aAp & ".pro_codigo=b_tomainv.tin_codpro SET " & aAp & ".precio2=b_tomainv.tin_propon " & _
'*                     "WHERE b_tomainv.tin_fectom=" & ffinac & " AND b_tomainv.tin_codbod=" & codbod & " AND b_tomainv.tin_ciemes<>0"
'*    Else
'*       '-------> Traer precio del producto
'*       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE (" & aAp & " INNER JOIN b_productos ON " & aAp & ".pro_codigo=b_productos.pro_codigo) INNER JOIN b_contlistprepro ON b_productos.pro_codigo=b_contlistprepro.cpp_codpro SET " & aAp & ".precio2=b_contlistprepro.cpp_propon " & _
'*                     "WHERE b_contlistprepro.cpp_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "'"
'*    End If
    '-------> Traer datos a imprimir
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.pro_codigo, a.pro_nombre, b.uni_nomcor, preant, AVG(preact) AS preact, SUM(cantidad) AS cantidad " & _
             "FROM " & aAp & " a, a_unidad b " & _
             "WHERE a.pro_coduni = b.uni_codigo " & _
             "GROUP BY a.pro_codigo, a.pro_nombre, b.uni_nomcor, preant ORDER BY a.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 9: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
    i = 1
    cosant = 0
    cosact = 0
    
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Format(RS1!Cantidad, fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Trim(RS1!uni_nomcor)
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS1!preant, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format((RS1!preant * RS1!Cantidad), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(Round(RS1!preact, 2), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format((Round(RS1!preact, 2) * RS1!Cantidad), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
       
       If (RS1!preant * RS1!Cantidad) > 0 Then
          
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format(((((RS1!preact * RS1!Cantidad) - (RS1!preant * RS1!Cantidad)) / (RS1!preant * RS1!Cantidad)) * 100), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)) & " %"
       
       Else
          
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format(0, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)) & " %"
       
       End If
       
       '-------> sumando costo del mes anterior y mes actual
       cosant = cosant + (RS1!preant * RS1!Cantidad)
       cosact = cosact + (RS1!preact * RS1!Cantidad)
       
       RS1.MoveNext
       i = i + 1
    
    Loop
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 3) = 2
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "Total General "
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 6) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(cosant, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = ""
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 8) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(cosact, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
    
    If cosant > 0 Then
       
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 9) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format((((cosact) - (cosant)) / (cosant) * 100), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)) & " %"
    
    Else
       
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 9) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format(0, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)) & " %"
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc

End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga

Exit Function
Error_InflacionInterna:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function

End Function

Public Function I_AnalisisConsumoPrecioFijo(codbod As Long, codpro As String, FecAnt As Long, fecact As Long)
Dim i As Long, finian As Long, ffinan As Long, finiac As Long, ffinac As Long, cosant As Double, cosact As Double
Dim aAp As String, aAp1 As String, estpre As Boolean, nomcen As String, NomPro As String, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String, sql4 As String, sql5 As String

On Local Error GoTo Error_AnalisisConsumoPrecioFijo

fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Analisis de Consumo Precio Fijo"

'-------> Poner formato a las fecha desde y hasta
finian = FecAnt & "01"
ffinan = Format(dEoM("01/" & Mid(FecAnt, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(FecAnt, 1, 4)), "yyyymmdd")
finiac = fecact & "01"
ffinac = Format(dEoM("01/" & Mid(finiac, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(finiac, 1, 4)), "yyyymmdd")

With Preview.VSPrinter
    
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Analisis de Consumo Precio Fijo"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    '-------> Treaer nombre centro costo
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, MuestraCasino(1), ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then nomcen = RS1!cli_nombre
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Treaer nombre centro costo
    NomPro = ""
    If codpro <> "" Then
       
       If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
       RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
       
       RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_productos WHERE pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS1.EOF Then NomPro = RS1!pro_nombre
       RS1.Close
       Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    End If
    
    '-------> Traer fecha del periodo desde
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_cierreperiodo WHERE cie_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND cie_periodo = " & FecAnt & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then finian = RS1!cie_fecini: ffinan = RS1!cie_fecter
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    '-------> Traer fecha del periodo hasta
    estpre = False
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_cierreperiodo WHERE cie_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND cie_periodo = " & fecact & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       
       finiac = RS1!cie_fecini
       ffinac = RS1!cie_fecter
       estpre = IIf(RS1!cie_estado = 1, True, False)
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 8500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1, 2, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 2) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato": .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = MuestraCasino(1) & " - " & nomcen
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Periodo": .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = fg_Ctod1(ffinan) & "A " & fg_Ctod1(ffinac)
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Producto": .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = IIf(Trim(NomPro) = "", "TODOS", Trim(codpro) & " - " & NomPro)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 9: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 2) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 230
    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 5) = 2
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "-- Comp. del " & fg_Ctod1(ffinan) & "--"
    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 7) = 2
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "-- Comp. del " & fg_Ctod1(ffinac) & "--"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Unidad"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = "Costo"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = "Compras"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = "Valor Total"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = "Compras"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 8) = "Valor Total"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 9) = "Inflación"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    '-------> Creo tabla temporal y chequeo si existe antes
    aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_AnalisisConsumoPrecioFijo"
    fg_CheckTmp aAp
    
    '-------> Traer Documento Proveedor
    Dim pctimp As Double, pctdes  As Double
    DoEvents
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(finiac) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(finiac), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(ffinac) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(ffinac), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
    sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " 0 AS cantant ", " convert(float,0) AS cantant")
    sql4 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(finian) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(finian), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
    sql5 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(ffinan) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(ffinan), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
    
    '-------> Traer compras de meses N
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

'    RS1.Open "SELECT a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, " & _
'             "c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dec_prerec AS preact, 0 AS preant, SUM(b.dec_canrec) AS cantact, " & sql3 & " " & _
'             "INTO " & aAp & " FROM b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c " & _
'             "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
'             "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_codbod = " & codbod & " " & _
'             "AND  (c.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "'='') " & _
'             "AND   b.dec_mueinv = 'S' AND a.toc_tipdoc<>'SN' AND b.dec_canrec>0 " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_fecrem >= " & sql1 & " " & _
'             "AND   a.toc_fecrem <= " & sql2 & " " & _
'             "GROUP BY a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dec_prerec", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, " & _
             "c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dec_prerec AS preact, 0 AS preant, SUM(b.dec_canrec) AS cantact, " & sql3 & " " & _
             "INTO " & aAp & " FROM b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c " & _
             "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
             "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
             "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.toc_codbod = " & codbod & " " & _
             "AND  (c.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "'='') " & _
             "AND   b.dec_mueinv = 'S' AND a.toc_tipdoc IN (select tdo_codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_IdCodigo <> 'SN') AND b.dec_canrec>0 " & _
             "AND   a.toc_fecrem >= " & sql1 & " " & _
             "AND   a.toc_fecrem <= " & sql2 & " " & _
             "GROUP BY a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dec_prerec", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       
       vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp & " ALTER COLUMN cantant double"
    
    End If
    '-------> Traer compras de meses N -1
    DoEvents
'    vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " SELECT a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, " & _
'                  "c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dec_prerec AS preact, 0 AS preant, 0 AS cantact, SUM(b.dec_canrec) AS cantant " & _
'                  "FROM  b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c " & _
'                  "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
'                  "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
'                  "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
'                  "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
'                  "AND   a.toc_codbod = " & codbod & " " & _
'                  "AND  (c.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "'='') " & _
'                  "AND   b.dec_mueinv = 'S' AND a.toc_tipdoc <> 'SN' AND b.dec_canrec > 0 " & _
'                  "AND   a.toc_fecrem >= " & sql4 & " " & _
'                  "AND   a.toc_fecrem <= " & sql5 & " " & _
'                  "GROUP BY a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dec_prerec"
    
    vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " SELECT a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, " & _
                  "c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dec_prerec AS preact, 0 AS preant, 0 AS cantact, SUM(b.dec_canrec) AS cantant " & _
                  "FROM  b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productos c " & _
                  "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
                  "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
                  "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
                  "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
                  "AND   a.toc_codbod = " & codbod & " " & _
                  "AND  (c.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "'='') " & _
                  "AND   b.dec_mueinv = 'S' AND a.toc_tipdoc in (select tdo_codigo from a_tipodocumento where tdo_IdCodigo <> 'SN') AND b.dec_canrec > 0 " & _
                  "AND   a.toc_fecrem >= " & sql4 & " " & _
                  "AND   a.toc_fecrem <= " & sql5 & " " & _
                  "GROUP BY a.toc_rutpro, a.toc_tipdoc, a.toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dec_prerec"
    
    DoEvents
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Fin traer Documento Proveedor
    
    '-------> Traer documento traspaso entrada del mes N
    vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " SELECT '' AS toc_rutpro, '' AS toc_tipdoc, 0 AS toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, " & _
                  "c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dev_predoc AS preact, 0 AS preant, SUM(b.dev_canmer) AS cantact, 0 as cantant " & _
                  "FROM   b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c " & _
                  "WHERE  a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
                  "AND    b.dev_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_codbod = " & codbod & " " & _
                  "AND   (c.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "' = '') " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_tipdoc = 'TR' " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_fecemi >= " & sql1 & " " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_fecemi <= " & sql2 & " AND b.dev_mueinv = 'S' AND b.dev_canmer > 0" & _
                  "GROUP BY c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dev_predoc"
    '-------> Fin traer documento traspaso entrada
    
    '-------> Actualizar cantidad del mes anterior
    DoEvents
    '-------> Traer documento traspaso entrada del mes N -1
    vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " SELECT '' AS toc_rutpro, '' AS toc_tipdoc, 0 AS toc_numdoc, c.pro_codigo, " & _
                  "c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dev_predoc AS preact, 0 AS preant, 0 as cantact, SUM(b.dev_canmer) AS cantant " & _
                  "FROM   b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productos c " & _
                  "WHERE  a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
                  "AND    b.dev_codmer = c.pro_codigo " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_codbod = " & codbod & " " & _
                  "AND   (c.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "' = '') " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_tipdoc = 'TR' " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND a.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_fecemi >= " & sql4 & " " & _
                  "AND    a.tov_fecemi <= " & sql5 & " AND b.dev_mueinv = 'S' AND b.dev_canmer > 0" & _
                  "GROUP BY c.pro_codigo, c.pro_nombre, c.pro_coduni, b.dev_predoc"
    '-------> Fin traer documento traspaso entrada

    DoEvents
    '-------> Traer precio del Inventario
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " INNER JOIN b_tomainv ON " & aAp & ".pro_codigo = b_tomainv.tin_codpro SET " & aAp & ".preact = b_tomainv.tin_propon " & _
                     "WHERE b_tomainv.tin_fectom = " & ffinac & " AND b_tomainv.tin_codbod = " & codbod & " AND b_tomainv.tin_ciemes <> 0"
    
    Else
       
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " SET " & aAp & ".preact = b_tomainv.tin_propon FROM " & aAp & ", b_tomainv WHERE " & aAp & ".pro_codigo = b_tomainv.tin_codpro " & _
                     "AND b_tomainv.tin_fectom = " & ffinac & " AND b_tomainv.tin_codbod = " & codbod & " AND b_tomainv.tin_ciemes <> 0"
    
    End If
    
    '-------> Traer datos a imprimir
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.pro_codigo, a.pro_nombre, b.uni_nomcor, preant, AVG(preact) AS preact, SUM(cantact) AS cantact, Sum(cantant) as cantant " & _
             "FROM " & aAp & " a, a_unidad b " & _
             "WHERE a.pro_coduni = b.uni_codigo " & _
             "GROUP BY a.pro_codigo, a.pro_nombre, b.uni_nomcor, preant ORDER BY a.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 9: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
    i = 1
    cosant = 0
    cosact = 0
    
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!uni_nomcor)
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(RS1!preact, fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS1!cantant, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format((RS1!preact * RS1!cantant), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(Round(RS1!cantact, 2), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format((Round(RS1!preact, 2) * RS1!cantact), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
       
       If (RS1!preact * RS1!cantant) > 0 Then
          
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format(((((RS1!preact * RS1!cantact) - (RS1!preact * RS1!cantant)) / (RS1!preact * RS1!cantant)) * 100), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)) & " %"
       
       Else
          
          .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format(0, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)) & " %"
       
       End If
       
       '-------> sumando costo del mes anterior y mes actual
       cosant = cosant + (RS1!preact * RS1!cantant)
       cosact = cosact + (RS1!preact * RS1!cantact)
       RS1.MoveNext
       i = i + 1
    
    Loop
    i = i + 1
    
    .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 3) = 2
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "Total General "
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 6) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(cosant, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = ""
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 8) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(cosact, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
    
    If cosant > 0 Then
       
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 9) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format((((cosact) - (cosant)) / (cosant) * 100), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)) & " %"
    
    Else
       
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 9) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format(0, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)) & " %"
    
    End If
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc

End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga

Exit Function
Error_AnalisisConsumoPrecioFijo:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function

End Function

Public Function I_ProductoSinMovimiento(codbod As Long, codpro As String, Fecha As Long, numdia As Long)
Dim i As Long, fecpro As Date, estexi As Boolean, NomPro As String, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, sql3 As String, sql4 As String
Dim aAp As String, totgen As Double
On Local Error GoTo Error_ProductoSinMovimiento
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Producto Sin Movimiento"
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
'    .FontSize = 8
    .FontSize = 7
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Producto Sin Movimiento"
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    '-------> Treaer nombre producto
    NomPro = ""
    If codpro <> "" Then
       RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_productos WHERE pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS1.EOF Then NomPro = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
       RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    End If
    
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 8500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1, 3, 3) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 3) = False
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato": .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = MuestraCasino(1) & " - " & MuestraCasino(2)
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Período": .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = numdia & " Ultimos días (Fecha de Procesamiento : " & fg_Ctod1(Fecha) & " )"
    .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Producto": .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = IIf(codpro = "", "TODOS", NomPro)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 9: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
    
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 2) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 230
    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 7) = 3
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "----------- Ultimo Movimiento ---------------"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "UN."
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = "Cantidad"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = "Precio pmp"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = "Total"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = "T.Doc."
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 8) = "Fecha"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 9) = "Nº. Doc."
    
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    '-------> Creo tabla temporal y chequeo si existe antes
    aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ProductoSinMov"
    fg_CheckTmp aAp
    
'    '-------> Compras
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT b.dec_codmer, c.bod_canmer, Max(a.toc_fecrem) AS toc_fecrem " & _
             " INTO " & aAp & " " & _
             "FROM b_totcompras a, b_detcompras  b, b_bodegas c " & _
             "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
             "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
             "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
             "AND   a.toc_codbod = c.bod_codbod " & _
             "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.bod_codpro " & _
             "AND  (b.dec_codmer = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "' = '') " & _
             "AND   a.toc_codbod = " & codbod & " AND ROUND(c.bod_canmer,3) > 0 " & _
             "GROUP BY b.dec_codmer, c.bod_canmer", vg_db, adOpenStatic

    Set RS2 = Nothing
    '-------> Traspaso, salida, devolución
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " MAX(iif(a.tov_tipdoc='SP' OR a.tov_tipdoc='DP',a.tov_fecpro, a.tov_fecemi)) AS toc_fecrem ", " MAX(CASE WHEN a.tov_tipdoc='SP' OR a.tov_tipdoc='DP' THEN a.tov_fecpro ELSE a.tov_fecemi END) AS toc_fecrem ")
    vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " SELECT b.dev_codmer AS dec_codmer, c.bod_canmer, " & _
                  "" & sql1 & " " & _
                  "FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_bodegas c " & _
                  "WHERE a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
                  "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
                  "AND   a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
                  "AND   a.tov_codbod = c.bod_codbod " & _
                  "AND   b.dev_codmer = c.bod_codpro " & _
                  "AND  (b.dev_codmer = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "'='') " & _
                  "AND   a.tov_codbod = " & codbod & " AND ROUND(c.bod_canmer,3) > 0 AND a.tov_tipdoc <> 'AI' AND (a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' OR a.tov_estdoc <> 'P') " & _
                  "GROUP BY b.dev_codmer, c.bod_canmer"
    
'                  "AND  IIF(a.tov_tipdoc='SP' OR a.tov_tipdoc='DP',a.tov_fecpro<=CDATE('" & fg_Ctod1(Fecha) & "'), a.tov_fecemi<=CDATE('" & fg_Ctod1(Fecha) & "')) " & _

    '-------> Venta cafateria
    vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " SELECT b.dvp_codmer AS dec_codmer, c.bod_canmer, " & _
                  "MAX(a.tvc_fecing) AS toc_fecrem " & _
                  "FROM b_totventascaf a, b_detventascafpro b, b_bodegas c " & _
                  "WHERE a.tvc_cencos = b.dvp_cencos " & _
                  "AND   a.tvc_fecing = b.dvp_fecing " & _
                  "AND   a.tvc_codbod = c.bod_codbod " & _
                  "AND   b.dvp_codmer = c.bod_codpro " & _
                  "AND  (b.dvp_codmer = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "' = '') " & _
                  "AND   a.tvc_codbod = " & codbod & " AND ROUND(c.bod_canmer,3) > 0 AND a.tvc_estado = 'C' " & _
                  "GROUP BY b.dvp_codmer, c.bod_canmer"
    
'                  "AND   a.tvc_fecing<=CDATE('" & fg_Ctod1(Fecha) & "') " & _

    fecpro = fg_Ctod1(Fecha):  fecpro = fecpro - 30
    i = 1
    RS1.Open "SELECT a.dec_codmer, c.pro_nombre, b.uni_nomcor, a.bod_canmer, " & _
             "MAX(a.toc_fecrem) AS toc_fecrem FROM " & aAp & " a, a_unidad b, b_productos c " & _
             "WHERE a.dec_codmer = c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_coduni = b.uni_codigo AND a.bod_canmer > 0 " & _
             "GROUP BY a.dec_codmer, c.pro_nombre, b.uni_nomcor, a.bod_canmer " & _
             "ORDER BY c.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then
       fg_descarga
       MsgBox "No existe información a visualizar...", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
       RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
       Exit Function
    End If
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 9: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1500:  .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1000:  .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
    
    fecpro = fg_Ctod1(Fecha)
    For i = numdia To 1 Step -1
        fecpro = fecpro - 1
    Next i
    i = 1
    tot_gen = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDATE('" & RS1!toc_fecrem & "') ", " '" & Format(RS1!toc_fecrem, "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
       If RS1!toc_fecrem < fecpro And Round(RS1!bod_canmer, 3) > 0 Then
          estexi = False
          '-------> Compras
          sql4 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " GROUP BY a.toc_numdoc, a.toc_tipdoc, c.ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia ORDER BY ppd_fecdia desc", " GROUP BY a.toc_numdoc, a.toc_tipdoc, c.ppd_propon ORDER BY ppd_fecdia desc")
          RS2.Open "SELECT TOP 1 a.toc_numdoc, a.toc_tipdoc, c.ppd_propon, max(c.ppd_fecdia) AS ppd_fecdia FROM b_totcompras a, b_detcompras b, b_productospmpdia c " & _
                   "WHERE a.toc_rutpro = b.dec_rutpro " & _
                   "AND   a.toc_tipdoc = b.dec_tipdoc " & _
                   "AND   a.toc_numdoc = b.dec_numdoc " & _
                   "AND   b.dec_codmer = c.ppd_codpro " & _
                   "AND   c.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                   "AND   b.dec_codmer = '" & RS1!dec_codmer & "' " & _
                   "AND   a.toc_fecrem = " & sql2 & " AND a.toc_codbod = " & codbod & " " & sql4 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!dec_codmer)
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!uni_nomcor)
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(RS1!bod_canmer, fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS2!ppd_propon, fg_Pict(9, 2))
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format((RS1!bod_canmer * RS2!ppd_propon), fg_Pict(9, 2))
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Trim(RS2!toc_tipdoc)
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = RS1!toc_fecrem
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = RS2!toc_numdoc
             estexi = True
             tot_gen = tot_gen + (RS1!bod_canmer * RS2!ppd_propon)
          End If
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          If Not estexi Then
             sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " CDATE('" & RS1!toc_fecrem & "') ", " '" & Format(RS1!toc_fecrem, "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
             sql4 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " GROUP BY a.tov_numdoc, a.tov_tipdoc, c.ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia ", " GROUP BY a.tov_numdoc, a.tov_tipdoc, c.ppd_propon ")
             '-------> Traspaso, salida, devolución
             RS2.Open "SELECT TOP 1 a.tov_numdoc, a.tov_tipdoc, c.ppd_propon, MAX(c.ppd_fecdia) AS ppd_fecdia FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b, b_productospmpdia c " & _
                      "WHERE a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
                      "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
                      "AND   a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
                      "AND   b.dev_codmer = c.ppd_codpro " & _
                      "AND   c.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                      "AND   b.dev_codmer = '" & RS1!dec_codmer & "' AND round(b.dev_canmer,3) > 0 " & _
                      "AND   a.tov_tipdoc IN ('SP','DP') " & _
                      "AND   a.tov_fecpro = " & sql3 & " " & _
                      "AND   a.tov_codbod = " & codbod & " AND a.tov_tipdoc <> 'AI' AND (a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' OR a.tov_estdoc <> 'P') " & sql4 & " ORDER BY ppd_fecdia", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!dec_codmer)
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!uni_nomcor)
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(RS1!bod_canmer, fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS2!ppd_propon, fg_Pict(9, 2))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format((RS1!bod_canmer * RS2!ppd_propon), fg_Pict(9, 2))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Trim(RS2!tov_tipdoc)
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = RS1!toc_fecrem
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = RS2!tov_numdoc
                estexi = True
                tot_gen = tot_gen + (RS1!bod_canmer * RS2!ppd_propon)
             End If
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
             
'             '-------> Traspaso, salida, devolución
'             If Not RS2.EOF Then
'                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!dec_codmer)
'                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
'                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!uni_nomcor)
'                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(RS1!bod_canmer, fg_Pict(9, vg_dca))
'                .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS2!ppd_propon, fg_Pict(9, 2))
'                .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format((RS1!bod_canmer * RS1!ppd_propon), fg_Pict(9, 2))
'                .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Trim(RS2!tov_tipdoc)
'                .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = RS1!toc_fecrem
'                .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = RS2!tov_numdoc
'                estexi = True
'                tot_gen = tot_gen + (RS1!bod_canmer * RS1!ppd_propon)
'             End If
'             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          
          End If
          If Not estexi Then
             '-------> Venta Cafateria
             sql4 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " GROUP BY a.tvc_cencos, c.ppd_codpro, c.ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia ", " GROUP BY a.tvc_cencos, c.ppd_codpro, c.ppd_propon ")
             RS2.Open "SELECT TOP 1 a.tvc_cencos, c.ppd_codpro, c.ppd_propon, max(c.ppd_fecdia) AS ppd_fecdia FROM b_totventascaf a, b_detventascafpro b, b_productospmpdia c " & _
                      "WHERE a.tvc_cencos = b.dvp_cencos " & _
                      "AND   a.tvc_fecing = b.dvp_fecing " & _
                      "AND   b.dvp_codmer = c.ppd_codpro " & _
                      "AND   c.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                      "AND   b.dvp_codmer = '" & RS1!dec_codmer & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.tvc_fecing = " & sql2 & " AND a.tvc_codbod = " & codbod & " AND a.tvc_estado = 'C' " & sql4 & " order by ppd_fecdia", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!dec_codmer)
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS1!uni_nomcor)
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(RS1!bod_canmer, fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS2!ppd_propon, fg_Pict(9, 2))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format((RS1!bod_canmer * RS2!ppd_propon), fg_Pict(9, 2))
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = "VC"
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = RS1!toc_fecrem
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = ""
                estexi = True
                tot_gen = tot_gen + (RS1!bod_canmer * RS2!ppd_propon)
             End If
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          End If
          i = i + 1
       End If
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    If tot_gen > 0 Then
       i = i + 2
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "Total General"
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format((tot_gen), fg_Pict(9, 2))
    End If
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    '.PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_ProductoSinMovimiento:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_Tcurvaabc()
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_TCurvaAbc
fg_carga ""
mgstitulo = "Informe de Curva ABC"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Maestro Curva ABC"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.CurvaABC(1, "", ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Porcentaje"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
    i = 1
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!abc_codigo)
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!abc_nombre)
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = RS1!abc_porce
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3)
            RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
        Loop
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_TCurvaAbc:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_CostoDetPeriodoRealizado(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String)
Dim auxreg As Long, auxser As Long, auxfec As String, auxestser As Long, nomrec As String, nomsec As String, estpag As Boolean, sql1 As String, sql2 As String
Dim totrec As Double, totsec As Double, numrac As Long, gtosec As Double, totdia As Double
On Local Error GoTo Error_CostoPeriodoRealizado
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Costo Detalle Periodo Realizado"
Preview.Refresh
Preview.Cls
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
    LogoEmp
    '-------> Traer costo planificación teórico ó real
    '-------> Creo tabla temporal y chequeo si existe antes
    estpag = False
    aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_CostoxPeriodo"
    fg_CheckTmp aAp
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "CDate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecini), "yyyymmdd") & "'")
    sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "CDate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "')", "'" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "'")

    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT c.reg_codigo, c.reg_nombre, d.ser_codigo, d.ser_nombre, a.tov_fecemi, a.tov_fecpro, a.tov_numdoc, b.dev_codsec INTO " & aAp & " " & _
             "FROM b_totventas a, b_detventas b, a_regimen c, a_servicio d " & _
             "WHERE a.tov_rutcli = b.dev_rutcli " & _
             "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = b.dev_tipdoc " & _
