             "AND   a.tov_numdoc = b.dev_numdoc " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codreg = c.reg_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codser = d.ser_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.tov_rutcli = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   a.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' " & _
             "AND   a.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro >= " & sql1 & " " & _
             "AND   a.tov_fecpro <= " & sql2 & " " & _
             "AND  (a.tov_estdoc <> 'A' OR a.tov_estdoc <> 'P') AND b.dev_codsec > 0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT reg_codigo, reg_nombre, ser_codigo, ser_nombre, tov_fecemi, tov_fecpro, tov_numdoc FROM " & aAp & " ORDER BY reg_codigo, ser_codigo, tov_fecpro", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: MsgBox "No existe información ó bien las salidas no tiene indicada la opción x sector", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo: Exit Function
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       '-------> Traer numero raciones
       numrac = 0
       RS2.Open "SELECT SUM(mir_nrorac) AS numrac FROM b_minutaraciones WHERE mir_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND mir_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " AND mir_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " AND mir_fecmin = " & Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd") & " AND mir_rutcli IN ('PRODUCIDAS')", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       If Not RS2.EOF Then numrac = IIf(IsNull(RS2!numrac) Or RS2!numrac = 0, 0, RS2!numrac)
       RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
       sql3 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", "ORDER BY sec.sec_orden, dev.dev_numlin", "")
       RS2.Open "SELECT ing.ing_codigo, ing.ing_nombre,unm.unm_nomcor, sec.sec_codigo, sec.sec_nombre, sec.sec_orden, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, uni.uni_nomcor, dev.dev_canmin, dev.dev_predoc, dev.dev_numlin, SUM(dev.dev_canmin * pro.pro_facing) AS canmin, " & _
                "SUM(dev.dev_canmer) AS dev_canmer, SUM(dev.dev_ptotal) AS dev_ptotal " & _
                "FROM  b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_ingrediente ing, b_productos pro, a_unidadmed unm, a_sector sec, a_unidad uni " & _
                "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc AND dev.dev_coding = ing.ing_codigo " & _
                "AND   ing.ing_unimed = unm.unm_codigo AND dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                "AND   dev.dev_codsec = sec.sec_codigo AND pro.pro_coduni = uni.uni_codigo " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_rutcli = '" & cencos & "' AND tov.tov_numdoc = " & RS1!tov_numdoc & " " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' AND tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                "GROUP BY ing.ing_codigo, ing.ing_nombre, unm.unm_nomcor, sec.sec_codigo, sec.sec_nombre,  sec.sec_orden, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, uni.uni_nomcor, dev.dev_canmin, dev.dev_predoc, dev.dev_numlin " & sql3 & " " & _
                "UNION ALL " & _
                "SELECT '' AS ing_codigo, 'Estructura Fija' AS ing_nombre, '' as unm_nomcor, -1 AS sec_codigo, 'Estructura Fija' AS sec_nombre, 999999999 AS sec_orden, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, uni.uni_nomcor, dev.dev_canmin, dev.dev_predoc, dev.dev_numlin, 0 AS canmin,  dev.dev_canmer AS dev_canmer, dev.dev_ptotal AS dev_ptotal " & _
                "FROM  b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro, a_unidad uni " & _
                "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND  tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc AND  dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                "AND   pro.pro_coduni = uni.uni_codigo AND  tov.tov_rutcli = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                "AND   dev.dev_numdoc = " & RS1!tov_numdoc & " AND tov.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' AND tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                "AND  (dev.dev_coding = '' OR (dev.dev_coding) IS NULL) ORDER BY sec_orden, dev.dev_numlin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
       RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT rec.rec_codigo, rec.rec_nombre, sec.sec_codigo, sec.sec_orden, sec.sec_nombre, mid.mid_numrac " & _
                "FROM b_minuta mi, b_minutadet mid, b_receta rec, b_recetadet red, a_servicio ser, a_estservicio ess, a_sector sec " & _
                "WHERE rec.rec_codigo = mid.mid_codrec AND rec.rec_codigo = red.red_codigo AND red.red_tiprec = mid.mid_tiprec AND ((red.red_tiprec <> 0 AND red.red_cencos = '" & cencos & "') OR (red.red_tiprec = 0 AND red.red_cencos = '0')) " & _
                "AND   mi.min_codigo = mid.mid_codigo AND mi.min_codser = ser.ser_codigo AND mi.min_codser = " & RS1!ser_codigo & " AND mi.min_cencos = ess.ess_cencos AND mid.mid_estser = ess.ess_codigo AND ess.ess_codsec = sec.sec_codigo " & _
                "AND   mi.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND mi.min_codreg = " & RS1!reg_codigo & " AND mi.min_fecmin = " & Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd") & " AND mid.mid_tipmin = '2' AND mid.mid_numrac > 0 AND red.red_canpro > 0 " & _
                "ORDER BY sec.sec_orden", vg_db, adOpenForwardOnly
       auxfec = "": auxreg = 0: auxser = 0: totrec = 0: nomrec = "": nomsec = "": gtosec = 0: totdia = 0
       i = 1: j = 1: totsec = 0
       If Not RS2.EOF Then
          Do While Not RS2.EOF
             If auxreg <> RS1!reg_codigo Or auxser <> RS1!ser_codigo Or auxfec <> RS1!tov_fecpro Then
                '-------> Si cambia de regimen, servicio o fecha salto de pagina
                If estpag Then .NewPage
                estpag = True
                    
                .StartTable
                .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
                .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
                .TableCell(tcFontSize, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcForeColor, 2) = &H4080&
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Costos Detalle Período Realizado"
                .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = ""
                .TableBorder = tbNone
                .EndTable
                .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
                    
                .StartTable
                .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 4200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 3) = True
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Folio"
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS1!tov_numdoc
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Contrato"
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = Trim(cencos) & " - " & MuestraCasino(2)
                .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "F. Emisión"
                .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = RS1!tov_fecemi
                .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Bodega"
                .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = vg_codbod
                .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "F. Producción"
                .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = RS1!tov_fecpro
                .TableCell(tcText, 3, 3) = "Servicios"
                .TableCell(tcText, 3, 4) = Trim(RS1!reg_nombre) & " - " & Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)
'                .TableCell(tcText, 4, 3) = "Rac. Efectivas"
                .TableCell(tcText, 4, 3) = "Rac. Producidas"
                .TableCell(tcText, 4, 4) = numrac
                
                .TableBorder = tbBoxRows
                rutcli = Trim(cencos)
                NumDoc = RS1!tov_numdoc
                .TableBorder = tbNone
                .EndTable
                .FontSize = 7
                    
                .StartTable
                .TableCell(tcCols) = 6: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "UN"
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Costo Unit."
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Cantidad"
                .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Costo Total"
                .TableBorder = tbBox
                .EndTable
                    
                .StartTable
                .TableCell(tcCols) = 6: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1000
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
                auxreg = RS1!reg_codigo
                auxser = RS1!ser_codigo
                auxfec = RS1!tov_fecpro
                i = 1
             End If
                 
             If codsac <> RS2!sec_codigo Then
                If i > 1 Then
                   .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 3) = 3
                   .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 3) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = nomsec
                   .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 6) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 6) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(totsec, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
                   i = i + 1
                   .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 3) = 3
                   .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 3) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "Costo x Sector"
                   .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 6) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 6) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
                   If numrac > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format((totsec / numrac), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)): j = i: totsec = 0
                   i = i + 1
                   '-------> Imprimir linea separación estructura servicio
                   .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 6
                   .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Space(240)
                   .TableCell(tcFontUnderline, i, 1) = True
                   i = i + 1
                End If
                    
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True
                .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 1) = 8: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = IIf(RS2!sec_codigo = -1, "", RS2!sec_codigo)
                .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 2) = 8: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!sec_nombre)
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = ""
                .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = ""
                i = i + 1
                codsac = RS2!sec_codigo
                nomsec = Trim(RS2!sec_nombre)
                coding = ""
                If Not RS3.EOF Then
                   Do While Not RS3.EOF
                      If RS3!sec_codigo = RS2!sec_codigo Then
                         .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 2) = 6
                         .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = "(" & Trim(RS3!rec_codigo) & ") " & Trim(RS3!rec_nombre) '& " [Nº.Rac. " & RS3!mid_numrac & "]"
                         i = i + 1
                      End If
                      RS3.MoveNext
                   Loop
                   RS3.MoveFirst
                End If
             End If
             '-------> Producto
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS2!pro_codigo)
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS2!pro_nombre)
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Trim(RS2!uni_nomcor)
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(RS2!dev_predoc, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS2!dev_canmer, fg_Pict(9, vg_DCa))
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(RS2!dev_ptotal, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
             If RS2!dev_canmer <> 0 Then totsec = (totsec + RS2!dev_ptotal): totdia = (totdia + RS2!dev_ptotal)
             RS2.MoveNext: i = i + 1
             .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = ""
          Loop
          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 3) = 3
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 3) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = nomsec
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 6) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 6) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(totsec, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
          i = i + 1
          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 3) = 3
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 3) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "Costo x Sector"
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 6) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 6) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
          If numrac > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format((totsec / numrac), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)): j = i: totsec = 0
          
          '-------> Imprimir total día y costo día
          i = i + 2
          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 3) = 3
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 3) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "Total Día"
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 6) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 6) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(totdia, fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr))
          i = i + 1
          .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 3) = 3
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 3) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = "Costo Día"
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, i, 6) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 6) = True: .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = ""
          If numrac > 0 Then .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format((totdia / numrac), fg_Pict(9, vg_DPr)): j = i: totsec = 0
          .TableCell(tcRows) = i
          .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
          .TableBorder = tbNone '= tbBottom
          .EndTable
       End If
       RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
       RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
       
       RS1.MoveNext: i = 1
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga
Exit Function
Error_CostoPeriodoRealizado:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_ComparativodeRaciones(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, X As Long, z As Long, y As Long, inddia As Long, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long, nomreg As String, nomser As String, numreg As Long, numser As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_ComparativodeRaciones
fg_carga ""
mgstitulo = "Informe de Comparativo de Raciones"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 5.5
    LogoEmp
    inddia = 0
    Dim vecdia As Variant, Fecha As Date
    numreg = 0
    RS1.Open "SELECT COUNT(*) AS nreg FROM a_regimen WHERE reg_codigo IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ")", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then numreg = IIf(IsNull(RS1!nreg), 0, Trim(RS1!nreg))
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    numser = 0
    RS1.Open "SELECT COUNT(*) AS nreg FROM a_servicio WHERE ser_codigo IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ")", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then numser = IIf(IsNull(RS1!nreg), 0, Trim(RS1!nreg))
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    Fecha = fg_Ctod1(fecini)
    Do While Fecha <= fg_Ctod1(fecfin)
       inddia = inddia + 1
       Fecha = Fecha + 1
    Loop
    ReDim vecdia((numreg * numser) * inddia, 9)
    Fecha = fg_Ctod1(fecini)
    For i = 1 To UBound(vecdia)
        vecdia(i, 1) = 0 '------> Fecha
        vecdia(i, 2) = 0 '-------> código regimen
        vecdia(i, 3) = 0 '-------> código servicio
        vecdia(i, 4) = 0 '-------> Raciones planificación teórica
        vecdia(i, 5) = 0 '-------> Raciones planificación real
        vecdia(i, 6) = 0 '-------> Raciones producidas
        vecdia(i, 7) = 0 '-------> Raciones control Venta
        vecdia(i, 8) = 0 '-------> raciones Mermas
        vecdia(i, 9) = 0 '-------> raciones Personal
    Next i
    '-------> Mover raciones teórica - real
    RS1.Open "SELECT min_codreg, min_codser, min_fecmin, SUM(min_racteo) AS racteo, SUM(min_racrea) AS racrea " & _
             "FROM b_minuta " & _
             "WHERE min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "GROUP BY min_codreg, min_codser, min_fecmin ORDER BY min_codreg, min_codser, min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          For i = 1 To UBound(vecdia)
              If vecdia(i, 1) = fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin) And vecdia(i, 2) = RS1!min_codreg And vecdia(i, 3) = RS1!min_codser Then
                 vecdia(i, 4) = vecdia(i, 4) + RS1!racteo
                 vecdia(i, 5) = vecdia(i, 5) + RS1!racrea
                 Exit For
              ElseIf vecdia(i, 1) = 0 And vecdia(i, 2) = 0 And vecdia(i, 3) = 0 Then
                 vecdia(i, 1) = fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin)
                 vecdia(i, 2) = RS1!min_codreg
                 vecdia(i, 3) = RS1!min_codser
                 vecdia(i, 4) = RS1!racteo
                 vecdia(i, 5) = RS1!racrea
                 Exit For
              End If
          Next i
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Mover raciones mermas
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.min_codreg, a.min_codser, a.min_fecmin, a.min_racrea, SUM(b.mid_nummer) AS mid_nummer, SUM((b.mid_cosrec + b.mid_cosdes) * b.mid_nummer) AS cosmer, SUM((b.mid_cosrec + b.mid_cosdes) * b.mid_numrac) AS cosrea " & _
             "FROM b_minuta a, b_minutadet b " & _
             "WHERE a.min_codigo = b.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   a.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   a.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   a.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   a.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   a.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   b.mid_tipmin IN ('2') GROUP BY a.min_codreg, a.min_codser, a.min_fecmin, a.min_racrea ORDER BY a.min_codreg, a.min_codser, a.min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          For i = 1 To UBound(vecdia)
              If vecdia(i, 1) = fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin) And vecdia(i, 2) = RS1!min_codreg And vecdia(i, 3) = RS1!min_codser Then
                 vecdia(i, 8) = vecdia(i, 8) + 0
                 If RS1!min_racrea > 0 And RS1!cosrea > 0 Then
                    vecdia(i, 8) = vecdia(i, 8) + Round(RS1!cosmer / (RS1!cosrea / RS1!min_racrea), 0)
                 End If
                 Exit For
              ElseIf vecdia(i, 1) = 0 And vecdia(i, 2) = 0 And vecdia(i, 3) = 0 Then
                 vecdia(i, 1) = fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin)
                 vecdia(i, 2) = RS1!min_codreg
                 vecdia(i, 3) = RS1!min_codser
                 vecdia(i, 8) = 0
                 If RS1!min_racrea > 0 And RS1!cosrea > 0 Then
                    vecdia(i, 8) = Round(RS1!cosmer / (RS1!cosrea / RS1!min_racrea), 0)
                 End If
                 Exit For
              End If
          Next i
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    '-------> Mover raciones producidas - control ventas
'             "AND   mir_rutcli NOT IN ('PERSONAL') "

    RS1.Open "SELECT mir_codreg, mir_codser, mir_fecmin, mir_rutcli, SUM(mir_nrorac) AS mir_nrorac " & _
             "FROM b_minutaraciones " & _
             "WHERE mir_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   mir_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   mir_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   mir_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   mir_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "GROUP BY mir_codreg, mir_codser, mir_fecmin, mir_rutcli ORDER BY mir_codreg, mir_codser, mir_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       Do While Not RS1.EOF
          For i = 1 To UBound(vecdia)
              If vecdia(i, 1) = fg_Ctod1(RS1!mir_fecmin) And vecdia(i, 2) = RS1!mir_codreg And vecdia(i, 3) = RS1!mir_codser Then
                 vecdia(i, IIf(RS1!MIR_RUTCLI = "PRODUCIDAS", 6, IIf(RS1!MIR_RUTCLI = "PERSONAL", 9, 7))) = vecdia(i, IIf(RS1!MIR_RUTCLI = "PRODUCIDAS", 6, IIf(RS1!MIR_RUTCLI = "PERSONAL", 9, 7))) + RS1!mir_nrorac
                 Exit For
              ElseIf vecdia(i, 1) = 0 And vecdia(i, 2) = 0 And vecdia(i, 3) = 0 Then
                 vecdia(i, 1) = fg_Ctod1(RS1!mir_fecmin)
                 vecdia(i, 2) = RS1!mir_codreg
                 vecdia(i, 3) = RS1!mir_codser
                 vecdia(i, IIf(RS1!MIR_RUTCLI = "PRODUCIDAS", 8, IIf(RS1!MIR_RUTCLI = "PERSONAL", 9, 7))) = RS1!mir_nrorac
                 Exit For
              End If
          Next i
          RS1.MoveNext
       Loop
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    '-------> Imprimir línea detalle
    Dim opimp As Boolean
    auxreg = 0: auxser = 0: opimp = False
    For i = 1 To UBound(vecdia)
        If (vecdia(i, 2) <> 0 And vecdia(i, 2) <> auxreg) Or (vecdia(i, 3) <> 0 And vecdia(i, 3) <> auxser) Then
           If auxreg > 0 Then
              .TableCell(tcRows) = j
              .TableBorder = tbNone
              .EndTable
              .NewPage
           End If
           '-------> Imprimir encabezado
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Comparativo de Raciones"
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
           .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
           '-------> Imprimir regimen
           nomreg = ""
           RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM a_regimen WHERE reg_codigo=" & vecdia(i, 2) & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
           If Not RS1.EOF Then nomreg = IIf(IsNull(RS1!reg_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!reg_nombre))
           RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
           '-------> Imprimir servicio
           nomser = ""
           RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM a_servicio WHERE ser_codigo=" & vecdia(i, 3) & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
           If Not RS1.EOF Then nomser = IIf(IsNull(RS1!ser_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!ser_nombre))
           RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
           
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 8500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftMiddle
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 8500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftMiddle
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1, 4, 4) = 8: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 1) = True: .TableCell(tcFontBold, , 2) = False
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato": .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = MuestraCasino(1) & " - " & MuestraCasino(2)
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen": .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = vecdia(i, 2) & " - " & nomreg
           .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Servicio": .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = vecdia(i, 3) & " - " & nomser
           .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) = "Periodo": .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2) = fg_Ctod1(fecini) & " - " & fg_Ctod1(fecfin)
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
           .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
           
           .FontSize = 5.5
           '-------> Mover datos auxiliares de regimen y servicio
           auxreg = vecdia(i, 2)
           auxser = vecdia(i, 3)
           '-------> Traer cantidad de columna
           y = 0
           For z = i To UBound(vecdia)
               If vecdia(z, 2) > 0 And vecdia(z, 2) = auxreg And vecdia(z, 3) = auxser Then
                  y = y + 1
               Else
                  Exit For
               End If
           Next z
           '-------> Imprimir columna detalle
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = y + 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
           X = 2
           For z = i To UBound(vecdia)
               If vecdia(z, 2) > 0 And vecdia(z, 2) = auxreg And vecdia(z, 3) = auxser Then
                  .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 450: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taRightTop
                  .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = fg_Fecha_Dia1(Format(vecdia(z, 1), "yyyymmdd"), 1)
                  X = X + 1
               Else
                  Exit For
               End If
           Next z
           .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
           .TableBorder = tbBox
           .EndTable

           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = y + 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 6
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Plan. Teó."
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Plan. Rea."
           .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Producidas"
           .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) = "Ctrl. Venta"
           .TableCell(tcText, 5, 1) = "Rac. no Ven."
           .TableCell(tcText, 6, 1) = "Personal Sodexo"
           X = 2
           j = 1
        End If
        If vecdia(i, 2) > 0 Then
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 450: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = IIf(IsNull(vecdia(i, 4)), 0, vecdia(i, 4))
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, X) = IIf(IsNull(vecdia(i, 5)), 0, vecdia(i, 5))
           .TableCell(tcText, 3, X) = IIf(IsNull(vecdia(i, 6)), 0, vecdia(i, 6))
           .TableCell(tcText, 4, X) = IIf(IsNull(vecdia(i, 7)), 0, vecdia(i, 7))
           .TableCell(tcText, 5, X) = IIf(IsNull(vecdia(i, 8)), 0, vecdia(i, 8))
           .TableCell(tcText, 6, X) = IIf(IsNull(vecdia(i, 8)), 0, vecdia(i, 9))
           X = X + 1: j = j + 1
           opimp = True
        End If
    Next i
    If opimp Then
       .TableCell(tcRows) = j
       .TableBorder = tbNone
       .EndTable
    End If
    .EndDoc
    vg_fecini = 0: vg_fecfin = 0
    vg_codservicio = 0
    vg_codregimen = 0
    If numreg = 1 And numser = 1 Then vg_codregimen = Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1): vg_codservicio = Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1): vg_fecini = fecini: vg_fecfin = fecfin
    Preview.Toolbar1.Buttons(4).Visible = IIf(numreg = 1 And numser = 1 And opimp, True, False)
    Preview.Toolbar1.Buttons(5).Visible = False
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_ComparativodeRaciones:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_CostoTeoricoNegociado(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String, opinf As Integer, opinc As Boolean, opcosto As Integer, numreg As Long, numser As Long)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxfec As Long, auxfecrac As Long, ancpag As Long, fecesf As Long
Dim nomser As String, cLin As String, nomtit As String, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, estfij As Boolean, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long, anomes As String
Dim vCosFij As Double, vCFijNeg As Double
Dim racteo As Double, totteo As Double, totneg As Double, totdes As Double, vputeo As Double, vpuneg As Double
Dim aAp As String, aAp1 As String, aAp2 As String, aAp3 As String, aAp4 As String, aAp5 As String
Dim vec_cosmin() As Variant
On Local Error GoTo Error_CostoTeoricoNegociado
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Costo Plan. Teórico - Negociado"
nomtit = "Costo Plan. Teorico - Negociado " & IIf(opcosto = 2, "(Alimentación & Desechable) ", IIf(opcosto = 0, "(Alimentación) ", "(Desechable) "))
ancpag = 13500
If opinf = 0 Then
   If opcosto = 0 Then
      nomtit = "Costo Plan. Teórico & Negociado (Alimentación) "
   ElseIf opcosto = 1 Then
      nomtit = "Costo Plan. Teórico & Negociado (Desechable) "
   End If
End If
sql1 = IIf(opcosto = 0, "c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') ", IIf(opcosto = 1, "c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "') ", "(c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','") & "') OR c.pro_ctacon in ('" & fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','") & "')) "))
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = True
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    numreg = (numser * 31)
    ReDim vec_cosmin(numser * 31, 15)
    For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
        vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 '-------> Fecha ddmmyyyy
        vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 '-------> Código regimen
        vec_cosmin(i, 3) = "" '-------> Nombre regimen
        vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 '-------> Código servicio
        vec_cosmin(i, 5) = "" '-------> Nombre servicio
        vec_cosmin(i, 6) = 0 '-------> Raciones teorica
        vec_cosmin(i, 7) = 0 '-------> Monto teorico
        vec_cosmin(i, 8) = 0 '-------> Monto negociado
        vec_cosmin(i, 9) = 0 '-------> Identifica si viene solamente estructura fija
    Next i
    '-------> Insert tabla productospmpdia
    anomes = Mid(fecini, 1, 4) & Mid(fecini, 5, 2)
    If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
       aAp1 = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ProductoPMPCosTeoNego"
       fg_CheckTmp aAp1
       vg_db.Execute "SELECT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, 0 AS ppd_propon, Max(ppd_fecdia) AS ppd_fecdia " & _
                     "INTO " & aAp1 & " " & _
                     "FROM b_productospmpdia " & _
                     "WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                     "AND   ppd_fecdia >= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_fecdia <= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia), "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                     "AND   ppd_propon > 0 " & _
                     "GROUP BY ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro"
       vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp1 & " ADD Constraint pmp_pk Primary Key (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_fecdia)"
       vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp1 & " INNER JOIN b_productospmpdia ON (" & aAp1 & ".ppd_fecdia = b_productospmpdia.ppd_fecdia) AND (" & aAp1 & ".ppd_codpro = b_productospmpdia.ppd_codpro) AND (" & aAp1 & ".ppd_cencos = b_productospmpdia.ppd_cencos) SET " & aAp1 & ".ppd_propon=b_productospmpdia.ppd_propon"
       vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp1 & " (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia) SELECT DISTINCT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_codpro NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_codpro FROM " & aAp1 & ")"
    End If
    DoEvents
    aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ServicioNoPlanNego"
    fg_CheckTmp aAp
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT ser_codigo AS codser, 0 AS eximin INTO " & aAp & " FROM a_servicio", vg_db, adOpenForwardOnly
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp & " ADD Constraint a_servicio_pk Primary Key (codser)"
    DoEvents
    '-------> Traer precio negociado
    aAp2 = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_CostoIngrNegociado"
    fg_CheckTmp aAp2
    vg_db.Execute "SELECT DISTINCT e.ing_codigo, Round(AVG((c.lps_precio)/i.pro_facing), 2) AS ing_precos " & _
                  "INTO " & aAp2 & " " & _
                  "FROM  b_productosing h, b_productos i, b_ingrediente e, b_contlistpreing f, b_formatocompras a, b_formatocomprassgp b, b_sac_listaprecio c " & _
                  "WHERE a.foc_codsac = b.fcs_codsac " & _
                  "AND   a.foc_codsac = c.lps_codsac " & _
                  "AND   f.cpi_coding = e.ing_codigo " & _
                  "AND   f.cpi_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                  "AND   e.ing_codigo = h.pri_coding " & _
                  "AND   h.pri_codpro = i.pro_codigo " & _
                  "AND   i.pro_codigo = b.fcs_codsgp " & _
                  "AND   c.lps_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                  "AND   c.lps_periodo = '" & anomes & "' " & _
                  "AND   c.lps_precio > 0 AND i.pro_ctrsto = 1 GROUP BY e.ing_codigo HAVING MIN(c.lps_precio)>0"
   DoEvents
   '-------> tabla temporal costo alimentación negociado
   aAp5 = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_RecetaNegociado"
   fg_CheckTmp aAp5
   vg_db.Execute "SELECT DISTINCT d.mid_codrec, d.mid_tiprec " & _
                 "INTO " & aAp5 & " " & _
                 "FROM b_recetadet a, b_minuta c, b_minutadet d " & _
                 "WHERE c.min_codigo = d.mid_codigo " & _
                 "AND   d.mid_codrec = a.red_codigo " & _
                 "AND   d.mid_tiprec = a.red_tiprec " & _
                 "AND   c.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                 "AND   c.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                 "AND   c.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                 "AND   c.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
                 "AND   c.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                 "AND   d.mid_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ") " & _
                 "GROUP BY d.mid_codrec, d.mid_tiprec"
    DoEvents
   
    If opcosto = 0 Or opcosto = 2 Then
       '-------> tabla temporal costo alimentación negociado
       aAp3 = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_CostoRecNegociadoAli"
       fg_CheckTmp aAp3
       sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " IIf(c.mid_tiprec = 0, '0', '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') ", " CASE WHEN c.mid_tiprec = 0 THEN  '0' ELSE  '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' END ")
       vg_db.Execute "SELECT DISTINCT c.mid_codrec, c.mid_tiprec, SUM(a.red_canpro*b.ing_precos) AS cosali " & _
                     "INTO " & aAp3 & " " & _
                     "FROM b_recetadet a, " & aAp2 & " b, " & aAp5 & " c, b_contlistpreing e, b_productos f " & _
                     "WHERE c.mid_codrec = a.red_codigo " & _
                     "AND   c.mid_tiprec = a.red_tiprec " & _
                     "AND   a.red_codpro = b.ing_codigo " & _
                     "AND   a.red_codpro = e.cpi_coding " & _
                     "AND   e.cpi_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                     "AND  (f.pro_codigo = e.cpi_codcom) " & _
                     "AND   f.pro_ctacon = '" & (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctainsumo"), ";", "','")) & "' " & _
                     "AND   a.red_cencos = " & sql2 & " " & _
                     "GROUP BY c.mid_codrec, c.mid_tiprec"
    End If
    DoEvents
    If opcosto = 1 Or opcosto = 2 Then
       '-------> tabla temporal costo desechables negociado
       aAp4 = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_CostoRecNegociadoDes"
       fg_CheckTmp aAp4
       sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " IIf(c.mid_tiprec = 0, '0', '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') ", " CASE WHEN c.mid_tiprec = 0 THEN '0' ELSE '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' END ")
       vg_db.Execute "SELECT DISTINCT c.mid_codrec, c.mid_tiprec, SUM(a.red_canpro*b.ing_precos) AS cosdes " & _
                     "INTO " & aAp4 & " " & _
                     "FROM b_recetadet a, " & aAp2 & " b, " & aAp5 & " c, b_contlistpreing e, b_productos f " & _
                     "WHERE c.mid_codrec = a.red_codigo " & _
                     "AND   c.mid_tiprec = a.red_tiprec " & _
                     "AND   a.red_codpro = b.ing_codigo " & _
                     "AND   a.red_codpro = e.cpi_coding " & _
                     "AND   e.cpi_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                     "AND  (f.pro_codigo = e.cpi_codcom) " & _
                     "AND   f.pro_ctacon = '" & (fg_CambiaChar(GetParametro("ctalimdes"), ";", "','")) & "' " & _
                     "AND   a.red_cencos = " & sql2 & " " & _
                     "GROUP BY c.mid_codrec, c.mid_tiprec"
    End If
    '-------> Mover costo planificación teorica
    RS1.Open "SELECT b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, c.mid_tipmin, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo, isnull(b.min_racteo,0) as min_racteo, isnull(b.min_racrea,0) as min_racrea, " & _
             "ROUND(SUM(c.mid_cosrec*c.mid_numrac),2) AS mid_cosrec, ROUND(SUM(c.mid_cosdes*c.mid_numrac),2) AS mid_cosdes FROM b_minuta b, b_minutadet c " & _
             "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   c.mid_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ") " & _
             "GROUP BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, c.mid_tipmin, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo, b.min_racteo, b.min_racrea " & _
             "ORDER BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, b.min_fecmin, c.mid_tipmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then Close #1: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Exit Function
    auxreg = 0: auxser = 0: estfij = False
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       DoEvents
       If RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
          '-------> Traer estructura fija
          estfij = False
          RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT mfd_cencos FROM b_minutafijadia " & _
                   "WHERE mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   mfd_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   mfd_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   mfd_fecha >= " & fecini & " AND mfd_fecha <= " & fecfin & " AND mfd_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ")", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS2.EOF Then estfij = True
          RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
           
          '-------> Buscar fecha estructura fija
          fecesf = 0
          If Not estfij Then
             RS2.Open "SELECT MAX(mif_fecval) AS fecval FROM b_minutafija " & _
                      "WHERE mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
             If Not RS2.EOF Then fecesf = IIf(IsNull(RS2!fecval), 0, RS2!fecval)
             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
          End If
          auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
          auxser = RS1!min_codser
       End If
       
       vCosFij = 0: vCFijNeg = 0
       If estfij Then
          '-------> Calcular datos desde tabla estructura fija día
          RS3.Open "SELECT SUM(a.mfd_canpro*a.mfd_cospro) AS cosfij " & _
                   "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos c " & _
                   "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = c.pro_codigo " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_fecha = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " AND a.mfd_tipmin = '" & RS1!mid_tipmin & "' " & _
                   "AND   " & sql1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS3.EOF And Not IsNull(RS3!cosfij) Then vCosFij = RS3!cosfij
          RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
          '-------> Calcular datos desde estructura fija día con precios negociados
'          RS3.Open "SELECT SUM(a.mfd_canpro*e.lps_precio) AS cosfij " & _
'                   "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos c, b_formatocompras b, b_formatocomprassgp d, b_sac_listaprecio e " & _
'                   "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = c.pro_codigo " & _
'                   "AND   c.pro_codigo = d.fcs_codsgp " & _
'                   "AND   b.foc_codsac = e.lps_codsac " & _
'                   "AND   a.mfd_cencos = e.lps_cencos " & _
'                   "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
'                   "AND   a.mfd_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
'                   "AND   a.mfd_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
'                   "AND   a.mfd_fecha = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " " & _
'                   "AND   a.mfd_tipmin = '" & RS1!mid_tipmin & "' " & _
'                   "AND   format(e.lps_fecini, 'mm/yyyy') = format('" & fg_Ctod1(fecini) & "', 'mm/yyyy') " & _
'                   "AND   format(e.lps_fecfin, 'mm/yyyy') = format('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "', 'mm/yyyy') " & _
'                   "AND   " & sql1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          
          RS3.Open "SELECT SUM(a.mfd_canpro*e.lps_precio) AS cosfij " & _
                   "FROM b_minutafijadia a, b_productos c, b_formatocompras b, b_formatocomprassgp d, b_sac_listaprecio e " & _
                   "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = c.pro_codigo " & _
                   "AND   c.pro_codigo = d.fcs_codsgp " & _
                   "AND   b.foc_codsac = d.fcs_codsac " & _
                   "AND   b.foc_codsac = e.lps_codsac " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_cencos = e.lps_cencos " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_fecha = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " " & _
                   "AND   a.mfd_tipmin = '" & RS1!mid_tipmin & "' " & _
                   "AND   e.lps_periodo = '" & anomes & "' " & _
                   "AND   " & sql1 & "  HAVING MIN(e.lps_precio)>0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS3.EOF And Not IsNull(RS3!cosfij) Then vCFijNeg = RS3!cosfij
          RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
       ElseIf Not estfij And fecesf > 0 Then
          '-------> Calcular datos desde tabla estructura fija
          If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
             RS3.Open "SELECT SUM(b.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro) AS cosfij " & _
                      "FROM  b_minutafija a, " & aAp1 & " b, b_productos c " & _
                      "WHERE a.mif_codpro = c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo = b.ppd_codpro AND b.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_fecval = " & fecesf & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_dianro = " & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                      "AND   " & sql1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          Else
             RS3.Open "SELECT SUM(b.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro) AS cosfij " & _
                      "FROM  b_minutafija a, b_productospmpdia b, b_productos c " & _
                      "WHERE a.mif_codpro = c.pro_codigo AND c.pro_codigo = b.ppd_codpro AND b.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND b.ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_fecval = " & fecesf & " " & _
                      "AND   a.mif_dianro = " & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                      "AND   " & sql1 & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          End If
          If Not RS3.EOF And Not IsNull(RS3!cosfij) Then vCosFij = RS3!cosfij
          RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
          '-------> Calcular datos desde estructura fija día con precios negociados
          RS3.Open "SELECT SUM(b.ppd_propon*a.mif_canpro) AS cosfij " & _
                   "FROM  b_minutafija a, " & aAp1 & " b, b_productos c, b_formatocompras b, b_formatocomprassgp d, b_sac_listaprecio e " & _
                   "WHERE a.mif_codpro = c.pro_codigo " & _
                   "AND   c.pro_codigo = d.fcs_codsgp " & _
                   "AND   b.foc_codsac = e.lps_codsac " & _
                   "AND   a.mif_cencos = e.lps_cencos " & _
                   "AND   a.mif_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                   "AND   a.mif_codreg = " & RS1!min_codreg & " " & _
                   "AND   a.mif_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                   "AND   a.mif_fecval = " & fecesf & " " & _
                   "AND   a.mif_dianro = " & fg_NumDia(Trim(Left(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2), Len(fg_Fecha_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin & Right("0" & i, 2), 2)) - 2))) & " " & _
                   "AND   e.lps_periodo = '" & anomes & "' " & _
                   "AND   " & sql1 & "  HAVING MIN(e.lps_precio)", vg_db, adOpenStatic
          If Not RS3.EOF And Not IsNull(RS3!cosfij) Then vCFijNeg = RS3!cosfij
          RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
       End If
       
       For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
           DoEvents
           If vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!min_fecmin And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!min_codreg And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!min_codser Then
              vec_cosmin(i, 6) = vec_cosmin(i, 6) + IIf(RS1!mid_tipmin = "1", IIf(IsNull(RS1!min_racteo), 0, RS1!min_racteo), IIf(IsNull(RS1!min_racrea), 0, RS1!min_racrea))
              vec_cosmin(i, 7) = vec_cosmin(i, 7) + IIf(opcosto = 0, RS1!mid_cosrec, IIf(opcosto = 1, RS1!mid_cosdes, (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes))) + vCosFij
              vec_cosmin(i, 8) = vec_cosmin(i, 8) + vCFijNeg
              vec_cosmin(i, 9) = 1
              Exit For
           ElseIf vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 Then
              vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!min_fecmin
              vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!min_codreg
              vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!min_codser
              vec_cosmin(i, 6) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!min_racteo), 0, RS1!min_racteo)
              vec_cosmin(i, 7) = IIf(opcosto = 0, RS1!mid_cosrec, IIf(opcosto = 1, RS1!mid_cosdes, (RS1!mid_cosrec + RS1!mid_cosdes))) + vCosFij
              vec_cosmin(i, 8) = vCFijNeg
              vec_cosmin(i, 9) = 1
              Exit For
           End If
       Next i
       RS1.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    If opcosto = 0 Or opcosto = 2 Then
        '-------> Mover costo planificación negociada alimentación
        RS1.Open "SELECT b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, c.mid_tipmin, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo, " & _
                 "ROUND(SUM(d.cosali*c.mid_numrac),2) AS cosali " & _
                 "FROM b_minuta b, b_minutadet c, " & aAp3 & " d " & _
                 "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
                 "AND   c.mid_codrec = d.mid_codrec " & _
                 "AND   c.mid_tiprec = d.mid_tiprec " & _
                 "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                 "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                 "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                 "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
                 "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                 "AND   c.mid_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ") " & _
                 "GROUP BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, c.mid_tipmin, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo " & _
                 "ORDER BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, b.min_fecmin, c.mid_tipmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
           DoEvents
           For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
               If vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!min_fecmin And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!min_codreg And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!min_codser Then
                  vec_cosmin(i, 8) = vec_cosmin(i, 8) + RS1!cosali
                  vec_cosmin(i, 9) = 1
                  Exit For
               ElseIf vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 Then
                  vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!min_fecmin
                  vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!min_codreg
                  vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!min_codser
                  vec_cosmin(i, 8) = vec_cosmin(i, 8) + RS1!cosali
                  vec_cosmin(i, 9) = 1
                  Exit For
               End If
           Next i
           RS1.MoveNext
        Loop
        RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    End If
    If opcosto = 1 Or opcosto = 2 Then
        '-------> Mover costo planificación negociada desechable
        RS1.Open "SELECT b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, c.mid_tipmin, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo, " & _
                 "ROUND(SUM(d.cosdes*c.mid_numrac),2) AS mid_cosdes " & _
                 "FROM b_minuta b, b_minutadet c, " & aAp4 & " d " & _
                 "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
                 "AND   c.mid_codrec = d.mid_codrec " & _
                 "AND   c.mid_tiprec = d.mid_tiprec " & _
                 "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                 "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
                 "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                 "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
                 "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
                 "AND   c.mid_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ") " & _
                 "GROUP BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, c.mid_tipmin, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo " & _
                 "ORDER BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, b.min_fecmin, c.mid_tipmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
           DoEvents
           For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
               If vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!min_fecmin And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!min_codreg And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!min_codser Then
                  vec_cosmin(i, 8) = vec_cosmin(i, 8) + RS1!CosDes
                  vec_cosmin(i, 9) = 1
                  Exit For
               ElseIf vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 Then
                  vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!min_fecmin
                  vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!min_codreg
                  vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!min_codser
                  vec_cosmin(i, 8) = vec_cosmin(i, 8) + RS1!CosDes
                  vec_cosmin(i, 9) = 1
                  Exit For
               End If
           Next i
           RS1.MoveNext
        Loop
        RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    End If
    
'    '-------> Traer costo estructura fija que no este asociada a planificación Minutas
'    vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " INNER JOIN (b_minuta INNER JOIN b_minutadet ON b_minuta.min_codigo = b_minutadet.mid_codigo) ON " & aAp & ".codser = b_minuta.min_codser SET " & aAp & ".eximin = 1 " & _
'                  "WHERE b_minuta.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
'                  "AND   b_minuta.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
'                  "AND   b_minuta.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " AND b_minuta.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " AND b_minutadet.mid_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ")"
'
'    vg_db.Execute "DELETE " & aAp & " FROM " & aAp & " WHERE eximin=1"
'
'    RS1.Open "SELECT a.mfd_codreg, a.mfd_codser, a.mfd_tipmin, a.mfd_fecha, SUM(a.mfd_canpro*a.mfd_cospro) AS mfd_cospro " & _
'             "FROM b_minutafijadia a, " & aAp & ", b_productos c " & _
'             "WHERE a.mfd_codpro = c.pro_codigo " & _
'             "AND   a.mfd_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
'             "AND   a.mfd_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
'             "AND   a.mfd_codser IN (SELECT codser FROM " & aAp & ") " & _
'             "AND   a.mfd_fecha >= " & fecini & " " & _
'             "AND   a.mfd_fecha <= " & fecfin & " " & _
'             "AND   a.mfd_tipmin IN (" & Mid(tipmin, 1, Len(tipmin)) & ") " & _
'             "AND   " & sql1 & " " & _
'             "GROUP BY a.mfd_codreg, a.mfd_codser, a.mfd_tipmin, a.mfd_fecha " & _
'             "ORDER BY a.mfd_codreg, a.mfd_codser, a.mfd_fecha, a.mfd_tipmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
'    If Not RS1.EOF Then
'       auxreg = 0: auxser = 0: estfij = False
'       Do While Not RS1.EOF
'          For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
'              If vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!mfd_fecha And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!mfd_codreg And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!mfd_codser Then
''                 vec_cosmin(i, 11) = vec_cosmin(i, 11) + RS1!mfd_cospro
'                 vec_cosmin(i, 6) = 1
'                 vec_cosmin(i, 7) = vec_cosmin(i, 7) + IIf(opcosto = 0, RS1!mfd_cospro, IIf(opcosto = 1, RS1!mfd_cospro, (RS1!mfd_cospro + RS1!mfd_cospro)))
'                 vec_cosmin(i, 9) = 2
'                 Exit For
'              ElseIf vec_cosmin(i, 1) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 2) = 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 4) = 0 Then
'                 vec_cosmin(i, 1) = RS1!mfd_fecha
'                 vec_cosmin(i, 2) = RS1!mfd_codreg
'                 vec_cosmin(i, 4) = RS1!mfd_codser
'                 vec_cosmin(i, 6) = 1
'                 vec_cosmin(i, 7) = IIf(opcosto = 0, RS1!mfd_cospro, IIf(opcosto = 1, RS1!mfd_cospro, (RS1!mfd_cospro + RS1!mfd_cospro)))
'                 vec_cosmin(i, 9) = 2
'                 Exit For
'              End If
'          Next i
'          RS1.MoveNext
'       Loop
'    End If
'    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    '-------> Proceso de imprimir
    If vec_cosmin(1, 1) < 1 Then Close #1: Exit Function
    auxreg = 0: auxser = 0
    tgracpt = 0: tgracpr = 0: tgracre = 0: tgrcospt = 0: tgrcospr = 0: tgrcosre = 0: totdes = 0
    j = 1
    For i = 1 To UBound(vec_cosmin)
        DoEvents
        If vec_cosmin(i, 1) > 0 Then
           If vec_cosmin(i, 2) <> auxreg Or vec_cosmin(i, 4) <> auxser Then
              If auxreg > 0 Or auxser > 0 Then
                 auxreg = 0: auxser = 0
                 j = j + 2
                 '-------> Totales generales
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) = "Total"
                 totdes = 0
                 If racteo > 0 Then
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((totteo / racteo), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = Format((totneg / racteo), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    totdes = (totteo / racteo) - (totneg / racteo)
                 Else
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 End If
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = Format(racteo, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = Format(totneg, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                 .TableCell(tcText, j, 7) = Format(totdes, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                 Print #1, Chr(13) & Chr(13)
                 .TableCell(tcRows) = j
                 .TableBorder = tbNone
                 .EndTable
                 .NewPage
              End If
               
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = ancpag: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
              .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = nomtit & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
              .TableBorder = tbNone
              .EndTable
              .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
                
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 6000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Regimen"
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Servicio"
              RS1.Open "SELECT cli_codigo, cli_nombre FROM b_clientes WHERE cli_codigo = '" & cencos & "' AND cli_tipo = 0", vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS1!cli_nombre
              RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
           
              RS1.Open "SELECT reg_nombre FROM a_regimen WHERE reg_codigo = " & vec_cosmin(i, 2) & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = Trim(RS1!reg_nombre)
              RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
           
              RS1.Open "SELECT ser_nombre FROM a_servicio WHERE ser_codigo = " & vec_cosmin(i, 4) & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = Trim(RS1!ser_nombre) & IIf(vec_cosmin(i, 12) = 2, " (Solo Estructura Fija) ", "")
              RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
                
              '-------> Traer costo patron
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Costo Piso"
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = "Costo Techo"
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 3) = ""
              RS1.Open "SELECT * FROM b_costopatron WHERE cpa_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND cpa_codreg = " & vec_cosmin(i, 2) & " AND cpa_codser = " & vec_cosmin(i, 4) & " AND cpa_anomes = " & Mid(vec_cosmin(i, 1), 1, 6) & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
              If Not RS1.EOF Then
                 Do While Not RS1.EOF
                     .TableCell(tcFontBold, IIf(Trim(RS1!cpa_descripcion) = "PISO", 1, 2), 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, IIf(Trim(RS1!cpa_descripcion) = "PISO", 1, 2), 4) = "$ " & Format(IIf(IsNull(RS1!cpa_valor), 0, RS1!cpa_valor), fg_Pict(9, 2))
                     RS1.MoveNext
                  Loop
              End If
              RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
              Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
              .TableBorder = tbNone
              .EndTable
              .text = Chr(13)
               
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 3900: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taCenterTop
              .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = ""
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Planif. Teórico"
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Negociado"
              .TableBorder = tbTop
              .EndTable
              
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Costo Bandeja"
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Nro. Rac."
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Costo Total"
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Costo bandeja"
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Costo Total"
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Desviación"
              .TableBorder = tbBottom
              .EndTable
              .StartTable
              .TableCell(tcCols) = 7: .TableCell(tcRows) = 100
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
              j = 2: racteo = 0: totteo = 0: totneg = 0: totdes = 0
              auxreg = vec_cosmin(i, 2)
              auxser = vec_cosmin(i, 4)
           End If
           '-------> Mover costo teorico
           racteo = CCur(racteo + vec_cosmin(i, 6))
           totteo = CCur(totteo + vec_cosmin(i, 7))
           totneg = CCur(totneg + vec_cosmin(i, 8))
           
           .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) = Mid(vec_cosmin(i, 1), 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(vec_cosmin(i, 1), 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(vec_cosmin(i, 1), 1, 4)
           vPtUnit = 0: vPrUnit = 0
           
           vputeo = 0: vpuneg = 0
           If vec_cosmin(i, 6) > 0 Then vputeo = (vec_cosmin(i, 7) / vec_cosmin(i, 6))
           If vec_cosmin(i, 8) > 0 And vec_cosmin(i, 6) > 0 Then vpuneg = (vec_cosmin(i, 8) / vec_cosmin(i, 6))
           
           '-------> Mover teórico
           If vec_cosmin(i, 6) > 0 Then
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((vec_cosmin(i, 7) / vec_cosmin(i, 6)), fg_Pict(6, 2))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = Format((vec_cosmin(i, 8) / vec_cosmin(i, 6)), fg_Pict(6, 2))
           Else
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
              .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
           End If
           .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = Format(vec_cosmin(i, 6), fg_Pict(6, 0))
           .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = Format((vec_cosmin(i, 7)), fg_Pict(9, 2))
           .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = Format((vec_cosmin(i, 8)), fg_Pict(9, 2))
           .TableCell(tcText, j, 7) = Format((vputeo - vpuneg), fg_Pict(9, 0))
           
           j = j + 1
        End If
    Next i
    j = j + 2
    '-------> Totales generales
    totdes = 0
    .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) = "Total"
    If racteo > 0 Then
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format((totteo / racteo), fg_Pict(6, 2))
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = Format((totneg / racteo), fg_Pict(6, 2))
       totdes = (totteo / racteo) - (totneg / racteo)
    Else
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       .TableCell(tcText, j, 5) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
    End If
    .TableCell(tcText, j, 3) = Format(racteo, fg_Pict(6, 2))
    .TableCell(tcText, j, 4) = Format(totteo, fg_Pict(6, 2))
    .TableCell(tcText, j, 6) = Format(totneg, fg_Pict(6, 2))
    .TableCell(tcText, j, 7) = Format(totdes, fg_Pict(6, 0))
    .TableCell(tcRows) = j
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    
    .EndDoc: Close #1
    '-------> Borrar tablas temporales
    If Trim(aAp) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp & ""
    If Trim(aAp1) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp1 & ""
    If Trim(aAp2) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp2 & ""
    If Trim(aAp3) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp3 & ""
    If Trim(aAp4) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp4 & ""
    If Trim(aAp5) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp5 & ""
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_CostoTeoricoNegociado:
    fg_descarga
    Resume Next
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_FichaStockMichel(cForm As Form, codbod As Long, codpro As String, codtip As Long, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long)
    
    Dim auxpro As String, aAp As String, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, auxtip As Long
    Dim ppddia As Double
    Dim FecIni1 As Long
    
    FecIni1 = fecini
    
    On Local Error GoTo Error_FicStock
    
    fg_carga ""
    MsgTitulo = "Informe Movimiento Stock"
    Preview.Refresh
    With Preview.VSPrinter
        
        .Styles.Apply "Default"
        .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    '    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
        .ExportFile = vg_reporte
        .Preview = True
        .PreviewPage = 1
        .Orientation = orPortrait
        .MarginLeft = 500
        .StartDoc
        .PageBorder = 0
        .HdrFontName = "Arial"
        .HdrFontSize = 8
        .HdrFontBold = False
        .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
        .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
        ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
        LogoEmp
        .FontSize = 8
        .StartTable
        .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
        .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
        .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Informe Ficha Stock"
        .TableBorder = tbNone
        .EndTable
        .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
        fg_carga ""
        .StartTable
        .TableCell(tcCols) = 10: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
        .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
        .TableCell(tcBackColor, 2) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 230
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taRightTop
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha"
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = ""
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Tipo"
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Movimiento"
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = ""
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 3) = ""
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Número"
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 4) = "Doc."
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Cantidad"
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 5) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 5) = "Movimiento"
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 6) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Costo"
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 6) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 6) = "Movimiento"
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 6) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Total"
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 6) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 7) = "Movimiento"
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Cantidad"
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 7) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 8) = "Stock"
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 8) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = "Precio Medio"
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 8) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 9) = "Ponderado"
        .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 9) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 10) = "Total Costo"
        .TableBorder = tbBox
        .EndTable
    
    '00 Inventario inicial
    '10 Ajuste de Entrada
    '20 Proveedores Entrada
    '30 Traspaso Entrada
    '40 Prodccion Salida
    '50 Produccion Entrada
    '60 Traspaso Salida
    '70 Mermas Salida
    '80 Venta Directa Salida
    '90 Ajuste Salida
        '-------> Insert tabla productospmpdia
    auxtip = 0
        If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
           
           aAp = Trim(vg_NUsr) & "_tmp_ProductoPMPFichaStock"
           fg_CheckTmp aAp
           vg_db.Execute "SELECT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, 0 AS ppd_propon, Max(ppd_fecdia) AS ppd_fecdia " & _
                         "INTO " & aAp & " " & _
                         "FROM b_productospmpdia " & _
                         "WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                         "AND   ppd_fecdia >= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_fecdia <= " & Format(dEoM(CDate(vg_ciedia)), "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                         "AND   ppd_propon > 0 " & _
                         "GROUP BY ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro"
           vg_db.Execute "ALTER TABLE " & aAp & " ADD Constraint pmp_pk Primary Key (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_fecdia)"
           vg_db.Execute "UPDATE " & aAp & " INNER JOIN b_productospmpdia ON (" & aAp & ".ppd_fecdia = b_productospmpdia.ppd_fecdia) AND (" & aAp & ".ppd_codpro = b_productospmpdia.ppd_codpro) AND (" & aAp & ".ppd_cencos = b_productospmpdia.ppd_cencos) SET " & aAp & ".ppd_propon=b_productospmpdia.ppd_propon"
           vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO " & aAp & " (ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia) SELECT DISTINCT ppd_cencos, ppd_codpro, ppd_propon, ppd_fecdia FROM b_productospmpdia WHERE ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND ppd_codpro NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ppd_codpro FROM " & aAp & ")"
        
        End If
        
        cForm.fpayuda(1).Visible = True
        
        If RS3.State = 1 Then RS3.Close
        RS3.CursorLocation = adUseClient
        vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

        If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
           
           RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.* FROM b_productos a, " & aAp & " b, a_tiposervicio c, b_clientes d " & _
                    "WHERE (c.tis_codigo = d.cli_codtis OR a.pro_maepro < 1) " & _
                    "AND    d.cli_codigo = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                    "AND   (c.tis_codigo = a.pro_maepro OR a.pro_maepro < 1) " & _
                    "AND    a.pro_codigo = b.ppd_codpro " & _
                    "AND    b.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                    "AND   (b.ppd_codpro = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "'='') " & _
                    "AND   (a.pro_codtip = " & codtip & " OR " & codtip & " = 0) " & _
                    "AND    a.pro_ctrsto = 1 ORDER BY a.pro_codtip, a.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        Else
           
           RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.* FROM b_productos a, b_productospmpdia b, a_tiposervicio c, b_clientes d " & _
                    "WHERE (c.tis_codigo = d.cli_codtis OR a.pro_maepro < 1) " & _
                    "AND    d.cli_codigo = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                    "AND   (c.tis_codigo = a.pro_maepro OR a.pro_maepro < 1) " & _
                    "AND    a.pro_codigo = b.ppd_codpro " & _
                    "AND    b.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
                    "AND    b.ppd_fecdia >= " & Format(CDate(vg_ciedia) - 1, "yyyymmdd") & " AND b.ppd_fecdia <= " & Format(dEoM(CDate(vg_ciedia)), "yyyymmdd") & " " & _
                    "AND   (b.ppd_codpro = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "' = '') " & _
                    "AND   (a.pro_codtip = " & codtip & " OR " & codtip & " = 0) " & _
                    "AND    a.pro_ctrsto = 1 ORDER BY a.pro_codtip, a.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        End If
        
        Do While Not RS3.EOF
            
            cForm.fpayuda(1).Caption = Trim(RS3!pro_nombre)
            DoEvents
            codpro = RS3!pro_codigo
            Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = 0: Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols = 12
            
            Dim fectom As Long, fectin As Long
 '           fecini = FecIni1
            fectom = 0
            fectin = fecini
            '-------> Traer Inventario del mes anterior
            
            If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
            RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
            vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
            
            RS1.Open RutinaLectura.TomaInventario(1, vg_codbod, codpro, fecini), vg_db, adOpenStatic
            If Not RS1.EOF Then
                
                fectin = RS1!tin_fectom
                'jpaz colombia
                fecini = RS1!tin_fectom
                Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
                Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tin_fectom
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Inventario Inicial"
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = ""
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "....."
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tin_stofis
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tin_propon
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "00"
            
            End If
            RS1.Close
            Set RS1 = Nothing
            
            '-------> Fin traer inventario del mes anterior
            '-------> Traer ajuste inventario
            sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fectin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fectin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
            sql2 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " cdate('" & fg_Ctod1(fecfin) & "') ", " '" & Format(fg_Ctod1(fecfin), "yyyymmdd") & "' ")
            
            If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
            RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
            vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

            RS1.Open RutinaLectura.AjusteInventario(1, vg_codbod, codpro, fectin, fecfin), vg_db, adOpenStatic
            Do While Not RS1.EOF
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
                Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!tov_fecemi, "yyyymmdd")
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = IIf(RS1!aju_tipo = "A", "Ajuste Inventario (+)", "Ajuste Inventario (-)")
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = ""
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tov_numdoc
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_canmin
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_precos
    '            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = IIf(RS1!aju_tipo = "A", "25", "90")
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = IIf(RS1!aju_tipo = "A", "90", "90")
                RS1.MoveNext
            
            Loop
            RS1.Close
            Set RS1 = Nothing
            '-------> Fin ajuste inventario
            
            '-------> Traer Documento Proveedor
            Dim pctimp As Double, pctdes  As Double
            
            If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
            RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
            vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

            RS1.Open RutinaLectura.DocPro(1, vg_codbod, codpro, fectin, fecfin, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
            Do While Not RS1.EOF
                
                pctimp = 0
                
                If RS2.State = 1 Then RS2.Close
                RS2.CursorLocation = adUseClient
                vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

                RS2.Open RutinaLectura.DocProImp(2, RS1!dec_rutpro, RS1!dec_tipdoc, RS1!dec_numdoc, RS1!dec_numlin, RS1!pro_codigo), vg_db, adOpenStatic
                If RS2.EOF Then RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing Else pctimp = Round((RS2!imd_monimp), 0): RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
'                If RS2.EOF Then RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing Else pctimp = RS2!imd_monimp: RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
                pctdes = 0
                tanali = 0
                If RS1!dec_pctdes > 0 Then pctdes = RS1!dec_pctdes
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
                Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!toc_fecrem, "yyyymmdd")
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Entrada"
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!dec_tipdoc)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dec_numdoc
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dec_canrec
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8
                
                If RS1!dec_prefle > 0 Then
                   
                   Preview.vaSpread1.text = ((RS1!dec_prerec) - (RS1!dec_prerec * (pctdes / 100)) + (pctimp / RS1!dec_canrec)) + (RS1!dec_prefle / RS1!dec_canrec)
                
                Else
                   
                   Preview.vaSpread1.text = ((RS1!dec_prerec) - (RS1!dec_prerec * (pctdes / 100)) + (pctimp / RS1!dec_canrec))
                
                End If
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "10"
                RS1.MoveNext
            
            Loop
            RS1.Close
            Set RS1 = Nothing
