            '-------> Fin traer Documento Proveedor
            
            '-------> Traer documento traspaso entrada
            
            If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
            RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
            vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

            RS1.Open RutinaLectura.DocTraspaso(1, vg_codbod, codpro, fectin, fecfin), vg_db, adOpenStatic
            Do While Not RS1.EOF
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
                Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!tov_fecemi, "yyyymmdd")
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
                
                If RS1!tov_codser = 1 Then
                    
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Entrada"
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "20"
                
                Else
                    
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Salida"
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "60"
                
                End If
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "TR"
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tov_numdoc
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_canmer
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_precos
                RS1.MoveNext
            
            Loop
            RS1.Close
            Set RS1 = Nothing
            
            '-------> Fin traer documento traspaso entrada
            
            '-------> Traer devoluciones de entrada y salida
            
            If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
            RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
            vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

            RS1.Open "SELECT tov.tov_fecpro, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, tov.tov_numdoc, tov.tov_tipdoc, dev.dev_canmer, dev.dev_precos " & _
                     "FROM b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro " & _
                     "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                     "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc AND dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                     "AND   tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                     "AND   pro.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' AND dev.dev_mueinv = 'S' " & _
                     "AND  (tov.tov_tipdoc = 'SP' OR tov.tov_tipdoc = 'DP') " & _
                     "AND   dev.dev_canmer <> 0 AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
                     "AND   tov.tov_fecpro > " & sql1 & " " & _
                     "AND   tov.tov_fecpro <= " & sql2 & " " & _
                     "ORDER BY tov.tov_fecemi, pro.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
            Do While Not RS1.EOF
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
                Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!tov_fecpro, "yyyymmdd")
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
                
                If RS1!tov_tipdoc = "SP" Then
                    
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Salida"
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "40"
                
                Else
                    
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Entrada"
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "50"
                
                End If
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!tov_tipdoc)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tov_numdoc
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_canmer
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_precos
                RS1.MoveNext
            
            Loop
            RS1.Close
            Set RS1 = Nothing
            
            '-------> Fin traer devoluciones de entrada y salida
            
            '-------> Traer devoluciones de entrada y salida ventas especiales
            
            If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
            RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
            vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

            Set RS1 = vg_db.Execute("sgp_Sel_ListarDevVentaServiciosEspecialesStock " & vg_codbod & ", '" & codpro & "', " & sql1 & ", " & sql2 & "")
            Do While Not RS1.EOF
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
                Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!tos_Fecha_Produccion, "yyyymmdd")
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
                
                If RS1!tos_tipo_documento = "SE" Then
                    
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Salida"
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "40"
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!des_Cantidad_Mercaderia
                
                Else
                    
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Entrada"
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "50"
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!des_cantidad_Devolver
                
                End If
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!tos_tipo_documento)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tos_numero_documento
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!des_Precio_Documento
                
                RS1.MoveNext
            
            Loop
            RS1.Close
            Set RS1 = Nothing
            
            '-------> Fin traer devoluciones de entrada y salida ventas especiales
            
            '-------> Traer Ventas Cafeterias
            
            If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
            RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
            vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

            RS1.Open "SELECT tvc.tvc_fecing, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, 0 as tvc_numdoc, 'VC' as tvc_tipdoc, dvp.dvp_candig, dvp.dvp_precos " & _
                     "FROM b_totventascaf tvc, b_detventascafpro dvp, b_productos pro " & _
                     "WHERE tvc.tvc_cencos = dvp.dvp_cencos " & _
                     "AND   tvc.tvc_fecing = dvp.dvp_fecing " & _
                     "AND   dvp.dvp_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                     "AND   tvc.tvc_fecing > " & sql1 & " " & _
                     "AND   tvc.tvc_fecing <= " & sql2 & " " & _
                     "AND   tvc.tvc_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                     "AND   pro.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' AND pro.pro_ctrsto = 1 " & _
                     "AND   tvc.tvc_estado = 'C' AND dvp.dvp_candig <> 0 " & _
                     "ORDER BY tvc.tvc_fecing, pro.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
            Do While Not RS1.EOF
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
                Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!tvc_fecing, "yyyymmdd")
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
                
                If RS1!tvc_tipdoc = "VC" Then
                   
                   Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Salida"
                   Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "40"
                
                End If
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!tvc_tipdoc)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = IIf(RS1!tvc_numdoc = 0, "", RS1!tvc_numdoc)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dvp_candig
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dvp_precos
                RS1.MoveNext
            
            Loop
            RS1.Close
            Set RS1 = Nothing
            
            '-------> Fin traer Ventas Cafeterias
            
            '-------> Traer Mermas
            
            If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
            RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
            vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

            RS1.Open "SELECT tov.tov_fecemi, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, tov.tov_numdoc, tov.tov_tipdoc, dev.dev_canmer, dev.dev_precos " & _
                     "FROM  b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro " & _
                     "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                     "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc AND dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                     "AND   tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " " & _
                     "AND   pro.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' AND tov.tov_tipdoc = 'ME' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' " & _
                     "AND   tov.tov_fecemi > " & sql1 & " " & _
                     "AND   tov.tov_fecemi <= " & sql2 & " " & _
                     "ORDER BY tov.tov_fecemi, pro.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
            Do While Not RS1.EOF
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
                Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!tov_fecemi, "yyyymmdd")
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Salida"
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "70"
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!tov_tipdoc)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tov_numdoc
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_canmer
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_precos
                RS1.MoveNext
            
            Loop
            RS1.Close
            Set RS1 = Nothing
            
            '-------> Fin traer Mermas
            
            '-------> Traer ventas directas
            
            If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
            RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
            vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
            
            RS1.Open "SELECT tov.tov_fecemi, pro.pro_codigo, pro.pro_nombre, tov.tov_numdoc, tov.tov_tipdoc, dev.dev_canmer, dev.dev_precos " & _
                     "FROM  b_totventas tov, b_detventas dev, b_productos pro " & _
                     "WHERE tov.tov_rutcli = dev.dev_rutcli AND tov.tov_tipdoc = dev.dev_tipdoc " & _
                     "AND   tov.tov_numdoc = dev.dev_numdoc AND dev.dev_codmer = pro.pro_codigo " & _
                     "AND   tov.tov_codbod = " & vg_codbod & " AND pro.pro_codigo = '" & codpro & "' " & _
                     "AND  (tov.tov_tipdoc = 'FA' OR tov.tov_tipdoc = 'FE' or tov.tov_tipdoc = 'GD') AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'A' AND tov.tov_estdoc <> 'P' AND dev.dev_mueinv = 'S' " & _
                     "AND   tov.tov_fecemi > " & sql1 & " " & _
                     "AND   tov.tov_fecemi <= " & sql2 & " " & _
                     "ORDER BY tov.tov_fecemi, pro.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
            
            Do While Not RS1.EOF
                
                Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 1
                Preview.vaSpread1.Row = Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Format(RS1!tov_fecemi, "yyyymmdd")
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "Salida"
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 9: Preview.vaSpread1.text = "80"
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: Preview.vaSpread1.text = Trim(RS1!tov_tipdoc)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!tov_numdoc
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_canmer
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: Preview.vaSpread1.text = RS1!dev_precos
                RS1.MoveNext
            
            Loop
            RS1.Close
            Set RS1 = Nothing
            '-------> Fin traer ventas directas
            
            Dim SortKeys, SortKeyOrder As Variant
            SortKeys = Array(1, 2, 9, 6)
            SortKeyOrder = Array(1, 1, 1, 1)
            '-------> Sort data in first five columns and rows by column 1 and 3
            Preview.vaSpread1.Sort 1, 1, Preview.vaSpread1.MaxCols, Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows, SS_SORT_BY_ROW, SortKeys, SortKeyOrder
            Dim CosMov As Double, CanMov As Double, canbod As Double, pmp As Long, FecMov As Long, tipdoc As String
            Dim SBod As Double, SMov As Double
            
            tipdoc = ""
            FecMov = 0
            CosMov = 0
            CanMov = 0
            canbod = 0
            pmp = 0
            i = 1
            
            Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 1: Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: CanMov = Val(Preview.vaSpread1.Value)
            Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4
            If Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows > 1 Or (Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows = 1 And Trim(Preview.vaSpread1.text) <> "Inventario Inicial") Or CanMov <> 0 Then
                
                .StartTable
                .TableCell(tcCols) = 10: .TableCell(tcRows) = (Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows + 3)
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taRightTop
                .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 10) = 1100: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 10) = taRightTop
                Preview.vaSpread1.Row = 1
                .TableCell(tcFontBold, i) = True: .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 2) = 10
                
                If RS3!pro_codtip <> auxtip Then
                  
                  If auxtip > 0 Then i = i + 1
                  .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 5
                  .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = fg_BuscaenArbol(RS3!pro_codtip, "a_tipopro", "tip_codigo")
                  .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
                  i = i + 1
                  auxtip = RS3!pro_codtip
                
                End If
    
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(Preview.vaSpread1.text)
                Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(Preview.vaSpread1.text)
    
                i = i + 1
                For j = 1 To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
                    
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Row = j
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: FecMov = Val(Preview.vaSpread1.Value)
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: tipdoc = Trim(Preview.vaSpread1.text)
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: CanMov = Val(Preview.vaSpread1.Value)
                    Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: CosMov = Val(Preview.vaSpread1.Value)
                    
                    If tipdoc = "Inventario Inicial" Then
                       
                       canbod = CanMov
                       pmp = CosMov
                    
                    Else
                        
                        If tipdoc = "Entrada" Or tipdoc = "Ajuste Inventario (+)" Then
                           
                           canbod = canbod + CanMov
                        
                        ElseIf tipdoc = "Salida" Or tipdoc = "Ajuste Inventario (-)" Then
                           
                           canbod = canbod - CanMov
                        
                        End If
                        'PMP = ((canpro * IIf(canbod < 0, (canbod * -1), canbod)) + (cosmov * canmov)) / (IIf(canbod < 0, (canbod * -1), canbod) + canmov)
                        SBod = IIf(canbod < 0, 0, canbod)
                        SMov = IIf(CanMov < 0, 0, CanMov)
                        
                        If (SMov + SBod) = 0 Then
                            
                            pmp = CosMov
                        
                        Else
                            
                            pmp = ((SMov * CosMov) + (SBod * pmp)) / (SMov + SBod)
                        
                        End If
                    
                    End If
                    
                    If (FecMov >= fecini And FecMov <= fecfin) Or tipdoc = "Inventario Inicial" Then
                        
                        ppddia = 0
                        Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3
                        
                        If RS4.State = 1 Then RS4.Close
                        RS4.CursorLocation = adUseClient
                        vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient

                        RS4.Open "SELECT ppd_propon from b_productospmpdia where ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' AND ppd_codpro = '" & Preview.vaSpread1.text & "' AND ppd_fecdia = " & FecMov & "", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                        If Not RS4.EOF Then
                           
                           ppddia = RS4!ppd_propon
                        
                        End If
                        RS4.Close
                        Set RS4 = Nothing
                        
                        Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2: .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Mid(Preview.vaSpread1.text, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(Preview.vaSpread1.text, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(Preview.vaSpread1.text, 1, 4)
                        Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4: .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Preview.vaSpread1.text
                        Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 5: .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = Preview.vaSpread1.text
                        Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 6: .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Preview.vaSpread1.text
                        Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(Preview.vaSpread1.text, fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
                        Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(Preview.vaSpread1.text, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                        If ppddia = 0 Then Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 8: ppddia = Format(Preview.vaSpread1.text, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                        .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = Format(CosMov * CanMov, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                        Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 7: .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = Format(canbod, fg_Pict(6, vg_DCa))
                        .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = Format(ppddia, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                        .TableCell(tcText, i, 10) = Format((canbod * ppddia), fg_Pict(6, 0))
                        
                        i = i + 1
                        
                    End If
                    
                 Next j
'                ValidaBod 1, codpro
'                vg_db.Execute "update b_bodegas set bod_canmer=" & canbod & " where bod_codbod=" & vg_codbod & " and bod_codpro='" & codpro & "'"
                .TableCell(tcRows) = i: .TableBorder = tbNone: .EndTable
                
            End If
            RS3.MoveNext
            DoEvents
            
        Loop
        RS3.Close
        Set RS3 = Nothing
        I_FicSto.fpayuda(1).Visible = False
        fg_descarga
        .EndDoc
        '-------> Borrar tablas temporales
        If Trim(aAp) <> "" Then vg_db.Execute "DROP TABLE " & aAp & ""
    
    End With
    Preview.Show 1
    Exit Function

Error_FicStock:
        fg_descarga
        MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
        Exit Function

End Function

Public Function I_DetCarInvMichel(cForm As Form, codbod As Long, codpro As String, codtip As Long, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long)
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
Dim auxpro As String, aAp As String, sql1 As String, sql2 As String, auxtip As Long

On Local Error GoTo Error_Cartola
Tot_General = 0
Fecha_Car = Mid(fecini, 7, 2)
Fecha_Car = Fecha_Car + "/" + Mid(fecini, 5, 2)
Fecha_Car = Fecha_Car + "/" + Mid(fecini, 1, 4)
fg_carga ""
mgstitulo = "Informe Detalle Cartola de Inventario"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape 'orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Informe Detalle Cartola de Inventario"
    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Fecha Inventario:  " + Fecha_Car
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.pro_codigo, a.pro_nombre, c.uni_nomcor, a.pro_coduni, a.pro_codtip, b.ppd_codpro, " & _
             "b.ppd_saldo, b.ppd_propon, b.ppd_saldo*b.ppd_propon as total " & _
             "FROM b_productos a, b_productospmpdia b, a_unidad c " & _
             "WHERE a.pro_codigo = b.ppd_codpro " & _
             "AND   a.pro_coduni = c.uni_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.ppd_cencos = '" & MuestraCasino(1) & "' " & _
             "AND   b.ppd_fecdia = " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND  (b.ppd_codpro = '" & codpro & "' OR '" & codpro & "' = '') " & _
             "AND  (a.pro_codtip = " & codtip & " OR " & codtip & " = 0) " & _
             "AND  b.ppd_propon <> 0 AND b.ppd_saldo <> 0 ORDER BY a.pro_codtip, a.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    
    If RS1.EOF Then MsgBox "No existe información": fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 6: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código Producto"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Unidad"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Saldo"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Precio pmp"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Total"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & _
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 6: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 4800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 800: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taRightTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taRightTop
    i = 1
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            cForm.fpayuda(1).Caption = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
            DoEvents
            codpro = RS1!pro_codigo
            If RS1!pro_codtip <> auxtip Then
               If auxtip > 0 Then
                  i = i + 1
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = "Total"
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(Tot_Parcial, fg_Pict(9, 2))
                  i = i + 1
               End If
               Tot_Parcial = 0
               .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 5
               .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = fg_BuscaenArbol(RS1!pro_codtip, "a_tipopro", "tip_codigo")
               .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
               i = i + 1
               auxtip = RS1!pro_codtip
            End If
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!pro_codigo
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = RS1!pro_nombre
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = RS1!uni_nomcor
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = Format(RS1!ppd_saldo, fg_Pict(9, 2))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = Format(RS1!ppd_propon, fg_Pict(9, 2))
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(RS1!total, fg_Pict(9, 2))
            
            Tot_Parcial = Tot_Parcial + RS1!total
            Tot_General = Tot_General + RS1!total
            
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & _
                      .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6)
            RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
        Loop
    Else
    End If
    i = i + 1
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = "Total"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(Tot_Parcial, fg_Pict(9, 2))
    
    i = i + 2
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = "Total General"
    .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = Format(Tot_General, fg_Pict(9, 2))
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_Cartola:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_ProductosNoAsociadoSac()
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, sql1 As String, auxtip As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_ProductosNoAsociadoSac
fg_carga ""
mgstitulo = "Informe de Productos No Asociado Sac"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Productos No Asociado Sac"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    sql1 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " AND CDATE(a.foc_vigfin) >  cdate('" & Date & "') ", " AND convert(varchar(10), a.foc_vigfin,101) >  '" & Date & "'")
    RS1.Open "SELECT DISTINCT d.pro_codigo, d.pro_nombre, d.pro_codtip, d.pro_ctacon " & _
             "FROM   b_productos d, a_param f " & _
             "WHERE (d.pro_fecven > " & Format(Date, "yyyymmdd") & "  OR d.pro_fecven <= 0) AND ((f.par_codigo = 'ctainsumo' AND d.pro_ctacon = f.par_valor) OR (f.par_codigo = 'ctalimdes' AND d.pro_ctacon = f.par_valor)) " & _
             "AND   d.pro_codigo NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT b.fcs_codsgp FROM   b_formatocompras a, b_formatocomprassgp b " & _
             "WHERE a.foc_codsac = b.fcs_codsac " & _
             "AND   (b.fcs_sgppre = 1 or b.fcs_sgppre = 0) " & _
             "AND   (a.foc_flexec  = 0 OR (a.foc_flexec = -1  " & sql1 & "))) ORDER BY d.pro_ctacon, d.pro_codtip, d.pro_nombre", vg_db, adOpenForwardOnly
    If RS1.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 6000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1200: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 6000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    i = 1: auxtip = 0
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
        Do While Not RS1.EOF
            If RS1!pro_codtip <> auxtip Then
               If auxtip > 0 Then i = i + 1
                 .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 1) = 2
                 .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = fg_BuscaenArbol(RS1!pro_codtip, "a_tipopro", "tip_codigo")
                 .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
                 i = i + 1
                 auxtip = RS1!pro_codtip
            End If
            
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!pro_codigo)
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!pro_nombre)
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2)
            RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
        Loop
    Else
        i = i + 1
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_ProductosNoAsociadoSac:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_MenuPlanMensualServicio(cForm As Form, cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String, opnomrec As Boolean)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, X As Long, p As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxfec As Long, auxser As Long, imay As Long
Dim icol As Long, anccol As Long, xcol As Long, filmay As Long, idia As Long, diafin As Long, diaini As Long, diafan As Long
Dim essnom As Boolean, dianva As Boolean, est As Boolean, estsal As Boolean
Dim nomser As String, cLin As String, fecmin As String, sql10 As String
Dim vecdia(7) As Long, IniIncDia As Long, iServ As Integer, NumDiaSemana As Integer, MaxFil As Integer, FecAnt As Integer, NuavaTabla As Boolean, spid As Long, NumSemanaAnt As Integer
Dim RS As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim RS1 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim RS2 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim RS3 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim LineaAnte As Long, ColumnaAnt As Long, auxfec2 As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_MenuPlanMensualServicio
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Menu Mensual Servicios"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 15
    .HdrFontBold = True
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    estsal = False
    RS.Open "SELECT DISTINCT reg_codigo, reg_nombre FROM a_regimen WHERE reg_codigo IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") ", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    Do While Not RS.EOF
       If estsal Then 'salto pagina
          estsal = False
          .NewPage
       End If
        If vg_tipbase = "1" Then
           RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.min_fecmin FROM b_minuta a, b_minutadet b WHERE a.min_codigo = b.mid_codigo " & _
                    "AND a.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND a.min_codreg = " & RS!reg_codigo & " AND a.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                    "AND val(mid(a.min_fecmin,1 ,6)) = " & Val(Mid(fecini, 1, 6)) & " AND b.mid_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "' ORDER BY a.min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        Else
           RS3.Open "SELECT DISTINCT a.min_fecmin FROM b_minuta a, b_minutadet b WHERE a.min_codigo = b.mid_codigo " & _
                    "AND a.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' AND a.min_codreg = " & RS!reg_codigo & " AND a.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                    "AND convert(int,substring(convert(varchar(8),a.min_fecmin),1 ,6)) = " & Val(Mid(fecini, 1, 6)) & " AND b.mid_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "' ORDER BY a.min_fecmin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
        End If
        If Not RS3.EOF Then 'fg_descarga: RS.Close: Set RS = Nothing: RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
           estsal = True
            NuavaTabla = False
            j = 2
            .StartTable
            .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
            .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
            .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
            .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "S e t   de   M i n u t a  S e r v i c i o s"
            Print #1, vbTab & vbTab & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
                   
            'imprimir cencos
            Set RS2 = vg_db.Execute("SELECT cli_nombre FROM b_clientes WHERE cli_codigo = '" & cencos & "'")
'            If RS2.EOF Then fg_descarga: RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
            .TableCell(tcFontSize, 2) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = Trim(RS2!cli_nombre)
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1)
            RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
            'imprimir regimen
            .TableCell(tcFontSize, 3) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = Trim(RS!reg_nombre)
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1)
            'Imprimir Periodo
            .TableCell(tcFontSize, 4) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 4) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) = Format("01/" & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4), "MMM-yy")
            Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1)
            .TableBorder = tbNone
            .EndTable
            .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
            'Buscar Nº días
            imay = 0
            
            Do While Not RS3.EOF
               Select Case fg_Dia(RS3!min_fecmin)
               Case 1
                    icol = 8 '7
               Case 2
                    icol = 2 '1
               Case 3
                    icol = 3 '2
               Case 4
                    icol = 4 '3
               Case 5
                    icol = 5 '4
               Case 6
                    icol = 6 '5
               Case 7
                    icol = 7 '6
               End Select
               If icol > imay Then imay = icol
               RS3.MoveNext
            Loop
            RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
            icol = imay
            '** FIN - CANTIDAD DE COLUMNAS
                  
            Select Case icol
            Case 1
                anccol = 6800
            Case 2
                anccol = 6800
            Case 3
                anccol = 4550
            Case 4
                anccol = 3400
            Case 5
                anccol = 2650
            Case 6
                anccol = 2200
            Case 7
                anccol = 1900
            Case 8
                anccol = 1700
            End Select
                   
            vecdia(7) = 1: vecdia(1) = 2: vecdia(2) = 3: vecdia(3) = 4: vecdia(4) = 5: vecdia(5) = 6: vecdia(6) = 7
            MaxFil = 0
            ' INICIO - Informacion a procesar
            CodigosServicios = ""
            srv = 0
            For srv = 1 To cForm.vaSpread1(1).MaxRows
                cForm.vaSpread1(1).Row = srv
                cForm.vaSpread1(1).Col = 1
                If cForm.vaSpread1(1).text = "1" Then
                   cForm.vaSpread1(1).Col = 2
                   If CodigosServicios = "" Then
                      CodigosServicios = cForm.vaSpread1(1).text
                   Else
                      CodigosServicios = CodigosServicios & ", " & cForm.vaSpread1(1).text
                   End If
                End If
            Next srv
            cForm.vaSpread1(1).Col = 3
            ' FIN - Informacion a procesar
                
            Dim xxx As Long, ppp As Long, FecIni1 As Long, fecfin1 As Long
            Dim estimp As Boolean
            estimp = True
            xxx = 0
            ppp = DatePart("ww", fg_Ctod1(fecini), 2)
            FecIni1 = fecini
            For xxx = fecini To fecfin
                If xxx > Format(dEoM("01/" & Mid(FecIni1, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(FecIni1, 1, 4)), "yyyymmdd") Then
                   xxx = Format(dEoM("01/" & Mid(FecIni1, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(FecIni1, 1, 4)) + 1, "yyyymmdd")
                   FecIni1 = Format(dEoM("01/" & Mid(FecIni1, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(FecIni1, 1, 4)) + 1, "yyyymmdd")
                   estimp = True
                End If
                If DatePart("ww", fg_Ctod1(xxx), 2) <> ppp Or xxx = fecfin Then
                   ppp = DatePart("ww", fg_Ctod1(xxx), 2)
                   fecfin1 = IIf(xxx = fecfin, fecfin, xxx - 1)
    '               Set RS1 = vg_db.Execute("sgpadm_s_InformeMensualServicio " & subseg & ", " & codreg & ", '" & CodigosServicios & "', " & fecini1 & ", " & fecfin1 & ", " & Indppr & ", " & TipMin & "")
                   RS1.Open "SELECT c.mid_tipmin, c.mid_numlin, c.mid_codrec, c.mid_descri, c.mid_cosrec, " & _
                            "c.mid_cosdes, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo, a.rec_nombre, a.rec_nomfan, c.mid_numrac, " & _
                            "c.mid_estser, d.ess_nombre, b.min_codser, e.ser_nombre " & _
                            "FROM b_receta a, b_minuta b, b_minutadet c, a_estservicio d, a_servicio e " & _
                            "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
                            "AND   b.min_codser = e.ser_codigo " & _
                            "AND   c.mid_codrec = a.rec_codigo " & _
                            "AND   c.mid_estser = d.ess_codigo " & _
                            "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                            "AND   b.min_codreg = " & RS!reg_codigo & " " & _
                            "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
                            "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & FecIni1 & " " & _
                            "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin1 & " " & _
                            "AND   c.mid_tipmin  = '" & tipmin & "' " & _
                            "ORDER BY b.min_codser, b.min_fecmin, c.mid_numlin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                   auxfec = 0: auxser = 0: filmay = 0: essnom = False: XX = 1: auxfec2 = 0
                   If Not RS1.EOF Then
                   
                      .StartTable
                      .TableCell(tcCols) = icol + 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
                      .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taCenterMiddle
                      .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1400
                      fecmin = RS1!min_fecmin
                      fecaux = RS1!min_fecmin
                      est = True: dianva = False
              
                      IniIncDia = 1
                      
                      Do While est
                         If Mid(fecmin, 7, 2) <> "00" Then
                            If fg_Dia(fecmin) = 2 Then est = False: diaini = Mid(fecmin, 7, 2): Exit Do
                         End If
                         If Mid(fecmin, 7, 2) = "00" Then
                            dianva = True
                            fecmin = BoM("01/" & Mid(fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecmin, 1, 4))
                            fecmin = Mid(fecmin, 7, 4) & Mid(fecmin, 4, 2) & Mid(fecmin, 1, 2)
                         Else
                            fecmin = (fecmin - 1)
                         End If
                      Loop
                      
                      If estimp Then
                         diafin = Val(Mid(BoM("01/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)), 1, 2))
                         estimp = False
                      Else
                         diafin = Mid(dEoM("01/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)), 1, 2)
                      End If
                      diafan = Val(Mid(BoM("01/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)), 1, 2))
                      
                      For X = 1 To icol + 1
                       If X = 1 Then
                          
                          .TableCell(tcFontName) = "Arial Narrow"
                          .TableCell(tcFontSize) = 8
                          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
                          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                          .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Servicio"
                          cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) & vbTab
                          
                          
                          .TableCell(tcFontName) = "Arial Narrow"
                          .TableCell(tcFontSize) = 8
                          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
                          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X + 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X + 1) = taCenterMiddle
                          .TableCell(tcText, 1, X + 1) = "Estructura"
                          cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X + 1) & vbTab
                             
                          NuavaTabla = True
                          NumSemanaAnt = SemanaDeAño(RS1!min_fecmin)
                      
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = anccol: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                          Select Case X
                          Case 3
                                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Lunes " & fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2)
                                 If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                                 diaini = diaini + 1
                                 
                          Case 4
                                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Martes " & fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2)
                                 If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                                 diaini = diaini + 1
                          Case 5
                                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Miércoles " & fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2)
                                 If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                                 diaini = diaini + 1
                          Case 6
                                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Jueves " & fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2)
                                 If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                                 diaini = diaini + 1
                          Case 7
                                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Viernes " & fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2)
                                 If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                                 diaini = diaini + 1
                          Case 8
                                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Sábado " & fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2)
                                 If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                                 diaini = diaini + 1
                          Case 9
                                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Domingo " & fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2)
                                 If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                                 diaini = diaini + 1
                          End Select
                             
                          cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) & "|"
                          If diaini > diafin And diafin > 0 Then diaini = 1: diafan = 0: dianva = False
                       End If
                   Next X
                   Print #1, cLin
                   .TableBorder = tbAll
                   .EndTable
                   .StartTable
                   .TableCell(tcCols) = icol + 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1000
                   .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taCenterMiddle
                   .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1400
                   For X = 1 To icol + 1
                       If X = 1 Then
                          .TableCell(tcFontName) = "Arial Narrow"
                          .TableCell(tcFontSize) = 8
                          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
                          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                          .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = ""
                       Else
                          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = anccol: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                       End If
                   Next X
                   cLin = ""
                    
                   LineaAnte = 0
                   ColumnaAnt = 0
                      
                      Do While Not RS1.EOF
                         If RS1!min_codser <> auxfec Or (LineaAnte = j And DatePart("w", fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin), 2) < ColumnaAnt) And RS1!min_codser = auxfec And auxfec2 < RS1!min_fecmin Then
                            auxfec2 = RS1!min_fecmin
                            If auxfec > 0 Then
                               j = 2
                               For j = 1 To filmay
                                   cLin = ""
                                   For X = 1 To icol + 1
                                      cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, j, X) & "|"
                                   Next X
                                   Print #1, cLin
                               Next j
                               Print #1, Chr(13): Print #1, Chr(13)
                               .TableCell(tcRows) = filmay + 1: .TableBorder = tbBoxColumns: .EndTable: j = 2
                               .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): cLin = ""
                               .StartTable
                               filmay = 0
                               .TableCell(tcCols) = icol + 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
                               .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taCenterMiddle
                               .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1400
                               fecmin = RS1!min_fecmin
                               fecaux = RS1!min_fecmin
                               est = True: dianva = False
              
                               IniIncDia = 1
                      
                               Do While est
                                  If Mid(fecmin, 7, 2) <> "00" Then
                                     If fg_Dia(fecmin) = 2 Then est = False: diaini = Mid(fecmin, 7, 2): Exit Do
                                  End If
                                  If Mid(fecmin, 7, 2) = "00" Then
                                     dianva = True
                                     fecmin = BoM("01/" & Mid(fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecmin, 1, 4))
                                     fecmin = Mid(fecmin, 7, 4) & Mid(fecmin, 4, 2) & Mid(fecmin, 1, 2)
                                  Else
                                     fecmin = (fecmin - 1)
                                  End If
                               Loop
                      
                               diafin = Mid(dEoM("01/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)), 1, 2)
                               diafan = Val(Mid(BoM("01/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)), 1, 2))
                   
                               For X = 1 To icol + 1
                                   If X = 1 Then
                                    
                                      .TableCell(tcFontName) = "Arial Narrow"
                                      .TableCell(tcFontSize) = 8
                                      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
                                      .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                                        If NumSemanaAnt <> SemanaDeAño(RS1!min_fecmin) Then
                                            .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Servicio"
                                        Else
                                            .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "."
                                        End If
                                      cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) & vbTab
                                      
                                      .TableCell(tcFontName) = "Arial Narrow"
                                      .TableCell(tcFontSize) = 8
                                      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
                                      .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X + 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X + 1) = taCenterMiddle
                                        If NumSemanaAnt <> SemanaDeAño(RS1!min_fecmin) Then
                                            .TableCell(tcText, 1, X + 1) = "Estructura"
                                        Else
                                            .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "."
                                        End If
                                      cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X + 1) & vbTab
                                      
                                      NuavaTabla = True
                                      
                                   Else
                                      .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = anccol: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                                     
                                      Select Case X
                                      Case 3
                                          If NumSemanaAnt <> SemanaDeAño(RS1!min_fecmin) Then
                                            .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Lunes " & IIf(idia > diafin, "", fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2))
                                          End If
                                          If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                                          diaini = diaini + 1
                                      Case 4
                                            If NumSemanaAnt <> SemanaDeAño(RS1!min_fecmin) Then
                                                .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Martes " & IIf(idia > diafin, "", fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2))
                                            End If
                                            If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                                            diaini = diaini + 1
                                      Case 5
                                            If NumSemanaAnt <> SemanaDeAño(RS1!min_fecmin) Then
                                                .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Miércoles " & IIf(idia > diafin, "", fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2))
                                            End If
                                            If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                                            diaini = diaini + 1
                                      Case 6
                                            If NumSemanaAnt <> SemanaDeAño(RS1!min_fecmin) Then
                                                .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Jueves " & IIf(idia > diafin, "", fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2))
                                            End If
                                            If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                                            diaini = diaini + 1
                                      Case 7
                                            If NumSemanaAnt <> SemanaDeAño(RS1!min_fecmin) Then
                                                .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Viernes " & IIf(idia > diafin, "", fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2))
                                             End If
                                            If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                                            diaini = diaini + 1
                                      Case 8
                                            If NumSemanaAnt <> SemanaDeAño(RS1!min_fecmin) Then .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Sábado " & IIf(idia > diafin, "", fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2))
                                            If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                                            diaini = diaini + 1
                                      Case 9
                                            If NumSemanaAnt <> SemanaDeAño(RS1!min_fecmin) Then .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = "Domingo " & IIf(idia > diafin, "", fg_pone_cero(Str(diaini), 2))
                                            If dianva Then .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1, X) = vbScrollBars
                                            diaini = diaini + 1
                                      End Select
                                      cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) & "|"
                                      If diaini > diafin And diafin > 0 Then diaini = 1: diafan = 0: dianva = False
                                   End If
                               Next X
                               NumSemanaAnt = DatePart("ww", fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin), 2) 'SemanaDeAño(RS1!min_fecmin)
                               Print #1, cLin
                               .TableBorder = tbAll
                               .EndTable
                               .StartTable
                               .TableCell(tcCols) = icol + 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1000
                               .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taCenterMiddle
                               .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1400
                               For X = 1 To icol + 1
                                   If X = 1 Then
                                      .TableCell(tcFontName) = "Arial Narrow"
                                      .TableCell(tcFontSize) = 8
                                      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
                                      .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                                      .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = ""
                                   Else
                                      .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = anccol: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taCenterMiddle
                                   End If
                               Next X
                            End If
                            auxser = 0
                            auxfec = RS1!min_codser
                            sql10 = IIf(vg_tipbase = "1", " max(c.mid_numlin) ", " isnull(max(c.mid_numlin),1) ")
                              RS2.Open "SELECT  " & sql10 & " " & _
                                       "FROM b_receta a, b_minuta b, b_minutadet c, a_estservicio d " & _
                                       "Where b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
                                       "AND   c.mid_codrec = a.rec_codigo " & _
                                       "AND   c.mid_estser = d.ess_codigo " & _
                                       "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
                                       "AND   b.min_codreg = " & RS!reg_codigo & " " & _
                                       "AND   b.min_codser = " & RS1!min_codser & " " & _
                                       "AND   b.min_fecmin = " & RS1!min_fecmin & " " & _
                                       "AND   c.mid_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "'", vg_db, adOpenStatic
                             If Not (RS2.EOF And RS2.BOF) Then RS2.MoveFirst: MaxFil = RS2.Fields(0)
                             RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
                         End If
                         j = 1 + RS1!mid_numlin
                         LineaAnte = j
                       
                         If j > filmay Then filmay = j
                         If RS1!mid_estser <> auxser Then
                            '------- Revisar si existe una estructura fija
                            essnom = False: cLin = ""
                            For p = 1 To j
                                If .TableCell(tcText, p, 1) = Trim(RS1!ess_nombre) Then essnom = True: cLin = "": Exit For
                            Next p
                            If essnom = False Then .TableCell(tcText, j, 2) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!ess_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!ess_nombre)): cLin = .TableCell(tcText, j, 2)
                            '------- Fin revisar si existe una estructura fija
                            auxser = RS1!mid_estser
                         End If
                         
                            
        
                         For X = 2 To icol
                             If vecdia(X - 1) = fg_Dia(RS1!min_fecmin) Then
                                .TableCell(tcText, j, X + 1) = IIf(opnomrec = True, ExtraeParentesis(IIf(IsNull(RS1!rec_nomfan) = True, "", RS1!rec_nomfan)) & " " & IIf(raciones = 1, "( " & RS1!mid_numrac & " raciones)", "") & " " & IIf(Costo = 1, " - Costo uni. $ " & Format((RS1!mid_cosrec), fg_Pict(6, 2)), ""), ExtraeParentesis(IIf(IsNull(RS1!rec_nombre) = True, "", RS1!rec_nombre)) & " " & IIf(raciones = 1, "( " & RS1!mid_numrac & " raciones)", "") & " " & IIf(Costo = 1, " - Costo uni. $ " & Format((RS1!mid_cosrec), fg_Pict(6, 2)), ""))
                                ColumnaAnt = DatePart("w", fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin), 2)
                             End If
                         Next X
                            
                            
                         '** INICIO  - OBTIENE LA FILA MAXIMA DE LA TABLA
                            'Lo siguiente averigua si la existen sabados o domingos para agregar o obviar estas columnas
                             .TableCell(tcText, (MaxFil / 2) + 1, 1) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!ser_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!ser_nombre)) 'G_Proc.fg_TraerNombre("a_servicio", "ser_codigo", RS1!min_codser, "ser_nombre")
                             .TableCell(tcVertical, (MaxFil / 2) + 1, 1) = True
                         '** FIN - OBTIENE LA FILA MAXIMA DE LA TABLA
                         NumSemanaAnt = DatePart("ww", fg_Ctod1(RS1!min_fecmin), 2)
                        
                         RS1.MoveNext
                      Loop
                      j = 2
                      For j = 1 To filmay
                         cLin = ""
                          For X = 1 To icol + 1
                             cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, j, X) & "|"
                          Next X
                          Print #1, cLin
                      Next j
                      Print #1, Chr(13): Print #1, Chr(13): cLin = ""
                      .TableCell(tcRows) = filmay + 1: .TableBorder = tbBoxColumns: .EndTable
                   End If
                   RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
                   .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
                   FecIni1 = xxx
               End If
            Next xxx
        Else
           RS3.Close: Set RS3 = Nothing
        End If
        RS.MoveNext
    Loop
    RS.Close: Set RS = Nothing
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    Close #1
    .EndDoc
End With
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_MenuPlanMensualServicio:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Sub I_PuntoAtencion()
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_PuntoAtencion
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Punto Atención"
Preview.Show
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    LogoEmp
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Punto Atención"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.PuntoAtencion(2, 0, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Sub
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Nombre"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    i = 1
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = Trim(RS1!ate_codatencion)
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = Trim(RS1!ate_descripcion)
        Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2)
        RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Exit Sub
Error_PuntoAtencion:
     MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
     Close #1
     Exit Sub
End Sub

Sub I_Personas()
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_Personas
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Personas"
Preview.Show
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    LogoEmp
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Personas"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Personal(5, "", ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Sub
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 2600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Rut"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Nombre"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Rut Cliente"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Descripción Cliente"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Código Barra"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 5: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 2600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 2600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 2600: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    i = 1
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!per_rut), "", fg_PintaRut(RS1!per_rut))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!per_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!per_nombre))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_codigo), "", fg_PintaRut(RS1!cli_codigo))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!cli_nombre))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!per_codbarra), "", Trim(RS1!per_codbarra))
        Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5)
        RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Exit Sub
Error_Personas:
     MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
     Close #1
     Exit Sub
End Sub

Sub I_PtoLecturaVales(CodLecVales As Long, nommaq As String)
Dim i As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
Dim codatencion As Long
On Local Error GoTo Error_PtoLecturaVales
MsgTitulo = "Informe de Punto Lectura Vales"
Preview.Show
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    LogoEmp
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Punto Lectura Vales"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Nombre Maquina : " & Trim(nommaq)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.PtoLecturaVales(5, CodLecVales, Trim(nommaq)), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Sub
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Código Servicio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Descripción"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Código Regimen"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Descripción"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 4: .TableCell(tcRows) = 10000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 3000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    i = 1
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
        If RS1!ate_codatencion <> codatencion Then
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = RS1!ate_codatencion: .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
            .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!ate_descripcion), "", Trim(RS1!ate_descripcion)): .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
       
            .TableCell(tcColSpan, i, 2) = 4
            codatencion = RS1!ate_codatencion
            i = i + 1
        End If
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!ser_codigo), 0, RS1!ser_codigo)
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!ser_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!ser_nombre))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!reg_codigo), 0, RS1!reg_codigo)
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!reg_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!reg_nombre))
        
        Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4)
        RS1.MoveNext: i = i + 1
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable

    .EndDoc
End With
Exit Sub
Error_PtoLecturaVales:
     MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
     Close #1
     Exit Sub
End Sub

Sub I_DetalleLecturaVales(cencos As String, PtoAte As Long, codreg As Long, codser As Long, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long)
On Local Error GoTo Error_DetalleLecturaVales

Dim Fecha As String
Dim CodBarra As String
Dim ContadorCodBarra As Double
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Detalle Lectura Vales"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape '= orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    .FontSize = 7
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterMiddle
    .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 14: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Detalle Lecturas de Vales "
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 4
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Contrato"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Pto. Atencion"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = "Regimen"
    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 4, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) = "Servicio"
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Cliente(1, cencos, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = RS1!cli_codigo & " - " & Trim(RS1!cli_nombre)
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    If PtoAte < 1 Then PtoAte = -1
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.PuntoAtencion(2, PtoAte, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = RS1!ate_codatencion & " - " & Trim(RS1!ate_descripcion)
    Else
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Todos"
       If PtoAte = -1 Then PtoAte = 0
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Regimen(2, codreg, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = RS1!reg_codigo & " - " & RS1!reg_nombre
    Else
      .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2) = "Todos"
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    RS1.Open RutinaLectura.Servicio(8, codser, ""), vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If Not RS1.EOF Then
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 4, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2) = RS1!ser_codigo & " - " & RS1!ser_nombre
    Else
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 4, 2) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2) = "Todos"
    End If
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 3, 2)
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 4, 2)
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
'    RS1.Open "select distinct a.cli_codigo, a.cli_nombre, c.ate_codatencion, c.ate_descripcion, b.codigobarra, b.fechahoravale from b_clientes a inner join b_detallelectura b on a.cli_codigo = b.cli_codigo inner join a_pto_atencion c on b.ate_codatencion = c.ate_codatencion where b.cli_codigo = '" & cencos & "' and (b.ate_codatencion = " & PtoAte & " or " & PtoAte & " = 0) and (b.reg_codigo = " & codreg & " or " & codreg & " = 0 ) and (b.ser_codigo = " & codser & " or " & codser & " = 0) order by b.fechahoravale", vg_db, adOpenStatic
'    Set RS1 = vg_db.Execute("sgp_Sel_InfDetalleLecturaVale '" & cencos & "', " & PtoAte & ", " & codreg & ", " & codser & ", " & fecini & ", " & fecfin & "")
     Set RS1 = vg_db.Execute("sgp_Sel_ListarLecturaCodigoBarra '" & cencos & "', " & PtoAte & ", " & codreg & ", " & codser & ", " & fecini & ", " & fecfin & "")
    If RS1.EOF Then
       fg_descarga
       RS1.Close
       Set RS1 = Nothing
       Close #1
       MsgBox "No existe información", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
       Exit Sub
    End If
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 9: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Pto. Venta"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Regimen"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Servicio"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) = "Código Barra"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) = "Comensales"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) = "Nombre"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) = "Fecha/Hora"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) = "Cliente"
    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9) = "Nombre Cliente"
    Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 9)
    .TableBorder = tbBox
    .EndTable
    .StartTable
    .TableCell(tcCols) = 9: .TableCell(tcRows) = 50000
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taCenterTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 4) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 4) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 5) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 5) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 6) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 6) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 7) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 7) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 8) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 8) = taLeftTop
    .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 9) = 1500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 9) = taLeftTop
    i = 1
    Fecha = ""
    CodBarra = ""
    ContadorCodBarra = 0
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
        If CodBarra <> RS1!cli_codigo Or Fecha <> RS1!fechavale Then
           If Trim(CodBarra) <> "" Then
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total Vales Días"
              .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
              .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ContadorCodBarra
              ContadorCodBarra = 0
              i = i + 1
           End If
