           CodBarra = RS1!cli_codigo
           Fecha = RS1!fechavale
        End If
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!ate_codatencion), "", Trim(RS1!ate_codatencion)) & " - " & IIf(IsNull(RS1!ate_descripcion), "", Trim(RS1!ate_descripcion))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!reg_codigo), "", Trim(RS1!reg_codigo)) & " - " & IIf(IsNull(RS1!reg_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!reg_nombre))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!ser_codigo), "", Trim(RS1!ser_codigo)) & " - " & IIf(IsNull(RS1!ser_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!ser_nombre))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!codigobarra), "", Trim(RS1!codigobarra))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!per_rut), "", Trim(RS1!per_rut))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!per_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!per_nombre))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!FechaHoravale), "", Trim(RS1!FechaHoravale))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_codigo), "", Trim(RS1!cli_codigo))
        .TableCell(tcText, i, 9) = IIf(IsNull(RS1!cli_nombre), "", Trim(RS1!cli_nombre))
        Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 3) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 4) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 5) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 6) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 7) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 8) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, 9)
        RS1.MoveNext
        i = i + 1
        ContadorCodBarra = ContadorCodBarra + 1
    Loop
    If Trim(CodBarra) <> "" Then
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 1) = "Total Vales Día"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, i, 2) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, i, 2) = ContadorCodBarra
       ContadorCodBarra = 0
    End If
    
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1
    .TableCell(tcRows) = i
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    .EndDoc
End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1
Exit Sub
Error_DetalleLecturaVales:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Sub
End Sub

Public Function I_MenuDiaAporteNutricional(cencos As String, codreg As String, codser As String, fecini As Long, fecfin As Long, tipmin As String, opnomrec As Boolean, Form As Object)
Dim i As Long, j As Long, X As Long, y As Long, z As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long, auxfec As Long, icol As Long
Dim auxrec As Long, codnut As Long, inut As Long, auxreg As Long, auxser As Long
Dim nomser As String, nomtip As String, cLin As String
Dim auxess As Long
Dim vecdie() As Long
Dim vecdia() As Double
On Local Error GoTo Error_MenuDiaAporteNutricional
fg_carga ""
MsgTitulo = "Informe Menu Día Aporte Nutricional"
Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
'    .ExportFile = App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Gabriola" '"Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = True
'    .Header = "" & fg_poneencpagina & "||"
'    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 8
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    ReDim Preserve vecdie(0)
    ReDim Preserve vecdia(0)
    icol = 1: inut = 0
    For i = 1 To Form.vaSpread1(2).MaxRows
        Form.vaSpread1(2).Row = i
        Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 1
        If Form.vaSpread1(2).text = "1" Then
           icol = icol + 1: inut = inut + 1
           ReDim Preserve vecdie(inut)
           Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 2
           vecdie(inut) = Form.vaSpread1(2).text
        End If
    Next i
    ReDim Preserve vecdia(inut)
    RS1.Open "SELECT b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, c.mid_tipmin, c.mid_numlin, c.mid_codrec, c.mid_tiprec, " & _
             "c.mid_descri, c.mid_cosrec, c.mid_cosdes, b.min_fecmin, b.min_indblo, " & _
             "a.rec_nombre, a.rec_nomfan, d.ess_nombre, d.ess_codigo " & _
             "FROM  b_receta a, b_minuta b, b_minutadet c, a_estservicio d " & _
             "WHERE b.min_codigo = c.mid_codigo " & _
             "AND   c.mid_codrec = a.rec_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_cencos = '" & cencos & "' " & _
             "AND   b.min_codreg IN (" & Mid(codreg, 1, Len(codreg) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   b.min_codser IN (" & Mid(codser, 1, Len(codser) - 1) & ") " & _
             "AND   c.mid_estser = d.ess_codigo " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin >= " & fecini & " " & _
             "AND   b.min_fecmin <= " & fecfin & " " & _
             "AND   c.mid_tipmin = '" & tipmin & "' ORDER BY b.min_codreg, b.min_codser, b.min_fecmin, c.mid_numlin", vg_db, adOpenStatic
    If RS1.EOF Then RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing: Close #1: Exit Function
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       DoEvents
       If RS1!min_fecmin <> auxfec Or RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
          If auxfec > 0 Then
             For j = 1 To X
                cLin = ""
                 For p = 1 To icol
                     cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, j, p) & "|"
                 Next p
                 Print #1, cLin
             Next j
             .TableCell(tcRows) = X
             Print #1, cLin
             .TableBorder = tbNone
             .EndTable
             
             For j = 1 To inut
                 vecdia(j) = 0
             Next j
             cLin = ""
             '------- Salto de pagina x nuevo día
             .NewPage
             If RS1!min_fecmin > auxfec Then
               .StartTable
               .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
               .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
               .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 12: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
               nomtip = IIf(tipmin = 1, "Teórico", "Real")
               .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "MENU DEL DIA" ' (" & nomtip & ")
               Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
               .TableBorder = tbNone
               .EndTable
               .text = Chr(13)
               .text = Chr(13)
          
               .StartTable
               .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
               .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
               .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterMiddle
               .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 12: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True

               nomtip = IIf(tipmin = 1, "Teórico", "Real")
               .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha" ' (" & nomtip & ")  " & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)
               .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)
               Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
               .TableBorder = tbNone
               .EndTable
               .text = Chr(13)
         
               .StartTable
               .TableCell(tcCols) = 1 + icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
               .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
               .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
              '.TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow
               .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
               .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
               .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Preparaciones"
               cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
               X = 2
               For j = 1 To Form.vaSpread1(2).MaxRows
                   Form.vaSpread1(2).Row = j
                   Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 1
                   If Form.vaSpread1(2).text = "1" Then
                      Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 3
                     .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taRightTop
                     .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = Form.vaSpread1(2).text
                     cLin = cLin & "|" & "" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X)
                     X = X + 1
                   End If
               Next j
               Print #1, cLin
               .TableBorder = tbNone
               .EndTable
               .text = Chr(13)
               Print #1, cLin
             End If
          End If
          cLin = ""
          auxfec = RS1!min_fecmin
          auxrec = 0
          auxess = 0
          X = 1
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 800 '1000
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          For j = 1 To inut
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1 + j) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taRightTop
          Next j
       End If
       
       If RS1!min_codreg <> auxreg Or RS1!min_codser <> auxser Then
'          If auxfec > 0 Then .NewPage
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 10500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 12: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
          nomtip = IIf(tipmin = 1, "Teórico", "Real")
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "MENU DEL DIA" ' (" & nomtip & ")
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13)
          .text = Chr(13)
          
          
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 9000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taCenterMiddle
          .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1) = 12: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True

          nomtip = IIf(tipmin = 1, "Teórico", "Real")
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha" ' (" & nomtip & ")  " & Mid(fecini, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(fecini, 1, 4)
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 7, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 5, 2) & "/" & Mid(RS1!min_fecmin, 1, 4)
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13)
         
          .StartTable
          .TableCell(tcCols) = 1 + icol: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1300: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
          '.TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow
          .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
          .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Preparaciones"
          cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
          X = 2
          For j = 1 To Form.vaSpread1(2).MaxRows
              Form.vaSpread1(2).Row = j
              Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 1
              If Form.vaSpread1(2).text = "1" Then
                 Form.vaSpread1(2).Col = 3
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , X) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , X) = taRightTop
                 .TableCell(tcText, 1, X) = Form.vaSpread1(2).text
                 cLin = cLin & "|" & "" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, X)
                 X = X + 1
              End If
          Next j
          Print #1, cLin
          .TableBorder = tbNone
          .EndTable
          .text = Chr(13)
          cLin = ""
          j = 1: X = 1
          
          auxreg = RS1!min_codreg
          auxser = RS1!min_codser
          auxess = 0
       End If
       If RS1!ess_codigo <> auxess Then
          X = X + 1
          .TableCell(tcAlign, X, 2) = taLeftTop
          .TableCell(tcColSpan, X, 1) = 2
          .TableCell(tcText, X, 1) = Trim(RS1!ess_nombre)
          auxess = RS1!ess_codigo
          X = X + 2
       End If
       .TableCell(tcAlign, X, 1) = taLeftTop: .TableCell(tcText, X, 1) = IIf(opnomrec = True, RS1!rec_nomfan, RS1!rec_nombre)
       For j = 1 To inut
           .TableCell(tcAlign, X, 1 + j) = taRightTop
           .TableCell(tcText, X, 1 + j) = Format(0, fg_Pict(6, 2))
       Next j
       RS2.Open "SELECT DISTINCT e.nut_nombre, e.nut_codigo, SUM((((b.red_pctnut/100)*(d.pnu_canapo*(b.red_canpro/a.rec_basrac)))/c.ing_facnut)) AS candiet, " & _
                "e.nut_secnro FROM b_receta a, b_recetadet b, b_ingrediente c, b_productonut d, a_nutriente e WHERE b.red_codigo=a.rec_codigo " & _
                "AND b.red_codpro=c.ing_codigo AND c.ing_codigo=d.pnu_codpro AND d.pnu_codapo=e.nut_codigo " & _
                "AND b.red_codigo=" & RS1!mid_codrec & " AND b.red_tiprec=" & RS1!mid_tiprec & " AND ((b.red_tiprec<>0 AND b.red_cencos='" & MuestraCasino(1) & "') OR (b.red_tiprec=0 AND b.red_cencos='0')) AND c.ing_facnut>0 GROUP BY e.nut_nombre, e.nut_codigo, e.nut_secnro " & _
                "ORDER BY e.nut_secnro", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       DoEvents
       If Not RS2.EOF Then
          Do While Not RS2.EOF
             For j = 1 To inut
                 If vecdie(j) = RS2!nut_codigo Then
                    .TableCell(tcAlign, X, 1 + j) = taRightTop
                    .TableCell(tcText, X, 1 + j) = Format(RS2!candiet, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                    vecdia(j) = CCur(vecdia(j) + RS2!candiet)
                    Exit For
                 End If
             Next j
             RS2.MoveNext
          Loop
       End If
       RS2.Close: Set RS2 = Nothing
       
       RS1.MoveNext: X = X + 2
    Loop
    RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
    For j = 1 To X
        cLin = ""
        For p = 1 To icol
            cLin = cLin & .TableCell(tcText, j, p) & "|"
        Next p
        Print #1, cLin
    Next j
    .TableCell(tcRows) = X
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    .EndTable
    cLin = ""
    Close #1
    .EndDoc
End With
Close #1
Preview.Show 1
Exit Function
Error_MenuDiaAporteNutricional:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Public Function I_AporteNutricionalSansis(Form As Object)

On Local Error GoTo Error_AporteNutricionalSansis

Dim RS  As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim RS1 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim cFor As String, cHea As String, cBod As String, TCasino As String, nomservicio As String, TRegimen As String, nompventa As String
Dim NomIngrediente As String, nomcasino As String, Casino As String, cabecera As String
Dim cRow As Long, FechaIni As Long, FechaFin As Long, MnitmRef As Long, ctrfecha As Long, MnitmNo As Long, indini As Long, indfin As Long, p As Long, z As Long, ipventa As Long, CodServicio As Long, nservicio As Long, auxcodservicio As Long
Dim iprocesa As Long, icatr As Long, totreg As Long, i As Long, j As Long, Idietetico As Long, idetapo As Long
Dim numdia As Integer, SwSalto As Integer, SwTotal As Integer, exdiet As Integer, npage As Integer, iglosa As Integer
Dim dAporte As String, vAporte As String, sAporte As String
Dim DietItemYldVal1 As Double, NtrntVal As Double, DietItemConvVal As Double, cantcalorias As Double, cantproteinas As Double, cantlipidos As Double, canthidratos As Double, cantacgrsat As Double
Dim porsolida As Double, porliquida As Double, totserporsolida As Double, totserporliquida As Double, totdiaporsolida As Double, totdiaporliquida As Double
Dim pneto As Double, totserpneto As Double, totdiapneto As Double, canpavb As Double, totpavb As Double
Dim pbruto As Double, totserpbruto As Double, totdiapbruto As Double
Dim pNetoApr As Double, totserpnetoApr As Double, totdiapNetoApr As Double
Dim cantotp As Double, cantotg As Double, cantotcho As Double, cantotdensidad As Double, cantotsacarosa As Double, cantotagrs As Double
Dim cantotcalorias As Double, cantotproteinas As Double, cantotlipidos As Double, cantothidratos As Double, cantotacgrsat As Double

Dim totsercanservida As Double
Dim totdiacanservida As Double
Dim canservida As Double

'-------> Definir vector
Dim MatrizCodDietetico()   As Long
Dim MatrizMenuAporte()     As Double
Dim Matrizaporteservicio() As Double
Dim MatrizMenuTotAporte()  As Double
Dim matrizcatr()           As Long
Dim matrizglosa()          As String
Dim VecDetAporte()         As Variant

dAporte = ""
vAporte = ""
npage = 0

MsgTitulo = "Aporte Nutricional Sansis"

Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = fg_ArchivoRtf
     vg_reporte = .ExportFile
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .MarginHeader = 500
    .MarginTop = 1850
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .MarginBottom = 1000
    .MarginFooter = 500
    .MarginRight = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 10
    .HdrFontBold = False
    .Action = 3
    .text = Chr(13)
    .IndentLeft = 0
    .IndentRight = 0
    .SpaceAfter = 0
    .TableBorder = 0
    cabecera = ""
    cabecera = "~<2400|~>1000|~>1000|~>1000|~>1000"
    dAporte = "Fecha    Servicio|G/V Servir|Bruta|G/V Neto|G/V Neto Nut"
    Idietetico = 1
    fg_carga ""
    
    For i = 0 To Form.vaSpread2(0).MaxRows
        
        Form.vaSpread2(0).Row = i
        Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = 1
        
        If Form.vaSpread2(0).text = "1" Then
           
           Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = 2
           ReDim Preserve MatrizCodDietetico(Idietetico)
           MatrizCodDietetico(Idietetico) = Val(Form.vaSpread2(0).text)
           
           Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = 3
           dAporte = dAporte & "|" & Trim(Form.vaSpread2(0).text)
           Idietetico = Idietetico + 1
           cabecera = cabecera & "|~>800"
        
        End If
    
    Next i
    
    cabecera = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, cabecera & "|~>600|~>600|~>600|~>600" & ";", cabecera & "|~>600|~>600|~>600|~>600|~>600|~>600" & ";")
    dAporte = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, dAporte & "|P%|G%|Cho%|AGS % " & ";", dAporte & "|Pavb|Pavb%|P%|G%|Cho%|AGS % " & ";")
    Idietetico = Idietetico - 1
    If Idietetico < 1 Then Idietetico = 1
    indfin = (((Idietetico) * 3) + 2)
    
    ReDim Preserve MatrizMenuAporte(Idietetico)

                   If canthidratos > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then
                      
                      cantotcho = CCur(((canthidratos * 4) / cantcalorias) * 100)
                   
                   End If
                   
                   If cantacgrsat > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then
                      
                      cantotagrs = CCur(((cantacgrsat * 9) / cantcalorias) * 100)
                   
                   End If
                   
                   cBod = ""
                   If Form.Option3(1).Value = True And cantproteinas > 0 Then
                      
                      sAporte = sAporte & "|" & Format(canpavb, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(CCur((canpavb / cantproteinas) * 100), fg_Pict(4, 2))
                   
                   End If
                   
                   cHea = sAporte & "|" & Format(cantotp, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotg, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotcho, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotagrs, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & ";"
                   cFor = cabecera
                       
                   ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
                   matrizglosa(iglosa) = cHea
                   iglosa = iglosa + 1
                   ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
                   matrizglosa(iglosa) = ""
                   iglosa = iglosa + 1
                   
                   For i = 1 To Idietetico
                       
                       Matrizaporteservicio(i) = 0
                   
                   Next i
                   
                   totserporsolida = 0
                   totserporliquida = 0
                   totserpneto = 0
                   pneto = 0
                   pNetoApr = 0
                   totserpbruto = 0
                   totserpnetoApr = 0
                   pbruto = 0
                   
                   canpavb = 0
                   cantcalorias = 0
                   cantproteinas = 0
                   cantlipidos = 0
                   canthidratos = 0
                   cantacgrsat = 0
                   sAporte = ""
' ****
                   MnitmRef = 0
                   MnitmNo = 0
                   SwTotal = 0
                   canpavb = 0
                
                End If
                
                CodServicio = RS![Codigo Servicio]
                cFor = "~<3500;"
                cBod = Trim(RS![Nombre Servicio]) & ";"
                ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
                matrizglosa(iglosa) = cBod
                iglosa = iglosa + 1
                nomservicio = Trim(RS![Nombre Servicio])
             
             End If
                 
             If RS![Codigo Minuta] <> MnitmRef Or RS![Nro. Linea] <> MnitmNo Then
                
                If SwTotal > 0 Then
                   
                   vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(porsolida, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(pbruto, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(pNetoApr, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(pneto, fg_Pict(4, 2))
                   
                   For i = 1 To Idietetico
                       
                       vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(MatrizMenuAporte(i), fg_Pict(4, 2))
                   
                   Next i
                   
                   cBod = ""
                   cBod = vAporte & ";"
                   cFor = cabecera
                   ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
                   matrizglosa(iglosa) = cBod
                   iglosa = iglosa + 1
                   vAporte = ""
                   
                   For i = 1 To Idietetico
                       
                       MatrizMenuAporte(i) = 0
                   
                   Next i
                   
                   If Form.Option4(1).Value = True Then
                      '-------> Imprimir detalle
                      
                      For i = 1 To UBound(VecDetAporte)
                          
                          If VecDetAporte(i, 1) > 0 Then
                             
                             vAporte = " " & VecDetAporte(i, 2) & "|" & Format(VecDetAporte(i, 3), fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(VecDetAporte(i, 4), fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(VecDetAporte(i, 5), fg_Pict(4, 2))
                             '" " & VecDetAporte(i, 2) & "|" & " " & "|" & Format(VecDetAporte(i, 3), fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(VecDetAporte(i, 4), fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(VecDetAporte(i, 5), fg_Pict(4, 2))
                             
                             For j = 6 To Idietetico + 5
                                 
                                 vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(VecDetAporte(i, j), fg_Pict(4, 2))
                             
                             Next j
                             
                             cBod = ""
                             cBod = vAporte & ";"
                             cFor = cabecera
                             ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
                             matrizglosa(iglosa) = cBod
                             iglosa = iglosa + 1
                             vAporte = ""
                          
                          Else
                             
                             Exit For
                          
                          End If
                      
                      Next i
                      
                      For i = 1 To UBound(VecDetAporte)
                          
                          VecDetAporte(i, 1) = 0
                          VecDetAporte(i, 2) = ""
                          VecDetAporte(i, 3) = 0
                          VecDetAporte(i, 4) = 0
                          VecDetAporte(i, 5) = 0
                          
                          For j = 6 To Idietetico + 5
                              
                              VecDetAporte(i, j) = 0
                          
                          Next j
                      
                      Next i
                      
                      ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
                      matrizglosa(iglosa) = ""
                      iglosa = iglosa + 1
                   
                   End If
                   vAporte = ""
                
                End If
                
                MnitmRef = RS![Codigo Minuta]
                MnitmNo = RS![Nro. Linea]
                porsolida = 0
                porliquida = 0
                pneto = 0
                pNetoApr = 0
                pbruto = 0
                vAporte = Fg_SacaParentesis(Trim(RS![Nombre Receta])) '& "|" & Format(porsolida, fg_Pict(4, 2))
                SwTotal = 1
                idetapo = 1
             
             End If
             
             porsolida = CCur(porsolida + RS!canservida)
             totserporsolida = CCur(totserporsolida + RS!canservida)
             totdiaporsolida = CCur(totdiaporsolida + RS!canservida)
                
             pneto = CCur(pneto + Format(RS!pneto, fg_Pict(4, 2)))
             totserpneto = CCur(totserpneto + RS!pneto)
             totdiapneto = CCur(totdiapneto + RS!pneto)
                 
             pNetoApr = CCur(pNetoApr + Format(RS!pNetoApr, fg_Pict(4, 2)))
             totserpnetoApr = CCur(totserpnetoApr + RS!pNetoApr)
             totdiapNetoApr = CCur(totdiapNetoApr + RS!pNetoApr)
                 
             pbruto = CCur(pbruto + RS!wsnumporcion)
             totserpbruto = CCur(totserpbruto + RS!wsnumporcion)
             totdiapbruto = CCur(totdiapbruto + RS!wsnumporcion)
                 
             cantcalorias = CCur(cantcalorias + RS!Calorias)
             cantproteinas = CCur(cantproteinas + RS!proteinas)
             cantlipidos = CCur(cantlipidos + RS!lipidos)
             canthidratos = CCur(canthidratos + RS!Hidratos)
             cantacgrsat = CCur(cantacgrsat + RS!Acgrsat)
                 
             cantotcalorias = CCur(cantotcalorias + RS!Calorias)
             cantotproteinas = CCur(cantotproteinas + RS!proteinas)
             cantotlipidos = CCur(cantotlipidos + RS!lipidos)
             cantothidratos = CCur(cantothidratos + RS!Hidratos)
             cantotacgrsat = CCur(cantotacgrsat + RS!Acgrsat)
                 
             If RS!indpavb = 1 Then
                
                canpavb = CCur(canpavb + RS!proteinas)
                totpavb = CCur(totpavb + RS!proteinas)
             
             End If
             
'aqui reemplazar

              Trim (CStr(RS![Codigo Ingrediente]))
              ind_ini = Preview.vaSpread1.SearchCol(1, -1, Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows, RS![Codigo Ingrediente], SearchFlagsEqual)
              codpro = ""
              
              For ind_par = ind_ini To Preview.vaSpread1.MaxRows
                  
                  Preview.vaSpread1.Row = ind_par
                  Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 1
                  
                  If Preview.vaSpread1.text <> RS![Codigo Ingrediente] Then Exit For
                  
                  Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 2
                  codapo = Preview.vaSpread1.text
                  
                  Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 3
                  NtrntVal = Preview.vaSpread1.text
                  
                  Preview.vaSpread1.Col = 4
                  DietItemConvVal = Preview.vaSpread1.text
                  
                  VecDetAporte(idetapo, 1) = RS![Codigo Ingrediente]
                  VecDetAporte(idetapo, 2) = IIf(IsNull(RS![Nombre Ingrediente]), "", Trim(RS![Nombre Ingrediente]))
                  VecDetAporte(idetapo, 3) = IIf(IsNull(RS!canservida), 0, Format(RS!canservida, fg_Pict(4, 2))) 'IIf(IsNull(RS!wsnumporcion), 0, Format(RS!wsnumporcion, fg_Pict(4, 2)))
                  VecDetAporte(idetapo, 4) = IIf(IsNull(RS!pNetoApr), 0, Format(RS!pNetoApr, fg_Pict(4, 2)))
                  VecDetAporte(idetapo, 5) = IIf(IsNull(RS!pneto), 0, Format(RS!pneto, fg_Pict(4, 2)))
                  
                  DietItemYldVal1 = RS![Porcentaje Nutricional]
                  
                  For j = 1 To Idietetico
                      
                      If MatrizCodDietetico(j) = codapo Then
                         
                         MatrizMenuAporte(j) = CCur(MatrizMenuAporte(j) + ((((DietItemYldVal1 / 100) * (NtrntVal * (RS!wsnumporcion))) / DietItemConvVal)))
                         MatrizMenuTotAporte(j) = CCur(MatrizMenuTotAporte(j) + ((((DietItemYldVal1 / 100) * (NtrntVal * (RS!wsnumporcion))) / DietItemConvVal)))
                         Matrizaporteservicio(j) = CCur(Matrizaporteservicio(j) + ((((DietItemYldVal1 / 100) * (NtrntVal * (RS!wsnumporcion))) / DietItemConvVal)))
                         
                         VecDetAporte(idetapo, j + 5) = CCur(((DietItemYldVal1 / 100) * (NtrntVal * RS!wsnumporcion) / DietItemConvVal)) + VecDetAporte(idetapo, j + 5)
                      
                      End If
                  
                  Next j
              
              Next ind_par
          
          End If
          
          RS.MoveNext
          idetapo = idetapo + 1
          
       Loop
       
       If SwTotal > 0 Then
          
          vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(porsolida, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(pbruto, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(pNetoApr, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(pneto, fg_Pict(4, 2))
          
          For i = 1 To Idietetico
              
              vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(MatrizMenuAporte(i), fg_Pict(4, 2))
          
          Next i
          
          cBod = ""
          cBod = vAporte & ";"
          cFor = cabecera
          ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
          matrizglosa(iglosa) = cBod
          iglosa = iglosa + 1
          vAporte = ""
          
          For i = 1 To Idietetico
              
              MatrizMenuAporte(i) = 0
          
          Next i
          
          If Form.Option4(1).Value = True Then
             '-------> Imprimir detalle
             
             For i = 1 To UBound(VecDetAporte)
                 
                 If VecDetAporte(i, 1) > 0 Then
                    
                    vAporte = " " & VecDetAporte(i, 2) & "|" & Format(VecDetAporte(i, 3), fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(VecDetAporte(i, 4), fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(VecDetAporte(i, 5), fg_Pict(4, 2))
                    
                    For j = 6 To Idietetico + 5
                        
                        vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(VecDetAporte(i, j), fg_Pict(4, 2))
                    
                    Next j
                    
                    cBod = ""
                   cBod = vAporte & ";"
                   cFor = cabecera
                   ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
                   matrizglosa(iglosa) = cBod
                   iglosa = iglosa + 1
                   vAporte = ""
                 
                 Else
                    
                    Exit For
                 
                 End If
             
             Next i
             
             For i = 1 To UBound(VecDetAporte)
                 
                 VecDetAporte(i, 1) = 0
                 VecDetAporte(i, 2) = ""
                 VecDetAporte(i, 3) = 0
                 VecDetAporte(i, 4) = 0
                 VecDetAporte(i, 5) = 0
                 
                 For j = 6 To Idietetico + 5
                     
                     VecDetAporte(i, j) = 0
                 
                 Next j
             
             Next i
             
             ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
             matrizglosa(iglosa) = ""
             iglosa = iglosa + 1
         
         End If
         
         vAporte = ""
       
       End If
             
       ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
       matrizglosa(iglosa) = ""
       iglosa = iglosa + 1
       sAporte = "Total " & "|" & ":" & Format(totserporsolida, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(totserpbruto, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(totserpnetoApr, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(totserpneto, fg_Pict(4, 2))
       
       For i = 1 To Idietetico
           
           sAporte = sAporte & "|" & Format(Matrizaporteservicio(i), fg_Pict(4, 2))
       
       Next i
       
       cantotp = 0
       cantotg = 0
       cantotcho = 0
       cantotagrs = 0
       
       If cantproteinas > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then
          
          cantotp = CCur(((cantproteinas * 4) / cantcalorias) * 100)
       
       End If
       
       If cantlipidos > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then
          
          cantotg = CCur(((cantlipidos * 9) / cantcalorias) * 100)
       
       End If
       
       If canthidratos > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then
          
          cantotcho = CCur(((canthidratos * 4) / cantcalorias) * 100)
       
       End If
       
       If cantacgrsat > 0 And cantcalorias > 0 Then
          
          cantotagrs = CCur(((cantacgrsat * 9) / cantcalorias) * 100)
       
       End If
       
       cBod = ""
       
       If Form.Option3(1).Value = True And cantproteinas > 0 Then
          
          sAporte = sAporte & "|" & Format(canpavb, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(CCur((canpavb / cantproteinas) * 100), fg_Pict(4, 2))
       
       End If
       
       cHea = sAporte & "|" & Format(cantotp, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotg, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotcho, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotagrs, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & ";"
       cFor = cabecera
              
       ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
       matrizglosa(iglosa) = cHea
       iglosa = iglosa + 1
       ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
       matrizglosa(iglosa) = ""
       iglosa = iglosa + 1
       totserporsolida = 0
       totserporliquida = 0
       totserpneto = 0
       totserpnetoApr = 0
       totserpbruto = 0
       cantcalorias = 0
       cantproteinas = 0
       cantlipidos = 0
       canthidratos = 0
       cantacgrsat = 0
                       
       For i = 1 To Idietetico
           
           Matrizaporteservicio(i) = 0
       
       Next i
       sAporte = ""

' *** Imprimir totales del día aportes nutricionales *** '
       cFor = "~<3500;"
       cBod = "" & ";"
       ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
       matrizglosa(iglosa) = ""
       iglosa = iglosa + 1
              
       vAporte = "A. Nutricional del Día" & "|" & ":" & Format(totdiaporsolida, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(totdiapbruto, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(totdiapNetoApr, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(totdiapneto, fg_Pict(4, 2))
       
       For i = 1 To Idietetico
           
           vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(MatrizMenuTotAporte(i), fg_Pict(4, 2))
       
       Next i
       
       cantotp = 0
       cantotg = 0
       cantotcho = 0
       cantotagrs = 0
       
       If cantotproteinas > 0 And cantotcalorias > 0 Then
          
          cantotp = CCur(((cantotproteinas * 4) / cantotcalorias) * 100)
       
       End If
       
       If cantotlipidos > 0 And cantotcalorias > 0 Then
          
          cantotg = CCur(((cantotlipidos * 9) / cantotcalorias) * 100)
       
       End If
       
       If cantothidratos > 0 And cantotcalorias > 0 Then
          
          cantotcho = CCur(((cantothidratos * 4) / cantotcalorias) * 100)
       
       End If
       
       If cantotacgrsat > 0 And cantotcalorias > 0 Then
          
          cantotagrs = CCur(((cantotacgrsat * 9) / cantotcalorias) * 100)
       
       End If
       
       cBod = ""
       If Form.Option3(1).Value = True And cantotproteinas > 0 Then
          
          vAporte = vAporte & "|" & Format(totpavb, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(CCur((totpavb / cantotproteinas) * 100), fg_Pict(4, 2))
       
       End If
       
       cHea = vAporte & "|" & Format(cantotp, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotg, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotcho, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & "|" & Format(cantotagrs, fg_Pict(4, 2)) & ";"
       cFor = cabecera
       ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(iglosa)
       matrizglosa(iglosa) = cHea
       iglosa = iglosa + 1
              
       vAporte = ""
       WsLinea = WsLinea + iglosa - 1
       
       If WsLinea > IIf(Form.Option4(1).Value = True, 140, 58) Then
          
          WsLinea = 7 + iglosa - 1
          Preview.VSPrinter.NewPage
          YCurrentPage = Preview.VSPrinter.CurrentPage
       
       End If
       
       For i = 1 To iglosa - 1
           
           If matrizglosa(i) = "" Then
              
              cFor = "~<3500;"
              cBod = "" & ";"
              .AddTable cFor, cHea, cBod, RGB(256, 256, 0), , True
              Print #1, "|"
           
           Else
              
              If i = 1 Then
                 
                 cFor = cabecera
                 cBod = ""
                 cHea = dAporte
                 .AddTable cFor, cHea, cBod, RGB(256, 256, 0) ', , True
                 Print #1, Mid(dAporte, 1, Len(dAporte) - 1)
              
              ElseIf i = iglosa - 1 Then
                 
                 cFor = cabecera
                 cBod = ""
                 cHea = matrizglosa(i)
                 .AddTable cFor, cHea, cBod, RGB(128, 255, 218) ', , True
                 Print #1, Mid(matrizglosa(i), 1, Len(matrizglosa(i)) - 1)
              
              Else
                 
                 cBod = ""
                 cBod = matrizglosa(i)
                 cFor = cabecera
                 .AddTable cFor, cHea, cBod, RGB(256, 256, 0), , True
                 Print #1, Mid(matrizglosa(i), 1, Len(matrizglosa(i)) - 1)
              
              End If
           
           End If
       
       Next i
       
       Print #1, "|"
       ReDim Preserve matrizglosa(0)
       iglosa = 1
       
       cantotcalorias = 0
       cantotproteinas = 0
       cantotlipidos = 0
       cantothidratos = 0
       cantotacgrsat = 0
       totserporsolida = 0
       totserporliquida = 0
       totdiaporliquida = 0
       totdiaporsolida = 0
       totserpneto = 0
       totdiapneto = 0
       totserpnetoApr = 0
       totdiapNetoApr = 0
       totserpbruto = 0
       totdiapbruto = 0
       
       For i = 1 To Idietetico
           
           MatrizMenuTotAporte(i) = 0
       
       Next i
              
    End If
    RS.Close
    Set RS = Nothing
    Close #1
    fg_descarga
    .PenColor = 0
    .EndDoc

End With
Preview.Show 1

Exit Function
Error_AporteNutricionalSansis:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function

End Function

Function I_SetMinutaSansis(Form As Object)

On Local Error GoTo Error_PlanificacionMinutaSansis

Dim RS As New ADODB.Recordset, RS1 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim comentario As String, Fecha As String, Glosa As String, nompventa As String, cosser As String
Dim Servicio As Long, iRow As Long, auxfecha As Long, icome As Long, icatr As Long, iset As Long, icol As Long, auxicol As Long, ivec As Long, auxfec As Long
Dim i As Integer, j As Integer, X As Integer, canserv As Integer, cancomentario As Integer, finserv As Integer, npage As Integer, opprecio As Integer
Dim iprod As Integer, swprod As Integer, z As Integer
Dim iy As Integer, ix As Integer, iz As Integer, iexcel As Integer
Dim cosmin As Double
Dim matrizserv() As Integer
Dim matrizcatr() As Long
Dim matrizcome() As String
Dim matrizsalto() As Integer
Dim Matrizcodprod() As Variant
Dim Matriznomprod() As Variant
Dim Matriztiperror() As Variant

MsgTitulo = "Planificación Minuta"

Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = fg_ArchivoRtf 'App.Path & "\Reporte.rtf"
     
     vg_reporte = .ExportFile
    .Preview = True
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .MarginHeader = 500
    .MarginTop = 1850
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .MarginBottom = 1000
    .MarginFooter = 500
    .MarginRight = 500
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    
    .StartDoc
    .HdrFontName = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, "Arial", "Arial")
    .HdrFontSize = 10
    .HdrFontBold = True
    .Action = 3
    .FontSize = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, 10, 14)
    .IndentLeft = 0
    .IndentRight = 0
    .SpaceAfter = 0
    .TableBorder = 0
    fg_carga ""
    vg_ArchTxt = ""
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    nompventa = Trim(Form.fpayuda(1).Caption)
    comentario = ""
    npage = 0
    ReDim Preserve matrizserv(0)
    ReDim Preserve matrizcome(0)
    
    If npage = 1 Then
       .NewPage
    End If
    
    npage = 1
    
    If Form.Option1(3).Value = True Then
       
       Print #1, Trim(Form.fpayuda(0).Caption)
       Print #1, (Form.fpayuda(0).Caption) & Chr(13)
       Print #1, Trim(Form.fpayuda(1).Caption) & Chr(13)
       Print #1, Meses("01" & "/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "mm") & "/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy")) & " " & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy") & Chr(13)
    
    ElseIf Form.Option1(2).Value = True Then
       
       Print #1, Trim(Form.fpayuda(0).Caption)
       Print #1, (Form.fpayuda(0).Caption) & " (" & ((Form.fpText1.text)) & "/" & Val(Form.Regimen.Value) & ")" & Chr(13)
       Print #1, Trim(Form.fpayuda(1).Caption) & Chr(13)
       Print #1, Meses("01" & "/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "mm") & "/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy")) & " " & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy") & Chr(13)
    
    End If
    
    .Header = IIf(Form.Option1(3).Value = True, Trim(Form.fpayuda(0).Caption), Trim(Form.fpayuda(0).Caption) & " - " & Form.fpText1.text) & Chr(13) & IIf(Form.Option1(3).Value = True, Trim(Form.fpayuda(1).Caption), Trim(Form.fpayuda(1).Caption) & " - " & Form.Regimen.Value) & Chr(13) & Meses("01" & "/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "mm") & "/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy")) & " " & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy")
    '& "|" & (Form.fpayuda(1).Caption)
    
    If Form.Option1(5).Value = True Then
       
       .Footer = "||Fecha Impresión : " & Format(Date, "dd/mm/yyyy") & " " & Format(Time, "hh:mm:ss AMPM")
    
    End If
    
    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    
    ' *** Definir Cantidad de Servicio y Comentario *** '
    Set RS = vg_db.Execute("sgp_Sel_MinutaEstruturaServicio '" & Trim(Form.fpText1.text) & "', " & Form.Regimen.Value & ", '" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyymm") & "', '" & IIf(Form.Option5(0).Value = True, "1", "2") & "'")
    
    If Not RS.EOF Then
       
       Servicio = 0
       canserv = 0
       cancomentario = 0
       finserv = 1
       
       Do While Not RS.EOF
          
          For iset = 1 To Form.vaSpread1(0).MaxRows
              
              Form.vaSpread1(0).Row = iset
              Form.vaSpread1(0).Col = 1
              
              If Form.vaSpread1(0).Value = "1" Then
                 
                 Form.vaSpread1(0).Col = 2
                 
                 If Val(Form.vaSpread1(0).Value) = RS!ser_codigo Then
                    
                    If RS!ser_codigo <> Servicio Then
                       
                       ReDim Preserve matrizserv(finserv)
                       matrizserv(finserv) = RS!ser_codigo
                       finserv = finserv + 1
                       Servicio = RS!ser_codigo
                       comentario = ""
                       canserv = canserv + 1
                    
                    End If
                    
                    If RS!ess_nombre <> comentario Then
                       
                       cancomentario = cancomentario + 1
                       comentario = RS!ess_nombre
                    
                    End If
                    Exit For
                 
                 End If
              
              End If
          
          Next iset
          RS.MoveNext
       
       Loop
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcRows) = 40
       .TableCell(tcRowKeepWithNext, 2) = 11
       .TableCell(tcRowIsSubHeader, 1, 2, 1, 2) = 12
       .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 450
       .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 2) = 450
       .TableCell(tcCols) = cancomentario + 1
       
       For j = 1 To cancomentario + 1
           
           If j = 1 Then
              
              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 470
           
           Else
              
              If cancomentario = 1 Or cancomentario = 2 Or cancomentario = 3 Then
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, 3000, 3420)
              ElseIf cancomentario = 5 Or cancomentario = 4 Then
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, 2400, 2820)
              ElseIf cancomentario = 6 Or cancomentario = 7 Then
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, 2000, 2420)
              ElseIf cancomentario = 10 Then
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, 1400, 1820)
              ElseIf cancomentario = 8 Then
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, 1700, 2120)
              ElseIf cancomentario >= 11 Then
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, 1050, 1720)
              Else
                 .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, 1300, 1720)
              End If
           
           End If
       
       Next j
       
       i = 2
       For j = 1 To finserv - 1
           
           Set RS1 = vg_db.Execute("sgp_Sel_NroRegMinutaEstruturaServicio '" & Trim(Form.fpText1.text) & "', " & Val(Form.Regimen.Value) & ", " & matrizserv(j) & ", '" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyymm") & "', '" & IIf(Form.Option5(0).Value = True, "1", "2") & "'")
           
           If Not RS1.EOF Then
              
              .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, i) = RS1!nreg
              i = i + RS1!nreg
           
           End If
           
           RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
       
       Next j
       
       .TableCell(tcFontSize) = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, 7, 10)
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, True, False)
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, True, False)
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Dia"
       .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taCenterMiddle
       comentario = "": Servicio = 0: i = 1: icome = 1
       RS.MoveFirst
       
       Do While Not RS.EOF
          
          For iset = 1 To Form.vaSpread1(0).MaxRows
              
              Form.vaSpread1(0).Row = iset
              Form.vaSpread1(0).Col = 1
              
              If Form.vaSpread1(0).Value = "1" Then
                 
                 Form.vaSpread1(0).Col = 2
                 
                 If Val(Form.vaSpread1(0).Value) = RS!ser_codigo Then
                    
                    If RS!ser_codigo <> Servicio Then
                       
                       .TableCell(tcText, 1, i + 1) = Trim(RS!ser_nombre)
                       .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, i + 1) = taCenterMiddle
                       Servicio = RS!ser_codigo
                       comentario = ""
                    
                    End If
                    
                    If RS!ess_nombre <> comentario Then
                       
                       ReDim Preserve matrizcome(icome)
                       matrizcome(icome) = Trim(RS!ess_nombre)
                       .TableCell(tcText, 2, i + 1) = Trim(RS!ess_nombre)
                       .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, i + 1) = taCenterMiddle
                       i = i + 1: icome = icome + 1
                       comentario = RS!ess_nombre
                    
                    End If
                    
                    Exit For
                 
                 End If
              
              End If
          Next iset
          
          RS.MoveNext
       
       Loop
       RS.Close
       Set RS = Nothing
       
       For i = 1 To 2
           Glosa = ""
           
           For j = 1 To cancomentario + 1
               Glosa = Glosa & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, i, j)
           Next j
           
           Print #1, Glosa
       
       Next i
       
       Form.vaSpread2(0).MaxRows = 31
       Form.vaSpread2(0).MaxCols = cancomentario + 1
       
       For i = 1 To Form.vaSpread2(0).MaxRows
           
           Form.vaSpread2(0).Row = i
           Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = 1
           Form.vaSpread2(0).Value = i
       
       Next i
       
       icol = 1
       iRow = 40
       ivec = 0
       vg_salpag = False
       
       For iset = 1 To Form.vaSpread1(0).MaxRows
           
           Form.vaSpread1(0).Row = iset
           Form.vaSpread1(0).Col = 1
           
           If Form.vaSpread1(0).Value = "1" Then
              
              Form.vaSpread1(0).Col = 2
              vg_codservicio = Val(Form.vaSpread1(0).Value)
              
              Set RS = vg_db.Execute("sgp_Sel_DetalleMinutaSetSansis '" & Trim(Form.fpText1.text) & "', " & Form.Regimen.Value & ", " & vg_codservicio & ", " & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyymm") & ", '" & IIf(Form.Option2(0).Value = True, "1", "0") & "', '" & IIf(Form.Option5(0).Value = True, "1", "0") & "'")
              
              If Not RS.EOF Then
                 
                 auxfecha = 0: auxicol = 0: ivec = 0
                 i = 1: ix = 1: iz = 0: iy = 0
                 
                 Do While Not RS.EOF
                    
                    If RS!Fecha_Minutas <> auxfecha Then
                       
                       .TableCell(tcFontSize, Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2)) + 2, 1) = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, 7, 8)
                       .TableCell(tcText, Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2)) + 2, 1) = Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2))
                       ivec = ivec + 1
                       
                       For ix = 1 To Form.vaSpread2(0).MaxRows
                           
                           Form.vaSpread2(0).Row = ix
                           Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = 1
                           
                           If Val(Form.vaSpread2(0).Value) = Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2)) Then
                              
                              iz = ix
                              Exit For
                           
                           End If
                       
                       Next ix
                       auxfecha = RS!Fecha_Minutas
                    
                    End If
                    .TableCell(tcFontSize, Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2)) + 2, RS!Col + icol) = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, 6, 11) '6
                    
                    If .TableCell(tcText, Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2)) + 2, RS!Col + icol) = "" Then
                       
                       .TableCell(tcText, Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2)) + 2, RS!Col + icol) = Chr(13) & Fg_SacaParentesis(Trim(RS!rec_nombre))
                       Form.vaSpread2(0).Row = iz
                       Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = RS!Col + icol
                       Form.vaSpread2(0).Value = Fg_SacaParentesis(Trim(RS!rec_nombre))
                    
                    Else
                       .TableCell(tcText, Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2)) + 2, RS!Col + icol) = .TableCell(tcText, Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2)) + 2, RS!Col + icol) & Chr(13) & Fg_SacaParentesis(Trim(RS!rec_nombre))
                       
                       For ix = iz + 1 To Form.vaSpread2(0).MaxRows + 1
                           
                           Form.vaSpread2(0).Row = ix
                           Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = 1
                           
                           If Val(Form.vaSpread2(0).Value) = Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2)) Then
                              
                              Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = RS!Col + icol
                              
                              If Form.vaSpread2(0).Value = "" Then
                                 
                                 Form.vaSpread2(0).Row = ix
                              
                                 Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = 1
                                 Form.vaSpread2(0).Value = Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2))
                              
                                 Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = RS!Col + icol
                                 Form.vaSpread2(0).Value = Fg_SacaParentesis(Trim(RS!rec_nombre))
                                 Exit For
                              
                              End If
                           
                           ElseIf Val(Form.vaSpread2(0).Value) <> Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2)) Then
                              
                              Form.vaSpread2(0).MaxRows = Form.vaSpread2(0).MaxRows + 1
                              Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = 1
                              Form.vaSpread2(0).Row = ix
                              Form.vaSpread2(0).Col2 = Form.vaSpread2(0).MaxCols
                              Form.vaSpread2(0).Row2 = Form.vaSpread2(0).MaxRows - 1
                              Form.vaSpread2(0).DestCol = 1
                              Form.vaSpread2(0).DestRow = ix + 1
                              Form.vaSpread2(0).Action = 20
                              
                              Form.vaSpread2(0).Row = ix
                              
                              Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = 1
                              Form.vaSpread2(0).Value = Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2))
                              
                              Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = RS!Col + icol
                              Form.vaSpread2(0).Value = Fg_SacaParentesis(Trim(RS!rec_nombre))
                              Exit For
                           
                           End If
                       
                       Next ix
                    
                    End If
                    
                    If RS!Col > auxicol Then
                       
                       auxicol = RS!Col
                    
                    End If
                    
                    RS.MoveNext
                 Loop
                 RS.Close: Set RS = Nothing
                 icol = icol + auxicol
              
              End If
           
           End If
       
       Next iset
       
       For j = 3 To iRow
           
           If j <= iRow Then
              
              If .TableCell(tcText, j, 1) = "" Then
                 
                 .TableCell(tcDeleteRow, j) = j: j = j - 1: iRow = iRow - 1
              
              End If
           
           End If
       
       Next j
       
       Glosa = ""
       auxfecha = 0: ix = 0
       
       For i = 1 To Form.vaSpread2(0).MaxRows + 1
           
           Form.vaSpread2(0).Row = i
           iexcel = 0
           
           For j = 2 To Form.vaSpread2(0).MaxCols
               
               Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = j
               
               If Form.vaSpread2(0).Value <> "" Then
                  
                  iexcel = 1
                  Exit For
           
               End If
               
           Next j
           
           If iexcel = 1 Then
              Glosa = ""
              Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = 1
              
              If Val(Form.vaSpread2(0).Value) <> auxfecha Then
                 
                 auxfecha = Val(Form.vaSpread2(0).Value)
                 Glosa = Glosa & "|" & fg_Fecha_Dia(Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy") & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "mm") & CStr(Form.vaSpread2(0).Value), 1)
              
              Else
                 
                 Glosa = Glosa & "|"
              
              End If
              
              For j = 2 To Form.vaSpread2(0).MaxCols
                  
                  Form.vaSpread2(0).Col = j
                  Glosa = Glosa & "|" & Form.vaSpread2(0).Value
              
              Next j
              
              Print #1, Glosa
           End If
       
       Next i
       
       Print #1, "" & "|": Print #1, "" & "|"
      .TableBorder = tbAll
      .EndTable
    
    Else
       
       RS.Close: Set RS = Nothing
    
    End If
    
'    '------- Imprimir Food Cost servicio
'    If Form.Check2.Value = 1 Then
'
'       .text = Chr(13)
'       .text = "Food Cost Servicios "
'       .text = Chr(13)
'       .text = Chr(13)
'
'       Print #1, "Food Cost Servicios "
'       Print #1, "": Print #1, ""
'
'       opprecio = Form.Combo1.ItemData(Form.Combo1.ListIndex)
'
'       ReDim Preserve Matrizcodprod(0)
'       ReDim Preserve Matriznomprod(0)
'       ReDim Preserve Matriztiperror(0)
'
'       For i = 1 To Form.vaSpread1.MaxRows
'
'           cosser = ""
'           Form.vaSpread1.Row = i
'           Form.vaSpread1.Col = 1
'
'           If Trim(Form.vaSpread1.text) = "1" Then
'
'              cosmin = 0: auxcodrec = 0: j = 0
'              Form.vaSpread1.Col = 2
'
'              sql = ""
'              sql = sql & " '" & Trim(Form.fpText1.text) & "', "
'              sql = sql & " " & Trim(Form.Regimen.Value) & ", "
'              sql = sql & " " & Val(Form.vaSpread1.text) & ", "
'              sql = sql & " " & Format(dBoM("01/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "mm/yyyy")), "yyyymmdd") & ", "
'              sql = sql & " " & Format(dEoM("27/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "mm/yyyy")), "yyyymmdd") & ", "
'              sql = sql & " '1' "
'              Set RS = vg_db.Execute("sgpadm_Sel_CostoDetalleMinutaSansis " & sql & "")
'
'
''              Set RS = vg_db.Execute("min_s_setctominutares '" & "00000" & Trim(Form.fpText.text) & "', " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(0).Value) & ", " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value) & ", " & Val(Form.vaSpread1.text) & ", '" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy") & "', '" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "mm") & "', " & opprecio & "")
'
'              If Not RS.EOF Then
'
'                 Do While Not RS.EOF
'
'                    If RS!Fecha_Minutas <> AuxFec Then
'
'                       j = j + 1
'                       AuxFec = RS!Fecha_Minutas
'
'                    End If
'
'                    cosmin = Round(cosmin + RS!Ing_Cost, 0)
'
'                    If RS!Ing_Cost <= 0 Then
'
'                       swprod = 0
'
'                       If iprod > 0 Then
'
'                          For z = 1 To UBound(Matrizcodprod)
'
'                              If Matrizcodprod(z) = RS!Item_No Then swprod = 1: Exit For
'
'                          Next z
'
'                       End If
'
'                       If swprod = 0 Then
'
'                          iprod = iprod + 1
'                          ReDim Preserve Matrizcodprod(iprod): Matrizcodprod(iprod) = RS!Item_No
'                          ReDim Preserve Matriznomprod(iprod): Matriznomprod(iprod) = Trim(RS!Item_Name)
'                          ReDim Preserve Matriztiperror(iprod): Matriztiperror(iprod) = IIf(RS!wsnumporcion < 1, Trim("Gramaje Cero"), Trim("Precio Cero"))
'
'                       End If
'
'                    End If
'                    RS.MoveNext
'
'                 Loop
'                 Form.vaSpread1.Col = 3
'                 cosser = cosser & Trim(Form.vaSpread1.text) & "  : " & Format(Round((cosmin / j), 0), fg_Pict(6, 0)) & "  |  "
'                 .text = cosser
'
'              End If
'
'              RS.Close: Set RS = Nothing
'
'           End If
'
'       Next i
'
'       Print #1, cosser
'       Print #1, "": Print #1, ""
'       .text = Chr(13): .text = Chr(13)
'
'    End If
    '------- Grabar ó Regrabar Inserto
    If Form.Check1.Value = 1 Then
       
       RS1.Open "sgpadm_Sel_ParametroSansis 9999", vg_db, adOpenStatic
       
       If Not RS1.EOF Then
          
          vg_db.Execute "UPDATE Sdx_Parametro_Sansis SET Parametro_Glosa='" & Trim(Form.Text1.text) & "' WHERE Parametro_Num=9999"
       
       Else
          
          vg_db.Execute "INSERT INTO Sdx_Parametro_Sansis (Parametro_Num, Parametro_Desc, Parametro_Val, Parametro_Glosa) VALUES (9999, 'Parametro Glosa', 0, '" & Trim(Form.Text1.text) & "')"
       
       End If
       RS1.Close: Set RS1 = Nothing
       
       .text = Chr(13)
       .StartTable
       .FontSize = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, 10, 14)
       .TableBorder = tbBoxRows
       .FontBold = False
       fmt = "<7600;"
       s = fmt
       .FontSize = IIf(Form.Option3(0).Value = True, 9, 14)
       s = fmt & Form.Text1.text & " "
       .Table = s
       Print #1, Form.Text1.text
       .EndTable
    
    End If
    
'    If iprod > 0 And Form.Check2.Value = 1 Then
'
'       Print #1, ""
'       Titulo = "Listado Producto Con Error" & " (" & Form.Combo1.text & ")"

'       .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True
'       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = Trim(Form.fpayuda(0).Caption)

'       .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = Trim(Form.fpayuda(1).Caption)
'       .TableCell(tcFontSize, 2, 1) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = Meses("01" & "/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "mm") & "/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy")) & " " & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy")
'       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13): Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & Chr(13)
'       .TableBorder = tbNone
'       .EndTable
'       .text = Chr(13)

'
'       For j = 1 To UBound(Matrizcodprod)
'
'           cFor = "~<1500|~<4500|~<4500;"
'           cBod = Matrizcodprod(j) & "|" & Matriznomprod(j) & "|" & Matriztiperror(j) & ";"
'           .AddTable cFor, cHea, cBod, RGB(256, 256, 0), , True

'

'
