    .EndDoc
    Close #1
    fg_descarga
    Preview.Show 1

End With

Exit Function
Error_PlanificacionMinutaSansis:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Function I_FrecuenciaRecetas(Form As Object)

On Local Error GoTo Error_FrecuenciaRecetas

Dim RS  As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim RS1 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim comentario As String, Fecha As String, nomdia As String, nomservicio As String, nomtexto As String, nompventa As String
Dim Servicio As Long, iRow As Long, auxfecha As Long, icome As Long, icatr As Long, iset As Long, codreceta As Long, Dia As Long, totreceta As Long, indfin As Long
Dim i As Integer, j As Integer, canserv As Integer, cancomentario As Integer, finserv As Integer, isalto As Integer, iprocesa As Integer, npage As Integer, ConLinea As Integer, opprecio As Integer, indexcel As Integer, X As Integer
Dim cosreceta As Double, canreceta As Double, costotreceta As Double
Dim MiFecha$, mes1$, FechaM$, FechaP$, diasem%, FinDiaMes%
Dim matrizserv() As Integer
Dim matrizcatr() As Long
Dim matrizcome() As String
MsgTitulo = "Frecuencia Recetas"

Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = fg_ArchivoRtf
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = False
    
    
'    .Preview = True
'    .Orientation = orLandscape
'    .PreviewPage = 1
    .MarginHeader = 500
    .MarginTop = 1850
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .MarginBottom = 1000
    .MarginFooter = 500
    .MarginRight = 500
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    
    .StartDoc
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 8
    .HdrFontBold = True
    .Action = 3
    .FontSize = 8
    .IndentLeft = 0
    .IndentRight = 0
    .SpaceAfter = 0
    .TableBorder = 0
    fg_carga ""
    vg_ArchTxt = ""
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    nompventa = Trim(Form.fpayuda(2).Caption)
    comentario = ""
    npage = 0
    indexcel = 0
    indfin = 0
    
    For iset = 1 To Form.vaSpread1(0).MaxRows
        
        Form.vaSpread1(0).Row = iset
        Form.vaSpread1(0).Col = 1
        
        If Form.vaSpread1(0).Value = "1" Then
           
           Form.vaSpread1(0).Col = 2: Servicio = Val(Form.vaSpread1(0).Value)
           Form.vaSpread1(0).Col = 3: nomservicio = Trim(Form.vaSpread1(0).Value)
           If npage = 1 Then .NewPage
           npage = 1
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 3750: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftMiddle
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = Trim(Form.fpayuda(1).Caption)
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 2) = 9750: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 2) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 2) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = (Form.fpayuda(1).Caption) & " (" & (Trim(Form.fpText.text)) & ")" '& "/" & Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value & ")"
           Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1): Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & Chr(13)
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable

           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = Trim(nompventa) & " - " & Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 2, 1) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = Meses("01" & "/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "mm") & "/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy")) & " " & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy")
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 3, 1) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = nomservicio & " - " & Servicio
           Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13): Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & Chr(13): Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & Chr(13)
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
           .text = Chr(13)
           
           ' *** Definir Cantidad de Servicio y Comentario *** '
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
           For j = 1 To 2
               
               .TableCell(tcRowHeight, j) = 450
           
           Next j
           
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 45
           indfin = 45
           For j = 1 To indfin
               
               If j = 1 Then
                  .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 600
               ElseIf j = 2 Then
                  .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 3000
               ElseIf j >= 3 And j <= 44 Then
                  .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 270
               ElseIf j = 45 Then
                  .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 500
               ElseIf j = 46 Then
                  .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 800
               End If
           
           Next j
           
           .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 2) = 1
           .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 3) = 7
           .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 10) = 7
           .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 17) = 7
           .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 24) = 7
           .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 31) = 7
           .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 38) = 7
           .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 45) = 1
           .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 46) = 1
           
           .TableCell(tcFontSize) = 7
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Cód."
           .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 1) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Nombre Receta"
           .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 2) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Semana Nº 1"
           .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 3) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) = "Semana Nº 2"
           .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 10) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 17) = "Semana Nº 3"
           .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 17) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 24) = "Semana Nº 4"
           .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 24) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 31) = "Semana Nº 5"
           .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 31) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 38) = "Semana Nº 6"
           .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 38) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcText, 2, 45) = "Total"
           .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 45) = taCenterMiddle
           
'           If Form.Option1(0).Value = True Then
'
'              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 46) = "Valor"
'              .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 46) = taCenterMiddle
'              .TableCell(tcText, 2, 46) = "Recetas"
'              .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 46) = taCenterMiddle
'
'           End If
           i = 1
           
           For j = 3 To 44
               
               If i = 1 Then nomdia = "l"
               If i = 2 Then nomdia = "m"
               If i = 3 Then nomdia = "m"
               If i = 4 Then nomdia = "j"
               If i = 5 Then nomdia = "v"
               If i = 6 Then nomdia = "s"
               If i = 7 Then nomdia = "d": i = 0
               .TableCell(tcText, 2, j) = nomdia
               .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, j) = taCenterMiddle
               i = i + 1
           
           Next j
           Fecha = CStr(1) & "/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "mm") & "/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy")
           MiFecha = Format$(Fecha, "mmm dd yyyy")
           diasem = Weekday(DateValue(MiFecha))
           FechaP = ""
           Dia = diasem - 1
           If Dia < 1 Then Dia = 7
           iprocesa = 0
           Set RS = vg_db.Execute("sgp_Sel_FrecRecetaMinutaBloque_Sansis '" & Trim(Form.fpText.text) & "', " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value) & ",  " & Servicio & ", " & Format(dBoM("01/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "mm/yyyy")), "yyyymm") & ", " & Format(dEoM("27/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "mm/yyyy")), "yyyymmdd") & ", '" & IIf(Form.Option5(0).Value, "1", "2") & "' ")
           
           If Not RS.EOF Then
              
              .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
              codreceta = 0
              isalto = 0
              auxfecha = 0
              cosreceta = 0
              canreceta = 0
              totreceta = 0
              costotreceta = 0
              iRow = 3
              ConLinea = 1
              indexcel = 0
              
              Do While Not RS.EOF
                 
                 If ConLinea > 35 And RS!Rcpe_No <> codreceta Then
                    
                    indexcel = 1
                    ConLinea = 1
                    .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 45) = Format(canreceta, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                    .TableCell(tcAlign, iRow, 45) = taCenterMiddle
                    
                    nomtexto = ""
                    
                    For i = 1 To iRow
                        
                        For j = 1 To indfin
                            
                            nomtexto = nomtexto & .TableCell(tcText, i, j) & "|"
                        
                        Next j
                        
                        Print #1, nomtexto
                        nomtexto = ""
                    
                    Next i
                    
                    .TableBorder = tbAll
                    .EndTable
                    .NewPage
                    .StartTable
                    .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
                    
                    For j = 1 To 2
                        
                        .TableCell(tcRowHeight, j) = 450
                    
                    Next j
                    
                    .TableCell(tcCols) = indfin '46
                    
                    For j = 1 To indfin '46
                        
                        If j = 1 Then
                           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 600
                        ElseIf j = 2 Then
                           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 3000 '3500
                        ElseIf j >= 3 And j <= 44 Then
                           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 270
                        ElseIf j = 45 Then
                           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 500
                        ElseIf j = 46 Then
                           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 800
                        End If
                    
                    Next j
                    
                    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 2) = 1
                    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 3) = 7
                    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 10) = 7
                    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 17) = 7
                    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 24) = 7
                    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 31) = 7
                    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 38) = 7
                    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 45) = 1
                    .TableCell(tcColSpan, 1, 46) = 1
           
                    .TableCell(tcFontSize) = 7
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
                    .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2) = True
                    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Cód."
                    .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 1) = taCenterMiddle
                    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 2) = "Nombre Receta"
                    .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 2) = taCenterMiddle
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "Semana Nº 1"
                    .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 3) = taCenterMiddle
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 10) = "Semana Nº 2"
                    .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 10) = taCenterMiddle
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 17) = "Semana Nº 3"
                    .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 17) = taCenterMiddle
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 24) = "Semana Nº 4"
                    .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 24) = taCenterMiddle
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 31) = "Semana Nº 5"
                    .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 31) = taCenterMiddle
                    .TableCell(tcText, 1, 38) = "Semana Nº 6"
                    .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 38) = taCenterMiddle
                    .TableCell(tcText, 2, 45) = "Total"
                    .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 45) = taCenterMiddle
                    
                    i = 1
                    
                    For j = 3 To 44
                        
                        If i = 1 Then nomdia = "l"
                        If i = 2 Then nomdia = "l"
                        If i = 3 Then nomdia = "l"
                        If i = 4 Then nomdia = "j"
                        If i = 5 Then nomdia = "v"
                        If i = 6 Then nomdia = "s"
                        If i = 7 Then nomdia = "d": i = 0
                        .TableCell(tcText, 2, j) = nomdia
                        .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, j) = taCenterMiddle
                        i = i + 1
                    
                    Next j
                    
                    .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
                    iRow = 3
                    isalto = 0
                 
                 End If
                 
                 If RS!Rcpe_No <> codreceta Then
                    
                    If isalto = 1 Then
                       
                       iRow = iRow + 1
                       .TableCell(tcRows) = iRow
                       .TableCell(tcText, iRow - 1, 45) = Format(canreceta, fg_Pict(6, 0))
                       .TableCell(tcAlign, iRow - 1, 45) = taCenterMiddle
                    
                    End If
                    
                    .TableCell(tcFontSize, iRow, 1) = 8
                    .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 1) = RS!Rcpe_No
                    .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 2) = Trim(RS!Rcpe_Desc)
                    .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 2 + (Dia + Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2)) - 1)) = "x"
                    codreceta = RS!Rcpe_No
                    totreceta = totreceta + 1
                    cosreceta = 0
                    canreceta = 0
                    auxfecha = 0
                    isalto = 1
                    ConLinea = ConLinea + 1
                 
                 Else
                    
                    .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 2 + (Dia + Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2)) - 1)) = "x"
                 
                 End If
                 
                 If RS!Fecha_Minutas <> auxfecha Then
                    
                    canreceta = canreceta + 1
                    auxfecha = RS!Fecha_Minutas
                 
                 End If
                 
                 RS.MoveNext
                 
                 iprocesa = 1
              
              Loop
              RS.Close: Set RS = Nothing
              .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 45) = Format(canreceta, fg_Pict(6, 0))
              .TableCell(tcAlign, iRow, 45) = taCenterMiddle
              
           End If
           
           If iprocesa = 1 Then
              
              nomtexto = ""
              X = 1
              
              If indexcel = 1 Then X = 3
              
              For i = X To iRow
                  
                  For j = 1 To indfin '46
                      
                      nomtexto = nomtexto & .TableCell(tcText, i, j) & "|"
                  
                  Next j
                  
                  Print #1, nomtexto
                  nomtexto = ""
              
              Next i
              
              .TableBorder = tbAll
              .EndTable
              .text = ""
              .text = Chr(13) & Chr(13) & "Total Recetas Listadas : " & Format(totreceta, fg_Pict(6, 0))
              Print #1, "|"
              Print #1, "Total Recetas Listadas : " & "|" & Format(totreceta, fg_Pict(6, 0))
              Print #1, "|"
              .text = ""
'              If Form.Option1(0).Value = True Then
'
'                 Set RS = vg_db.Execute("sgpadm_Sel_CantDiaPlanificado '" & Trim(Form.fpText.text) & "', " & Val(Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value) & ",  " & Servicio & ", '" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyymm") & "', '1'")
'
'                 If Not RS.EOF Then
'
'                    .text = Chr(13) & Chr(13) & "Costo Promedio Servicio : " & Format(CCur(costotreceta / RS!nreg), fg_Pict(6, 2))
'                    Print #1, "|"
'                    Print #1, "Costo Promedio Servicio : " & Format(CCur(costotreceta / RS!nreg), fg_Pict(6, 2))
'                    Print #1, "|"
'                    .text = ""
'
'                 End If
'
'                 RS.Close: Set RS = Nothing
'
'              End If
           
           End If
           
           totreceta = 0
           costotreceta = 0
        
        End If
    
    Next iset

.EndDoc
Close #1
fg_descarga
Preview.Show 1
End With

Exit Function
Error_FrecuenciaRecetas:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function
End Function

Function I_GramosProductos(Form As Object)

'On Local Error GoTo Error_GramosProductos

Dim RS  As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim RS1 As New ADODB.Recordset
Dim comentario As String, Fecha As String, nomdia As String, nomservicio As String, nomcat As String, nomtexto As String, nompventa As String
Dim Servicio As Long, iRow As Long, auxfecha As Long, icome As Long, icatr As Long, iset As Long, codreceta As Long, Dia As Long, ctrcat As Long, totpro As Long
Dim i As Integer, j As Integer, canserv As Integer, cancomentario As Integer, finserv As Integer, isalto As Integer, iprocesa As Integer, npage As Integer
Dim MiFecha$, mes1$, FechaM$, FechaP$, diasem%, FinDiaMes%
Dim totcat As Double, totgralcat As Double
Dim matrizgrprodmen(32) As Double
MsgTitulo = "Gramos Productos"

Preview.Refresh
With Preview.VSPrinter
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = fg_ArchivoRtf
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orLandscape
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .MarginHeader = 500
    .MarginTop = 1850
    .MarginLeft = 400
    .MarginBottom = 1000
    .MarginFooter = 500
    .MarginRight = 500
    .TableBorder = tbNone
    
    .StartDoc
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 10
    .HdrFontBold = True
    .Action = 3
    .FontSize = 10
    .IndentLeft = 0
    .IndentRight = 0
    .SpaceAfter = 0
    .TableBorder = 0
    fg_carga ""
    vg_ArchTxt = ""
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    nompventa = Form.fpayuda(2).Caption
    comentario = ""
    npage = 0
    
    For iset = 1 To Form.vaSpread1(0).MaxRows
        
        Form.vaSpread1(0).Row = iset
        Form.vaSpread1(0).Col = 1
        
        If Form.vaSpread1(0).Value = "1" Then
           
           Form.vaSpread1(0).Col = 2
           Servicio = Val(Form.vaSpread1(0).Value)
           Form.vaSpread1(0).Col = 3
           nomservicio = Trim(Form.vaSpread1(0).Value)
           If npage = 1 Then .NewPage
           npage = 1
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 2: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 3750: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftMiddle
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = Trim(Form.fpayuda(1).Caption)
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 2) = 9750: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 2) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 2) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 2) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = (Form.fpayuda(1).Caption) & " (" & (Trim(Form.fpText.text)) & ")" '& "/" & Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value & ")"
           Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1): Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & Chr(13)
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable

           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 3
           .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 13500: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftMiddle
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 1, 1) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = Trim(nompventa) & " - " & Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 2, 1) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 2, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = Meses("01" & "/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "mm") & "/" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy")) & " " & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy")
           .TableCell(tcFontSize, 3, 1) = 10: .TableCell(tcFontBold, 3, 1) = True: .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = nomservicio & " - " & Servicio
           Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & Chr(13): Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) & Chr(13): Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) & Chr(13)
           .TableBorder = tbNone
           .EndTable
           .text = Chr(13)
' *** Definir Cantidad de Servicio y Comentario *** '
           .StartTable
           .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
           .TableCell(tcRowKeepWithNext, 1) = 11
           .TableCell(tcRowIsSubHeader, 1, 1, 1, 1) = 12
           .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 450
           .TableCell(tcCols) = IIf(LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "dbgt" Or LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "pcentral_des" Or LCase(vg_SqlNSvr) = "desasql", 36, 34)
           
           For j = 1 To IIf(LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "dbgt" Or LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "pcentral_des", 36, 34)

               If j = 1 Then
                  .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 500
               ElseIf j = 2 Then
                  .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 1300
               ElseIf j >= 3 And j <= 33 Then
                  .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 400
               ElseIf j = 34 Then
                  .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 800
               ElseIf (j = 35 Or j = 36) Then
                  .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 0.05
               End If

           Next j
           
           .TableCell(tcFontSize) = 4
           .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Cód."
           .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Nombre Producto"
           .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 2) = taCenterMiddle
           .TableCell(tcText, 1, 34) = "Tot. Grs."
           .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 34) = taCenterMiddle
           
           If (LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "dbgt" Or LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "pcentral_des" Or LCase(vg_SqlNSvr) = "desasql") Then
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 35) = "Cód.Prod. Real"
              .TableCell(tcText, 1, 36) = "Nombre Prod. Real"
           End If
           
           i = 1
           For j = 3 To 33
               .TableCell(tcText, 1, j) = i
               .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, j) = taCenterMiddle
               i = i + 1
           Next j
           
           For j = 1 To 32
               matrizgrprodmen(j) = 0
           Next j
           
           Set RS = vg_db.Execute("sgp_Sel_GramosProductosMensual '" & Trim(Form.fpText.text) & "', " & Form.fpLongInteger1(1).Value & ", " & Servicio & ", '" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "yyyy") & "', '" & Format(Form.fpDateTime1.text, "mm") & "', '" & IIf(Form.Option5(0).Value = True, "1", "2") & "'")
           
           If Not RS.EOF Then
              
              .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
              codreceta = 0
              isalto = 0
              iRow = 2
              ctrcat = 0
              totcat = 0
              totgralcat = 0
              totpro = 0
              
              Do While Not RS.EOF
                 
                 If RS!Item_Cat_Anal_Code <> ctrcat Then
                    
                    If ctrcat > 0 Then
                       
                       For j = 1 To 31
                           
                           If matrizgrprodmen(j) > 0 Then
                              
                              .TableCell(tcFontSize, iRow, j + 2) = 4
                              .TableCell(tcAlign, iRow, j + 2) = taCenterMiddle
                              .TableCell(tcText, iRow, j + 2) = Format(matrizgrprodmen(j), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                              totcat = CCur(totcat + matrizgrprodmen(j))
                              totgralcat = CCur(totgralcat + matrizgrprodmen(j))
                           
                           End If
                       
                       Next j
                       
                       If matrizgrprodmen(32) > 0 Then
                          
                          .TableCell(tcFontSize, iRow, 34) = 4
                          .TableCell(tcAlign, iRow, 34) = taCenterMiddle
                          .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 34) = Format(matrizgrprodmen(j), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                       
                       End If
                       
                       For j = 1 To 32
                           
                           matrizgrprodmen(j) = 0
                        
                        Next j
                        
                        nomtexto = ""
                        
                        For i = 1 To iRow
                            
                            For j = 1 To IIf(LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "dbgtADM" Or LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "pcentral_des" Or LCase(vg_SqlNSvr) = "desasql", 36, 34)

                                nomtexto = nomtexto & Fg_Sacasaltolinea(.TableCell(tcText, i, j)) & "|"

                            Next j
                            
                            Print #1, nomtexto
                            nomtexto = ""
                        
                        Next i
                       
                       .TableBorder = tbAll
                       .EndTable
                       .text = ""
                       .text = Chr(13) & "Total Gramos " & nomcat & " : " & Format(totcat, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                       Print #1, "|"
                       Print #1, "" & "|" & "Total Gramos " & nomcat & " : " & "|" & Format(totcat, fg_Pict(6, 2))
                       Print #1, "|"
' *** Definir Cantidad de Servicio y Comentario *** '
                       .NewPage
                       .StartTable
                       .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
                       .TableCell(tcRowKeepWithNext, 1) = 11
                       .TableCell(tcRowIsSubHeader, 1, 1, 1, 1) = 12
                       .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 450
                       .TableCell(tcCols) = IIf(LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "dbgt" Or LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "pcentral_des" Or LCase(vg_SqlNSvr) = "desasql", 36, 34)
                       
                       For j = 1 To IIf(LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "dbgt" Or LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "pcentral_des", 36, 34)

                           If j = 1 Then
                              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 500
                           ElseIf j = 2 Then
                              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 1300
                           ElseIf j >= 3 And j <= 33 Then
                              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 400
                           ElseIf j = 34 Then
                              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 800
                           ElseIf (j = 35 Or j = 36) Then
                              .TableCell(tcColWidth, , j) = 0.05
                           End If

                       Next j

                       .TableCell(tcFontSize) = 4
                       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
                       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Cód."
                       .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taCenterMiddle
                       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "Nombre Producto"
                       .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 2) = taCenterMiddle
                       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 34) = "Tot. Grs."
                       .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 34) = taCenterMiddle
                       
                       If (LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "dbgt" Or LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "pcentral_des" Or LCase(vg_SqlNSvr) = "desasql") Then
                          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 35) = "Cód.Prod. Real"
                          .TableCell(tcText, 1, 36) = "Nombre Prod. Real"
                       End If
                       
                       i = 1
                       
                       For j = 3 To 33
                           
                           .TableCell(tcText, 1, j) = i
                           .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, j) = taCenterMiddle
                           i = i + 1
                       
                       Next j
                       
                       .TableCell(tcRows) = 2
                       iRow = 2
                    
                    End If
                    
                    ctrcat = RS!Item_Cat_Anal_Code
                    nomcat = Trim(RS!Anal_Code_Desc)
                    totcat = 0: isalto = 0
                 
                 End If
                 
                 If RS!Item_No <> codreceta Then
                    
                    If isalto = 1 Then
                       
                       iRow = iRow + 1
                       .TableCell(tcRows) = iRow
                       
                       For j = 1 To 31
                           
                           If matrizgrprodmen(j) > 0 Then
                              
                              .TableCell(tcFontSize, iRow - 1, j + 2) = 4
                              .TableCell(tcAlign, iRow - 1, j + 2) = taCenterMiddle
                              .TableCell(tcText, iRow - 1, j + 2) = Format(matrizgrprodmen(j), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                              totcat = CCur(totcat + matrizgrprodmen(j))
                              totgralcat = CCur(totgralcat + matrizgrprodmen(j))
                           
                           End If
                       
                       Next j
                       
                       If matrizgrprodmen(32) > 0 Then
                          
                          .TableCell(tcFontSize, iRow - 1, 34) = 4
                          .TableCell(tcAlign, iRow - 1, 34) = taCenterMiddle
                          .TableCell(tcText, iRow - 1, 34) = Format(matrizgrprodmen(j), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                       
                       End If
                       
                       For j = 1 To 32
                           
                           matrizgrprodmen(j) = 0
                        
                        Next j
                    
                    End If
                    
                    .TableCell(tcFontSize, iRow, 1) = 4
                    .TableCell(tcAlign, iRow, 1) = taCenterMiddle
                    .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 1) = Chr(13) & RS!Item_No & Chr(13) & Chr(13)
                    .TableCell(tcFontSize, iRow, 2) = 4
                    .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 2) = Chr(13) & Trim(RS!Item_Name) & Chr(13) & Chr(13)
                    
                    If (LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "dbgt" Or LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "pcentral_des" Or LCase(vg_SqlNSvr) = "desasql") Then
                       
                       .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 35) = Chr(13) & IIf(IsNull(RS!cod_prorea), "", RS!cod_prorea) & Chr(13) & Chr(13)
                       .TableCell(tcFontSize, iRow, 2) = 4
                       .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 36) = Chr(13) & IIf(IsNull(RS!nom_prorea), "", RS!nom_prorea) & Chr(13) & Chr(13)
                    
                    End If
                    
                    codreceta = RS!Item_No
                    totpro = totpro + 1
                    isalto = 1
                 
                 End If
                 matrizgrprodmen(Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2))) = CCur(matrizgrprodmen(Val(Mid(RS!Fecha_Minutas, 7, 2))) + RS!wsnumporcion)
                 matrizgrprodmen(32) = CCur(matrizgrprodmen(32) + RS!wsnumporcion)
                 
                 RS.MoveNext
              
              Loop
              RS.Close: Set RS = Nothing
              
              For j = 1 To 31
                  
                  If matrizgrprodmen(j) > 0 Then
                     
                     .TableCell(tcFontSize, iRow, j + 2) = 4
                     .TableCell(tcAlign, iRow, j + 2) = taCenterMiddle
                     .TableCell(tcText, iRow, j + 2) = Format(matrizgrprodmen(j), fg_Pict(6, 2))
                     totcat = CCur(totcat + matrizgrprodmen(j))
                     totgralcat = CCur(totgralcat + matrizgrprodmen(j))
                  
                  End If
              
              Next j
              
              If matrizgrprodmen(32) > 0 Then

'                 .TableCell(tcColSpan, irow, 34) = 3
                 .TableCell(tcFontSize, iRow, 34) = 4
                 .TableCell(tcAlign, iRow, 34) = taCenterMiddle
                 .TableCell(tcText, iRow, 34) = Format(matrizgrprodmen(j), fg_Pict(6, 2))
              
              End If
              
              For j = 1 To 32
                  
                  matrizgrprodmen(j) = 0
              
              Next j
              
              For i = 1 To iRow
                  
                  nomtexto = ""
                  For j = 1 To IIf(LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "dbgt" Or LCase(vg_SqlBase) = "pcentral_des" Or LCase(vg_SqlNSvr) = "desasql", 36, 34)
                      
                      nomtexto = nomtexto & Fg_Sacasaltolinea(.TableCell(tcText, i, j)) & "|"
                  
                  Next j
                  Print #1, nomtexto
                  nomtexto = ""
                  
              Next i
           
           End If

'        .TableCell(tcCols) = 36 '34
        .TableBorder = tbAll
        .EndTable
        .text = ""
        .text = Chr(13) & "Total Gramos " & nomcat & " : " & Format(totcat, fg_Pict(6, 2))
        .text = ""
        .text = Chr(13) & Chr(13) & "Total de Productos Listados : " & Format(totpro, fg_Pict(6, 0))
        .text = ""
        .text = Chr(13) & Chr(13) & "Total Gramos                  : " & Format(totgralcat, fg_Pict(6, 2))
        Print #1, "|"
        Print #1, "" & "|" & "Total Gramos " & nomcat & " : " & "|" & Format(totcat, fg_Pict(6, 2))
        Print #1, "|"
        Print #1, "" & "|" & "Total Productos Listados : " & "|" & Format(totpro, fg_Pict(6, 0))
        Print #1, "" & "|" & "Total Gramos             : " & "|" & Format(totgralcat, fg_Pict(6, 2))
        Print #1, "|"
        
        End If
    
    Next iset

.EndDoc
Close #1
fg_descarga
Preview.Show 1
End With

Exit Function
Error_GramosProductos:
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function

End Function

Public Function I_Etiquetado_Receta(Sql As String, sql1 As String, Ceco As String, CecoPar As String, Azucares As String, Calorias As String, Grasas As String, Sodio As String, Fecha As String, Logo As String)

Dim i As Long, X As Long, NotA As Long, AsiA As Long, CumA As Long, CerA As Long
Dim CodRec As Long, nomrec As String, NomFan As String, catdie As String, tippla As String
Dim acorec  As Variant
Dim RS1 As New ADODB.Recordset

On Local Error GoTo Error_EtiquetadoReceta

MsgTitulo = "Informe de etiquetado Recetas"

fg_carga ""

With Preview.VSPrinter
    
    .Styles.Apply "Default"
    .ExportFormat = vpxRTF
    .ExportFile = vg_reporte
    .Preview = True
    .PreviewPage = 1
    .Orientation = orPortrait
    .MarginLeft = 500
    .StartDoc
    .PageBorder = 0
    .HdrFontName = "Arial"
    .HdrFontSize = 5 '10
    .HdrFontBold = False
'    .Header = "Elaborado por SODEXO CHILE SPA||"
'    .Footer = "" & fg_ponepiepagina & "||Página : %d"
'    ExportHeaderFooter Preview.VSPrinter
    .FontSize = 5 '7
    vg_Archxls = fg_ArchivoTxt
    Open vg_Archxls For Output As #1
    LogoEmp
    Preview.Toolbar1.Buttons(1).Enabled = False
    Preview.Toolbar1.Buttons(2).Enabled = False
    
    Dim AuxReceta As Long
    Dim CaloriasAportes As Double
    Dim TotalGrasaAportes As Double
    Dim AzucaresAportes As Double
    Dim SodioAportes As Double
    
    Dim ParCodigoCalorias As Long
    Dim ParCodigoTotalGrasa As Long
    Dim ParCodigoAzucares As Long
    Dim ParCodigoSodio As Long
    
    Dim ParCaloriasAportes As Double
    Dim ParTotalGrasaAportes As Double
    Dim ParAzucaresAportes As Double
    Dim ParSodioAportes As Double
    
    Dim sPicFile$
    Dim Etiquetado As String
    Dim SaltoPagina As Boolean
    
    '-------
    '------- Ini : Traer codigo parametros nutrientes
    '-------
    ParCodigoCalorias = GetParametro("ParCaloria")
    ParCodigoTotalGrasa = GetParametro("ParGrasas")
    ParCodigoAzucares = GetParametro("ParAzucar")
    ParCodigoSodio = GetParametro("ParSodio")
    
    If ParCodigoCalorias = 0 Then
    
       fg_descarga
       MsgBox "No existe código parametro calorias, en la tabla a_param" & VgLinea & "intentelo dentro de una hora...", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    
       .EndDoc
       Close #1
       Exit Function
    
    End If
    
    
    If ParCodigoTotalGrasa < 0 Then
    
       fg_descarga
       MsgBox "No existe código parametro total grasas, en tabla a_param" & VgLinea & "intentelo dentro de una hora...", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    
       .EndDoc
       Close #1
       Exit Function
    
    End If
    
    If ParCodigoAzucares = 0 Then
    
       fg_descarga
       MsgBox "No existe código parametro azucares, en tabla a_param" & VgLinea & "intentelo dentro de una hora...", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    
       .EndDoc
       Close #1
       Exit Function
    
    End If
    
    
    If ParCodigoSodio = 0 Then
    
       fg_descarga
       MsgBox "No existe código parametro sodio, en tabla a_param" & VgLinea & "intentelo dentro de una hora...", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    
       .EndDoc
       Close #1
       Exit Function
    
    End If
    '-------
    '------- Fin : Traer codigo parametros nutrientes
    '-------
    
    
    '-------
    '------- Emitir informe etiquetado receta
    '-------
    
    If RS1.State = 1 Then RS1.Close
    RS1.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    vg_db.CursorLocation = adUseClient
    
    Set RS1 = vg_db.Execute("sgp_Sel_EtiquetadoNutricional '" & Sql & "', '" & sql1 & "', '" & Ceco & "', '" & CecoPar & "'")
    
    If RS1.EOF Then
       
       fg_descarga
       MsgBox "No esta definido el etiquetado en las recetas con el concepto (Liquido o Solido)." & VgLinea & "intentelo dentro de una hora...", vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo

       RS1.Close
       Set RS1 = Nothing
    
       .EndDoc
       Close #1
       Exit Function
       
    End If
    
    X = 0
    
    fg_carga ""
    SaltoPagina = False
    
    Do While Not RS1.EOF
       
       AuxReceta = RS1!codigoreceta
       
       CaloriasAportes = 0
       TotalGrasaAportes = 0
       AzucaresAportes = 0
       SodioAportes = 0
            
       ParCaloriasAportes = 0
       ParTotalGrasaAportes = 0
       ParAzucaresAportes = 0
       ParSodioAportes = 0
        
       sPicFile = dir_trabajo_Inf & "\Etiquetado\" & Logo
       .DrawPicture LoadPicture(sPicFile), .MarginLeft + .IndentLeft + 2000, .CurrentY - 400
           
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 11
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 2, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 2, 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 3, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 3, 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 4, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 4, 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 5, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 5, 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 6, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 6, 1) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 7, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 7, 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 8, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 8, 1) = taCenterTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 9, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 9, 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 10, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 10, 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 11, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 11, 1) = taLeftTop
    
'       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Elaborado por Sodexo Chile SPA"
       .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1) = "Dirección :" & Trim(RS1!Direccion)
       .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1) = "Resolución exenta N° " & Trim(RS1!Resolucion) & "                                            FECHA: " & Fecha
       .TableCell(tcText, 5, 1) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, 6, 1) = "Información Nutricional " & Trim(RS1!nomreceta)
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 6, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 7, 1) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, 8, 1) = "MANTENER 0°C - 4°C"
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 8, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 9, 1) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, 10, 1) = "Ingredientes : " & LCase(Mid(Trim(RS1!NomIngrediente), 2, Len(Trim(RS1!NomIngrediente))))
       .TableCell(tcText, 11, 1) = ""
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 2, 1)
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 3, 1)
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 4, 1)
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 5, 1)
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 6, 1)
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 7, 1)
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 8, 1)
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 9, 1)
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 10, 1)
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 11, 1)
       .TableBorder = tbBox
       .EndTable
                
       
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Elaborado en líneas que también procesan productos que contienen gluten, lactosa, soya y frutos secos."
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
       .TableBorder = tbBox
       .EndTable
        
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Porción                               Contenido Aprox " & RS1!CantidadServida
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
       .TableBorder = tbBox
       .EndTable
        
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Porciones por envases                   " & RS1!PorcionReceta
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
       .TableBorder = tbBox
       .EndTable
       
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcBackColor, 1) = vbYellow
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcRowHeight, 1) = 230
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = ""
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) = "100 gramos"
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3) = "1 porción"
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, 1, 3)
       .TableBorder = tbBox
       .EndTable
        
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 3: .TableCell(tcRows) = 100
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 1) = 2000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 2) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 2) = taRightTop
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, , 3) = 1000: .TableCell(tcAlign, , 3) = taRightTop
             
       Do While Not RS1.EOF And AuxReceta = RS1!codigoreceta
       
          DoEvents

          'Rescatar Aportes calorias - azucares - grasas - sodio
          If RS1!codnut = ParCodigoCalorias Then
            
             CaloriasAportes = RS1!porcion 'RS1!candiet
               
          ElseIf RS1!codnut = ParCodigoAzucares Then
            
             AzucaresAportes = RS1!porcion 'RS1!candiet
               
          ElseIf RS1!codnut = ParCodigoTotalGrasa Then
            
             TotalGrasaAportes = RS1!porcion 'RS1!candiet
               
          ElseIf RS1!codnut = ParCodigoSodio Then
            
             SodioAportes = RS1!porcion 'RS1!candiet
               
          End If
          
          X = X + 1
          .TableCell(tcText, X, 1) = RS1!NomNut
          .TableCell(tcText, X, 2) = RS1!porcion
          .TableCell(tcText, X, 3) = RS1!candiet
          Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, X, 1) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, X, 2) & "|" & .TableCell(tcText, X, 3)
       
          ParCaloriasAportes = RS1!par_calorias
          ParTotalGrasaAportes = RS1!par_grasas
          ParAzucaresAportes = RS1!par_azucares
          ParSodioAportes = RS1!par_sodio
          
          RS1.MoveNext
          If RS1.EOF Then Exit Do
          
       Loop
       
       SaltoPagina = False
                            
 '      .PenColor = &HC0C0C0
       .TableBorder = tbAll
       .TableCell(tcRows) = X
       .EndTable
                 
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftTop
'       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Fecha duración de producto, 12 Días desde fecha indicada"
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
       .TableBorder = tbBox
       .EndTable
                 
       .StartTable
       .TableCell(tcCols) = 1: .TableCell(tcRows) = 1
       .TableCell(tcColWidth, 1, 1) = 4000: .TableCell(tcAlign, 1, 1) = taLeftTop
       .TableCell(tcFontBold, 1) = True
       .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1) = "Mantener refrigerado entre 0 y 5 °C. Una vez abierto consumir, mantener refrigerado ente 0 a 5°C y consumir máx dentro de 24 hrs."
       Print #1, .TableCell(tcText, 1, 1)
       .TableBorder = tbBox
       .EndTable
        
        Etiquetado = ""
                          
        If CaloriasAportes >= ParCaloriasAportes And ParCaloriasAportes > 0 Then
                
           .NewPage
           SaltoPagina = True
                
           sPicFile = dir_trabajo_Inf & "\Etiquetado\" & Calorias
           .DrawPicture LoadPicture(sPicFile), .MarginLeft + .IndentLeft, .CurrentY '+ 200
             
           Etiquetado = "1"
                
        End If
             
        If AzucaresAportes >= ParAzucaresAportes And ParAzucaresAportes > 0 And Etiquetado = "" Then
        
           If SaltoPagina = False Then
        
              .NewPage
           
           End If
        
           SaltoPagina = True
        
           sPicFile = dir_trabajo_Inf & "\Etiquetado\" & Azucares
           .DrawPicture LoadPicture(sPicFile), .MarginLeft + .IndentLeft, .CurrentY '+ 200
     
           Etiquetado = "1"
        
        ElseIf AzucaresAportes >= ParAzucaresAportes And ParAzucaresAportes > 0 And Etiquetado = "1" Then
     
           If SaltoPagina = False Then
        
              .NewPage
           
           End If
        
           SaltoPagina = True
        
           sPicFile = dir_trabajo_Inf & "\Etiquetado\" & Azucares
           .DrawPicture LoadPicture(sPicFile), .MarginLeft + .IndentLeft + 2500, .CurrentY '+ 200
        
           Etiquetado = "2"
        
        End If
     
        If TotalGrasaAportes >= ParTotalGrasaAportes And ParTotalGrasaAportes > 0 And Etiquetado = "" Then
        
           If SaltoPagina = False Then
        
              .NewPage
           
           End If
        
           SaltoPagina = True
        
           sPicFile = dir_trabajo_Inf & "\Etiquetado\" & Grasas
           .DrawPicture LoadPicture(sPicFile), .MarginLeft + .IndentLeft, .CurrentY '+ 200
     
           Etiquetado = "1"
        
        ElseIf TotalGrasaAportes >= ParTotalGrasaAportes And ParTotalGrasaAportes > 0 And Etiquetado = "1" Then
     
           If SaltoPagina = False Then
        
              .NewPage
           
           End If
        
           SaltoPagina = True
        
           sPicFile = dir_trabajo_Inf & "\Etiquetado\" & Grasas
           .DrawPicture LoadPicture(sPicFile), .MarginLeft + .IndentLeft + 2500, .CurrentY '+ 200
        
           Etiquetado = "2"
        
        ElseIf TotalGrasaAportes >= ParTotalGrasaAportes And ParTotalGrasaAportes > 0 And Etiquetado = "2" Then
     
           If SaltoPagina = False Then
        
              .NewPage
           
           End If
        
           SaltoPagina = True
        
           sPicFile = dir_trabajo_Inf & "\Etiquetado\" & Grasas
           .DrawPicture LoadPicture(sPicFile), .MarginLeft + .IndentLeft, .CurrentY + 2500
        
           Etiquetado = "3"
        
        End If
     
        If SodioAportes >= ParSodioAportes And ParSodioAportes > 0 And Etiquetado = "" Then
        
           If SaltoPagina = False Then
        
              .NewPage
           
           End If
        
           SaltoPagina = True
        
           sPicFile = dir_trabajo_Inf & "\Etiquetado\" & Sodio
           .DrawPicture LoadPicture(sPicFile), .MarginLeft + .IndentLeft, .CurrentY '+ 200
     
           Etiquetado = "1"
        
        ElseIf SodioAportes >= ParSodioAportes And ParSodioAportes > 0 And Etiquetado = "1" Then
     
           If SaltoPagina = False Then
        
              .NewPage
           
           End If
        
           SaltoPagina = True
        
           sPicFile = dir_trabajo_Inf & "\Etiquetado\" & Sodio
           .DrawPicture LoadPicture(sPicFile), .MarginLeft + .IndentLeft + 2500, .CurrentY '+ 200
        
           Etiquetado = "2"
        
        ElseIf SodioAportes >= ParSodioAportes And ParSodioAportes > 0 And Etiquetado = "2" Then
     
           If SaltoPagina = False Then
        
              .NewPage
           
           End If
        
           SaltoPagina = True
        
           sPicFile = dir_trabajo_Inf & "\Etiquetado\" & Sodio
           .DrawPicture LoadPicture(sPicFile), .MarginLeft + .IndentLeft, .CurrentY + 2500
        
           Etiquetado = "3"
        
        ElseIf SodioAportes >= ParSodioAportes And ParSodioAportes > 0 And Etiquetado = "3" Then
     
           If SaltoPagina = False Then
        
              .NewPage
           
           End If
        
           SaltoPagina = True
        
           sPicFile = dir_trabajo_Inf & "\Etiquetado\" & Sodio
           .DrawPicture LoadPicture(sPicFile), .MarginLeft + .IndentLeft + 2500, .CurrentY + 2500
        
           Etiquetado = "3"
        
        End If

       If Not RS1.EOF Then .NewPage
    
       CaloriasAportes = 0
       TotalGrasaAportes = 0
       AzucaresAportes = 0
       SodioAportes = 0
    
       ParCaloriasAportes = 0
       ParTotalGrasaAportes = 0
       ParAzucaresAportes = 0
       ParSodioAportes = 0
    
       X = 0
                        
    Loop
    RS1.Close
    Set RS1 = Nothing
    
    .EndDoc
    Close #1
    
End With
Preview.Show 1
fg_descarga

Exit Function

Error_EtiquetadoReceta:
    
    fg_descarga
    MsgBox Err.Number & " " & Err.Description, vbExclamation + vbOKOnly, MsgTitulo
    Close #1
    Exit Function

End Function
